authors_text: Chenyu Yi,Siyuan Yang,Yufei Wang,Haoliang Li,Yap-Peng Tan,Alex C. Kot
title: Temporal Coherent Test-Time Optimization for Robust Video Classification
title_zh: 鲁棒视频分类的时间相干测试时间优化
abstract: Deep neural networks are likely to fail when the test data is corrupted in real-world deployment (e.g., blur, weather, etc.). Test-time optimization is an effective way that adapts models to generalize to corrupted data during testing, which has been shown in the image domain. However, the techniques for improving video classification corruption robustness remain few. In this work, we propose a Temporal Coherent Test-time Optimization framework (TeCo) to utilize spatio-temporal information in test-time optimization for robust video classification. To exploit information in video with self-supervised learning, TeCo uses global content from video clips and optimizes models for entropy minimization. TeCo minimizes the entropy of the prediction based on the global content from video clips. Meanwhile, it also feeds local content to regularize the temporal coherence at the feature level. TeCo retains the generalization ability of various video classification models and achieves significant improvements in corruption robustness across Mini Kinetics-C and Mini SSV2-C. Furthermore, TeCo sets a new baseline in video classification corruption robustness via test-time optimization.
summary: Deep neural networks are likely to fail when the test data is corrupted in real-world deployment (e.g., blur, weather, etc.). Test-time optimization is an effective way that adapts models to generalize to corrupted data during testing, which has been shown in the image domain. However, the techniques for improving video classification corruption robustness remain few. In this work, we propose a Temporal Coherent Test-time Optimization framework (TeCo) to utilize spatio-temporal information in test-time optimization for robust video classification. To exploit information in video with self-supervised learning, TeCo uses global content from video clips and optimizes models for entropy minimization. TeCo minimizes the entropy of the prediction based on the global content from video clips. Meanwhile, it also feeds local content to regularize the temporal coherence at the feature level. TeCo retains the generalization ability of various video classification models and achieves significant improvements in corruption robustness across Mini Kinetics-C and Mini SSV2-C. Furthermore, TeCo sets a new baseline in video classification corruption robustness via test-time optimization.
abstract_zh: 当测试数据在现实世界部署中被损坏（例如模糊、天气等）时，深度神经网络可能会失败。测试时优化是一种有效的方法，可以使模型在测试过程中泛化到损坏的数据，这已经在图像领域得到了证明。然而，提高视频分类损坏鲁棒性的技术仍然很少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种时间相干测试时间优化框架（TeCo），以在测试时间优化中利用时空信息来实现稳健的视频分类。为了通过自监督学习来利用视频中的信息，TeCo 使用视频剪辑中的全局内容并优化模型以实现熵最小化。 TeCo 根据视频剪辑的全局内容最小化预测的熵。同时，它还提供本地内容以规范特征级别的时间一致性。 TeCo 保留了各种视频分类模型的泛化能力，并在 Mini Kinetics-C 和 Mini SSV2-C 上实现了腐败鲁棒性的显着改进。此外，TeCo 通过测试时优化为视频分类损坏鲁棒性设定了新的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TeCo的时序一致测试时优化框架，旨在通过利用视频的时空信息提升视频分类在受干扰数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管测试时优化在图像领域已被证明有效，但针对视频分类的抗干扰方法研究较少，而视频数据的时序特性未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: TeCo结合自监督学习，通过视频片段的全局内容进行熵最小化优化，同时利用局部内容在特征层面正则化时序一致性。
AI.result: 在Mini Kinetics-C和Mini SSV2-C数据集上，TeCo显著提升了模型在受干扰场景下的分类性能，并建立了新的基准。
AI.conclusion: TeCo通过时序一致性约束有效增强了视频分类的鲁棒性，为测试时优化在视频领域的发展提供了新方向。

authors_text: Kangyang Luo,Xiang Li,Yunshi Lan,Ming Gao
title: GradMA: A Gradient-Memory-based Accelerated Federated Learning with Alleviated Catastrophic Forgetting
title_zh: GrandMA：一种基于梯度记忆的加速联邦学习，可减轻灾难性遗忘
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a de facto machine learning area and received rapid increasing research interests from the community. However, catastrophic forgetting caused by data heterogeneity and partial participation poses distinctive challenges for FL, which are detrimental to the performance. To tackle the problems, we propose a new FL approach (namely GradMA), which takes inspiration from continual learning to simultaneously correct the server-side and worker-side update directions as well as take full advantage of server's rich computing and memory resources. Furthermore, we elaborate a memory reduction strategy to enable GradMA to accommodate FL with a large scale of workers. We then analyze convergence of GradMA theoretically under the smooth non-convex setting and show that its convergence rate achieves a linear speed up w.r.t the increasing number of sampled active workers. At last, our extensive experiments on various image classification tasks show that GradMA achieves significant performance gains in accuracy and communication efficiency compared to SOTA baselines.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a de facto machine learning area and received rapid increasing research interests from the community. However, catastrophic forgetting caused by data heterogeneity and partial participation poses distinctive challenges for FL, which are detrimental to the performance. To tackle the problems, we propose a new FL approach (namely GradMA), which takes inspiration from continual learning to simultaneously correct the server-side and worker-side update directions as well as take full advantage of server's rich computing and memory resources. Furthermore, we elaborate a memory reduction strategy to enable GradMA to accommodate FL with a large scale of workers. We then analyze convergence of GradMA theoretically under the smooth non-convex setting and show that its convergence rate achieves a linear speed up w.r.t the increasing number of sampled active workers. At last, our extensive experiments on various image classification tasks show that GradMA achieves significant performance gains in accuracy and communication efficiency compared to SOTA baselines.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）已成为事实上的机器学习领域，并受到社区快速增长的研究兴趣。然而，数据异质性和部分参与引起的灾难性遗忘给FL带来了独特的挑战，这不利于性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 FL 方法（即 GradMA），它从持续学习中汲取灵感，同时纠正服务器端和工作端的更新方向，并充分利用服务器丰富的计算和内存资源。此外，我们还制定了一种内存减少策略，使 GradMA 能够适应具有大量工作人员的 FL。然后，我们从理论上分析了平滑非凸设置下 GradMA 的收敛性，并表明其收敛速度随着样本活跃工作人员数量的增加而实现线性加速。最后，我们对各种图像分类任务的广泛实验表明，与 SOTA 基线相比，GradMA 在准确性和通信效率方面取得了显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度-记忆的加速联邦学习方法GradMA，以缓解灾难性遗忘问题，提升联邦学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中由于数据异质性和部分参与导致的灾难性遗忘问题严重影响模型性能，现有方法难以有效解决这一挑战。
AI.method: GradMA方法结合持续学习思想，通过修正服务器和客户端的更新方向，并利用服务器的计算与内存资源，同时引入内存缩减策略以适应大规模工人节点。
AI.result: 理论分析证明GradMA在平滑非凸设置下收敛速率线性加速，实验表明其在多个图像分类任务中准确性和通信效率优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GradMA有效缓解了联邦学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，同时提升了收敛速度和通信效率，为大规模联邦学习提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Srikanth Malla,Yi-Ting Chen
title: CLR-GAM: Contrastive Point Cloud Learning with Guided Augmentation and Feature Mapping
title_zh: CLR-GAM：具有引导增强和特征映射的对比点云学习
abstract: Point cloud data plays an essential role in robotics and self-driving applications. Yet, annotating point cloud data is time-consuming and nontrivial while they enable learning discriminative 3D representations that empower downstream tasks, such as classification and segmentation. Recently, contrastive learning-based frameworks have shown promising results for learning 3D representations in a self-supervised manner. However, existing contrastive learning methods cannot precisely encode and associate structural features and search the higher dimensional augmentation space efficiently. In this paper, we present CLR-GAM, a novel contrastive learning-based framework with Guided Augmentation (GA) for efficient dynamic exploration strategy and Guided Feature Mapping (GFM) for similar structural feature association between augmented point clouds. We empirically demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on both simulated and real-world 3D point cloud datasets for three different downstream tasks, i.e., 3D point cloud classification, few-shot learning, and object part segmentation.
summary: Point cloud data plays an essential role in robotics and self-driving applications. Yet, annotating point cloud data is time-consuming and nontrivial while they enable learning discriminative 3D representations that empower downstream tasks, such as classification and segmentation. Recently, contrastive learning-based frameworks have shown promising results for learning 3D representations in a self-supervised manner. However, existing contrastive learning methods cannot precisely encode and associate structural features and search the higher dimensional augmentation space efficiently. In this paper, we present CLR-GAM, a novel contrastive learning-based framework with Guided Augmentation (GA) for efficient dynamic exploration strategy and Guided Feature Mapping (GFM) for similar structural feature association between augmented point clouds. We empirically demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on both simulated and real-world 3D point cloud datasets for three different downstream tasks, i.e., 3D point cloud classification, few-shot learning, and object part segmentation.
abstract_zh: 点云数据在机器人和自动驾驶应用中发挥着重要作用。然而，注释点云数据既耗时又重要，同时它们可以学习有区别的 3D 表示，从而支持下游任务，例如分类和分割。最近，基于对比学习的框架在以自我监督的方式学习 3D 表示方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，现有的对比学习方法无法精确地编码和关联结构特征并有效地搜索更高维的增强空间。在本文中，我们提出了 CLR-GAM，这是一种基于对比学习的新颖框架，具有用于高效动态探索策略的引导增强（GA）和用于增强点云之间相似结构特征关联的引导特征映射（GFM）。我们凭经验证明，所提出的方法在模拟和真实 3D 点云数据集上针对三种不同的下游任务（即 3D 点云分类、少样本学习和对象部分分割）实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLR-GAM框架，通过引导增强和特征映射技术，提升点云数据的自监督学习效果，以改进3D表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法难以高效编码结构特征并探索高维增强空间，而点云数据的标注成本高且对下游任务（如分类、分割）至关重要。
AI.method: CLR-GAM包含两个核心模块：引导增强（GA）用于动态探索增强策略，引导特征映射（GFM）用于关联增强点云间的相似结构特征。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界点云数据集上，CLR-GAM在3D分类、少样本学习和物体部件分割三项下游任务中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: CLR-GAM通过结构化特征关联与高效增强策略，显著提升了点云的自监督表示学习能力，为机器人和自动驾驶应用提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CLR-GAM框架，通过引导增强和特征映射技术，提升点云数据的自监督学习效果，以改进3D表示学习。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对比学习方法难以高效编码结构特征并探索高维增强空间，而点云数据的标注成本高且对下游任务（如分类、分割）至关重要。
ai_content.method: CLR-GAM包含两个核心模块：引导增强（GA）用于动态探索增强策略，引导特征映射（GFM）用于关联增强点云间的相似结构特征。

ai_content.conclusion: CLR-GAM通过结构化特征关联与高效增强策略，显著提升了点云的自监督表示学习能力，为机器人和自动驾驶应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: CLR-GAM: Contrastive Point Cloud Learning with Guided Augmentation and Feature Mapping CLR-GAM：具有引导增强和特征映射的对比点云学习 Point cloud data plays an essential role in robotics and self-driving applications. Yet, annotating point cloud data is time-consuming and nontrivial while they enable learning discriminative 3D representations that empower downstream tasks, such as classification and segmentation. Recently, contrastive learning-based frameworks have shown promising results for learning 3D representations in a self-supervised manner. However, existing contrastive learning methods cannot precisely encode and associate structural features and search the higher dimensional augmentation space efficiently. In this paper, we present CLR-GAM, a novel contrastive learning-based framework with Guided Augmentation (GA) for efficient dynamic exploration strategy and Guided Feature Mapping (GFM) for similar structural feature association between augmented point clouds. We empirically demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on both simulated and real-world 3D point cloud datasets for three different downstream tasks, i.e., 3D point cloud classification, few-shot learning, and object part segmentation. 点云数据在机器人和自动驾驶应用中发挥着重要作用。然而，注释点云数据既耗时又重要，同时它们可以学习有区别的 3D 表示，从而支持下游任务，例如分类和分割。最近，基于对比学习的框架在以自我监督的方式学习 3D 表示方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，现有的对比学习方法无法精确地编码和关联结构特征并有效地搜索更高维的增强空间。在本文中，我们提出了 CLR-GAM，这是一种基于对比学习的新颖框架，具有用于高效动态探索策略的引导增强（GA）和用于增强点云之间相似结构特征关联的引导特征映射（GFM）。我们凭经验证明，所提出的方法在模拟和真实 3D 点云数据集上针对三种不同的下游任务（即 3D 点云分类、少样本学习和对象部分分割）实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出CLR-GAM框架，通过引导增强和特征映射技术，提升点云数据的自监督学习效果，以改进3D表示学习。 Srikanth Malla,Yi-Ting Chen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chang Liu,Wenzhao Xiang,Yuan He,Hui Xue,Shibao Zheng,Hang Su
title: Improving Model Generalization by On-manifold Adversarial Augmentation in the Frequency Domain
title_zh: 通过频域中的流形对抗性增强来提高模型泛化能力
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) may suffer from significantly degenerated performance when the training and test data are of different underlying distributions. Despite the importance of model generalization to out-of-distribution (OOD) data, the accuracy of state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on OOD data can plummet. Recent work has demonstrated that regular or off-manifold adversarial examples, as a special case of data augmentation, can be used to improve OOD generalization. Inspired by this, we theoretically prove that on-manifold adversarial examples can better benefit OOD generalization. Nevertheless, it is nontrivial to generate on-manifold adversarial examples because the real manifold is generally complex. To address this issue, we proposed a novel method of Augmenting data with Adversarial examples via a Wavelet module (AdvWavAug), an on-manifold adversarial data augmentation technique that is simple to implement. In particular, we project a benign image into a wavelet domain. With the assistance of the sparsity characteristic of wavelet transformation, we can modify an image on the estimated data manifold. We conduct adversarial augmentation based on AdvProp training framework. Extensive experiments on different models and different datasets, including ImageNet and its distorted versions, demonstrate that our method can improve model generalization, especially on OOD data. By integrating AdvWavAug into the training process, we have achieved SOTA results on some recent transformer-based models.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) may suffer from significantly degenerated performance when the training and test data are of different underlying distributions. Despite the importance of model generalization to out-of-distribution (OOD) data, the accuracy of state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on OOD data can plummet. Recent work has demonstrated that regular or off-manifold adversarial examples, as a special case of data augmentation, can be used to improve OOD generalization. Inspired by this, we theoretically prove that on-manifold adversarial examples can better benefit OOD generalization. Nevertheless, it is nontrivial to generate on-manifold adversarial examples because the real manifold is generally complex. To address this issue, we proposed a novel method of Augmenting data with Adversarial examples via a Wavelet module (AdvWavAug), an on-manifold adversarial data augmentation technique that is simple to implement. In particular, we project a benign image into a wavelet domain. With the assistance of the sparsity characteristic of wavelet transformation, we can modify an image on the estimated data manifold. We conduct adversarial augmentation based on AdvProp training framework. Extensive experiments on different models and different datasets, including ImageNet and its distorted versions, demonstrate that our method can improve model generalization, especially on OOD data. By integrating AdvWavAug into the training process, we have achieved SOTA results on some recent transformer-based models.
abstract_zh: 当训练数据和测试数据具有不同的底层分布时，深度神经网络 (DNN) 的性能可能会显着下降。尽管模型泛化对于分布外 (OOD) 数据很重要，但 OOD 数据上最先进 (SOTA) 模型的准确性可能会直线下降。最近的工作表明，常规或非流形对抗性示例作为数据增强的特殊情况，可用于改进 OOD 泛化。受此启发，我们从理论上证明了流形对抗性示例可以更好地有利于 OOD 泛化。然而，生成流形上的对抗性例子并不简单，因为真实的流形通常很复杂。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通过小波模块（AdvWavAug）使用对抗性示例增强数据的新方法，这是一种易于实现的流形对抗性数据增强技术。特别是，我们将良性图像投影到小波域中。借助小波变换的稀疏特性，我们可以在估计的数据流形上修改图像。我们基于 AdvProp 训练框架进行对抗性增强。对不同模型和不同数据集（包括 ImageNet 及其扭曲版本）的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以提高模型泛化能力，特别是在 OOD 数据上。通过将 AdvWavAug 集成到训练过程中，我们在一些最近基于 Transformer 的模型上取得了 SOTA 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频域的对抗性数据增强方法AdvWavAug，通过在波let域生成流形内对抗样本提升模型对分布外数据的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在训练数据与测试数据分布不一致时表现显著下降，现有对抗样本生成方法难以有效生成符合真实数据流形的对抗样本。
AI.method: 设计AdvWavAug方法，利用波let变换的稀疏性特性，在频域中估计数据流形并生成流形内对抗样本，结合AdvProp训练框架实现数据增强。
AI.result: 在ImageNet及其变种数据集上验证，该方法显著提升多种模型（尤其是Transformer）在分布外数据上的性能，达到SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: AdvWavAug通过频域流形内对抗增强有效提升模型泛化能力，为分布外鲁棒性研究提供简单可行的新方法。

authors_text: Chang Liu,Yinpeng Dong,Wenzhao Xiang,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Jun Zhu,Yuefeng Chen,Yuan He,Hui Xue,Shibao Zheng
title: A Comprehensive Study on Robustness of Image Classification Models: Benchmarking and Rethinking
title_zh: 图像分类模型鲁棒性的综合研究：基准测试和反思
comment: International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV) [under review]
comments: International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV) [under review]
abstract: The robustness of deep neural networks is usually lacking under adversarial examples, common corruptions, and distribution shifts, which becomes an important research problem in the development of deep learning. Although new deep learning methods and robustness improvement techniques have been constantly proposed, the robustness evaluations of existing methods are often inadequate due to their rapid development, diverse noise patterns, and simple evaluation metrics. Without thorough robustness evaluations, it is hard to understand the advances in the field and identify the effective methods. In this paper, we establish a comprehensive robustness benchmark called \textbf{ARES-Bench} on the image classification task. In our benchmark, we evaluate the robustness of 55 typical deep learning models on ImageNet with diverse architectures (e.g., CNNs, Transformers) and learning algorithms (e.g., normal supervised training, pre-training, adversarial training) under numerous adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets. Using robustness curves as the major evaluation criteria, we conduct large-scale experiments and draw several important findings, including: 1) there is an inherent trade-off between adversarial and natural robustness for the same model architecture; 2) adversarial training effectively improves adversarial robustness, especially when performed on Transformer architectures; 3) pre-training significantly improves natural robustness based on more training data or self-supervised learning. Based on ARES-Bench, we further analyze the training tricks in large-scale adversarial training on ImageNet. By designing the training settings accordingly, we achieve the new state-of-the-art adversarial robustness. We have made the benchmarking results and code platform publicly available.
summary: The robustness of deep neural networks is usually lacking under adversarial examples, common corruptions, and distribution shifts, which becomes an important research problem in the development of deep learning. Although new deep learning methods and robustness improvement techniques have been constantly proposed, the robustness evaluations of existing methods are often inadequate due to their rapid development, diverse noise patterns, and simple evaluation metrics. Without thorough robustness evaluations, it is hard to understand the advances in the field and identify the effective methods. In this paper, we establish a comprehensive robustness benchmark called \textbf{ARES-Bench} on the image classification task. In our benchmark, we evaluate the robustness of 55 typical deep learning models on ImageNet with diverse architectures (e.g., CNNs, Transformers) and learning algorithms (e.g., normal supervised training, pre-training, adversarial training) under numerous adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets. Using robustness curves as the major evaluation criteria, we conduct large-scale experiments and draw several important findings, including: 1) there is an inherent trade-off between adversarial and natural robustness for the same model architecture; 2) adversarial training effectively improves adversarial robustness, especially when performed on Transformer architectures; 3) pre-training significantly improves natural robustness based on more training data or self-supervised learning. Based on ARES-Bench, we further analyze the training tricks in large-scale adversarial training on ImageNet. By designing the training settings accordingly, we achieve the new state-of-the-art adversarial robustness. We have made the benchmarking results and code platform publicly available.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在对抗性样本、常见腐败和分布偏移等情况下通常缺乏鲁棒性，这成为深度学习发展中的一个重要研究问题。尽管新的深度学习方法和鲁棒性改进技术不断被提出，但由于现有方法的快速发展、噪声模式多样和评估指标简单，鲁棒性评估往往不足。如果没有彻底的稳健性评估，就很难了解该领域的进展并确定有效的方法。在本文中，我们在图像分类任务上建立了一个名为 \textbf{ARES-Bench} 的综合鲁棒性基准。在我们的基准测试中，我们评估了 ImageNet 上具有不同架构（例如 CNN、Transformers）和学习算法（例如正常监督训练、预训练、对抗训练）的 55 个典型深度学习模型在大量对抗性攻击和分布外（OOD）数据集下的鲁棒性。使用鲁棒性曲线作为主要评估标准，我们进行了大规模实验并得出了几个重要发现，包括：1）对于相同的模型架构，对抗性鲁棒性和自然鲁棒性之间存在固有的权衡； 2）对抗训练有效提高对抗鲁棒性，特别是在 Transformer 架构上进行时； 3）预训练基于更多的训练数据或自我监督学习，显着提高了自然鲁棒性。基于ARES-Bench，我们进一步分析了ImageNet上大规模对抗训练的训练技巧。通过相应地设计训练设置，我们实现了新的最先进的对抗鲁棒性。我们已经公开了基准测试结果和代码平台。

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个名为ARES-Bench的综合鲁棒性基准，评估了55种图像分类模型在对抗攻击和分布外数据下的鲁棒性，并分析了训练方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法的鲁棒性评估不足，缺乏全面的基准测试，难以衡量领域进展并识别有效方法。
AI.method: 构建ARES-Bench基准，涵盖多种模型架构和训练算法，在ImageNet上进行大规模实验，使用鲁棒性曲线作为主要评估指标，并分析对抗训练和预训练策略。
AI.result: 发现对抗鲁棒性与自然鲁棒性存在权衡关系，对抗训练对Transformer架构效果显著，预训练通过更多数据或自监督学习提升自然鲁棒性，并实现了新的对抗鲁棒性SOTA。
AI.conclusion: ARES-Bench为鲁棒性研究提供了系统性分析框架，揭示了关键训练策略的有效性，推动了图像分类模型的鲁棒性发展。

ai_content_json.method: 构建ARES-Bench基准，涵盖多种模型架构和训练算法，在ImageNet上进行大规模实验，使用鲁棒性曲线作为主要评估指标，并分析对抗训练和预训练策略。
ai_content_json.result: 发现对抗鲁棒性与自然鲁棒性存在权衡关系，对抗训练对Transformer架构效果显著，预训练通过更多数据或自监督学习提升自然鲁棒性，并实现了新的对抗鲁棒性SOTA。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ARES-Bench为鲁棒性研究提供了系统性分析框架，揭示了关键训练策略的有效性，推动了图像分类模型的鲁棒性发展。

tldr: 本文建立了一个名为ARES-Bench的综合鲁棒性基准，评估了55种图像分类模型在对抗攻击和分布外数据下的鲁棒性，并分析了训练方法的有效性。

method: 构建ARES-Bench基准，涵盖多种模型架构和训练算法，在ImageNet上进行大规模实验，使用鲁棒性曲线作为主要评估指标，并分析对抗训练和预训练策略。
result: 发现对抗鲁棒性与自然鲁棒性存在权衡关系，对抗训练对Transformer架构效果显著，预训练通过更多数据或自监督学习提升自然鲁棒性，并实现了新的对抗鲁棒性SOTA。
conclusion: ARES-Bench为鲁棒性研究提供了系统性分析框架，揭示了关键训练策略的有效性，推动了图像分类模型的鲁棒性发展。
search_text: A Comprehensive Study on Robustness of Image Classification Models: Benchmarking and Rethinking 图像分类模型鲁棒性的综合研究：基准测试和反思 The robustness of deep neural networks is usually lacking under adversarial examples, common corruptions, and distribution shifts, which becomes an important research problem in the development of deep learning. Although new deep learning methods and robustness improvement techniques have been constantly proposed, the robustness evaluations of existing methods are often inadequate due to their rapid development, diverse noise patterns, and simple evaluation metrics. Without thorough robustness evaluations, it is hard to understand the advances in the field and identify the effective methods. In this paper, we establish a comprehensive robustness benchmark called \textbf{ARES-Bench} on the image classification task. In our benchmark, we evaluate the robustness of 55 typical deep learning models on ImageNet with diverse architectures (e.g., CNNs, Transformers) and learning algorithms (e.g., normal supervised training, pre-training, adversarial training) under numerous adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets. Using robustness curves as the major evaluation criteria, we conduct large-scale experiments and draw several important findings, including: 1) there is an inherent trade-off between adversarial and natural robustness for the same model architecture; 2) adversarial training effectively improves adversarial robustness, especially when performed on Transformer architectures; 3) pre-training significantly improves natural robustness based on more training data or self-supervised learning. Based on ARES-Bench, we further analyze the training tricks in large-scale adversarial training on ImageNet. By designing the training settings accordingly, we achieve the new state-of-the-art adversarial robustness. We have made the benchmarking results and code platform publicly available. 深度神经网络在对抗性样本、常见腐败和分布偏移等情况下通常缺乏鲁棒性，这成为深度学习发展中的一个重要研究问题。尽管新的深度学习方法和鲁棒性改进技术不断被提出，但由于现有方法的快速发展、噪声模式多样和评估指标简单，鲁棒性评估往往不足。如果没有彻底的稳健性评估，就很难了解该领域的进展并确定有效的方法。在本文中，我们在图像分类任务上建立了一个名为 \textbf{ARES-Bench} 的综合鲁棒性基准。在我们的基准测试中，我们评估了 ImageNet 上具有不同架构（例如 CNN、Transformers）和学习算法（例如正常监督训练、预训练、对抗训练）的 55 个典型深度学习模型在大量对抗性攻击和分布外（OOD）数据集下的鲁棒性。使用鲁棒性曲线作为主要评估标准，我们进行了大规模实验并得出了几个重要发现，包括：1）对于相同的模型架构，对抗性鲁棒性和自然鲁棒性之间存在固有的权衡； 2）对抗训练有效提高对抗鲁棒性，特别是在 Transformer 架构上进行时； 3）预训练基于更多的训练数据或自我监督学习，显着提高了自然鲁棒性。基于ARES-Bench，我们进一步分析了ImageNet上大规模对抗训练的训练技巧。通过相应地设计训练设置，我们实现了新的最先进的对抗鲁棒性。我们已经公开了基准测试结果和代码平台。 本文建立了一个名为ARES-Bench的综合鲁棒性基准，评估了55种图像分类模型在对抗攻击和分布外数据下的鲁棒性，并分析了训练方法的有效性。 Chang Liu,Yinpeng Dong,Wenzhao Xiang,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Jun Zhu,Yuefeng Chen,Yuan He,Hui Xue,Shibao Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Andrea Treviño Gavito,Diego Klabjan,Jean Utke
title: Gradient-Boosted Based Structured and Unstructured Learning
title_zh: 基于梯度提升的结构化和非结构化学习
abstract: We propose two frameworks to deal with problem settings in which both structured and unstructured data are available. Structured data problems are best solved by traditional machine learning models such as boosting and tree-based algorithms, whereas deep learning has been widely applied to problems dealing with images, text, audio, and other unstructured data sources. However, for the setting in which both structured and unstructured data are accessible, it is not obvious what the best modeling approach is to enhance performance on both data sources simultaneously. Our proposed frameworks allow joint learning on both kinds of data by integrating the paradigms of boosting models and deep neural networks. The first framework, the boosted-feature-vector deep learning network, learns features from the structured data using gradient boosting and combines them with embeddings from unstructured data via a two-branch deep neural network. Secondly, the two-weak-learner boosting framework extends the boosting paradigm to the setting with two input data sources. We present and compare first- and second-order methods of this framework. Our experimental results on both public and real-world datasets show performance gains achieved by the frameworks over selected baselines by magnitudes of 0.1% - 4.7%.
summary: We propose two frameworks to deal with problem settings in which both structured and unstructured data are available. Structured data problems are best solved by traditional machine learning models such as boosting and tree-based algorithms, whereas deep learning has been widely applied to problems dealing with images, text, audio, and other unstructured data sources. However, for the setting in which both structured and unstructured data are accessible, it is not obvious what the best modeling approach is to enhance performance on both data sources simultaneously. Our proposed frameworks allow joint learning on both kinds of data by integrating the paradigms of boosting models and deep neural networks. The first framework, the boosted-feature-vector deep learning network, learns features from the structured data using gradient boosting and combines them with embeddings from unstructured data via a two-branch deep neural network. Secondly, the two-weak-learner boosting framework extends the boosting paradigm to the setting with two input data sources. We present and compare first- and second-order methods of this framework. Our experimental results on both public and real-world datasets show performance gains achieved by the frameworks over selected baselines by magnitudes of 0.1% - 4.7%.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了两个框架来处理问题设置，其中结构化和非结构化数据都可用。结构化数据问题最好通过传统的机器学习模型（例如boosting和基于树的算法）来解决，而深度学习已广泛应用于处理图像、文本、音频和其他非结构化数据源的问题。然而，对于可访问结构化和非结构化数据的设置，同时增强两个数据源性能的最佳建模方法并不明显。我们提出的框架允许通过集成增强模型和深度神经网络的范例来对两种数据进行联合学习。第一个框架是增强特征向量深度学习网络，它使用梯度增强从结构化数据中学习特征，并通过两分支深度神经网络将它们与非结构化数据的嵌入相结合。其次，双弱学习器提升框架将提升范式扩展到具有两个输入数据源的设置。我们介绍并比较该框架的一阶和二阶方法。我们在公共和现实世界数据集上的实验结果表明，框架在选定的基线上实现了 0.1% - 4.7% 的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种框架，结合结构化和非结构化数据进行联合学习，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习擅长处理结构化数据，深度学习擅长处理非结构化数据，但两者结合时缺乏有效方法。
AI.method: 提出两种框架：1) 通过梯度提升提取结构化特征并与非结构化数据嵌入结合；2) 扩展提升算法以处理双输入数据源。
AI.result: 在公开和真实数据集上，框架性能较基线提升0.1%-4.7%。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习框架能有效整合结构化与非结构化数据，显著提升模型表现。

authors_text: Zikang Yuan,Fengtian Lang,Tianle Xu,Xin Yang
title: LIWO: Lidar-Inertial-Wheel Odometry
title_zh: LIWO：激光雷达惯性轮里程计
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, has published on IROS 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2210.10424
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, has published on IROS 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2210.10424
abstract: LiDAR-inertial odometry (LIO), which fuses complementary information of a LiDAR and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), is an attractive solution for state estimation. In LIO, both pose and velocity are regarded as state variables that need to be solved. However, the widely-used Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm can only provide constraint for pose, while the velocity can only be constrained by IMU pre-integration. As a result, the velocity estimates inclined to be updated accordingly with the pose results. In this paper, we propose LIWO, an accurate and robust LiDAR-inertialwheel (LIW) odometry, which fuses the measurements from LiDAR, IMU and wheel encoder in a bundle adjustment (BA) based optimization framework. The involvement of a wheel encoder could provide velocity measurement as an important observation, which assists LIO to provide a more accurate state prediction. In addition, constraining the velocity variable by the observation from wheel encoder in optimization can further improve the accuracy of state estimation. Experiment results on two public datasets demonstrate that our system outperforms all state-of-the-art LIO systems in terms of smaller absolute trajectory error (ATE), and embedding a wheel encoder can greatly improve the performance of LIO based on the BA framework.
summary: LiDAR-inertial odometry (LIO), which fuses complementary information of a LiDAR and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), is an attractive solution for state estimation. In LIO, both pose and velocity are regarded as state variables that need to be solved. However, the widely-used Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm can only provide constraint for pose, while the velocity can only be constrained by IMU pre-integration. As a result, the velocity estimates inclined to be updated accordingly with the pose results. In this paper, we propose LIWO, an accurate and robust LiDAR-inertialwheel (LIW) odometry, which fuses the measurements from LiDAR, IMU and wheel encoder in a bundle adjustment (BA) based optimization framework. The involvement of a wheel encoder could provide velocity measurement as an important observation, which assists LIO to provide a more accurate state prediction. In addition, constraining the velocity variable by the observation from wheel encoder in optimization can further improve the accuracy of state estimation. Experiment results on two public datasets demonstrate that our system outperforms all state-of-the-art LIO systems in terms of smaller absolute trajectory error (ATE), and embedding a wheel encoder can greatly improve the performance of LIO based on the BA framework.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达惯性里程计 (LIO) 融合了激光雷达和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的互补信息，是一种颇具吸引力的状态估计解决方案。在LIO中，位姿和速度都被视为需要求解的状态变量。然而，目前广泛使用的迭代最近点（ICP）算法只能对位姿提供约束，而速度只能通过IMU预积分来约束。因此，速度估计倾向于根据位姿结果相应地更新。在本文中，我们提出了 LIWO，一种精确且鲁棒的 LiDAR 惯性轮 (LIW) 里程计，它将 LiDAR、IMU 和车轮编码器的测量融合到基于捆绑调整 (BA) 的优化框架中。车轮编码器的参与可以提供速度测量作为重要的观察，这有助于 LIO 提供更准确的状态预测。此外，在优化中通过车轮编码器的观测来约束速度变量可以进一步提高状态估计的准确性。在两个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的系统在更小的绝对轨迹误差（ATE）方面优于所有最先进的LIO系统，并且嵌入车轮编码器可以极大地提高基于BA框架的LIO的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIWO方法，通过融合激光雷达、惯性测量单元和轮编码器数据，改进基于束调整的激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统LIO方法中，速度估计依赖IMU预积分，易受姿态估计影响，导致精度不足。轮编码器可提供直接速度观测，但未被有效利用。
AI.method: 在束调整框架下联合优化激光雷达点云、IMU数据及轮编码器速度观测，通过引入轮编码器约束速度变量，提升状态估计准确性。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，LIWO的绝对轨迹误差（ATE）优于现有最佳LIO方法，验证了轮编码器与束调整框架结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将轮编码器观测纳入束调整优化框架，可显著提升LIO系统的定位精度与鲁棒性，为多传感器融合里程计提供新思路。

search_text: LIWO: Lidar-Inertial-Wheel Odometry LIWO：激光雷达惯性轮里程计 LiDAR-inertial odometry (LIO), which fuses complementary information of a LiDAR and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), is an attractive solution for state estimation. In LIO, both pose and velocity are regarded as state variables that need to be solved. However, the widely-used Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm can only provide constraint for pose, while the velocity can only be constrained by IMU pre-integration. As a result, the velocity estimates inclined to be updated accordingly with the pose results. In this paper, we propose LIWO, an accurate and robust LiDAR-inertialwheel (LIW) odometry, which fuses the measurements from LiDAR, IMU and wheel encoder in a bundle adjustment (BA) based optimization framework. The involvement of a wheel encoder could provide velocity measurement as an important observation, which assists LIO to provide a more accurate state prediction. In addition, constraining the velocity variable by the observation from wheel encoder in optimization can further improve the accuracy of state estimation. Experiment results on two public datasets demonstrate that our system outperforms all state-of-the-art LIO systems in terms of smaller absolute trajectory error (ATE), and embedding a wheel encoder can greatly improve the performance of LIO based on the BA framework. 激光雷达惯性里程计 (LIO) 融合了激光雷达和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的互补信息，是一种颇具吸引力的状态估计解决方案。在LIO中，位姿和速度都被视为需要求解的状态变量。然而，目前广泛使用的迭代最近点（ICP）算法只能对位姿提供约束，而速度只能通过IMU预积分来约束。因此，速度估计倾向于根据位姿结果相应地更新。在本文中，我们提出了 LIWO，一种精确且鲁棒的 LiDAR 惯性轮 (LIW) 里程计，它将 LiDAR、IMU 和车轮编码器的测量融合到基于捆绑调整 (BA) 的优化框架中。车轮编码器的参与可以提供速度测量作为重要的观察，这有助于 LIO 提供更准确的状态预测。此外，在优化中通过车轮编码器的观测来约束速度变量可以进一步提高状态估计的准确性。在两个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的系统在更小的绝对轨迹误差（ATE）方面优于所有最先进的LIO系统，并且嵌入车轮编码器可以极大地提高基于BA框架的LIO的性能。 本文提出LIWO方法，通过融合激光雷达、惯性测量单元和轮编码器数据，改进基于束调整的激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）的定位精度。 Zikang Yuan,Fengtian Lang,Tianle Xu,Xin Yang cs.RO

authors_text: Gaurav Patel,Konda Reddy Mopuri,Qiang Qiu
title: Learning to Retain while Acquiring: Combating Distribution-Shift in Adversarial Data-Free Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 在获取的同时学会保留：对抗对抗性无数据知识蒸馏中的分布转移
abstract: Data-free Knowledge Distillation (DFKD) has gained popularity recently, with the fundamental idea of carrying out knowledge transfer from a Teacher neural network to a Student neural network in the absence of training data. However, in the Adversarial DFKD framework, the student network's accuracy, suffers due to the non-stationary distribution of the pseudo-samples under multiple generator updates. To this end, at every generator update, we aim to maintain the student's performance on previously encountered examples while acquiring knowledge from samples of the current distribution. Thus, we propose a meta-learning inspired framework by treating the task of Knowledge-Acquisition (learning from newly generated samples) and Knowledge-Retention (retaining knowledge on previously met samples) as meta-train and meta-test, respectively. Hence, we dub our method as Learning to Retain while Acquiring. Moreover, we identify an implicit aligning factor between the Knowledge-Retention and Knowledge-Acquisition tasks indicating that the proposed student update strategy enforces a common gradient direction for both tasks, alleviating interference between the two objectives. Finally, we support our hypothesis by exhibiting extensive evaluation and comparison of our method with prior arts on multiple datasets.
summary: Data-free Knowledge Distillation (DFKD) has gained popularity recently, with the fundamental idea of carrying out knowledge transfer from a Teacher neural network to a Student neural network in the absence of training data. However, in the Adversarial DFKD framework, the student network's accuracy, suffers due to the non-stationary distribution of the pseudo-samples under multiple generator updates. To this end, at every generator update, we aim to maintain the student's performance on previously encountered examples while acquiring knowledge from samples of the current distribution. Thus, we propose a meta-learning inspired framework by treating the task of Knowledge-Acquisition (learning from newly generated samples) and Knowledge-Retention (retaining knowledge on previously met samples) as meta-train and meta-test, respectively. Hence, we dub our method as Learning to Retain while Acquiring. Moreover, we identify an implicit aligning factor between the Knowledge-Retention and Knowledge-Acquisition tasks indicating that the proposed student update strategy enforces a common gradient direction for both tasks, alleviating interference between the two objectives. Finally, we support our hypothesis by exhibiting extensive evaluation and comparison of our method with prior arts on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 无数据知识蒸馏（DFKD）最近很受欢迎，其基本思想是在没有训练数据的情况下将知识从教师神经网络转移到学生神经网络。然而，在对抗性 DFKD 框架中，由于多次生成器更新下伪样本的非平稳分布，学生网络的准确性受到影响。为此，在每次生成器更新时，我们的目标是保持学生在以前遇到的示例上的表现，同时从当前分布的样本中获取知识。因此，我们提出了一个元学习启发框架，将知识获取（从新生成的样本中学习）和知识保留（保留先前遇到的样本的知识）任务分别视为元训练和元测试。因此，我们将我们的方法称为“在获取的同时学习保留”。此外，我们确定了知识保留和知识获取任务之间的隐式对齐因素，表明所提出的学生更新策略为这两个任务强制执行共同的梯度方向，从而减轻了两个目标之间的干扰。最后，我们通过在多个数据集上对我们的方法与现有技术进行广泛的评估和比较来支持我们的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性数据自由知识蒸馏方法，通过在生成器更新时同时保留学生模型对旧样本的知识和学习新样本知识，缓解分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 对抗性数据自由知识蒸馏中，生成器更新导致伪样本分布非平稳，学生模型性能下降，需平衡新知识获取与旧知识保留。
AI.method: 基于元学习框架，将知识获取（新样本学习）作为元训练，知识保留（旧样本保持）作为元测试，利用梯度方向一致性减少任务间干扰。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法相比现有技术显著提升学生模型在对抗性分布偏移场景下的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过元学习策略实现知识获取与保留的协同优化，有效缓解对抗性数据自由知识蒸馏中的分布偏移问题。

authors_text: Zehui Lu,Tianyu Zhou,Shaoshuai Mou
title: DrMaMP: Distributed Real-time Multi-agent Mission Planning in Cluttered Environment
title_zh: DrMaMP：杂乱环境中的分布式实时多代理任务规划
abstract: Solving a collision-aware multi-agent mission planning (task allocation and path finding) problem is challenging due to the requirement of real-time computational performance, scalability, and capability of handling static/dynamic obstacles and tasks in a cluttered environment. This paper proposes a distributed real-time (on the order of millisecond) algorithm DrMaMP, which partitions the entire unassigned task set into subsets via approximation and decomposes the original problem into several single-agent mission planning problems. This paper presents experiments with dynamic obstacles and tasks and conducts optimality and scalability comparisons with an existing method, where DrMaMP outperforms the existing method in both indices. Finally, this paper analyzes the computational burden of DrMaMP which is consistent with the observations from comparisons, and presents the optimality gap in small-size problems.
summary: Solving a collision-aware multi-agent mission planning (task allocation and path finding) problem is challenging due to the requirement of real-time computational performance, scalability, and capability of handling static/dynamic obstacles and tasks in a cluttered environment. This paper proposes a distributed real-time (on the order of millisecond) algorithm DrMaMP, which partitions the entire unassigned task set into subsets via approximation and decomposes the original problem into several single-agent mission planning problems. This paper presents experiments with dynamic obstacles and tasks and conducts optimality and scalability comparisons with an existing method, where DrMaMP outperforms the existing method in both indices. Finally, this paper analyzes the computational burden of DrMaMP which is consistent with the observations from comparisons, and presents the optimality gap in small-size problems.
abstract_zh: 由于需要实时计算性能、可扩展性以及在杂乱环境中处理静态/动态障碍物和任务的能力，解决碰撞感知多智能体任务规划（任务分配和路径查找）问题具有挑战性。本文提出了一种分布式实时（毫秒量级）算法DrMaMP，该算法通过近似将整个未分配任务集划分为子集，并将原始问题分解为多个单代理任务规划问题。本文提出了动态障碍和任务的实验，并与现有方法进行了最优性和可扩展性比较，其中 DrMaMP 在两个指标上都优于现有方法。最后，本文分析了 DrMaMP 的计算负担，与比较的观察结果一致，并提出了小规模问题中的最优性差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式实时多智能体任务规划算法DrMaMP，用于解决复杂环境中的碰撞感知问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态障碍物和任务时存在实时性不足、可扩展性差的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过近似划分任务集为子集，将多智能体问题分解为多个单智能体规划子问题，实现分布式实时计算。
AI.result: 实验表明DrMaMP在动态环境下优于现有方法，计算负担与实验观察一致，且分析了小规模问题的最优性差距。
AI.conclusion: DrMaMP有效解决了多智能体实时任务规划难题，在复杂环境中有较好适用性。

authors_text: Zhengzhuo Xu,Shuo Yang,Xingjun Wang,Chun Yuan
title: Rethink Long-tailed Recognition with Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用视觉转换器重新思考长尾识别
abstract: In the real world, data tends to follow long-tailed distributions w.r.t. class or attribution, motivating the challenging Long-Tailed Recognition (LTR) problem. In this paper, we revisit recent LTR methods with promising Vision Transformers (ViT). We figure out that 1) ViT is hard to train with long-tailed data. 2) ViT learns generalized features in an unsupervised manner, like mask generative training, either on long-tailed or balanced datasets. Hence, we propose to adopt unsupervised learning to utilize long-tailed data. Furthermore, we propose the Predictive Distribution Calibration (PDC) as a novel metric for LTR, where the model tends to simply classify inputs into common classes. Our PDC can measure the model calibration of predictive preferences quantitatively. On this basis, we find many LTR approaches alleviate it slightly, despite the accuracy improvement. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate that PDC reflects the model's predictive preference precisely, which is consistent with the visualization.
summary: In the real world, data tends to follow long-tailed distributions w.r.t. class or attribution, motivating the challenging Long-Tailed Recognition (LTR) problem. In this paper, we revisit recent LTR methods with promising Vision Transformers (ViT). We figure out that 1) ViT is hard to train with long-tailed data. 2) ViT learns generalized features in an unsupervised manner, like mask generative training, either on long-tailed or balanced datasets. Hence, we propose to adopt unsupervised learning to utilize long-tailed data. Furthermore, we propose the Predictive Distribution Calibration (PDC) as a novel metric for LTR, where the model tends to simply classify inputs into common classes. Our PDC can measure the model calibration of predictive preferences quantitatively. On this basis, we find many LTR approaches alleviate it slightly, despite the accuracy improvement. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate that PDC reflects the model's predictive preference precisely, which is consistent with the visualization.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中，数据往往遵循长尾分布。类别或归因，激发具有挑战性的长尾识别（LTR）问题。在本文中，我们使用有前景的 Vision Transformers (ViT) 重新审视最近的 LTR 方法。我们发现 1）ViT 很难用长尾数据进行训练。 2）ViT 以无监督的方式学习广义特征，例如在长尾数据集或平衡数据集上进行掩模生成训练。因此，我们建议采用无监督学习来利用长尾数据。此外，我们提出预测分布校准（PDC）作为 LTR 的一种新颖指标，其中模型倾向于简单地将输入分类为常见类别。我们的 PDC 可以定量测量预测偏好的模型校准。在此基础上，我们发现许多 LTR 方法尽管精度有所提高，但稍微减轻了它。在基准数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 PDC 准确地反映了模型的预测偏好，这与可视化结果是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在长尾分布数据下如何利用视觉Transformer（ViT）进行长尾识别（LTR），并提出新的方法解决训练困难和模型校准问题。
AI.motivation: ViT在长尾数据上训练困难，且现有方法虽提升准确率，但模型仍倾向于将输入分类到常见类别，需改进模型校准能力。
AI.method: 采用无监督学习利用长尾数据，并提出预测分布校准（PDC）指标，量化衡量模型预测偏好的校准情况。
AI.result: 实验表明PDC能准确反映模型预测偏好，且与可视化结果一致，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: PDC指标揭示现有LTR方法在提升准确率的同时未有效缓解模型偏好问题，无监督学习可更好利用长尾数据。

search_text: Rethink Long-tailed Recognition with Vision Transformers 使用视觉转换器重新思考长尾识别 In the real world, data tends to follow long-tailed distributions w.r.t. class or attribution, motivating the challenging Long-Tailed Recognition (LTR) problem. In this paper, we revisit recent LTR methods with promising Vision Transformers (ViT). We figure out that 1) ViT is hard to train with long-tailed data. 2) ViT learns generalized features in an unsupervised manner, like mask generative training, either on long-tailed or balanced datasets. Hence, we propose to adopt unsupervised learning to utilize long-tailed data. Furthermore, we propose the Predictive Distribution Calibration (PDC) as a novel metric for LTR, where the model tends to simply classify inputs into common classes. Our PDC can measure the model calibration of predictive preferences quantitatively. On this basis, we find many LTR approaches alleviate it slightly, despite the accuracy improvement. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate that PDC reflects the model's predictive preference precisely, which is consistent with the visualization. 在现实世界中，数据往往遵循长尾分布。类别或归因，激发具有挑战性的长尾识别（LTR）问题。在本文中，我们使用有前景的 Vision Transformers (ViT) 重新审视最近的 LTR 方法。我们发现 1）ViT 很难用长尾数据进行训练。 2）ViT 以无监督的方式学习广义特征，例如在长尾数据集或平衡数据集上进行掩模生成训练。因此，我们建议采用无监督学习来利用长尾数据。此外，我们提出预测分布校准（PDC）作为 LTR 的一种新颖指标，其中模型倾向于简单地将输入分类为常见类别。我们的 PDC 可以定量测量预测偏好的模型校准。在此基础上，我们发现许多 LTR 方法尽管精度有所提高，但稍微减轻了它。在基准数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 PDC 准确地反映了模型的预测偏好，这与可视化结果是一致的。 本文研究了在长尾分布数据下如何利用视觉Transformer（ViT）进行长尾识别（LTR），并提出新的方法解决训练困难和模型校准问题。 Zhengzhuo Xu,Shuo Yang,Xingjun Wang,Chun Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Andrea Treviño Gavito,Diego Klabjan,Jean Utke
title: Multi-Layer Attention-Based Explainability via Transformers for Tabular Data
title_zh: 通过表格数据的转换器实现基于注意力的多层可解释性
abstract: We propose a graph-oriented attention-based explainability method for tabular data. Tasks involving tabular data have been solved mostly using traditional tree-based machine learning models which have the challenges of feature selection and engineering. With that in mind, we consider a transformer architecture for tabular data, which is amenable to explainability, and present a novel way to leverage self-attention mechanism to provide explanations by taking into account the attention matrices of all heads and layers as a whole. The matrices are mapped to a graph structure where groups of features correspond to nodes and attention values to arcs. By finding the maximum probability paths in the graph, we identify groups of features providing larger contributions to explain the model's predictions. To assess the quality of multi-layer attention-based explanations, we compare them with popular attention-, gradient-, and perturbation-based explanability methods.
summary: We propose a graph-oriented attention-based explainability method for tabular data. Tasks involving tabular data have been solved mostly using traditional tree-based machine learning models which have the challenges of feature selection and engineering. With that in mind, we consider a transformer architecture for tabular data, which is amenable to explainability, and present a novel way to leverage self-attention mechanism to provide explanations by taking into account the attention matrices of all heads and layers as a whole. The matrices are mapped to a graph structure where groups of features correspond to nodes and attention values to arcs. By finding the maximum probability paths in the graph, we identify groups of features providing larger contributions to explain the model's predictions. To assess the quality of multi-layer attention-based explanations, we compare them with popular attention-, gradient-, and perturbation-based explanability methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对表格数据的面向图的基于注意力的可解释性方法。涉及表格数据的任务主要使用传统的基于树的机器学习模型来解决，该模型面临特征选择和工程的挑战。考虑到这一点，我们考虑了一种适用于表格数据的转换器架构，该架构易于解释，并提出了一种利用自注意力机制通过考虑所有头和层的注意力矩阵来提供解释的新颖方法。矩阵被映射到图结构，其中特征组对应于节点，注意力值对应于弧。通过查找图中的最大概率路径，我们确定了为解释模型的预测提供更大贡献的特征组。为了评估基于注意力的多层解释的质量，我们将它们与流行的基于注意力、梯度和扰动的可解释性方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多层注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于提升表格数据的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统树模型在处理表格数据时面临特征选择和工程的挑战，而Transformer结构更易于解释，因此需探索新的可解释方法。
AI.method: 通过构建Transformer的自注意力矩阵图结构，将特征组映射为节点，注意力值为边，利用最大概率路径识别关键特征组进行解释。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在解释质量上优于主流的注意力、梯度和扰动基方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了表格数据模型的可解释性，为复杂模型的透明化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiesi Hu,Yanwu Yang,Xutao Guo,Ting Ma
title: DECOR-NET: A COVID-19 Lung Infection Segmentation Network Improved by Emphasizing Low-level Features and Decorrelating Features
title_zh: DECOR-NET：通过强调低级特征和去相关特征改进的 COVID-19 肺部感染分割网络
abstract: Since 2019, coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) has been widely spread and posed a serious threat to public health. Chest Computed Tomography (CT) holds great potential for screening and diagnosis of this disease. The segmentation of COVID-19 CT imaging can achieves quantitative evaluation of infections and tracks disease progression. COVID-19 infections are characterized by high heterogeneity and unclear boundaries, so capturing low-level features such as texture and intensity is critical for segmentation. However, segmentation networks that emphasize low-level features are still lacking. In this work, we propose a DECOR-Net capable of capturing more decorrelated low-level features. The channel re-weighting strategy is applied to obtain plenty of low-level features and the dependencies between channels are reduced by proposed decorrelation loss. Experiments show that DECOR-Net outperforms other cutting-edge methods and surpasses the baseline by 5.1% and 4.9% in terms of Dice coefficient and intersection over union. Moreover, the proposed decorrelation loss can improve the performance constantly under different settings. The Code is available at https://github.com/jiesihu/DECOR-Net.git.
summary: Since 2019, coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) has been widely spread and posed a serious threat to public health. Chest Computed Tomography (CT) holds great potential for screening and diagnosis of this disease. The segmentation of COVID-19 CT imaging can achieves quantitative evaluation of infections and tracks disease progression. COVID-19 infections are characterized by high heterogeneity and unclear boundaries, so capturing low-level features such as texture and intensity is critical for segmentation. However, segmentation networks that emphasize low-level features are still lacking. In this work, we propose a DECOR-Net capable of capturing more decorrelated low-level features. The channel re-weighting strategy is applied to obtain plenty of low-level features and the dependencies between channels are reduced by proposed decorrelation loss. Experiments show that DECOR-Net outperforms other cutting-edge methods and surpasses the baseline by 5.1% and 4.9% in terms of Dice coefficient and intersection over union. Moreover, the proposed decorrelation loss can improve the performance constantly under different settings. The Code is available at https://github.com/jiesihu/DECOR-Net.git.
abstract_zh: 2019年以来，2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）广泛传播，对公众健康构成严重威胁。胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）在筛查和诊断这种疾病方面具有巨大的潜力。 COVID-19 CT成像的分割可以实现感染的定量评估并跟踪疾病进展。 COVID-19 感染的特点是高度异质性和不清晰的边界，因此捕获纹理和强度等低级特征对于分割至关重要。然而，仍然缺乏强调低级特征的分割网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个能够捕获更多去相关的低级特征的 DECOR-Net。应用通道重新加权策略来获得大量低级特征，并且通过提出的去相关损失来减少通道之间的依赖性。实验表明，DECOR-Net 的性能优于其他前沿方法，在 Dice 系数和交集比并集方面超过基线 5.1% 和 4.9%。此外，所提出的去相关损失可以在不同设置下不断提高性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/jiesihu/DECOR-Net.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DECOR-Net网络，通过强调低层特征和解相关特征来改进COVID-19肺部感染的CT影像分割。
AI.motivation: COVID-19感染在CT影像中呈现高异质性和模糊边界，捕捉纹理和强度等低层特征对分割至关重要，但现有网络缺乏对此的优化。
AI.method: 设计DECOR-Net网络，采用通道重加权策略提取丰富低层特征，并通过提出的解相关损失函数降低通道间依赖性。
AI.result: DECOR-Net在Dice系数和交并比指标上分别优于基线5.1%和4.9%，且解相关损失在不同设置下均能持续提升性能。
AI.conclusion: DECOR-Net通过强调低层特征与解相关机制有效提升了分割精度，验证了方法在不同场景下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Seth Karten,Siva Kailas,Huao Li,Katia Sycara
title: On the Role of Emergent Communication for Social Learning in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 论社交学习中的紧急沟通在多智能体强化学习中的作用
abstract: Explicit communication among humans is key to coordinating and learning. Social learning, which uses cues from experts, can greatly benefit from the usage of explicit communication to align heterogeneous policies, reduce sample complexity, and solve partially observable tasks. Emergent communication, a type of explicit communication, studies the creation of an artificial language to encode a high task-utility message directly from data. However, in most cases, emergent communication sends insufficiently compressed messages with little or null information, which also may not be understandable to a third-party listener. This paper proposes an unsupervised method based on the information bottleneck to capture both referential complexity and task-specific utility to adequately explore sparse social communication scenarios in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). We show that our model is able to i) develop a natural-language-inspired lexicon of messages that is independently composed of a set of emergent concepts, which span the observations and intents with minimal bits, ii) develop communication to align the action policies of heterogeneous agents with dissimilar feature models, and iii) learn a communication policy from watching an expert's action policy, which we term `social shadowing'.
summary: Explicit communication among humans is key to coordinating and learning. Social learning, which uses cues from experts, can greatly benefit from the usage of explicit communication to align heterogeneous policies, reduce sample complexity, and solve partially observable tasks. Emergent communication, a type of explicit communication, studies the creation of an artificial language to encode a high task-utility message directly from data. However, in most cases, emergent communication sends insufficiently compressed messages with little or null information, which also may not be understandable to a third-party listener. This paper proposes an unsupervised method based on the information bottleneck to capture both referential complexity and task-specific utility to adequately explore sparse social communication scenarios in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). We show that our model is able to i) develop a natural-language-inspired lexicon of messages that is independently composed of a set of emergent concepts, which span the observations and intents with minimal bits, ii) develop communication to align the action policies of heterogeneous agents with dissimilar feature models, and iii) learn a communication policy from watching an expert's action policy, which we term `social shadowing'.
abstract_zh: 人类之间的明确沟通是协调和学习的关键。使用专家提示的社会学习可以极大地受益于使用显式通信来协调异构策略、降低样本复杂性并解决部分可观察的任务。紧急沟通是显式沟通的一种，研究人工语言的创建，以直接从数据中编码高任务效用消息。然而，在大多数情况下，紧急通信发送的消息压缩得不够充分，信息很少或为零，这也可能无法被第三方侦听者理解。本文提出了一种基于信息瓶颈的无监督方法，以捕获参考复杂性和特定任务效用，以充分探索多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的稀疏社交通信场景。我们表明，我们的模型能够：i）开发受自然语言启发的消息词典，该词典独立地由一组新兴概念组成，这些概念以最少的比特跨越观察和意图；ii）开发通信，以将异质代理的行动策略与不同的特征模型相一致；iii）通过观察专家的行动策略来学习通信策略，我们将其称为“社会影子”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息瓶颈的无监督方法，旨在改进多智能体强化学习中社会学习的涌现通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有涌现通信在多智能体系统中存在信息压缩不足、可理解性差的问题，难以有效支持社会学习中的策略对齐与任务协作。
AI.method: 通过信息瓶颈理论同时捕捉指称复杂度与任务特异性效用，构建自然语言启发的最小比特消息词典，并实现异构智能体策略对齐与专家行为模仿（社会影子学习）。
AI.result: 模型成功生成概念驱动的消息词典，实现异构特征模型智能体的策略对齐，并通过观察专家动作策略完成通信策略学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过信息瓶颈框架有效解决了多智能体社会学习中的通信稀疏性问题，为高效协作提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Yunwoo Lee,Jungwon Park,Seungwoo Jung,Boseong Jeon,Dahyun Oh,H. Jin Kim
title: QP Chaser: Polynomial Trajectory Generation for Autonomous Aerial Tracking
title_zh: QP Chaser：用于自主空中跟踪的多项式轨迹生成
abstract: Maintaining the visibility of the target is one of the major objectives of aerial tracking missions. This paper proposes a target-visible trajectory planning pipeline using quadratic programming. Our approach can handle various tracking settings, including single and dual target following and both static and dynamic environments, unlike other works that focus on a single specific setup. In contrast to other studies that fully trust the predicted trajectory of the target and consider only the visibility of the center of the target, our pipeline considers error in target path prediction and the entire body of the target to maintain the target visibility robustly. First, a prediction module uses a sample-check strategy to quickly calculate the reachable areas of moving objects, which represent the areas their bodies can reach, considering obstacles. Subsequently, the planning module formulates a single QP problem, considering path homotopy, to generate a tracking trajectory that maximizes the visibility of the target's reachable area among obstacles. The performance of the planner is validated in multiple scenarios, through high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments.
summary: Maintaining the visibility of the target is one of the major objectives of aerial tracking missions. This paper proposes a target-visible trajectory planning pipeline using quadratic programming. Our approach can handle various tracking settings, including single and dual target following and both static and dynamic environments, unlike other works that focus on a single specific setup. In contrast to other studies that fully trust the predicted trajectory of the target and consider only the visibility of the center of the target, our pipeline considers error in target path prediction and the entire body of the target to maintain the target visibility robustly. First, a prediction module uses a sample-check strategy to quickly calculate the reachable areas of moving objects, which represent the areas their bodies can reach, considering obstacles. Subsequently, the planning module formulates a single QP problem, considering path homotopy, to generate a tracking trajectory that maximizes the visibility of the target's reachable area among obstacles. The performance of the planner is validated in multiple scenarios, through high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 保持目标的可见性是空中跟踪任务的主要目标之一。本文提出了一种使用二次规划的目标可见轨迹规划流程。我们的方法可以处理各种跟踪设置，包括单目标和双目标跟踪以及静态和动态环境，这与专注于单个特定设置的其他作品不同。与完全信任目标的预测轨迹并仅考虑目标中心的可见性的其他研究相比，我们的流程考虑了目标路径预测和目标整个身体的误差，以稳健地保持目标可见性。首先，预测模块使用样本检查策略快速计算移动物体的可到达区域，这代表了考虑障碍物后其身体可以到达的区域。随后，规划模块考虑路径同伦，制定单个 QP 问题，以生成最大化目标在障碍物中的可到达区域的可见性的跟踪轨迹。通过高保真模拟和真实实验，规划器的性能在多种场景下得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二次规划的轨迹生成方法，用于自主空中追踪任务，确保目标在复杂环境中的可见性。
AI.motivation: 现有追踪方法多针对单一场景或仅考虑目标中心点，难以应对多目标、动态环境及预测误差带来的鲁棒性挑战。
AI.method: 设计包含预测模块与规划模块的双阶段框架：预测模块通过样本检查策略计算目标可达区域，规划模块构建考虑路径同源性的QP问题，最大化目标可达区域在障碍物中的可见性。
AI.result: 在多种仿真与真实场景实验中验证了方法的有效性，成功处理单/双目标追踪及静态/动态环境，保持目标可见性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过综合考虑目标预测误差与全目标体可见性，显著提升了复杂环境下自主空中追踪的鲁棒性与适应性。

authors_text: David Berga,Alexandre Pereda,Eleonora De Filippi,Arijit Nandi,Eulalia Febrer,Marta Reverte,Lautaro Russo
title: Measuring arousal and stress physiology on Esports, a League of Legends case study
title_zh: 测量电子竞技的唤醒和压力生理学，英雄联盟案例研究
abstract: Esports gaming is an area in which videogame players need to cooperate and compete with each other, influencing their cognitive load, processing, stress, and social skills. Here it is unknown to which extent competitive videogame play using a desktop setting can affect the physiological responses of players' autonomic nervous system. For such, we propose a study where we have measured distinct electrodermal and cardiac activity metrics over competitive players during several League of Legends gameplay sessions in a Esports stadium. We mainly found that game performance (whether winning or losing the game) significantly affects both electrodermal and cardiac activity, where players who lost the game showed higher stress-related physiological responses, as compared to winning players. We also found that important specific in-game events such as "Killing", "Dying" or "Destroying Turret" significantly increased both electrodermal and cardiac activity over players more than other less-relevant events such as "Placing Wards" or "Destroying Turret Plates". Finally, by analyzing activity over player roles we found different trends of activity on these measurements, this could foster the exploration on human physiology with a higher set of participants in future Esports studies.
summary: Esports gaming is an area in which videogame players need to cooperate and compete with each other, influencing their cognitive load, processing, stress, and social skills. Here it is unknown to which extent competitive videogame play using a desktop setting can affect the physiological responses of players' autonomic nervous system. For such, we propose a study where we have measured distinct electrodermal and cardiac activity metrics over competitive players during several League of Legends gameplay sessions in a Esports stadium. We mainly found that game performance (whether winning or losing the game) significantly affects both electrodermal and cardiac activity, where players who lost the game showed higher stress-related physiological responses, as compared to winning players. We also found that important specific in-game events such as "Killing", "Dying" or "Destroying Turret" significantly increased both electrodermal and cardiac activity over players more than other less-relevant events such as "Placing Wards" or "Destroying Turret Plates". Finally, by analyzing activity over player roles we found different trends of activity on these measurements, this could foster the exploration on human physiology with a higher set of participants in future Esports studies.
abstract_zh: 电子竞技游戏是电子游戏玩家需要相互合作和竞争的领域，影响他们的认知负荷、处理能力、压力和社交技能。目前尚不清楚使用桌面设置玩竞技视频游戏会在多大程度上影响玩家自主神经系统的生理反应。为此，我们提出了一项研究，在电子竞技体育场的几次英雄联盟游戏过程中，测量了竞技玩家的不同皮肤电和心脏活动指标。我们主要发现游戏表现（无论是赢得还是输掉比赛）都会显着影响皮肤电和心脏活动，其中输掉比赛的玩家与获胜玩家相比表现出更高的与压力相关的生理反应。我们还发现，重要的特定游戏内事件（如“杀戮”、“死亡”或“摧毁炮塔”）比其他不太相关的事件（如“放置守卫”或“摧毁炮塔板”）显着增加了玩家的皮肤电和心脏活动。最后，通过分析玩家角色的活动，我们发现了这些测量的不同活动趋势，这可以促进未来电子竞技研究中更多参与者对人类生理学的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文通过《英雄联盟》电竞比赛案例，测量玩家在竞技游戏中的觉醒与压力生理反应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确桌面竞技游戏对玩家自主神经系统生理反应的影响，需探索游戏表现及关键事件对生理指标的作用机制。
AI.method: 在电竞场馆中对选手进行多场《英雄联盟》比赛，实时监测皮肤电反应与心率等生理指标，对比胜负状态及不同游戏事件的影响。
AI.result: 输家呈现更高应激生理反应；击杀、死亡等关键事件显著提升生理指标；不同角色存在差异化的生理活动趋势。
AI.conclusion: 电竞比赛中的胜负状态与关键事件显著影响生理指标，未来需扩大样本以深化对电竞生理学机制的理解。

search_text: Measuring arousal and stress physiology on Esports, a League of Legends case study 测量电子竞技的唤醒和压力生理学，英雄联盟案例研究 Esports gaming is an area in which videogame players need to cooperate and compete with each other, influencing their cognitive load, processing, stress, and social skills. Here it is unknown to which extent competitive videogame play using a desktop setting can affect the physiological responses of players' autonomic nervous system. For such, we propose a study where we have measured distinct electrodermal and cardiac activity metrics over competitive players during several League of Legends gameplay sessions in a Esports stadium. We mainly found that game performance (whether winning or losing the game) significantly affects both electrodermal and cardiac activity, where players who lost the game showed higher stress-related physiological responses, as compared to winning players. We also found that important specific in-game events such as "Killing", "Dying" or "Destroying Turret" significantly increased both electrodermal and cardiac activity over players more than other less-relevant events such as "Placing Wards" or "Destroying Turret Plates". Finally, by analyzing activity over player roles we found different trends of activity on these measurements, this could foster the exploration on human physiology with a higher set of participants in future Esports studies. 电子竞技游戏是电子游戏玩家需要相互合作和竞争的领域，影响他们的认知负荷、处理能力、压力和社交技能。目前尚不清楚使用桌面设置玩竞技视频游戏会在多大程度上影响玩家自主神经系统的生理反应。为此，我们提出了一项研究，在电子竞技体育场的几次英雄联盟游戏过程中，测量了竞技玩家的不同皮肤电和心脏活动指标。我们主要发现游戏表现（无论是赢得还是输掉比赛）都会显着影响皮肤电和心脏活动，其中输掉比赛的玩家与获胜玩家相比表现出更高的与压力相关的生理反应。我们还发现，重要的特定游戏内事件（如“杀戮”、“死亡”或“摧毁炮塔”）比其他不太相关的事件（如“放置守卫”或“摧毁炮塔板”）显着增加了玩家的皮肤电和心脏活动。最后，通过分析玩家角色的活动，我们发现了这些测量的不同活动趋势，这可以促进未来电子竞技研究中更多参与者对人类生理学的探索。 本文通过《英雄联盟》电竞比赛案例，测量玩家在竞技游戏中的觉醒与压力生理反应。 David Berga,Alexandre Pereda,Eleonora De Filippi,Arijit Nandi,Eulalia Febrer,Marta Reverte,Lautaro Russo cs.HC

authors_text: Xueyi Liu,Ji Zhang,Ruizhen Hu,Haibin Huang,He Wang,Li Yi
title: Self-Supervised Category-Level Articulated Object Pose Estimation with Part-Level SE(3) Equivariance
title_zh: 具有部分级 SE(3) 等方差的自监督类别级铰接物体姿态估计
abstract: Category-level articulated object pose estimation aims to estimate a hierarchy of articulation-aware object poses of an unseen articulated object from a known category. To reduce the heavy annotations needed for supervised learning methods, we present a novel self-supervised strategy that solves this problem without any human labels. Our key idea is to factorize canonical shapes and articulated object poses from input articulated shapes through part-level equivariant shape analysis. Specifically, we first introduce the concept of part-level SE(3) equivariance and devise a network to learn features of such property. Then, through a carefully designed fine-grained pose-shape disentanglement strategy, we expect that canonical spaces to support pose estimation could be induced automatically. Thus, we could further predict articulated object poses as per-part rigid transformations describing how parts transform from their canonical part spaces to the camera space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on both complete and partial point clouds from synthetic and real articulated object datasets.
summary: Category-level articulated object pose estimation aims to estimate a hierarchy of articulation-aware object poses of an unseen articulated object from a known category. To reduce the heavy annotations needed for supervised learning methods, we present a novel self-supervised strategy that solves this problem without any human labels. Our key idea is to factorize canonical shapes and articulated object poses from input articulated shapes through part-level equivariant shape analysis. Specifically, we first introduce the concept of part-level SE(3) equivariance and devise a network to learn features of such property. Then, through a carefully designed fine-grained pose-shape disentanglement strategy, we expect that canonical spaces to support pose estimation could be induced automatically. Thus, we could further predict articulated object poses as per-part rigid transformations describing how parts transform from their canonical part spaces to the camera space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on both complete and partial point clouds from synthetic and real articulated object datasets.
abstract_zh: 类别级铰接物体姿态估计旨在估计已知类别中不可见的铰接物体的铰接感知物体姿态的层次结构。为了减少监督学习方法所需的大量注释，我们提出了一种新颖的自我监督策略，可以在没有任何人类标签的情况下解决这个问题。我们的关键思想是通过零件级等变形状分析，从输入的铰接形状中分解规范形状和铰接物体姿势。具体来说，我们首先引入部分级 SE(3) 等方差的概念，并设计一个网络来学习此类属性的特征。然后，通过精心设计的细粒度姿势形状解缠策略，我们期望可以自动诱导支持姿势估计的规范空间。因此，我们可以进一步预测铰接对象的姿势作为每个部件的刚性变换，描述部件如何从其规范部件空间变换到相机空间。大量的实验证明了我们的方法对来自合成和真实铰接对象数据集的完整和部分点云的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自监督方法，通过部分级别的SE(3)等变性实现类别级别的关节物体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖大量标注数据，而本文旨在减少标注需求，通过自监督策略实现更高效的学习。
AI.method: 引入部分级别SE(3)等变性概念，设计网络学习特征，并采用细粒度姿态-形状解耦策略自动诱导规范空间，预测各部分刚体变换。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集的完整及部分点云上验证了方法的有效性，证明其在姿态估计任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了无标注的关节物体姿态估计，为相关领域提供了新的技术思路和解决方案。

authors_text: Jiyuan Liu,Bingyi Lu,Mingkang Xiong,Tao Zhang,Huilin Xiong
title: Adversarial Attack with Raindrops
title_zh: 雨滴对抗性攻击
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, This manuscript was submitted to CVPR 2023
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures, This manuscript was submitted to CVPR 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, which are usually designed artificially to fool DNNs, but rarely exist in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we study the adversarial examples caused by raindrops, to demonstrate that there exist plenty of natural phenomena being able to work as adversarial attackers to DNNs. Moreover, we present a new approach to generate adversarial raindrops, denoted as AdvRD, using the generative adversarial network (GAN) technique to simulate natural raindrops. The images crafted by our AdvRD look very similar to the real-world raindrop images, statistically close to the distribution of true raindrop images, and more importantly, can perform strong adversarial attack to the state-of-the-art DNN models. On the other side, we show that the adversarial training using our AdvRD images can significantly improve the robustness of DNNs to the real-world raindrop attacks. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the images crafted by AdvRD are visually and statistically close to the natural raindrop images, can work as strong attackers to DNN models, and also help improve the robustness of DNNs to raindrop attacks.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, which are usually designed artificially to fool DNNs, but rarely exist in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we study the adversarial examples caused by raindrops, to demonstrate that there exist plenty of natural phenomena being able to work as adversarial attackers to DNNs. Moreover, we present a new approach to generate adversarial raindrops, denoted as AdvRD, using the generative adversarial network (GAN) technique to simulate natural raindrops. The images crafted by our AdvRD look very similar to the real-world raindrop images, statistically close to the distribution of true raindrop images, and more importantly, can perform strong adversarial attack to the state-of-the-art DNN models. On the other side, we show that the adversarial training using our AdvRD images can significantly improve the robustness of DNNs to the real-world raindrop attacks. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the images crafted by AdvRD are visually and statistically close to the natural raindrop images, can work as strong attackers to DNN models, and also help improve the robustness of DNNs to raindrop attacks.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这些示例通常是人为设计的，旨在欺骗 DNN，但在现实场景中很少存在。在本文中，我们研究了由雨滴引起的对抗性例子，以证明存在大量的自然现象能够作为 DNN 的对抗性攻击者。此外，我们提出了一种生成对抗性雨滴的新方法，表示为 AdvRD，使用生成对抗网络（GAN）技术来模拟自然雨滴。我们的 AdvRD 制作的图像看起来与现实世界的雨滴图像非常相似，统计上接近真实雨滴图像的分布，更重要的是，可以对最先进的 DNN 模型进行强大的对抗性攻击。另一方面，我们表明使用 AdvRD 图像进行对抗训练可以显着提高 DNN 对现实世界雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明，AdvRD 制作的图像在视觉上和统计上都接近自然雨滴图像，可以作为 DNN 模型的强大攻击者，并且还有助于提高 DNN 对雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法AdvRD，生成与真实雨滴图像高度相似的对抗样本，用于攻击深度神经网络（DNN），并验证对抗训练可提升模型对雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本多为人工设计，而现实中自然现象（如雨滴）可能成为潜在对抗攻击源，但其影响尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 利用GAN技术生成统计分布接近真实雨滴的对抗样本AdvRD，通过视觉和统计指标验证其真实性，并测试其对DNN的攻击效果及对抗训练的防御能力。
AI.result: AdvRD生成的雨滴图像在视觉和统计特性上接近真实样本，能有效攻击主流DNN模型；对抗训练后模型在真实雨滴攻击下的准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 自然现象可作为有效对抗攻击载体，AdvRD方法为研究物理世界对抗样本提供了新视角，对抗训练能增强模型鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法AdvRD，生成与真实雨滴图像高度相似的对抗样本，用于攻击深度神经网络（DNN），并验证对抗训练可提升模型对雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对抗样本多为人工设计，而现实中自然现象（如雨滴）可能成为潜在对抗攻击源，但其影响尚未被充分研究。

ai_content.result: AdvRD生成的雨滴图像在视觉和统计特性上接近真实样本，能有效攻击主流DNN模型；对抗训练后模型在真实雨滴攻击下的准确率显著提升。

search_text: Adversarial Attack with Raindrops 雨滴对抗性攻击 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, which are usually designed artificially to fool DNNs, but rarely exist in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we study the adversarial examples caused by raindrops, to demonstrate that there exist plenty of natural phenomena being able to work as adversarial attackers to DNNs. Moreover, we present a new approach to generate adversarial raindrops, denoted as AdvRD, using the generative adversarial network (GAN) technique to simulate natural raindrops. The images crafted by our AdvRD look very similar to the real-world raindrop images, statistically close to the distribution of true raindrop images, and more importantly, can perform strong adversarial attack to the state-of-the-art DNN models. On the other side, we show that the adversarial training using our AdvRD images can significantly improve the robustness of DNNs to the real-world raindrop attacks. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the images crafted by AdvRD are visually and statistically close to the natural raindrop images, can work as strong attackers to DNN models, and also help improve the robustness of DNNs to raindrop attacks. 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这些示例通常是人为设计的，旨在欺骗 DNN，但在现实场景中很少存在。在本文中，我们研究了由雨滴引起的对抗性例子，以证明存在大量的自然现象能够作为 DNN 的对抗性攻击者。此外，我们提出了一种生成对抗性雨滴的新方法，表示为 AdvRD，使用生成对抗网络（GAN）技术来模拟自然雨滴。我们的 AdvRD 制作的图像看起来与现实世界的雨滴图像非常相似，统计上接近真实雨滴图像的分布，更重要的是，可以对最先进的 DNN 模型进行强大的对抗性攻击。另一方面，我们表明使用 AdvRD 图像进行对抗训练可以显着提高 DNN 对现实世界雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。大量的实验表明，AdvRD 制作的图像在视觉上和统计上都接近自然雨滴图像，可以作为 DNN 模型的强大攻击者，并且还有助于提高 DNN 对雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法AdvRD，生成与真实雨滴图像高度相似的对抗样本，用于攻击深度神经网络（DNN），并验证对抗训练可提升模型对雨滴攻击的鲁棒性。 Jiyuan Liu,Bingyi Lu,Mingkang Xiong,Tao Zhang,Huilin Xiong cs.CV

authors_text: Ran Qin,Haoxiang Ma,Boyang Gao,Di Huang
title: RGB-D Grasp Detection via Depth Guided Learning with Cross-modal Attention
title_zh: 通过具有跨模态注意力的深度引导学习的 RGB-D 抓取检测
abstract: Planar grasp detection is one of the most fundamental tasks to robotic manipulation, and the recent progress of consumer-grade RGB-D sensors enables delivering more comprehensive features from both the texture and shape modalities. However, depth maps are generally of a relatively lower quality with much stronger noise compared to RGB images, making it challenging to acquire grasp depth and fuse multi-modal clues. To address the two issues, this paper proposes a novel learning based approach to RGB-D grasp detection, namely Depth Guided Cross-modal Attention Network (DGCAN). To better leverage the geometry information recorded in the depth channel, a complete 6-dimensional rectangle representation is adopted with the grasp depth dedicatedly considered in addition to those defined in the common 5-dimensional one. The prediction of the extra grasp depth substantially strengthens feature learning, thereby leading to more accurate results. Moreover, to reduce the negative impact caused by the discrepancy of data quality in two modalities, a Local Cross-modal Attention (LCA) module is designed, where the depth features are refined according to cross-modal relations and concatenated to the RGB ones for more sufficient fusion. Extensive simulation and physical evaluations are conducted and the experimental results highlight the superiority of the proposed approach.
summary: Planar grasp detection is one of the most fundamental tasks to robotic manipulation, and the recent progress of consumer-grade RGB-D sensors enables delivering more comprehensive features from both the texture and shape modalities. However, depth maps are generally of a relatively lower quality with much stronger noise compared to RGB images, making it challenging to acquire grasp depth and fuse multi-modal clues. To address the two issues, this paper proposes a novel learning based approach to RGB-D grasp detection, namely Depth Guided Cross-modal Attention Network (DGCAN). To better leverage the geometry information recorded in the depth channel, a complete 6-dimensional rectangle representation is adopted with the grasp depth dedicatedly considered in addition to those defined in the common 5-dimensional one. The prediction of the extra grasp depth substantially strengthens feature learning, thereby leading to more accurate results. Moreover, to reduce the negative impact caused by the discrepancy of data quality in two modalities, a Local Cross-modal Attention (LCA) module is designed, where the depth features are refined according to cross-modal relations and concatenated to the RGB ones for more sufficient fusion. Extensive simulation and physical evaluations are conducted and the experimental results highlight the superiority of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 平面抓取检测是机器人操纵最基本的任务之一，消费级 RGB-D 传感器的最新进展使得能够从纹理和形状模式提供更全面的特征。然而，与 RGB 图像相比，深度图通常质量相对较低，噪声也更强，这使得获取深度图和融合多模态线索变得具有挑战性。为了解决这两个问题，本文提出了一种基于学习的 RGB-D 抓取检测新方法，即深度引导跨模态注意网络（DGCAN）。为了更好地利用深度通道中记录的几何信息，采用完整的 6 维矩形表示，除了常见的 5 维矩形表示之外，还专门考虑了抓取深度。额外掌握深度的预测大大加强了特征学习，从而产生更准确的结果。此外，为了减少两种模态数据质量差异造成的负面影响，设计了局部跨模态注意力（LCA）模块，其中深度特征根据跨模态关系进行细化，并连接到RGB特征以实现更充分的融合。进行了广泛的模拟和物理评估，实验结果凸显了所提出方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度引导的跨模态注意力网络（DGCAN），用于改进RGB-D抓取检测。
AI.motivation: 由于深度图的质量通常低于RGB图像，导致抓取深度获取困难及多模态信息融合具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合6维矩形表示和局部跨模态注意力模块（LCA）的方法，以增强几何信息利用和跨模态特征融合。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真和物理实验验证，该方法在抓取检测任务中表现出优越性。
AI.conclusion: DGCAN方法有效提升了RGB-D抓取检测的精度和鲁棒性，为机器人操作提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Liya Wang,Alex Tien
title: Remote Sensing Scene Classification with Masked Image Modeling (MIM)
title_zh: 使用掩模图像建模 (MIM) 进行遥感场景分类
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.12058
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.12058
abstract: Remote sensing scene classification has been extensively studied for its critical roles in geological survey, oil exploration, traffic management, earthquake prediction, wildfire monitoring, and intelligence monitoring. In the past, the Machine Learning (ML) methods for performing the task mainly used the backbones pretrained in the manner of supervised learning (SL). As Masked Image Modeling (MIM), a self-supervised learning (SSL) technique, has been shown as a better way for learning visual feature representation, it presents a new opportunity for improving ML performance on the scene classification task. This research aims to explore the potential of MIM pretrained backbones on four well-known classification datasets: Merced, AID, NWPU-RESISC45, and Optimal-31. Compared to the published benchmarks, we show that the MIM pretrained Vision Transformer (ViTs) backbones outperform other alternatives (up to 18% on top 1 accuracy) and that the MIM technique can learn better feature representation than the supervised learning counterparts (up to 5% on top 1 accuracy). Moreover, we show that the general-purpose MIM-pretrained ViTs can achieve competitive performance as the specially designed yet complicated Transformer for Remote Sensing (TRS) framework. Our experiment results also provide a performance baseline for future studies.
summary: Remote sensing scene classification has been extensively studied for its critical roles in geological survey, oil exploration, traffic management, earthquake prediction, wildfire monitoring, and intelligence monitoring. In the past, the Machine Learning (ML) methods for performing the task mainly used the backbones pretrained in the manner of supervised learning (SL). As Masked Image Modeling (MIM), a self-supervised learning (SSL) technique, has been shown as a better way for learning visual feature representation, it presents a new opportunity for improving ML performance on the scene classification task. This research aims to explore the potential of MIM pretrained backbones on four well-known classification datasets: Merced, AID, NWPU-RESISC45, and Optimal-31. Compared to the published benchmarks, we show that the MIM pretrained Vision Transformer (ViTs) backbones outperform other alternatives (up to 18% on top 1 accuracy) and that the MIM technique can learn better feature representation than the supervised learning counterparts (up to 5% on top 1 accuracy). Moreover, we show that the general-purpose MIM-pretrained ViTs can achieve competitive performance as the specially designed yet complicated Transformer for Remote Sensing (TRS) framework. Our experiment results also provide a performance baseline for future studies.
abstract_zh: 遥感场景分类因其在地质调查、石油勘探、交通管理、地震预报、野火监测和情报监测等方面的重要作用而被广泛研究。过去，用于执行任务的机器学习（ML）方法主要使用以监督学习（SL）方式预训练的主干网络。作为一种自监督学习 (SSL) 技术，掩模图像建模 (MIM) 已被证明是学习视觉特征表示的更好方法，它为提高场景分类任务上的机器学习性能提供了新的机会。本研究旨在探索 MIM 预训练骨干网在四个著名分类数据集上的潜力：Merced、AID、NWPU-RESISC45 和 Optimal-31。与已发布的基准相比，我们表明 MIM 预训练 Vision Transformer (ViTs) 主干优于其他替代方案（top 1 准确率高达 18%），并且 MIM 技术可以比监督学习技术学到更好的特征表示（top 1 准确率高达 5%）。此外，我们还表明，通用 MIM 预训练的 ViT 可以实现与专门设计但复杂的遥感变压器（TRS）框架一样的竞争性能。我们的实验结果也为未来的研究提供了性能基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过掩码图像建模（MIM）预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）主干网络，在遥感场景分类任务中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法在遥感场景分类中存在局限性，而MIM作为一种自监督学习技术能更有效地学习视觉特征表示，可能提升分类性能。
AI.method: 在四个主流遥感数据集（Merced、AID、NWPU-RESISC45、Optimal-31）上，对比MIM预训练ViT与其他方法（包括监督学习和复杂TRRS框架）的性能差异。
AI.result: MIM预训练ViT在Top-1准确率上最高提升18%，优于监督学习方法5%，且性能与复杂TRRS框架相当，为后续研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: MIM预训练模型在遥感场景分类中表现出显著优势，证明了自监督学习在该领域的有效性，并为未来研究提供了性能基准。
