search_text: Remote Sensing Scene Classification with Masked Image Modeling (MIM) 使用掩模图像建模 (MIM) 进行遥感场景分类 Remote sensing scene classification has been extensively studied for its critical roles in geological survey, oil exploration, traffic management, earthquake prediction, wildfire monitoring, and intelligence monitoring. In the past, the Machine Learning (ML) methods for performing the task mainly used the backbones pretrained in the manner of supervised learning (SL). As Masked Image Modeling (MIM), a self-supervised learning (SSL) technique, has been shown as a better way for learning visual feature representation, it presents a new opportunity for improving ML performance on the scene classification task. This research aims to explore the potential of MIM pretrained backbones on four well-known classification datasets: Merced, AID, NWPU-RESISC45, and Optimal-31. Compared to the published benchmarks, we show that the MIM pretrained Vision Transformer (ViTs) backbones outperform other alternatives (up to 18% on top 1 accuracy) and that the MIM technique can learn better feature representation than the supervised learning counterparts (up to 5% on top 1 accuracy). Moreover, we show that the general-purpose MIM-pretrained ViTs can achieve competitive performance as the specially designed yet complicated Transformer for Remote Sensing (TRS) framework. Our experiment results also provide a performance baseline for future studies. 遥感场景分类因其在地质调查、石油勘探、交通管理、地震预报、野火监测和情报监测等方面的重要作用而被广泛研究。过去，用于执行任务的机器学习（ML）方法主要使用以监督学习（SL）方式预训练的主干网络。作为一种自监督学习 (SSL) 技术，掩模图像建模 (MIM) 已被证明是学习视觉特征表示的更好方法，它为提高场景分类任务上的机器学习性能提供了新的机会。本研究旨在探索 MIM 预训练骨干网在四个著名分类数据集上的潜力：Merced、AID、NWPU-RESISC45 和 Optimal-31。与已发布的基准相比，我们表明 MIM 预训练 Vision Transformer (ViTs) 主干优于其他替代方案（top 1 准确率高达 18%），并且 MIM 技术可以比监督学习技术学到更好的特征表示（top 1 准确率高达 5%）。此外，我们还表明，通用 MIM 预训练的 ViT 可以实现与专门设计但复杂的遥感变压器（TRS）框架一样的竞争性能。我们的实验结果也为未来的研究提供了性能基线。 本文研究了通过掩码图像建模（MIM）预训练视觉Transformer（ViT）主干网络，在遥感场景分类任务中的应用效果。 Liya Wang,Alex Tien cs.CV

authors_text: Chaohui Yu,Qiang Zhou,Jingliang Li,Jianlong Yuan,Zhibin Wang,Fan Wang
title: Foundation Model Drives Weakly Incremental Learning for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 基础模型驱动语义分割的弱增量学习
abstract: Modern incremental learning for semantic segmentation methods usually learn new categories based on dense annotations. Although achieve promising results, pixel-by-pixel labeling is costly and time-consuming. Weakly incremental learning for semantic segmentation (WILSS) is a novel and attractive task, which aims at learning to segment new classes from cheap and widely available image-level labels. Despite the comparable results, the image-level labels can not provide details to locate each segment, which limits the performance of WILSS. This inspires us to think how to improve and effectively utilize the supervision of new classes given image-level labels while avoiding forgetting old ones. In this work, we propose a novel and data-efficient framework for WILSS, named FMWISS. Specifically, we propose pre-training based co-segmentation to distill the knowledge of complementary foundation models for generating dense pseudo labels. We further optimize the noisy pseudo masks with a teacher-student architecture, where a plug-in teacher is optimized with a proposed dense contrastive loss. Moreover, we introduce memory-based copy-paste augmentation to improve the catastrophic forgetting problem of old classes. Extensive experiments on Pascal VOC and COCO datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our framework, e.g., FMWISS achieves 70.7% and 73.3% in the 15-5 VOC setting, outperforming the state-of-the-art method by 3.4% and 6.1%, respectively.
summary: Modern incremental learning for semantic segmentation methods usually learn new categories based on dense annotations. Although achieve promising results, pixel-by-pixel labeling is costly and time-consuming. Weakly incremental learning for semantic segmentation (WILSS) is a novel and attractive task, which aims at learning to segment new classes from cheap and widely available image-level labels. Despite the comparable results, the image-level labels can not provide details to locate each segment, which limits the performance of WILSS. This inspires us to think how to improve and effectively utilize the supervision of new classes given image-level labels while avoiding forgetting old ones. In this work, we propose a novel and data-efficient framework for WILSS, named FMWISS. Specifically, we propose pre-training based co-segmentation to distill the knowledge of complementary foundation models for generating dense pseudo labels. We further optimize the noisy pseudo masks with a teacher-student architecture, where a plug-in teacher is optimized with a proposed dense contrastive loss. Moreover, we introduce memory-based copy-paste augmentation to improve the catastrophic forgetting problem of old classes. Extensive experiments on Pascal VOC and COCO datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our framework, e.g., FMWISS achieves 70.7% and 73.3% in the 15-5 VOC setting, outperforming the state-of-the-art method by 3.4% and 6.1%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 现代语义分割方法的增量学习通常基于密集注释来学习新类别。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但逐像素标记既昂贵又耗时。语义分割的弱增量学习（WILSS）是一项新颖且有吸引力的任务，其目的是学习从廉价且广泛可用的图像级标签中分割新类别。尽管结果具有可比性，但图像级标签无法提供定位每个片段的详细信息，这限制了 WILSS 的性能。这启发我们思考如何改进和有效利用给定图像级标签的新类的监督，同时避免忘记旧类。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且数据高效的 WILSS 框架，名为 FMWISS。具体来说，我们提出基于预训练的联合分割来提取互补基础模型的知识，以生成密集的伪标签。我们通过师生架构进一步优化噪声伪掩模，其中插件教师通过建议的密集对比损失进行优化。此外，我们引入基于内存的复制粘贴增强来改善旧类的灾难性遗忘问题。在 Pascal VOC 和 COCO 数据集上的大量实验证明了我们的框架的优越性能，例如，FMWISS 在 15-5 VOC 设置中达到了 70.7% 和 73.3%，分别比最先进的方法高出 3.4% 和 6.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于基础模型的弱增量学习框架FMWISS，用于语义分割任务，通过图像级标签实现新类别的学习并避免遗忘旧类别。
AI.motivation: 现有增量学习方法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而弱增量学习（WILSS）仅使用图像级标签，但其定位精度不足，需提升监督效果并防止旧类别遗忘。
AI.method: 提出预训练协同分割生成伪标签，结合教师-学生架构与密集对比损失优化伪掩码，并引入记忆增强的复制粘贴数据增强缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC和COCO数据集上，FMWISS在15-5 VOC设置下分别达到70.7%和73.3%，较现有方法提升3.4%和6.1%。
AI.conclusion: FMWISS通过基础模型知识蒸馏与优化策略，有效利用图像级标签提升弱增量学习性能，为减少标注成本提供新思路。

authors_text: Boren Jiang,Ximeng Tao,Yuanfeng Han,Wanze Li,Gregory S. Chirikjian
title: Model-Free and Learning-Free Proprioceptive Humanoid Movement Control
title_zh: 无模型和免学习本体感觉人形运动控制
abstract: This paper presents a novel model-free method for humanoid-robot quasi-static movement control. Traditional model-based methods often require precise robot model parameters. Additionally, existing learning-based frameworks often train the policy in simulation environments, thereby indirectly relying on a model. In contrast, we propose a proprioceptive framework based only on sensory outputs. It does not require prior knowledge of a robot's kinematic model or inertial parameters. Our method consists of three steps: 1. Planning different pairs of center of pressure (CoP) and foot position objectives within a single cycle. 2. Searching around the current configuration by slightly moving the robot's leg joints back and forth while recording the sensor measurements of its CoP and foot positions. 3. Updating the robot motion with an optimization algorithm until all objectives are achieved. We demonstrate our approach on a NAO humanoid robot platform. Experiment results show that it can successfully generate stable robot motions.
summary: This paper presents a novel model-free method for humanoid-robot quasi-static movement control. Traditional model-based methods often require precise robot model parameters. Additionally, existing learning-based frameworks often train the policy in simulation environments, thereby indirectly relying on a model. In contrast, we propose a proprioceptive framework based only on sensory outputs. It does not require prior knowledge of a robot's kinematic model or inertial parameters. Our method consists of three steps: 1. Planning different pairs of center of pressure (CoP) and foot position objectives within a single cycle. 2. Searching around the current configuration by slightly moving the robot's leg joints back and forth while recording the sensor measurements of its CoP and foot positions. 3. Updating the robot motion with an optimization algorithm until all objectives are achieved. We demonstrate our approach on a NAO humanoid robot platform. Experiment results show that it can successfully generate stable robot motions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的仿人机器人准静态运动控制无模型方法。传统的基于模型的方法通常需要精确的机器人模型参数。此外，现有的基于学习的框架通常在模拟环境中训练策略，从而间接依赖于模型。相反，我们提出了一个仅基于感觉输出的本体感觉框架。它不需要机器人运动学模型或惯性参数的先验知识。我们的方法由三个步骤组成： 1. 在单个周期内规划不同对的压力中心 (CoP) 和足部位置目标。 2. 通过稍微前后移动机器人的腿部关节来搜索当前配置，同时记录其 CoP 和脚位置的传感器测量值。 3. 使用优化算法更新机器人运动，直到实现所有目标。我们在 NAO 人形机器人平台上展示了​​我们的方法。实验结果表明，它可以成功地产生稳定的机器人运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需模型和学习的人形机器人运动控制方法，仅依赖于本体感觉反馈实现稳定运动。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的方法依赖精确的机器人参数，而基于学习的框架需在仿真中训练策略，间接依赖模型。现有方法存在模型依赖性和训练成本高的问题。
AI.method: 方法分为三步：1. 规划单周期内足底压力中心(CoP)与足部位置目标对；2. 通过微调腿部关节并记录传感器数据进行局部搜索；3. 使用优化算法更新机器人运动直至目标达成。
AI.result: 在NAO人形机器人平台实验验证，成功生成稳定运动，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉框架无需先验模型参数或学习过程，为复杂环境下的人形机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yifan Zeng,Suiyi He,Han Hoang Nguyen,Yihan Li,Zhongyu Li,Koushil Sreenath,Jun Zeng
title: i2LQR: Iterative LQR for Iterative Tasks in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: i2LQR：动态环境中迭代任务的迭代 LQR
comment: Accepted by 2023 62nd IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC)
comments: Accepted by 2023 62nd IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC)
abstract: This work introduces a novel control strategy called Iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator for Iterative Tasks (i2LQR), which aims to improve closed-loop performance with local trajectory optimization for iterative tasks in a dynamic environment. The proposed algorithm is reference-free and utilizes historical data from previous iterations to enhance the performance of the autonomous system. Unlike existing algorithms, the i2LQR computes the optimal solution in an iterative manner at each timestamp, rendering it well-suited for iterative tasks with changing constraints at different iterations. To evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm, we conduct numerical simulations for an iterative task aimed at minimizing completion time. The results show that i2LQR achieves an optimized performance with respect to learning-based MPC (LMPC) as the benchmark in static environments, and outperforms LMPC in dynamic environments with both static and dynamics obstacles.
summary: This work introduces a novel control strategy called Iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator for Iterative Tasks (i2LQR), which aims to improve closed-loop performance with local trajectory optimization for iterative tasks in a dynamic environment. The proposed algorithm is reference-free and utilizes historical data from previous iterations to enhance the performance of the autonomous system. Unlike existing algorithms, the i2LQR computes the optimal solution in an iterative manner at each timestamp, rendering it well-suited for iterative tasks with changing constraints at different iterations. To evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm, we conduct numerical simulations for an iterative task aimed at minimizing completion time. The results show that i2LQR achieves an optimized performance with respect to learning-based MPC (LMPC) as the benchmark in static environments, and outperforms LMPC in dynamic environments with both static and dynamics obstacles.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了一种称为迭代任务迭代线性二次调节器（i2LQR）的新颖控制策略，旨在通过动态环境中迭代任务的局部轨迹优化来提高闭环性能。所提出的算法是无参考的，并利用先前迭代的历史数据来增强自治系统的性能。与现有算法不同，i2LQR 在每个时间戳以迭代方式计算最优解，使其非常适合在不同迭代时约束条件发生变化的迭代任务。为了评估所提出算法的性能，我们对旨在最小化完成时间的迭代任务进行数值模拟。结果表明，i2LQR 在静态环境中以基于学习的 MPC（LMPC）为基准实现了优化性能，并且在具有静态和动态障碍的动态环境中优于 LMPC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为i2LQR的新型控制策略，用于动态环境中的迭代任务，通过局部轨迹优化提升闭环性能。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理动态环境中的变化约束和迭代任务时存在性能局限，需开发一种无需参考轨迹且能利用历史数据的优化方法。
AI.method: i2LQR采用迭代线性二次调节器框架，在每个时间戳通过迭代计算最优解，并利用历史数据增强动态环境下的适应性。
AI.result: 数值模拟表明，i2LQR在静态环境和含静态/动态障碍物的动态环境中均优于基准的基于学习的MPC方法。
AI.conclusion: i2LQR通过迭代优化和历史数据利用，有效提升了动态环境下迭代任务的控制性能，适用于复杂约束场景。

authors_text: Ruihan Zhao,Ufuk Topcu,Sandeep Chinchali,Mariano Phielipp
title: Learning Sparse Control Tasks from Pixels by Latent Nearest-Neighbor-Guided Explorations
title_zh: 通过潜在最近邻引导探索从像素学习稀疏控制任务
abstract: Recent progress in deep reinforcement learning (RL) and computer vision enables artificial agents to solve complex tasks, including locomotion, manipulation and video games from high-dimensional pixel observations. However, domain specific reward functions are often engineered to provide sufficient learning signals, requiring expert knowledge. While it is possible to train vision-based RL agents using only sparse rewards, additional challenges in exploration arise. We present a novel and efficient method to solve sparse-reward robot manipulation tasks from only image observations by utilizing a few demonstrations. First, we learn an embedded neural dynamics model from demonstration transitions and further fine-tune it with the replay buffer. Next, we reward the agents for staying close to the demonstrated trajectories using a distance metric defined in the embedding space. Finally, we use an off-policy, model-free vision RL algorithm to update the control policies. Our method achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency in simulation and enables efficient training of a real Franka Emika Panda manipulator.
summary: Recent progress in deep reinforcement learning (RL) and computer vision enables artificial agents to solve complex tasks, including locomotion, manipulation and video games from high-dimensional pixel observations. However, domain specific reward functions are often engineered to provide sufficient learning signals, requiring expert knowledge. While it is possible to train vision-based RL agents using only sparse rewards, additional challenges in exploration arise. We present a novel and efficient method to solve sparse-reward robot manipulation tasks from only image observations by utilizing a few demonstrations. First, we learn an embedded neural dynamics model from demonstration transitions and further fine-tune it with the replay buffer. Next, we reward the agents for staying close to the demonstrated trajectories using a distance metric defined in the embedding space. Finally, we use an off-policy, model-free vision RL algorithm to update the control policies. Our method achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency in simulation and enables efficient training of a real Franka Emika Panda manipulator.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (RL) 和计算机视觉的最新进展使人工智能体能够通过高维像素观察来解决复杂的任务，包括运动、操纵和视频游戏。然而，特定领域的奖励函数通常被设计为提供足够的学习信号，需要专业知识。虽然仅使用稀疏奖励来训练基于视觉的 RL 代理是可能的，但探索中会出现额外的挑战。我们提出了一种新颖而有效的方法，通过一些演示，仅通过图像观察来解决稀疏奖励机器人操作任务。首先，我们从演示转换中学习嵌入式神经动力学模型，并使用重放缓冲区进一步对其进行微调。接下来，我们使用嵌入空间中定义的距离度量来奖励保持接近演示轨迹的代理。最后，我们使用离策略、无模型的视觉强化学习算法来更新控制策略。我们的方法在模拟中实现了最先进的样本效率，并能够有效训练真正的 Franka Emika Panda 机械臂。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在空间最近邻引导探索的方法，通过少量演示解决稀疏奖励下的机器人操作任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习依赖专家设计的领域特定奖励函数，而稀疏奖励场景下探索效率低下，需减少对专家知识的依赖并提升样本效率。
AI.method: 1. 从演示数据中学习嵌入式神经动力学模型并用回放缓冲区微调；2. 在嵌入空间定义距离度量，奖励代理保持演示轨迹邻近性；3. 采用无模型异策略视觉RL算法更新控制策略。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中达到最先进样本效率，并成功应用于真实Franka Emika Panda机械臂的高效训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间引导探索有效解决了稀疏奖励问题，为基于视觉的现实机器人操作提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhongli Fan,Li Zhang,Yuxuan Liu
title: Nonlinear Intensity, Scale and Rotation Invariant Matching for Multimodal Images
title_zh: 多模态图像的非线性强度、尺度和旋转不变匹配
abstract: We present an effective method for the matching of multimodal images. Accurate image matching is the basis of various applications, such as image registration and structure from motion. Conventional matching methods fail when handling noisy multimodal image pairs with severe scale change, rotation, and nonlinear intensity distortion (NID). Toward this need, we introduce an image pyramid strategy to tackle scale change. We put forward an accurate primary orientation estimation approach to reduce the effect of image rotation at any angle. We utilize multi-scale and multi-orientation image filtering results and a feature-to-template matching scheme to ensure effective and accurate matching under large NID. Integrating these improvements significantly increases noise, scale, rotation, and NID invariant capability. Our experimental results confirm the excellent ability to achieve high-quality matches across various multimodal images. The proposed method outperforms the mainstream multimodal image matching methods in qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Zhongli-Fan/NISR.
summary: We present an effective method for the matching of multimodal images. Accurate image matching is the basis of various applications, such as image registration and structure from motion. Conventional matching methods fail when handling noisy multimodal image pairs with severe scale change, rotation, and nonlinear intensity distortion (NID). Toward this need, we introduce an image pyramid strategy to tackle scale change. We put forward an accurate primary orientation estimation approach to reduce the effect of image rotation at any angle. We utilize multi-scale and multi-orientation image filtering results and a feature-to-template matching scheme to ensure effective and accurate matching under large NID. Integrating these improvements significantly increases noise, scale, rotation, and NID invariant capability. Our experimental results confirm the excellent ability to achieve high-quality matches across various multimodal images. The proposed method outperforms the mainstream multimodal image matching methods in qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Zhongli-Fan/NISR.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种有效的多模态图像匹配方法。精确的图像匹配是各种应用的基础，例如图像配准和运动结构。当处理具有严重尺度变化、旋转和非线性强度失真 (NID) 的噪声多模态图像对时，传统的匹配方法会失败。针对这一需求，我们引入了图像金字塔策略来应对尺度变化。我们提出了一种准确的主方向估计方法来减少任意角度图像旋转的影响。我们利用多尺度和多方向的图像过滤结果以及特征到模板的匹配方案来确保大NID下的有效和准确的匹配。集成这些改进显着提高了噪声、尺度、旋转和 NID 不变能力。我们的实验结果证实了在各种多模态图像之间实现高质量匹配的出色能力。该方法在定性和定量评估方面均优于主流的多模态图像匹配方法。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/Zhongli-Fan/NISR 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对多模态图像的非线性强度、尺度和旋转不变匹配方法，以解决传统方法在噪声、尺度变化、旋转和非线性强度失真下的匹配失效问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态图像匹配方法在处理存在严重尺度变化、旋转和非线性强度失真（NID）的噪声图像时效果不佳，亟需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入图像金字塔策略应对尺度变化，提出精确的主方向估计方法减少旋转影响，并结合多尺度多方向图像滤波结果与特征到模板的匹配方案，增强对NID的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多种多模态图像上实现高质量匹配，定性和定量评估均优于主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过集成尺度、旋转和NID不变性改进，显著提升了多模态图像匹配的准确性与稳定性。

search_text: Nonlinear Intensity, Scale and Rotation Invariant Matching for Multimodal Images 多模态图像的非线性强度、尺度和旋转不变匹配 We present an effective method for the matching of multimodal images. Accurate image matching is the basis of various applications, such as image registration and structure from motion. Conventional matching methods fail when handling noisy multimodal image pairs with severe scale change, rotation, and nonlinear intensity distortion (NID). Toward this need, we introduce an image pyramid strategy to tackle scale change. We put forward an accurate primary orientation estimation approach to reduce the effect of image rotation at any angle. We utilize multi-scale and multi-orientation image filtering results and a feature-to-template matching scheme to ensure effective and accurate matching under large NID. Integrating these improvements significantly increases noise, scale, rotation, and NID invariant capability. Our experimental results confirm the excellent ability to achieve high-quality matches across various multimodal images. The proposed method outperforms the mainstream multimodal image matching methods in qualitative and quantitative evaluations. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Zhongli-Fan/NISR. 我们提出了一种有效的多模态图像匹配方法。精确的图像匹配是各种应用的基础，例如图像配准和运动结构。当处理具有严重尺度变化、旋转和非线性强度失真 (NID) 的噪声多模态图像对时，传统的匹配方法会失败。针对这一需求，我们引入了图像金字塔策略来应对尺度变化。我们提出了一种准确的主方向估计方法来减少任意角度图像旋转的影响。我们利用多尺度和多方向的图像过滤结果以及特征到模板的匹配方案来确保大NID下的有效和准确的匹配。集成这些改进显着提高了噪声、尺度、旋转和 NID 不变能力。我们的实验结果证实了在各种多模态图像之间实现高质量匹配的出色能力。该方法在定性和定量评估方面均优于主流的多模态图像匹配方法。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/Zhongli-Fan/NISR 上找到。 本文提出一种针对多模态图像的非线性强度、尺度和旋转不变匹配方法，以解决传统方法在噪声、尺度变化、旋转和非线性强度失真下的匹配失效问题。 Zhongli Fan,Li Zhang,Yuxuan Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Kay Hutchinson,Zongyu Li,Ian Reyes,Homa Alemzadeh
title: Towards Surgical Context Inference and Translation to Gestures
title_zh: 走向手术背景推断和手势翻译
comment: accepted for the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: accepted for the 2023 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Manual labeling of gestures in robot-assisted surgery is labor intensive, prone to errors, and requires expertise or training. We propose a method for automated and explainable generation of gesture transcripts that leverages the abundance of data for image segmentation. Surgical context is detected using segmentation masks by examining the distances and intersections between the tools and objects. Next, context labels are translated into gesture transcripts using knowledge-based Finite State Machine (FSM) and data-driven Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) models. We evaluate the performance of each stage of our method by comparing the results with the ground truth segmentation masks, the consensus context labels, and the gesture labels in the JIGSAWS dataset. Our results show that our segmentation models achieve state-of-the-art performance in recognizing needle and thread in Suturing and we can automatically detect important surgical states with high agreement with crowd-sourced labels (e.g., contact between graspers and objects in Suturing). We also find that the FSM models are more robust to poor segmentation and labeling performance than LSTMs. Our proposed method can significantly shorten the gesture labeling process (~2.8 times).
summary: Manual labeling of gestures in robot-assisted surgery is labor intensive, prone to errors, and requires expertise or training. We propose a method for automated and explainable generation of gesture transcripts that leverages the abundance of data for image segmentation. Surgical context is detected using segmentation masks by examining the distances and intersections between the tools and objects. Next, context labels are translated into gesture transcripts using knowledge-based Finite State Machine (FSM) and data-driven Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) models. We evaluate the performance of each stage of our method by comparing the results with the ground truth segmentation masks, the consensus context labels, and the gesture labels in the JIGSAWS dataset. Our results show that our segmentation models achieve state-of-the-art performance in recognizing needle and thread in Suturing and we can automatically detect important surgical states with high agreement with crowd-sourced labels (e.g., contact between graspers and objects in Suturing). We also find that the FSM models are more robust to poor segmentation and labeling performance than LSTMs. Our proposed method can significantly shorten the gesture labeling process (~2.8 times).
abstract_zh: 在机器人辅助手术中手动标记手势是劳动密集型的，容易出错，并且需要专业知识或培训。我们提出了一种自动且可解释的手势记录生成方法，该方法利用大量数据进行图像分割。通过检查工具和对象之间的距离和交叉点，使用分割掩模来检测手术环境。接下来，使用基于知识的有限状态机 (FSM) 和数据驱动的长短期记忆 (LSTM) 模型将上下文标签转换为手势转录本。我们通过将结果与 JIGSAWS 数据集中的地面实况分割掩模、共识上下文标签和手势标签进行比较来评估我们方法每个阶段的性能。我们的结果表明，我们的分割模型在识别缝合中的针和线方面实现了最先进的性能，并且我们可以自动检测与众包标签高度一致的重要手术状态（例如，缝合中抓握器和物体之间的接触）。我们还发现，FSM 模型对于较差的分割和标记性能比 LSTM 更稳健。我们提出的方法可以显着缩短手势标记过程（约 2.8 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化生成手术手势转录的方法，通过图像分割和有限状态机（FSM）与长短期记忆网络（LSTM）模型实现手术上下文推理与手势翻译。
AI.motivation: 手动标注手术手势耗时且易出错，需专业知识和培训，亟需自动化且可解释的解决方案以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 利用图像分割掩码检测手术上下文，通过工具与物体的距离和交集分析生成上下文标签；结合基于知识的FSM和数据驱动的LSTM模型将上下文转换为手势转录，并在JIGSAWS数据集上验证性能。
AI.result: 分割模型在缝合任务中实现针线识别的最先进性能，与众包标注的高一致性（如夹持器与物体接触状态）；FSM在分割和标注性能较差时比LSTM更鲁棒，可将手势标注流程缩短约2.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了手术手势标注的自动化水平，FSM的鲁棒性和效率优势显著，为机器人辅助手术的智能分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ruiqi Zhong,Peter Zhang,Steve Li,Jinwoo Ahn,Dan Klein,Jacob Steinhardt
title: Goal Driven Discovery of Distributional Differences via Language Descriptions
title_zh: 通过语言描述目标驱动发现分布差异
abstract: Mining large corpora can generate useful discoveries but is time-consuming for humans. We formulate a new task, D5, that automatically discovers differences between two large corpora in a goal-driven way. The task input is a problem comprising a research goal "$\textit{comparing the side effects of drug A and drug B}$" and a corpus pair (two large collections of patients' self-reported reactions after taking each drug). The output is a language description (discovery) of how these corpora differ (patients taking drug A "$\textit{mention feelings of paranoia}$" more often). We build a D5 system, and to quantitatively measure its performance, we 1) contribute a meta-dataset, OpenD5, aggregating 675 open-ended problems ranging across business, social sciences, humanities, machine learning, and health, and 2) propose a set of unified evaluation metrics: validity, relevance, novelty, and significance. With the dataset and the unified metrics, we confirm that language models can use the goals to propose more relevant, novel, and significant candidate discoveries. Finally, our system produces discoveries previously unknown to the authors on a wide range of applications in OpenD5, including temporal and demographic differences in discussion topics, political stances and stereotypes in speech, insights in commercial reviews, and error patterns in NLP models.
summary: Mining large corpora can generate useful discoveries but is time-consuming for humans. We formulate a new task, D5, that automatically discovers differences between two large corpora in a goal-driven way. The task input is a problem comprising a research goal "$\textit{comparing the side effects of drug A and drug B}$" and a corpus pair (two large collections of patients' self-reported reactions after taking each drug). The output is a language description (discovery) of how these corpora differ (patients taking drug A "$\textit{mention feelings of paranoia}$" more often). We build a D5 system, and to quantitatively measure its performance, we 1) contribute a meta-dataset, OpenD5, aggregating 675 open-ended problems ranging across business, social sciences, humanities, machine learning, and health, and 2) propose a set of unified evaluation metrics: validity, relevance, novelty, and significance. With the dataset and the unified metrics, we confirm that language models can use the goals to propose more relevant, novel, and significant candidate discoveries. Finally, our system produces discoveries previously unknown to the authors on a wide range of applications in OpenD5, including temporal and demographic differences in discussion topics, political stances and stereotypes in speech, insights in commercial reviews, and error patterns in NLP models.
abstract_zh: 挖掘大型语料库可以产生有用的发现，但对人类来说非常耗时。我们制定了一个新任务 D5，它以目标驱动的方式自动发现两个大型语料库之间的差异。任务输入是一个由研究目标“$\textit{比较药物A和药物B的副作用}$”和一个语料对（患者服用每种药物后的自我报告反应的两个大集合）组成的问题。输出是这些语料库差异的语言描述（发现）（服用药物 A“$\textit{提及偏执狂的感觉}$”的患者更频繁）。我们构建了一个 D5 系统，为了定量衡量其性能，我们 1) 贡献了一个元数据集 OpenD5，聚合了涵盖商业、社会科学、人文、机器学习和健康领域的 675 个开放式问题，2) 提出了一套统一的评估指标：有效性、相关性、新颖性和重要性。通过数据集和统一的指标，我们确认语言模型可以使用目标来提出更相关、新颖和重要的候选发现。最后，我们的系统在 OpenD5 的广泛应用中产生了作者以前未知的发现，包括讨论主题中的时间和人口统计差异、演讲中的政治立场和刻板印象、商业评论中的见解以及 NLP 模型中的错误模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D5的新任务，通过语言描述自动以目标驱动的方式发现两个大型语料库之间的分布差异。
AI.motivation: 手动挖掘大规模语料库以发现有用信息耗时且效率低，需自动化方法根据研究目标快速识别语料库间的差异。
AI.method: 构建D5系统，结合研究目标（如药物副作用比较）与语料库对，利用语言模型生成差异描述；创建OpenD5元数据集（含675个跨领域问题）及统一评估指标（有效性、相关性、新颖性、显著性）进行量化验证。
AI.result: 系统在OpenD5数据集上生成了作者未知的新发现，涵盖时间/人口统计差异、政治立场、商业评论洞察及NLP模型错误模式等多领域应用。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型可基于目标驱动生成相关且具显著性的分布差异发现，为跨领域研究提供自动化分析工具。

method: 构建D5系统，结合研究目标（如药物副作用比较）与语料库对，利用语言模型生成差异描述；创建OpenD5元数据集（含675个跨领域问题）及统一评估指标（有效性、相关性、新颖性、显著性）进行量化验证。
result: 系统在OpenD5数据集上生成了作者未知的新发现，涵盖时间/人口统计差异、政治立场、商业评论洞察及NLP模型错误模式等多领域应用。
conclusion: 语言模型可基于目标驱动生成相关且具显著性的分布差异发现，为跨领域研究提供自动化分析工具。
search_text: Goal Driven Discovery of Distributional Differences via Language Descriptions 通过语言描述目标驱动发现分布差异 Mining large corpora can generate useful discoveries but is time-consuming for humans. We formulate a new task, D5, that automatically discovers differences between two large corpora in a goal-driven way. The task input is a problem comprising a research goal "$\textit{comparing the side effects of drug A and drug B}$" and a corpus pair (two large collections of patients' self-reported reactions after taking each drug). The output is a language description (discovery) of how these corpora differ (patients taking drug A "$\textit{mention feelings of paranoia}$" more often). We build a D5 system, and to quantitatively measure its performance, we 1) contribute a meta-dataset, OpenD5, aggregating 675 open-ended problems ranging across business, social sciences, humanities, machine learning, and health, and 2) propose a set of unified evaluation metrics: validity, relevance, novelty, and significance. With the dataset and the unified metrics, we confirm that language models can use the goals to propose more relevant, novel, and significant candidate discoveries. Finally, our system produces discoveries previously unknown to the authors on a wide range of applications in OpenD5, including temporal and demographic differences in discussion topics, political stances and stereotypes in speech, insights in commercial reviews, and error patterns in NLP models. 挖掘大型语料库可以产生有用的发现，但对人类来说非常耗时。我们制定了一个新任务 D5，它以目标驱动的方式自动发现两个大型语料库之间的差异。任务输入是一个由研究目标“$\textit{比较药物A和药物B的副作用}$”和一个语料对（患者服用每种药物后的自我报告反应的两个大集合）组成的问题。输出是这些语料库差异的语言描述（发现）（服用药物 A“$\textit{提及偏执狂的感觉}$”的患者更频繁）。我们构建了一个 D5 系统，为了定量衡量其性能，我们 1) 贡献了一个元数据集 OpenD5，聚合了涵盖商业、社会科学、人文、机器学习和健康领域的 675 个开放式问题，2) 提出了一套统一的评估指标：有效性、相关性、新颖性和重要性。通过数据集和统一的指标，我们确认语言模型可以使用目标来提出更相关、新颖和重要的候选发现。最后，我们的系统在 OpenD5 的广泛应用中产生了作者以前未知的发现，包括讨论主题中的时间和人口统计差异、演讲中的政治立场和刻板印象、商业评论中的见解以及 NLP 模型中的错误模式。 本文提出了一种名为D5的新任务，通过语言描述自动以目标驱动的方式发现两个大型语料库之间的分布差异。 Ruiqi Zhong,Peter Zhang,Steve Li,Jinwoo Ahn,Dan Klein,Jacob Steinhardt cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiaan Wang,Yunlong Liang,Fandong Meng,Beiqi Zou,Zhixu Li,Jianfeng Qu,Jie Zhou
title: Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Summarization via Large Language Models
title_zh: 通过大型语言模型进行零样本跨语言摘要
comment: Both first authors contributed equally. Technical Report, 12 pages. Accepted to the 4th New Frontiers in Summarization Workshop (NewSumm@EMNLP 2023)
comments: Both first authors contributed equally. Technical Report, 12 pages. Accepted to the 4th New Frontiers in Summarization Workshop (NewSumm@EMNLP 2023)
abstract: Given a document in a source language, cross-lingual summarization (CLS) aims to generate a summary in a different target language. Recently, the emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs), such as GPT-3.5, ChatGPT and GPT-4, has attracted wide attention from the computational linguistics community. However, it is not yet known the performance of LLMs on CLS. In this report, we empirically use various prompts to guide LLMs to perform zero-shot CLS from different paradigms (i.e., end-to-end and pipeline), and provide a preliminary evaluation on the generated summaries. We find that ChatGPT and GPT-4 originally prefer to produce lengthy summaries with detailed information. These two LLMs can further balance informativeness and conciseness with the help of an interactive prompt, significantly improving their CLS performance. Experimental results on three widely-used CLS datasets show that GPT-4 achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot CLS performance, and performs competitively compared with the fine-tuned mBART-50. Moreover, we also find some multi-lingual and bilingual LLMs (i.e., BLOOMZ, ChatGLM-6B, Vicuna-13B and ChatYuan) have limited zero-shot CLS ability. Due to the composite nature of CLS, which requires models to perform summarization and translation simultaneously, accomplishing this task in a zero-shot manner is even a challenge for LLMs. Therefore, we sincerely hope and recommend future LLM research could use CLS as a testbed.

Recently, the emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs), such as GPT-3.5, ChatGPT and GPT-4, has attracted wide attention from the computational linguistics community. However, it is not yet known the performance of LLMs on CLS. In this report, we empirically use various prompts to guide LLMs to perform zero-shot CLS from different paradigms (i.e., end-to-end and pipeline), and provide a preliminary evaluation on the generated summaries. We find that ChatGPT and GPT-4 originally prefer to produce lengthy summaries with detailed information. These two LLMs can further balance informativeness and conciseness with the help of an interactive prompt, significantly improving their CLS performance. Experimental results on three widely-used CLS datasets show that GPT-4 achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot CLS performance, and performs competitively compared with the fine-tuned mBART-50. Moreover, we also find some multi-lingual and bilingual LLMs (i.e., BLOOMZ, ChatGLM-6B, Vicuna-13B and ChatYuan) have limited zero-shot CLS ability. Due to the composite nature of CLS, which requires models to perform summarization and translation simultaneously, accomplishing this task in a zero-shot manner is even a challenge for LLMs. Therefore, we sincerely hope and recommend future LLM research could use CLS as a testbed.
abstract_zh: 给定源语言的文档，跨语言摘要（CLS）旨在生成不同目标语言的摘要。近年来，GPT-3.5、ChatGPT和GPT-4等大型语言模型（LLM）的出现引起了计算语言学界的广泛关注。然而，目前尚不清楚 LLM 在 CLS 上的表现。在本报告中，我们根据经验使用各种提示来指导法学硕士从不同范式（即端到端和管道）执行零样本 CLS，并对生成的摘要进行初步评估。我们发现 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 最初更喜欢生成包含详细信息的冗长摘要。这两位法学硕士可以借助交互式提示进一步平衡信息性和简洁性，显着提高他们的 CLS 表现。在三个广泛使用的 CLS 数据集上的实验结果表明，GPT-4 实现了最先进的零样本 CLS 性能，并且与微调后的 mBART-50 相比具有竞争力。此外，我们还发现一些多语言和双语 LLM（即 BLOOMZ、ChatGLM-6B、Vicuna-13B 和 ChatYuan）的零样本 CLS 能力有限。由于 CLS 的复合性质，需要模型同时执行摘要和翻译，以零样本的方式完成这项任务对于法学硕士来说甚至是一个挑战。因此，我们真诚地希望并推荐未来的LLM研究可以使用CLS作为测试平台。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了大型语言模型（LLMs）在零样本跨语言摘要（CLS）任务中的性能，并探索了不同提示方法对模型表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型（如GPT-4）在自然语言处理领域表现出色，但其在零样本跨语言摘要任务中的表现尚未被系统研究，而该任务需同时完成摘要与翻译，具有较高复杂性。
AI.method: 通过设计多种提示策略（如端到端和流水线范式），引导LLMs进行零样本CLS，并在三个常用数据集上评估生成摘要的质量。
AI.result: GPT-4在零样本CLS中达到最先进水平，且在交互式提示下显著提升表现；而部分多语言LLMs（如BLOOMZ）的零样本能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 零样本跨语言摘要任务对LLMs构成挑战，建议未来研究将CLS作为评估模型能力的基准测试场景。

authors_text: Linhan Zhang,Qian Chen,Wen Wang,Chong Deng,Xin Cao,Kongzhang Hao,Yuxin Jiang,Wei Wang
title: Weighted Sampling for Masked Language Modeling
title_zh: 掩码语言建模的加权采样
abstract: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) is widely used to pretrain language models. The standard random masking strategy in MLM causes the pre-trained language models (PLMs) to be biased toward high-frequency tokens. Representation learning of rare tokens is poor and PLMs have limited performance on downstream tasks. To alleviate this frequency bias issue, we propose two simple and effective Weighted Sampling strategies for masking tokens based on the token frequency and training loss. We apply these two strategies to BERT and obtain Weighted-Sampled BERT (WSBERT). Experiments on the Semantic Textual Similarity benchmark (STS) show that WSBERT significantly improves sentence embeddings over BERT. Combining WSBERT with calibration methods and prompt learning further improves sentence embeddings. We also investigate fine-tuning WSBERT on the GLUE benchmark and show that Weighted Sampling also improves the transfer learning capability of the backbone PLM. We further analyze and provide insights into how WSBERT improves token embeddings.
summary: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) is widely used to pretrain language models. The standard random masking strategy in MLM causes the pre-trained language models (PLMs) to be biased toward high-frequency tokens. Representation learning of rare tokens is poor and PLMs have limited performance on downstream tasks. To alleviate this frequency bias issue, we propose two simple and effective Weighted Sampling strategies for masking tokens based on the token frequency and training loss. We apply these two strategies to BERT and obtain Weighted-Sampled BERT (WSBERT). Experiments on the Semantic Textual Similarity benchmark (STS) show that WSBERT significantly improves sentence embeddings over BERT. Combining WSBERT with calibration methods and prompt learning further improves sentence embeddings. We also investigate fine-tuning WSBERT on the GLUE benchmark and show that Weighted Sampling also improves the transfer learning capability of the backbone PLM. We further analyze and provide insights into how WSBERT improves token embeddings.
abstract_zh: 掩码语言建模（MLM）广泛用于预训练语言模型。 MLM 中的标准随机屏蔽策略导致预训练语言模型 (PLM) 偏向于高频标记。稀有代币的表示学习很差，PLM 在下游任务上的性能有限。为了缓解这种频率偏差问题，我们提出了两种简单有效的加权采样策略，用于根据令牌频率和训练损失来屏蔽令牌。我们将这两种策略应用到 BERT 中，得到加权采样 BERT (WSBERT)。语义文本相似度基准（STS）的实验表明，WSBERT 比 BERT 显着改善了句子嵌入。将 WSBERT 与校准方法和提示学习相结合进一步改善了句子嵌入。我们还研究了在 GLUE 基准上微调 WSBERT，并表明加权采样还提高了骨干 PLM 的迁移学习能力。我们进一步分析并提供有关 WSBERT 如何改进令牌嵌入的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种加权采样策略以改进掩码语言模型（MLM）中的随机掩码方法，解决预训练语言模型对高频词的偏向问题。
AI.motivation: 标准随机掩码策略导致预训练模型偏向高频词，稀有词表示学习效果差，下游任务性能受限。
AI.method: 基于词频和训练损失设计两种加权采样策略，应用于BERT生成WSBERT模型。
AI.result: 在STS基准测试中WSBERT显著提升句子嵌入质量，结合校准方法和提示学习进一步优化；在GLUE基准上显示更好的迁移学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 加权采样有效改善词嵌入质量，提升模型在语义相似度和迁移学习任务中的表现。

Combining WSBERT with calibration methods and prompt learning further improves sentence embeddings. We also investigate fine-tuning WSBERT on the GLUE benchmark and show that Weighted Sampling also improves the transfer learning capability of the backbone PLM. We further analyze and provide insights into how WSBERT improves token embeddings. 掩码语言建模（MLM）广泛用于预训练语言模型。 MLM 中的标准随机屏蔽策略导致预训练语言模型 (PLM) 偏向于高频标记。稀有代币的表示学习很差，PLM 在下游任务上的性能有限。为了缓解这种频率偏差问题，我们提出了两种简单有效的加权采样策略，用于根据令牌频率和训练损失来屏蔽令牌。我们将这两种策略应用到 BERT 中，得到加权采样 BERT (WSBERT)。语义文本相似度基准（STS）的实验表明，WSBERT 比 BERT 显着改善了句子嵌入。将 WSBERT 与校准方法和提示学习相结合进一步改善了句子嵌入。我们还研究了在 GLUE 基准上微调 WSBERT，并表明加权采样还提高了骨干 PLM 的迁移学习能力。我们进一步分析并提供有关 WSBERT 如何改进令牌嵌入的见解。 本文提出两种加权采样策略以改进掩码语言模型（MLM）中的随机掩码方法，解决预训练语言模型对高频词的偏向问题。 Linhan Zhang,Qian Chen,Wen Wang,Chong Deng,Xin Cao,Kongzhang Hao,Yuxin Jiang,Wei Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Amar Ali-bey,Brahim Chaib-draa,Philippe Giguère
title: Global Proxy-based Hard Mining for Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 基于全局代理的视觉地点识别硬挖掘
abstract: Learning deep representations for visual place recognition is commonly performed using pairwise or triple loss functions that highly depend on the hardness of the examples sampled at each training iteration. Existing techniques address this by using computationally and memory expensive offline hard mining, which consists of identifying, at each iteration, the hardest samples from the training set. In this paper we introduce a new technique that performs global hard mini-batch sampling based on proxies. To do so, we add a new end-to-end trainable branch to the network, which generates efficient place descriptors (one proxy for each place). These proxy representations are thus used to construct a global index that encompasses the similarities between all places in the dataset, allowing for highly informative mini-batch sampling at each training iteration. Our method can be used in combination with all existing pairwise and triplet loss functions with negligible additional memory and computation cost. We run extensive ablation studies and show that our technique brings new state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale benchmarks such as Pittsburgh, Mapillary-SLS and SPED. In particular, our method provides more than 100% relative improvement on the challenging Nordland dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/amaralibey/GPM
summary: Learning deep representations for visual place recognition is commonly performed using pairwise or triple loss functions that highly depend on the hardness of the examples sampled at each training iteration. Existing techniques address this by using computationally and memory expensive offline hard mining, which consists of identifying, at each iteration, the hardest samples from the training set. In this paper we introduce a new technique that performs global hard mini-batch sampling based on proxies. To do so, we add a new end-to-end trainable branch to the network, which generates efficient place descriptors (one proxy for each place). These proxy representations are thus used to construct a global index that encompasses the similarities between all places in the dataset, allowing for highly informative mini-batch sampling at each training iteration. Our method can be used in combination with all existing pairwise and triplet loss functions with negligible additional memory and computation cost. We run extensive ablation studies and show that our technique brings new state-of-the-art performance on multiple large-scale benchmarks such as Pittsburgh, Mapillary-SLS and SPED. In particular, our method provides more than 100% relative improvement on the challenging Nordland dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/amaralibey/GPM
abstract_zh: 学习视觉位置识别的深度表示通常使用成对或三重损失函数来执行，这些函数高度依赖于每次训练迭代中采样的示例的硬度。现有技术通过使用计算和内存昂贵的离线硬挖掘来解决这个问题，其中包括在每次迭代时识别训练集中最难的样本。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于代理执行全局硬小批量采样的新技术。为此，我们向网络添加一个新的端到端可训练分支，该分支生成有效的位置描述符（每个位置一个代理）。因此，这些代理表示用于构建一个全局索引，该索引包含数据集中所有位置之间的相似性，从而允许在每次训练迭代时进行信息丰富的小批量采样。我们的方法可以与所有现有的成对和三元组损失函数结合使用，而额外的内存和计算成本可以忽略不计。我们进行了广泛的消融研究，结果表明我们的技术在匹兹堡、Mapillary-SLS 和 SPED 等多个大规模基准测试中带来了最先进的性能。特别是，我们的方法在具有挑战性的 Nordland 数据集上提供了超过 100% 的相对改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/amaralibey/GPM 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局代理的硬样本挖掘方法，用于改进视觉地点识别的深度表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖计算和内存消耗大的离线硬挖掘，难以高效获取训练样本的最难例。
AI.method: 在网络中新增可训练分支生成地点代理描述符，构建全局相似性索引，实现高效mini-batch采样。
AI.result: 在Pittsburgh、Mapillary-SLS等基准测试中达到SOTA性能，Nordland数据集相对提升超100%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以极低计算成本兼容各类损失函数，显著提升视觉地点识别性能。

authors_text: Tung Thai,Ming Shen,Mayank Garg,Ayush Kalani,Nakul Vaidya,Utkarsh Soni,Mudit Verma,Sriram Gopalakrishnan,Neeraj Varshney,Chitta Baral,Subbarao Kambhampati,Jivko Sinapov,Matthias Scheutz
title: Methods and Mechanisms for Interactive Novelty Handling in Adversarial Environments
title_zh: 对抗环境中交互式新颖性处理的方法和机制
abstract: Learning to detect, characterize and accommodate novelties is a challenge that agents operating in open-world domains need to address to be able to guarantee satisfactory task performance. Certain novelties (e.g., changes in environment dynamics) can interfere with the performance or prevent agents from accomplishing task goals altogether. In this paper, we introduce general methods and architectural mechanisms for detecting and characterizing different types of novelties, and for building an appropriate adaptive model to accommodate them utilizing logical representations and reasoning methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods in evaluations performed by a third party in the adversarial multi-agent board game Monopoly. The results show high novelty detection and accommodation rates across a variety of novelty types, including changes to the rules of the game, as well as changes to the agent's action capabilities.
summary: Learning to detect, characterize and accommodate novelties is a challenge that agents operating in open-world domains need to address to be able to guarantee satisfactory task performance. Certain novelties (e.g., changes in environment dynamics) can interfere with the performance or prevent agents from accomplishing task goals altogether. In this paper, we introduce general methods and architectural mechanisms for detecting and characterizing different types of novelties, and for building an appropriate adaptive model to accommodate them utilizing logical representations and reasoning methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods in evaluations performed by a third party in the adversarial multi-agent board game Monopoly. The results show high novelty detection and accommodation rates across a variety of novelty types, including changes to the rules of the game, as well as changes to the agent's action capabilities.
abstract_zh: 学习检测、表征和适应新奇事物是在开放世界域中运行的智能体需要解决的一个挑战，以保证令人满意的任务性能。某些新奇事物（例如，环境动态的变化）可能会干扰性能或阻止智能体完全完成任务目标。在本文中，我们介绍了用于检测和表征不同类型的新颖性的通用方法和架构机制，以及利用逻辑表示和推理方法构建适当的自适应模型来适应它们。我们证明了所提出的方法在第三方在对抗性多智能体棋盘游戏大富翁中进行的评估中的有效性。结果显示，各种新颖性类型的新颖性检测和适应率很高，包括游戏规则的变化以及智能体行动能力的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在对抗环境中处理新颖性的通用方法和架构机制，通过逻辑表示和推理方法构建适应模型，并在《大富翁》游戏中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 开放世界中的智能体需应对环境动态变化等新颖性挑战，传统方法难以有效检测和适应多种类型的新颖性，影响任务性能。
AI.method: 利用逻辑表示和推理方法，设计检测与表征不同新颖性的通用机制，并构建适应模型以处理对抗环境中的变化。
AI.result: 在第三方评估的《大富翁》游戏中，方法成功检测并适应了规则变更和行动能力变化等多类型新颖性，表现出高检测率和适应率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效应对对抗环境中的新颖性，为开放世界智能体的适应性研究提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Kareem Ahmed,Kai-Wei Chang,Guy Van den Broeck
title: Semantic Strengthening of Neuro-Symbolic Learning
title_zh: 神经符号学习的语义强化
abstract: Numerous neuro-symbolic approaches have recently been proposed typically with the goal of adding symbolic knowledge to the output layer of a neural network. Ideally, such losses maximize the probability that the neural network's predictions satisfy the underlying domain. Unfortunately, this type of probabilistic inference is often computationally infeasible. Neuro-symbolic approaches therefore commonly resort to fuzzy approximations of this probabilistic objective, sacrificing sound probabilistic semantics, or to sampling which is very seldom feasible. We approach the problem by first assuming the constraint decomposes conditioned on the features learned by the network. We iteratively strengthen our approximation, restoring the dependence between the constraints most responsible for degrading the quality of the approximation. This corresponds to computing the mutual information between pairs of constraints conditioned on the network's learned features, and may be construed as a measure of how well aligned the gradients of two distributions are. We show how to compute this efficiently for tractable circuits. We test our approach on three tasks: predicting a minimum-cost path in Warcraft, predicting a minimum-cost perfect matching, and solving Sudoku puzzles, observing that it improves upon the baselines while sidestepping intractability.
summary: Numerous neuro-symbolic approaches have recently been proposed typically with the goal of adding symbolic knowledge to the output layer of a neural network. Ideally, such losses maximize the probability that the neural network's predictions satisfy the underlying domain. Unfortunately, this type of probabilistic inference is often computationally infeasible. Neuro-symbolic approaches therefore commonly resort to fuzzy approximations of this probabilistic objective, sacrificing sound probabilistic semantics, or to sampling which is very seldom feasible. We approach the problem by first assuming the constraint decomposes conditioned on the features learned by the network. We iteratively strengthen our approximation, restoring the dependence between the constraints most responsible for degrading the quality of the approximation. This corresponds to computing the mutual information between pairs of constraints conditioned on the network's learned features, and may be construed as a measure of how well aligned the gradients of two distributions are. We show how to compute this efficiently for tractable circuits. We test our approach on three tasks: predicting a minimum-cost path in Warcraft, predicting a minimum-cost perfect matching, and solving Sudoku puzzles, observing that it improves upon the baselines while sidestepping intractability.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了许多神经符号方法，其目标通常是将符号知识添加到神经网络的输出层。理想情况下，这种损失可以最大化神经网络的预测满足基础领域的概率。不幸的是，这种类型的概率推理在计算上通常是不可行的。因此，神经符号方法通常诉诸于该概率目标的模糊近似，牺牲合理的概率语义，或者采用几乎不可行的采样。我们首先假设约束根据网络学习到的特征进行分解来解决这个问题。我们迭代地加强我们的近似，恢复最能降低近似质量的约束之间的依赖性。这对应于计算以网络学习特征为条件的约束对之间的互信息，并且可以被解释为两个分布的梯度对齐程度的度量。我们展示了如何针对易于处理的电路有效地计算这一点。我们在三个任务上测试我们的方法：预测魔兽争霸中的最小成本路径，预测最小成本完美匹配，以及解决数独谜题，观察它在避开棘手问题的同时在基线上进行了改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经符号学习的语义强化方法，通过迭代加强近似来提高预测质量。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号方法在概率推理时计算复杂，常使用模糊近似或采样，但牺牲了概率语义或不可行。
AI.method: 假设约束基于网络特征分解，通过计算约束对的互信息迭代加强近似，适用于可处理电路。
AI.result: 在Warcraft路径预测、完美匹配和数独任务中优于基线方法，且避免计算困难。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过恢复约束依赖关系提升近似质量，为神经符号学习提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Semantic Strengthening of Neuro-Symbolic Learning 神经符号学习的语义强化 Numerous neuro-symbolic approaches have recently been proposed typically with the goal of adding symbolic knowledge to the output layer of a neural network. Ideally, such losses maximize the probability that the neural network's predictions satisfy the underlying domain. Unfortunately, this type of probabilistic inference is often computationally infeasible. Neuro-symbolic approaches therefore commonly resort to fuzzy approximations of this probabilistic objective, sacrificing sound probabilistic semantics, or to sampling which is very seldom feasible. We approach the problem by first assuming the constraint decomposes conditioned on the features learned by the network. We iteratively strengthen our approximation, restoring the dependence between the constraints most responsible for degrading the quality of the approximation. This corresponds to computing the mutual information between pairs of constraints conditioned on the network's learned features, and may be construed as a measure of how well aligned the gradients of two distributions are. We show how to compute this efficiently for tractable circuits. We test our approach on three tasks: predicting a minimum-cost path in Warcraft, predicting a minimum-cost perfect matching, and solving Sudoku puzzles, observing that it improves upon the baselines while sidestepping intractability. 最近提出了许多神经符号方法，其目标通常是将符号知识添加到神经网络的输出层。理想情况下，这种损失可以最大化神经网络的预测满足基础领域的概率。不幸的是，这种类型的概率推理在计算上通常是不可行的。因此，神经符号方法通常诉诸于该概率目标的模糊近似，牺牲合理的概率语义，或者采用几乎不可行的采样。我们首先假设约束根据网络学习到的特征进行分解来解决这个问题。我们迭代地加强我们的近似，恢复最能降低近似质量的约束之间的依赖性。这对应于计算以网络学习特征为条件的约束对之间的互信息，并且可以被解释为两个分布的梯度对齐程度的度量。我们展示了如何针对易于处理的电路有效地计算这一点。我们在三个任务上测试我们的方法：预测魔兽争霸中的最小成本路径，预测最小成本完美匹配，以及解决数独谜题，观察它在避开棘手问题的同时在基线上进行了改进。 提出一种神经符号学习的语义强化方法，通过迭代加强近似来提高预测质量。 Kareem Ahmed,Kai-Wei Chang,Guy Van den Broeck cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhongjie Yu,Shuyang Wang,Lin Chen,Zhongwei Cheng
title: HalluAudio: Hallucinating Frequency as Concepts for Few-Shot Audio Classification
title_zh: HalluAudio：幻觉频率作为少样本音频分类的概念
abstract: Few-shot audio classification is an emerging topic that attracts more and more attention from the research community. Most existing work ignores the specificity of the form of the audio spectrogram and focuses largely on the embedding space borrowed from image tasks, while in this work, we aim to take advantage of this special audio format and propose a new method by hallucinating high-frequency and low-frequency parts as structured concepts. Extensive experiments on ESC-50 and our curated balanced Kaggle18 dataset show the proposed method outperforms the baseline by a notable margin. The way that our method hallucinates high-frequency and low-frequency parts also enables its interpretability and opens up new potentials for the few-shot audio classification.
summary: Few-shot audio classification is an emerging topic that attracts more and more attention from the research community. Most existing work ignores the specificity of the form of the audio spectrogram and focuses largely on the embedding space borrowed from image tasks, while in this work, we aim to take advantage of this special audio format and propose a new method by hallucinating high-frequency and low-frequency parts as structured concepts. Extensive experiments on ESC-50 and our curated balanced Kaggle18 dataset show the proposed method outperforms the baseline by a notable margin. The way that our method hallucinates high-frequency and low-frequency parts also enables its interpretability and opens up new potentials for the few-shot audio classification.
abstract_zh: 小样本音频分类是一个新兴课题，吸引了研究界越来越多的关注。大多数现有工作忽略了音频频谱图形式的特殊性，主要关注从图像任务借用的嵌入空间，而在这项工作中，我们的目标是利用这种特殊的音频格式，并通过将高频和低频部分幻觉为结构化概念来提出一种新方法。在 ESC-50 和我们策划的平衡 Kaggle18 数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于基线。我们的方法产生高频和低频部分的方式也使其具有可解释性，并为少样本音频分类开辟了新的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种少样本音频分类方法，通过将高频和低频部分幻觉为结构化概念来提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视音频频谱图的特殊性，过度依赖图像任务的嵌入空间，而音频的频率特性本身蕴含重要分类信息。
AI.method: 通过生成对抗网络幻觉音频频谱的高频和低频区域，将其作为结构化概念注入模型，增强频率特征的可解释性与判别性。
AI.result: 在ESC-50和Kaggle18数据集上显著超越基线方法，且通过频率区域的可视化验证了方法的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 利用频率域结构化概念能有效提升少样本音频分类性能，为音频表征学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Minoru Kuribayashi,Koki Nakai,Nobuo Funabiki
title: Image-Based Virtual Try-on System With Clothing-Size Adjustment
title_zh: 基于图像的服装尺码虚拟试穿系统
abstract: The conventional image-based virtual try-on method cannot generate fitting images that correspond to the clothing size because the system cannot accurately reflect the body information of a person. In this study, an image-based virtual try-on system that could adjust the clothing size was proposed. The size information of the person and clothing were used as the input for the proposed method to visualize the fitting of various clothing sizes in a virtual space. First, the distance between the shoulder width and height of the clothing in the person image is calculated based on the coordinate information of the key points detected by OpenPose. Then, the system changes the size of only the clothing area of the segmentation map, whose layout is estimated using the size of the person measured in the person image based on the ratio of the person and clothing sizes. If the size of the clothing area increases during the drawing, the details in the collar and overlapping areas are corrected to improve visual appearance.
summary: The conventional image-based virtual try-on method cannot generate fitting images that correspond to the clothing size because the system cannot accurately reflect the body information of a person. In this study, an image-based virtual try-on system that could adjust the clothing size was proposed. The size information of the person and clothing were used as the input for the proposed method to visualize the fitting of various clothing sizes in a virtual space. First, the distance between the shoulder width and height of the clothing in the person image is calculated based on the coordinate information of the key points detected by OpenPose. Then, the system changes the size of only the clothing area of the segmentation map, whose layout is estimated using the size of the person measured in the person image based on the ratio of the person and clothing sizes. If the size of the clothing area increases during the drawing, the details in the collar and overlapping areas are corrected to improve visual appearance.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于图像的虚拟试穿方法无法生成与服装尺寸相对应的试衣图像，因为系统无法准确反映人的身体信息。在这项研究中，提出了一种基于图像的可以调整服装尺寸的虚拟试穿系统。人和衣服的尺寸信息被用作所提出的方法的输入，以可视化虚拟空间中各种服装尺寸的合身情况。首先，根据OpenPose检测到的关键点的坐标信息，计算人物图像中衣服的肩宽和肩高的距离。然后，系统仅改变分割图的服装区域的尺寸，其布局是根据人与服装尺寸的比率，使用在人物图像中测量的人的尺寸来估计的。如果在绘图过程中衣服区域的尺寸增加，则会校正衣领和重叠区域的细节以改善视觉外观。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像的虚拟试衣系统，能够根据人体尺寸调整衣物大小，以生成更贴合的虚拟试衣效果。
AI.motivation: 传统基于图像的虚拟试衣方法无法准确反映人体尺寸与衣物尺寸的对应关系，导致生成的试衣图像不够贴合。
AI.method: 利用OpenPose检测人体关键点坐标，计算肩宽与身高的比例关系；通过分割图调整衣物区域尺寸，并根据人体与衣物尺寸比例修正领口和重叠区域的细节。
AI.result: 系统可在虚拟空间中可视化多种尺寸的衣物试穿效果，通过细节修正提升了视觉表现的真实性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合人体尺寸与衣物比例调整，有效解决了传统虚拟试衣系统中衣物尺寸不匹配的问题。

search_text: Image-Based Virtual Try-on System With Clothing-Size Adjustment 基于图像的服装尺码虚拟试穿系统 The conventional image-based virtual try-on method cannot generate fitting images that correspond to the clothing size because the system cannot accurately reflect the body information of a person. In this study, an image-based virtual try-on system that could adjust the clothing size was proposed. The size information of the person and clothing were used as the input for the proposed method to visualize the fitting of various clothing sizes in a virtual space. First, the distance between the shoulder width and height of the clothing in the person image is calculated based on the coordinate information of the key points detected by OpenPose. Then, the system changes the size of only the clothing area of the segmentation map, whose layout is estimated using the size of the person measured in the person image based on the ratio of the person and clothing sizes. If the size of the clothing area increases during the drawing, the details in the collar and overlapping areas are corrected to improve visual appearance. 传统的基于图像的虚拟试穿方法无法生成与服装尺寸相对应的试衣图像，因为系统无法准确反映人的身体信息。在这项研究中，提出了一种基于图像的可以调整服装尺寸的虚拟试穿系统。人和衣服的尺寸信息被用作所提出的方法的输入，以可视化虚拟空间中各种服装尺寸的合身情况。首先，根据OpenPose检测到的关键点的坐标信息，计算人物图像中衣服的肩宽和肩高的距离。然后，系统仅改变分割图的服装区域的尺寸，其布局是根据人与服装尺寸的比率，使用在人物图像中测量的人的尺寸来估计的。如果在绘图过程中衣服区域的尺寸增加，则会校正衣领和重叠区域的细节以改善视觉外观。 本文提出了一种基于图像的虚拟试衣系统，能够根据人体尺寸调整衣物大小，以生成更贴合的虚拟试衣效果。 Minoru Kuribayashi,Koki Nakai,Nobuo Funabiki cs.CV

authors_text: Pranav Kadam,Jiahao Gu,Shan Liu,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: PointFlowHop: Green and Interpretable Scene Flow Estimation from Consecutive Point Clouds
title_zh: PointFlowHop：来自连续点云的绿色且可解释的场景流估计
abstract: An efficient 3D scene flow estimation method called PointFlowHop is proposed in this work. PointFlowHop takes two consecutive point clouds and determines the 3D flow vectors for every point in the first point cloud. PointFlowHop decomposes the scene flow estimation task into a set of subtasks, including ego-motion compensation, object association and object-wise motion estimation. It follows the green learning (GL) pipeline and adopts the feedforward data processing path. As a result, its underlying mechanism is more transparent than deep-learning (DL) solutions based on end-to-end optimization of network parameters. We conduct experiments on the stereoKITTI and the Argoverse LiDAR point cloud datasets and demonstrate that PointFlowHop outperforms deep-learning methods with a small model size and less training time. Furthermore, we compare the Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) required by PointFlowHop and other learning-based methods in inference, and show its big savings in computational complexity.
summary: An efficient 3D scene flow estimation method called PointFlowHop is proposed in this work. PointFlowHop takes two consecutive point clouds and determines the 3D flow vectors for every point in the first point cloud. PointFlowHop decomposes the scene flow estimation task into a set of subtasks, including ego-motion compensation, object association and object-wise motion estimation. It follows the green learning (GL) pipeline and adopts the feedforward data processing path. As a result, its underlying mechanism is more transparent than deep-learning (DL) solutions based on end-to-end optimization of network parameters. We conduct experiments on the stereoKITTI and the Argoverse LiDAR point cloud datasets and demonstrate that PointFlowHop outperforms deep-learning methods with a small model size and less training time. Furthermore, we compare the Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) required by PointFlowHop and other learning-based methods in inference, and show its big savings in computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种称为 PointFlowHop 的高效 3D 场景流估计方法。 PointFlowHop 采用两个连续的点云并确定第一个点云中每个点的 3D 流向量。 PointFlowHop 将场景流估计任务分解为一组子任务，包括自我运动补偿、对象关联和对象运动估计。它遵循绿色学习（GL）流程并采用前馈数据处理路径。因此，其底层机制比基于网络参数端到端优化的深度学习（DL）解决方案更加透明。我们在 StereoKITTI 和 Argoverse LiDAR 点云数据集上进行了实验，并证明 PointFlowHop 凭借较小的模型尺寸和更少的训练时间优于深度学习方法。此外，我们比较了 PointFlowHop 和其他基于学习的推理方法所需的浮点运算 (FLOP)，并显示了其在计算复杂性方面的巨大节省。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效且可解释的3D场景流估计方法PointFlowHop，通过分解任务并采用绿色学习框架，从连续点云中估计每个点的3D流向量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法存在模型复杂度高、训练时间长及可解释性差的问题，需开发更高效、透明的场景流估计方法。
AI.method: 将场景流估计分解为自运动补偿、物体关联和物体级运动估计，并采用绿色学习（GL）管道和前馈数据处理路径，提升透明度和效率。
AI.result: 在stereoKITTI和Argoverse数据集上，PointFlowHop在模型大小、训练时间及计算复杂度（FLOPs）上优于现有深度学习方法，同时保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: PointFlowHop通过任务分解和绿色学习框架，在保证性能的同时实现高效、可解释的场景流估计，为3D场景理解提供新思路。

search_text: PointFlowHop: Green and Interpretable Scene Flow Estimation from Consecutive Point Clouds PointFlowHop：来自连续点云的绿色且可解释的场景流估计 An efficient 3D scene flow estimation method called PointFlowHop is proposed in this work. PointFlowHop takes two consecutive point clouds and determines the 3D flow vectors for every point in the first point cloud. PointFlowHop decomposes the scene flow estimation task into a set of subtasks, including ego-motion compensation, object association and object-wise motion estimation. It follows the green learning (GL) pipeline and adopts the feedforward data processing path. As a result, its underlying mechanism is more transparent than deep-learning (DL) solutions based on end-to-end optimization of network parameters. We conduct experiments on the stereoKITTI and the Argoverse LiDAR point cloud datasets and demonstrate that PointFlowHop outperforms deep-learning methods with a small model size and less training time. Furthermore, we compare the Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) required by PointFlowHop and other learning-based methods in inference, and show its big savings in computational complexity. 这项工作提出了一种称为 PointFlowHop 的高效 3D 场景流估计方法。 PointFlowHop 采用两个连续的点云并确定第一个点云中每个点的 3D 流向量。 PointFlowHop 将场景流估计任务分解为一组子任务，包括自我运动补偿、对象关联和对象运动估计。它遵循绿色学习（GL）流程并采用前馈数据处理路径。因此，其底层机制比基于网络参数端到端优化的深度学习（DL）解决方案更加透明。我们在 StereoKITTI 和 Argoverse LiDAR 点云数据集上进行了实验，并证明 PointFlowHop 凭借较小的模型尺寸和更少的训练时间优于深度学习方法。此外，我们比较了 PointFlowHop 和其他基于学习的推理方法所需的浮点运算 (FLOP)，并显示了其在计算复杂性方面的巨大节省。 提出一种高效且可解释的3D场景流估计方法PointFlowHop，通过分解任务并采用绿色学习框架，从连续点云中估计每个点的3D流向量。 Pranav Kadam,Jiahao Gu,Shan Liu,C. -C. Jay Kuo cs.CV

authors_text: Wenqing Zheng,Edward W Huang,Nikhil Rao,Zhangyang Wang,Karthik Subbian
title: You Only Transfer What You Share: Intersection-Induced Graph Transfer Learning for Link Prediction
title_zh: 您只传输您共享的内容：用于链接预测的交叉点诱导图迁移学习
abstract: Link prediction is central to many real-world applications, but its performance may be hampered when the graph of interest is sparse. To alleviate issues caused by sparsity, we investigate a previously overlooked phenomenon: in many cases, a densely connected, complementary graph can be found for the original graph. The denser graph may share nodes with the original graph, which offers a natural bridge for transferring selective, meaningful knowledge. We identify this setting as Graph Intersection-induced Transfer Learning (GITL), which is motivated by practical applications in e-commerce or academic co-authorship predictions. We develop a framework to effectively leverage the structural prior in this setting. We first create an intersection subgraph using the shared nodes between the two graphs, then transfer knowledge from the source-enriched intersection subgraph to the full target graph. In the second step, we consider two approaches: a modified label propagation, and a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) model in a teacher-student regime. Experimental results on proprietary e-commerce datasets and open-source citation graphs show that the proposed workflow outperforms existing transfer learning baselines that do not explicitly utilize the intersection structure.
summary: Link prediction is central to many real-world applications, but its performance may be hampered when the graph of interest is sparse. To alleviate issues caused by sparsity, we investigate a previously overlooked phenomenon: in many cases, a densely connected, complementary graph can be found for the original graph. The denser graph may share nodes with the original graph, which offers a natural bridge for transferring selective, meaningful knowledge. We identify this setting as Graph Intersection-induced Transfer Learning (GITL), which is motivated by practical applications in e-commerce or academic co-authorship predictions. We develop a framework to effectively leverage the structural prior in this setting. We first create an intersection subgraph using the shared nodes between the two graphs, then transfer knowledge from the source-enriched intersection subgraph to the full target graph. In the second step, we consider two approaches: a modified label propagation, and a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) model in a teacher-student regime. Experimental results on proprietary e-commerce datasets and open-source citation graphs show that the proposed workflow outperforms existing transfer learning baselines that do not explicitly utilize the intersection structure.
abstract_zh: 链接预测是许多现实应用程序的核心，但当感兴趣的图稀疏时，其性能可能会受到影响。为了缓解稀疏性引起的问题，我们研究了一个以前被忽视的现象：在许多情况下，可以为原始图找到一个紧密连接的互补图。更密集的图可以与原始图共享节点，这为传输选择性的、有意义的知识提供了天然的桥梁。我们将这种设置称为图交集诱导迁移学习（GITL），它是由电子商务或学术合着预测中的实际应用激发的。我们开发了一个框架来有效利用这种情况下的结构先验。我们首先使用两个图之间的共享节点创建一个交集子图，然后将知识从源丰富的交集子图转移到完整的目标图。在第二步中，我们考虑两种方法：修改后的标签传播和师生体系中的多层感知器（MLP）模型。在专有电子商务数据集和开源引文图上的实验结果表明，所提出的工作流程优于未明确利用交叉结构的现有迁移学习基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图交集诱导的迁移学习方法（GITL），用于解决稀疏图中的链接预测问题。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，稀疏图的链接预测性能较差，而存在一个与原图共享节点的密集图可以作为知识迁移的桥梁，从而提高预测性能。
AI.method: 首先构建两个图的交集子图，然后通过修改后的标签传播算法或教师-学生模式下的多层感知机（MLP）模型，从源图的交集子图中迁移知识到目标图。
AI.result: 在电子商务和学术引用数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法优于不显式利用交集结构的现有迁移学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用图交集结构有效迁移知识，显著提升了稀疏图中链接预测的性能。

authors_text: Joshua Aurand,Steven Cutlip,Henry Lei,Kendra Lang,Sean Phillips
title: Exposure-Based Multi-Agent Inspection of a Tumbling Target Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习对翻滚目标进行基于曝光的多智能体检查
abstract: As space becomes more congested, on orbit inspection is an increasingly relevant activity whether to observe a defunct satellite for planning repairs or to de-orbit it. However, the task of on orbit inspection itself is challenging, typically requiring the careful coordination of multiple observer satellites. This is complicated by a highly nonlinear environment where the target may be unknown or moving unpredictably without time for continuous command and control from the ground. There is a need for autonomous, robust, decentralized solutions to the inspection task. To achieve this, we consider a hierarchical, learned approach for the decentralized planning of multi-agent inspection of a tumbling target. Our solution consists of two components: a viewpoint or high-level planner trained using deep reinforcement learning and a navigation planner handling point-to-point navigation between pre-specified viewpoints. We present a novel problem formulation and methodology that is suitable not only to reinforcement learning-derived robust policies, but extendable to unknown target geometries and higher fidelity information theoretic objectives received directly from sensor inputs. Operating under limited information, our trained multi-agent high-level policies successfully contextualize information within the global hierarchical environment and are correspondingly able to inspect over 90% of non-convex tumbling targets, even in the absence of additional agent attitude control.
summary: As space becomes more congested, on orbit inspection is an increasingly relevant activity whether to observe a defunct satellite for planning repairs or to de-orbit it. However, the task of on orbit inspection itself is challenging, typically requiring the careful coordination of multiple observer satellites. This is complicated by a highly nonlinear environment where the target may be unknown or moving unpredictably without time for continuous command and control from the ground. There is a need for autonomous, robust, decentralized solutions to the inspection task. To achieve this, we consider a hierarchical, learned approach for the decentralized planning of multi-agent inspection of a tumbling target. Our solution consists of two components: a viewpoint or high-level planner trained using deep reinforcement learning and a navigation planner handling point-to-point navigation between pre-specified viewpoints. We present a novel problem formulation and methodology that is suitable not only to reinforcement learning-derived robust policies, but extendable to unknown target geometries and higher fidelity information theoretic objectives received directly from sensor inputs. Operating under limited information, our trained multi-agent high-level policies successfully contextualize information within the global hierarchical environment and are correspondingly able to inspect over 90% of non-convex tumbling targets, even in the absence of additional agent attitude control.
abstract_zh: 随着太空变得更加拥挤，无论是观察报废卫星以计划维修还是使其脱离轨道，在轨检查都成为一项越来越重要的活动。然而，在轨检查任务本身具有挑战性，通常需要多颗观测卫星的仔细协调。由于高度非线性的环境，情况变得更加复杂，在这种环境中，目标可能未知或不可预测地移动，而没有时间从地面进行连续命令和控制。检测任务需要自主、稳健、分散的解决方案。为了实现这一目标，我们考虑采用一种分层的、学习的方法来对翻滚目标的多智能体检查进行分散规划。我们的解决方案由两个组件组成：使用深度强化学习训练的视点或高级规划器，以及处理预先指定的视点之间的点对点导航的导航规划器。我们提出了一种新颖的问题表述和方法，不仅适用于强化学习衍生的稳健策略，而且可扩展到未知的目标几何形状和直接从传感器输入接收的更高保真度信息理论目标。在有限的信息下运行，我们训练有素的多智能体高级策略成功地将信息置于全局分层环境中，并且相应地能够检查超过 90% 的非凸翻滚目标，即使在没有额外的智能体姿态控制的情况下也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的多智能体协同方法，用于对空间中非凸旋转目标进行自主检测。
AI.motivation: 随着太空环境日益拥挤，需要自主、鲁棒的多卫星协同检测技术以应对不可预测的旋转目标，传统方法难以满足动态环境需求。
AI.method: 采用分层架构，包含基于深度强化学习的高层视角规划器和点对点导航规划器，结合传感器输入实现未知目标几何形状的扩展性检测。
AI.result: 训练后的多智能体策略在无额外姿态控制情况下，成功检测超过90%的非凸旋转目标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了分层强化学习框架在复杂太空环境中的有效性，为自主化在轨检测提供了可行方案。

ai_content.result: 训练后的多智能体策略在无额外姿态控制情况下，成功检测超过90%的非凸旋转目标。

search_text: Exposure-Based Multi-Agent Inspection of a Tumbling Target Using Deep Reinforcement Learning 使用深度强化学习对翻滚目标进行基于曝光的多智能体检查 As space becomes more congested, on orbit inspection is an increasingly relevant activity whether to observe a defunct satellite for planning repairs or to de-orbit it. However, the task of on orbit inspection itself is challenging, typically requiring the careful coordination of multiple observer satellites. This is complicated by a highly nonlinear environment where the target may be unknown or moving unpredictably without time for continuous command and control from the ground. There is a need for autonomous, robust, decentralized solutions to the inspection task. To achieve this, we consider a hierarchical, learned approach for the decentralized planning of multi-agent inspection of a tumbling target. Our solution consists of two components: a viewpoint or high-level planner trained using deep reinforcement learning and a navigation planner handling point-to-point navigation between pre-specified viewpoints. We present a novel problem formulation and methodology that is suitable not only to reinforcement learning-derived robust policies, but extendable to unknown target geometries and higher fidelity information theoretic objectives received directly from sensor inputs. Operating under limited information, our trained multi-agent high-level policies successfully contextualize information within the global hierarchical environment and are correspondingly able to inspect over 90% of non-convex tumbling targets, even in the absence of additional agent attitude control. 随着太空变得更加拥挤，无论是观察报废卫星以计划维修还是使其脱离轨道，在轨检查都成为一项越来越重要的活动。然而，在轨检查任务本身具有挑战性，通常需要多颗观测卫星的仔细协调。由于高度非线性的环境，情况变得更加复杂，在这种环境中，目标可能未知或不可预测地移动，而没有时间从地面进行连续命令和控制。检测任务需要自主、稳健、分散的解决方案。为了实现这一目标，我们考虑采用一种分层的、学习的方法来对翻滚目标的多智能体检查进行分散规划。我们的解决方案由两个组件组成：使用深度强化学习训练的视点或高级规划器，以及处理预先指定的视点之间的点对点导航的导航规划器。我们提出了一种新颖的问题表述和方法，不仅适用于强化学习衍生的稳健策略，而且可扩展到未知的目标几何形状和直接从传感器输入接收的更高保真度信息理论目标。在有限的信息下运行，我们训练有素的多智能体高级策略成功地将信息置于全局分层环境中，并且相应地能够检查超过 90% 的非凸翻滚目标，即使在没有额外的智能体姿态控制的情况下也是如此。 本文提出基于深度强化学习的多智能体协同方法，用于对空间中非凸旋转目标进行自主检测。 Joshua Aurand,Steven Cutlip,Henry Lei,Kendra Lang,Sean Phillips cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Michele Garibbo,Maxime Robeyns,Laurence Aitchison
title: Taylor TD-learning
title_zh: 泰勒TD学习
comment: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2023
abstract: Many reinforcement learning approaches rely on temporal-difference (TD) learning to learn a critic. However, TD-learning updates can be high variance. Here, we introduce a model-based RL framework, Taylor TD, which reduces this variance in continuous state-action settings. Taylor TD uses a first-order Taylor series expansion of TD updates. This expansion allows Taylor TD to analytically integrate over stochasticity in the action-choice, and some stochasticity in the state distribution for the initial state and action of each TD update. We include theoretical and empirical evidence that Taylor TD updates are indeed lower variance than standard TD updates. Additionally, we show Taylor TD has the same stable learning guarantees as standard TD-learning with linear function approximation under a reasonable assumption. Next, we combine Taylor TD with the TD3 algorithm, forming TaTD3. We show TaTD3 performs as well, if not better, than several state-of-the art model-free and model-based baseline algorithms on a set of standard benchmark tasks.
summary: Many reinforcement learning approaches rely on temporal-difference (TD) learning to learn a critic. However, TD-learning updates can be high variance. Here, we introduce a model-based RL framework, Taylor TD, which reduces this variance in continuous state-action settings. Taylor TD uses a first-order Taylor series expansion of TD updates. This expansion allows Taylor TD to analytically integrate over stochasticity in the action-choice, and some stochasticity in the state distribution for the initial state and action of each TD update. We include theoretical and empirical evidence that Taylor TD updates are indeed lower variance than standard TD updates. Additionally, we show Taylor TD has the same stable learning guarantees as standard TD-learning with linear function approximation under a reasonable assumption. Next, we combine Taylor TD with the TD3 algorithm, forming TaTD3. We show TaTD3 performs as well, if not better, than several state-of-the art model-free and model-based baseline algorithms on a set of standard benchmark tasks.
abstract_zh: 许多强化学习方法依靠时差（TD）学习来学习批评者。然而，TD 学习更新可能具有很高的方差。在这里，我们引入了一种基于模型的 RL 框架 Taylor TD，它可以减少连续状态-动作设置中的这种方差。泰勒 TD 使用 TD 更新的一阶泰勒级数展开。这种扩展允许泰勒 TD 分析地整合动作选择中的随机性，以及每个 TD 更新的初始状态和动作的状态分布中的一些随机性。我们提供的理论和经验证据表明，泰勒 TD 更新的方差确实低于标准 TD 更新。此外，我们表明泰勒 TD 与在合理假设下使用线性函数逼近的标准 TD 学习具有相同的稳定学习保证。接下来，我们将 Taylor TD 与 TD3 算法结合起来，形成 TaTD3。我们证明，在一组标准基准测试任务上，TaTD3 的性能即使不是更好，也比几种最先进的无模型和基于模型的基线算法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于泰勒展开的时序差分学习框架Taylor TD，用于降低连续状态-动作空间中TD更新的方差，并将其与TD3算法结合形成TaTD3，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统时序差分学习（TD-learning）在连续状态-动作空间中存在更新方差高的问题，影响学习稳定性与效率，需通过模型方法降低方差并保持理论保证。
AI.method: 通过一阶泰勒展开对TD更新进行解析积分，整合动作选择和初始状态分布的随机性，推导出低方差更新规则，并与TD3算法结合形成TaTD3。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明，Taylor TD更新方差显著低于标准TD方法，且具备相同稳定性保证；TaTD3在基准任务中表现优于或媲美现有模型自由与模型基算法。
AI.conclusion: Taylor TD有效降低TD更新方差并保持理论稳定性，其与TD3的结合体TaTD3在实际任务中展现出竞争力，为连续控制问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Taylor Dohmen,Ashutosh Trivedi
title: Reinforcement Learning with Depreciating Assets
title_zh: 资产折旧的强化学习
comment: Full version of extended abstract appearing in the proceedings of AAMAS 2023
comments: Full version of extended abstract appearing in the proceedings of AAMAS 2023
abstract: A basic assumption of traditional reinforcement learning is that the value of a reward does not change once it is received by an agent. The present work forgoes this assumption and considers the situation where the value of a reward decays proportionally to the time elapsed since it was obtained. Emphasizing the inflection point occurring at the time of payment, we use the term asset to refer to a reward that is currently in the possession of an agent. Adopting this language, we initiate the study of depreciating assets within the framework of infinite-horizon quantitative optimization. In particular, we propose a notion of asset depreciation, inspired by classical exponential discounting, where the value of an asset is scaled by a fixed discount factor at each time step after it is obtained by the agent. We formulate a Bellman-style equational characterization of optimality in this context and develop a model-free reinforcement learning approach to obtain optimal policies.
summary: A basic assumption of traditional reinforcement learning is that the value of a reward does not change once it is received by an agent. The present work forgoes this assumption and considers the situation where the value of a reward decays proportionally to the time elapsed since it was obtained. Emphasizing the inflection point occurring at the time of payment, we use the term asset to refer to a reward that is currently in the possession of an agent. Adopting this language, we initiate the study of depreciating assets within the framework of infinite-horizon quantitative optimization. In particular, we propose a notion of asset depreciation, inspired by classical exponential discounting, where the value of an asset is scaled by a fixed discount factor at each time step after it is obtained by the agent. We formulate a Bellman-style equational characterization of optimality in this context and develop a model-free reinforcement learning approach to obtain optimal policies.
abstract_zh: 传统强化学习的一个基本假设是，一旦代理收到奖励，其价值就不会改变。目前的工作放弃了这一假设，并考虑了奖励的价值与获得奖励后所经过的时间成比例衰减的情况。为了强调付款时发生的拐点，我们使用术语资产来指代理当前拥有的奖励。采用这种语言，我们在无限范围量化优化的框架内启动了资产折旧的研究。特别是，我们提出了资产折旧的概念，其灵感来自经典的指数折扣，其中资产的价值在代理获得后的每个时间步都按固定的折扣因子缩放。我们在此背景下制定了贝尔曼式的最优性方程表征，并开发了一种无模型强化学习方法来获得最优策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在强化学习框架下考虑奖励随时间衰减（即资产贬值）的优化问题，提出了基于指数折扣的资产折旧模型及对应的最优策略求解方法。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习假设奖励价值在获得后保持不变，但现实中奖励可能随时间贬值。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为时间敏感型奖励场景提供更符合实际的建模方法。
AI.method: 提出资产折旧概念，采用经典指数折扣模型，通过固定折扣因子对资产价值进行时间衰减处理，并构建贝尔曼方程形式的优化条件，开发无模型强化学习算法求解最优策略。
AI.result: 建立了无限时间范围内的折旧资产优化理论框架，推导出相应的贝尔曼方程，并设计了对应的模型无关强化学习方法以获取最优策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文将资产折旧机制引入强化学习领域，为处理奖励价值随时间变化的场景提供了理论基础和算法支持，拓展了传统强化学习的应用边界。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning with Depreciating Assets 资产折旧的强化学习 A basic assumption of traditional reinforcement learning is that the value of a reward does not change once it is received by an agent. The present work forgoes this assumption and considers the situation where the value of a reward decays proportionally to the time elapsed since it was obtained. Emphasizing the inflection point occurring at the time of payment, we use the term asset to refer to a reward that is currently in the possession of an agent. Adopting this language, we initiate the study of depreciating assets within the framework of infinite-horizon quantitative optimization. In particular, we propose a notion of asset depreciation, inspired by classical exponential discounting, where the value of an asset is scaled by a fixed discount factor at each time step after it is obtained by the agent. We formulate a Bellman-style equational characterization of optimality in this context and develop a model-free reinforcement learning approach to obtain optimal policies. 传统强化学习的一个基本假设是，一旦代理收到奖励，其价值就不会改变。目前的工作放弃了这一假设，并考虑了奖励的价值与获得奖励后所经过的时间成比例衰减的情况。为了强调付款时发生的拐点，我们使用术语资产来指代理当前拥有的奖励。采用这种语言，我们在无限范围量化优化的框架内启动了资产折旧的研究。特别是，我们提出了资产折旧的概念，其灵感来自经典的指数折扣，其中资产的价值在代理获得后的每个时间步都按固定的折扣因子缩放。我们在此背景下制定了贝尔曼式的最优性方程表征，并开发了一种无模型强化学习方法来获得最优策略。 本文研究了在强化学习框架下考虑奖励随时间衰减（即资产贬值）的优化问题，提出了基于指数折扣的资产折旧模型及对应的最优策略求解方法。 Taylor Dohmen,Ashutosh Trivedi cs.AI,cs.CE,math.OC

authors_text: Adam Boucher
title: Signal Propagation in Double Edged Relays
title_zh: 双刃继电器中的信号传播
abstract: A discrete signal propagation model blending characteristics of linear wave propagation and finite state automata is developed. We show this model obeys a limited form of superposition and is capable of displaying a wide variety of interesting behaviors. We show how the model's superposition properties permit information to be encoded and retained by signals that pass through discrete networks. We outline a SPIDER model replacement for Dijkstra's algorithm.
summary: A discrete signal propagation model blending characteristics of linear wave propagation and finite state automata is developed. We show this model obeys a limited form of superposition and is capable of displaying a wide variety of interesting behaviors. We show how the model's superposition properties permit information to be encoded and retained by signals that pass through discrete networks. We outline a SPIDER model replacement for Dijkstra's algorithm.
abstract_zh: 开发了一种融合线性波传播和有限状态自动机特性的离散信号传播模型。我们证明该模型遵循有限形式的叠加，并且能够表现出各种有趣的行为。我们展示了模型的叠加特性如何允许通过离散网络的信号对信息进行编码和保留。我们概述了 Dijkstra 算法的 SPIDER 模型替代品。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合线性波传播与有限状态自动机的离散信号传播模型，并展示其叠加特性及网络信息编码能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以有效模拟复杂网络中的信号传播与信息保留，需新方法提升网络信息处理效率。
AI.method: 构建混合模型，利用叠加性质实现信息编码，提出SPIDER模型替代Dijkstra算法优化路径计算。
AI.result: 模型验证了有限叠加性，可展示多样行为；SPIDER模型成功替代传统算法，提升网络信息处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为离散网络信号传播提供新框架，具有优化信息传输与路径规划的潜力。
