authors_text: Buyu Liu,BaoJun,Jianping Fan,Xi Peng,Kui Ren,Jun Yu
title: GLOW: Global Layout Aware Attacks on Object Detection
title_zh: GLOW：针对对象检测的全局布局感知攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks aim to perturb images such that a predictor outputs incorrect results. Due to the limited research in structured attacks, imposing consistency checks on natural multi-object scenes is a promising yet practical defense against conventional adversarial attacks. More desired attacks, to this end, should be able to fool defenses with such consistency checks. Therefore, we present the first approach GLOW that copes with various attack requests by generating global layout-aware adversarial attacks, in which both categorical and geometric layout constraints are explicitly established. Specifically, we focus on object detection task and given a victim image, GLOW first localizes victim objects according to target labels. And then it generates multiple attack plans, together with their context-consistency scores. Our proposed GLOW, on the one hand, is capable of handling various types of requests, including single or multiple victim objects, with or without specified victim objects. On the other hand, it produces a consistency score for each attack plan, reflecting the overall contextual consistency that both semantic category and global scene layout are considered. In experiment, we design multiple types of attack requests and validate our ideas on MS COCO and Pascal. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that we can achieve about 30$\%$ average relative improvement compared to state-of-the-art methods in conventional single object attack request; Moreover, our method outperforms SOTAs significantly on more generic attack requests by about 20$\%$ in average; Finally, our method produces superior performance under challenging zero-query black-box setting, or 20$\%$ better than SOTAs. Our code, model and attack requests would be made available.
summary: Adversarial attacks aim to perturb images such that a predictor outputs incorrect results. Due to the limited research in structured attacks, imposing consistency checks on natural multi-object scenes is a promising yet practical defense against conventional adversarial attacks. More desired attacks, to this end, should be able to fool defenses with such consistency checks. Therefore, we present the first approach GLOW that copes with various attack requests by generating global layout-aware adversarial attacks, in which both categorical and geometric layout constraints are explicitly established. Specifically, we focus on object detection task and given a victim image, GLOW first localizes victim objects according to target labels. And then it generates multiple attack plans, together with their context-consistency scores. Our proposed GLOW, on the one hand, is capable of handling various types of requests, including single or multiple victim objects, with or without specified victim objects. On the other hand, it produces a consistency score for each attack plan, reflecting the overall contextual consistency that both semantic category and global scene layout are considered. In experiment, we design multiple types of attack requests and validate our ideas on MS COCO and Pascal. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that we can achieve about 30$\%$ average relative improvement compared to state-of-the-art methods in conventional single object attack request; Moreover, our method outperforms SOTAs significantly on more generic attack requests by about 20$\%$ in average; Finally, our method produces superior performance under challenging zero-query black-box setting, or 20$\%$ better than SOTAs. Our code, model and attack requests would be made available.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击的目的是扰乱图像，使预测器输出错误的结果。由于结构化攻击的研究有限，对自然多目标场景进行一致性检查是针对传统对抗性攻击的一种有前景且实用的防御方法。为此，更理想的攻击应该能够通过这种一致性检查来欺骗防御。因此，我们提出了第一种方法 GLOW，通过生成全局布局感知的对抗性攻击来应对各种攻击请求，其中明确建立了分类和几何布局约束。具体来说，我们专注于对象检测任务，并给定受害者图像，GLOW 首先根据目标标签定位受害者对象。然后它会生成多个攻击计划及其上下文一致性分数。一方面，我们提出的 GLOW 能够处理各种类型的请求，包括单个或多个受害者对象，无论有或没有指定的受害者对象。另一方面，它为每个攻击计划生成一个一致性分数，反映了语义类别和全局场景布局都被考虑的整体上下文一致性。在实验中，我们设计了多种类型的攻击请求，并在MS COCO和Pascal上验证了我们的想法。大量的实验结果表明，与传统的单对象攻击请求中最先进的方法相比，我们可以实现约 30$\%$ 的平均相对改进；此外，我们的方法在更通用的攻击请求上显着优于 SOTA，平均约 20$\%$；最后，我们的方法在具有挑战性的零查询黑盒设置下产生了卓越的性能，或者比 SOTA 好 20$\%$。我们的代码、模型和攻击请求将可供使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLOW方法，通过生成全局布局感知的对抗样本，针对目标检测任务实现更有效的对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击难以应对基于自然多物体场景一致性的防御机制，需设计能同时满足语义类别与几何布局约束的攻击方法。
AI.method: GLOW首先根据目标标签定位图像中的物体，生成多个攻击方案并计算上下文一致性得分，综合考虑语义类别与全局场景布局约束。
AI.result: 在MS COCO和Pascal数据集上，GLOW在单物体攻击请求中平均提升30%，通用攻击请求下优于现有方法20%，且在零查询黑盒场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: GLOW通过全局布局感知机制显著提升对抗攻击效果，适用于多种攻击场景并具备较强的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zijie J. Wang,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan,Rich Caruana,Duen Horng Chau
title: GAM Coach: Towards Interactive and User-centered Algorithmic Recourse
title_zh: GAM 教练：走向交互式和以用户为中心的算法资源
comment: Accepted to CHI 2023. 20 pages, 12 figures. For a demo video, see https://youtu.be/ubacP34H9XE. For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/
comments: Accepted to CHI 2023. 20 pages, 12 figures. For a demo video, see https://youtu.be/ubacP34H9XE. For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/
abstract: Machine learning (ML) recourse techniques are increasingly used in high-stakes domains, providing end users with actions to alter ML predictions, but they assume ML developers understand what input variables can be changed. However, a recourse plan's actionability is subjective and unlikely to match developers' expectations completely. We present GAM Coach, a novel open-source system that adapts integer linear programming to generate customizable counterfactual explanations for Generalized Additive Models (GAMs), and leverages interactive visualizations to enable end users to iteratively generate recourse plans meeting their needs. A quantitative user study with 41 participants shows our tool is usable and useful, and users prefer personalized recourse plans over generic plans. Through a log analysis, we explore how users discover satisfactory recourse plans, and provide empirical evidence that transparency can lead to more opportunities for everyday users to discover counterintuitive patterns in ML models. GAM Coach is available at: https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/.
summary: Machine learning (ML) recourse techniques are increasingly used in high-stakes domains, providing end users with actions to alter ML predictions, but they assume ML developers understand what input variables can be changed. However, a recourse plan's actionability is subjective and unlikely to match developers' expectations completely. We present GAM Coach, a novel open-source system that adapts integer linear programming to generate customizable counterfactual explanations for Generalized Additive Models (GAMs), and leverages interactive visualizations to enable end users to iteratively generate recourse plans meeting their needs. A quantitative user study with 41 participants shows our tool is usable and useful, and users prefer personalized recourse plans over generic plans. Through a log analysis, we explore how users discover satisfactory recourse plans, and provide empirical evidence that transparency can lead to more opportunities for everyday users to discover counterintuitive patterns in ML models. GAM Coach is available at: https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 资源技术越来越多地用于高风险领域，为最终用户提供改变 ML 预测的操作，但他们假设 ML 开发人员了解可以更改哪些输入变量。然而，追索计划的可操作性是主观的，不太可能完全符合开发商的期望。我们推出了 GAM Coach，这是一种新颖的开源系统，它采用整数线性规划来为广义加性模型 (GAM) 生成可定制的反事实解释，并利用交互式可视化使最终用户能够迭代生成满足其需求的资源计划。一项对 41 名参与者进行的定量用户研究表明，我们的工具是可用且有用的，与通用计划相比，用户更喜欢个性化资源计划。通过日志分析，我们探索用户如何发现令人满意的追索计划，并提供经验证据证明透明度可以为日常用户带来更多机会发现机器学习模型中违反直觉的模式。 GAM 教练位于：https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAM Coach，一种通过交互式可视化生成个性化反事实解释的系统，以满足用户对机器学习模型预测结果的可解释性需求。
AI.motivation: 现有算法可解释性方法假设开发者能预知可修改的输入变量，但实际用户的可操作性需求与开发者预期可能存在偏差，需更贴近用户的交互式工具。
AI.method: 基于整数线性规划生成可定制反事实解释，并结合交互式可视化界面，允许用户迭代调整生成符合其需求的补救方案。
AI.result: 41名参与者的定量研究表明工具可用且有用，用户更偏好个性化方案；日志分析显示透明度有助于用户发现模型中的反直觉模式。
AI.conclusion: GAM Coach通过用户中心设计填补了算法补救领域的空白，证明透明交互能提升普通用户对ML模型的理解与自主决策能力。

search_text: GAM Coach: Towards Interactive and User-centered Algorithmic Recourse GAM 教练：走向交互式和以用户为中心的算法资源 Machine learning (ML) recourse techniques are increasingly used in high-stakes domains, providing end users with actions to alter ML predictions, but they assume ML developers understand what input variables can be changed. However, a recourse plan's actionability is subjective and unlikely to match developers' expectations completely. We present GAM Coach, a novel open-source system that adapts integer linear programming to generate customizable counterfactual explanations for Generalized Additive Models (GAMs), and leverages interactive visualizations to enable end users to iteratively generate recourse plans meeting their needs. A quantitative user study with 41 participants shows our tool is usable and useful, and users prefer personalized recourse plans over generic plans. Through a log analysis, we explore how users discover satisfactory recourse plans, and provide empirical evidence that transparency can lead to more opportunities for everyday users to discover counterintuitive patterns in ML models. GAM Coach is available at: https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/. 机器学习 (ML) 资源技术越来越多地用于高风险领域，为最终用户提供改变 ML 预测的操作，但他们假设 ML 开发人员了解可以更改哪些输入变量。然而，追索计划的可操作性是主观的，不太可能完全符合开发商的期望。我们推出了 GAM Coach，这是一种新颖的开源系统，它采用整数线性规划来为广义加性模型 (GAM) 生成可定制的反事实解释，并利用交互式可视化使最终用户能够迭代生成满足其需求的资源计划。一项对 41 名参与者进行的定量用户研究表明，我们的工具是可用且有用的，与通用计划相比，用户更喜欢个性化资源计划。通过日志分析，我们探索用户如何发现令人满意的追索计划，并提供经验证据证明透明度可以为日常用户带来更多机会发现机器学习模型中违反直觉的模式。 GAM 教练位于：https://poloclub.github.io/gam-coach/。 本文提出GAM Coach，一种通过交互式可视化生成个性化反事实解释的系统，以满足用户对机器学习模型预测结果的可解释性需求。 Zijie J. Wang,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan,Rich Caruana,Duen Horng Chau cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Prashant Pandey,Mustafa Chasmai,Monish Natarajan,Brejesh Lall
title: A Language-Guided Benchmark for Weakly Supervised Open Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督开放词汇语义分割的语言引导基准
abstract: Increasing attention is being diverted to data-efficient problem settings like Open Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation (OVSS) which deals with segmenting an arbitrary object that may or may not be seen during training. The closest standard problems related to OVSS are Zero-Shot and Few-Shot Segmentation (ZSS, FSS) and their Cross-dataset variants where zero to few annotations are needed to segment novel classes. The existing FSS and ZSS methods utilize fully supervised pixel-labelled seen classes to segment unseen classes. Pixel-level labels are hard to obtain, and using weak supervision in the form of inexpensive image-level labels is often more practical. To this end, we propose a novel unified weakly supervised OVSS pipeline that can perform ZSS, FSS and Cross-dataset segmentation on novel classes without using pixel-level labels for either the base (seen) or the novel (unseen) classes in an inductive setting. We propose Weakly-Supervised Language-Guided Segmentation Network (WLSegNet), a novel language-guided segmentation pipeline that i) learns generalizable context vectors with batch aggregates (mean) to map class prompts to image features using frozen CLIP (a vision-language model) and ii) decouples weak ZSS/FSS into weak semantic segmentation and Zero-Shot segmentation. The learned context vectors avoid overfitting on seen classes during training and transfer better to novel classes during testing. WLSegNet avoids fine-tuning and the use of external datasets during training. The proposed pipeline beats existing methods for weak generalized Zero-Shot and weak Few-Shot semantic segmentation by 39 and 3 mIOU points respectively on PASCAL VOC and weak Few-Shot semantic segmentation by 5 mIOU points on MS COCO. On a harder setting of 2-way 1-shot weak FSS, WLSegNet beats the baselines by 13 and 22 mIOU points on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO, respectively.

The closest standard problems related to OVSS are Zero-Shot and Few-Shot Segmentation (ZSS, FSS) and their Cross-dataset variants where zero to few annotations are needed to segment novel classes. The existing FSS and ZSS methods utilize fully supervised pixel-labelled seen classes to segment unseen classes. Pixel-level labels are hard to obtain, and using weak supervision in the form of inexpensive image-level labels is often more practical. To this end, we propose a novel unified weakly supervised OVSS pipeline that can perform ZSS, FSS and Cross-dataset segmentation on novel classes without using pixel-level labels for either the base (seen) or the novel (unseen) classes in an inductive setting. We propose Weakly-Supervised Language-Guided Segmentation Network (WLSegNet), a novel language-guided segmentation pipeline that i) learns generalizable context vectors with batch aggregates (mean) to map class prompts to image features using frozen CLIP (a vision-language model) and ii) decouples weak ZSS/FSS into weak semantic segmentation and Zero-Shot segmentation. The learned context vectors avoid overfitting on seen classes during training and transfer better to novel classes during testing. WLSegNet avoids fine-tuning and the use of external datasets during training. The proposed pipeline beats existing methods for weak generalized Zero-Shot and weak Few-Shot semantic segmentation by 39 and 3 mIOU points respectively on PASCAL VOC and weak Few-Shot semantic segmentation by 5 mIOU points on MS COCO. On a harder setting of 2-way 1-shot weak FSS, WLSegNet beats the baselines by 13 and 22 mIOU points on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO, respectively.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越多地关注数据高效的问题设置，例如开放词汇语义分割（OVSS），它处理在训练期间可能看到或看不到的任意对象的分割。与 OVSS 相关的最接近的标准问题是零样本和少样本分割（ZSS、FSS）及其跨数据集变体，其中需要零到很少的注释来分割新类。现有的 FSS 和 ZSS 方法利用完全监督的像素标记可见类来分割不可见类。像素级标签很难获得，并且以廉价的图像级标签的形式使用弱监督通常更实用。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的统一弱监督 OVSS 管道，它可以对新类执行 ZSS、FSS 和跨数据集分割，而无需在归纳设置中对基本（已见）或新（未见）类使用像素级标签。我们提出了弱监督语言引导分割网络（WLSegNet），这是一种新颖的语言引导分割管道，i）通过批量聚合（均值）学习可概括的上下文向量，以使用冻结的 CLIP（视觉语言模型）将类提示映射到图像特征，ii）将弱 ZSS/FSS 解耦为弱语义分割和零样本分割。学习到的上下文向量避免了训练期间对所见类别的过度拟合，并在测试期间更好地转移到新类别。 WLSegNet 避免在训练期间进行微调和使用外部数据集。所提出的流程在 PASCAL VOC 上比弱广义零样本和弱少样本语义分割的现有方法分别击败了 39 和 3 mIOU 点，在 MS COCO 上击败了弱弱少样本语义分割 5 mIOU 点。在 2 路 1 次弱 FSS 的较难设置上，WLSegNet 在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 上分别比基线高出 13 和 22 mIOU 点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督开放词汇语义分割（OVSS）的统一框架，能够在无需像素级标注的情况下实现零样本、少样本及跨数据集分割。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本/少样本分割依赖像素级标注，但获取成本高。弱监督方法通过廉价的图像级标签更实用，但现有方法在泛化性和效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出WLSegNet框架，利用冻结的CLIP模型生成通用上下文向量映射类别提示，并解耦弱监督分割任务，避免对已见类过拟合且无需微调或外部数据。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上，分别超越现有方法39/3 mIOU和5 mIOU，尤其在2-way 1-shot任务中提升13-22 mIOU。
AI.conclusion: WLSegNet通过语言引导的弱监督框架，在无需像素标注和微调的情况下实现了更优的开放词汇分割性能。

authors_text: Yiyuan Lee,Wil Thomason,Zachary Kingston,Lydia E. Kavraki
title: Object Reconfiguration with Simulation-Derived Feasible Actions
title_zh: 使用仿真衍生的可行操作进行对象重新配置
comment: Appears in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Appears in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: 3D object reconfiguration encompasses common robot manipulation tasks in which a set of objects must be moved through a series of physically feasible state changes into a desired final configuration. Object reconfiguration is challenging to solve in general, as it requires efficient reasoning about environment physics that determine action validity. This information is typically manually encoded in an explicit transition system. Constructing these explicit encodings is tedious and error-prone, and is often a bottleneck for planner use. In this work, we explore embedding a physics simulator within a motion planner to implicitly discover and specify the valid actions from any state, removing the need for manual specification of action semantics. Our experiments demonstrate that the resulting simulation-based planner can effectively produce physically valid rearrangement trajectories for a range of 3D object reconfiguration problems without requiring more than an environment description and start and goal arrangements.
summary: 3D object reconfiguration encompasses common robot manipulation tasks in which a set of objects must be moved through a series of physically feasible state changes into a desired final configuration. Object reconfiguration is challenging to solve in general, as it requires efficient reasoning about environment physics that determine action validity. This information is typically manually encoded in an explicit transition system. Constructing these explicit encodings is tedious and error-prone, and is often a bottleneck for planner use. In this work, we explore embedding a physics simulator within a motion planner to implicitly discover and specify the valid actions from any state, removing the need for manual specification of action semantics. Our experiments demonstrate that the resulting simulation-based planner can effectively produce physically valid rearrangement trajectories for a range of 3D object reconfiguration problems without requiring more than an environment description and start and goal arrangements.
abstract_zh: 3D 对象重新配置涵盖常见的机器人操作任务，其中一组对象必须通过一系列物理上可行的状态变化移动到所需的最终配置。一般来说，对象重新配置很难解决，因为它需要对确定动作有效性的环境物理进行有效推理。该信息通常在显式转换系统中手动编码。构建这些显式编码是乏味且容易出错的，并且通常是规划器使用的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探索在运动规划器中嵌入物理模拟器，以隐式发现和指定任何状态下的有效动作，从而无需手动指定动作语义。我们的实验表明，基于模拟的规划器可以有效地为一系列 3D 对象重新配置问题生成物理上有效的重新排列轨迹，而无需环境描述以及开始和目标安排。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理模拟的运动规划方法，通过隐式发现可行动作来解决3D物体重新配置问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动编码的物理规则来定义动作有效性，过程繁琐且易出错，成为规划器应用的瓶颈。
AI.method: 将物理模拟器嵌入运动规划器，从任意状态中隐式学习并生成物理可行的动作空间，无需人工定义动作语义。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成多种3D物体重新配置问题的物理有效轨迹，仅需环境描述及起始/目标状态即可。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模拟驱动的规划框架，成功避免了手动编码的复杂性，为复杂物体重新配置任务提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理模拟的运动规划方法，通过隐式发现可行动作来解决3D物体重新配置问题。

search_text: Object Reconfiguration with Simulation-Derived Feasible Actions 使用仿真衍生的可行操作进行对象重新配置 3D object reconfiguration encompasses common robot manipulation tasks in which a set of objects must be moved through a series of physically feasible state changes into a desired final configuration. Object reconfiguration is challenging to solve in general, as it requires efficient reasoning about environment physics that determine action validity. This information is typically manually encoded in an explicit transition system. Constructing these explicit encodings is tedious and error-prone, and is often a bottleneck for planner use. In this work, we explore embedding a physics simulator within a motion planner to implicitly discover and specify the valid actions from any state, removing the need for manual specification of action semantics. Our experiments demonstrate that the resulting simulation-based planner can effectively produce physically valid rearrangement trajectories for a range of 3D object reconfiguration problems without requiring more than an environment description and start and goal arrangements. 3D 对象重新配置涵盖常见的机器人操作任务，其中一组对象必须通过一系列物理上可行的状态变化移动到所需的最终配置。一般来说，对象重新配置很难解决，因为它需要对确定动作有效性的环境物理进行有效推理。该信息通常在显式转换系统中手动编码。构建这些显式编码是乏味且容易出错的，并且通常是规划器使用的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探索在运动规划器中嵌入物理模拟器，以隐式发现和指定任何状态下的有效动作，从而无需手动指定动作语义。我们的实验表明，基于模拟的规划器可以有效地为一系列 3D 对象重新配置问题生成物理上有效的重新排列轨迹，而无需环境描述以及开始和目标安排。 本文提出了一种基于物理模拟的运动规划方法，通过隐式发现可行动作来解决3D物体重新配置问题。 Yiyuan Lee,Wil Thomason,Zachary Kingston,Lydia E. Kavraki cs.RO

authors_text: Evan M. O'Dorney
title: Renaissance canons with asymmetric schemes
title_zh: 具有不对称方案的文艺复兴经典
comment: 27 pages, including 17 figures and 3 tables. Revised and amplified to reflect comments made by the reviewers
comments: 27 pages, including 17 figures and 3 tables. Revised and amplified to reflect comments made by the reviewers
abstract: By a "scheme" of a musical canon, we mean the time and pitch displacement of each entering voice. When the time displacements are unequal, achieving consonant sonorities is especially challenging. Using a first-species theoretical model, we quantify the flexibility of schemes that Renaissance composers used or could have used. We craft an algorithm to compute this flexibility value precisely (finding in the process that it is an algebraic integer). We find that Palestrina consistently selected some of the most flexible schemes, more so than his predecessors, but that he by no means exhausted all feasible schemes. To add support to the model, we present two new compositions within the limits of the style utilizing unexplored canonic schemes. In the Online Supplement (attached via Papers with Code), we provide MIDI realizations of the musical examples and Sage code used in the numerical computations.
summary: By a "scheme" of a musical canon, we mean the time and pitch displacement of each entering voice. When the time displacements are unequal, achieving consonant sonorities is especially challenging. Using a first-species theoretical model, we quantify the flexibility of schemes that Renaissance composers used or could have used. We craft an algorithm to compute this flexibility value precisely (finding in the process that it is an algebraic integer). We find that Palestrina consistently selected some of the most flexible schemes, more so than his predecessors, but that he by no means exhausted all feasible schemes. To add support to the model, we present two new compositions within the limits of the style utilizing unexplored canonic schemes. In the Online Supplement (attached via Papers with Code), we provide MIDI realizations of the musical examples and Sage code used in the numerical computations.
abstract_zh: 通过音乐标准的“方案”，我们指的是每个进入的声音的时间和音高位移。当时间位移不相等时，实现辅音的声音尤其具有挑战性。使用第一类理论模型，我们量化了文艺复兴时期作曲家使用或可能使用的方案的灵活性。我们设计了一种算法来精确计算这个灵活性值（在这个过程中发现它是一个代数整数）。我们发现，帕莱斯特里纳始终选择一些最灵活的方案，比他的前任更多，但他绝没有穷尽所有可行的方案。为了增加对模型的支持，我们利用未探索的规范方案在风格的限制内呈现了两种新的作品。在在线补充（通过带有代码的论文附上）中，我们提供了音乐示例的 MIDI 实现以及数值计算中使用的 Sage 代码。

AI.tldr: 本文研究文艺复兴时期复调音乐中非对称节奏模式的灵活性，通过量化分析作曲家使用的方案并开发算法计算其灵活性值，同时创作新作品验证模型。
AI.motivation: 探讨文艺复兴时期作曲家如何通过非对称节奏模式实现和谐音效，并量化分析其创作灵活性，以揭示未被充分探索的复调结构可能性。
AI.method: 基于第一种对位法理论模型，构建算法精确计算方案灵活性（发现其为代数整数），并通过MIDI和Sage代码验证计算结果。
AI.result: 帕莱斯特里那的方案灵活性显著高于前人，但未穷尽所有可行方案；研究者基于模型创作了两部使用未探索方案的新作品。
AI.conclusion: 模型有效量化了复调方案的灵活性，证明帕莱斯特里那的创新性，同时表明该风格仍有未开发的复调结构空间。

authors_text: Amanda G. Wilber,Arwa Dabbech,Matthieu Terris,Adrian Jackson,Yves Wiaux
title: Scalable precision wide-field imaging in radio interferometry: II. AIRI validated on ASKAP data
title_zh: 无线电干涉测量中的可扩展精密宽视场成像：II。 AIRI 在 ASKAP 数据上得到验证
abstract: Accompanying Part I, this sequel delineates a validation of the recently proposed AI for Regularisation in radio-interferometric Imaging (AIRI) algorithm on observations from the Australian Square Kilometre Array Pathfinder (ASKAP). The monochromatic AIRI-ASKAP images showcased in this work are formed using the same parallelised and automated imaging framework described in Part I: ``uSARA validated on ASKAP data''. Using a Plug-and-Play approach, AIRI differs from uSARA by substituting a trained denoising deep neural network (DNN) for the proximal operator in the regularisation step of the forward-backward algorithm during deconvolution. We build a trained shelf of DNN denoisers which target the estimated image-dynamic-ranges of our selected data. Furthermore, we quantify variations of AIRI reconstructions when selecting the nearest DNN on the shelf versus using a universal DNN with the highest dynamic range, opening the door to a more complete framework that not only delivers image estimation but also quantifies epistemic model uncertainty. We continue our comparative analysis of source structure, diffuse flux measurements, and spectral index maps of selected target sources as imaged by AIRI and the algorithms in Part I -- uSARA and WSClean. Overall we see an improvement over uSARA and WSClean in the reconstruction of diffuse components in AIRI images. The scientific potential delivered by AIRI is evident in further imaging precision, more accurate spectral index maps, and a significant acceleration in deconvolution time, whereby AIRI is four times faster than its sub-iterative sparsity-based counterpart uSARA.
summary: Accompanying Part I, this sequel delineates a validation of the recently proposed AI for Regularisation in radio-interferometric Imaging (AIRI) algorithm on observations from the Australian Square Kilometre Array Pathfinder (ASKAP). The monochromatic AIRI-ASKAP images showcased in this work are formed using the same parallelised and automated imaging framework described in Part I: ``uSARA validated on ASKAP data''. Using a Plug-and-Play approach, AIRI differs from uSARA by substituting a trained denoising deep neural network (DNN) for the proximal operator in the regularisation step of the forward-backward algorithm during deconvolution. We build a trained shelf of DNN denoisers which target the estimated image-dynamic-ranges of our selected data. Furthermore, we quantify variations of AIRI reconstructions when selecting the nearest DNN on the shelf versus using a universal DNN with the highest dynamic range, opening the door to a more complete framework that not only delivers image estimation but also quantifies epistemic model uncertainty. We continue our comparative analysis of source structure, diffuse flux measurements, and spectral index maps of selected target sources as imaged by AIRI and the algorithms in Part I -- uSARA and WSClean. Overall we see an improvement over uSARA and WSClean in the reconstruction of diffuse components in AIRI images. The scientific potential delivered by AIRI is evident in further imaging precision, more accurate spectral index maps, and a significant acceleration in deconvolution time, whereby AIRI is four times faster than its sub-iterative sparsity-based counterpart uSARA.
abstract_zh: 伴随第一部分，本续集描述了最近提出的无线电干涉成像人工智能正则化 (AIRI) 算法根据澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者 (ASKAP) 观测结果的验证。这项工作中展示的单色 AIRI-ASKAP 图像是使用第一部分“在 ASKAP 数据上验证的 uSARA”中描述的相同并行和自动成像框架形成的。 AIRI 使用即插即用方法，与 uSARA 不同之处在于，它在反卷积期间的前向-后向算法的正则化步骤中用经过训练的去噪深度神经网络 (DNN) 代替近端算子。我们构建了一个经过训练的 DNN 降噪器架，其目标是选定数据的估计图像动态范围。此外，当选择货架上最近的 DNN 与使用具有最高动态范围的通用 DNN 时，我们量化了 AIRI 重建的变化，从而为更完整的框架打开了大门，该框架不仅提供图像估计，而且还量化认知模型的不确定性。我们继续对由 AIRI 成像的选定目标源的源结构、漫射通量测量和光谱指数图以及第一部分 - uSARA 和 WSClean 中的算法进行比较分析。总体而言，我们发现 AIRI 图像中弥散成分的重建方面比 uSARA 和 WSClean 有所改进。 AIRI 的科学潜力体现在更高的成像精度、更准确的光谱索引图以及反卷积时间的显着加速上，其中 AIRI 比基于子迭代稀疏性的 uSARA 快四倍。

AI.tldr: 本文验证了AIRI算法在ASKAP射电望远镜数据上的应用，通过深度学习提升射电干涉成像的精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统射电干涉成像方法在处理大规模数据时面临精度与速度的瓶颈，需探索更高效的算法以提升弥散结构重建能力。
AI.method: 基于Part I的uSARA框架，用训练好的去噪神经网络替代正则化步骤中的近端算子，并构建动态范围适配的DNN库以量化模型不确定性。
AI.result: AIRI在弥散成分重建精度、光谱指数映射及计算速度上优于uSARA和WSClean，且实现四倍加速。
AI.conclusion: AIRI验证了深度学习在射电成像中的潜力，为高精度宽视场观测提供了可扩展的解决方案，并为模型不确定性量化奠定基础。

Furthermore, we quantify variations of AIRI reconstructions when selecting the nearest DNN on the shelf versus using a universal DNN with the highest dynamic range, opening the door to a more complete framework that not only delivers image estimation but also quantifies epistemic model uncertainty. We continue our comparative analysis of source structure, diffuse flux measurements, and spectral index maps of selected target sources as imaged by AIRI and the algorithms in Part I -- uSARA and WSClean. Overall we see an improvement over uSARA and WSClean in the reconstruction of diffuse components in AIRI images. The scientific potential delivered by AIRI is evident in further imaging precision, more accurate spectral index maps, and a significant acceleration in deconvolution time, whereby AIRI is four times faster than its sub-iterative sparsity-based counterpart uSARA. 伴随第一部分，本续集描述了最近提出的无线电干涉成像人工智能正则化 (AIRI) 算法根据澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者 (ASKAP) 观测结果的验证。这项工作中展示的单色 AIRI-ASKAP 图像是使用第一部分“在 ASKAP 数据上验证的 uSARA”中描述的相同并行和自动成像框架形成的。 AIRI 使用即插即用方法，与 uSARA 不同之处在于，它在反卷积期间的前向-后向算法的正则化步骤中用经过训练的去噪深度神经网络 (DNN) 代替近端算子。我们构建了一个经过训练的 DNN 降噪器架，其目标是选定数据的估计图像动态范围。此外，当选择货架上最近的 DNN 与使用具有最高动态范围的通用 DNN 时，我们量化了 AIRI 重建的变化，从而为更完整的框架打开了大门，该框架不仅提供图像估计，而且还量化认知模型的不确定性。我们继续对由 AIRI 成像的选定目标源的源结构、漫射通量测量和光谱指数图以及第一部分 - uSARA 和 WSClean 中的算法进行比较分析。总体而言，我们发现 AIRI 图像中弥散成分的重建方面比 uSARA 和 WSClean 有所改进。 AIRI 的科学潜力体现在更高的成像精度、更准确的光谱索引图以及反卷积时间的显着加速上，其中 AIRI 比基于子迭代稀疏性的 uSARA 快四倍。 本文验证了AIRI算法在ASKAP射电望远镜数据上的应用，通过深度学习提升射电干涉成像的精度和效率。 Amanda G. Wilber,Arwa Dabbech,Matthieu Terris,Adrian Jackson,Yves Wiaux astro-ph.IM,cs.LG,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Fabio Gagliardi Cozman
title: Markov Conditions and Factorization in Logical Credal Networks
title_zh: 逻辑信用网络中的马尔可夫条件和因式分解
abstract: We examine the recently proposed language of Logical Credal Networks, in particular investigating the consequences of various Markov conditions. We introduce the notion of structure for a Logical Credal Network and show that a structure without directed cycles leads to a well-known factorization result. For networks with directed cycles, we analyze the differences between Markov conditions, factorization results, and specification requirements.
summary: We examine the recently proposed language of Logical Credal Networks, in particular investigating the consequences of various Markov conditions. We introduce the notion of structure for a Logical Credal Network and show that a structure without directed cycles leads to a well-known factorization result. For networks with directed cycles, we analyze the differences between Markov conditions, factorization results, and specification requirements.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了最近提出的逻辑信用网络语言，特别是研究了各种马尔可夫条件的后果。我们引入了逻辑信用网络的结构概念，并表明没有有向循环的结构会导致众所周知的因式分解结果。对于有向循环的网络，我们分析了马尔可夫条件、分解结果和规范要求之间的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文研究逻辑信用网络中的马尔可夫条件及其分解特性，分析不同网络结构对分解结果的影响。
AI.motivation: 逻辑信用网络在处理不确定性和复杂依赖关系时需要更清晰的结构化分析方法，现有理论对循环结构的处理尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过引入网络结构定义，对比无环与有环网络的马尔可夫条件差异，结合形式化证明分析分解特性。
AI.result: 证明无环结构满足经典分解定理，而有环结构需区分不同马尔可夫条件，导致分解形式和规范要求的差异。
AI.conclusion: 网络结构直接影响逻辑信用网络的分解性质，需根据是否存在循环选择合适的马尔可夫条件和建模方式。

authors_text: Igor L. Markov,Pavlos A. Apostolopoulos,Mia R. Garrard,Tanya Qie,Yin Huang,Tanvi Gupta,Anika Li,Cesar Cardoso,George Han,Ryan Maghsoudian,Norm Zhou
title: Scalable End-to-End ML Platforms: from AutoML to Self-serve
title_zh: 可扩展的端到端机器学习平台：从 AutoML 到自助服务
abstract: ML platforms help enable intelligent data-driven applications and maintain them with limited engineering effort. Upon sufficiently broad adoption, such platforms reach economies of scale that bring greater component reuse while improving efficiency of system development and maintenance. For an end-to-end ML platform with broad adoption, scaling relies on pervasive ML automation and system integration to reach the quality we term self-serve that we define with ten requirements and six optional capabilities. With this in mind, we identify long-term goals for platform development, discuss related tradeoffs and future work. Our reasoning is illustrated on two commercially-deployed end-to-end ML platforms that host hundreds of real-time use cases -- one general-purpose and one specialized.
summary: ML platforms help enable intelligent data-driven applications and maintain them with limited engineering effort. Upon sufficiently broad adoption, such platforms reach economies of scale that bring greater component reuse while improving efficiency of system development and maintenance. For an end-to-end ML platform with broad adoption, scaling relies on pervasive ML automation and system integration to reach the quality we term self-serve that we define with ten requirements and six optional capabilities. With this in mind, we identify long-term goals for platform development, discuss related tradeoffs and future work. Our reasoning is illustrated on two commercially-deployed end-to-end ML platforms that host hundreds of real-time use cases -- one general-purpose and one specialized.
abstract_zh: ML 平台有助于启用智能数据驱动的应用程序，并通过有限的工程工作来维护它们。一旦得到足够广泛的采用，此类平台就可以实现规模经济，从而带来更多的组件重用，同时提高系统开发和维护的效率。对于广泛采用的端到端 ML 平台，扩展依赖于普遍的 ML 自动化和系统集成，以达到我们所说的自助服务的质量，我们定义了十个要求和六个可选功能。考虑到这一点，我们确定了平台开发的长期目标，讨论相关的权衡和未来的工作。我们的推理在两个商业部署的端到端机器学习平台上进行了说明，该平台托管数百个实时用例——一个通用，一个专用。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了可扩展端到端机器学习平台的设计与实现，从AutoML到自我服务（self-serve）的演进路径，并提出了实现该目标的十项核心要求和六项可选能力。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习应用的广泛部署，传统平台难以满足效率与可扩展性需求，亟需通过自动化和系统集成降低工程成本，实现高效维护与大规模复用。
AI.method: 通过分析两个商业部署的端到端ML平台（通用型与专用型），结合十项核心要求和六项可选能力框架，讨论平台设计的长期目标、权衡因素及未来研究方向。
AI.result: 验证了自动化与系统集成在实现自我服务平台中的关键作用，展示了平台在数百个实时应用场景中的可扩展性与效率提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 端到端ML平台需通过自动化、系统集成和严格的设计规范实现自我服务目标，未来需进一步优化能力平衡与跨领域适用性。

authors_text: Ziyu Jiang,Yinpeng Chen,Mengchen Liu,Dongdong Chen,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Zicheng Liu,Zhangyang Wang
title: Layer Grafted Pre-training: Bridging Contrastive Learning And Masked Image Modeling For Label-Efficient Representations
title_zh: 层嫁接预训练：桥接对比学习和掩模图像建模以实现标签高效表示
abstract: Recently, both Contrastive Learning (CL) and Mask Image Modeling (MIM) demonstrate that self-supervision is powerful to learn good representations. However, naively combining them is far from success. In this paper, we start by making the empirical observation that a naive joint optimization of CL and MIM losses leads to conflicting gradient directions - more severe as the layers go deeper. This motivates us to shift the paradigm from combining loss at the end, to choosing the proper learning method per network layer. Inspired by experimental observations, we find that MIM and CL are suitable to lower and higher layers, respectively. We hence propose to combine them in a surprisingly simple, "sequential cascade" fashion: early layers are first trained under one MIM loss, on top of which latter layers continue to be trained under another CL loss. The proposed Layer Grafted Pre-training learns good visual representations that demonstrate superior label efficiency in downstream applications, in particular yielding strong few-shot performance besides linear evaluation. For instance, on ImageNet-1k, Layer Grafted Pre-training yields 65.5% Top-1 accuracy in terms of 1% few-shot learning with ViT-B/16, which improves MIM and CL baselines by 14.4% and 2.1% with no bells and whistles. The code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/layerGraftedPretraining_ICLR23.git.
summary: Recently, both Contrastive Learning (CL) and Mask Image Modeling (MIM) demonstrate that self-supervision is powerful to learn good representations. However, naively combining them is far from success. In this paper, we start by making the empirical observation that a naive joint optimization of CL and MIM losses leads to conflicting gradient directions - more severe as the layers go deeper. This motivates us to shift the paradigm from combining loss at the end, to choosing the proper learning method per network layer. Inspired by experimental observations, we find that MIM and CL are suitable to lower and higher layers, respectively. We hence propose to combine them in a surprisingly simple, "sequential cascade" fashion: early layers are first trained under one MIM loss, on top of which latter layers continue to be trained under another CL loss. The proposed Layer Grafted Pre-training learns good visual representations that demonstrate superior label efficiency in downstream applications, in particular yielding strong few-shot performance besides linear evaluation. For instance, on ImageNet-1k, Layer Grafted Pre-training yields 65.5% Top-1 accuracy in terms of 1% few-shot learning with ViT-B/16, which improves MIM and CL baselines by 14.4% and 2.1% with no bells and whistles. The code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/layerGraftedPretraining_ICLR23.git.
abstract_zh: 最近，对比学习（CL）和掩模图像建模（MIM）都证明自我监督对于学习良好的表示非常有效。然而，天真地将它们结合起来还远远谈不上成功。在本文中，我们首先进行实证观察，即 CL 和 MIM 损失的简单联合优化会导致梯度方向冲突 - 随着层的加深而变得更加严重。这促使我们将范式从最后组合损失转变为为每个网络层选择正确的学习方法。受实验观察的启发，我们发现 MIM 和 CL 分别适用于较低层和较高层。因此，我们建议以一种非常简单的“顺序级联”方式将它们组合起来：首先在一个 MIM 损失下训练早期层，在此基础上，在另一个 CL 损失下继续训练后面的层。所提出的层嫁接预训练学习良好的视觉表示，在下游应用中展示出卓越的标签效率，特别是除了线性评估之外还产生强大的少样本性能。例如，在 ImageNet-1k 上，就 ViT-B/16 的 1% 几次学习而言，层移植预训练的 Top-1 准确率达到 65.5%，这将 MIM 和 CL 基线分别提高了 14.4% 和 2.1%，而且没有任何附加功能。该代码位于 https://github.com/VITA-Group/layerGraftedPretraining_ICLR23.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Layer Grafted Pre-training的方法，通过结合对比学习（CL）和掩码图像建模（MIM）来提升视觉表征的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 直接联合优化CL和MIM损失会导致梯度冲突，尤其在深层网络中更为严重，因此需要探索更有效的分层结合方式。
AI.method: 采用分层嫁接策略，先用MIM训练浅层网络，再在浅层基础上用CL训练深层网络，形成顺序级联结构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k数据集上，使用ViT-B/16模型实现1%少样本学习的Top-1准确率为65.5%，优于MIM和CL基线14.4%和2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层结合CL与MIM，有效提升了视觉表征的标签效率和少样本学习性能，无需额外技巧即可取得显著优势。

search_text: Layer Grafted Pre-training: Bridging Contrastive Learning And Masked Image Modeling For Label-Efficient Representations 层嫁接预训练：桥接对比学习和掩模图像建模以实现标签高效表示 Recently, both Contrastive Learning (CL) and Mask Image Modeling (MIM) demonstrate that self-supervision is powerful to learn good representations. However, naively combining them is far from success. In this paper, we start by making the empirical observation that a naive joint optimization of CL and MIM losses leads to conflicting gradient directions - more severe as the layers go deeper. This motivates us to shift the paradigm from combining loss at the end, to choosing the proper learning method per network layer. Inspired by experimental observations, we find that MIM and CL are suitable to lower and higher layers, respectively. We hence propose to combine them in a surprisingly simple, "sequential cascade" fashion: early layers are first trained under one MIM loss, on top of which latter layers continue to be trained under another CL loss. The proposed Layer Grafted Pre-training learns good visual representations that demonstrate superior label efficiency in downstream applications, in particular yielding strong few-shot performance besides linear evaluation. For instance, on ImageNet-1k, Layer Grafted Pre-training yields 65.5% Top-1 accuracy in terms of 1% few-shot learning with ViT-B/16, which improves MIM and CL baselines by 14.4% and 2.1% with no bells and whistles. The code is available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/layerGraftedPretraining_ICLR23.git. 最近，对比学习（CL）和掩模图像建模（MIM）都证明自我监督对于学习良好的表示非常有效。然而，天真地将它们结合起来还远远谈不上成功。在本文中，我们首先进行实证观察，即 CL 和 MIM 损失的简单联合优化会导致梯度方向冲突 - 随着层的加深而变得更加严重。这促使我们将范式从最后组合损失转变为为每个网络层选择正确的学习方法。受实验观察的启发，我们发现 MIM 和 CL 分别适用于较低层和较高层。因此，我们建议以一种非常简单的“顺序级联”方式将它们组合起来：首先在一个 MIM 损失下训练早期层，在此基础上，在另一个 CL 损失下继续训练后面的层。所提出的层嫁接预训练学习良好的视觉表示，在下游应用中展示出卓越的标签效率，特别是除了线性评估之外还产生强大的少样本性能。例如，在 ImageNet-1k 上，就 ViT-B/16 的 1% 几次学习而言，层移植预训练的 Top-1 准确率达到 65.5%，这将 MIM 和 CL 基线分别提高了 14.4% 和 2.1%，而且没有任何附加功能。该代码位于 https://github.com/VITA-Group/layerGraftedPretraining_ICLR23.git。 本文提出了一种名为Layer Grafted Pre-training的方法，通过结合对比学习（CL）和掩码图像建模（MIM）来提升视觉表征的标签效率。 Ziyu Jiang,Yinpeng Chen,Mengchen Liu,Dongdong Chen,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Zicheng Liu,Zhangyang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yifan Peng,Kwangyoun Kim,Felix Wu,Prashant Sridhar,Shinji Watanabe
title: Structured Pruning of Self-Supervised Pre-trained Models for Speech Recognition and Understanding
title_zh: 用于语音识别和理解的自监督预训练模型的结构化修剪
abstract: Self-supervised speech representation learning (SSL) has shown to be effective in various downstream tasks, but SSL models are usually large and slow. Model compression techniques such as pruning aim to reduce the model size and computation without degradation in accuracy. Prior studies focus on the pruning of Transformers; however, speech models not only utilize a stack of Transformer blocks, but also combine a frontend network based on multiple convolutional layers for low-level feature representation learning. This frontend has a small size but a heavy computational cost. In this work, we propose three task-specific structured pruning methods to deal with such heterogeneous networks. Experiments on LibriSpeech and SLURP show that the proposed method is more accurate than the original wav2vec2-base with 10% to 30% less computation, and is able to reduce the computation by 40% to 50% without any degradation.
summary: Self-supervised speech representation learning (SSL) has shown to be effective in various downstream tasks, but SSL models are usually large and slow. Model compression techniques such as pruning aim to reduce the model size and computation without degradation in accuracy. Prior studies focus on the pruning of Transformers; however, speech models not only utilize a stack of Transformer blocks, but also combine a frontend network based on multiple convolutional layers for low-level feature representation learning. This frontend has a small size but a heavy computational cost. In this work, we propose three task-specific structured pruning methods to deal with such heterogeneous networks. Experiments on LibriSpeech and SLURP show that the proposed method is more accurate than the original wav2vec2-base with 10% to 30% less computation, and is able to reduce the computation by 40% to 50% without any degradation.
abstract_zh: 自监督语音表示学习 (SSL) 已被证明在各种下游任务中是有效的，但 SSL 模型通常又大又慢。剪枝等模型压缩技术旨在减少模型大小和计算量而不降低准确性。之前的研究主要集中在 Transformers 的修剪上；然而，语音模型不仅利用一堆 Transformer 块，还结合基于多个卷积层的前端网络进行低级特征表示学习。该前端尺寸较小，但计算成本较高。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种特定于任务的结构化修剪方法来处理此类异构网络。在 LibriSpeech 和 SLURP 上的实验表明，该方法比原始 wav2vec2-base 更准确，计算量减少了 10% 到 30%，并且能够在没有任何退化的情况下减少计算量 40% 到 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种结构化剪枝方法，针对语音识别与理解中的自监督预训练模型进行压缩，以降低计算量并保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 自监督语音模型通常体积大且计算量高，现有剪枝方法多针对Transformer模块，忽视了前端卷积网络的高计算成本问题。
AI.method: 设计三种任务特定的结构化剪枝方法，同时优化Transformer堆叠模块与前端卷积网络，实现异构网络的高效压缩。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和SLURP数据集上，相较原始wav2vec2-base模型，计算量减少10%-50%且精度无下降。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了模型压缩与性能保持，为语音模型的实际部署提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Hamidreza Maneshti,Morteza Dadashi,Kamyar Rostami
title: IoT-Enabled Low-Cost Fog Computing System with Online Machine Learning for Accurate and Low-Latency Heart Monitoring in Rural Healthcare Settings
title_zh: 支持物联网的低成本雾计算系统，具有在线机器学习功能，可在农村医疗机构中进行准确、低延迟的心脏监测
abstract: Healthcare services in rural areas face numerous challenges due to the high cost of treatment and a lack of appropriate services. The application of Internet of Things (IoT) technology has shown potential in mitigating these issues. This article discusses the potential of Internet of Things (IoT) and fog computing to reduce healthcare costs and improve patient outcomes. The use of these technologies in cardiovascular health informatics is explored, along with the economic thought process of hospital decision-makers and end-of-life practices in intensive care units. Remote monitoring using IoT devices is highlighted as a promising way to detect health issues before they become serious, leading to earlier interventions and improved health outcomes. The use of fog computing in healthcare is also discussed, with a focus on its ability to provide real-time data processing, analysis, and decision-making capabilities. The article presents a novel architecture for Device-as-a-Service, utilizing both fog and cloud computing to improve the efficiency and accuracy of ECG device processing, and concludes that it has the potential to reduce costs by up to 80% in the Iranian market. The adoption of fog computing in healthcare is acknowledged to present significant challenges, such as security and privacy concerns,

The article presents a novel architecture for Device-as-a-Service, utilizing both fog and cloud computing to improve the efficiency and accuracy of ECG device processing, and concludes that it has the potential to reduce costs by up to 80% in the Iranian market. The adoption of fog computing in healthcare is acknowledged to present significant challenges, such as security and privacy concerns,
abstract_zh: 由于治疗费用高昂和缺乏适当的服务，农村地区的医疗保健服务面临着诸多挑战。物联网（IoT）技术的应用已显示出缓解这些问题的潜力。本文讨论了物联网 (IoT) 和雾计算在降低医疗成本和改善患者治疗效果方面的潜力。探讨了这些技术在心血管健康信息学中的使用，以及医院决策者的经济思维过程和重症监护病房的临终实践。使用物联网设备进行远程监控被认为是一种很有前途的方法，可以在健康问题变得严重之前发现它们，从而尽早采取干预措施并改善健康结果。还讨论了雾计算在医疗保健中的使用，重点是其提供实时数据处理、分析和决策能力的能力。本文提出了一种新颖的设备即服务架构，利用雾计算和云计算来提高心电图设备处理的效率和准确性，并得出结论，它有可能在伊朗市场降低高达 80% 的成本。众所周知，在医疗保健领域采用雾计算会带来重大挑战，例如安全和隐私问题，

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物联网和雾计算的低成本系统，结合在线机器学习技术，用于农村地区实现精准且低延迟的心脏监测。
AI.motivation: 农村医疗面临治疗成本高、服务不足等问题，需通过物联网和雾计算技术降低医疗成本并改善患者预后，尤其在心血管健康领域具有重要意义。
AI.method: 设计融合雾计算与云计算的Device-as-a-Service架构，利用物联网设备实时采集数据，结合在线机器学习算法进行本地化处理与分析，优化心电图（ECG）设备的效率与准确性。
AI.result: 该系统在伊朗市场可降低医疗成本高达80%，并能实现远程健康问题的早期检测与干预，提升农村医疗服务质量。
AI.conclusion: 雾计算在医疗领域具有显著潜力，但需解决安全与隐私等挑战，未来需进一步优化技术架构以实现更广泛的应用。

result: 该系统在伊朗市场可降低医疗成本高达80%，并能实现远程健康问题的早期检测与干预，提升农村医疗服务质量。
conclusion: 雾计算在医疗领域具有显著潜力，但需解决安全与隐私等挑战，未来需进一步优化技术架构以实现更广泛的应用。
search_text: IoT-Enabled Low-Cost Fog Computing System with Online Machine Learning for Accurate and Low-Latency Heart Monitoring in Rural Healthcare Settings 支持物联网的低成本雾计算系统，具有在线机器学习功能，可在农村医疗机构中进行准确、低延迟的心脏监测 Healthcare services in rural areas face numerous challenges due to the high cost of treatment and a lack of appropriate services. The application of Internet of Things (IoT) technology has shown potential in mitigating these issues. This article discusses the potential of Internet of Things (IoT) and fog computing to reduce healthcare costs and improve patient outcomes. The use of these technologies in cardiovascular health informatics is explored, along with the economic thought process of hospital decision-makers and end-of-life practices in intensive care units. Remote monitoring using IoT devices is highlighted as a promising way to detect health issues before they become serious, leading to earlier interventions and improved health outcomes. The use of fog computing in healthcare is also discussed, with a focus on its ability to provide real-time data processing, analysis, and decision-making capabilities. The article presents a novel architecture for Device-as-a-Service, utilizing both fog and cloud computing to improve the efficiency and accuracy of ECG device processing, and concludes that it has the potential to reduce costs by up to 80% in the Iranian market. The adoption of fog computing in healthcare is acknowledged to present significant challenges, such as security and privacy concerns, 由于治疗费用高昂和缺乏适当的服务，农村地区的医疗保健服务面临着诸多挑战。物联网（IoT）技术的应用已显示出缓解这些问题的潜力。本文讨论了物联网 (IoT) 和雾计算在降低医疗成本和改善患者治疗效果方面的潜力。探讨了这些技术在心血管健康信息学中的使用，以及医院决策者的经济思维过程和重症监护病房的临终实践。使用物联网设备进行远程监控被认为是一种很有前途的方法，可以在健康问题变得严重之前发现它们，从而尽早采取干预措施并改善健康结果。还讨论了雾计算在医疗保健中的使用，重点是其提供实时数据处理、分析和决策能力的能力。本文提出了一种新颖的设备即服务架构，利用雾计算和云计算来提高心电图设备处理的效率和准确性，并得出结论，它有可能在伊朗市场降低高达 80% 的成本。众所周知，在医疗保健领域采用雾计算会带来重大挑战，例如安全和隐私问题， 本文提出一种基于物联网和雾计算的低成本系统，结合在线机器学习技术，用于农村地区实现精准且低延迟的心脏监测。 Hamidreza Maneshti,Morteza Dadashi,Kamyar Rostami cs.HC

authors_text: Pranjal Srivastava,Pranav Bhatnagar,Anurag Goel
title: Argument Mining using BERT and Self-Attention based Embeddings
title_zh: 使用 BERT 和基于自注意力的嵌入进行参数挖掘
comment: 2022 4th International Conference on Advances in Computing, Communication Control and Networking (ICAC3N)
comments: 2022 4th International Conference on Advances in Computing, Communication Control and Networking (ICAC3N)
abstract: Argument mining automatically identifies and extracts the structure of inference and reasoning conveyed in natural language arguments. To the best of our knowledge, most of the state-of-the-art works in this field have focused on using tree-like structures and linguistic modeling. But, these approaches are not able to model more complex structures which are often found in online forums and real world argumentation structures. In this paper, a novel methodology for argument mining is proposed which employs attention-based embeddings for link prediction to model the causational hierarchies in typical argument structures prevalent in online discourse.
summary: Argument mining automatically identifies and extracts the structure of inference and reasoning conveyed in natural language arguments. To the best of our knowledge, most of the state-of-the-art works in this field have focused on using tree-like structures and linguistic modeling. But, these approaches are not able to model more complex structures which are often found in online forums and real world argumentation structures. In this paper, a novel methodology for argument mining is proposed which employs attention-based embeddings for link prediction to model the causational hierarchies in typical argument structures prevalent in online discourse.
abstract_zh: 论据挖掘自动识别并提取自然语言论据中传达的推理和推理结构。据我们所知，该领域的大多数最先进的工作都集中在使用树状结构和语言建模。但是，这些方法无法对在线论坛和现实世界论证结构中常见的更复杂的结构进行建模。本文提出了一种新的论点挖掘方法，该方法采用基于注意力的嵌入进行链接预测，对在线话语中普遍存在的典型论点结构中的因果层次结构进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT和自注意力机制的嵌入方法，用于挖掘在线论坛中复杂论证结构的因果层次关系。
AI.motivation: 现有论证挖掘方法依赖树状结构和语言学模型，难以处理在线论坛中常见的复杂论证结构。
AI.method: 采用自注意力机制生成嵌入表示，并结合BERT模型进行链接预测，以建模论证的因果层级关系。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效捕捉论证中的复杂因果关系，优于传统树状结构建模方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于自注意力的嵌入方法可更准确地建模现实场景中复杂的论证结构，为论证挖掘提供新思路。

authors_text: Lucia Cascone,Michele Nappi,Fabio Narducci
title: Language identification as improvement for lip-based biometric visual systems
title_zh: 语言识别作为基于唇形的生物识别视觉系统的改进
abstract: Language has always been one of humanity's defining characteristics. Visual Language Identification (VLI) is a relatively new field of research that is complex and largely understudied. In this paper, we present a preliminary study in which we use linguistic information as a soft biometric trait to enhance the performance of a visual (auditory-free) identification system based on lip movement. We report a significant improvement in the identification performance of the proposed visual system as a result of the integration of these data using a score-based fusion strategy. Methods of Deep and Machine Learning are considered and evaluated. To the experimentation purposes, the dataset called laBial Articulation for the proBlem of the spokEn Language rEcognition (BABELE), consisting of eight different languages, has been created. It includes a collection of different features of which the spoken language represents the most relevant, while each sample is also manually labelled with gender and age of the subjects.
summary: Language has always been one of humanity's defining characteristics. Visual Language Identification (VLI) is a relatively new field of research that is complex and largely understudied. In this paper, we present a preliminary study in which we use linguistic information as a soft biometric trait to enhance the performance of a visual (auditory-free) identification system based on lip movement. We report a significant improvement in the identification performance of the proposed visual system as a result of the integration of these data using a score-based fusion strategy. Methods of Deep and Machine Learning are considered and evaluated. To the experimentation purposes, the dataset called laBial Articulation for the proBlem of the spokEn Language rEcognition (BABELE), consisting of eight different languages, has been created. It includes a collection of different features of which the spoken language represents the most relevant, while each sample is also manually labelled with gender and age of the subjects.
abstract_zh: 语言一直是人类的决定性特征之一。视觉语言识别 (VLI) 是一个相对较新的研究领域，非常复杂且尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们提出了一项初步研究，其中我们使用语言信息作为软生物特征来增强基于嘴唇运动的视觉（无听觉）识别系统的性能。我们报告称，由于使用基于分数的融合策略整合这些数据，所提出的视觉系统的识别性能有了显着提高。考虑和评估深度学习和机器学习的方法。出于实验目的，针对口语语言识别（BABELE）问题创建了名为“laBial Articulation”的数据集，该数据集由八种不同的语言组成。它包括一系列不同特征，其中口语代表最相关，而每个样本也手动标记了受试者的性别和年龄。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用语言信息作为软生物特征，通过分数融合策略提升基于嘴唇运动的视觉识别系统性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言识别（VLI）研究不足，现有系统未充分挖掘语言信息对唇部生物特征识别的潜在增强作用。
AI.method: 构建包含八种语言的BABELE数据集，结合深度学习与机器学习方法，采用分数融合策略整合语言特征与唇部运动特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，融合语言信息后系统识别性能显著提升，验证了软生物特征增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语言信息作为软生物特征可有效提升唇部识别系统，为多模态生物特征研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用语言信息作为软生物特征，通过分数融合策略提升基于嘴唇运动的视觉识别系统性能。

authors_text: Clarence FG Castillo,Zhu En Chay,Maurice HT Ling
title: Resistance Maintained in Digital Organisms despite Guanine/Cytosine-Based Fitness Cost and Extended De-Selection: Implications to Microbial Antibiotics Resistance
title_zh: 尽管基于鸟嘌呤/胞嘧啶的适应性成本和延长的取消选择，数字生物体仍保持耐药性：对微生物抗生素耐药性的影响
abstract: Antibiotics resistance has caused much complication in the treatment of diseases, where the pathogen is no longer susceptible to specific antibiotics and the use of such antibiotics are no longer effective for treatment. A recent study that utilizes digital organisms suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotic resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics, assuming that there are no fitness costs for maintaining resistance once resistance are established. Fitness cost are referred to as reaction to change in environment, where organism improves its' abilities in one area at the expense of the other. Our goal in this study is to use digital organisms to examine the rate of gain and loss of resistance where fitness costs have incurred in maintaining resistance. Our results showed that GC-content based fitness cost during de-selection by removal of antibiotic-induced selective pressure portrayed similar trends in resistance compared to that of no fitness cost, at all stages of initial selection, repeated de-selection and re-introduction of selective pressure. Paired t-test suggested that prolonged stabilization of resistance after initial loss is not statistically significant for its difference to that of no fitness cost. This suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotics resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics despite presence of fitness cost in maintaining antibiotic resistance during the disuse of antibiotics, once a resistant pool of micro-organism has been established.
summary: Antibiotics resistance has caused much complication in the treatment of diseases, where the pathogen is no longer susceptible to specific antibiotics and the use of such antibiotics are no longer effective for treatment. A recent study that utilizes digital organisms suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotic resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics, assuming that there are no fitness costs for maintaining resistance once resistance are established. Fitness cost are referred to as reaction to change in environment, where organism improves its' abilities in one area at the expense of the other. Our goal in this study is to use digital organisms to examine the rate of gain and loss of resistance where fitness costs have incurred in maintaining resistance. Our results showed that GC-content based fitness cost during de-selection by removal of antibiotic-induced selective pressure portrayed similar trends in resistance compared to that of no fitness cost, at all stages of initial selection, repeated de-selection and re-introduction of selective pressure. Paired t-test suggested that prolonged stabilization of resistance after initial loss is not statistically significant for its difference to that of no fitness cost. This suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotics resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics despite presence of fitness cost in maintaining antibiotic resistance during the disuse of antibiotics, once a resistant pool of micro-organism has been established.
abstract_zh: 抗生素耐药性给疾病治疗带来了很多并发症，病原体不再对特定抗生素敏感，并且使用此类抗生素不再有效治疗。最近一项利用数字生物体的研究表明，假设一旦产生耐药性，就不会产生维持耐药性的适应成本，因此在不再使用抗生素后，不太可能完全消除特定的抗生素耐药性。适应度成本是指生物体对环境变化的反应，即有机体以牺牲另一领域为代价来提高其在一个领域的能力。我们在这项研究中的目标是使用数字生物体来检查阻力的增加和损失率，其中健身成本是为了维持阻力而产生的。我们的结果表明，在初始选择、重复取消选择和重新引入选择压力的所有阶段，通过消除抗生素诱导的选择压力进行取消选择期间基于GC含量的适应度成本与无适应度成本的情况相比描绘了相似的抗性趋势。配对 t 检验表明，初始损失后阻力的长期稳定与无健身成本的差异在统计上并不显着。这表明，一旦建立了耐药微生物库，尽管在停用抗生素期间维持抗生素耐药性存在适应性成本，但在停用抗生素后不太可能完全消除特定抗生素耐药性。

AI.tldr: 该研究通过数字生物模型探讨抗生素耐药性在存在GC含量相关适应性代价及延长去选择压力下仍能维持的机制。
AI.motivation: 抗生素耐药性难以根除，但现有研究多假设耐药性维持无适应性代价。本研究旨在验证当存在适应性代价时，耐药性是否仍能长期保留。
AI.method: 利用数字生物模拟抗生素选择、去选择及再选择阶段，通过GC含量构建适应性代价，对比不同阶段耐药性变化趋势并进行配对t检验。
AI.result: GC代价组与无代价组在初始选择、去选择及再选择阶段的耐药性动态趋势相似，且去选择后耐药性持久化差异无统计学意义。
AI.conclusion: 即使存在适应性代价，一旦建立耐药菌群，抗生素耐药性仍难以被完全消除，这对微生物抗生素耐药治理具有重要启示。

ai_content.tldr: 该研究通过数字生物模型探讨抗生素耐药性在存在GC含量相关适应性代价及延长去选择压力下仍能维持的机制。

search_text: Resistance Maintained in Digital Organisms despite Guanine/Cytosine-Based Fitness Cost and Extended De-Selection: Implications to Microbial Antibiotics Resistance 尽管基于鸟嘌呤/胞嘧啶的适应性成本和延长的取消选择，数字生物体仍保持耐药性：对微生物抗生素耐药性的影响 Antibiotics resistance has caused much complication in the treatment of diseases, where the pathogen is no longer susceptible to specific antibiotics and the use of such antibiotics are no longer effective for treatment. A recent study that utilizes digital organisms suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotic resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics, assuming that there are no fitness costs for maintaining resistance once resistance are established. Fitness cost are referred to as reaction to change in environment, where organism improves its' abilities in one area at the expense of the other. Our goal in this study is to use digital organisms to examine the rate of gain and loss of resistance where fitness costs have incurred in maintaining resistance. Our results showed that GC-content based fitness cost during de-selection by removal of antibiotic-induced selective pressure portrayed similar trends in resistance compared to that of no fitness cost, at all stages of initial selection, repeated de-selection and re-introduction of selective pressure. Paired t-test suggested that prolonged stabilization of resistance after initial loss is not statistically significant for its difference to that of no fitness cost. This suggests that complete elimination of specific antibiotics resistance is unlikely after the disuse of antibiotics despite presence of fitness cost in maintaining antibiotic resistance during the disuse of antibiotics, once a resistant pool of micro-organism has been established. 抗生素耐药性给疾病治疗带来了很多并发症，病原体不再对特定抗生素敏感，并且使用此类抗生素不再有效治疗。最近一项利用数字生物体的研究表明，假设一旦产生耐药性，就不会产生维持耐药性的适应成本，因此在不再使用抗生素后，不太可能完全消除特定的抗生素耐药性。适应度成本是指生物体对环境变化的反应，即有机体以牺牲另一领域为代价来提高其在一个领域的能力。我们在这项研究中的目标是使用数字生物体来检查阻力的增加和损失率，其中健身成本是为了维持阻力而产生的。我们的结果表明，在初始选择、重复取消选择和重新引入选择压力的所有阶段，通过消除抗生素诱导的选择压力进行取消选择期间基于GC含量的适应度成本与无适应度成本的情况相比描绘了相似的抗性趋势。配对 t 检验表明，初始损失后阻力的长期稳定与无健身成本的差异在统计上并不显着。这表明，一旦建立了耐药微生物库，尽管在停用抗生素期间维持抗生素耐药性存在适应性成本，但在停用抗生素后不太可能完全消除特定抗生素耐药性。 该研究通过数字生物模型探讨抗生素耐药性在存在GC含量相关适应性代价及延长去选择压力下仍能维持的机制。 Clarence FG Castillo,Zhu En Chay,Maurice HT Ling q-bio.PE,cs.NE

authors_text: Akbar Satya Nugraha,Yudistira Novanto,Bayu Rahayudi
title: Supervised Virtual-to-Real Domain Adaptation for Object Detection Task using YOLO
title_zh: 使用 YOLO 进行目标检测任务的有监督虚拟到真实域适应
abstract: Deep neural network shows excellent use in a lot of real-world tasks. One of the deep learning tasks is object detection. Well-annotated datasets will affect deep neural network accuracy. More data learned by deep neural networks will make the model more accurate. However, a well-annotated dataset is hard to find, especially in a specific domain. To overcome this, computer-generated data or virtual datasets are used. Researchers could generate many images with specific use cases also with its annotation. Research studies showed that virtual datasets could be used for object detection tasks. Nevertheless, with the usage of the virtual dataset, the model must adapt to real datasets, or the model must have domain adaptability features. We explored the domain adaptation inside the object detection model using a virtual dataset to overcome a few well-annotated datasets. We use VW-PPE dataset, using 5000 and 10000 virtual data and 220 real data. For model architecture, we used YOLOv4 using CSPDarknet53 as the backbone and PAN as the neck. The domain adaptation technique with fine-tuning only on backbone weight achieved a mean average precision of 74.457%.
summary: Deep neural network shows excellent use in a lot of real-world tasks. One of the deep learning tasks is object detection. Well-annotated datasets will affect deep neural network accuracy. More data learned by deep neural networks will make the model more accurate. However, a well-annotated dataset is hard to find, especially in a specific domain. To overcome this, computer-generated data or virtual datasets are used. Researchers could generate many images with specific use cases also with its annotation. Research studies showed that virtual datasets could be used for object detection tasks. Nevertheless, with the usage of the virtual dataset, the model must adapt to real datasets, or the model must have domain adaptability features. We explored the domain adaptation inside the object detection model using a virtual dataset to overcome a few well-annotated datasets. We use VW-PPE dataset, using 5000 and 10000 virtual data and 220 real data. For model architecture, we used YOLOv4 using CSPDarknet53 as the backbone and PAN as the neck. The domain adaptation technique with fine-tuning only on backbone weight achieved a mean average precision of 74.457%.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在许多现实世界的任务中表现出了出色的用途。深度学习任务之一是对象检测。注释良好的数据集将影响深度神经网络的准确性。深度神经网络学习到的更多数据将使模型更加准确。然而，注释良好的数据集很难找到，尤其是在特定领域。为了克服这个问题，使用计算机生成的数据或虚拟数据集。研究人员可以生成许多具有特定用例的图像及其注释。研究表明，虚拟数据集可用于对象检测任务。然而，随着虚拟数据集的使用，模型必须适应真实数据集，或者模型必须具有领域适应性特征。我们使用虚拟数据集探索了对象检测模型内的域适应，以克服一些注释良好的数据集。我们使用VW-PPE数据集，使用5000和10000个虚拟数据和220个真实数据。对于模型架构，我们使用 YOLOv4，使用 CSPDarknet53 作为骨干，PAN 作为颈部。仅对主干权重进行微调的域自适应技术实现了 74.457% 的平均精度。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用监督虚拟到真实领域适应方法，结合YOLOv4模型解决目标检测任务中真实标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 高质量标注数据在特定领域获取困难，而虚拟数据集虽易生成但需解决领域差异问题，需提升模型跨领域适应能力。
AI.method: 基于VW-PPE数据集（含5000/10000虚拟数据和220真实数据），采用YOLOv4架构（CSPDarknet53主干网络+PAN结构），仅对主干网络权重进行微调实现领域适应。
AI.result: 在目标检测任务中达到74.457%的平均精度均值（mAP）。
AI.conclusion: 通过虚拟数据与领域适应技术结合，有效提升了模型在真实场景中的检测性能，为标注数据稀缺场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Adnan Munawar,Zhaoshuo Li,Nimesh Nagururu,Danielle Trakimas,Peter Kazanzides,Russell H. Taylor,Francis X. Creighton
title: Fully Immersive Virtual Reality for Skull-base Surgery: Surgical Training and Beyond
title_zh: 用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实：手术训练及其他
abstract: Purpose: A virtual reality (VR) system, where surgeons can practice procedures on virtual anatomies, is a scalable and cost-effective alternative to cadaveric training. The fully digitized virtual surgeries can also be used to assess the surgeon's skills using measurements that are otherwise hard to collect in reality. Thus, we present the Fully Immersive Virtual Reality System (FIVRS) for skull-base surgery, which combines surgical simulation software with a high-fidelity hardware setup. Methods: FIVRS allows surgeons to follow normal clinical workflows inside the VR environment. FIVRS uses advanced rendering designs and drilling algorithms for realistic bone ablation. A head-mounted display with ergonomics similar to that of surgical microscopes is used to improve immersiveness. Extensive multi-modal data is recorded for post-analysis, including eye gaze, motion, force, and video of the surgery. A user-friendly interface is also designed to ease the learning curve of using FIVRS. Results: We present results from a user study involving surgeons with various levels of expertise. The preliminary data recorded by FIVRS differentiates between participants with different levels of expertise, promising future research on automatic skill assessment. Furthermore, informal feedback from the study participants about the system's intuitiveness and immersiveness was positive. Conclusion: We present FIVRS, a fully immersive VR system for skull-base surgery. FIVRS features a realistic software simulation coupled with modern hardware for improved realism. The system is completely open-source and provides feature-rich data in an industry-standard format.
summary: Purpose: A virtual reality (VR) system, where surgeons can practice procedures on virtual anatomies, is a scalable and cost-effective alternative to cadaveric training. The fully digitized virtual surgeries can also be used to assess the surgeon's skills using measurements that are otherwise hard to collect in reality. Thus, we present the Fully Immersive Virtual Reality System (FIVRS) for skull-base surgery, which combines surgical simulation software with a high-fidelity hardware setup. Methods: FIVRS allows surgeons to follow normal clinical workflows inside the VR environment. FIVRS uses advanced rendering designs and drilling algorithms for realistic bone ablation. A head-mounted display with ergonomics similar to that of surgical microscopes is used to improve immersiveness. Extensive multi-modal data is recorded for post-analysis, including eye gaze, motion, force, and video of the surgery. A user-friendly interface is also designed to ease the learning curve of using FIVRS. Results: We present results from a user study involving surgeons with various levels of expertise. The preliminary data recorded by FIVRS differentiates between participants with different levels of expertise, promising future research on automatic skill assessment. Furthermore, informal feedback from the study participants about the system's intuitiveness and immersiveness was positive. Conclusion: We present FIVRS, a fully immersive VR system for skull-base surgery. FIVRS features a realistic software simulation coupled with modern hardware for improved realism. The system is completely open-source and provides feature-rich data in an industry-standard format.
abstract_zh: 目的：虚拟现实 (VR) 系统可供外科医生在虚拟解剖结构上练习手术，是尸体训练的一种可扩展且经济高效的替代方案。完全数字化的虚拟手术还可用于使用现实中难以收集的测量数据来评估外科医生的技能。因此，我们推出了用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实系统（FIVRS），它将手术模拟软件与高保真硬件设置相结合。方法：FIVRS 允许外科医生在 VR 环境中遵循正常的临床工作流程。 FIVRS 使用先进的渲染设计和钻孔算法来实现逼真的骨消融。采用与手术显微镜类似的人体工程学头戴式显示器来提高沉浸感。记录大量多模态数据以供后期分析，包括眼睛注视、运动、力量和手术视频。还设计了用户友好的界面，以简化使用 FIVRS 的学习曲线。结果：我们展示了一项涉及具有不同专业水平的外科医生的用户研究的结果。 FIVRS 记录的初步数据区分了不同专业水平的参与者，为自动技能评估的未来研究带来了希望。此外，研究参与者对系统的直观性和沉浸感的非正式反馈是积极的。结论：我们推出了 FIVRS，一种用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式 VR 系统。 FIVRS 采用逼真的软件模拟与现代硬件相结合，以提高真实感。该系统完全开源，并以行业标准格式提供功能丰富的数据。

AI.tldr: 开发一种用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实系统（FIVRS），用于外科培训和技能评估。
AI.motivation: 传统尸体训练成本高且难以普及，而虚拟现实技术可提供可扩展、低成本的替代方案，并能通过难以在现实中获取的指标评估外科医生技能。
AI.method: 结合高保真硬件与先进软件模拟，采用逼真骨骼切除算法及类似手术显微镜的头戴显示设备，记录眼动、动作、力反馈等多模态数据，并设计用户友好界面。
AI.result: 用户研究显示系统能区分不同经验水平的外科医生，初步数据支持未来自动技能评估研究，且用户对系统直观性和沉浸感反馈积极。
AI.conclusion: FIVRS通过软硬件结合实现高真实性，开源且支持行业标准数据格式，为颅底手术培训及技能评估提供新工具。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实系统（FIVRS），用于外科培训和技能评估。
ai_content.motivation: 传统尸体训练成本高且难以普及，而虚拟现实技术可提供可扩展、低成本的替代方案，并能通过难以在现实中获取的指标评估外科医生技能。
ai_content.method: 结合高保真硬件与先进软件模拟，采用逼真骨骼切除算法及类似手术显微镜的头戴显示设备，记录眼动、动作、力反馈等多模态数据，并设计用户友好界面。
ai_content.result: 用户研究显示系统能区分不同经验水平的外科医生，初步数据支持未来自动技能评估研究，且用户对系统直观性和沉浸感反馈积极。
ai_content.conclusion: FIVRS通过软硬件结合实现高真实性，开源且支持行业标准数据格式，为颅底手术培训及技能评估提供新工具。

search_text: Fully Immersive Virtual Reality for Skull-base Surgery: Surgical Training and Beyond 用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实：手术训练及其他 Purpose: A virtual reality (VR) system, where surgeons can practice procedures on virtual anatomies, is a scalable and cost-effective alternative to cadaveric training. The fully digitized virtual surgeries can also be used to assess the surgeon's skills using measurements that are otherwise hard to collect in reality. Thus, we present the Fully Immersive Virtual Reality System (FIVRS) for skull-base surgery, which combines surgical simulation software with a high-fidelity hardware setup. Methods: FIVRS allows surgeons to follow normal clinical workflows inside the VR environment. FIVRS uses advanced rendering designs and drilling algorithms for realistic bone ablation. A head-mounted display with ergonomics similar to that of surgical microscopes is used to improve immersiveness. Extensive multi-modal data is recorded for post-analysis, including eye gaze, motion, force, and video of the surgery. A user-friendly interface is also designed to ease the learning curve of using FIVRS. Results: We present results from a user study involving surgeons with various levels of expertise. The preliminary data recorded by FIVRS differentiates between participants with different levels of expertise, promising future research on automatic skill assessment. Furthermore, informal feedback from the study participants about the system's intuitiveness and immersiveness was positive. Conclusion: We present FIVRS, a fully immersive VR system for skull-base surgery. FIVRS features a realistic software simulation coupled with modern hardware for improved realism. The system is completely open-source and provides feature-rich data in an industry-standard format. 目的：虚拟现实 (VR) 系统可供外科医生在虚拟解剖结构上练习手术，是尸体训练的一种可扩展且经济高效的替代方案。完全数字化的虚拟手术还可用于使用现实中难以收集的测量数据来评估外科医生的技能。因此，我们推出了用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实系统（FIVRS），它将手术模拟软件与高保真硬件设置相结合。方法：FIVRS 允许外科医生在 VR 环境中遵循正常的临床工作流程。 FIVRS 使用先进的渲染设计和钻孔算法来实现逼真的骨消融。采用与手术显微镜类似的人体工程学头戴式显示器来提高沉浸感。记录大量多模态数据以供后期分析，包括眼睛注视、运动、力量和手术视频。还设计了用户友好的界面，以简化使用 FIVRS 的学习曲线。结果：我们展示了一项涉及具有不同专业水平的外科医生的用户研究的结果。 FIVRS 记录的初步数据区分了不同专业水平的参与者，为自动技能评估的未来研究带来了希望。此外，研究参与者对系统的直观性和沉浸感的非正式反馈是积极的。结论：我们推出了 FIVRS，一种用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式 VR 系统。 FIVRS 采用逼真的软件模拟与现代硬件相结合，以提高真实感。该系统完全开源，并以行业标准格式提供功能丰富的数据。 开发一种用于颅底手术的完全沉浸式虚拟现实系统（FIVRS），用于外科培训和技能评估。 Adnan Munawar,Zhaoshuo Li,Nimesh Nagururu,Danielle Trakimas,Peter Kazanzides,Russell H. Taylor,Francis X. Creighton cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Yiman Liu,Xiaoxiang Han,Tongtong Liang,Bin Dong,Jiajun Yuan,Menghan Hu,Qiaohong Liu,Jiangang Chen,Qingli Li,Yuqi Zhang
title: EDMAE: An Efficient Decoupled Masked Autoencoder for Standard View Identification in Pediatric Echocardiography
title_zh: EDMAE：一种高效解耦掩模自动编码器，用于儿科超声心动图标准视图识别
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables, Published in Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
comments: 15 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables, Published in Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
abstract: This paper introduces the Efficient Decoupled Masked Autoencoder (EDMAE), a novel self-supervised method for recognizing standard views in pediatric echocardiography. EDMAE introduces a new proxy task based on the encoder-decoder structure. The EDMAE encoder is composed of a teacher and a student encoder. The teacher encoder extracts the potential representation of the masked image blocks, while the student encoder extracts the potential representation of the visible image blocks. The loss is calculated between the feature maps output by the two encoders to ensure consistency in the latent representations they extract. EDMAE uses pure convolution operations instead of the ViT structure in the MAE encoder. This improves training efficiency and convergence speed. EDMAE is pre-trained on a large-scale private dataset of pediatric echocardiography using self-supervised learning, and then fine-tuned for standard view recognition. The proposed method achieves high classification accuracy in 27 standard views of pediatric echocardiography. To further verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, the authors perform another downstream task of cardiac ultrasound segmentation on the public dataset CAMUS. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms some popular supervised and recent self-supervised methods, and is more competitive on different downstream tasks.
summary: This paper introduces the Efficient Decoupled Masked Autoencoder (EDMAE), a novel self-supervised method for recognizing standard views in pediatric echocardiography. EDMAE introduces a new proxy task based on the encoder-decoder structure. The EDMAE encoder is composed of a teacher and a student encoder. The teacher encoder extracts the potential representation of the masked image blocks, while the student encoder extracts the potential representation of the visible image blocks. The loss is calculated between the feature maps output by the two encoders to ensure consistency in the latent representations they extract. EDMAE uses pure convolution operations instead of the ViT structure in the MAE encoder. This improves training efficiency and convergence speed. EDMAE is pre-trained on a large-scale private dataset of pediatric echocardiography using self-supervised learning, and then fine-tuned for standard view recognition. The proposed method achieves high classification accuracy in 27 standard views of pediatric echocardiography. To further verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, the authors perform another downstream task of cardiac ultrasound segmentation on the public dataset CAMUS. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms some popular supervised and recent self-supervised methods, and is more competitive on different downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了高效解耦掩模自动编码器（EDMAE），这是一种用于识别儿科超声心动图标准视图的新型自监督方法。 EDMAE引入了一种基于编码器-解码器结构的新代理任务。 EDMAE编码器由教师和学生编码器组成。教师编码器提取掩模图像块的潜在表示，而学生编码器提取可见图像块的潜在表示。损失是在两个编码器输出的特征图之间计算的，以确保它们提取的潜在表示的一致性。 EDMAE使用纯卷积运算而不是MAE编码器中的ViT结构。这提高了训练效率和收敛速度。 EDMAE 使用自我监督学习在儿科超声心动图的大规模私人数据集上进行预训练，然后针对标准视图识别进行微调。该方法在 27 个儿科超声心动图标准视图中实现了较高的分类准确性。为了进一步验证所提出方法的有效性，作者在公共数据集 CAMUS 上执行了心脏超声分割的另一项下游任务。实验结果表明，该方法优于一些流行的监督方法和最近的自监督方法，并且在不同的下游任务上更具竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的解耦掩码自编码器（EDMAE），用于识别儿科超声心动图中的标准视图。
AI.motivation: 儿科超声心动图中标准视图的识别对于诊断至关重要，但传统方法依赖于标注数据，成本高且效率低。因此，需要一种高效的自监督学习方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: EDMAE采用编码器-解码器结构，包含一个教师编码器和一个学生编码器。教师编码器处理掩码图像块，学生编码器处理可见图像块，通过计算两个编码器输出的特征图之间的损失来确保潜在表示的一致性。该方法使用纯卷积操作，而非ViT结构，以提高训练效率和收敛速度。
AI.result: EDMAE在27种儿科超声心动图标准视图分类任务中取得了高分类准确率，并在公共数据集CAMUS的心脏超声分割任务中优于一些流行的监督和最近的自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: EDMAE是一种高效的自监督学习方法，能够有效识别儿科超声心动图中的标准视图，并在多个下游任务中表现出色，具有广泛的应用前景。

To further verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, the authors perform another downstream task of cardiac ultrasound segmentation on the public dataset CAMUS. authors_text: Sahra Ghalebikesabi,Leonard Berrada,Sven Gowal,Ira Ktena,Robert Stanforth,Jamie Hayes,Soham De,Samuel L. Smith,Olivia Wiles,Borja Balle
title: Differentially Private Diffusion Models Generate Useful Synthetic Images
title_zh: 差分隐私扩散模型生成有用的合成图像
abstract: The ability to generate privacy-preserving synthetic versions of sensitive image datasets could unlock numerous ML applications currently constrained by data availability. Due to their astonishing image generation quality, diffusion models are a prime candidate for generating high-quality synthetic data. However, recent studies have found that, by default, the outputs of some diffusion models do not preserve training data privacy. By privately fine-tuning ImageNet pre-trained diffusion models with more than 80M parameters, we obtain SOTA results on CIFAR-10 and Camelyon17 in terms of both FID and the accuracy of downstream classifiers trained on synthetic data. We decrease the SOTA FID on CIFAR-10 from 26.2 to 9.8, and increase the accuracy from 51.0% to 88.0%. On synthetic data from Camelyon17, we achieve a downstream accuracy of 91.1% which is close to the SOTA of 96.5% when training on the real data. We leverage the ability of generative models to create infinite amounts of data to maximise the downstream prediction performance, and further show how to use synthetic data for hyperparameter tuning. Our results demonstrate that diffusion models fine-tuned with differential privacy can produce useful and provably private synthetic data, even in applications with significant distribution shift between the pre-training and fine-tuning distributions.
summary: The ability to generate privacy-preserving synthetic versions of sensitive image datasets could unlock numerous ML applications currently constrained by data availability. Due to their astonishing image generation quality, diffusion models are a prime candidate for generating high-quality synthetic data. However, recent studies have found that, by default, the outputs of some diffusion models do not preserve training data privacy. By privately fine-tuning ImageNet pre-trained diffusion models with more than 80M parameters, we obtain SOTA results on CIFAR-10 and Camelyon17 in terms of both FID and the accuracy of downstream classifiers trained on synthetic data. We decrease the SOTA FID on CIFAR-10 from 26.2 to 9.8, and increase the accuracy from 51.0% to 88.0%. On synthetic data from Camelyon17, we achieve a downstream accuracy of 91.1% which is close to the SOTA of 96.5% when training on the real data. We leverage the ability of generative models to create infinite amounts of data to maximise the downstream prediction performance, and further show how to use synthetic data for hyperparameter tuning. Our results demonstrate that diffusion models fine-tuned with differential privacy can produce useful and provably private synthetic data, even in applications with significant distribution shift between the pre-training and fine-tuning distributions.
abstract_zh: 生成敏感图像数据集的隐私保护合成版本的能力可以解锁目前受数据可用性限制的众多机器学习应用程序。由于其惊人的图像生成质量，扩散模型是生成高质量合成数据的主要候选者。然而，最近的研究发现，默认情况下，某些扩散模型的输出不会保护训练数据的隐私。通过私下微调具有超过 80M 个参数的 ImageNet 预训练扩散模型，我们在 CIFAR-10 和 Camelyon17 上获得了 FID 和在合成数据上训练的下游分类器的准确性方面的 SOTA 结果。我们将 CIFAR-10 上的 SOTA FID 从 26.2 降低到 9.8，并将准确度从 51.0% 提高到 88.0%。在 Camelyon17 的合成数据上，我们实现了 91.1% 的下游准确率，接近在真实数据上训练时的 SOTA 96.5%。我们利用生成模型的能力来创建无限量的数据，以最大化下游预测性能，并进一步展示如何使用合成数据进行超参数调整。我们的结果表明，即使在预训练和微调分布之间存在显着分布变化的应用中，通过差异隐私进行微调的扩散模型也可以产生有用且可证明隐私的合成数据。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过差分隐私微调扩散模型生成高质量且隐私保护的合成图像，以解决敏感数据集的隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 生成隐私保护的合成图像数据可解锁受限于数据可用性的机器学习应用，但现有扩散模型输出可能泄露训练数据隐私，需在保证质量的同时实现隐私保护。
AI.method: 基于预训练的ImageNet扩散模型，通过差分隐私技术微调参数（超80M），在CIFAR-10和Camelyon17数据集上优化生成效果，并利用合成数据进行下游任务评估与超参数调优。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上将FID从26.2降至9.8，下游分类准确率从51.0%提升至88.0%；Camelyon17合成数据下游准确率达91.1%，接近真实数据的96.5%。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私微调的扩散模型可生成兼具实用性和隐私保障的合成数据，即使在预训练与微调分布存在显著偏移的应用场景中仍表现优异。
