search_text: Differentially Private Diffusion Models Generate Useful Synthetic Images 差分隐私扩散模型生成有用的合成图像 The ability to generate privacy-preserving synthetic versions of sensitive image datasets could unlock numerous ML applications currently constrained by data availability. Due to their astonishing image generation quality, diffusion models are a prime candidate for generating high-quality synthetic data. However, recent studies have found that, by default, the outputs of some diffusion models do not preserve training data privacy. By privately fine-tuning ImageNet pre-trained diffusion models with more than 80M parameters, we obtain SOTA results on CIFAR-10 and Camelyon17 in terms of both FID and the accuracy of downstream classifiers trained on synthetic data. We decrease the SOTA FID on CIFAR-10 from 26.2 to 9.8, and increase the accuracy from 51.0% to 88.0%. On synthetic data from Camelyon17, we achieve a downstream accuracy of 91.1% which is close to the SOTA of 96.5% when training on the real data. We leverage the ability of generative models to create infinite amounts of data to maximise the downstream prediction performance, and further show how to use synthetic data for hyperparameter tuning. Our results demonstrate that diffusion models fine-tuned with differential privacy can produce useful and provably private synthetic data, even in applications with significant distribution shift between the pre-training and fine-tuning distributions. 生成敏感图像数据集的隐私保护合成版本的能力可以解锁目前受数据可用性限制的众多机器学习应用程序。由于其惊人的图像生成质量，扩散模型是生成高质量合成数据的主要候选者。然而，最近的研究发现，默认情况下，某些扩散模型的输出不会保护训练数据的隐私。通过私下微调具有超过 80M 个参数的 ImageNet 预训练扩散模型，我们在 CIFAR-10 和 Camelyon17 上获得了 FID 和在合成数据上训练的下游分类器的准确性方面的 SOTA 结果。我们将 CIFAR-10 上的 SOTA FID 从 26.2 降低到 9.8，并将准确度从 51.0% 提高到 88.0%。在 Camelyon17 的合成数据上，我们实现了 91.1% 的下游准确率，接近在真实数据上训练时的 SOTA 96.5%。我们利用生成模型的能力来创建无限量的数据，以最大化下游预测性能，并进一步展示如何使用合成数据进行超参数调整。我们的结果表明，即使在预训练和微调分布之间存在显着分布变化的应用中，通过差异隐私进行微调的扩散模型也可以产生有用且可证明隐私的合成数据。 该论文提出通过差分隐私微调扩散模型生成高质量且隐私保护的合成图像，以解决敏感数据集的隐私问题。 Sahra Ghalebikesabi,Leonard Berrada,Sven Gowal,Ira Ktena,Robert Stanforth,Jamie Hayes,Soham De,Samuel L. Smith,Olivia Wiles,Borja Balle cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Okan Düzyel,Mehmet Kuntalp
title: Data Augmentation with GAN increases the Performance of Arrhythmia Classification for an Unbalanced Dataset
title_zh: 使用 GAN 进行数据增强可提高不平衡数据集的心律失常分类性能
comment: 4th International Eurasian Conference on Science, Engineering and Technology (EurasianSciEnTech 2022)
comments: 4th International Eurasian Conference on Science, Engineering and Technology (EurasianSciEnTech 2022)
abstract: Due to the data shortage problem, which is one of the major problems in the field of machine learning, the accuracy level of many applications remains well below the expected. It prevents researchers from producing new artificial intelligence-based systems with the available data. This problem can be solved by generating new synthetic data with augmentation methods. In this study, new ECG signals are produced using MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database by using Generative Adversarial Neural Networks (GAN), which is a modern data augmentation method. These generated data are used for training a machine learning system and real ECG data for testing it. The obtained results show that this way the performance of the machine learning system is increased.
summary: Due to the data shortage problem, which is one of the major problems in the field of machine learning, the accuracy level of many applications remains well below the expected. It prevents researchers from producing new artificial intelligence-based systems with the available data. This problem can be solved by generating new synthetic data with augmentation methods. In this study, new ECG signals are produced using MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database by using Generative Adversarial Neural Networks (GAN), which is a modern data augmentation method. These generated data are used for training a machine learning system and real ECG data for testing it. The obtained results show that this way the performance of the machine learning system is increased.
abstract_zh: 由于数据短缺问题是机器学习领域的主要问题之一，许多应用的准确率水平仍然远低于预期。它阻止研究人员利用可用数据开发新的基于人工智能的系统。这个问题可以通过使用增强方法生成新的合成数据来解决。在这项研究中，使用 MIT-BIH 心律失常数据库通过生成对抗神经网络 (GAN)（一种现代数据增强方法）生成新的心电图信号。这些生成的数据用于训练机器学习系统，并使用真实的心电图数据进行测试。获得的结果表明，通过这种方式，机器学习系统的性能得到了提高。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成合成ECG信号以增强数据集，提升心律失常分类模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 数据不足导致机器学习模型在心律失常分类任务中表现不佳，尤其在数据不平衡场景下难以构建有效系统。
AI.method: 基于MIT-BIH心律失常数据库，采用GAN生成新ECG信号作为训练数据，结合真实数据测试模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用GAN生成的数据显著提升了机器学习系统的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: GAN数据增强技术能有效缓解不平衡数据集问题，提高心律失常分类模型的性能。

authors_text: Peter Xiangyuan Ma,Steve Croft,Chris Lintott,Andrew P. V. Siemion
title: A Deep Neural Network Based Reverse Radio Spectrogram Search Algorithm
title_zh: 一种基于深度神经网络的反向无线电频谱图搜索算法
abstract: Modern radio astronomy instruments generate vast amounts of data, and the increasingly challenging radio frequency interference (RFI) environment necessitates ever-more sophisticated RFI rejection algorithms. The "needle in a haystack" nature of searches for transients and technosignatures requires us to develop methods that can determine whether a signal of interest has unique properties, or is a part of some larger set of pernicious RFI. In the past, this vetting has required onerous manual inspection of very large numbers of signals. In this paper we present a fast and modular deep learning algorithm to search for lookalike signals of interest in radio spectrogram data. First, we trained a B-Variational Autoencoder on signals returned by an energy detection algorithm. We then adapted a positional embedding layer from classical Transformer architecture to a embed additional metadata, which we demonstrate using a frequency-based embedding. Next we used the encoder component of the B-Variational Autoencoder to extract features from small (~ 715,Hz, with a resolution of 2.79Hz per frequency bin) windows in the radio spectrogram. We used our algorithm to conduct a search for a given query (encoded signal of interest) on a set of signals (encoded features of searched items) to produce the top candidates with similar features. We successfully demonstrate that the algorithm retrieves signals with similar appearance, given only the original radio spectrogram data. This algorithm can be used to improve the efficiency of vetting signals of interest in technosignature searches, but could also be applied to a wider variety of searches for "lookalike" signals in large astronomical datasets.
summary: Modern radio astronomy instruments generate vast amounts of data, and the increasingly challenging radio frequency interference (RFI) environment necessitates ever-more sophisticated RFI rejection algorithms. The "needle in a haystack" nature of searches for transients and technosignatures requires us to develop methods that can determine whether a signal of interest has unique properties, or is a part of some larger set of pernicious RFI. In the past, this vetting has required onerous manual inspection of very large numbers of signals. In this paper we present a fast and modular deep learning algorithm to search for lookalike signals of interest in radio spectrogram data. First, we trained a B-Variational Autoencoder on signals returned by an energy detection algorithm. We then adapted a positional embedding layer from classical Transformer architecture to a embed additional metadata, which we demonstrate using a frequency-based embedding. Next we used the encoder component of the B-Variational Autoencoder to extract features from small (~ 715,Hz, with a resolution of 2.79Hz per frequency bin) windows in the radio spectrogram. We used our algorithm to conduct a search for a given query (encoded signal of interest) on a set of signals (encoded features of searched items) to produce the top candidates with similar features. We successfully demonstrate that the algorithm retrieves signals with similar appearance, given only the original radio spectrogram data. This algorithm can be used to improve the efficiency of vetting signals of interest in technosignature searches, but could also be applied to a wider variety of searches for "lookalike" signals in large astronomical datasets.
abstract_zh: 现代射电天文仪器会生成大量数据，而日益严峻的射频干扰 (RFI) 环境需要更加复杂的 RFI 抑制算法。搜索瞬态信号和技术特征的“大海捞针”性质要求我们开发方法来确定感兴趣的信号是否具有独特的属性，或者是否是某些更大的有害 RFI 的一部分。过去，这种审查需要对大量信号进行繁琐的手动检查。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且模块化的深度学习算法，用于搜索无线电频谱图数据中感兴趣的相似信号。首先，我们根据能量检测算法返回的信号训练 B 变分自动编码器。然后，我们将经典 Transformer 架构中的位置嵌入层改编为嵌入附加元数据，我们使用基于频率的嵌入进行了演示。接下来，我们使用 B 变分自动编码器的编码器组件从无线电频谱图中的小窗口（~ 715 Hz，每个频率仓的分辨率为 2.79 Hz）中提取特征。我们使用我们的算法对一组信号（搜索项目的编码特征）进行给定查询（感兴趣的编码信号）的搜索，以产生具有相似特征的最佳候选。我们成功地证明了该算法在仅给出原始无线电频谱图数据的情况下检索具有相似外观的信号。该算法可用于提高技术签名搜索中感兴趣信号的审核效率，但也可应用于大型天文数据集中“相似”信号的更广泛搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的反向无线电频谱图搜索算法，用于在大量无线电数据中高效识别相似信号。
AI.motivation: 现代射电天文仪器产生的海量数据及复杂的射频干扰（RFI）环境，使得手动筛选瞬变信号和人工技术信号（technosignatures）的效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 训练B-变分自编码器（B-VAE）提取信号特征，结合Transformer的位置嵌入层处理频率元数据，通过编码器对频谱图小窗口进行特征提取，并基于相似性检索目标信号。
AI.result: 算法能够仅根据原始无线电频谱数据成功检索出外观相似的信号，显著提升信号筛选效率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可优化技术信号搜索的信号验证流程，并适用于其他大型天文学数据集的“类似信号”检索任务。

First, we trained a B-Variational Autoencoder on signals returned by an energy detection algorithm. We then adapted a positional embedding layer from classical Transformer architecture to a embed additional metadata, which we demonstrate using a frequency-based embedding. Next we used the encoder component of the B-Variational Autoencoder to extract features from small (~ 715,Hz, with a resolution of 2.79Hz per frequency bin) windows in the radio spectrogram. We used our algorithm to conduct a search for a given query (encoded signal of interest) on a set of signals (encoded features of searched items) to produce the top candidates with similar features. We successfully demonstrate that the algorithm retrieves signals with similar appearance, given only the original radio spectrogram data. This algorithm can be used to improve the efficiency of vetting signals of interest in technosignature searches, but could also be applied to a wider variety of searches for "lookalike" signals in large astronomical datasets. 现代射电天文仪器会生成大量数据，而日益严峻的射频干扰 (RFI) 环境需要更加复杂的 RFI 抑制算法。搜索瞬态信号和技术特征的“大海捞针”性质要求我们开发方法来确定感兴趣的信号是否具有独特的属性，或者是否是某些更大的有害 RFI 的一部分。过去，这种审查需要对大量信号进行繁琐的手动检查。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且模块化的深度学习算法，用于搜索无线电频谱图数据中感兴趣的相似信号。首先，我们根据能量检测算法返回的信号训练 B 变分自动编码器。然后，我们将经典 Transformer 架构中的位置嵌入层改编为嵌入附加元数据，我们使用基于频率的嵌入进行了演示。接下来，我们使用 B 变分自动编码器的编码器组件从无线电频谱图中的小窗口（~ 715 Hz，每个频率仓的分辨率为 2.79 Hz）中提取特征。我们使用我们的算法对一组信号（搜索项目的编码特征）进行给定查询（感兴趣的编码信号）的搜索，以产生具有相似特征的最佳候选。我们成功地证明了该算法在仅给出原始无线电频谱图数据的情况下检索具有相似外观的信号。该算法可用于提高技术签名搜索中感兴趣信号的审核效率，但也可应用于大型天文数据集中“相似”信号的更广泛搜索。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的反向无线电频谱图搜索算法，用于在大量无线电数据中高效识别相似信号。 Peter Xiangyuan Ma,Steve Croft,Chris Lintott,Andrew P. V. Siemion eess.SP,astro-ph.IM,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Mohammad Mohammadi,Jonathan Nöther,Debmalya Mandal,Adish Singla,Goran Radanovic
title: Implicit Poisoning Attacks in Two-Agent Reinforcement Learning: Adversarial Policies for Training-Time Attacks
title_zh: 双代理强化学习中的隐式中毒攻击：训练时间攻击的对抗策略
abstract: In targeted poisoning attacks, an attacker manipulates an agent-environment interaction to force the agent into adopting a policy of interest, called target policy. Prior work has primarily focused on attacks that modify standard MDP primitives, such as rewards or transitions. In this paper, we study targeted poisoning attacks in a two-agent setting where an attacker implicitly poisons the effective environment of one of the agents by modifying the policy of its peer. We develop an optimization framework for designing optimal attacks, where the cost of the attack measures how much the solution deviates from the assumed default policy of the peer agent. We further study the computational properties of this optimization framework. Focusing on a tabular setting, we show that in contrast to poisoning attacks based on MDP primitives (transitions and (unbounded) rewards), which are always feasible, it is NP-hard to determine the feasibility of implicit poisoning attacks. We provide characterization results that establish sufficient conditions for the feasibility of the attack problem, as well as an upper and a lower bound on the optimal cost of the attack. We propose two algorithmic approaches for finding an optimal adversarial policy: a model-based approach with tabular policies and a model-free approach with parametric/neural policies. We showcase the efficacy of the proposed algorithms through experiments.
summary: In targeted poisoning attacks, an attacker manipulates an agent-environment interaction to force the agent into adopting a policy of interest, called target policy. Prior work has primarily focused on attacks that modify standard MDP primitives, such as rewards or transitions. In this paper, we study targeted poisoning attacks in a two-agent setting where an attacker implicitly poisons the effective environment of one of the agents by modifying the policy of its peer. We develop an optimization framework for designing optimal attacks, where the cost of the attack measures how much the solution deviates from the assumed default policy of the peer agent. We further study the computational properties of this optimization framework. Focusing on a tabular setting, we show that in contrast to poisoning attacks based on MDP primitives (transitions and (unbounded) rewards), which are always feasible, it is NP-hard to determine the feasibility of implicit poisoning attacks. We provide characterization results that establish sufficient conditions for the feasibility of the attack problem, as well as an upper and a lower bound on the optimal cost of the attack. We propose two algorithmic approaches for finding an optimal adversarial policy: a model-based approach with tabular policies and a model-free approach with parametric/neural policies. We showcase the efficacy of the proposed algorithms through experiments.
abstract_zh: 在有针对性的中毒攻击中，攻击者操纵代理与环境的交互，迫使代理采用感兴趣的策略，称为目标策略。之前的工作主要集中于修改标准 MDP 原语的攻击，例如奖励或转换。在本文中，我们研究了双代理环境中的针对性中毒攻击，其中攻击者通过修改对等代理的策略来隐式毒害其中一个代理的有效环境。我们开发了一个用于设计最佳攻击的优化框架，其中攻击成本衡量解决方案与对等代理假定的默认策略的偏差程度。我们进一步研究该优化框架的计算特性。着眼于表格设置，我们表明，与始终可行的基于 MDP 原语（转换和（无界）奖励）的中毒攻击相比，确定隐式中毒攻击的可行性是 NP 困难的。我们提供表征结果，为攻击问题的可行性建立充分的条件，以及攻击最优成本的上限和下限。我们提出了两种寻找最佳对抗策略的算法方法：具有表格策略的基于模型的方法和具有参数/神经策略的无模型方法。我们通过实验展示了所提出算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究双智能体强化学习中的隐式中毒攻击问题，通过修改同伴智能体策略来毒害目标智能体，提出优化框架及两种算法实现攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统中毒攻击直接修改MDP要素易被检测，而隐式攻击通过策略修改更隐蔽，但其可行性及计算复杂性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建攻击优化框架，分析计算复杂性，提出可行性条件并设计基于模型的表格策略与无模型神经网络策略两种算法。
AI.result: 证明隐式攻击可行性判定为NP难，建立充分条件及成本界，实验验证两种算法能有效生成对抗策略。
AI.conclusion: 隐式中毒攻击在双智能体场景中具有理论可行性，其计算复杂性与传统攻击不同，所提算法可有效实施此类攻击。

authors_text: Yuxiang Wei,Yabo Zhang,Zhilong Ji,Jinfeng Bai,Lei Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo
title: ELITE: Encoding Visual Concepts into Textual Embeddings for Customized Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: ELITE：将视觉概念编码为文本嵌入，以生成定制的文本到图像
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023, oral presentation. Code: https://github.com/csyxwei/ELITE
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023, oral presentation. Code: https://github.com/csyxwei/ELITE
abstract: In addition to the unprecedented ability in imaginary creation, large text-to-image models are expected to take customized concepts in image generation. Existing works generally learn such concepts in an optimization-based manner, yet bringing excessive computation or memory burden. In this paper, we instead propose a learning-based encoder, which consists of a global and a local mapping networks for fast and accurate customized text-to-image generation. In specific, the global mapping network projects the hierarchical features of a given image into multiple new words in the textual word embedding space, i.e., one primary word for well-editable concept and other auxiliary words to exclude irrelevant disturbances (e.g., background). In the meantime, a local mapping network injects the encoded patch features into cross attention layers to provide omitted details, without sacrificing the editability of primary concepts. We compare our method with existing optimization-based approaches on a variety of user-defined concepts, and demonstrate that our method enables high-fidelity inversion and more robust editability with a significantly faster encoding process. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/csyxwei/ELITE.
summary: In addition to the unprecedented ability in imaginary creation, large text-to-image models are expected to take customized concepts in image generation. Existing works generally learn such concepts in an optimization-based manner, yet bringing excessive computation or memory burden. In this paper, we instead propose a learning-based encoder, which consists of a global and a local mapping networks for fast and accurate customized text-to-image generation. In specific, the global mapping network projects the hierarchical features of a given image into multiple new words in the textual word embedding space, i.e., one primary word for well-editable concept and other auxiliary words to exclude irrelevant disturbances (e.g., background). In the meantime, a local mapping network injects the encoded patch features into cross attention layers to provide omitted details, without sacrificing the editability of primary concepts. We compare our method with existing optimization-based approaches on a variety of user-defined concepts, and demonstrate that our method enables high-fidelity inversion and more robust editability with a significantly faster encoding process. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/csyxwei/ELITE.
abstract_zh: 除了前所未有的想象能力之外，大型文本到图像模型预计将在图像生成中采用定制概念。现有的工作通常以基于优化的方式学习这些概念，但会带来过多的计算或内存负担。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的编码器，它由全局和局部映射网络组成，用于快速准确地生成定制的文本到图像。具体来说，全局映射网络将给定图像的层次特征投影到文本词嵌入空间中的多个新词中，即，一个用于良好编辑概念的主要词和其他辅助词以排除不相关的干扰（例如背景）。与此同时，本地映射网络将编码的补丁特征注入交叉注意层以提供省略的细节，而不牺牲主要概念的可编辑性。我们将我们的方法与现有的基于优化的方法在各种用户定义的概念上进行比较，并证明我们的方法可以通过显着更快的编码过程实现高保真度反转和更强大的可编辑性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/csyxwei/ELITE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELITE方法，通过将视觉概念编码为文本嵌入，实现高效的定制化文本到图像生成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于优化的方法在定制化图像生成中存在计算和内存负担过重的问题，亟需一种更高效的学习型编码方案。
AI.method: 设计包含全局映射网络和局部映射网络的编码器：全局网络将图像分层特征映射到文本嵌入空间（含主控词和辅助词），局部网络通过交叉注意力机制注入局部细节。
AI.result: 在多种用户自定义概念上优于现有优化方法，实现更高速度、高保真反演和更强的编辑鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ELITE通过学习型编码有效解决了定制化生成的效率与精度矛盾，为文本到图像生成提供新范式。

authors_text: Aleksander Czechowski,Frans A. Oliehoek
title: Safe Multi-agent Learning via Trapping Regions
title_zh: 通过捕获区域进行安全的多智能体学习
abstract: One of the main challenges of multi-agent learning lies in establishing convergence of the algorithms, as, in general, a collection of individual, self-serving agents is not guaranteed to converge with their joint policy, when learning concurrently. This is in stark contrast to most single-agent environments, and sets a prohibitive barrier for deployment in practical applications, as it induces uncertainty in long term behavior of the system. In this work, we apply the concept of trapping regions, known from qualitative theory of dynamical systems, to create safety sets in the joint strategy space for decentralized learning. We propose a binary partitioning algorithm for verification that candidate sets form trapping regions in systems with known learning dynamics, and a heuristic sampling algorithm for scenarios where learning dynamics are not known. We demonstrate the applications to a regularized version of Dirac Generative Adversarial Network, a four-intersection traffic control scenario run in a state of the art open-source microscopic traffic simulator SUMO, and a mathematical model of economic competition.
summary: One of the main challenges of multi-agent learning lies in establishing convergence of the algorithms, as, in general, a collection of individual, self-serving agents is not guaranteed to converge with their joint policy, when learning concurrently. This is in stark contrast to most single-agent environments, and sets a prohibitive barrier for deployment in practical applications, as it induces uncertainty in long term behavior of the system. In this work, we apply the concept of trapping regions, known from qualitative theory of dynamical systems, to create safety sets in the joint strategy space for decentralized learning. We propose a binary partitioning algorithm for verification that candidate sets form trapping regions in systems with known learning dynamics, and a heuristic sampling algorithm for scenarios where learning dynamics are not known. We demonstrate the applications to a regularized version of Dirac Generative Adversarial Network, a four-intersection traffic control scenario run in a state of the art open-source microscopic traffic simulator SUMO, and a mathematical model of economic competition.
abstract_zh: 多智能体学习的主要挑战之一在于建立算法的收敛性，因为一般来说，在同时学习时，不能保证一组独立的、自服务的智能体能够与其联合策略收敛。这与大多数单代理环境形成鲜明对比，并且为实际应用中的部署设置了令人望而却步的障碍，因为它会导致系统长期行为的不确定性。在这项工作中，我们应用从动力系统定性理论中已知的捕获区域的概念，在联合策略空间中创建用于分散学习的安全集。我们提出了一种二元划分算法，用于验证候选集在具有已知学习动态的系统中形成陷阱区域，以及用于学习动态未知的场景的启发式采样算法。我们演示了狄拉克生成对抗网络的正则化版本、在最先进的开源微观交通模拟器 SUMO 中运行的四交叉路口交通控制场景以及经济竞争的数学模型的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入动态系统理论中的'捕获区域'概念，为去中心化多智能体学习构建安全策略集，解决多智能体系统联合策略不收敛的问题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统因智能体自私行为导致联合策略无法保证收敛，与单智能体环境形成鲜明对比，这种长期行为不确定性阻碍了实际应用部署。
AI.method: 提出二分法验证算法判断候选集是否构成捕获区域（适用于已知学习动态系统），以及启发式采样算法（适用于未知动态场景）。
AI.result: 方法在正则化Dirac生成对抗网络、SUMO交通模拟器四交叉口控制场景及经济竞争数学模型中均验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 捕获区域框架为去中心化多智能体学习提供了理论保障，通过多种场景验证证明其在确保系统安全收敛方面的有效性。

This is in stark contrast to most single-agent environments, and sets a prohibitive barrier for deployment in practical applications, as it induces uncertainty in long term behavior of the system. In this work, we apply the concept of trapping regions, known from qualitative theory of dynamical systems, to create safety sets in the joint strategy space for decentralized learning. We propose a binary partitioning algorithm for verification that candidate sets form trapping regions in systems with known learning dynamics, and a heuristic sampling algorithm for scenarios where learning dynamics are not known. We demonstrate the applications to a regularized version of Dirac Generative Adversarial Network, a four-intersection traffic control scenario run in a state of the art open-source microscopic traffic simulator SUMO, and a mathematical model of economic competition. 多智能体学习的主要挑战之一在于建立算法的收敛性，因为一般来说，在同时学习时，不能保证一组独立的、自服务的智能体能够与其联合策略收敛。这与大多数单代理环境形成鲜明对比，并且为实际应用中的部署设置了令人望而却步的障碍，因为它会导致系统长期行为的不确定性。在这项工作中，我们应用从动力系统定性理论中已知的捕获区域的概念，在联合策略空间中创建用于分散学习的安全集。我们提出了一种二元划分算法，用于验证候选集在具有已知学习动态的系统中形成陷阱区域，以及用于学习动态未知的场景的启发式采样算法。我们演示了狄拉克生成对抗网络的正则化版本、在最先进的开源微观交通模拟器 SUMO 中运行的四交叉路口交通控制场景以及经济竞争的数学模型的应用。 本文提出通过引入动态系统理论中的'捕获区域'概念，为去中心化多智能体学习构建安全策略集，解决多智能体系统联合策略不收敛的问题。 Aleksander Czechowski,Frans A. Oliehoek cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Kaijie He,Canlong Zhang,Sheng Xie,Zhixin Li,Zhiwen Wang
title: Target-Aware Tracking with Long-term Context Attention
title_zh: 具有长期上下文注意力的目标感知跟踪
abstract: Most deep trackers still follow the guidance of the siamese paradigms and use a template that contains only the target without any contextual information, which makes it difficult for the tracker to cope with large appearance changes, rapid target movement, and attraction from similar objects. To alleviate the above problem, we propose a long-term context attention (LCA) module that can perform extensive information fusion on the target and its context from long-term frames, and calculate the target correlation while enhancing target features. The complete contextual information contains the location of the target as well as the state around the target. LCA uses the target state from the previous frame to exclude the interference of similar objects and complex backgrounds, thus accurately locating the target and enabling the tracker to obtain higher robustness and regression accuracy. By embedding the LCA module in Transformer, we build a powerful online tracker with a target-aware backbone, termed as TATrack. In addition, we propose a dynamic online update algorithm based on the classification confidence of historical information without additional calculation burden. Our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, with 71.1\% AUC, 89.3\% NP, and 73.0\% AO on LaSOT, TrackingNet, and GOT-10k. The code and trained models are available on https://github.com/hekaijie123/TATrack.
summary: Most deep trackers still follow the guidance of the siamese paradigms and use a template that contains only the target without any contextual information, which makes it difficult for the tracker to cope with large appearance changes, rapid target movement, and attraction from similar objects. To alleviate the above problem, we propose a long-term context attention (LCA) module that can perform extensive information fusion on the target and its context from long-term frames, and calculate the target correlation while enhancing target features. The complete contextual information contains the location of the target as well as the state around the target. LCA uses the target state from the previous frame to exclude the interference of similar objects and complex backgrounds, thus accurately locating the target and enabling the tracker to obtain higher robustness and regression accuracy. By embedding the LCA module in Transformer, we build a powerful online tracker with a target-aware backbone, termed as TATrack. In addition, we propose a dynamic online update algorithm based on the classification confidence of historical information without additional calculation burden. Our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, with 71.1\% AUC, 89.3\% NP, and 73.0\% AO on LaSOT, TrackingNet, and GOT-10k. The code and trained models are available on https://github.com/hekaijie123/TATrack.
abstract_zh: 大多数深度跟踪器仍然遵循孪生范式的指导，并使用仅包含目标而没有任何上下文信息的模板，这使得跟踪器难以应对较大的外观变化、快速的目标移动以及来自相似物体的吸引力。为了缓解上述问题，我们提出了一种长期上下文注意力（LCA）模块，该模块可以对长期帧中的目标及其上下文进行广泛的信息融合，并在增强目标特征的同时计算目标相关性。完整的上下文信息包含目标的位置以及目标周围的状态。 LCA利用前一帧的目标状态排除相似物体和复杂背景的干扰，从而准确定位目标，使跟踪器获得更高的鲁棒性和回归精度。通过在 Transformer 中嵌入 LCA 模块，我们构建了一个具有目标感知主干的强大在线跟踪器，称为 TATrack。此外，我们提出了一种基于历史信息分类置信度的动态在线更新算法，无需额外的计算负担。我们的跟踪器在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，在 LaSOT、TrackingNet 和 GOT-10k 上具有 71.1\% AUC、89.3\% NP 和 73.0\% AO。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/hekaijie123/TATrack 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于长时上下文注意力机制的目标感知跟踪器TATrack，通过融合目标及其长期上下文信息提升跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度跟踪器依赖单目标模板，缺乏上下文信息导致难以应对目标外观变化、快速运动及相似物干扰等挑战。
AI.method: 设计长时上下文注意力模块(LCA)，融合目标及长期帧的上下文信息，结合目标状态排除干扰；将LCA嵌入Transformer架构，构建目标感知主干网络，并提出基于历史分类置信度的动态在线更新算法。
AI.result: 在LaSOT/TrackingNet/GOT-10k基准测试中分别达到71.1% AUC、89.3% NP、73.0% AO指标，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过长期上下文信息融合与动态更新机制，TATrack在复杂场景下实现了更优的跟踪鲁棒性与回归精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于长时上下文注意力机制的目标感知跟踪器TATrack，通过融合目标及其长期上下文信息提升跟踪鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度跟踪器依赖单目标模板，缺乏上下文信息导致难以应对目标外观变化、快速运动及相似物干扰等挑战。

authors_text: Naoya Takahashi,Mayank K. Singh,Yuki Mitsufuji
title: Cross-modal Face- and Voice-style Transfer
title_zh: 跨模态面部和语音式传输
abstract: Image-to-image translation and voice conversion enable the generation of a new facial image and voice while maintaining some of the semantics such as a pose in an image and linguistic content in audio, respectively. They can aid in the content-creation process in many applications. However, as they are limited to the conversion within each modality, matching the impression of the generated face and voice remains an open question. We propose a cross-modal style transfer framework called XFaVoT that jointly learns four tasks: image translation and voice conversion tasks with audio or image guidance, which enables the generation of ``face that matches given voice" and ``voice that matches given face", and intra-modality translation tasks with a single framework. Experimental results on multiple datasets show that XFaVoT achieves cross-modal style translation of image and voice, outperforming baselines in terms of quality, diversity, and face-voice correspondence.
summary: Image-to-image translation and voice conversion enable the generation of a new facial image and voice while maintaining some of the semantics such as a pose in an image and linguistic content in audio, respectively. They can aid in the content-creation process in many applications. However, as they are limited to the conversion within each modality, matching the impression of the generated face and voice remains an open question. We propose a cross-modal style transfer framework called XFaVoT that jointly learns four tasks: image translation and voice conversion tasks with audio or image guidance, which enables the generation of ``face that matches given voice" and ``voice that matches given face", and intra-modality translation tasks with a single framework. Experimental results on multiple datasets show that XFaVoT achieves cross-modal style translation of image and voice, outperforming baselines in terms of quality, diversity, and face-voice correspondence.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像的翻译和语音转换能够生成新的面部图像和语音，同时保留一些语义，例如图像中的姿势和音频中的语言内容。它们可以帮助许多应用程序中的内容创建过程。然而，由于它们仅限于每种模态内的转换，匹配生成的面部和声音的印象仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一个名为 XFaVoT 的跨模态风格迁移框架，它联合学习四个任务：具有音频或图像引导的图像翻译和语音转换任务，这使得能够生成“与给定语音匹配的面部”和“与给定面部匹配的语音”，以及使用单一框架的模态内翻译任务。多个数据集上的实验结果表明，XFaVoT 实现了图像和语音的跨模态翻译，在质量、多样性和人脸语音对应方面优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态的面部与语音风格迁移框架XFaVoT，实现生成与给定语音匹配的面部及与给定面部匹配的语音。
AI.motivation: 现有图像翻译和语音转换方法仅能实现单模态内转换，无法保证生成的面部与语音在印象上的匹配性，限制了多模态内容创作的应用效果。
AI.method: 设计XFaVoT框架联合学习四个任务：基于音频/图像引导的图像翻译与语音转换任务，以及单模态翻译任务，通过跨模态对齐实现风格迁移。
AI.result: 在多个数据集实验中，XFaVoT在生成质量、多样性及面部-语音对应性指标上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: XFaVoT通过跨模态联合学习有效解决了面部与语音风格匹配难题，为多模态内容生成提供了新方法。

search_text: Cross-modal Face- and Voice-style Transfer 跨模态面部和语音式传输 Image-to-image translation and voice conversion enable the generation of a new facial image and voice while maintaining some of the semantics such as a pose in an image and linguistic content in audio, respectively. They can aid in the content-creation process in many applications. However, as they are limited to the conversion within each modality, matching the impression of the generated face and voice remains an open question. We propose a cross-modal style transfer framework called XFaVoT that jointly learns four tasks: image translation and voice conversion tasks with audio or image guidance, which enables the generation of ``face that matches given voice" and ``voice that matches given face", and intra-modality translation tasks with a single framework. Experimental results on multiple datasets show that XFaVoT achieves cross-modal style translation of image and voice, outperforming baselines in terms of quality, diversity, and face-voice correspondence. 图像到图像的翻译和语音转换能够生成新的面部图像和语音，同时保留一些语义，例如图像中的姿势和音频中的语言内容。它们可以帮助许多应用程序中的内容创建过程。然而，由于它们仅限于每种模态内的转换，匹配生成的面部和声音的印象仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一个名为 XFaVoT 的跨模态风格迁移框架，它联合学习四个任务：具有音频或图像引导的图像翻译和语音转换任务，这使得能够生成“与给定语音匹配的面部”和“与给定面部匹配的语音”，以及使用单一框架的模态内翻译任务。多个数据集上的实验结果表明，XFaVoT 实现了图像和语音的跨模态翻译，在质量、多样性和人脸语音对应方面优于基线。 本文提出一种跨模态的面部与语音风格迁移框架XFaVoT，实现生成与给定语音匹配的面部及与给定面部匹配的语音。 Naoya Takahashi,Mayank K. Singh,Yuki Mitsufuji cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Oscar Defrain,Antonio E. Porreca,Ekaterina Timofeeva
title: Polynomial-delay generation of functional digraphs up to isomorphism
title_zh: 函数有向图的多项式延迟生成直至同构
abstract: We describe a procedure for the generation of functional digraphs up to isomorphism; these are digraphs with uniform outdegree 1, also called mapping patterns, finite endofunctions, or finite discrete-time dynamical systems. This procedure is based on a reverse search algorithm for the generation of connected functional digraphs, which is then applied as a subroutine for the generation of arbitrary ones. Both algorithms output solutions with $O(n^2)$ delay and require linear space with respect to the number $n$ of vertices.
summary: We describe a procedure for the generation of functional digraphs up to isomorphism; these are digraphs with uniform outdegree 1, also called mapping patterns, finite endofunctions, or finite discrete-time dynamical systems. This procedure is based on a reverse search algorithm for the generation of connected functional digraphs, which is then applied as a subroutine for the generation of arbitrary ones. Both algorithms output solutions with $O(n^2)$ delay and require linear space with respect to the number $n$ of vertices.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了生成同构函数有向图的过程；这些是具有统一出度 1 的有向图，也称为映射模式、有限内函数或有限离散时间动力系统。该过程基于用于生成连通函数有向图的反向搜索算法，然后将其用作生成任意有向图的子例程。两种算法都会输出具有 $O(n^2)$ 延迟的解决方案，并且需要相对于 $n$ 顶点数量的线性空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成函数有向图（functional digraphs）的算法，该算法能够按同构性生成这些图。
AI.motivation: 函数有向图在离散动力系统和映射模式研究中具有重要应用，但其高效生成方法尚未完善，需设计低延迟且空间复杂度可控的算法。
AI.method: 基于逆向搜索算法生成连通函数有向图，并将其作为子程序扩展至任意图的生成，结合多项式延迟策略。
AI.result: 算法在O(n²)延迟内生成所有同构唯一的函数有向图，且空间复杂度为线性级别（与顶点数n相关）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为函数有向图的系统性生成提供了高效解决方案，平衡了时间复杂度与空间效率，适用于大规模动态系统分析。

authors_text: Marco Favorito
title: Forward LTLf Synthesis: DPLL At Work
title_zh: 正向 LTLf 综合：DPLL 工作
abstract: This paper proposes a new AND-OR graph search framework for synthesis of Linear Temporal Logic on finite traces (\LTLf), that overcomes some limitations of previous approaches. Within such framework, we devise a procedure inspired by the Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Loveland (DPLL) algorithm to generate the next available agent-environment moves in a truly depth-first fashion, possibly avoiding exhaustive enumeration or costly compilations. We also propose a novel equivalence check for search nodes based on syntactic equivalence of state formulas. Since the resulting procedure is not guaranteed to terminate, we identify a stopping condition to abort execution and restart the search with state-equivalence checking based on Binary Decision Diagrams (BDD), which we show to be correct. The experimental results show that in many cases the proposed techniques outperform other state-of-the-art approaches. Our implementation Nike competed in the LTLf Realizability Track in the 2023 edition of SYNTCOMP, and won the competition.
summary: This paper proposes a new AND-OR graph search framework for synthesis of Linear Temporal Logic on finite traces (\LTLf), that overcomes some limitations of previous approaches. Within such framework, we devise a procedure inspired by the Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Loveland (DPLL) algorithm to generate the next available agent-environment moves in a truly depth-first fashion, possibly avoiding exhaustive enumeration or costly compilations. We also propose a novel equivalence check for search nodes based on syntactic equivalence of state formulas. Since the resulting procedure is not guaranteed to terminate, we identify a stopping condition to abort execution and restart the search with state-equivalence checking based on Binary Decision Diagrams (BDD), which we show to be correct. The experimental results show that in many cases the proposed techniques outperform other state-of-the-art approaches. Our implementation Nike competed in the LTLf Realizability Track in the 2023 edition of SYNTCOMP, and won the competition.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的 AND-OR 图搜索框架，用于在有限迹线 (\LTLf) 上综合线性时序逻辑，克服了先前方法的一些局限性。在这样的框架内，我们设计了一个受 Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Loveland (DPLL) 算法启发的程序，以真正深度优先的方式生成下一个可用的代理环境移动，可能避免详尽的枚举或昂贵的编译。我们还提出了一种基于状态公式的句法等价性的搜索节点的新颖等价性检查。由于生成的过程不能保证终止，因此我们确定了一个停止条件来中止执行，并通过基于二元决策图 (BDD) 的状态等价检查重新启动搜索，我们证明这是正确的。实验结果表明，在许多情况下，所提出的技术优于其他最先进的方法。我们的实现 Nike 参加了 2023 年 SYNTCOMP 的 LTLf Realizability Track 竞赛，并赢得了比赛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AND-OR图搜索的新框架，用于解决有限迹线性时序逻辑（LTLf）的合成问题，并引入DPLL算法改进搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LTLf合成方法存在穷举搜索成本高、编译开销大等问题，需更高效的深度优先搜索策略及等价性检测机制。
AI.method: 设计深度优先的DPLL启发式搜索框架，结合语法等价性检查与BDD辅助的终止条件，避免冗余计算并保证正确性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多数案例中优于现有技术，实现Nike在2023年SYNTCOMP LTLf可实现性赛道中夺冠。
AI.conclusion: 新框架通过深度优先搜索与等价性优化显著提升LTLf合成效率，且理论正确性与实践效果均得到验证。

authors_text: Mixue Xie,Shuang Li,Rui Zhang,Chi Harold Liu
title: Dirichlet-based Uncertainty Calibration for Active Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 基于狄利克雷的主动域适应不确定性校准
abstract: Active domain adaptation (DA) aims to maximally boost the model adaptation on a new target domain by actively selecting limited target data to annotate, whereas traditional active learning methods may be less effective since they do not consider the domain shift issue. Despite active DA methods address this by further proposing targetness to measure the representativeness of target domain characteristics, their predictive uncertainty is usually based on the prediction of deterministic models, which can easily be miscalibrated on data with distribution shift. Considering this, we propose a \textit{Dirichlet-based Uncertainty Calibration} (DUC) approach for active DA, which simultaneously achieves the mitigation of miscalibration and the selection of informative target samples. Specifically, we place a Dirichlet prior on the prediction and interpret the prediction as a distribution on the probability simplex, rather than a point estimate like deterministic models. This manner enables us to consider all possible predictions, mitigating the miscalibration of unilateral prediction. Then a two-round selection strategy based on different uncertainty origins is designed to select target samples that are both representative of target domain and conducive to discriminability. Extensive experiments on cross-domain image classification and semantic segmentation validate the superiority of DUC.
summary: Active domain adaptation (DA) aims to maximally boost the model adaptation on a new target domain by actively selecting limited target data to annotate, whereas traditional active learning methods may be less effective since they do not consider the domain shift issue. Despite active DA methods address this by further proposing targetness to measure the representativeness of target domain characteristics, their predictive uncertainty is usually based on the prediction of deterministic models, which can easily be miscalibrated on data with distribution shift. Considering this, we propose a \textit{Dirichlet-based Uncertainty Calibration} (DUC) approach for active DA, which simultaneously achieves the mitigation of miscalibration and the selection of informative target samples. Specifically, we place a Dirichlet prior on the prediction and interpret the prediction as a distribution on the probability simplex, rather than a point estimate like deterministic models. This manner enables us to consider all possible predictions, mitigating the miscalibration of unilateral prediction. Then a two-round selection strategy based on different uncertainty origins is designed to select target samples that are both representative of target domain and conducive to discriminability. Extensive experiments on cross-domain image classification and semantic segmentation validate the superiority of DUC.
abstract_zh: 主动域适应（DA）旨在通过主动选择有限的目标数据进行注释来最大程度地提高模型在新目标域上的适应能力，而传统的主动学习方法可能效果较差，因为它们没有考虑域转移问题。尽管主动DA方法通过进一步提出目标性来衡量目标域特征的代表性来解决这个问题，但它们的预测不确定性通常基于确定性模型的预测，而确定性模型很容易在具有分布变化的数据上被错误校准。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一种用于主动 DA 的基于 Dirichlet 的不确定性校准（DUC）方法，该方法同时实现了误校准的缓解和信息丰富的目标样本的选择。具体来说，我们在预测上放置狄利克雷先验，并将预测解释为概率单纯形的分布，而不是像确定性模型那样的点估计。这种方式使我们能够考虑所有可能的预测，减少单方面预测的误校准。然后设计基于不同不确定性来源的两轮选择策略，以选择既能代表目标领域又有利于区分性的目标样本。跨域图像分类和语义分割的大量实验验证了DUC的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于狄利克雷分布的不确定性校准方法（DUC），用于主动域适应任务，通过选择具有代表性和判别性的目标域样本以提升模型适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统主动学习方法在域适应场景中效果不佳，因其未考虑域偏移问题，且现有主动域适应方法依赖确定性模型预测，易在分布偏移数据上出现不确定性校准偏差。
AI.method: 在预测结果上引入狄利克雷先验，将预测视为概率单纯形上的分布而非点估计，通过双轮选择策略结合不同不确定性来源筛选目标样本。
AI.result: 在跨域图像分类和语义分割任务中，DUC方法相较于现有方法展现出更优的适应性能和样本选择效果。
AI.conclusion: DUC通过不确定性校准和样本选择策略有效缓解了域偏移带来的预测偏差，为主动域适应提供了新思路。

search_text: Dirichlet-based Uncertainty Calibration for Active Domain Adaptation 基于狄利克雷的主动域适应不确定性校准 Active domain adaptation (DA) aims to maximally boost the model adaptation on a new target domain by actively selecting limited target data to annotate, whereas traditional active learning methods may be less effective since they do not consider the domain shift issue. Despite active DA methods address this by further proposing targetness to measure the representativeness of target domain characteristics, their predictive uncertainty is usually based on the prediction of deterministic models, which can easily be miscalibrated on data with distribution shift. Considering this, we propose a \textit{Dirichlet-based Uncertainty Calibration} (DUC) approach for active DA, which simultaneously achieves the mitigation of miscalibration and the selection of informative target samples. Specifically, we place a Dirichlet prior on the prediction and interpret the prediction as a distribution on the probability simplex, rather than a point estimate like deterministic models. This manner enables us to consider all possible predictions, mitigating the miscalibration of unilateral prediction. Then a two-round selection strategy based on different uncertainty origins is designed to select target samples that are both representative of target domain and conducive to discriminability. Extensive experiments on cross-domain image classification and semantic segmentation validate the superiority of DUC. 主动域适应（DA）旨在通过主动选择有限的目标数据进行注释来最大程度地提高模型在新目标域上的适应能力，而传统的主动学习方法可能效果较差，因为它们没有考虑域转移问题。尽管主动DA方法通过进一步提出目标性来衡量目标域特征的代表性来解决这个问题，但它们的预测不确定性通常基于确定性模型的预测，而确定性模型很容易在具有分布变化的数据上被错误校准。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一种用于主动 DA 的基于 Dirichlet 的不确定性校准（DUC）方法，该方法同时实现了误校准的缓解和信息丰富的目标样本的选择。具体来说，我们在预测上放置狄利克雷先验，并将预测解释为概率单纯形的分布，而不是像确定性模型那样的点估计。这种方式使我们能够考虑所有可能的预测，减少单方面预测的误校准。然后设计基于不同不确定性来源的两轮选择策略，以选择既能代表目标领域又有利于区分性的目标样本。跨域图像分类和语义分割的大量实验验证了DUC的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于狄利克雷分布的不确定性校准方法（DUC），用于主动域适应任务，通过选择具有代表性和判别性的目标域样本以提升模型适应能力。 Mixue Xie,Shuang Li,Rui Zhang,Chi Harold Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Sakib Shahriar,Kadhim Hayawi
title: Let's have a chat! A Conversation with ChatGPT: Technology, Applications, and Limitations
title_zh: 我们来聊聊吧！对话 ChatGPT：技术、应用和局限性
comment: This manuscript has been accepted by Artificial Intelligence and Applications (AIA, ISSN: 2811-0854), https://doi.org/10.47852/bonviewAIA3202939, 2023
comments: This manuscript has been accepted by Artificial Intelligence and Applications (AIA, ISSN: 2811-0854), https://doi.org/10.47852/bonviewAIA3202939, 2023
abstract: The emergence of an AI-powered chatbot that can generate human-like sentences and write coherent essays has caught the world's attention. This paper discusses the historical overview of chatbots and the technology behind Chat Generative Pre-trained Transformer, better known as ChatGPT. Moreover, potential applications of ChatGPT in various domains, including healthcare, education, and research, are highlighted. Despite promising results, there are several privacy and ethical concerns surrounding ChatGPT. In addition, we highlight some of the important limitations of the current version of ChatGPT. We also ask ChatGPT to provide its point of view and present its responses to several questions we attempt to answer.
summary: The emergence of an AI-powered chatbot that can generate human-like sentences and write coherent essays has caught the world's attention. This paper discusses the historical overview of chatbots and the technology behind Chat Generative Pre-trained Transformer, better known as ChatGPT. Moreover, potential applications of ChatGPT in various domains, including healthcare, education, and research, are highlighted. Despite promising results, there are several privacy and ethical concerns surrounding ChatGPT. In addition, we highlight some of the important limitations of the current version of ChatGPT. We also ask ChatGPT to provide its point of view and present its responses to several questions we attempt to answer.
abstract_zh: 人工智能聊天机器人的出现引起了全世界的关注，它可以生成类似人类的句子并撰写连贯的文章。本文讨论了聊天机器人的历史概述以及聊天生成预训练 Transformer（更广为人知的名称为 ChatGPT）背后的技术。此外，还强调了 ChatGPT 在医疗、教育和研究等各个领域的潜在应用。尽管结果令人鼓舞，但围绕 ChatGPT 仍存在一些隐私和道德问题。此外，我们还强调了当前版本 ChatGPT 的一些重要限制。我们还要求 ChatGPT 提供其观点，并对我们试图回答的几个问题做出回应。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了ChatGPT的技术原理、应用场景及局限性，并通过与ChatGPT的对话展示其能力与问题。
AI.motivation: 探讨ChatGPT作为AI聊天机器人的技术突破及其在医疗、教育等领域的应用潜力，同时关注其引发的隐私和伦理争议。
AI.method: 通过分析ChatGPT的技术背景，结合实际应用场景案例，并直接与ChatGPT对话验证其回答问题的能力。
AI.result: 总结了ChatGPT在多领域的应用价值，揭示了数据隐私、伦理风险及技术局限性，并呈现ChatGPT对相关问题的回答。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT展现出变革性潜力，但需通过技术优化和伦理规范解决现有问题以实现可持续发展。

authors_text: Paulo Shakarian,Abhinav Koyyalamudi,Noel Ngu,Lakshmivihari Mareedu
title: An Independent Evaluation of ChatGPT on Mathematical Word Problems (MWP)
title_zh: ChatGPT 对数学应用题 (MWP) 的独立评估
abstract: We study the performance of a commercially available large language model (LLM) known as ChatGPT on math word problems (MWPs) from the dataset DRAW-1K. To our knowledge, this is the first independent evaluation of ChatGPT. We found that ChatGPT's performance changes dramatically based on the requirement to show its work, failing 20% of the time when it provides work compared with 84% when it does not. Further several factors about MWPs relating to the number of unknowns and number of operations that lead to a higher probability of failure when compared with the prior, specifically noting (across all experiments) that the probability of failure increases linearly with the number of addition and subtraction operations. We also have released the dataset of ChatGPT's responses to the MWPs to support further work on the characterization of LLM performance and present baseline machine learning models to predict if ChatGPT can correctly answer an MWP. We have released a dataset comprised of ChatGPT's responses to support further research in this area.
summary: We study the performance of a commercially available large language model (LLM) known as ChatGPT on math word problems (MWPs) from the dataset DRAW-1K. To our knowledge, this is the first independent evaluation of ChatGPT. We found that ChatGPT's performance changes dramatically based on the requirement to show its work, failing 20% of the time when it provides work compared with 84% when it does not. Further several factors about MWPs relating to the number of unknowns and number of operations that lead to a higher probability of failure when compared with the prior, specifically noting (across all experiments) that the probability of failure increases linearly with the number of addition and subtraction operations. We also have released the dataset of ChatGPT's responses to the MWPs to support further work on the characterization of LLM performance and present baseline machine learning models to predict if ChatGPT can correctly answer an MWP. We have released a dataset comprised of ChatGPT's responses to support further research in this area.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种名为 ChatGPT 的商用大型语言模型 (LLM) 在数据集 DRAW-1K 的数学应用题 (MWP) 上的性能。据我们所知，这是ChatGPT的首次独立评估。我们发现 ChatGPT 的性能会根据显示其工作的要求而发生巨大变化，当它提供工作时，失败率为 20%，而当不提供工作时，失败率为 84%。与之前相比，与未知数和操作数相关的 MWP 的其他几个因素会导致更高的失败概率，特别注意到（在所有实验中）失败的概率随着加法和减法操作的数量线性增加。我们还发布了 ChatGPT 对 MWP 响应的数据集，以支持 LLM 性能表征的进一步工作，并提供基线机器学习模型来预测 ChatGPT 是否可以正确回答 MWP。我们发布了一个包含 ChatGPT 响应的数据集，以支持该领域的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了ChatGPT在数学文字题（MWP）上的表现，分析其性能与问题复杂度及解题过程展示要求的关系。
AI.motivation: 缺乏对商业大型语言模型ChatGPT在数学问题解决能力的独立评估，且需明确影响其性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 使用DRAW-1K数据集测试ChatGPT，对比其在需展示解题过程与无需展示时的性能差异，并分析问题中未知数数量、运算步骤对失败率的影响，同时发布响应数据集及预测模型。
AI.result: 要求展示解题过程时失败率降至20%，未展示时高达84%；加减法运算数量与失败概率呈线性增长关系。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT的数学问题解决能力受解题过程透明度及问题复杂度显著影响，需进一步研究以提升其处理复杂运算的能力。

method: 使用DRAW-1K数据集测试ChatGPT，对比其在需展示解题过程与无需展示时的性能差异，并分析问题中未知数数量、运算步骤对失败率的影响，同时发布响应数据集及预测模型。
result: 要求展示解题过程时失败率降至20%，未展示时高达84%；加减法运算数量与失败概率呈线性增长关系。
conclusion: ChatGPT的数学问题解决能力受解题过程透明度及问题复杂度显著影响，需进一步研究以提升其处理复杂运算的能力。
search_text: An Independent Evaluation of ChatGPT on Mathematical Word Problems (MWP) ChatGPT 对数学应用题 (MWP) 的独立评估 We study the performance of a commercially available large language model (LLM) known as ChatGPT on math word problems (MWPs) from the dataset DRAW-1K. To our knowledge, this is the first independent evaluation of ChatGPT. We found that ChatGPT's performance changes dramatically based on the requirement to show its work, failing 20% of the time when it provides work compared with 84% when it does not. Further several factors about MWPs relating to the number of unknowns and number of operations that lead to a higher probability of failure when compared with the prior, specifically noting (across all experiments) that the probability of failure increases linearly with the number of addition and subtraction operations. We also have released the dataset of ChatGPT's responses to the MWPs to support further work on the characterization of LLM performance and present baseline machine learning models to predict if ChatGPT can correctly answer an MWP. We have released a dataset comprised of ChatGPT's responses to support further research in this area. 我们研究了一种名为 ChatGPT 的商用大型语言模型 (LLM) 在数据集 DRAW-1K 的数学应用题 (MWP) 上的性能。据我们所知，这是ChatGPT的首次独立评估。我们发现 ChatGPT 的性能会根据显示其工作的要求而发生巨大变化，当它提供工作时，失败率为 20%，而当不提供工作时，失败率为 84%。与之前相比，与未知数和操作数相关的 MWP 的其他几个因素会导致更高的失败概率，特别注意到（在所有实验中）失败的概率随着加法和减法操作的数量线性增加。我们还发布了 ChatGPT 对 MWP 响应的数据集，以支持 LLM 性能表征的进一步工作，并提供基线机器学习模型来预测 ChatGPT 是否可以正确回答 MWP。我们发布了一个包含 ChatGPT 响应的数据集，以支持该领域的进一步研究。 本文评估了ChatGPT在数学文字题（MWP）上的表现，分析其性能与问题复杂度及解题过程展示要求的关系。 Paulo Shakarian,Abhinav Koyyalamudi,Noel Ngu,Lakshmivihari Mareedu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Long Sun,Jiangxin Dong,Jinhui Tang,Jinshan Pan
title: Spatially-Adaptive Feature Modulation for Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效图像超分辨率的空间自适应特征调制
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/SAFMN
comments: The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/SAFMN
abstract: Although numerous solutions have been proposed for image super-resolution, they are usually incompatible with low-power devices with many computational and memory constraints. In this paper, we address this problem by proposing a simple yet effective deep network to solve image super-resolution efficiently. In detail, we develop a spatially-adaptive feature modulation (SAFM) mechanism upon a vision transformer (ViT)-like block. Within it, we first apply the SAFM block over input features to dynamically select representative feature representations. As the SAFM block processes the input features from a long-range perspective, we further introduce a convolutional channel mixer (CCM) to simultaneously extract local contextual information and perform channel mixing. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed method is $3\times$ smaller than state-of-the-art efficient SR methods, e.g., IMDN, in terms of the network parameters and requires less computational cost while achieving comparable performance. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/SAFMN.
summary: Although numerous solutions have been proposed for image super-resolution, they are usually incompatible with low-power devices with many computational and memory constraints. In this paper, we address this problem by proposing a simple yet effective deep network to solve image super-resolution efficiently. In detail, we develop a spatially-adaptive feature modulation (SAFM) mechanism upon a vision transformer (ViT)-like block. Within it, we first apply the SAFM block over input features to dynamically select representative feature representations. As the SAFM block processes the input features from a long-range perspective, we further introduce a convolutional channel mixer (CCM) to simultaneously extract local contextual information and perform channel mixing. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed method is $3\times$ smaller than state-of-the-art efficient SR methods, e.g., IMDN, in terms of the network parameters and requires less computational cost while achieving comparable performance. The code is available at https://github.com/sunny2109/SAFMN.
abstract_zh: 尽管已经针对图像超分辨率提出了许多解决方案，但它们通常与具有许多计算和内存限制的低功耗设备不兼容。在本文中，我们通过提出一种简单而有效的深度网络来有效解决图像超分辨率问题来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们在类似视觉变换器（ViT）的块上开发了一种空间自适应特征调制（SAFM）机制。在其中，我们首先在输入特征上应用 SAFM 块来动态选择代表性特征表示。由于 SAFM 模块从远程角度处理输入特征，因此我们进一步引入了卷积通道混合器（CCM）来同时提取局部上下文信息并执行通道混合。大量实验结果表明，就网络参数而言，所提出的方法比最先进的高效 SR 方法（例如 IMDN）小 3 倍，并且在实现可比性能的同时需要更少的计算成本。该代码可在 https://github.com/sunny2109/SAFMN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效图像超分辨率方法，旨在解决低功耗设备上的计算和内存限制问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有许多图像超分辨率解决方案，但它们通常难以在计算和内存受限的低功耗设备上运行，因此需要一种高效的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）块的空域自适应特征调制（SAFM）机制，并引入卷积通道混合器（CCM）以同时提取局部上下文信息并进行通道混合。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在参数数量和计算成本上比现有高效超分辨率方法（如IMDN）小3倍，同时保持了相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算和内存需求，适用于低功耗设备的图像超分辨率任务。

authors_text: Mendes Oulamara,Alex Auvolat
title: An algorithm for geo-distributed and redundant storage in Garage
title_zh: Garage中地理分布式和冗余存储的算法
abstract: This paper presents an optimal algorithm to compute the assignment of data to storage nodes in the Garage geo-distributed storage system. We discuss the complexity of the different steps of the algorithm and metrics that can be displayed to the user.
summary: This paper presents an optimal algorithm to compute the assignment of data to storage nodes in the Garage geo-distributed storage system. We discuss the complexity of the different steps of the algorithm and metrics that can be displayed to the user.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种优化算法来计算 Garage 地理分布式存储系统中存储节点的数据分配。我们讨论算法不同步骤的复杂性以及可以向用户显示的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于Garage地理分布式存储系统的最优算法，用于计算数据到存储节点的分配方案。
AI.motivation: 地理分布式存储系统需要高效且冗余的数据分配策略，以确保数据可靠性、访问效率及容灾能力，现有方法可能存在优化不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计并分析了数据分配算法的计算复杂度，定义了可展示给用户的性能指标，通过理论分析与实验验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 实现了数据分配的最优算法，明确了各步骤的复杂度，并提供了可量化的用户指标以评估系统表现。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为地理分布式存储系统提供了高效、可扩展的数据分配方案，同时通过指标可视化增强了用户对系统状态的感知能力。

authors_text: Jianan Zhou,Yaoxin Wu,Zhiguang Cao,Wen Song,Jie Zhang,Zhenghua Chen
title: Learning Large Neighborhood Search for Vehicle Routing in Airport Ground Handling
title_zh: 学习机场地勤中车辆路线的大邻域搜索
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
abstract: Dispatching vehicle fleets to serve flights is a key task in airport ground handling (AGH). Due to the notable growth of flights, it is challenging to simultaneously schedule multiple types of operations (services) for a large number of flights, where each type of operation is performed by one specific vehicle fleet. To tackle this issue, we first represent the operation scheduling as a complex vehicle routing problem and formulate it as a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) model. Then given the graph representation of the MILP model, we propose a learning assisted large neighborhood search (LNS) method using data generated based on real scenarios, where we integrate imitation learning and graph convolutional network (GCN) to learn a destroy operator to automatically select variables, and employ an off-the-shelf solver as the repair operator to reoptimize the selected variables. Experimental results based on a real airport show that the proposed method allows for handling up to 200 flights with 10 types of operations simultaneously, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the learned method performs consistently accompanying different solvers, and generalizes well on larger instances, verifying the versatility and scalability of our method.
summary: Dispatching vehicle fleets to serve flights is a key task in airport ground handling (AGH). Due to the notable growth of flights, it is challenging to simultaneously schedule multiple types of operations (services) for a large number of flights, where each type of operation is performed by one specific vehicle fleet. To tackle this issue, we first represent the operation scheduling as a complex vehicle routing problem and formulate it as a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) model. Then given the graph representation of the MILP model, we propose a learning assisted large neighborhood search (LNS) method using data generated based on real scenarios, where we integrate imitation learning and graph convolutional network (GCN) to learn a destroy operator to automatically select variables, and employ an off-the-shelf solver as the repair operator to reoptimize the selected variables. Experimental results based on a real airport show that the proposed method allows for handling up to 200 flights with 10 types of operations simultaneously, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the learned method performs consistently accompanying different solvers, and generalizes well on larger instances, verifying the versatility and scalability of our method.
abstract_zh: 调度车队为航班服务是机场地勤 (AGH) 的一项关键任务。由于航班数量显着增长，同时为大量航班安排多种类型的运营（服务）非常具有挑战性，其中每种类型的运营都由一个特定的车队执行。为了解决这个问题，我们首先将运营调度表示为复杂的车辆路径问题，并将其公式化为混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型。然后，给定 MILP 模型的图表示，我们提出了一种使用基于真实场景生成的数据的学习辅助大邻域搜索（LNS）方法，其中我们集成模仿学习和图卷积网络（GCN）来学习破坏算子来自动选择变量，并采用现成的求解器作为修复算子来重新优化所选变量。基于真实机场的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以同时处理多达 200 个航班和 10 种类型的操作，并且优于最先进的方法。此外，学习到的方法在不同的求解器中表现一致，并且在更大的实例上很好地泛化，验证了我们方法的多功能性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习的大型邻域搜索方法，用于解决机场地面处理中的多类型车辆路径优化问题。
AI.motivation: 随着航班数量激增，机场需同时调度多种车辆完成复杂操作，传统方法难以兼顾规模与效率，亟需智能化解决方案。
AI.method: 将问题建模为混合整数线性规划（MILP），设计基于模仿学习与图卷积网络（GCN）的破坏算子，结合现成求解器构建学习辅助的大型邻域搜索框架。
AI.result: 实测可处理200架次航班10类操作，性能优于现有方法，且在不同求解器与更大规模实例上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了学习驱动的邻域搜索在复杂调度问题中的有效性，具有良好的可扩展性与通用性。

ai_content_json.method: 将问题建模为混合整数线性规划（MILP），设计基于模仿学习与图卷积网络（GCN）的破坏算子，结合现成求解器构建学习辅助的大型邻域搜索框架。

search_text: Learning Large Neighborhood Search for Vehicle Routing in Airport Ground Handling 学习机场地勤中车辆路线的大邻域搜索 Dispatching vehicle fleets to serve flights is a key task in airport ground handling (AGH). Due to the notable growth of flights, it is challenging to simultaneously schedule multiple types of operations (services) for a large number of flights, where each type of operation is performed by one specific vehicle fleet. To tackle this issue, we first represent the operation scheduling as a complex vehicle routing problem and formulate it as a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) model. Then given the graph representation of the MILP model, we propose a learning assisted large neighborhood search (LNS) method using data generated based on real scenarios, where we integrate imitation learning and graph convolutional network (GCN) to learn a destroy operator to automatically select variables, and employ an off-the-shelf solver as the repair operator to reoptimize the selected variables. Experimental results based on a real airport show that the proposed method allows for handling up to 200 flights with 10 types of operations simultaneously, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the learned method performs consistently accompanying different solvers, and generalizes well on larger instances, verifying the versatility and scalability of our method. 调度车队为航班服务是机场地勤 (AGH) 的一项关键任务。由于航班数量显着增长，同时为大量航班安排多种类型的运营（服务）非常具有挑战性，其中每种类型的运营都由一个特定的车队执行。为了解决这个问题，我们首先将运营调度表示为复杂的车辆路径问题，并将其公式化为混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型。然后，给定 MILP 模型的图表示，我们提出了一种使用基于真实场景生成的数据的学习辅助大邻域搜索（LNS）方法，其中我们集成模仿学习和图卷积网络（GCN）来学习破坏算子来自动选择变量，并采用现成的求解器作为修复算子来重新优化所选变量。基于真实机场的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以同时处理多达 200 个航班和 10 种类型的操作，并且优于最先进的方法。此外，学习到的方法在不同的求解器中表现一致，并且在更大的实例上很好地泛化，验证了我们方法的多功能性和可扩展性。 本文提出一种结合深度学习的大型邻域搜索方法，用于解决机场地面处理中的多类型车辆路径优化问题。 Jianan Zhou,Yaoxin Wu,Zhiguang Cao,Wen Song,Jie Zhang,Zhenghua Chen cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Marco Monforte,Luna Gava,Massimiliano Iacono,Arren Glover,Chiara Bartolozzi
title: Fast Trajectory End-Point Prediction with Event Cameras for Reactive Robot Control
title_zh: 使用事件相机进行快速轨迹终点预测以实现反应式机器人控制
abstract: Prediction skills can be crucial for the success of tasks where robots have limited time to act or joints actuation power. In such a scenario, a vision system with a fixed, possibly too low, sampling rate could lead to the loss of informative points, slowing down prediction convergence and reducing the accuracy. In this paper, we propose to exploit the low latency, motion-driven sampling, and data compression properties of event cameras to overcome these issues. As a use-case, we use a Panda robotic arm to intercept a ball bouncing on a table. To predict the interception point, we adopt a Stateful LSTM network, a specific LSTM variant without fixed input length, which perfectly suits the event-driven paradigm and the problem at hand, where the length of the trajectory is not defined. We train the network in simulation to speed up the dataset acquisition and then fine-tune the models on real trajectories. Experimental results demonstrate how using a dense spatial sampling (i.e. event cameras) significantly increases the number of intercepted trajectories as compared to a fixed temporal sampling (i.e. frame-based cameras).
summary: Prediction skills can be crucial for the success of tasks where robots have limited time to act or joints actuation power. In such a scenario, a vision system with a fixed, possibly too low, sampling rate could lead to the loss of informative points, slowing down prediction convergence and reducing the accuracy. In this paper, we propose to exploit the low latency, motion-driven sampling, and data compression properties of event cameras to overcome these issues. As a use-case, we use a Panda robotic arm to intercept a ball bouncing on a table. To predict the interception point, we adopt a Stateful LSTM network, a specific LSTM variant without fixed input length, which perfectly suits the event-driven paradigm and the problem at hand, where the length of the trajectory is not defined. We train the network in simulation to speed up the dataset acquisition and then fine-tune the models on real trajectories. Experimental results demonstrate how using a dense spatial sampling (i.e. event cameras) significantly increases the number of intercepted trajectories as compared to a fixed temporal sampling (i.e. frame-based cameras).
abstract_zh: 在机器人的行动时间或关节驱动能力有限的情况下，预测技能对于任务的成功至关重要。在这种情况下，具有固定采样率（可能太低）的视觉系统可能会导致信息点丢失，减慢预测收敛速度并降低准确性。在本文中，我们建议利用事件摄像机的低延迟、运动驱动采样和数据压缩特性来克服这些问题。作为一个用例，我们使用 Panda 机械臂拦截在桌子上弹跳的球。为了预测拦截点，我们采用了 Stateful LSTM 网络，这是一种没有固定输入长度的特定 LSTM 变体，它完全适合事件驱动范式和当前未定义轨迹长度的问题。我们在模拟中训练网络以加速数据集获取，然后在真实轨迹上微调模型。实验结果表明，与固定时间采样（即基于帧的相机）相比，使用密集空间采样（即事件相机）如何显着增加截获轨迹的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用事件相机的低延迟和运动驱动采样特性，结合状态型LSTM网络，实现对机器人拦截轨迹端点的快速预测。
AI.motivation: 传统固定采样率的视觉系统可能丢失关键信息点，导致预测收敛速度慢且精度低，需通过事件相机的动态采样特性解决此问题。
AI.method: 采用状态型LSTM网络处理事件相机的异步数据流，通过仿真训练加速数据采集，并在真实轨迹上微调模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，事件相机的密集空间采样相比传统帧相机显著提升了轨迹拦截成功率。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与状态型LSTM的结合有效提升了机器人对动态轨迹的实时预测能力，为反应式控制提供了新方案。

authors_text: Guido Zuccon,Bevan Koopman
title: Dr ChatGPT, tell me what I want to hear: How prompt knowledge impacts health answer correctness
title_zh: ChatGPT 博士，告诉我我想听什么：及时的知识如何影响健康答案的正确性
abstract: Generative pre-trained language models (GPLMs) like ChatGPT encode in the model's parameters knowledge the models observe during the pre-training phase. This knowledge is then used at inference to address the task specified by the user in their prompt. For example, for the question-answering task, the GPLMs leverage the knowledge and linguistic patterns learned at training to produce an answer to a user question. Aside from the knowledge encoded in the model itself, answers produced by GPLMs can also leverage knowledge provided in the prompts. For example, a GPLM can be integrated into a retrieve-then-generate paradigm where a search engine is used to retrieve documents relevant to the question; the content of the documents is then transferred to the GPLM via the prompt. In this paper we study the differences in answer correctness generated by ChatGPT when leveraging the model's knowledge alone vs. in combination with the prompt knowledge. We study this in the context of consumers seeking health advice from the model. Aside from measuring the effectiveness of ChatGPT in this context, we show that the knowledge passed in the prompt can overturn the knowledge encoded in the model and this is, in our experiments, to the detriment of answer correctness. This work has important implications for the development of more robust and transparent question-answering systems based on generative pre-trained language models.
summary: Generative pre-trained language models (GPLMs) like ChatGPT encode in the model's parameters knowledge the models observe during the pre-training phase. This knowledge is then used at inference to address the task specified by the user in their prompt. For example, for the question-answering task, the GPLMs leverage the knowledge and linguistic patterns learned at training to produce an answer to a user question. Aside from the knowledge encoded in the model itself, answers produced by GPLMs can also leverage knowledge provided in the prompts. For example, a GPLM can be integrated into a retrieve-then-generate paradigm where a search engine is used to retrieve documents relevant to the question; the content of the documents is then transferred to the GPLM via the prompt. In this paper we study the differences in answer correctness generated by ChatGPT when leveraging the model's knowledge alone vs. in combination with the prompt knowledge. We study this in the context of consumers seeking health advice from the model. Aside from measuring the effectiveness of ChatGPT in this context, we show that the knowledge passed in the prompt can overturn the knowledge encoded in the model and this is, in our experiments, to the detriment of answer correctness. This work has important implications for the development of more robust and transparent question-answering systems based on generative pre-trained language models.
abstract_zh: 像 ChatGPT 这样的生成式预训练语言模型 (GPLM) 会在模型在预训练阶段观察到的模型参数知识中进行编码。然后使用这些知识进行推理，以解决用户在提示中指定的任务。例如，对于问答任务，GPLM 利用在训练中学到的知识和语言模式来生成用户问题的答案。除了模型本身编码的知识之外，GPLM 生成的答案还可以利用提示中提供的知识。例如，GPLM 可以集成到检索然后生成范例中，其中搜索引擎用于检索与问题相关的文档；然后，文档内容将通过提示传输至 GPLM。在本文中，我们研究了单独利用模型知识与结合提示知识时 ChatGPT 生成的答案正确性的差异。我们在消费者从模型中寻求健康建议的背景下研究这一点。除了测量 ChatGPT 在这种情况下的有效性之外，我们还表明提示中传递的知识可以推翻模型中编码的知识，在我们的实验中，这会损害答案的正确性。这项工作对于开发基于生成预训练语言模型的更强大和透明的问答系统具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 研究提示知识对ChatGPT在健康问答中答案正确性的影响
AI.motivation: 探讨提示知识如何影响模型答案正确性，以开发更可靠透明的问答系统
AI.method: 通过实验比较ChatGPT在仅使用模型知识与结合提示知识时的健康问答正确性
AI.result: 实验显示提示知识可能覆盖模型知识，导致答案正确性降低
AI.conclusion: 提示知识可能损害答案正确性，需优化知识整合策略以提高系统可靠性

authors_text: Michel Barbeau,Joaquin Garcia-Alfaro,Evangelos Kranakis
title: Repeated Purification versus Concatenated Error Correction in Fault Tolerant Quantum Networks
title_zh: 容错量子网络中的重复净化与级联纠错
abstract: Entanglement distribution is a core mechanism for the future quantum Internet. The quantum world is, however, a faulty environment. Hence, successful entanglement swapping is error-prone. The occurrence of quantum state errors can be mitigated using purification and error correction, which can be repeated in the former case and concatenated in the latter case. Repeated purification merges low-fidelity qubits into higher-quality ones, while concatenated error correction builds upon the redundancy of quantum information. In this article, we study in-depth and compare the two options: repeated purification and concatenated error correction. We consider using repeated purification and concatenated error correction to mitigate the presence of faults that occur during the establishment of Bell pairs between remote network nodes. We compare their performance versus the number of repetitions or concatenations, to reach a certain level of fidelity in quantum networks. We study their resource requirements, namely, their work memory complexity (e.g., number of stored qubits) and operational complexity (e.g., number of operations). Our analysis demonstrates that concatenated error correction, versus repeated purification, requires fewer iterations and has lower operational complexity than repeated purification to reach high fidelity at the expense of increased memory requirements.

The occurrence of quantum state errors can be mitigated using purification and error correction, which can be repeated in the former case and concatenated in the latter case. Repeated purification merges low-fidelity qubits into higher-quality ones, while concatenated error correction builds upon the redundancy of quantum information. In this article, we study in-depth and compare the two options: repeated purification and concatenated error correction. Our analysis demonstrates that concatenated error correction, versus repeated purification, requires fewer iterations and has lower operational complexity than repeated purification to reach high fidelity at the expense of increased memory requirements.
abstract_zh: 纠缠分布是未来量子互联网的核心机制。然而，量子世界是一个有缺陷的环境。因此，成功的纠缠交换很容易出错。可以使用净化和纠错来减轻量子态错误的发生，这可以在前一种情况下重复并在后一种情况下串联。重复纯化将低保真度量子位合并为更高质量的量子位，而级联纠错则建立在量子信息的冗余之上。在本文中，我们深入研究并比较了两种选择：重复纯化和级联纠错。我们考虑使用重复净化和级联纠错来减轻在远程网络节点之间建立贝尔对期间发生的故障。我们将它们的性能与重复或串联的次数进行比较，以达到量子网络一定程度的保真度。我们研究它们的资源需求，即它们的工作内存复杂性（例如，存储的量子位的数量）和操作复杂性（例如，操作的数量）。我们的分析表明，与重复纯化相比，级联纠错需要更少的迭代，并且比重复纯化具有更低的操作复杂性，以增加内存需求为代价来达到高保真度。

AI.tldr: 比较重复净化与分层纠错在容错量子网络中的性能
AI.motivation: 量子互联网依赖纠缠分发，但量子环境存在错误需有效纠错方法，需比较不同方案的优劣
AI.method: 通过分析两种方法的迭代次数、操作复杂度及资源需求（内存与操作量）进行系统性对比
AI.result: 分层纠错较重复净化需更少迭代且操作复杂度更低，但需更高内存开销以达到高保真度
AI.conclusion: 分层纠错在操作效率上优于重复净化，但需权衡内存需求，为量子网络设计提供关键参考

authors_text: Giorgia Adorni
title: Neural networks for learning personality traits from natural language
title_zh: 从自然语言中学习人格特征的神经网络
abstract: Personality is considered one of the most influential research topics in psychology, as it predicts many consequential outcomes such as mental and physical health and explains human behaviour. With the widespread use of social networks as a means of communication, it is becoming increasingly important to develop models that can automatically and accurately read the essence of individuals based solely on their writing. In particular, the convergence of social and computer sciences has led researchers to develop automatic approaches for extracting and studying "hidden" information in textual data on the internet. The nature of this thesis project is highly experimental, and the motivation behind this work is to present detailed analyses on the topic, as currently there are no significant investigations of this kind. The objective is to identify an adequate semantic space that allows for defining the personality of the object to which a certain text refers. The starting point is a dictionary of adjectives that psychological literature defines as markers of the five major personality traits, or Big Five. In this work, we started with the implementation of fully-connected neural networks as a basis for understanding how simple deep learning models can provide information on hidden personality characteristics. Finally, we use a class of distributional algorithms invented in 2013 by Tomas Mikolov, which consists of using a convolutional neural network that learns the contexts of words in an unsupervised way. In this way, we construct an embedding that contains the semantic information on the text, obtaining a kind of "geometry of meaning" in which concepts are translated into linear relationships. With this last experiment, we hypothesize that an individual writing style is largely coupled with their personality traits.

With the widespread use of social networks as a means of communication, it is becoming increasingly important to develop models that can automatically and accurately read the essence of individuals based solely on their writing. In particular, the convergence of social and computer sciences has led researchers to develop automatic approaches for extracting and studying "hidden" information in textual data on the internet. Finally, we use a class of distributional algorithms invented in 2013 by Tomas Mikolov, which consists of using a convolutional neural network that learns the contexts of words in an unsupervised way. In this way, we construct an embedding that contains the semantic information on the text, obtaining a kind of "geometry of meaning" in which concepts are translated into linear relationships. abstract_zh: 人格被认为是心理学中最有影响力的研究主题之一，因为它可以预测许多后果，例如心理和身体健康，并解释人类行为。随着社交网络作为交流手段的广泛使用，开发能够仅根据个人写作自动准确地读取个人本质的模型变得越来越重要。特别是，社会科学和计算机科学的融合促使研究人员开发自动方法来提取和研究互联网文本数据中的“隐藏”信息。本论文项目的性质是高度实验性的，这项工作背后的动机是对该主题进行详细分析，因为目前还没有此类重大研究。目的是确定一个足够的语义空间，以定义特定文本所指对象的个性。起点是一本形容词词典，心理学文献将其定义为五种主要人格特征或“大五人格”的标记。在这项工作中，我们从实现全连接神经网络开始，作为理解简单的深度学习模型如何提供有关隐藏人格特征的信息的基础。最后，我们使用 Tomas Mikolov 于 2013 年发明的一类分布式算法，其中包括使用卷积神经网络以无监督的方式学习单词的上下文。通过这种方式，我们构建了一个包含文本语义信息的嵌入，获得了一种“意义几何”，其中概念被转化为线性关系。通过最后一个实验，我们假设个人的写作风格在很大程度上与他们的性格特征有关。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过神经网络模型从自然语言文本中学习并识别个体的五大人格特质。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体的普及，自动分析文本中隐藏的人格特质成为重要研究方向，但现有研究缺乏系统性探索。
AI.method: 采用全连接神经网络和Mikolov于2013年提出的卷积神经网络算法，通过无监督学习构建语义嵌入空间，将文本转化为可量化的语义几何关系。
AI.result: 成功构建了关联文本与人格特质的语义空间，验证了写作风格与人格特征之间存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，基于深度学习的文本分析能够有效捕捉人格特质，为社交媒体中的个性化分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Pengxiang Xiao,Shuai He,Limin Liu,Anlong Ming
title: Mask Reference Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 掩模参考图像质量评估
abstract: Understanding semantic information is an essential step in knowing what is being learned in both full-reference (FR) and no-reference (NR) image quality assessment (IQA) methods. However, especially for many severely distorted images, even if there is an undistorted image as a reference (FR-IQA), it is difficult to perceive the lost semantic and texture information of distorted images directly. In this paper, we propose a Mask Reference IQA (MR-IQA) method that masks specific patches of a distorted image and supplements missing patches with the reference image patches. In this way, our model only needs to input the reconstructed image for quality assessment. First, we design a mask generator to select the best candidate patches from reference images and supplement the lost semantic information in distorted images, thus providing more reference for quality assessment; in addition, the different masked patches imply different data augmentations, which favors model training and reduces overfitting. Second, we provide a Mask Reference Network (MRNet): the dedicated modules can prevent disturbances due to masked patches and help eliminate the patch discontinuity in the reconstructed image. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on the benchmark KADID-10k, LIVE and CSIQ datasets and has better generalization performance across datasets. The code and results are available in the supplementary material.
summary: Understanding semantic information is an essential step in knowing what is being learned in both full-reference (FR) and no-reference (NR) image quality assessment (IQA) methods. However, especially for many severely distorted images, even if there is an undistorted image as a reference (FR-IQA), it is difficult to perceive the lost semantic and texture information of distorted images directly. In this paper, we propose a Mask Reference IQA (MR-IQA) method that masks specific patches of a distorted image and supplements missing patches with the reference image patches. In this way, our model only needs to input the reconstructed image for quality assessment. First, we design a mask generator to select the best candidate patches from reference images and supplement the lost semantic information in distorted images, thus providing more reference for quality assessment; in addition, the different masked patches imply different data augmentations, which favors model training and reduces overfitting. Second, we provide a Mask Reference Network (MRNet): the dedicated modules can prevent disturbances due to masked patches and help eliminate the patch discontinuity in the reconstructed image. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on the benchmark KADID-10k, LIVE and CSIQ datasets and has better generalization performance across datasets. The code and results are available in the supplementary material.
abstract_zh: 了解语义信息是了解全参考 (FR) 和无参考 (NR) 图像质量评估 (IQA) 方法中所学习内容的重要步骤。然而，特别是对于许多严重畸变的图像，即使有未畸变的图像作为参考（FR-IQA），也很难直接感知畸变图像丢失的语义和纹理信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种掩模参考 IQA (MR-IQA) 方法，该方法可以掩盖失真图像的特定斑块，并用参考图像斑块补充缺失的斑块。这样，我们的模型只需要输入重建图像进行质量评估。首先，我们设计了一个掩模生成器，从参考图像中选择最佳候选斑块，并补充失真图像中丢失的语义信息，从而为质量评估提供更多参考；此外，不同的屏蔽补丁意味着不同的数据增强，这有利于模型训练并减少过度拟合。其次，我们提供了掩模参考网络（MRNet）：专用模块可以防止由于掩模补丁造成的干扰，并有助于消除重建图像中的补丁不连续性。我们的方法在基准 KADID-10k、LIVE 和 CSIQ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且在跨数据集上具有更好的泛化性能。代码和结果可在补充材料中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mask Reference IQA（MR-IQA）的图像质量评估方法，通过掩码机制结合参考图像补全失真图像的缺失区域以提升评估效果。
AI.motivation: 现有全参考图像质量评估方法在严重失真图像中难以直接感知语义和纹理信息的损失，需设计更有效的参考图像利用方式以提高评估准确性。
AI.method: 设计掩码生成器从参考图像中选择最佳候选块补全失真图像，并构建Mask Reference Network（MRNet）消除掩码区域的干扰与块间不连续性，同时利用不同掩码实现数据增强。
AI.result: 在KADID-10k、LIVE和CSIQ数据集上达到最先进性能，且跨数据集泛化能力优于现有方法，代码和结果已公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过掩码机制有效融合参考图像信息，MR-IQA在准确性和泛化性上均优于传统方法，其核心模块设计对图像质量评估领域具有重要参考价值。
