search_text: Mask Reference Image Quality Assessment 掩模参考图像质量评估 Understanding semantic information is an essential step in knowing what is being learned in both full-reference (FR) and no-reference (NR) image quality assessment (IQA) methods. However, especially for many severely distorted images, even if there is an undistorted image as a reference (FR-IQA), it is difficult to perceive the lost semantic and texture information of distorted images directly. In this paper, we propose a Mask Reference IQA (MR-IQA) method that masks specific patches of a distorted image and supplements missing patches with the reference image patches. In this way, our model only needs to input the reconstructed image for quality assessment. First, we design a mask generator to select the best candidate patches from reference images and supplement the lost semantic information in distorted images, thus providing more reference for quality assessment; in addition, the different masked patches imply different data augmentations, which favors model training and reduces overfitting. Second, we provide a Mask Reference Network (MRNet): the dedicated modules can prevent disturbances due to masked patches and help eliminate the patch discontinuity in the reconstructed image. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on the benchmark KADID-10k, LIVE and CSIQ datasets and has better generalization performance across datasets. The code and results are available in the supplementary material. 了解语义信息是了解全参考 (FR) 和无参考 (NR) 图像质量评估 (IQA) 方法中所学习内容的重要步骤。然而，特别是对于许多严重畸变的图像，即使有未畸变的图像作为参考（FR-IQA），也很难直接感知畸变图像丢失的语义和纹理信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种掩模参考 IQA (MR-IQA) 方法，该方法可以掩盖失真图像的特定斑块，并用参考图像斑块补充缺失的斑块。这样，我们的模型只需要输入重建图像进行质量评估。首先，我们设计了一个掩模生成器，从参考图像中选择最佳候选斑块，并补充失真图像中丢失的语义信息，从而为质量评估提供更多参考；此外，不同的屏蔽补丁意味着不同的数据增强，这有利于模型训练并减少过度拟合。其次，我们提供了掩模参考网络（MRNet）：专用模块可以防止由于掩模补丁造成的干扰，并有助于消除重建图像中的补丁不连续性。我们的方法在基准 KADID-10k、LIVE 和 CSIQ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且在跨数据集上具有更好的泛化性能。代码和结果可在补充材料中找到。 本文提出了一种名为Mask Reference IQA（MR-IQA）的图像质量评估方法，通过掩码机制结合参考图像补全失真图像的缺失区域以提升评估效果。 Pengxiang Xiao,Shuai He,Limin Liu,Anlong Ming cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Lei Yu,Bishan Wang,Xiang Zhang,Haijian Zhang,Wen Yang,Jianzhuang Liu,Gui-Song Xia
title: Learning to Super-Resolve Blurry Images with Events
title_zh: 学习通过事件超分辨率模糊图像
abstract: Super-Resolution from a single motion Blurred image (SRB) is a severely ill-posed problem due to the joint degradation of motion blurs and low spatial resolution. In this paper, we employ events to alleviate the burden of SRB and propose an Event-enhanced SRB (E-SRB) algorithm, which can generate a sequence of sharp and clear images with High Resolution (HR) from a single blurry image with Low Resolution (LR). To achieve this end, we formulate an event-enhanced degeneration model to consider the low spatial resolution, motion blurs, and event noises simultaneously. We then build an event-enhanced Sparse Learning Network (eSL-Net++) upon a dual sparse learning scheme where both events and intensity frames are modeled with sparse representations. Furthermore, we propose an event shuffle-and-merge scheme to extend the single-frame SRB to the sequence-frame SRB without any additional training process. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed eSL-Net++ outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Datasets, codes, and more results are available at https://github.com/ShinyWang33/eSL-Net-Plusplus.
summary: Super-Resolution from a single motion Blurred image (SRB) is a severely ill-posed problem due to the joint degradation of motion blurs and low spatial resolution. In this paper, we employ events to alleviate the burden of SRB and propose an Event-enhanced SRB (E-SRB) algorithm, which can generate a sequence of sharp and clear images with High Resolution (HR) from a single blurry image with Low Resolution (LR). To achieve this end, we formulate an event-enhanced degeneration model to consider the low spatial resolution, motion blurs, and event noises simultaneously. We then build an event-enhanced Sparse Learning Network (eSL-Net++) upon a dual sparse learning scheme where both events and intensity frames are modeled with sparse representations. Furthermore, we propose an event shuffle-and-merge scheme to extend the single-frame SRB to the sequence-frame SRB without any additional training process. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed eSL-Net++ outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Datasets, codes, and more results are available at https://github.com/ShinyWang33/eSL-Net-Plusplus.
abstract_zh: 由于运动模糊和低空间分辨率的联合退化，单运动模糊图像（SRB）的超分辨率是一个严重的不适定问题。在本文中，我们利用事件来减轻SRB的负担，并提出了一种事件增强型SRB（E-SRB）算法，该算法可以从单个低分辨率（LR）模糊图像生成一系列清晰的高分辨率（HR）图像。为了实现这一目标，我们制定了事件增强退化模型来同时考虑低空间分辨率、运动模糊和事件噪声。然后，我们基于双稀疏学习方案构建事件增强的稀疏学习网络（eSL-Net++），其中事件和强度帧都使用稀疏表示进行建模。此外，我们提出了一种事件洗牌和合并方案，将单帧 SRB 扩展到序列帧 SRB，而无需任何额外的训练过程。合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的 eSL-Net++ 大大优于最先进的方法。数据集、代码和更多结果可在 https://github.com/ShinyWang33/eSL-Net-Plusplus 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用事件数据提升模糊图像超分辨率的方法E-SRB，通过结合事件信息和稀疏学习网络解决运动模糊与低分辨率的联合退化问题。
AI.motivation: 单帧运动模糊图像超分辨率（SRB）因同时存在运动模糊和低分辨率退化，导致问题严重病态，传统方法难以有效恢复高质量图像。
AI.method: 构建事件增强退化模型，设计双稀疏学习网络eSL-Net++，结合事件噪声与强度帧的稀疏表示，并提出事件洗牌合并方案实现序列帧超分辨率。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了事件信息与网络设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合事件数据与稀疏学习，本文方法有效解决了运动模糊图像超分辨率的病态问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rongtao Xu,Changwei Wang,Jiaxi Sun,Shibiao Xu,Weiliang Meng,Xiaopeng Zhang
title: Self Correspondence Distillation for End-to-End Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于端到端弱监督语义分割的自对应蒸馏
abstract: Efficiently training accurate deep models for weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels is challenging and important. Recently, end-to-end WSSS methods have become the focus of research due to their high training efficiency. However, current methods suffer from insufficient extraction of comprehensive semantic information, resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels and sub-optimal solutions for end-to-end WSSS. To this end, we propose a simple and novel Self Correspondence Distillation (SCD) method to refine pseudo-labels without introducing external supervision. Our SCD enables the network to utilize feature correspondence derived from itself as a distillation target, which can enhance the network's feature learning process by complementing semantic information. In addition, to further improve the segmentation accuracy, we design a Variation-aware Refine Module to enhance the local consistency of pseudo-labels by computing pixel-level variation. Finally, we present an efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework (TSCD) via SCD and Variation-aware Refine Module for the accurate WSSS task. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at {https://github.com/Rongtao-Xu/RepresentationLearning/tree/main/SCD-AAAI2023}.
summary: Efficiently training accurate deep models for weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels is challenging and important. Recently, end-to-end WSSS methods have become the focus of research due to their high training efficiency. However, current methods suffer from insufficient extraction of comprehensive semantic information, resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels and sub-optimal solutions for end-to-end WSSS. To this end, we propose a simple and novel Self Correspondence Distillation (SCD) method to refine pseudo-labels without introducing external supervision. Our SCD enables the network to utilize feature correspondence derived from itself as a distillation target, which can enhance the network's feature learning process by complementing semantic information. In addition, to further improve the segmentation accuracy, we design a Variation-aware Refine Module to enhance the local consistency of pseudo-labels by computing pixel-level variation. Finally, we present an efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework (TSCD) via SCD and Variation-aware Refine Module for the accurate WSSS task. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at {https://github.com/Rongtao-Xu/RepresentationLearning/tree/main/SCD-AAAI2023}.
abstract_zh: 使用图像级标签有效地训练用于弱监督语义分割（WSSS）的准确深度模型具有挑战性且重要。最近，端到端的WSSS方法由于其高训练效率而成为研究的焦点。然而，当前的方法缺乏全面语义信息的提取，导致低质量的伪标签和端到端 WSSS 的次优解决方案。为此，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的自对应蒸馏（SCD）方法来精炼伪标签，而无需引入外部监督。我们的 SCD 使网络能够利用源自自身的特征对应关系作为蒸馏目标，这可以通过补充语义信息来增强网络的特征学习过程。此外，为了进一步提高分割精度，我们设计了一个变化感知优化模块，通过计算像素级变化来增强伪标签的局部一致性。最后，我们通过 SCD 和变化感知精炼模块提出了一个高效的基于 Transformer 的端到端框架 (TSCD)，用于准确的 WSSS 任务。对 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法明显优于其他最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 {https://github.com/Rongtao-Xu/RepresentationLearning/tree/main/SCD-AAAI2023} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自对应蒸馏方法（SCD）和变体感知细化模块，用于改进端到端弱监督语义分割任务中的伪标签质量。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端弱监督语义分割方法因无法充分提取语义信息，导致伪标签质量低且分割效果次优。
AI.method: 通过自对应蒸馏（SCD）利用网络自身特征对应关系作为蒸馏目标，并设计变体感知细化模块增强伪标签局部一致性，构建高效的Transformer框架TSCD。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和MS COCO 2014数据集上显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SCD方法有效提升了弱监督语义分割的伪标签质量，为端到端训练提供了更优解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种自对应蒸馏方法（SCD）和变体感知细化模块，用于改进端到端弱监督语义分割任务中的伪标签质量。
motivation: 现有端到端弱监督语义分割方法因无法充分提取语义信息，导致伪标签质量低且分割效果次优。
method: 通过自对应蒸馏（SCD）利用网络自身特征对应关系作为蒸馏目标，并设计变体感知细化模块增强伪标签局部一致性，构建高效的Transformer框架TSCD。

conclusion: SCD方法有效提升了弱监督语义分割的伪标签质量，为端到端训练提供了更优解决方案。
search_text: Self Correspondence Distillation for End-to-End Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation 用于端到端弱监督语义分割的自对应蒸馏 Efficiently training accurate deep models for weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels is challenging and important. Recently, end-to-end WSSS methods have become the focus of research due to their high training efficiency. However, current methods suffer from insufficient extraction of comprehensive semantic information, resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels and sub-optimal solutions for end-to-end WSSS. To this end, we propose a simple and novel Self Correspondence Distillation (SCD) method to refine pseudo-labels without introducing external supervision. Our SCD enables the network to utilize feature correspondence derived from itself as a distillation target, which can enhance the network's feature learning process by complementing semantic information. In addition, to further improve the segmentation accuracy, we design a Variation-aware Refine Module to enhance the local consistency of pseudo-labels by computing pixel-level variation. Finally, we present an efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework (TSCD) via SCD and Variation-aware Refine Module for the accurate WSSS task. Extensive experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at {https://github.com/Rongtao-Xu/RepresentationLearning/tree/main/SCD-AAAI2023}. 使用图像级标签有效地训练用于弱监督语义分割（WSSS）的准确深度模型具有挑战性且重要。最近，端到端的WSSS方法由于其高训练效率而成为研究的焦点。然而，当前的方法缺乏全面语义信息的提取，导致低质量的伪标签和端到端 WSSS 的次优解决方案。为此，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的自对应蒸馏（SCD）方法来精炼伪标签，而无需引入外部监督。我们的 SCD 使网络能够利用源自自身的特征对应关系作为蒸馏目标，这可以通过补充语义信息来增强网络的特征学习过程。此外，为了进一步提高分割精度，我们设计了一个变化感知优化模块，通过计算像素级变化来增强伪标签的局部一致性。最后，我们通过 SCD 和变化感知精炼模块提出了一个高效的基于 Transformer 的端到端框架 (TSCD)，用于准确的 WSSS 任务。对 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法明显优于其他最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 {https://github.com/Rongtao-Xu/RepresentationLearning/tree/main/SCD-AAAI2023} 获取。 本文提出一种自对应蒸馏方法（SCD）和变体感知细化模块，用于改进端到端弱监督语义分割任务中的伪标签质量。 Rongtao Xu,Changwei Wang,Jiaxi Sun,Shibiao Xu,Weiliang Meng,Xiaopeng Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yoohwan Kwon,Soo-Whan Chung
title: MoLE : Mixture of Language Experts for Multi-Lingual Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: MoLE：多语言自动语音识别的语言专家组合
abstract: Multi-lingual speech recognition aims to distinguish linguistic expressions in different languages and integrate acoustic processing simultaneously. In contrast, current multi-lingual speech recognition research follows a language-aware paradigm, mainly targeted to improve recognition performance rather than discriminate language characteristics. In this paper, we present a multi-lingual speech recognition network named Mixture-of-Language-Expert(MoLE), which digests speech in a variety of languages. Specifically, MoLE analyzes linguistic expression from input speech in arbitrary languages, activating a language-specific expert with a lightweight language tokenizer. The tokenizer not only activates experts, but also estimates the reliability of the activation. Based on the reliability, the activated expert and the language-agnostic expert are aggregated to represent language-conditioned embedding for efficient speech recognition. Our proposed model is evaluated in 5 languages scenario, and the experimental results show that our structure is advantageous on multi-lingual recognition, especially for speech in low-resource language.
summary: Multi-lingual speech recognition aims to distinguish linguistic expressions in different languages and integrate acoustic processing simultaneously. In contrast, current multi-lingual speech recognition research follows a language-aware paradigm, mainly targeted to improve recognition performance rather than discriminate language characteristics. In this paper, we present a multi-lingual speech recognition network named Mixture-of-Language-Expert(MoLE), which digests speech in a variety of languages. Specifically, MoLE analyzes linguistic expression from input speech in arbitrary languages, activating a language-specific expert with a lightweight language tokenizer. The tokenizer not only activates experts, but also estimates the reliability of the activation. Based on the reliability, the activated expert and the language-agnostic expert are aggregated to represent language-conditioned embedding for efficient speech recognition. Our proposed model is evaluated in 5 languages scenario, and the experimental results show that our structure is advantageous on multi-lingual recognition, especially for speech in low-resource language.
abstract_zh: 多语言语音识别旨在区分不同语言的语言表达并同时集成声学处理。相比之下，当前的多语言语音识别研究遵循语言感知范式，主要目标是提高识别性能而不是区分语言特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Mixture-of-Language-Expert（MoLE）的多语言语音识别网络，它可以消化多种语言的语音。具体来说，MoLE 可以分析任意语言输入语音的语言表达，并通过轻量级语言分词器激活特定语言的专家。分词器不仅可以激活专家，还可以估计激活的可靠性。基于可靠性，激活的专家和与语言无关的专家被聚合以表示语言条件嵌入，以实现高效的语音识别。我们提出的模型在 5 种语言场景中进行了评估，实验结果表明我们的结构在多语言识别方面具有优势，特别是对于低资源语言的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多语言语音识别模型MoLE，通过混合语言专家机制提升多语言识别效果，尤其针对低资源语言。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言语音识别研究侧重提升性能而非区分语言特征，导致低资源语言识别效果不佳，需设计更关注语言区分的模型。
AI.method: 采用混合语言专家架构，利用轻量级语言分词器激活对应专家并评估可靠性，结合语言相关专家与语言无关专家生成条件嵌入。
AI.result: 在五种语言实验中，MoLE在多语言识别任务中表现优异，尤其显著提升低资源语言的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: MoLE通过语言特征区分与可靠性聚合机制，有效解决多语言语音识别难题，为低资源语言提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Jiaqi Gao,Xinyang Jiang,Yuqing Yang,Dongsheng Li,Lili Qiu
title: Unsupervised Video Anomaly Detection for Stereotypical Behaviours in Autism
title_zh: 针对自闭症刻板行为的无监督视频异常检测
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Monitoring and analyzing stereotypical behaviours is important for early intervention and care taking in Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). This paper focuses on automatically detecting stereotypical behaviours with computer vision techniques. Off-the-shelf methods tackle this task by supervised classification and activity recognition techniques. However, the unbounded types of stereotypical behaviours and the difficulty in collecting video recordings of ASD patients largely limit the feasibility of the existing supervised detection methods. As a result, we tackle these challenges from a new perspective, i.e. unsupervised video anomaly detection for stereotypical behaviours detection. The models can be trained among unlabeled videos containing only normal behaviours and unknown types of abnormal behaviours can be detected during inference. Correspondingly, we propose a Dual Stream deep model for Stereotypical Behaviours Detection, DS-SBD, based on the temporal trajectory of human poses and the repetition patterns of human actions. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our proposed method and suggest that it serves as a potential benchmark for future research.
summary: Monitoring and analyzing stereotypical behaviours is important for early intervention and care taking in Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). This paper focuses on automatically detecting stereotypical behaviours with computer vision techniques. Off-the-shelf methods tackle this task by supervised classification and activity recognition techniques. However, the unbounded types of stereotypical behaviours and the difficulty in collecting video recordings of ASD patients largely limit the feasibility of the existing supervised detection methods. As a result, we tackle these challenges from a new perspective, i.e. unsupervised video anomaly detection for stereotypical behaviours detection. The models can be trained among unlabeled videos containing only normal behaviours and unknown types of abnormal behaviours can be detected during inference. Correspondingly, we propose a Dual Stream deep model for Stereotypical Behaviours Detection, DS-SBD, based on the temporal trajectory of human poses and the repetition patterns of human actions. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our proposed method and suggest that it serves as a potential benchmark for future research.
abstract_zh: 监测和分析刻板行为对于自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 的早期干预和护理非常重要。本文重点研究利用计算机视觉技术自动检测刻板行为。现成的方法通过监督分类和活动识别技术来解决此任务。然而，无限制的刻板行为类型以及收集 ASD 患者视频记录的困难在很大程度上限制了现有监督检测方法的可行性。因此，我们从一个新的角度应对这些挑战，即用于刻板行为检测的无监督视频异常检测。模型可以在仅包含正常行为的未标记视频中进行训练，并且可以在推理过程中检测到未知类型的异常行为。相应地，我们基于人类姿势的时间轨迹和人类动作的重复模式，提出了一种用于刻板行为检测的双流深度模型（DS-SBD）。进行了大量的实验来验证我们提出的方法的有效性，并表明它可以作为未来研究的潜在基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督视频异常检测方法，用于自动识别自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）患者的刻板行为。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法因ASD患者视频数据难以获取且刻板行为类型多样而受限，需开发无需标注数据的无监督检测方案。
AI.method: 提出双流深度模型DS-SBD，结合人体姿态的时间轨迹与动作重复模式进行无监督异常检测。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法的有效性，表明其可作为未来研究的潜在基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为ASD刻板行为的早期干预提供了可行的技术路径，无需依赖标注数据即可检测未知异常行为。

authors_text: Mohammad Abdulaziz,Christoph Madlener
title: A Formal Analysis of RANKING
title_zh: 排名的正式分析
abstract: We describe a formal correctness proof of RANKING, an online algorithm for online bipartite matching. An outcome of our formalisation is that it shows that there is a gap in all combinatorial proofs of the algorithm. Filling that gap constituted the majority of the effort which went into this work. This is despite the algorithm being one of the most studied algorithms and a central result in theoretical computer science. This gap is an example of difficulties in formalising graphical arguments which are ubiquitous in the theory of computing.
summary: We describe a formal correctness proof of RANKING, an online algorithm for online bipartite matching. An outcome of our formalisation is that it shows that there is a gap in all combinatorial proofs of the algorithm. Filling that gap constituted the majority of the effort which went into this work. This is despite the algorithm being one of the most studied algorithms and a central result in theoretical computer science. This gap is an example of difficulties in formalising graphical arguments which are ubiquitous in the theory of computing.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了 RANKING 的正式正确性证明，RANKING 是一种用于在线二分匹配的在线算法。我们形式化的结果是，它表明该算法的所有组合证明都存在差距。填补这一空白构成了这项工作的大部分努力。尽管该算法是研究最多的算法之一，也是理论计算机科学的核心成果。这种差距是计算理论中普遍存在的图形论证形式化困难的一个例子。

AI.tldr: 对在线二分图匹配算法RANKING进行形式化正确性证明，并揭示组合证明中的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有组合证明存在逻辑缺口，而形式化验证能更严谨地完善理论计算机科学中的核心算法证明。
AI.method: 采用形式化验证方法，通过数学归纳法与不变量分析，对算法进行严格逻辑推导并定位组合证明缺陷。
AI.result: 发现所有组合证明均存在未填补的逻辑缺口，并通过形式化方法完成缺口修补，验证了RANKING算法的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 形式化验证揭示了图形化论证的普遍困难，为算法理论研究提供了可复用的严格证明框架。

search_text: A Formal Analysis of RANKING 排名的正式分析 We describe a formal correctness proof of RANKING, an online algorithm for online bipartite matching. An outcome of our formalisation is that it shows that there is a gap in all combinatorial proofs of the algorithm. Filling that gap constituted the majority of the effort which went into this work. This is despite the algorithm being one of the most studied algorithms and a central result in theoretical computer science. This gap is an example of difficulties in formalising graphical arguments which are ubiquitous in the theory of computing. 我们描述了 RANKING 的正式正确性证明，RANKING 是一种用于在线二分匹配的在线算法。我们形式化的结果是，它表明该算法的所有组合证明都存在差距。填补这一空白构成了这项工作的大部分努力。尽管该算法是研究最多的算法之一，也是理论计算机科学的核心成果。这种差距是计算理论中普遍存在的图形论证形式化困难的一个例子。 对在线二分图匹配算法RANKING进行形式化正确性证明，并揭示组合证明中的缺陷。 Mohammad Abdulaziz,Christoph Madlener cs.LO,cs.DS

authors_text: Lingxiao Huang,Ruiyuan Huang,Zengfeng Huang,Xuan Wu
title: On Coresets for Clustering in Small Dimensional Euclidean Spaces
title_zh: 小维欧几里得空间中聚类的核心集
abstract: We consider the problem of constructing small coresets for $k$-Median in Euclidean spaces. Given a large set of data points $P\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, a coreset is a much smaller set $S\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, so that the $k$-Median costs of any $k$ centers w.r.t. $P$ and $S$ are close. Existing literature mainly focuses on the high-dimension case and there has been great success in obtaining dimension-independent bounds, whereas the case for small $d$ is largely unexplored. Considering many applications of Euclidean clustering algorithms are in small dimensions and the lack of systematic studies in the current literature, this paper investigates coresets for $k$-Median in small dimensions. For small $d$, a natural question is whether existing near-optimal dimension-independent bounds can be significantly improved. We provide affirmative answers to this question for a range of parameters. Moreover, new lower bound results are also proved, which are the highest for small $d$. In particular, we completely settle the coreset size bound for $1$-d $k$-Median (up to log factors). Interestingly, our results imply a strong separation between $1$-d $1$-Median and $1$-d $2$-Median. As far as we know, this is the first such separation between $k=1$ and $k=2$ in any dimension.
summary: We consider the problem of constructing small coresets for $k$-Median in Euclidean spaces. Given a large set of data points $P\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, a coreset is a much smaller set $S\subset \mathbb{R}^d$, so that the $k$-Median costs of any $k$ centers w.r.t. $P$ and $S$ are close. Existing literature mainly focuses on the high-dimension case and there has been great success in obtaining dimension-independent bounds, whereas the case for small $d$ is largely unexplored. Considering many applications of Euclidean clustering algorithms are in small dimensions and the lack of systematic studies in the current literature, this paper investigates coresets for $k$-Median in small dimensions. For small $d$, a natural question is whether existing near-optimal dimension-independent bounds can be significantly improved. We provide affirmative answers to this question for a range of parameters. Moreover, new lower bound results are also proved, which are the highest for small $d$. In particular, we completely settle the coreset size bound for $1$-d $k$-Median (up to log factors). Interestingly, our results imply a strong separation between $1$-d $1$-Median and $1$-d $2$-Median. As far as we know, this is the first such separation between $k=1$ and $k=2$ in any dimension.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在欧几里德空间中为 $k$-Median 构建小型核心集的问题。给定大量数据点 $P\subset \mathbb{R}^d$，核心集是一个小得多的集合 $S\subset \mathbb{R}^d$，因此任何 $k$ 中心的 $k$-Median 成本都集中在 w.r.t. 上。 $P$ 和$S$ 接近。现有文献主要关注高维情况，并且在获得与维度无关的边界方面取得了巨大成功，而小 $d$ 的情况很大程度上尚未探索。考虑到欧几里得聚类算法的许多应用都是在小维度上，并且目前文献中缺乏系统的研究，本文研究了小维度下$k$-Median的核心集。对于较小的 $d$，一个自然的问题是是否可以显着改进现有的接近最优的维度无关边界。我们针对一系列参数对这个问题提供了肯定的答案。此外，还证明了新的下界结果，该结果对于小 $d$ 来说是最高的。特别是，我们完全解决了 $1$-d $k$-Median 的核心集大小限制（最多为对数因子）。有趣的是，我们的结果表明 $1$-d $1$-中位数和 $1$-d $2$-中位数之间有很大的分离。据我们所知，这是任何维度上 $k=1$ 和 $k=2$ 之间的第一次分离。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低维欧几里得空间中为k-中位数聚类问题构建更高效的核心集（Coreset）的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有核心集研究主要关注高维空间并取得维度无关的界，但低维场景缺乏系统性分析，而实际应用中低维数据更常见。
AI.method: 通过几何分析与组合优化方法，结合低维空间特性设计核心集构造策略，并证明新的上下界。
AI.result: 在多个参数范围内改进了现有界，首次完全确定1维k-中位数核心集大小界，并揭示1维k=1与k=2的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了低维核心集研究的空白，为低维聚类算法优化提供了理论支持，并揭示了不同k值间的本质差异。

authors_text: Weidong Chen,Xiaofen Xing,Xiangmin Xu,Jianxin Pang,Lan Du
title: DST: Deformable Speech Transformer for Emotion Recognition
title_zh: DST：用于情绪识别的可变形语音转换器
abstract: Enabled by multi-head self-attention, Transformer has exhibited remarkable results in speech emotion recognition (SER). Compared to the original full attention mechanism, window-based attention is more effective in learning fine-grained features while greatly reducing model redundancy. However, emotional cues are present in a multi-granularity manner such that the pre-defined fixed window can severely degrade the model flexibility. In addition, it is difficult to obtain the optimal window settings manually. In this paper, we propose a Deformable Speech Transformer, named DST, for SER task. DST determines the usage of window sizes conditioned on input speech via a light-weight decision network. Meanwhile, data-dependent offsets derived from acoustic features are utilized to adjust the positions of the attention windows, allowing DST to adaptively discover and attend to the valuable information embedded in the speech. Extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD demonstrate the superiority of DST.
summary: Enabled by multi-head self-attention, Transformer has exhibited remarkable results in speech emotion recognition (SER). Compared to the original full attention mechanism, window-based attention is more effective in learning fine-grained features while greatly reducing model redundancy. However, emotional cues are present in a multi-granularity manner such that the pre-defined fixed window can severely degrade the model flexibility. In addition, it is difficult to obtain the optimal window settings manually. In this paper, we propose a Deformable Speech Transformer, named DST, for SER task. DST determines the usage of window sizes conditioned on input speech via a light-weight decision network. Meanwhile, data-dependent offsets derived from acoustic features are utilized to adjust the positions of the attention windows, allowing DST to adaptively discover and attend to the valuable information embedded in the speech. Extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD demonstrate the superiority of DST.
abstract_zh: 在多头自注意力的支持下，Transformer 在语音情感识别（SER）方面表现出了显着的成果。与原始的全注意力机制相比，基于窗口的注意力在学习细粒度特征方面更加有效，同时大大减少了模型冗余。然而，情感线索以多粒度的方式存在，因此预定义的固定窗口会严重降低模型的灵活性。此外，手动获得最佳窗口设置也很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 SER 任务的可变形语音转换器（Deformable Speech Transformer），名为 DST。 DST 通过轻量级决策网络根据输入语音确定窗口大小的使用。同时，利用从声学特征导出的数据相关偏移来调整注意力窗口的位置，使 DST 能够自适应地发现并关注语音中嵌入的有价值的信息。 IEMOCAP 和 MELD 上的大量实验证明了 DST 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可变形语音Transformer（DST），通过动态调整注意力窗口大小和位置提升语音情感识别（SER）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统固定窗口注意力机制难以适应语音中多粒度情感特征，且手动优化窗口参数效率低下。
AI.method: 设计轻量决策网络动态选择窗口尺寸，结合声学特征生成的偏移量调整注意力位置，实现对关键情感信息的自适应捕捉。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上实验表明，DST相较基线模型取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DST通过可变形注意力机制有效解决了固定窗口的灵活性问题，为语音情感识别提供了新方法。

DST determines the usage of window sizes conditioned on input speech via a light-weight decision network. Meanwhile, data-dependent offsets derived from acoustic features are utilized to adjust the positions of the attention windows, allowing DST to adaptively discover and attend to the valuable information embedded in the speech. Extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD demonstrate the superiority of DST. 在多头自注意力的支持下，Transformer 在语音情感识别（SER）方面表现出了显着的成果。与原始的全注意力机制相比，基于窗口的注意力在学习细粒度特征方面更加有效，同时大大减少了模型冗余。然而，情感线索以多粒度的方式存在，因此预定义的固定窗口会严重降低模型的灵活性。此外，手动获得最佳窗口设置也很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 SER 任务的可变形语音转换器（Deformable Speech Transformer），名为 DST。 DST 通过轻量级决策网络根据输入语音确定窗口大小的使用。同时，利用从声学特征导出的数据相关偏移来调整注意力窗口的位置，使 DST 能够自适应地发现并关注语音中嵌入的有价值的信息。 IEMOCAP 和 MELD 上的大量实验证明了 DST 的优越性。 本文提出一种可变形语音Transformer（DST），通过动态调整注意力窗口大小和位置提升语音情感识别（SER）性能。 Weidong Chen,Xiaofen Xing,Xiangmin Xu,Jianxin Pang,Lan Du cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Haoyi Niu,Kun Ren,Yizhou Xu,Ziyuan Yang,Yichen Lin,Yi Zhang,Jianming Hu
title: (Re)$^2$H2O: Autonomous Driving Scenario Generation via Reversely Regularized Hybrid Offline-and-Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: (Re)$^2$H2O：通过反向正则化混合离线和在线强化学习自动驾驶场景生成
comment: Accepted in IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2023
comments: Accepted in IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2023
abstract: Autonomous driving and its widespread adoption have long held tremendous promise. Nevertheless, without a trustworthy and thorough testing procedure, not only does the industry struggle to mass-produce autonomous vehicles (AV), but neither the general public nor policymakers are convinced to accept the innovations. Generating safety-critical scenarios that present significant challenges to AV is an essential first step in testing. Real-world datasets include naturalistic but overly safe driving behaviors, whereas simulation would allow for unrestricted exploration of diverse and aggressive traffic scenarios. Conversely, higher-dimensional searching space in simulation disables efficient scenario generation without real-world data distribution as implicit constraints. In order to marry the benefits of both, it seems appealing to learn to generate scenarios from both offline real-world and online simulation data simultaneously. Therefore, we tailor a Reversely Regularized Hybrid Offline-and-Online ((Re)$^2$H2O) Reinforcement Learning recipe to additionally penalize Q-values on real-world data and reward Q-values on simulated data, which ensures the generated scenarios are both varied and adversarial. Through extensive experiments, our solution proves to produce more risky scenarios than competitive baselines and it can generalize to work with various autonomous driving models. In addition, these generated scenarios are also corroborated to be capable of fine-tuning AV performance.
summary: Autonomous driving and its widespread adoption have long held tremendous promise. Nevertheless, without a trustworthy and thorough testing procedure, not only does the industry struggle to mass-produce autonomous vehicles (AV), but neither the general public nor policymakers are convinced to accept the innovations. Generating safety-critical scenarios that present significant challenges to AV is an essential first step in testing. Real-world datasets include naturalistic but overly safe driving behaviors, whereas simulation would allow for unrestricted exploration of diverse and aggressive traffic scenarios. Conversely, higher-dimensional searching space in simulation disables efficient scenario generation without real-world data distribution as implicit constraints. In order to marry the benefits of both, it seems appealing to learn to generate scenarios from both offline real-world and online simulation data simultaneously. Therefore, we tailor a Reversely Regularized Hybrid Offline-and-Online ((Re)$^2$H2O) Reinforcement Learning recipe to additionally penalize Q-values on real-world data and reward Q-values on simulated data, which ensures the generated scenarios are both varied and adversarial. Through extensive experiments, our solution proves to produce more risky scenarios than competitive baselines and it can generalize to work with various autonomous driving models. In addition, these generated scenarios are also corroborated to be capable of fine-tuning AV performance.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶及其广泛采用长期以来一直有着巨大的前景。然而，如果没有值得信赖和彻底的测试程序，该行业不仅难以大规模生产自动驾驶汽车（AV），而且公众和政策制定者都无法说服他们接受这些创新。生成对 AV 提出重大挑战的安全关键场景是测试中至关重要的第一步。现实世界的数据集包括自然但过于安全的驾驶行为，而模拟将允许不受限制地探索多样化和激进的交通场景。相反，在没有现实世界数据分布作为隐式约束的情况下，模拟中的高维搜索空间无法有效生成场景。为了结合两者的优点，学习同时从离线现实世界和在线模拟数据生成场景似乎很有吸引力。因此，我们定制了反向正则化混合离线和在线 ((Re)$^2$H2O) 强化学习配方，以额外惩罚真实数据的 Q 值并奖励模拟数据的 Q 值，从而确保生成的场景既多样化又具有对抗性。通过大量的实验，我们的解决方案被证明比竞争基准产生更多风险的场景，并且它可以推广到与各种自动驾驶模型一起使用。此外，这些生成的场景也被证实能够微调 AV 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合离线真实数据与在线模拟数据的混合强化学习方法，用于生成具有挑战性的自动驾驶测试场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要安全关键场景测试，但真实数据过于保守而模拟数据搜索空间高维，难以高效生成对抗性场景。
AI.method: 设计反向正则化混合离线-在线强化学习框架（(Re)$^2$H2O），通过在真实数据中惩罚Q值、在模拟数据中奖励Q值，引导生成多样化对抗场景。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法生成的场景比基线更危险，且能适配多种自动驾驶模型并提升其性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合真实与模拟数据的反向正则化方法可有效生成高质量对抗场景，推动自动驾驶安全测试发展。

authors_text: Maheshi Lokumarambage,Vishnu Gowrisetty,Hossein Rezaei,Thushan Sivalingam,Nandana Rajatheva,Anil Fernando
title: Wireless End-to-End Image Transmission System using Semantic Communications
title_zh: 使用语义通信的无线端到端图像传输系统
abstract: Semantic communication is considered the future of mobile communication, which aims to transmit data beyond Shannon's theorem of communications by transmitting the semantic meaning of the data rather than the bit-by-bit reconstruction of the data at the receiver's end. The semantic communication paradigm aims to bridge the gap of limited bandwidth problems in modern high-volume multimedia application content transmission. Integrating AI technologies with the 6G communications networks paved the way to develop semantic communication-based end-to-end communication systems. In this study, we have implemented a semantic communication-based end-to-end image transmission system, and we discuss potential design considerations in developing semantic communication systems in conjunction with physical channel characteristics. A Pre-trained GAN network is used at the receiver as the transmission task to reconstruct the realistic image based on the Semantic segmented image at the receiver input. The semantic segmentation task at the transmitter (encoder) and the GAN network at the receiver (decoder) is trained on a common knowledge base, the COCO-Stuff dataset. The research shows that the resource gain in the form of bandwidth saving is immense when transmitting the semantic segmentation map through the physical channel instead of the ground truth image in contrast to conventional communication systems. Furthermore, the research studies the effect of physical channel distortions and quantization noise on semantic communication-based multimedia content transmission.
summary: Semantic communication is considered the future of mobile communication, which aims to transmit data beyond Shannon's theorem of communications by transmitting the semantic meaning of the data rather than the bit-by-bit reconstruction of the data at the receiver's end. The semantic communication paradigm aims to bridge the gap of limited bandwidth problems in modern high-volume multimedia application content transmission. Integrating AI technologies with the 6G communications networks paved the way to develop semantic communication-based end-to-end communication systems. A Pre-trained GAN network is used at the receiver as the transmission task to reconstruct the realistic image based on the Semantic segmented image at the receiver input. The semantic segmentation task at the transmitter (encoder) and the GAN network at the receiver (decoder) is trained on a common knowledge base, the COCO-Stuff dataset. The research shows that the resource gain in the form of bandwidth saving is immense when transmitting the semantic segmentation map through the physical channel instead of the ground truth image in contrast to conventional communication systems. Furthermore, the research studies the effect of physical channel distortions and quantization noise on semantic communication-based multimedia content transmission.
abstract_zh: 语义通信被认为是移动通信的未来，其目标是通过传输数据的语义含义而不是在接收端逐位重建数据来传输超越香农通信定理的数据。语义通信范式旨在弥补现代大容量多媒体应用内容传输中有限带宽问题的差距。将人工智能技术与6G通信网络相结合，为开发基于语义通信的端到端通信系统铺平了道路。在本研究中，我们实现了基于语义通信的端到端图像传输系统，并结合物理信道特性讨论了开发语义通信系统的潜在设计考虑因素。接收器处使用预训练的 GAN 网络作为传输任务，根据接收器输入处的语义分割图像重建真实图像。发送器（编码器）的语义分割任务和接收器（解码器）的 GAN 网络在公共知识库 COCO-Stuff 数据集上进行训练。研究表明，与传统通信系统相比，通过物理信道而不是地面实况图像传输语义分割图时，以带宽节省形式获得的资源增益是巨大的。此外，该研究还研究了物理信道失真和量化噪声对基于语义通信的多媒体内容传输的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于语义通信的无线端到端图像传输系统，通过语义分割与生成对抗网络（GAN）实现图像重建，以减少带宽消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统通信系统在传输高体积多媒体内容时面临带宽瓶颈，而语义通信通过传输数据语义而非原始比特流，可突破香农定理限制，结合AI与6G技术是未来方向。
AI.method: 在发送端使用语义分割编码器提取图像语义信息，接收端采用预训练GAN网络根据语义分割图重建图像。编码器与解码器基于COCO-Stuff数据集联合训练，并考虑物理信道特性进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，传输语义分割图相比直接传输原始图像可节省大量带宽；同时验证了物理信道失真和量化噪声对语义通信系统的影响。
AI.conclusion: 语义通信在带宽效率上具有显著优势，但需进一步研究物理信道特性对语义信息传输的干扰问题以提升系统鲁棒性。

Furthermore, the research studies the effect of physical channel distortions and quantization noise on semantic communication-based multimedia content transmission. 语义通信被认为是移动通信的未来，其目标是通过传输数据的语义含义而不是在接收端逐位重建数据来传输超越香农通信定理的数据。语义通信范式旨在弥补现代大容量多媒体应用内容传输中有限带宽问题的差距。将人工智能技术与6G通信网络相结合，为开发基于语义通信的端到端通信系统铺平了道路。在本研究中，我们实现了基于语义通信的端到端图像传输系统，并结合物理信道特性讨论了开发语义通信系统的潜在设计考虑因素。接收器处使用预训练的 GAN 网络作为传输任务，根据接收器输入处的语义分割图像重建真实图像。发送器（编码器）的语义分割任务和接收器（解码器）的 GAN 网络在公共知识库 COCO-Stuff 数据集上进行训练。研究表明，与传统通信系统相比，通过物理信道而不是地面实况图像传输语义分割图时，以带宽节省形式获得的资源增益是巨大的。此外，该研究还研究了物理信道失真和量化噪声对基于语义通信的多媒体内容传输的影响。 本文设计了一个基于语义通信的无线端到端图像传输系统，通过语义分割与生成对抗网络（GAN）实现图像重建，以减少带宽消耗。 Maheshi Lokumarambage,Vishnu Gowrisetty,Hossein Rezaei,Thushan Sivalingam,Nandana Rajatheva,Anil Fernando cs.CV

authors_text: Joan Boyar,Lene M. Favrholdt,Shahin Kamali,Kim S. Larsen
title: Online Interval Scheduling with Predictions
title_zh: 带预测的在线间隔调度
abstract: In online interval scheduling, the input is an online sequence of intervals, and the goal is to accept a maximum number of non-overlapping intervals. In the more general disjoint path allocation problem, the input is a sequence of requests, each consisting of pairs of vertices of a known graph, and the goal is to accept a maximum number of requests forming edge-disjoint paths between accepted pairs. We study a setting with a potentially erroneous prediction specifying the set of requests forming the input sequence and provide tight upper and lower bounds on the competitive ratios of online algorithms as a function of the prediction error. We also present asymptotically tight trade-offs between consistency (competitive ratio with error-free predictions) and robustness (competitive ratio with adversarial predictions) of interval scheduling algorithms. Finally, we provide experimental results on real-world scheduling workloads that confirm our theoretical analysis.
summary: In online interval scheduling, the input is an online sequence of intervals, and the goal is to accept a maximum number of non-overlapping intervals. In the more general disjoint path allocation problem, the input is a sequence of requests, each consisting of pairs of vertices of a known graph, and the goal is to accept a maximum number of requests forming edge-disjoint paths between accepted pairs. We study a setting with a potentially erroneous prediction specifying the set of requests forming the input sequence and provide tight upper and lower bounds on the competitive ratios of online algorithms as a function of the prediction error. We also present asymptotically tight trade-offs between consistency (competitive ratio with error-free predictions) and robustness (competitive ratio with adversarial predictions) of interval scheduling algorithms. Finally, we provide experimental results on real-world scheduling workloads that confirm our theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 在在线间隔调度中，输入是在线间隔序列，目标是接受最大数量的非重叠间隔。在更一般的不相交路径分配问题中，输入是一系列请求，每个请求都由已知图的顶点对组成，目标是接受最大数量的在接受的对之间形成边不相交路径的请求。我们研究了一个具有潜在错误预测的设置，指定了形成输入序列的请求集，并为在线算法的竞争比提供了严格的上限和下限作为预测误差的函数。我们还提出了间隔调度算法的一致性（无差错预测的竞争比率）和鲁棒性（对抗性预测的竞争比率）之间的渐近紧密权衡。最后，我们提供了现实世界调度工作负载的实验结果，证实了我们的理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线区间调度问题，考虑存在预测误差的情况下，分析算法的竞争比并探讨一致性与鲁棒性的权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统在线调度算法无法有效利用预测信息，而实际应用中预测可能存在误差，需设计能平衡预测准确性与鲁棒性的算法。
AI.method: 建立包含预测误差的模型，通过理论分析推导竞争比的上下界，并设计实验验证理论结果。
AI.result: 获得竞争比的紧致界，证明一致性与鲁棒性的渐进最优权衡，并通过实验验证理论分析。
AI.conclusion: 预测驱动的在线算法设计需在利用预测信息与应对误差间取得平衡，理论结果为实际调度系统提供指导。

authors_text: Jiyoung Lee,Joon Son Chung,Soo-Whan Chung
title: Imaginary Voice: Face-styled Diffusion Model for Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 想象的声音：用于文本转语音的面部风格扩散模型
abstract: The goal of this work is zero-shot text-to-speech synthesis, with speaking styles and voices learnt from facial characteristics. Inspired by the natural fact that people can imagine the voice of someone when they look at his or her face, we introduce a face-styled diffusion text-to-speech (TTS) model within a unified framework learnt from visible attributes, called Face-TTS. This is the first time that face images are used as a condition to train a TTS model. We jointly train cross-model biometrics and TTS models to preserve speaker identity between face images and generated speech segments. We also propose a speaker feature binding loss to enforce the similarity of the generated and the ground truth speech segments in speaker embedding space. Since the biometric information is extracted directly from the face image, our method does not require extra fine-tuning steps to generate speech from unseen and unheard speakers. We train and evaluate the model on the LRS3 dataset, an in-the-wild audio-visual corpus containing background noise and diverse speaking styles. The project page is https://facetts.github.io.
summary: The goal of this work is zero-shot text-to-speech synthesis, with speaking styles and voices learnt from facial characteristics. Inspired by the natural fact that people can imagine the voice of someone when they look at his or her face, we introduce a face-styled diffusion text-to-speech (TTS) model within a unified framework learnt from visible attributes, called Face-TTS. This is the first time that face images are used as a condition to train a TTS model. We jointly train cross-model biometrics and TTS models to preserve speaker identity between face images and generated speech segments. We also propose a speaker feature binding loss to enforce the similarity of the generated and the ground truth speech segments in speaker embedding space. Since the biometric information is extracted directly from the face image, our method does not require extra fine-tuning steps to generate speech from unseen and unheard speakers. We train and evaluate the model on the LRS3 dataset, an in-the-wild audio-visual corpus containing background noise and diverse speaking styles. The project page is https://facetts.github.io.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是零样本文本到语音合成，从面部特征中学习说话风格和声音。受人们在看着某人的脸时可以想象出他或她的声音这一自然事实的启发，我们在从可见属性学习的统一框架内引入了一种面部风格的扩散文本到语音 (TTS) 模型，称为 Face-TTS。这是首次使用人脸图像作为训练 TTS 模型的条件。我们联合训练跨模型生物识别和 TTS 模型，以保留人脸图像和生成的语音片段之间的说话人身份。我们还提出了说话人特征绑定损失，以增强说话人嵌入空间中生成的语音片段和地面真实语音片段的相似性。由于生物识别信息是直接从面部图像中提取的，因此我们的方法不需要额外的微调步骤来生成来自看不见和听不见的说话者的语音。我们在 LRS3 数据集上训练和评估模型，LRS3 数据集是一个包含背景噪声和不同说话风格的野外视听语料库。项目页面为 https://facets.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于面部特征的零样本文本到语音合成模型Face-TTS，通过面部图像直接生成对应说话人的语音。
AI.motivation: 受人类通过面部特征想象他人声音的启发，解决传统TTS模型需要预先收集目标说话人语音数据的局限性。
AI.method: 联合训练跨模态生物特征识别模型与TTS模型，提出说话人特征绑定损失函数，直接从面部图像提取生物特征进行语音生成。
AI.result: 在包含背景噪音和多样说话风格的LRS3数据集上验证了模型有效性，可生成符合面部特征的语音且无需额外微调。
AI.conclusion: 首次将面部图像作为条件训练TTS模型，实现无需目标语音数据的零样本语音合成，为跨模态生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiangtao Wang,Ruizhi Wang,Biao Tian,Jiaojiao Zhang,Shuo Zhang,Junyang Chen,Thomas Lukasiewicz,Zhenghua Xu
title: MPS-AMS: Masked Patches Selection and Adaptive Masking Strategy Based Self-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: MPS-AMS：基于自监督医学图像分割的掩模斑块选择和自适应掩模策略
abstract: Existing self-supervised learning methods based on contrastive learning and masked image modeling have demonstrated impressive performances. However, current masked image modeling methods are mainly utilized in natural images, and their applications in medical images are relatively lacking. Besides, their fixed high masking strategy limits the upper bound of conditional mutual information, and the gradient noise is considerable, making less the learned representation information. Motivated by these limitations, in this paper, we propose masked patches selection and adaptive masking strategy based self-supervised medical image segmentation method, named MPS-AMS. We leverage the masked patches selection strategy to choose masked patches with lesions to obtain more lesion representation information, and the adaptive masking strategy is utilized to help learn more mutual information and improve performance further. Extensive experiments on three public medical image segmentation datasets (BUSI, Hecktor, and Brats2018) show that our proposed method greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised baselines.
summary: Existing self-supervised learning methods based on contrastive learning and masked image modeling have demonstrated impressive performances. However, current masked image modeling methods are mainly utilized in natural images, and their applications in medical images are relatively lacking. Besides, their fixed high masking strategy limits the upper bound of conditional mutual information, and the gradient noise is considerable, making less the learned representation information. Motivated by these limitations, in this paper, we propose masked patches selection and adaptive masking strategy based self-supervised medical image segmentation method, named MPS-AMS. We leverage the masked patches selection strategy to choose masked patches with lesions to obtain more lesion representation information, and the adaptive masking strategy is utilized to help learn more mutual information and improve performance further. Extensive experiments on three public medical image segmentation datasets (BUSI, Hecktor, and Brats2018) show that our proposed method greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised baselines.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于对比学习和掩模图像建模的自监督学习方法已经表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，目前的掩模图像建模方法主要应用于自然图像，在医学图像中的应用相对缺乏。此外，其固定的高掩蔽策略限制了条件互信息的上限，并且梯度噪声相当大，使得学习到的表示信息较少。受这些限制的启发，在本文中，我们提出了基于掩模斑块选择和自适应掩模策略的自监督医学图像分割方法，称为MPS-AMS。我们利用屏蔽斑块选择策略来选择具有病变的屏蔽斑块以获得更多的病变表示信息，并利用自适应屏蔽策略来帮助学习更多的互信息并进一步提高性能。对三个公共医学图像分割数据集（BUSI、Hecktor 和 Brats2018）的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法大大优于最先进的自监督基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码块选择和自适应掩码策略的自监督医学图像分割方法MPS-AMS。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对比学习和掩码图像建模的自监督方法在自然图像中表现优异，但医学图像应用不足，且固定高掩码策略限制了条件互信息上限并引入较大梯度噪声。
AI.method: 通过病变掩码块选择策略获取更多病变表征信息，并采用自适应掩码策略提升互信息学习效率。
AI.result: 在BUSI、Hecktor和Brats2018三个医学图像分割数据集上显著优于现有自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: MPS-AMS方法通过优化掩码策略有效提升了医学图像分割的自监督学习性能。

search_text: MPS-AMS: Masked Patches Selection and Adaptive Masking Strategy Based Self-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation MPS-AMS：基于自监督医学图像分割的掩模斑块选择和自适应掩模策略 Existing self-supervised learning methods based on contrastive learning and masked image modeling have demonstrated impressive performances. However, current masked image modeling methods are mainly utilized in natural images, and their applications in medical images are relatively lacking. Besides, their fixed high masking strategy limits the upper bound of conditional mutual information, and the gradient noise is considerable, making less the learned representation information. Motivated by these limitations, in this paper, we propose masked patches selection and adaptive masking strategy based self-supervised medical image segmentation method, named MPS-AMS. We leverage the masked patches selection strategy to choose masked patches with lesions to obtain more lesion representation information, and the adaptive masking strategy is utilized to help learn more mutual information and improve performance further. Extensive experiments on three public medical image segmentation datasets (BUSI, Hecktor, and Brats2018) show that our proposed method greatly outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised baselines. 现有的基于对比学习和掩模图像建模的自监督学习方法已经表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，目前的掩模图像建模方法主要应用于自然图像，在医学图像中的应用相对缺乏。此外，其固定的高掩蔽策略限制了条件互信息的上限，并且梯度噪声相当大，使得学习到的表示信息较少。受这些限制的启发，在本文中，我们提出了基于掩模斑块选择和自适应掩模策略的自监督医学图像分割方法，称为MPS-AMS。我们利用屏蔽斑块选择策略来选择具有病变的屏蔽斑块以获得更多的病变表示信息，并利用自适应屏蔽策略来帮助学习更多的互信息并进一步提高性能。对三个公共医学图像分割数据集（BUSI、Hecktor 和 Brats2018）的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法大大优于最先进的自监督基线。 本文提出了一种基于掩码块选择和自适应掩码策略的自监督医学图像分割方法MPS-AMS。 Xiangtao Wang,Ruizhi Wang,Biao Tian,Jiaojiao Zhang,Shuo Zhang,Junyang Chen,Thomas Lukasiewicz,Zhenghua Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Hankyul Koh,Joon-hyuk Ko,Wonho Jhe
title: Moderate Adaptive Linear Units (MoLU)
title_zh: 中等自适应线性单元 (MoLU)
abstract: We propose the Moderate Adaptive Linear Unit (MoLU), a novel activation function for deep neural networks, defined analytically as: f(x)=x \times (1+tanh(x))/2. MoLU combines mathematical elegance with empirical effectiveness, exhibiting superior performance in terms of prediction accuracy, convergence speed, and computational efficiency. Due to its C-infinity smoothness, i.e. infinite differentiability and analyticity, MoLU is expected to mitigate issues such as vanishing or exploding gradients, making it suitable for a broad range of architectures and applications, including large language models (LLMs), Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Empirical evaluations show that MoLU consistently achieves faster convergence and improved final accuracy relative to widely used activation functions such as GeLU, SiLU, and Mish. These properties position MoLU as a promising and robust candidate for general-purpose activation across diverse deep learning paradigms.
summary: We propose the Moderate Adaptive Linear Unit (MoLU), a novel activation function for deep neural networks, defined analytically as: f(x)=x \times (1+tanh(x))/2. MoLU combines mathematical elegance with empirical effectiveness, exhibiting superior performance in terms of prediction accuracy, convergence speed, and computational efficiency. Due to its C-infinity smoothness, i.e. infinite differentiability and analyticity, MoLU is expected to mitigate issues such as vanishing or exploding gradients, making it suitable for a broad range of architectures and applications, including large language models (LLMs), Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Empirical evaluations show that MoLU consistently achieves faster convergence and improved final accuracy relative to widely used activation functions such as GeLU, SiLU, and Mish. These properties position MoLU as a promising and robust candidate for general-purpose activation across diverse deep learning paradigms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了中等自适应线性单元（MoLU），一种用于深度神经网络的新型激活函数，分析定义为：f(x)=x \times (1+tanh(x))/2。 MoLU 将数学的优雅与经验的有效性相结合，在预测精度、收敛速度和计算效率方面表现出卓越的性能。由于其 C 无穷平滑性，即无限可微性和分析性，MoLU 有望缓解梯度消失或爆炸等问题，使其适用于广泛的架构和应用，包括大型语言模型 (LLM)、神经常微分方程 (神经 ODE)、物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)。实证评估表明，相对于广泛使用的激活函数（例如 GeLU、SiLU 和 Mish），MoLU 始终能够实现更快的收敛并提高最终精度。这些特性使 MoLU 成为跨不同深度学习范式的通用激活的有前途且强大的候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型激活函数Moderate Adaptive Linear Unit (MoLU)，用于改进深度神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 为解决深度学习中梯度消失/爆炸问题，并提升模型在不同架构中的收敛速度与准确性。
AI.method: 定义MoLU为f(x)=x×(1+tanh(x))/2，利用其C-infinity平滑特性，并在多种模型（如LLM、Neural ODEs等）中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoLU在收敛速度和最终精度上优于GeLU、SiLU和Mish等主流激活函数。
AI.conclusion: MoLU凭借数学特性与实证效果，成为跨领域深度学习任务的通用激活函数候选方案。

authors_text: Piotr Kicki,Amadeusz Szymko,Krzysztof Walas
title: DLOFTBs -- Fast Tracking of Deformable Linear Objects with B-splines
title_zh: DLOBTBs——使用 B 样条曲线快速跟踪可变形线性物体
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: While manipulating rigid objects is an extensively explored research topic, deformable linear object (DLO) manipulation seems significantly underdeveloped. A potential reason for this is the inherent difficulty in describing and observing the state of the DLO as its geometry changes during manipulation. This paper proposes an algorithm for fast-tracking the shape of a DLO based on the masked image. Having no prior knowledge about the tracked object, the proposed method finds a reliable representation of the shape of the tracked object within tens of milliseconds. This algorithm's main idea is to first skeletonize the DLO mask image, walk through the parts of the DLO skeleton, arrange the segments into an ordered path, and finally fit a B-spline into it. Experiments show that our solution outperforms the State-of-the-Art approaches in DLO's shape reconstruction accuracy and algorithm running time and can handle challenging scenarios such as severe occlusions, self-intersections, and multiple DLOs in a single image.
summary: While manipulating rigid objects is an extensively explored research topic, deformable linear object (DLO) manipulation seems significantly underdeveloped. A potential reason for this is the inherent difficulty in describing and observing the state of the DLO as its geometry changes during manipulation. This paper proposes an algorithm for fast-tracking the shape of a DLO based on the masked image. Having no prior knowledge about the tracked object, the proposed method finds a reliable representation of the shape of the tracked object within tens of milliseconds. This algorithm's main idea is to first skeletonize the DLO mask image, walk through the parts of the DLO skeleton, arrange the segments into an ordered path, and finally fit a B-spline into it. Experiments show that our solution outperforms the State-of-the-Art approaches in DLO's shape reconstruction accuracy and algorithm running time and can handle challenging scenarios such as severe occlusions, self-intersections, and multiple DLOs in a single image.
abstract_zh: 虽然操纵刚性物体是一个广泛探索的研究主题，但可变形线性物体 (DLO) 操纵似乎明显不发达。造成这种情况的一个潜在原因是，当 DLO 的几何形状在操作过程中发生变化时，描述和观察 DLO 的状态存在固有的困难。本文提出了一种基于掩模图像快速跟踪 DLO 形状的算法。在没有关于被跟踪对象的先验知识的情况下，所提出的方法可以在数十毫秒内找到被跟踪对象形状的可靠表示。该算法的主要思想是首先对 DLO 掩模图像进行骨架化，遍历 DLO 骨架的各个部分，将各个片段排列成有序路径，最后将 B 样条拟合到其中。实验表明，我们的解决方案在 DLO 的形状重建精度和算法运行时间方面优于最先进的方法，并且可以处理具有挑战性的场景，例如严重遮挡、自相交和单个图像中的多个 DLO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于B样条的可变形线性物体（DLO）快速跟踪算法，通过掩码图像实现无需先验知识的形状重建。
AI.motivation: 可变形线性物体（DLO）操作研究不足，因其几何形状在操作过程中变化复杂，难以准确描述和观测。
AI.method: 算法通过骨架化DLO掩码图像、遍历骨架段并排序为有序路径，最终拟合B样条曲线实现形状跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在形状重建精度和运行时间上优于现有技术，可处理严重遮挡、自相交及单图像多DLO等复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为DLO操作提供了高效且鲁棒的形状跟踪解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Albert H. Li,Preston Culbertson,Joel W. Burdick,Aaron D. Ames
title: FRoGGeR: Fast Robust Grasp Generation via the Min-Weight Metric
title_zh: FRoGGeR：通过最小权重度量快速生成强大的抓取
comment: Accepted at IROS 2023. The arXiv version contains the appendix, which does not appear in the conference version
comments: Accepted at IROS 2023. The arXiv version contains the appendix, which does not appear in the conference version
abstract: Many approaches to grasp synthesis optimize analytic quality metrics that measure grasp robustness based on finger placements and local surface geometry. However, generating feasible dexterous grasps by optimizing these metrics is slow, often taking minutes. To address this issue, this paper presents FRoGGeR: a method that quickly generates robust precision grasps using the min-weight metric, a novel, almost-everywhere differentiable approximation of the classical epsilon grasp metric. The min-weight metric is simple and interpretable, provides a reasonable measure of grasp robustness, and admits numerically efficient gradients for smooth optimization. We leverage these properties to rapidly synthesize collision-free robust grasps - typically in less than a second. FRoGGeR can refine the candidate grasps generated by other methods (heuristic, data-driven, etc.) and is compatible with many object representations (SDFs, meshes, etc.). We study FRoGGeR's performance on over 40 objects drawn from the YCB dataset, outperforming a competitive baseline in computation time, feasibility rate of grasp synthesis, and picking success in simulation. We conclude that FRoGGeR is fast: it has a median synthesis time of 0.834s over hundreds of experiments.
summary: Many approaches to grasp synthesis optimize analytic quality metrics that measure grasp robustness based on finger placements and local surface geometry. However, generating feasible dexterous grasps by optimizing these metrics is slow, often taking minutes. To address this issue, this paper presents FRoGGeR: a method that quickly generates robust precision grasps using the min-weight metric, a novel, almost-everywhere differentiable approximation of the classical epsilon grasp metric. The min-weight metric is simple and interpretable, provides a reasonable measure of grasp robustness, and admits numerically efficient gradients for smooth optimization. We leverage these properties to rapidly synthesize collision-free robust grasps - typically in less than a second. FRoGGeR can refine the candidate grasps generated by other methods (heuristic, data-driven, etc.) and is compatible with many object representations (SDFs, meshes, etc.). We study FRoGGeR's performance on over 40 objects drawn from the YCB dataset, outperforming a competitive baseline in computation time, feasibility rate of grasp synthesis, and picking success in simulation. We conclude that FRoGGeR is fast: it has a median synthesis time of 0.834s over hundreds of experiments.
abstract_zh: 许多抓取合成方法都优化了分析质量指标，这些指标根据手指放置和局部表面几何形状来衡量抓取的鲁棒性。然而，通过优化这些指标来生成可行的灵巧抓握速度很慢，通常需要几分钟的时间。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 FRoGGeR：一种使用最小权重度量快速生成鲁棒精度抓取的方法，这是经典 epsilon 抓取度量的一种新颖的、几乎处处可微的近似。最小权重度量简单且可解释，提供了抓取鲁棒性的合理度量，并允许数值有效的梯度以实现平滑优化。我们利用这些特性来快速合成无碰撞的稳健抓握——通常不到一秒。 FRoGGeR 可以细化由其他方法（启发式、数据驱动等）生成的候选抓取，并且与许多对象表示（SDF、网格等）兼容。我们研究了 FRoGGeR 在从 YCB 数据集中提取的 40 多个对象上的性能，在计算时间、抓取合成的可行性率以及模拟成功率方面优于竞争基线。我们得出的结论是 FRoGGeR 很快：在数百次实验中，它的中位合成时间为 0.834 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FRoGGeR方法，通过最小权重度量快速生成稳健的精密抓取。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取生成方法优化分析质量指标时速度慢，通常需要数分钟。
AI.method: 利用几乎处处可微的最小权重度量（min-weight metric）替代传统epsilon抓取度量，结合高效梯度计算实现快速优化。
AI.result: 在YCB数据集40个物体上测试，合成时间中位数为0.834秒，优于基线方法，在可行性率和模拟抓取成功率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: FRoGGeR是一种快速生成无碰撞稳健抓取的高效方法，适用于多种物体表示形式。

authors_text: Ali Al-Kaswan,Maliheh Izadi
title: The (ab)use of Open Source Code to Train Large Language Models
title_zh: （滥用）使用开源代码来训练大型语言模型
abstract: In recent years, Large Language Models (LLMs) have gained significant popularity due to their ability to generate human-like text and their potential applications in various fields, such as Software Engineering. LLMs for Code are commonly trained on large unsanitized corpora of source code scraped from the Internet. The content of these datasets is memorized and emitted by the models, often in a verbatim manner. In this work, we will discuss the security, privacy, and licensing implications of memorization. We argue why the use of copyleft code to train LLMs is a legal and ethical dilemma. Finally, we provide four actionable recommendations to address this issue.
summary: In recent years, Large Language Models (LLMs) have gained significant popularity due to their ability to generate human-like text and their potential applications in various fields, such as Software Engineering. LLMs for Code are commonly trained on large unsanitized corpora of source code scraped from the Internet. The content of these datasets is memorized and emitted by the models, often in a verbatim manner. In this work, we will discuss the security, privacy, and licensing implications of memorization. We argue why the use of copyleft code to train LLMs is a legal and ethical dilemma. Finally, we provide four actionable recommendations to address this issue.
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）因其生成类人文本的能力及其在软件工程等各个领域的潜在应用而受到广泛欢迎。代码法学硕士通常是在从互联网上抓取的未经清理的大型源代码语料库上进行培训的。这些数据集的内容通常由模型逐字记录和发出。在这项工作中，我们将讨论记忆的安全、隐私和许可影响。我们争论为什么使用 Copyleft 代码来培训法学硕士会造成法律和道德困境。最后，我们提供了四项可行的建议来解决这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用开源代码训练大型语言模型（LLMs）所带来的安全、隐私和许可问题，特别是对copyleft代码的法律和伦理困境进行分析，并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs在代码生成等领域的广泛应用，其训练数据中可能包含大量未清洗的开源代码，导致模型记忆并输出原始代码，引发版权、隐私及安全风险。
AI.method: 通过分析现有LLMs的训练数据来源及代码记忆机制，结合开源许可协议（如copyleft）的法律条款，讨论其在模型训练中的适用性与潜在冲突。
AI.result: 揭示了使用copyleft代码训练LLMs可能违反许可协议的法律风险，提出四条可操作性建议以缓解此类问题。
AI.conclusion: 使用开源代码训练LLMs需谨慎处理版权与伦理问题，需通过技术手段与政策调整降低法律风险，保障开发者权益。

authors_text: Brendan O'Connor,Simon Dixon
title: A Comparative Analysis Of Latent Regressor Losses For Singing Voice Conversion
title_zh: 歌声转换的潜在回归器损失的比较分析
comment: Submitted to the Sound and Music Computing Conference 2023
comments: Submitted to the Sound and Music Computing Conference 2023
abstract: Previous research has shown that established techniques for spoken voice conversion (VC) do not perform as well when applied to singing voice conversion (SVC). We propose an alternative loss component in a loss function that is otherwise well-established among VC tasks, which has been shown to improve our model's SVC performance. We first trained a singer identity embedding (SIE) network on mel-spectrograms of singer recordings to produce singer-specific variance encodings using contrastive learning. We subsequently trained a well-known autoencoder framework (AutoVC) conditioned on these SIEs, and measured differences in SVC performance when using different latent regressor loss components. We found that using this loss w.r.t. SIEs leads to better performance than w.r.t. bottleneck embeddings, where converted audio is more natural and specific towards target singers. The inclusion of this loss component has the advantage of explicitly forcing the network to reconstruct with timbral similarity, and also negates the effect of poor disentanglement in AutoVC's bottleneck embeddings. We demonstrate peculiar diversity between computational and human evaluations on singer-converted audio clips, which highlights the necessity of both. We also propose a pitch-matching mechanism between source and target singers to ensure these evaluations are not influenced by differences in pitch register.
summary: Previous research has shown that established techniques for spoken voice conversion (VC) do not perform as well when applied to singing voice conversion (SVC). We propose an alternative loss component in a loss function that is otherwise well-established among VC tasks, which has been shown to improve our model's SVC performance. We first trained a singer identity embedding (SIE) network on mel-spectrograms of singer recordings to produce singer-specific variance encodings using contrastive learning. We subsequently trained a well-known autoencoder framework (AutoVC) conditioned on these SIEs, and measured differences in SVC performance when using different latent regressor loss components. We found that using this loss w.r.t. SIEs leads to better performance than w.r.t. bottleneck embeddings, where converted audio is more natural and specific towards target singers. The inclusion of this loss component has the advantage of explicitly forcing the network to reconstruct with timbral similarity, and also negates the effect of poor disentanglement in AutoVC's bottleneck embeddings. We demonstrate peculiar diversity between computational and human evaluations on singer-converted audio clips, which highlights the necessity of both. We also propose a pitch-matching mechanism between source and target singers to ensure these evaluations are not influenced by differences in pitch register.
abstract_zh: 先前的研究表明，现有的口语语音转换 (VC) 技术在应用于歌声转换 (SVC) 时效果不佳。我们在损失函数中提出了一种替代损失组件，该组件在 VC 任务中已经得到了广泛应用，已被证明可以提高我们模型的 SVC 性能。我们首先在歌手录音的梅尔谱图上训练歌手身份嵌入（SIE）网络，以使用对比学习生成歌手特定的方差编码。随后，我们以这些 SIE 为条件训练了一个著名的自动编码器框架 (AutoVC)，并测量了使用不同潜在回归损失分量时 SVC 性能的差异。我们发现使用这个损失 w.r.t. SIE 比 w.r.t. 带来更好的性能。瓶颈嵌入，转换后的音频对于目标歌手来说更加自然和具体。包含此损失组件的优点是明确强制网络以音色相似性进行重建，并且还消除了 AutoVC 瓶颈嵌入中不良解缠结的影响。我们展示了对歌手转换的音频剪辑的计算评估和人类评估之间的独特多样性，这凸显了两者的必要性。我们还提出了源歌手和目标歌手之间的音高匹配机制，以确保这些评估不会受到音高差异的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的损失函数组件，用于提升歌唱语音转换（SVC）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换（VC）技术在应用于歌唱语音转换（SVC）时效果不佳，因此需要一种新的损失函数组件来提高SVC性能。
AI.method: 作者首先使用对比学习训练了一个歌手身份嵌入（SIE）网络，以生成歌手特定的方差编码。然后基于这些SIEs训练了一个知名自编码器框架（AutoVC），并测试了不同潜在回归损失组件对SVC性能的影响。
AI.result: 使用基于SIEs的损失组件比使用瓶颈嵌入的损失组件在SVC任务中表现更好，转换的音频更自然且更贴近目标歌手。同时，还提出了一种音高匹配机制，以确保评估不受音高范围差异的影响。
AI.conclusion: 引入基于SIEs的损失组件可以提升SVC性能，并且需要结合计算评估和人工评估来全面衡量结果。

ai_content_json.result: 使用基于SIEs的损失组件比使用瓶颈嵌入的损失组件在SVC任务中表现更好，转换的音频更自然且更贴近目标歌手。同时，还提出了一种音高匹配机制，以确保评估不受音高范围差异的影响。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 引入基于SIEs的损失组件可以提升SVC性能，并且需要结合计算评估和人工评估来全面衡量结果。

tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的损失函数组件，用于提升歌唱语音转换（SVC）的性能。
motivation: 传统语音转换（VC）技术在应用于歌唱语音转换（SVC）时效果不佳，因此需要一种新的损失函数组件来提高SVC性能。
method: 作者首先使用对比学习训练了一个歌手身份嵌入（SIE）网络，以生成歌手特定的方差编码。然后基于这些SIEs训练了一个知名自编码器框架（AutoVC），并测试了不同潜在回归损失组件对SVC性能的影响。
result: 使用基于SIEs的损失组件比使用瓶颈嵌入的损失组件在SVC任务中表现更好，转换的音频更自然且更贴近目标歌手。同时，还提出了一种音高匹配机制，以确保评估不受音高范围差异的影响。
conclusion: 引入基于SIEs的损失组件可以提升SVC性能，并且需要结合计算评估和人工评估来全面衡量结果。
search_text: A Comparative Analysis Of Latent Regressor Losses For Singing Voice Conversion 歌声转换的潜在回归器损失的比较分析 Previous research has shown that established techniques for spoken voice conversion (VC) do not perform as well when applied to singing voice conversion (SVC). We propose an alternative loss component in a loss function that is otherwise well-established among VC tasks, which has been shown to improve our model's SVC performance. We first trained a singer identity embedding (SIE) network on mel-spectrograms of singer recordings to produce singer-specific variance encodings using contrastive learning. We subsequently trained a well-known autoencoder framework (AutoVC) conditioned on these SIEs, and measured differences in SVC performance when using different latent regressor loss components. We found that using this loss w.r.t. SIEs leads to better performance than w.r.t. bottleneck embeddings, where converted audio is more natural and specific towards target singers. The inclusion of this loss component has the advantage of explicitly forcing the network to reconstruct with timbral similarity, and also negates the effect of poor disentanglement in AutoVC's bottleneck embeddings. We demonstrate peculiar diversity between computational and human evaluations on singer-converted audio clips, which highlights the necessity of both. We also propose a pitch-matching mechanism between source and target singers to ensure these evaluations are not influenced by differences in pitch register. 先前的研究表明，现有的口语语音转换 (VC) 技术在应用于歌声转换 (SVC) 时效果不佳。我们在损失函数中提出了一种替代损失组件，该组件在 VC 任务中已经得到了广泛应用，已被证明可以提高我们模型的 SVC 性能。我们首先在歌手录音的梅尔谱图上训练歌手身份嵌入（SIE）网络，以使用对比学习生成歌手特定的方差编码。随后，我们以这些 SIE 为条件训练了一个著名的自动编码器框架 (AutoVC)，并测量了使用不同潜在回归损失分量时 SVC 性能的差异。我们发现使用这个损失 w.r.t. SIE 比 w.r.t. 带来更好的性能。瓶颈嵌入，转换后的音频对于目标歌手来说更加自然和具体。包含此损失组件的优点是明确强制网络以音色相似性进行重建，并且还消除了 AutoVC 瓶颈嵌入中不良解缠结的影响。我们展示了对歌手转换的音频剪辑的计算评估和人类评估之间的独特多样性，这凸显了两者的必要性。我们还提出了源歌手和目标歌手之间的音高匹配机制，以确保这些评估不会受到音高差异的影响。 本文提出了一种改进的损失函数组件，用于提升歌唱语音转换（SVC）的性能。 Brendan O'Connor,Simon Dixon cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Junbin Xiao,Pan Zhou,Angela Yao,Yicong Li,Richang Hong,Shuicheng Yan,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Contrastive Video Question Answering via Video Graph Transformer
title_zh: 通过 Video Graph Transformer 进行对比视频问答
abstract: We propose to perform video question answering (VideoQA) in a Contrastive manner via a Video Graph Transformer model (CoVGT). CoVGT's uniqueness and superiority are three-fold: 1) It proposes a dynamic graph transformer module which encodes video by explicitly capturing the visual objects, their relations and dynamics, for complex spatio-temporal reasoning. 2) It designs separate video and text transformers for contrastive learning between the video and text to perform QA, instead of multi-modal transformer for answer classification. Fine-grained video-text communication is done by additional cross-modal interaction modules. 3) It is optimized by the joint fully- and self-supervised contrastive objectives between the correct and incorrect answers, as well as the relevant and irrelevant questions respectively. With superior video encoding and QA solution, we show that CoVGT can achieve much better performances than previous arts on video reasoning tasks. Its performances even surpass those models that are pretrained with millions of external data. We further show that CoVGT can also benefit from cross-modal pretraining, yet with orders of magnitude smaller data. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of CoVGT, and additionally reveal its potential for more data-efficient pretraining. We hope our success can advance VideoQA beyond coarse recognition/description towards fine-grained relation reasoning of video contents. Our code is available at https://github.com/doc-doc/CoVGT.
summary: We propose to perform video question answering (VideoQA) in a Contrastive manner via a Video Graph Transformer model (CoVGT). CoVGT's uniqueness and superiority are three-fold: 1) It proposes a dynamic graph transformer module which encodes video by explicitly capturing the visual objects, their relations and dynamics, for complex spatio-temporal reasoning. 2) It designs separate video and text transformers for contrastive learning between the video and text to perform QA, instead of multi-modal transformer for answer classification. Fine-grained video-text communication is done by additional cross-modal interaction modules. 3) It is optimized by the joint fully- and self-supervised contrastive objectives between the correct and incorrect answers, as well as the relevant and irrelevant questions respectively. With superior video encoding and QA solution, we show that CoVGT can achieve much better performances than previous arts on video reasoning tasks. Its performances even surpass those models that are pretrained with millions of external data. We further show that CoVGT can also benefit from cross-modal pretraining, yet with orders of magnitude smaller data. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of CoVGT, and additionally reveal its potential for more data-efficient pretraining. We hope our success can advance VideoQA beyond coarse recognition/description towards fine-grained relation reasoning of video contents. Our code is available at https://github.com/doc-doc/CoVGT.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过视频图转换器模型（CoVGT）以对比方式执行视频问答（VideoQA）。 CoVGT 的独特性和优越性有三个方面：1）它提出了一种动态图转换器模块，通过显式捕获视觉对象、它们的关系和动态来对视频进行编码，以进行复杂的时空推理。 2）它设计了单独的视频和文本转换器，用于视频和文本之间的对比学习以执行质量保证，而不是用于答案分类的多模态转换器。细粒度的视频文本通信是通过额外的跨模态交互模块来完成的。 3）通过正确答案和错误答案以及相关问题和不相关问题之间的联合全监督和自监督对比目标进行优化。凭借卓越的视频编码和 QA 解决方案，我们表明 CoVGT 在视频推理任务上可以取得比以前的技术更好的性能。它的性能甚至超过了那些使用数百万外部数据进行预训练的模型。我们进一步表明，CoVGT 也可以从跨模式预训练中受益，但数据要小几个数量级。结果证明了 CoVGT 的有效性和优越性，并进一步揭示了其数据效率更高的预训练的潜力。我们希望我们的成功能够推动 VideoQA 超越粗略的识别/描述，转向视频内容的细粒度关系推理。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/doc-doc/CoVGT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视频图变换器的对比视频问答方法CoVGT，通过动态图结构和对比学习提升视频内容的细粒度关系推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法在处理复杂时空推理和细粒度关系时表现不足，且依赖大量外部数据预训练，缺乏数据效率。
AI.method: 设计动态图变换器模块捕捉视频对象及其动态关系，采用分离的视频与文本变换器进行对比学习，并通过跨模态交互模块实现细粒度通信，结合全监督与自监督对比目标联合优化。
AI.result: CoVGT在视频推理任务中超越现有方法，甚至优于使用数百万外部数据预训练的模型，且在跨模态预训练中实现数量级更小的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: CoVGT通过对比学习与动态图结构有效提升视频问答性能，为细粒度关系推理和数据高效预训练提供新方向。

authors_text: Dekai Sun,Yancheng He,Jiqing Han
title: Using Auxiliary Tasks In Multimodal Fusion Of Wav2vec 2.0 And BERT For Multimodal Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 使用 Wav2vec 2.0 和 BERT 多模态融合中的辅助任务进行多模态情感识别
abstract: The lack of data and the difficulty of multimodal fusion have always been challenges for multimodal emotion recognition (MER). In this paper, we propose to use pretrained models as upstream network, wav2vec 2.0 for audio modality and BERT for text modality, and finetune them in downstream task of MER to cope with the lack of data. For the difficulty of multimodal fusion, we use a K-layer multi-head attention mechanism as a downstream fusion module. Starting from the MER task itself, we design two auxiliary tasks to alleviate the insufficient fusion between modalities and guide the network to capture and align emotion-related features. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art models, we achieve a better performance by 78.42% Weighted Accuracy (WA) and 79.71% Unweighted Accuracy (UA) on the IEMOCAP dataset.
summary: The lack of data and the difficulty of multimodal fusion have always been challenges for multimodal emotion recognition (MER). In this paper, we propose to use pretrained models as upstream network, wav2vec 2.0 for audio modality and BERT for text modality, and finetune them in downstream task of MER to cope with the lack of data. For the difficulty of multimodal fusion, we use a K-layer multi-head attention mechanism as a downstream fusion module. Starting from the MER task itself, we design two auxiliary tasks to alleviate the insufficient fusion between modalities and guide the network to capture and align emotion-related features. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art models, we achieve a better performance by 78.42% Weighted Accuracy (WA) and 79.71% Unweighted Accuracy (UA) on the IEMOCAP dataset.
abstract_zh: 数据的缺乏和多模态融合的困难一直是多模态情感识别（MER）面临的挑战。在本文中，我们建议使用预训练模型作为上游网络，使用 wav2vec 2.0 作为音频模态，使用 BERT 作为文本模态，并在 MER 的下游任务中对它们进行微调以应对数据缺乏的情况。针对多模态融合的困难，我们使用K层多头注意力机制作为下游融合模块。从MER任务本身开始，我们设计了两个辅助任务来缓解模态之间融合不足的问题，并指导网络捕获和对齐情感相关特征。与之前最先进的模型相比，我们在 IEMOCAP 数据集上获得了 78.42% 的加权准确度（WA）和 79.71% 的未加权准确度（UA）的更好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合预训练模型Wav2vec 2.0和BERT，并设计辅助任务以提升多模态情绪识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态情绪识别面临数据不足和模态融合困难的问题，需通过预训练模型和辅助任务优化特征对齐与融合。
AI.method: 采用Wav2vec 2.0处理音频、BERT处理文本作为上游网络，微调后通过K层多头注意力机制融合模态，并设计两个辅助任务增强跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上达到78.42%加权准确率(WA)和79.71%非加权准确率(UA)，优于现有最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: 辅助任务与多头注意力融合有效缓解模态间信息不足问题，为多模态情绪识别提供新方法。

search_text: Using Auxiliary Tasks In Multimodal Fusion Of Wav2vec 2.0 And BERT For Multimodal Emotion Recognition 使用 Wav2vec 2.0 和 BERT 多模态融合中的辅助任务进行多模态情感识别 The lack of data and the difficulty of multimodal fusion have always been challenges for multimodal emotion recognition (MER). In this paper, we propose to use pretrained models as upstream network, wav2vec 2.0 for audio modality and BERT for text modality, and finetune them in downstream task of MER to cope with the lack of data. For the difficulty of multimodal fusion, we use a K-layer multi-head attention mechanism as a downstream fusion module. Starting from the MER task itself, we design two auxiliary tasks to alleviate the insufficient fusion between modalities and guide the network to capture and align emotion-related features. Compared to the previous state-of-the-art models, we achieve a better performance by 78.42% Weighted Accuracy (WA) and 79.71% Unweighted Accuracy (UA) on the IEMOCAP dataset. 数据的缺乏和多模态融合的困难一直是多模态情感识别（MER）面临的挑战。在本文中，我们建议使用预训练模型作为上游网络，使用 wav2vec 2.0 作为音频模态，使用 BERT 作为文本模态，并在 MER 的下游任务中对它们进行微调以应对数据缺乏的情况。针对多模态融合的困难，我们使用K层多头注意力机制作为下游融合模块。从MER任务本身开始，我们设计了两个辅助任务来缓解模态之间融合不足的问题，并指导网络捕获和对齐情感相关特征。与之前最先进的模型相比，我们在 IEMOCAP 数据集上获得了 78.42% 的加权准确度（WA）和 79.71% 的未加权准确度（UA）的更好性能。 本文提出结合预训练模型Wav2vec 2.0和BERT，并设计辅助任务以提升多模态情绪识别的性能。 Dekai Sun,Yancheng He,Jiqing Han cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Benjamin Lee,Arvind Satyanarayan,Maxime Cordeil,Arnaud Prouzeau,Bernhard Jenny,Tim Dwyer
title: Deimos: A Grammar of Dynamic Embodied Immersive Visualisation Morphs and Transitions
title_zh: Deimos：动态体现沉浸式可视化变形和转换的语法
abstract: We present Deimos, a grammar for specifying dynamic embodied immersive visualisation morphs and transitions. A morph is a collection of animated transitions that are dynamically applied to immersive visualisations at runtime and is conceptually modelled as a state machine. It is comprised of state, transition, and signal specifications. States in a morph are used to generate animation keyframes, with transitions connecting two states together. A transition is controlled by signals, which are composable data streams that can be used to enable embodied interaction techniques. Morphs allow immersive representations of data to transform and change shape through user interaction, facilitating the embodied cognition process. We demonstrate the expressivity of Deimos in an example gallery and evaluate its usability in an expert user study of six immersive analytics researchers. Participants found the grammar to be powerful and expressive, and showed interest in drawing upon Deimos' concepts and ideas in their own research.
summary: We present Deimos, a grammar for specifying dynamic embodied immersive visualisation morphs and transitions. A morph is a collection of animated transitions that are dynamically applied to immersive visualisations at runtime and is conceptually modelled as a state machine. It is comprised of state, transition, and signal specifications. States in a morph are used to generate animation keyframes, with transitions connecting two states together. A transition is controlled by signals, which are composable data streams that can be used to enable embodied interaction techniques. Morphs allow immersive representations of data to transform and change shape through user interaction, facilitating the embodied cognition process. We demonstrate the expressivity of Deimos in an example gallery and evaluate its usability in an expert user study of six immersive analytics researchers. Participants found the grammar to be powerful and expressive, and showed interest in drawing upon Deimos' concepts and ideas in their own research.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Deimos，一种用于指定动态体现的沉浸式可视化变形和过渡的语法。变形是动画过渡的集合，它们在运行时动态应用于沉浸式可视化，并且在概念上建模为状态机。它由状态、转换和信号规范组成。变形中的状态用于生成动画关键帧，并通过过渡将两个状态连接在一起。转换由信号控制，信号是可组合的数据流，可用于实现具体的交互技术。变形允许数据的沉浸式表示通过用户交互来变换和改变形状，从而促进具体认知过程。我们在示例库中展示了 Deimos 的表现力，并在六名沉浸式分析研究人员的专家用户研究中评估了其可用性。参与者发现语法功能强大且富有表现力，并表现出在自己的研究中借鉴 Deimos 的概念和想法的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deimos语法，用于动态生成沉浸式可视化变形与过渡，通过状态机模型实现用户交互驱动的形态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有沉浸式可视化缺乏灵活的动态变形机制，难以支持具身交互与认知过程，需设计可编程的语法规范以增强交互表达力。
AI.method: 构建基于状态机的语法框架，包含状态（生成关键帧）、过渡（由信号驱动）和可组合信号流，通过用户研究验证语法有效性。
AI.result: 六名专家用户认为Deimos语法强大且表达力强，认可其在沉浸式数据分析中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: Deimos为动态沉浸式可视化提供了可编程的语法基础，有效支持具身认知交互，未来可拓展至更多可视化场景。
