authors_text: Dong Yang,Tomoki Koriyama,Yuki Saito,Takaaki Saeki,Detai Xin,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Duration-aware pause insertion using pre-trained language model for multi-speaker text-to-speech
title_zh: 使用预先训练的语言模型进行持续时间感知的暂停插入，以实现多说话者文本转语音
abstract: Pause insertion, also known as phrase break prediction and phrasing, is an essential part of TTS systems because proper pauses with natural duration significantly enhance the rhythm and intelligibility of synthetic speech. However, conventional phrasing models ignore various speakers' different styles of inserting silent pauses, which can degrade the performance of the model trained on a multi-speaker speech corpus. To this end, we propose more powerful pause insertion frameworks based on a pre-trained language model. Our approach uses bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT) pre-trained on a large-scale text corpus, injecting speaker embedding to capture various speaker characteristics. We also leverage duration-aware pause insertion for more natural multi-speaker TTS. We develop and evaluate two types of models. The first improves conventional phrasing models on the position prediction of respiratory pauses (RPs), i.e., silent pauses at word transitions without punctuation. It performs speaker-conditioned RP prediction considering contextual information and is used to demonstrate the effect of speaker information on the prediction. The second model is further designed for phoneme-based TTS models and performs duration-aware pause insertion, predicting both RPs and punctuation-indicated pauses (PIPs) that are categorized by duration. The evaluation results show that our models improve the precision and recall of pause insertion and the rhythm of synthetic speech.
summary: Pause insertion, also known as phrase break prediction and phrasing, is an essential part of TTS systems because proper pauses with natural duration significantly enhance the rhythm and intelligibility of synthetic speech. However, conventional phrasing models ignore various speakers' different styles of inserting silent pauses, which can degrade the performance of the model trained on a multi-speaker speech corpus. To this end, we propose more powerful pause insertion frameworks based on a pre-trained language model. Our approach uses bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT) pre-trained on a large-scale text corpus, injecting speaker embedding to capture various speaker characteristics. We also leverage duration-aware pause insertion for more natural multi-speaker TTS. We develop and evaluate two types of models. The first improves conventional phrasing models on the position prediction of respiratory pauses (RPs), i.e., silent pauses at word transitions without punctuation. It performs speaker-conditioned RP prediction considering contextual information and is used to demonstrate the effect of speaker information on the prediction. The second model is further designed for phoneme-based TTS models and performs duration-aware pause insertion, predicting both RPs and punctuation-indicated pauses (PIPs) that are categorized by duration. The evaluation results show that our models improve the precision and recall of pause insertion and the rhythm of synthetic speech.
abstract_zh: 停顿插入，也称为断词预测和措辞，是 TTS 系统的重要组成部分，因为具有自然持续时间的适当停顿可显着增强合成语音的节奏和清晰度。然而，传统的措辞模型忽略了不同说话者插入无声停顿的不同风格，这可能会降低在多说话者语音语料库上训练的模型的性能。为此，我们提出了基于预训练语言模型的更强大的停顿插入框架。我们的方法使用在大规模文本语料库上预训练的 Transformer (BERT) 的双向编码器表示，注入说话人嵌入来捕获各种说话人特征。我们还利用持续时间感知的暂停插入来实现更自然的多说话者 TTS。我们开发和评估两种类型的模型。第一个改进了呼吸停顿（RP）位置预测的传统措辞模型，即在没有标点符号的单词转换时的无声停顿。它考虑上下文信息执行说话人条件 RP 预测，并用于演示说话人信息对预测的影响。第二个模型进一步设计用于基于音素的 TTS 模型，并执行持续时间感知的暂停插入，预测按持续时间分类的 RP 和标点符号指示的暂停 (PIP)。评估结果表明，我们的模型提高了停顿插入和合成语音节奏的精确度和召回率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于预训练语言模型的多说话人文本到语音系统中时长感知的停顿插入方法，以提升合成语音的节奏感和可理解性。
AI.motivation: 传统分句模型忽视了不同说话人插入静默停顿时的风格差异，导致多说话人语料训练的模型性能下降。
AI.method: 采用BERT预训练模型注入说话人嵌入以捕捉特征，开发两种模型：1) 基于上下文信息的说话人条件呼吸停顿（RP）预测模型；2) 针对音素级TTS的时长感知停顿插入模型，同时预测RP和标点停顿（PIPs）。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在停顿插入精度、召回率及合成语音节奏方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合预训练语言模型与说话人特征，本文方法有效提升了多说话人TTS系统的停顿插入质量。

authors_text: Lucas Meijer
title: 3-Coloring in Time O(1.3217^n)
abstract: We propose a new algorithm for 3-coloring that runs in time O(1.3217^n). For this algorithm, we make use of the time O(1.3289^n) algorithm for 3-coloring by Beigel and Eppstein. They described a structure in all graphs, whose vertices could be colored relatively easily. In this paper, we improve upon this structure and present new ways to determine how the involved vertices reduce the runtime of the algorithm.
summary: We propose a new algorithm for 3-coloring that runs in time O(1.3217^n). For this algorithm, we make use of the time O(1.3289^n) algorithm for 3-coloring by Beigel and Eppstein. They described a structure in all graphs, whose vertices could be colored relatively easily. In this paper, we improve upon this structure and present new ways to determine how the involved vertices reduce the runtime of the algorithm.

search_text: 3-Coloring in Time O(1.3217^n) 3-着色时间 O(1.3217^n) We propose a new algorithm for 3-coloring that runs in time O(1.3217^n). For this algorithm, we make use of the time O(1.3289^n) algorithm for 3-coloring by Beigel and Eppstein. They described a structure in all graphs, whose vertices could be colored relatively easily. authors_text: Mehmet Cengiz,Matthew Forshaw,Amir Atapour-Abarghouei,Andrew Stephen McGough
title: Predicting the Performance of a Computing System with Deep Networks
title_zh: 使用深度网络预测计算系统的性能
abstract: Predicting the performance and energy consumption of computing hardware is critical for many modern applications. This will inform procurement decisions, deployment decisions, and autonomic scaling. Existing approaches to understanding the performance of hardware largely focus around benchmarking -- leveraging standardised workloads which seek to be representative of an end-user's needs. Two key challenges are present; benchmark workloads may not be representative of an end-user's workload, and benchmark scores are not easily obtained for all hardware. Within this paper, we demonstrate the potential to build Deep Learning models to predict benchmark scores for unseen hardware. We undertake our evaluation with the openly available SPEC 2017 benchmark results. We evaluate three different networks, one fully-connected network along with two Convolutional Neural Networks (one bespoke and one ResNet inspired) and demonstrate impressive $R^2$ scores of 0.96, 0.98 and 0.94 respectively.
summary: Predicting the performance and energy consumption of computing hardware is critical for many modern applications. This will inform procurement decisions, deployment decisions, and autonomic scaling. Existing approaches to understanding the performance of hardware largely focus around benchmarking -- leveraging standardised workloads which seek to be representative of an end-user's needs. Two key challenges are present; benchmark workloads may not be representative of an end-user's workload, and benchmark scores are not easily obtained for all hardware. Within this paper, we demonstrate the potential to build Deep Learning models to predict benchmark scores for unseen hardware. We undertake our evaluation with the openly available SPEC 2017 benchmark results. We evaluate three different networks, one fully-connected network along with two Convolutional Neural Networks (one bespoke and one ResNet inspired) and demonstrate impressive $R^2$ scores of 0.96, 0.98 and 0.94 respectively.
abstract_zh: 预测计算硬件的性能和能耗对于许多现代应用程序至关重要。这将为采购决策、部署决策和自主扩展提供信息。了解硬件性能的现有方法主要集中在基准测试上——利用标准化工作负载来代表最终用户的需求。目前存在两个关键挑战：基准测试工作负载可能无法代表最终用户的工作负载，并且不容易获得所有硬件的基准测试分数。在本文中，我们展示了构建深度学习模型来预测看不见的硬件的基准分数的潜力。我们使用公开的 SPEC 2017 基准测试结果进行评估。我们评估了三种不同的网络，一种是全连接网络，另一种是卷积神经网络（一种是定制的，一种是受 ResNet 启发的），并展示了令人印象深刻的 $R^2$ 分数，分别为 0.96、0.98 和 0.94。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度学习模型预测计算硬件的基准性能分数，以解决传统基准测试的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试存在工作负载代表性不足和硬件覆盖不全的问题，而深度学习模型可提供更灵活的预测方案。
AI.method: 基于公开的SPEC 2017数据集，构建三种深度网络模型（全连接网络、定制CNN和ResNet启发CNN）进行性能预测。
AI.result: 三种模型在测试中分别达到0.96、0.98和0.94的R²分数，显示出优异的预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法能有效预测硬件性能，为硬件采购和部署决策提供新工具，未来可探索更多网络结构优化。

authors_text: Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Conor Owens-Walton,Emily Laltoo,Christina P. Boyle,Yao-Liang Chen,Philip Cook,Corey McMillan,Chih-Chien Tsai,J-J Wang,Yih-Ru Wu,Ysbrand van der Werf,Paul M. Thompson
title: Curriculum Based Multi-Task Learning for Parkinson's Disease Detection
title_zh: 基于课程的多任务学习用于帕金森病检测
comment: Accepted for publication at the 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging, ISBI 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at the 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging, ISBI 2023
abstract: There is great interest in developing radiological classifiers for diagnosis, staging, and predictive modeling in progressive diseases such as Parkinson's disease (PD), a neurodegenerative disease that is difficult to detect in its early stages. Here we leverage severity-based meta-data on the stages of disease to define a curriculum for training a deep convolutional neural network (CNN). Typically, deep learning networks are trained by randomly selecting samples in each mini-batch. By contrast, curriculum learning is a training strategy that aims to boost classifier performance by starting with examples that are easier to classify. Here we define a curriculum to progressively increase the difficulty of the training data corresponding to the Hoehn and Yahr (H&Y) staging system for PD (total N=1,012; 653 PD patients, 359 controls; age range: 20.0-84.9 years). Even with our multi-task setting using pre-trained CNNs and transfer learning, PD classification based on T1-weighted (T1-w) MRI was challenging (ROC AUC: 0.59-0.65), but curriculum training boosted performance (by 3.9%) compared to our baseline model. Future work with multimodal imaging may further boost performance.
summary: There is great interest in developing radiological classifiers for diagnosis, staging, and predictive modeling in progressive diseases such as Parkinson's disease (PD), a neurodegenerative disease that is difficult to detect in its early stages. Here we leverage severity-based meta-data on the stages of disease to define a curriculum for training a deep convolutional neural network (CNN). Typically, deep learning networks are trained by randomly selecting samples in each mini-batch. By contrast, curriculum learning is a training strategy that aims to boost classifier performance by starting with examples that are easier to classify. Here we define a curriculum to progressively increase the difficulty of the training data corresponding to the Hoehn and Yahr (H&Y) staging system for PD (total N=1,012; 653 PD patients, 359 controls; age range: 20.0-84.9 years). Even with our multi-task setting using pre-trained CNNs and transfer learning, PD classification based on T1-weighted (T1-w) MRI was challenging (ROC AUC: 0.59-0.65), but curriculum training boosted performance (by 3.9%) compared to our baseline model. Future work with multimodal imaging may further boost performance.
abstract_zh: 人们对开发用于帕金森病（PD）等进行性疾病的诊断、分期和预测建模的放射学分类器非常感兴趣，帕金森病是一种在早期阶段难以检测的神经退行性疾病。在这里，我们利用疾病阶段基于严重程度的元数据来定义训练深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的课程。通常，深度学习网络是通过在每个小批量中随机选择样本来训练的。相比之下，课程学习是一种培训策略，旨在通过从更容易分类的示例开始来提高分类器的性能。在这里，我们定义了一个课程，逐步增加与 PD 的 Hoehn 和 Yahr (H&Y) 分期系统相对应的训练数据的难度（总 N=1,012；653 名 PD 患者，359 名对照；年龄范围：20.0-84.9 岁）。即使我们使用预先训练的 CNN 和迁移学习进行多任务设置，基于 T1 加权 (T1-w) MRI 的 PD 分类仍然具有挑战性（ROC AUC：0.59-0.65），但与我们的基线模型相比，课程训练提高了性能（提高了 3.9%）。未来的多模态成像工作可能会进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于课程的多任务学习方法，利用T1加权MRI数据检测帕金森病（PD），通过课程学习策略提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病早期检测困难，传统深度学习方法在PD分类上表现有限，需探索更有效的训练策略以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 基于Hoehn和Yahr分期系统设计课程学习框架，使用预训练CNN进行迁移学习，按疾病严重程度逐步增加训练数据难度。
AI.result: 课程学习使PD分类的ROC AUC提升3.9%（基线0.59-0.65），但性能仍有限，未来需结合多模态影像进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习策略有效提升模型性能，但PD检测仍需更多数据和多模态方法支持以实现临床实用化。

authors_text: Mohsen Raoufi,Pawel Romanczuk,Heiko Hamann
title: Estimation of continuous environments by robot swarms: Correlated networks and decision-making
title_zh: 机器人群对连续环境的估计：相关网络和决策
comment: \c{opyright} Accepted at IEEE/International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, 7 pages, 7 figures
comments: \c{opyright} Accepted at IEEE/International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, 7 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Collective decision-making is an essential capability of large-scale multi-robot systems to establish autonomy on the swarm level. A large portion of literature on collective decision-making in swarm robotics focuses on discrete decisions selecting from a limited number of options. Here we assign a decentralized robot system with the task of exploring an unbounded environment, finding consensus on the mean of a measurable environmental feature, and aggregating at areas where that value is measured (e.g., a contour line). A unique quality of this task is a causal loop between the robots' dynamic network topology and their decision-making. For example, the network's mean node degree influences time to convergence while the currently agreed-on mean value influences the swarm's aggregation location, hence, also the network structure as well as the precision error. We propose a control algorithm and study it in real-world robot swarm experiments in different environments. We show that our approach is effective and achieves higher precision than a control experiment. We anticipate applications, for example, in containing pollution with surface vehicles.

For example, the network's mean node degree influences time to convergence while the currently agreed-on mean value influences the swarm's aggregation location, hence, also the network structure as well as the precision error. We propose a control algorithm and study it in real-world robot swarm experiments in different environments. We show that our approach is effective and achieves higher precision than a control experiment. We anticipate applications, for example, in containing pollution with surface vehicles.
abstract_zh: 集体决策是大规模多机器人系统在群体层面建立自治的基本能力。关于群体机器人集体决策的大部分文献都关注从有限数量的选项中进行离散决策的选择。在这里，我们分配一个分散的机器人系统，其任务是探索无界环境，就可测量环境特征的平均值达成共识，并在测量该值的区域（例如等高线）进行聚合。这项任务的独特之处在于机器人的动态网络拓扑与其决策之间存在因果循环。例如，网络的平均节点度影响收敛时间，而当前商定的平均值影响群体的聚集位置，因此也影响网络结构以及精度误差。我们提出了一种控制算法，并在不同环境下的真实机器人群实验中对其进行了研究。我们证明了我们的方法是有效的，并且比对照实验实现了更高的精度。我们预计会有应用，例如，控制地面车辆的污染。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器人集群在连续环境中估计环境特征均值并实现聚集的任务，重点分析动态网络拓扑与决策间的因果循环关系。
AI.motivation: 现有群机器人决策研究多聚焦离散选项选择，而连续环境下的均值估计与动态网络交互机制尚未充分探索，需解决收敛速度与精度的平衡问题。
AI.method: 设计兼顾网络拓扑动态调整与决策反馈的分布式控制算法，通过真实机器人集群实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种环境中实现更高精度的均值估计与空间聚集，优于基准对照实验表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制算法有效解决了连续环境估计中的动态网络-决策耦合问题，为污染控制等应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Estimation of continuous environments by robot swarms: Correlated networks and decision-making 机器人群对连续环境的估计：相关网络和决策 Collective decision-making is an essential capability of large-scale multi-robot systems to establish autonomy on the swarm level. A large portion of literature on collective decision-making in swarm robotics focuses on discrete decisions selecting from a limited number of options. Here we assign a decentralized robot system with the task of exploring an unbounded environment, finding consensus on the mean of a measurable environmental feature, and aggregating at areas where that value is measured (e.g., a contour line). A unique quality of this task is a causal loop between the robots' dynamic network topology and their decision-making. For example, the network's mean node degree influences time to convergence while the currently agreed-on mean value influences the swarm's aggregation location, hence, also the network structure as well as the precision error. We propose a control algorithm and study it in real-world robot swarm experiments in different environments. We show that our approach is effective and achieves higher precision than a control experiment. authors_text: Nuo Chen,Hongguang Li,Junqing He,Yinan Bao,Xinshi Lin,Qi Yang,Jianfeng Liu,Ruyi Gan,Jiaxing Zhang,Baoyuan Wang,Jia Li
title: Orca: A Few-shot Benchmark for Chinese Conversational Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: Orca：中文会话机器阅读理解的小样本基准
abstract: The conversational machine reading comprehension (CMRC) task aims to answer questions in conversations, which has been a hot research topic in recent years because of its wide applications. However, existing CMRC benchmarks in which each conversation is assigned a static passage are inconsistent with real scenarios. Thus, model's comprehension ability towards real scenarios are hard to evaluate reasonably. To this end, we propose the first Chinese CMRC benchmark Orca and further provide zero-shot/few-shot settings to evaluate model's generalization ability towards diverse domains. We collect 831 hot-topic driven conversations with 4,742 turns in total. Each turn of a conversation is assigned with a response-related passage, aiming to evaluate model's comprehension ability more reasonably. The topics of conversations are collected from social media platform and cover 33 domains, trying to be consistent with real scenarios. Importantly, answers in Orca are all well-annotated natural responses rather than the specific spans or short phrase in previous datasets. Besides, we implement three strong baselines to tackle the challenge in Orca. The results indicate the great challenge of our CMRC benchmark. Our datatset and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/nuochenpku/Orca.
summary: The conversational machine reading comprehension (CMRC) task aims to answer questions in conversations, which has been a hot research topic in recent years because of its wide applications. However, existing CMRC benchmarks in which each conversation is assigned a static passage are inconsistent with real scenarios. Thus, model's comprehension ability towards real scenarios are hard to evaluate reasonably. To this end, we propose the first Chinese CMRC benchmark Orca and further provide zero-shot/few-shot settings to evaluate model's generalization ability towards diverse domains. We collect 831 hot-topic driven conversations with 4,742 turns in total. Each turn of a conversation is assigned with a response-related passage, aiming to evaluate model's comprehension ability more reasonably. The topics of conversations are collected from social media platform and cover 33 domains, trying to be consistent with real scenarios. Importantly, answers in Orca are all well-annotated natural responses rather than the specific spans or short phrase in previous datasets. Besides, we implement three strong baselines to tackle the challenge in Orca. The results indicate the great challenge of our CMRC benchmark. Our datatset and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/nuochenpku/Orca.
abstract_zh: 会话机器阅读理解（CMRC）任务旨在回答会话中的问题，由于其广泛的应用而成为近年来的研究热点。然而，现有的 CMRC 基准测试中每个对话都分配一个静态段落，这与实际场景不一致。因此，模型对真实场景的理解能力很难合理评估。为此，我们提出了第一个中国 CMRC 基准 Orca，并进一步提供零样本/少样本设置来评估模型对不同领域的泛化能力。我们收集了 831 个热点话题驱动的对话，总共 4,742 个回合。每轮对话都分配有一个与响应相关的段落，旨在更合理地评估模型的理解能力。对话话题均来自社交媒体平台，涵盖33个领域，力求与真实场景保持一致。重要的是，Orca 中的答案都是经过充分注释的自然响应，而不是以前数据集中的特定跨度或短语。此外，我们还实施了三个强大的基线来应对 Orca 的挑战。结果表明我们的 CMRC 基准面临巨大的挑战。我们的数据集和检查点可在 https://github.com/nuochenpku/Orca 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个中文对话式机器阅读理解基准测试集Orca，通过动态分配对话相关段落评估模型在真实场景下的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有CMRC基准使用静态段落与对话不一致，难以合理评估模型在真实场景中的表现，需构建更贴近实际的评估体系。
AI.method: 收集831个社交媒体话题驱动的对话（4742轮），每轮对话分配相关段落；覆盖33个领域，采用自然响应标注答案；实现三个强基线模型进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明Orca对模型的泛化能力提出重大挑战，基线模型表现不佳，验证了数据集的有效性与难度。
AI.conclusion: Orca为评估中文对话式阅读理解模型提供了更具挑战性的基准，其跨领域特性和自然响应标注有助于推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Anton Koval,Christoforos Kanellakis,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Evaluation of Lidar-based 3D SLAM algorithms in SubT environment
title_zh: SubT环境下基于激光雷达的3D SLAM算法评估
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, \c{opyright} 2022 the authors. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, \c{opyright} 2022 the authors. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
abstract: Autonomous navigation of robots in harsh and GPS denied subterranean (SubT) environments with lack of natural or poor illumination is a challenging task that fosters the development of algorithms for pose estimation and mapping. Inspired by the need for real-life deployment of autonomous robots in such environments, this article presents an experimental comparative study of 3D SLAM algorithms. The study focuses on state-of-the-art Lidar SLAM algorithms with open-source implementation that are i) lidar-only like BLAM, LOAM, A-LOAM, ISC-LOAM and hdl graph slam, or ii) lidar-inertial like LeGO-LOAM, Cartographer, LIO-mapping and LIO-SAM. The evaluation of the methods is performed based on a dataset collected from the Boston Dynamics Spot robot equipped with 3D lidar Velodyne Puck Lite and IMU Vectornav VN-100, during a mission in an underground tunnel. In the evaluation process poses and 3D tunnel reconstructions from SLAM algorithms are compared against each other to find methods with most solid performance in terms of pose accuracy and map quality.
summary: Autonomous navigation of robots in harsh and GPS denied subterranean (SubT) environments with lack of natural or poor illumination is a challenging task that fosters the development of algorithms for pose estimation and mapping. Inspired by the need for real-life deployment of autonomous robots in such environments, this article presents an experimental comparative study of 3D SLAM algorithms. The study focuses on state-of-the-art Lidar SLAM algorithms with open-source implementation that are i) lidar-only like BLAM, LOAM, A-LOAM, ISC-LOAM and hdl graph slam, or ii) lidar-inertial like LeGO-LOAM, Cartographer, LIO-mapping and LIO-SAM. The evaluation of the methods is performed based on a dataset collected from the Boston Dynamics Spot robot equipped with 3D lidar Velodyne Puck Lite and IMU Vectornav VN-100, during a mission in an underground tunnel. In the evaluation process poses and 3D tunnel reconstructions from SLAM algorithms are compared against each other to find methods with most solid performance in terms of pose accuracy and map quality.
abstract_zh: 在缺乏自然照明或较差照明的恶劣和 GPS 拒绝的地下 (SubT) 环境中，机器人的自主导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，这促进了姿态估计和映射算法的开发。受到在此类环境中实际部署自主机器人的需求的启发，本文提出了 3D SLAM 算法的实验比较研究。该研究重点关注具有开源实现的最先进的激光雷达 SLAM 算法，即 i) 仅激光雷达，如 BLAM、LOAM、A-LOAM、ISC-LOAM 和 hdl graph slam，或 ii) 激光雷达惯性，如 LeGO-LOAM、Cartographer、LIO-mapping 和 LIO-SAM。该方法的评估是基于波士顿动力 Spot 机器人在地下隧道执行任务期间收集的数据集进行的，该机器人配备 3D 激光雷达 Velodyne Puck Lite 和 IMU Vectornav VN-100。在评估过程中，将 SLAM 算法的位姿和 3D 隧道重建进行相互比较，以找到在位姿精度和地图质量方面性能最可靠的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文在地下隧道环境中对基于激光雷达的3D SLAM算法进行实验对比研究，评估其位姿估计和地图重建性能。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏GPS信号的地下等恶劣环境中，自主机器人导航面临挑战，需开发可靠的SLAM算法以支持实际部署。
AI.method: 使用波士顿动力Spot机器人搭载Velodyne Puck Lite激光雷达和IMU传感器采集数据，对比测试包括BLAM、LOAM、LeGO-LOAM等在内的lidar-only和lidar-inertial算法。
AI.result: 通过位姿和3D隧道重建结果对比，识别出在位姿精度和地图质量方面表现最稳定的算法。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果为地下等复杂环境下的SLAM算法选型提供了实证依据，验证了部分算法在恶劣条件下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Evaluation of Lidar-based 3D SLAM algorithms in SubT environment SubT环境下基于激光雷达的3D SLAM算法评估 Autonomous navigation of robots in harsh and GPS denied subterranean (SubT) environments with lack of natural or poor illumination is a challenging task that fosters the development of algorithms for pose estimation and mapping. Inspired by the need for real-life deployment of autonomous robots in such environments, this article presents an experimental comparative study of 3D SLAM algorithms. The study focuses on state-of-the-art Lidar SLAM algorithms with open-source implementation that are i) lidar-only like BLAM, LOAM, A-LOAM, ISC-LOAM and hdl graph slam, or ii) lidar-inertial like LeGO-LOAM, Cartographer, LIO-mapping and LIO-SAM. The evaluation of the methods is performed based on a dataset collected from the Boston Dynamics Spot robot equipped with 3D lidar Velodyne Puck Lite and IMU Vectornav VN-100, during a mission in an underground tunnel. In the evaluation process poses and 3D tunnel reconstructions from SLAM algorithms are compared against each other to find methods with most solid performance in terms of pose accuracy and map quality. 在缺乏自然照明或较差照明的恶劣和 GPS 拒绝的地下 (SubT) 环境中，机器人的自主导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，这促进了姿态估计和映射算法的开发。受到在此类环境中实际部署自主机器人的需求的启发，本文提出了 3D SLAM 算法的实验比较研究。该研究重点关注具有开源实现的最先进的激光雷达 SLAM 算法，即 i) 仅激光雷达，如 BLAM、LOAM、A-LOAM、ISC-LOAM 和 hdl graph slam，或 ii) 激光雷达惯性，如 LeGO-LOAM、Cartographer、LIO-mapping 和 LIO-SAM。该方法的评估是基于波士顿动力 Spot 机器人在地下隧道执行任务期间收集的数据集进行的，该机器人配备 3D 激光雷达 Velodyne Puck Lite 和 IMU Vectornav VN-100。在评估过程中，将 SLAM 算法的位姿和 3D 隧道重建进行相互比较，以找到在位姿精度和地图质量方面性能最可靠的方法。 本文在地下隧道环境中对基于激光雷达的3D SLAM算法进行实验对比研究，评估其位姿估计和地图重建性能。 Anton Koval,Christoforos Kanellakis,George Nikolakopoulos cs.RO

authors_text: Sadaf Khan,Zhengyuan Shi,Min Li,Qiang Xu
title: DeepSeq: Deep Sequential Circuit Learning
title_zh: DeepSeq：深度序列电路学习
abstract: Circuit representation learning is a promising research direction in the electronic design automation (EDA) field. With sufficient data for pre-training, the learned general yet effective representation can help to solve multiple downstream EDA tasks by fine-tuning it on a small set of task-related data. However, existing solutions only target combinational circuits, significantly limiting their applications. In this work, we propose DeepSeq, a novel representation learning framework for sequential netlists. Specifically, we introduce a dedicated graph neural network (GNN) with a customized propagation scheme to exploit the temporal correlations between gates in sequential circuits. To ensure effective learning, we propose to use a multi-task training objective with two sets of strongly related supervision: logic probability and transition probability at each node. A novel dual attention aggregation mechanism is introduced to facilitate learning both tasks efficiently. Experimental results on various benchmark circuits show that DeepSeq outperforms other GNN models for sequential circuit learning. We evaluate the generalization capability of DeepSeq on a downstream power estimation task. After fine-tuning, DeepSeq can accurately estimate power across various circuits under different workloads.
summary: Circuit representation learning is a promising research direction in the electronic design automation (EDA) field. With sufficient data for pre-training, the learned general yet effective representation can help to solve multiple downstream EDA tasks by fine-tuning it on a small set of task-related data. However, existing solutions only target combinational circuits, significantly limiting their applications. In this work, we propose DeepSeq, a novel representation learning framework for sequential netlists. Specifically, we introduce a dedicated graph neural network (GNN) with a customized propagation scheme to exploit the temporal correlations between gates in sequential circuits. To ensure effective learning, we propose to use a multi-task training objective with two sets of strongly related supervision: logic probability and transition probability at each node. A novel dual attention aggregation mechanism is introduced to facilitate learning both tasks efficiently. Experimental results on various benchmark circuits show that DeepSeq outperforms other GNN models for sequential circuit learning. We evaluate the generalization capability of DeepSeq on a downstream power estimation task. After fine-tuning, DeepSeq can accurately estimate power across various circuits under different workloads.
abstract_zh: 电路表示学习是电子设计自动化（EDA）领域一个有前途的研究方向。有了足够的预训练数据，学习到的通用而有效的表示可以通过对一小组任务相关数据进行微调来帮助解决多个下游 EDA 任务。然而，现有的解决方案仅针对组合电路，极大地限制了它们的应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DeepSeq，一种新颖的顺序网表表示学习框架。具体来说，我们引入了一种具有定制传播方案的专用图神经网络（GNN），以利用时序电路中门之间的时间相关性。为了确保有效的学习，我们建议使用具有两组强相关监督的多任务训练目标：每个节点的逻辑概率和转移概率。引入了一种新颖的双重注意力聚合机制，以促进有效地学习这两个任务。各种基准电路的实验结果表明，DeepSeq 在顺序电路学习方面优于其他 GNN 模型。我们评估 DeepSeq 在下游功率估计任务上的泛化能力。经过微调后，DeepSeq 可以准确估计不同工作负载下各种电路的功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSeq，一种针对时序电路的表示学习框架，通过图神经网络和多任务训练解决现有方法仅适用于组合电路的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有电路表示学习方法仅适用于组合电路，无法有效处理时序电路中的时序相关性，限制了其在电子设计自动化领域的应用。
AI.method: 设计定制化图神经网络（GNN）捕捉时序电路门级时序相关性，结合逻辑概率与转换概率的多任务训练目标，并引入双重注意力聚合机制提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在多个基准电路测试中，DeepSeq优于其他GNN模型；通过微调后，在功耗估计任务中展现跨电路、跨工作负载的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DeepSeq有效解决了时序电路表示学习难题，验证了其在电子设计自动化下游任务中的潜力与实用性。

authors_text: Dipayan Chakraborty,R. B. Sandeep
title: Contracting edges to destroy a pattern: A complexity study
title_zh: 收缩边缘以破坏模式：复杂性研究
comment: 30 pages, 10 figures, a short version is accepted to FCT 2023
comments: 30 pages, 10 figures, a short version is accepted to FCT 2023
abstract: Given a graph G and an integer k, the objective of the $Π$-Contraction problem is to check whether there exists at most k edges in G such that contracting them in G results in a graph satisfying the property $Π$. We investigate the problem where $Π$ is `H-free' (without any induced copies of H). It is trivial that H-free Contraction is polynomial-time solvable if H is a complete graph of at most two vertices. We prove that, in all other cases, the problem is NP-complete. We then investigate the fixed-parameter tractability of these problems. We prove that whenever H is a tree, except for seven trees, H-free Contraction is W[2]-hard. This result along with the known results leaves behind three unknown cases among trees.
summary: Given a graph G and an integer k, the objective of the $Π$-Contraction problem is to check whether there exists at most k edges in G such that contracting them in G results in a graph satisfying the property $Π$. We investigate the problem where $Π$ is `H-free' (without any induced copies of H). It is trivial that H-free Contraction is polynomial-time solvable if H is a complete graph of at most two vertices. We prove that, in all other cases, the problem is NP-complete. We then investigate the fixed-parameter tractability of these problems. We prove that whenever H is a tree, except for seven trees, H-free Contraction is W[2]-hard. This result along with the known results leaves behind three unknown cases among trees.
abstract_zh: 给定一个图 G 和一个整数 k，$Π$-收缩问题的目标是检查 G 中是否存在至多 k 个边，使得在 G 中收缩它们会产生满足属性 $Π$ 的图。我们研究 $Π$ 是“H-free”（没有任何 H 的诱导副本）的问题。如果 H 是最多两个顶点的完全图，则无 H 收缩是多项式时间可解的，这是微不足道的。我们证明，在所有其他情况下，问题都是 NP 完全的。然后我们研究这些问题的固定参数可处理性。我们证明，只要 H 是一棵树，除了七棵树之外，H 无收缩是 W[2]-困难的。这一结果与已知结果一起留下了树木中的三个未知案例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过收缩最多k条边使图满足H-free属性的复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 探讨图收缩操作下模式消除问题的计算复杂性，为参数化算法设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: 采用复杂性理论分析方法，结合归约技术证明问题的NP难性和参数化难度。
AI.result: 当H为至多两顶点完全图时问题多项式可解，其他情况NP难；H为树时除七种情况外均为W[2]-难。
AI.conclusion: 完成H-free收缩问题的复杂性分类，剩余三种树状情况留待进一步研究。

search_text: Contracting edges to destroy a pattern: A complexity study 收缩边缘以破坏模式：复杂性研究 Given a graph G and an integer k, the objective of the $Π$-Contraction problem is to check whether there exists at most k edges in G such that contracting them in G results in a graph satisfying the property $Π$. We investigate the problem where $Π$ is `H-free' (without any induced copies of H). It is trivial that H-free Contraction is polynomial-time solvable if H is a complete graph of at most two vertices. We prove that, in all other cases, the problem is NP-complete. We then investigate the fixed-parameter tractability of these problems. We prove that whenever H is a tree, except for seven trees, H-free Contraction is W[2]-hard. This result along with the known results leaves behind three unknown cases among trees. 给定一个图 G 和一个整数 k，$Π$-收缩问题的目标是检查 G 中是否存在至多 k 个边，使得在 G 中收缩它们会产生满足属性 $Π$ 的图。我们研究 $Π$ 是“H-free”（没有任何 H 的诱导副本）的问题。如果 H 是最多两个顶点的完全图，则无 H 收缩是多项式时间可解的，这是微不足道的。我们证明，在所有其他情况下，问题都是 NP 完全的。然后我们研究这些问题的固定参数可处理性。我们证明，只要 H 是一棵树，除了七棵树之外，H 无收缩是 W[2]-困难的。这一结果与已知结果一起留下了树木中的三个未知案例。 本文研究通过收缩最多k条边使图满足H-free属性的复杂性问题。 Dipayan Chakraborty,R. B. Sandeep cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Rahim Entezari,Mitchell Wortsman,Olga Saukh,M. Moein Shariatnia,Hanie Sedghi,Ludwig Schmidt
title: The Role of Pre-training Data in Transfer Learning
title_zh: 预训练数据在迁移学习中的作用
abstract: The transfer learning paradigm of model pre-training and subsequent fine-tuning produces high-accuracy models. While most studies recommend scaling the pre-training size to benefit most from transfer learning, a question remains: what data and method should be used for pre-training? We investigate the impact of pre-training data distribution on the few-shot and full fine-tuning performance using 3 pre-training methods (supervised, contrastive language-image and image-image), 7 pre-training datasets, and 9 downstream datasets. Through extensive controlled experiments, we find that the choice of the pre-training data source is essential for the few-shot transfer, but its role decreases as more data is made available for fine-tuning. Additionally, we explore the role of data curation and examine the trade-offs between label noise and the size of the pre-training dataset. We find that using 2000X more pre-training data from LAION can match the performance of supervised ImageNet pre-training. Furthermore, we investigate the effect of pre-training methods, comparing language-image contrastive vs. image-image contrastive, and find that the latter leads to better downstream accuracy
summary: The transfer learning paradigm of model pre-training and subsequent fine-tuning produces high-accuracy models. While most studies recommend scaling the pre-training size to benefit most from transfer learning, a question remains: what data and method should be used for pre-training? We investigate the impact of pre-training data distribution on the few-shot and full fine-tuning performance using 3 pre-training methods (supervised, contrastive language-image and image-image), 7 pre-training datasets, and 9 downstream datasets. Through extensive controlled experiments, we find that the choice of the pre-training data source is essential for the few-shot transfer, but its role decreases as more data is made available for fine-tuning. Additionally, we explore the role of data curation and examine the trade-offs between label noise and the size of the pre-training dataset. We find that using 2000X more pre-training data from LAION can match the performance of supervised ImageNet pre-training. Furthermore, we investigate the effect of pre-training methods, comparing language-image contrastive vs. image-image contrastive, and find that the latter leads to better downstream accuracy
abstract_zh: 模型预训练和后续微调的迁移学习范式产生了高精度模型。虽然大多数研究建议扩大预训练规模以从迁移学习中获得最大收益，但仍然存在一个问题：应使用哪些数据和方法进行预训练？我们使用 3 种预训练方法（监督、对比语言-图像和图像-图像）、7 个预训练数据集和 9 个下游数据集，研究预训练数据分布对小样本和完全微调性能的影响。通过广泛的受控实验，我们发现预训练数据源的选择对于小样本迁移至关重要，但随着更多数据可用于微调，其作用会减弱。此外，我们探讨了数据管理的作用，并检查了标签噪声和预训练数据集大小之间的权衡。我们发现使用 LAION 多 2000 倍的预训练数据可以与监督 ImageNet 预训练的性能相匹配。此外，我们研究了预训练方法的效果，比较了语言-图像对比与图像-图像对比，发现后者可以带来更好的下游准确性

AI.tldr: 研究预训练数据在迁移学习中的作用，探讨不同数据来源和方法对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩大预训练规模被广泛推荐，但关于预训练数据选择和方法的细节仍存在疑问，需明确其对迁移效果的具体影响。
AI.method: 采用三种预训练方法（监督学习、对比语言-图像、图像-图像对比），结合七个预训练数据集和九个下游任务，通过控制实验分析数据分布、噪声与规模的影响。
AI.result: 预训练数据来源对少样本迁移至关重要，但微调数据量增加时影响减弱；2000倍LAION数据可匹敌监督ImageNet预训练；图像-图像对比方法优于语言-图像对比。
AI.conclusion: 预训练数据选择和方法显著影响迁移效果，大规模无监督数据可能替代监督数据，但需权衡噪声与规模的平衡。

authors_text: Shi Guo,Hongwei Yong,Xindong Zhang,Jianqi Ma,Lei Zhang
title: Spatial-Frequency Attention for Image Denoising
title_zh: 图像去噪的空间频率关注
abstract: The recently developed transformer networks have achieved impressive performance in image denoising by exploiting the self-attention (SA) in images. However, the existing methods mostly use a relatively small window to compute SA due to the quadratic complexity of it, which limits the model's ability to model long-term image information. In this paper, we propose the spatial-frequency attention network (SFANet) to enhance the network's ability in exploiting long-range dependency. For spatial attention module (SAM), we adopt dilated SA to model long-range dependency. In the frequency attention module (FAM), we exploit more global information by using Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) by designing a window-based frequency channel attention (WFCA) block to effectively model deep frequency features and their dependencies. To make our module applicable to images of different sizes and keep the model consistency between training and inference, we apply window-based FFT with a set of fixed window sizes. In addition, channel attention is computed on both real and imaginary parts of the Fourier spectrum, which further improves restoration performance. The proposed WFCA block can effectively model image long-range dependency with acceptable complexity. Experiments on multiple denoising benchmarks demonstrate the leading performance of SFANet network.
summary: The recently developed transformer networks have achieved impressive performance in image denoising by exploiting the self-attention (SA) in images. However, the existing methods mostly use a relatively small window to compute SA due to the quadratic complexity of it, which limits the model's ability to model long-term image information. In this paper, we propose the spatial-frequency attention network (SFANet) to enhance the network's ability in exploiting long-range dependency. For spatial attention module (SAM), we adopt dilated SA to model long-range dependency. In the frequency attention module (FAM), we exploit more global information by using Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) by designing a window-based frequency channel attention (WFCA) block to effectively model deep frequency features and their dependencies. To make our module applicable to images of different sizes and keep the model consistency between training and inference, we apply window-based FFT with a set of fixed window sizes. In addition, channel attention is computed on both real and imaginary parts of the Fourier spectrum, which further improves restoration performance. The proposed WFCA block can effectively model image long-range dependency with acceptable complexity. Experiments on multiple denoising benchmarks demonstrate the leading performance of SFANet network.
abstract_zh: 最近开发的 Transformer 网络通过利用图像中的自注意力（SA），在图像去噪方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，由于其二次复杂度，现有方法大多使用相对较小的窗口来计算SA，这限制了模型对长期图像信息进行建模的能力。在本文中，我们提出了空间频率注意网络（SFANet）来增强网络利用远程依赖性的能力。对于空间注意模块（SAM），我们采用扩张的 SA 来建模远程依赖性。在频率注意模块（FAM）中，我们通过使用快速傅立叶变换（FFT）设计基于窗口的频率通道注意（WFCA）块来利用更多的全局信息，以有效地建模深层频率特征及其依赖性。为了使我们的模块适用于不同大小的图像并保持训练和推理之间的模型一致性，我们应用具有一组固定窗口大小的基于窗口的 F​​FT。此外，通道注意力是在傅立叶频谱的实部和虚部上计算的，这进一步提高了恢复性能。所提出的 WFCA 块可以有效地以可接受的复杂度对图像远程依赖性进行建模。多个去噪基准的实验证明了SFANet网络的领先性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合空间-频率注意力机制的图像去噪网络SFANet，以增强模型对长距离依赖关系的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像去噪方法因自注意力机制的二次复杂度，通常采用小窗口计算，限制了模型对长程图像信息的建模能力。
AI.method: 设计空间注意力模块（SAM）采用扩张自注意力建模长距离依赖，频率注意力模块（FAM）通过FFT和窗口化频域通道注意力块（WFCA）提取全局频域特征，并在训练和推理中保持窗口大小一致性。
AI.result: 在多个去噪基准测试中，SFANet展现出领先的去噪性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的WFCA模块在保证复杂度的前提下有效建模了图像长程依赖，显著提升了去噪效果。

authors_text: Wei Wang,Xuejing Lei,Yueru Chen,Ming-Sui Lee,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: LSR: A Light-Weight Super-Resolution Method
title_zh: LSR：一种轻量级超分辨率方法
abstract: A light-weight super-resolution (LSR) method from a single image targeting mobile applications is proposed in this work. LSR predicts the residual image between the interpolated low-resolution (ILR) and high-resolution (HR) images using a self-supervised framework. To lower the computational complexity, LSR does not adopt the end-to-end optimization deep networks. It consists of three modules: 1) generation of a pool of rich and diversified representations in the neighborhood of a target pixel via unsupervised learning, 2) selecting a subset from the representation pool that is most relevant to the underlying super-resolution task automatically via supervised learning, 3) predicting the residual of the target pixel via regression. LSR has low computational complexity and reasonable model size so that it can be implemented on mobile/edge platforms conveniently. Besides, it offers better visual quality than classical exemplar-based methods in terms of PSNR/SSIM measures.
summary: A light-weight super-resolution (LSR) method from a single image targeting mobile applications is proposed in this work. LSR predicts the residual image between the interpolated low-resolution (ILR) and high-resolution (HR) images using a self-supervised framework. To lower the computational complexity, LSR does not adopt the end-to-end optimization deep networks. It consists of three modules: 1) generation of a pool of rich and diversified representations in the neighborhood of a target pixel via unsupervised learning, 2) selecting a subset from the representation pool that is most relevant to the underlying super-resolution task automatically via supervised learning, 3) predicting the residual of the target pixel via regression. LSR has low computational complexity and reasonable model size so that it can be implemented on mobile/edge platforms conveniently. Besides, it offers better visual quality than classical exemplar-based methods in terms of PSNR/SSIM measures.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种针对移动应用的单图像轻量级超分辨率（LSR）方法。 LSR 使用自监督框架预测插值低分辨率 (ILR) 和高分辨率 (HR) 图像之间的残差图像。为了降低计算复杂度，LSR没有采用端到端优化深度网络。它由三个模块组成：1）通过无监督学习在目标像素的邻域中生成丰富多样的表示池，2）通过监督学习自动从表示池中选择与底层超分辨率任务最相关的子集，3）通过回归预测目标像素的残差。 LSR具有较低的计算复杂度和合理的模型尺寸，可以方便地在移动/边缘平台上实现。此外，在 PSNR/SSIM 测量方面，它比基于经典示例的方法提供了更好的视觉质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级单图像超分辨率方法LSR，适用于移动设备。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法计算复杂度高，难以部署在移动设备上，需设计低复杂度且保持视觉质量的算法。
AI.method: LSR通过自监督框架生成邻域表示池，结合监督学习选择相关子集，最后用回归预测残差图像，避免端到端深度网络优化。
AI.result: LSR具有低计算复杂度和合理模型规模，可在移动平台部署，且PSNR/SSIM指标优于经典示例方法。
AI.conclusion: LSR在保持较高视觉质量的同时实现了轻量化，适合移动端超分辨率应用。

search_text: LSR: A Light-Weight Super-Resolution Method LSR：一种轻量级超分辨率方法 A light-weight super-resolution (LSR) method from a single image targeting mobile applications is proposed in this work. LSR predicts the residual image between the interpolated low-resolution (ILR) and high-resolution (HR) images using a self-supervised framework. To lower the computational complexity, LSR does not adopt the end-to-end optimization deep networks. It consists of three modules: 1) generation of a pool of rich and diversified representations in the neighborhood of a target pixel via unsupervised learning, 2) selecting a subset from the representation pool that is most relevant to the underlying super-resolution task automatically via supervised learning, 3) predicting the residual of the target pixel via regression. LSR has low computational complexity and reasonable model size so that it can be implemented on mobile/edge platforms conveniently. Besides, it offers better visual quality than classical exemplar-based methods in terms of PSNR/SSIM measures. 这项工作提出了一种针对移动应用的单图像轻量级超分辨率（LSR）方法。 LSR 使用自监督框架预测插值低分辨率 (ILR) 和高分辨率 (HR) 图像之间的残差图像。为了降低计算复杂度，LSR没有采用端到端优化深度网络。它由三个模块组成：1）通过无监督学习在目标像素的邻域中生成丰富多样的表示池，2）通过监督学习自动从表示池中选择与底层超分辨率任务最相关的子集，3）通过回归预测目标像素的残差。 LSR具有较低的计算复杂度和合理的模型尺寸，可以方便地在移动/边缘平台上实现。此外，在 PSNR/SSIM 测量方面，它比基于经典示例的方法提供了更好的视觉质量。 本文提出一种轻量级单图像超分辨率方法LSR，适用于移动设备。 Wei Wang,Xuejing Lei,Yueru Chen,Ming-Sui Lee,C. -C. Jay Kuo eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Thong Bach,Thuong Nguyen Canh,Van-Quang Nguyen
title: Leveraging Video Coding Knowledge for Deep Video Enhancement
title_zh: 利用视频编码知识进行深度视频增强
abstract: Recent advancements in deep learning techniques have significantly improved the quality of compressed videos. However, previous approaches have not fully exploited the motion characteristics of compressed videos, such as the drastic change in motion between video contents and the hierarchical coding structure of the compressed video. This study proposes a novel framework that leverages the low-delay configuration of video compression to enhance the existing state-of-the-art method, BasicVSR++. We incorporate a context-adaptive video fusion method to enhance the final quality of compressed videos. The proposed approach has been evaluated in the NTIRE22 challenge, a benchmark for video restoration and enhancement, and achieved improvements in both quantitative metrics and visual quality compared to the previous method.
summary: Recent advancements in deep learning techniques have significantly improved the quality of compressed videos. However, previous approaches have not fully exploited the motion characteristics of compressed videos, such as the drastic change in motion between video contents and the hierarchical coding structure of the compressed video. This study proposes a novel framework that leverages the low-delay configuration of video compression to enhance the existing state-of-the-art method, BasicVSR++. We incorporate a context-adaptive video fusion method to enhance the final quality of compressed videos. The proposed approach has been evaluated in the NTIRE22 challenge, a benchmark for video restoration and enhancement, and achieved improvements in both quantitative metrics and visual quality compared to the previous method.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术的最新进展显着提高了压缩视频的质量。然而，先前的方法并没有充分利用压缩视频的运动特性，例如视频内容之间运动的剧烈变化和压缩视频的分层编码结构。本研究提出了一种新颖的框架，利用视频压缩的低延迟配置来增强现有最先进的方法 BasicVSR++。我们采用上下文自适应视频融合方法来提高压缩视频的最终质量。所提出的方法已在视频恢复和增强基准 NTIRE22 挑战赛中进行了评估，与之前的方法相比，在定量指标和视觉质量方面都取得了改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视频压缩知识的深度视频增强框架，以提升压缩视频质量
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分利用压缩视频的运动特征和分层编码结构，导致增强效果有限
AI.method: 结合低延迟视频压缩配置和上下文自适应视频融合方法，改进BasicVSR++框架
AI.result: 在NTIRE22挑战赛中，定量指标和视觉质量均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 证明了结合视频编码知识的深度学习方法能有效提升压缩视频质量

authors_text: Nicolas Pinon,Geoffroy Oudoumanessah,Robin Trombetta,Michel Dojat,Florence Forbes,Carole Lartizien
title: Brain subtle anomaly detection based on auto-encoders latent space analysis : application to de novo parkinson patients
title_zh: 基于自动编码器潜在空间分析的大脑细微异常检测：应用于新发帕金森患者
comment: ef:IEEE 20th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI))., Apr 2023, Cartegena de Indias, Colombia
comments: ef:IEEE 20th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI))., Apr 2023, Cartegena de Indias, Colombia
abstract: Neural network-based anomaly detection remains challenging in clinical applications with little or no supervised information and subtle anomalies such as hardly visible brain lesions. Among unsupervised methods, patch-based auto-encoders with their efficient representation power provided by their latent space, have shown good results for visible lesion detection. However, the commonly used reconstruction error criterion may limit their performance when facing less obvious lesions. In this work, we design two alternative detection criteria. They are derived from multivariate analysis and can more directly capture information from latent space representations. Their performance compares favorably with two additional supervised learning methods, on a difficult de novo Parkinson Disease (PD) classification task.
summary: Neural network-based anomaly detection remains challenging in clinical applications with little or no supervised information and subtle anomalies such as hardly visible brain lesions. Among unsupervised methods, patch-based auto-encoders with their efficient representation power provided by their latent space, have shown good results for visible lesion detection. However, the commonly used reconstruction error criterion may limit their performance when facing less obvious lesions. In this work, we design two alternative detection criteria. They are derived from multivariate analysis and can more directly capture information from latent space representations. Their performance compares favorably with two additional supervised learning methods, on a difficult de novo Parkinson Disease (PD) classification task.
abstract_zh: 基于神经网络的异常检测在临床应用中仍然具有挑战性，因为很少或没有监督信息以及微妙的异常，例如几乎不可见的脑部病变。在无监督方法中，基于补丁的自动编码器以其潜在空间提供的高效表示能力，在可见病变检测方面显示出了良好的结果。然而，当面对不太明显的病变时，常用的重建误差标准可能会限制它们的性能。在这项工作中，我们设计了两种替代检测标准。它们源自多变量分析，可以更直接地从潜在空间表示中捕获信息。在一项困难的从头帕金森病 (PD) 分类任务中，它们的表现优于另外两种监督学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于自编码器潜在空间分析的细微脑部异常检测方法，用于新发帕金森病患者的诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器的重建误差准则难以有效检测细微脑部病变，需改进无监督方法以提升临床应用效果。
AI.method: 设计两种源自多元分析的检测标准，直接利用自编码器潜在空间特征进行异常检测。
AI.result: 新方法在区分新发帕金森病患者任务中表现优于两种监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于潜在空间特征的无监督检测方法可有效识别细微脑部异常，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Mattia Fumagalli,Daqian Shi,Fausto Giunchiglia
title: Towards Ranking Schemas by Focus
title_zh: 按焦点对模式进行排名
abstract: The main goal of this paper is to evaluate knowledge base schemas, modeled as a set of entity types, each such type being associated with a set of properties, according to their focus. We intuitively model the notion of focus as ''the state or quality of being relevant in storing and retrieving information''. This definition of focus is adapted from the notion of ''categorization purpose'', as first defined in cognitive psychology, thus giving us a high level of understandability on the side of users. In turn, this notion is formalized based on a set of knowledge metrics that, for any given focus, rank knowledge base schemas according to their quality. We apply the proposed methodology to more than 200 state-of-the-art knowledge base schemas. The experimental results show the utility of our approach
summary: The main goal of this paper is to evaluate knowledge base schemas, modeled as a set of entity types, each such type being associated with a set of properties, according to their focus. We intuitively model the notion of focus as ''the state or quality of being relevant in storing and retrieving information''. This definition of focus is adapted from the notion of ''categorization purpose'', as first defined in cognitive psychology, thus giving us a high level of understandability on the side of users. In turn, this notion is formalized based on a set of knowledge metrics that, for any given focus, rank knowledge base schemas according to their quality. We apply the proposed methodology to more than 200 state-of-the-art knowledge base schemas. The experimental results show the utility of our approach
abstract_zh: 本文的主要目标是评估知识库模式，将其建模为一组实体类型，每个此类类型根据其重点与一组属性相关联。我们直观地将焦点概念建模为“存储和检索信息相关的状态或质量”。焦点的定义源自认知心理学中首次定义的“分类目的”概念，从而为用户提供了高度的可理解性。反过来，这个概念是基于一组知识度量来形式化的，对于任何给定的焦点，知识库模式根据其质量进行排名。我们将所提出的方法应用于 200 多个最先进的知识库模式。实验结果表明了我们方法的实用性

AI.tldr: 本文旨在根据知识库模式的焦点（即存储和检索信息的相关性）对其进行评估和排序。
AI.motivation: 现有知识库模式缺乏统一的评估标准，而焦点作为用户可理解的分类目的概念，能提升知识库的可用性和实用性。
AI.method: 将焦点概念形式化为知识指标，通过计算不同模式在特定焦点下的指标值进行排序，并应用于200多个知识库模式验证。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方法能有效区分不同知识库模式的质量，证明其评估体系的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 基于焦点的知识库模式评估方法具有理论意义和实际应用价值，为知识库优化提供新思路。

search_text: Towards Ranking Schemas by Focus 按焦点对模式进行排名 The main goal of this paper is to evaluate knowledge base schemas, modeled as a set of entity types, each such type being associated with a set of properties, according to their focus. We intuitively model the notion of focus as ''the state or quality of being relevant in storing and retrieving information''. This definition of focus is adapted from the notion of ''categorization purpose'', as first defined in cognitive psychology, thus giving us a high level of understandability on the side of users. In turn, this notion is formalized based on a set of knowledge metrics that, for any given focus, rank knowledge base schemas according to their quality. We apply the proposed methodology to more than 200 state-of-the-art knowledge base schemas. The experimental results show the utility of our approach 本文的主要目标是评估知识库模式，将其建模为一组实体类型，每个此类类型根据其重点与一组属性相关联。我们直观地将焦点概念建模为“存储和检索信息相关的状态或质量”。焦点的定义源自认知心理学中首次定义的“分类目的”概念，从而为用户提供了高度的可理解性。反过来，这个概念是基于一组知识度量来形式化的，对于任何给定的焦点，知识库模式根据其质量进行排名。我们将所提出的方法应用于 200 多个最先进的知识库模式。实验结果表明了我们方法的实用性 本文旨在根据知识库模式的焦点（即存储和检索信息的相关性）对其进行评估和排序。 Mattia Fumagalli,Daqian Shi,Fausto Giunchiglia cs.AI

authors_text: Fabian Woitschek,Georg Schneider
title: Online Black-Box Confidence Estimation of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的在线黑盒置信度估计
comment: ef:2022 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Aachen, Germany, 2022, pp. 183-189
comments: ef:2022 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Aachen, Germany, 2022, pp. 183-189
abstract: Autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) increasingly utilize deep neural networks (DNNs) for improved perception or planning. Nevertheless, DNNs are quite brittle when the data distribution during inference deviates from the data distribution during training. This represents a challenge when deploying in partly unknown environments like in the case of ADAS. At the same time, the standard confidence of DNNs remains high even if the classification reliability decreases. This is problematic since following motion control algorithms consider the apparently confident prediction as reliable even though it might be considerably wrong. To reduce this problem real-time capable confidence estimation is required that better aligns with the actual reliability of the DNN classification. Additionally, the need exists for black-box confidence estimation to enable the homogeneous inclusion of externally developed components to an entire system. In this work we explore this use case and introduce the neighborhood confidence (NHC) which estimates the confidence of an arbitrary DNN for classification. The metric can be used for black-box systems since only the top-1 class output is required and does not need access to the gradients, the training dataset or a hold-out validation dataset. Evaluation on different data distributions, including small in-domain distribution shifts, out-of-domain data or adversarial attacks, shows that the NHC performs better or on par with a comparable method for online white-box confidence estimation in low data regimes which is required for real-time capable AD/ADAS.
summary: Autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) increasingly utilize deep neural networks (DNNs) for improved perception or planning. Nevertheless, DNNs are quite brittle when the data distribution during inference deviates from the data distribution during training. This represents a challenge when deploying in partly unknown environments like in the case of ADAS. At the same time, the standard confidence of DNNs remains high even if the classification reliability decreases. This is problematic since following motion control algorithms consider the apparently confident prediction as reliable even though it might be considerably wrong. To reduce this problem real-time capable confidence estimation is required that better aligns with the actual reliability of the DNN classification. Additionally, the need exists for black-box confidence estimation to enable the homogeneous inclusion of externally developed components to an entire system. In this work we explore this use case and introduce the neighborhood confidence (NHC) which estimates the confidence of an arbitrary DNN for classification. The metric can be used for black-box systems since only the top-1 class output is required and does not need access to the gradients, the training dataset or a hold-out validation dataset. Evaluation on different data distributions, including small in-domain distribution shifts, out-of-domain data or adversarial attacks, shows that the NHC performs better or on par with a comparable method for online white-box confidence estimation in low data regimes which is required for real-time capable AD/ADAS.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶 (AD) 和高级驾驶辅助系统 (ADAS) 越来越多地利用深度神经网络 (DNN) 来改善感知或规划。然而，当推理过程中的数据分布偏离训练过程中的数据分布时，DNN 就会变得相当脆弱。在部分未知的环境（例如 ADAS）中进行部署时，这是一个挑战。同时，即使分类可靠性下降，DNN 的标准置信度仍然很高。这是有问题的，因为以下运动控制算法认为明显置信的预测是可靠的，即使它可能是相当错误的。为了减少这个问题，需要实时的置信度估计，以更好地符合 DNN 分类的实际可靠性。此外，还需要黑盒置信度估计，以便能够将外部开发的组件均匀地纳入整个系统。在这项工作中，我们探索了这个用例并引入了邻域置信度 (NHC)，它估计任意 DNN 进行分类的置信度。该指标可用于黑盒系统，因为仅需要 top-1 类输出，并且不需要访问梯度、训练数据集或保留验证数据集。对不同数据分布（包括小的域内分布变化、域外数据或对抗性攻击）的评估表明，NHC 的性能更好或与低数据状态下的在线白盒置信度估计的类似方法相当，这是实时 AD/ADAS 所需的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线黑盒置信度估计方法NHC，用于评估深度神经网络在分布偏移或对抗攻击下的分类可靠性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖深度神经网络，但其在未知环境中的置信度评估不可靠，传统方法无法反映真实分类可靠性，存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 提出基于邻域置信度（NHC）的黑盒指标，仅需模型输出的top-1类别，无需梯度、训练数据或验证集，可实时评估分类可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明NHC在低数据场景下优于或等同于白盒方法，能有效应对分布偏移和对抗攻击，适用于AD/ADAS系统。
AI.conclusion: NHC为黑盒系统提供了高效可靠的置信度估计方案，可提升自动驾驶在未知环境中的安全性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Online Black-Box Confidence Estimation of Deep Neural Networks 深度神经网络的在线黑盒置信度估计 Autonomous driving (AD) and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) increasingly utilize deep neural networks (DNNs) for improved perception or planning. Nevertheless, DNNs are quite brittle when the data distribution during inference deviates from the data distribution during training. This represents a challenge when deploying in partly unknown environments like in the case of ADAS. At the same time, the standard confidence of DNNs remains high even if the classification reliability decreases. This is problematic since following motion control algorithms consider the apparently confident prediction as reliable even though it might be considerably wrong. To reduce this problem real-time capable confidence estimation is required that better aligns with the actual reliability of the DNN classification. Additionally, the need exists for black-box confidence estimation to enable the homogeneous inclusion of externally developed components to an entire system. In this work we explore this use case and introduce the neighborhood confidence (NHC) which estimates the confidence of an arbitrary DNN for classification. The metric can be used for black-box systems since only the top-1 class output is required and does not need access to the gradients, the training dataset or a hold-out validation dataset. Evaluation on different data distributions, including small in-domain distribution shifts, out-of-domain data or adversarial attacks, shows that the NHC performs better or on par with a comparable method for online white-box confidence estimation in low data regimes which is required for real-time capable AD/ADAS. 自动驾驶 (AD) 和高级驾驶辅助系统 (ADAS) 越来越多地利用深度神经网络 (DNN) 来改善感知或规划。然而，当推理过程中的数据分布偏离训练过程中的数据分布时，DNN 就会变得相当脆弱。在部分未知的环境（例如 ADAS）中进行部署时，这是一个挑战。同时，即使分类可靠性下降，DNN 的标准置信度仍然很高。这是有问题的，因为以下运动控制算法认为明显置信的预测是可靠的，即使它可能是相当错误的。为了减少这个问题，需要实时的置信度估计，以更好地符合 DNN 分类的实际可靠性。此外，还需要黑盒置信度估计，以便能够将外部开发的组件均匀地纳入整个系统。在这项工作中，我们探索了这个用例并引入了邻域置信度 (NHC)，它估计任意 DNN 进行分类的置信度。该指标可用于黑盒系统，因为仅需要 top-1 类输出，并且不需要访问梯度、训练数据集或保留验证数据集。对不同数据分布（包括小的域内分布变化、域外数据或对抗性攻击）的评估表明，NHC 的性能更好或与低数据状态下的在线白盒置信度估计的类似方法相当，这是实时 AD/ADAS 所需的。 本文提出一种在线黑盒置信度估计方法NHC，用于评估深度神经网络在分布偏移或对抗攻击下的分类可靠性。 Fabian Woitschek,Georg Schneider cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xihao Wang,Jiaming Lei,Hai Lan,Arafat Al-Jawari,Xian Wei
title: DuEqNet: Dual-Equivariance Network in Outdoor 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: DuEqNet：自动驾驶室外 3D 物体检测中的双等方差网络
comment: This work is accepted by ICRA2023
comments: This work is accepted by ICRA2023
abstract: Outdoor 3D object detection has played an essential role in the environment perception of autonomous driving. In complicated traffic situations, precise object recognition provides indispensable information for prediction and planning in the dynamic system, improving self-driving safety and reliability. However, with the vehicle's veering, the constant rotation of the surrounding scenario makes a challenge for the perception systems. Yet most existing methods have not focused on alleviating the detection accuracy impairment brought by the vehicle's rotation, especially in outdoor 3D detection. In this paper, we propose DuEqNet, which first introduces the concept of equivariance into 3D object detection network by leveraging a hierarchical embedded framework. The dual-equivariance of our model can extract the equivariant features at both local and global levels, respectively. For the local feature, we utilize the graph-based strategy to guarantee the equivariance of the feature in point cloud pillars. In terms of the global feature, the group equivariant convolution layers are adopted to aggregate the local feature to achieve the global equivariance. In the experiment part, we evaluate our approach with different baselines in 3D object detection tasks and obtain State-Of-The-Art performance. According to the results, our model presents higher accuracy on orientation and better prediction efficiency. Moreover, our dual-equivariance strategy exhibits the satisfied plug-and-play ability on various popular object detection frameworks to improve their performance.
summary: Outdoor 3D object detection has played an essential role in the environment perception of autonomous driving. In complicated traffic situations, precise object recognition provides indispensable information for prediction and planning in the dynamic system, improving self-driving safety and reliability. However, with the vehicle's veering, the constant rotation of the surrounding scenario makes a challenge for the perception systems. Yet most existing methods have not focused on alleviating the detection accuracy impairment brought by the vehicle's rotation, especially in outdoor 3D detection. In this paper, we propose DuEqNet, which first introduces the concept of equivariance into 3D object detection network by leveraging a hierarchical embedded framework. The dual-equivariance of our model can extract the equivariant features at both local and global levels, respectively. For the local feature, we utilize the graph-based strategy to guarantee the equivariance of the feature in point cloud pillars. In terms of the global feature, the group equivariant convolution layers are adopted to aggregate the local feature to achieve the global equivariance. In the experiment part, we evaluate our approach with different baselines in 3D object detection tasks and obtain State-Of-The-Art performance. According to the results, our model presents higher accuracy on orientation and better prediction efficiency. Moreover, our dual-equivariance strategy exhibits the satisfied plug-and-play ability on various popular object detection frameworks to improve their performance.
abstract_zh: 室外3D物体检测在自动驾驶的环境感知中发挥了至关重要的作用。在复杂的交通情况下，精确的物体识别为动态系统的预测和规划提供了不可或缺的信息，提高了自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性。然而，随着车辆的转向，周围场景的不断旋转对感知系统提出了挑战。然而，大多数现有方法并没有专注于减轻车辆旋转带来的检测精度损害，特别是在室外3D检测中。在本文中，我们提出了 DuEqNet，它首先利用分层嵌入式框架将等方差的概念引入 3D 对象检测网络。我们模型的双等变可以分别在局部和全局层面提取等变特征。对于局部特征，我们利用基于图的策略来保证点云柱中特征的等方差。在全局特征方面，采用组等变卷积层对局部特征进行聚合，实现全局等变。在实验部分，我们在 3D 对象检测任务中使用不同的基线评估我们的方法，并获得最先进的性能。根据结果​​，我们的模型具有更高的定向精度和更好的预测效率。此外，我们的双等方差策略在各种流行的目标检测框架上表现出令人满意的即插即用能力，以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DuEqNet，一种用于自动驾驶的户外3D目标检测的双等变网络，旨在解决车辆旋转导致的检测精度下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分解决车辆旋转带来的户外3D检测精度下降问题，尤其在动态交通场景中，精确的目标识别对自动驾驶安全至关重要。
AI.method: 通过分层嵌入框架引入等变性概念，利用图策略提取局部点云柱特征，结合群等变卷积层聚合全局特征，实现局部与全局双等变性。
AI.result: 在3D检测任务中达到SOTA性能，方向预测精度更高且效率更优，双等变策略可有效适配多种主流检测框架。
AI.conclusion: DuEqNet通过双等变机制显著提升旋转场景下的检测鲁棒性，为自动驾驶复杂环境感知提供可靠解决方案。

motivation: 现有方法未充分解决车辆旋转带来的户外3D检测精度下降问题，尤其在动态交通场景中，精确的目标识别对自动驾驶安全至关重要。
method: 通过分层嵌入框架引入等变性概念，利用图策略提取局部点云柱特征，结合群等变卷积层聚合全局特征，实现局部与全局双等变性。
result: 在3D检测任务中达到SOTA性能，方向预测精度更高且效率更优，双等变策略可有效适配多种主流检测框架。
conclusion: DuEqNet通过双等变机制显著提升旋转场景下的检测鲁棒性，为自动驾驶复杂环境感知提供可靠解决方案。
search_text: DuEqNet: Dual-Equivariance Network in Outdoor 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving DuEqNet：自动驾驶室外 3D 物体检测中的双等方差网络 Outdoor 3D object detection has played an essential role in the environment perception of autonomous driving. In complicated traffic situations, precise object recognition provides indispensable information for prediction and planning in the dynamic system, improving self-driving safety and reliability. However, with the vehicle's veering, the constant rotation of the surrounding scenario makes a challenge for the perception systems. Yet most existing methods have not focused on alleviating the detection accuracy impairment brought by the vehicle's rotation, especially in outdoor 3D detection. In this paper, we propose DuEqNet, which first introduces the concept of equivariance into 3D object detection network by leveraging a hierarchical embedded framework. The dual-equivariance of our model can extract the equivariant features at both local and global levels, respectively. For the local feature, we utilize the graph-based strategy to guarantee the equivariance of the feature in point cloud pillars. In terms of the global feature, the group equivariant convolution layers are adopted to aggregate the local feature to achieve the global equivariance. In the experiment part, we evaluate our approach with different baselines in 3D object detection tasks and obtain State-Of-The-Art performance. According to the results, our model presents higher accuracy on orientation and better prediction efficiency. Moreover, our dual-equivariance strategy exhibits the satisfied plug-and-play ability on various popular object detection frameworks to improve their performance. 室外3D物体检测在自动驾驶的环境感知中发挥了至关重要的作用。在复杂的交通情况下，精确的物体识别为动态系统的预测和规划提供了不可或缺的信息，提高了自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性。然而，随着车辆的转向，周围场景的不断旋转对感知系统提出了挑战。然而，大多数现有方法并没有专注于减轻车辆旋转带来的检测精度损害，特别是在室外3D检测中。在本文中，我们提出了 DuEqNet，它首先利用分层嵌入式框架将等方差的概念引入 3D 对象检测网络。我们模型的双等变可以分别在局部和全局层面提取等变特征。对于局部特征，我们利用基于图的策略来保证点云柱中特征的等方差。在全局特征方面，采用组等变卷积层对局部特征进行聚合，实现全局等变。在实验部分，我们在 3D 对象检测任务中使用不同的基线评估我们的方法，并获得最先进的性能。根据结果​​，我们的模型具有更高的定向精度和更好的预测效率。此外，我们的双等方差策略在各种流行的目标检测框架上表现出令人满意的即插即用能力，以提高其性能。 本文提出DuEqNet，一种用于自动驾驶的户外3D目标检测的双等变网络，旨在解决车辆旋转导致的检测精度下降问题。 Xihao Wang,Jiaming Lei,Hai Lan,Arafat Al-Jawari,Xian Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Shih-Fang Chang,Benny Wei-Yun Hsu,Tien-Yu Chang,Vincent S. Tseng
title: FLAG: Fast Label-Adaptive Aggregation for Multi-label Classification in Federated Learning
title_zh: FLAG：联邦学习中多标签分类的快速标签自适应聚合
abstract: Federated learning aims to share private data to maximize the data utility without privacy leakage. Previous federated learning research mainly focuses on multi-class classification problems. However, multi-label classification is a crucial research problem close to real-world data properties. Nevertheless, a limited number of federated learning studies explore this research problem. Existing studies of multi-label federated learning did not consider the characteristics of multi-label data, i.e., they used the concept of multi-class classification to verify their methods' performance, which means it will not be feasible to apply their methods to real-world applications. Therefore, this study proposed a new multi-label federated learning framework with a Clustering-based Multi-label Data Allocation (CMDA) and a novel aggregation method, Fast Label-Adaptive Aggregation (FLAG), for multi-label classification in the federated learning environment. The experimental results demonstrate that our methods only need less than 50\% of training epochs and communication rounds to surpass the performance of state-of-the-art federated learning methods.
summary: Federated learning aims to share private data to maximize the data utility without privacy leakage. Previous federated learning research mainly focuses on multi-class classification problems. However, multi-label classification is a crucial research problem close to real-world data properties. Nevertheless, a limited number of federated learning studies explore this research problem. Existing studies of multi-label federated learning did not consider the characteristics of multi-label data, i.e., they used the concept of multi-class classification to verify their methods' performance, which means it will not be feasible to apply their methods to real-world applications. Therefore, this study proposed a new multi-label federated learning framework with a Clustering-based Multi-label Data Allocation (CMDA) and a novel aggregation method, Fast Label-Adaptive Aggregation (FLAG), for multi-label classification in the federated learning environment. The experimental results demonstrate that our methods only need less than 50\% of training epochs and communication rounds to surpass the performance of state-of-the-art federated learning methods.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习旨在共享私有数据，在不泄露隐私的情况下最大化数据效用。以往的联邦学习研究主要集中在多类分类问题上。然而，多标签分类是一个接近现实世界数据属性的关键研究问题。然而，有限数量的联邦学习研究探讨了这个研究问题。现有的多标签联邦学习研究没有考虑多标签数据的特征，即他们使用多类分类的概念来验证其方法的性能，这意味着他们的方法将其应用于实际应用是不可行的。因此，本研究提出了一种新的多标签联邦学习框架，具有基于聚类的多标签数据分配（CMDA）和一种新颖的聚合方法，快速标签自适应聚合（FLAG），用于联邦学习环境中的多标签分类。实验结果表明，我们的方法只需要不到 50% 的训练周期和通信轮次，就可以超越最先进的联邦学习方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的多标签联邦学习框架，结合基于聚类的多标签数据分配（CMDA）和快速标签自适应聚合（FLAG）方法，以提升多标签分类在联邦学习环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在多标签分类中未考虑数据特性，导致实际应用中效果不佳，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 方法包括基于聚类的多标签数据分配（CMDA）和快速标签自适应聚合（FLAG），通过优化数据分配和聚合策略提升多标签分类效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，方法在训练轮次和通信轮次减少50%的情况下仍优于现有联邦学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的框架有效解决了多标签联邦学习中的挑战，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Fabian Woitschek,Georg Schneider
title: Physical Adversarial Attacks on Deep Neural Networks for Traffic Sign Recognition: A Feasibility Study
title_zh: 用于交通标志识别的深度神经网络的物理对抗攻击：可行性研究
comment: ef:2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Nagoya, Japan, 2021, pp. 481-487
comments: ef:2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), Nagoya, Japan, 2021, pp. 481-487
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are increasingly applied in the real world in safety critical applications like advanced driver assistance systems. An example for such use case is represented by traffic sign recognition systems. At the same time, it is known that current DNNs can be fooled by adversarial attacks, which raises safety concerns if those attacks can be applied under realistic conditions. In this work we apply different black-box attack methods to generate perturbations that are applied in the physical environment and can be used to fool systems under different environmental conditions. To the best of our knowledge we are the first to combine a general framework for physical attacks with different black-box attack methods and study the impact of the different methods on the success rate of the attack under the same setting. We show that reliable physical adversarial attacks can be performed with different methods and that it is also possible to reduce the perceptibility of the resulting perturbations. The findings highlight the need for viable defenses of a DNN even in the black-box case, but at the same time form the basis for securing a DNN with methods like adversarial training which utilizes adversarial attacks to augment the original training data.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are increasingly applied in the real world in safety critical applications like advanced driver assistance systems. An example for such use case is represented by traffic sign recognition systems. At the same time, it is known that current DNNs can be fooled by adversarial attacks, which raises safety concerns if those attacks can be applied under realistic conditions. In this work we apply different black-box attack methods to generate perturbations that are applied in the physical environment and can be used to fool systems under different environmental conditions. To the best of our knowledge we are the first to combine a general framework for physical attacks with different black-box attack methods and study the impact of the different methods on the success rate of the attack under the same setting. We show that reliable physical adversarial attacks can be performed with different methods and that it is also possible to reduce the perceptibility of the resulting perturbations. The findings highlight the need for viable defenses of a DNN even in the black-box case, but at the same time form the basis for securing a DNN with methods like adversarial training which utilizes adversarial attacks to augment the original training data.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 越来越多地应用于现实世界中的安全关键应用，例如高级驾驶员辅助系统。交通标志识别系统就是此类用例的一个示例。与此同时，众所周知，当前的 DNN 可能会被对抗性攻击所愚弄，如果这些攻击可以在现实条件下应用，就会引发安全问题。在这项工作中，我们应用不同的黑盒攻击方法来生成应用于物理环境的扰动，并可用于在不同环境条件下欺骗系统。据我们所知，我们是第一个将物理攻击的通用框架与不同的黑盒攻击方法相结合，并研究相同设置下不同方法对攻击成功率的影响。我们表明，可以使用不同的方法来执行可靠的物理对抗性攻击，并且还可以降低由此产生的扰动的可感知性。研究结果强调了即使在黑盒情况下也需要对 DNN 进行可行的防御，但同时也构成了通过对抗训练等方法保护 DNN 的基础，这些方法利用对抗性攻击来增强原始训练数据。

AI.tldr: 研究在物理环境中对交通标志识别系统的深度神经网络进行对抗攻击的可行性
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键系统中广泛应用，但对抗攻击可能引发安全隐患，需研究其在真实环境中的可行性及防御方法
AI.method: 结合通用物理攻击框架与多种黑盒攻击方法，生成物理扰动并测试其在不同环境下的攻击成功率，同时降低扰动的可察觉性
AI.result: 证明多种方法可实现可靠的物理对抗攻击，且能有效降低扰动的可察觉性
AI.conclusion: 需开发针对黑盒攻击的有效防御机制，对抗训练等方法可作为增强DNN安全性的基础

authors_text: Devi Padmavathi Alagarswamy,Christian Berghoff,Vasilios Danos,Fabian Langer,Thora Markert,Georg Schneider,Arndt von Twickel,Fabian Woitschek
title: Towards Audit Requirements for AI-based Systems in Mobility Applications
title_zh: 移动应用中基于人工智能的系统的审计要求
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 9th International Conference on Information Systems Security and Privacy
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the 9th International Conference on Information Systems Security and Privacy
abstract: Various mobility applications like advanced driver assistance systems increasingly utilize artificial intelligence (AI) based functionalities. Typically, deep neural networks (DNNs) are used as these provide the best performance on the challenging perception, prediction or planning tasks that occur in real driving environments. However, current regulations like UNECE R 155 or ISO 26262 do not consider AI-related aspects and are only applied to traditional algorithm-based systems. The non-existence of AI-specific standards or norms prevents the practical application and can harm the trust level of users. Hence, it is important to extend existing standardization for security and safety to consider AI-specific challenges and requirements. To take a step towards a suitable regulation we propose 50 technical requirements or best practices that extend existing regulations and address the concrete needs for DNN-based systems. We show the applicability, usefulness and meaningfulness of the proposed requirements by performing an exemplary audit of a DNN-based traffic sign recognition system using three of the proposed requirements.

Typically, deep neural networks (DNNs) are used as these provide the best performance on the challenging perception, prediction or planning tasks that occur in real driving environments. However, current regulations like UNECE R 155 or ISO 26262 do not consider AI-related aspects and are only applied to traditional algorithm-based systems. The non-existence of AI-specific standards or norms prevents the practical application and can harm the trust level of users. Hence, it is important to extend existing standardization for security and safety to consider AI-specific challenges and requirements. To take a step towards a suitable regulation we propose 50 technical requirements or best practices that extend existing regulations and address the concrete needs for DNN-based systems. We show the applicability, usefulness and meaningfulness of the proposed requirements by performing an exemplary audit of a DNN-based traffic sign recognition system using three of the proposed requirements.
abstract_zh: 高级驾驶辅助系统等各种移动应用越来越多地利用基于人工智能 (AI) 的功能。通常，使用深度神经网络 (DNN)，因为它们可以在实际驾驶环境中发生的具有挑战性的感知、预测或规划任务中提供最佳性能。然而，UNECE R 155 或 ISO 26262 等现行法规并未考虑人工智能相关方面，仅适用于传统的基于算法的系统。人工智能特定标准或规范的不存在阻碍了实际应用，并可能损害用户的信任水平。因此，扩展现有的安全标准化以考虑人工智能特定的挑战和要求非常重要。为了朝着合适的法规迈出一步，我们提出了 50 项技术要求或最佳实践，以扩展现有法规并满足基于 DNN 的系统的具体需求。我们通过使用三个提议的要求对基于 DNN 的交通标志识别系统进行示例性审核，展示了提议的要求的适用性、有用性和意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对AI系统在移动应用中的审计要求，以弥补现有法规对深度神经网络（DNN）安全性和安全性的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前法规（如UNECE R 155、ISO 26262）未涵盖AI特性，导致AI系统缺乏标准，影响用户信任与实际应用。
AI.method: 提出50项技术要求与最佳实践，扩展现有法规，并通过审计基于DNN的交通标志识别系统验证其适用性。
AI.result: 审计结果表明，所提要求对DNN系统具有实用性与指导意义，能够有效识别潜在安全风险。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI系统在安全关键型移动应用中的标准化提供了方向，推动法规适应AI技术特性。

authors_text: Taejin Paik
title: Invariant Representations of Embedded Simplicial Complexes
title_zh: 嵌入式单纯复形的不变表示
abstract: Analyzing embedded simplicial complexes, such as triangular meshes and graphs, is an important problem in many fields. We propose a new approach for analyzing embedded simplicial complexes in a subdivision-invariant and isometry-invariant way using only topological and geometric information. Our approach is based on creating and analyzing sufficient statistics and uses a graph neural network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach using a synthetic mesh data set.
summary: Analyzing embedded simplicial complexes, such as triangular meshes and graphs, is an important problem in many fields. We propose a new approach for analyzing embedded simplicial complexes in a subdivision-invariant and isometry-invariant way using only topological and geometric information. Our approach is based on creating and analyzing sufficient statistics and uses a graph neural network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach using a synthetic mesh data set.
abstract_zh: 分析嵌入的单纯复形，例如三角形网格和图形，是许多领域的一个重要问题。我们提出了一种仅使用拓扑和几何信息以细分不变和等距不变的方式分析嵌入单纯复形的新方法。我们的方法基于创建和分析足够的统计数据并使用图神经网络。我们使用合成网格数据集证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种细分不变和等距不变的嵌入单纯复形分析方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理嵌入单纯复形时缺乏细分和等距不变性，影响跨尺度和形变分析的稳定性
AI.method: 基于充分统计量构建与细分和等距不变的表示，并结合图神经网络进行特征学习和分析
AI.result: 在合成网格数据集上验证了方法的有效性，展示了其在保持不变性的同时准确捕捉几何和拓扑特征的能力
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合充分统计量与图神经网络，实现了对嵌入单纯复形的鲁棒分析，为几何处理和拓扑数据分析提供了新思路

authors_text: Junli Gao,Zhaoji Huang,Zhaonian Tang,Haitao Song,Wenyu Liang
title: Visuo-Tactile-Based Slip Detection Using A Multi-Scale Temporal Convolution Network
title_zh: 使用多尺度时间卷积网络的基于视觉触觉的滑动检测
abstract: Humans can accurately determine whether the object in hand has slipped or not by visual and tactile perception. However, it is still a challenge for robots to detect in-hand object slip through visuo-tactile fusion. To address this issue, a novel visuo-tactile fusion deep neural network is proposed to detect slip, which is a time-dependent continuous action. By using the multi-scale temporal convolution network (MS-TCN) to extract the temporal features of visual and tactile data, the slip can be detected effectively. In this paper, a 7-dregree-of-freedom (7-DoF) robot manipulator equipped with a camera and a tactile sensor is used for data collection on 50 daily objects with different shapes, materials, sizes, and weights. Therefore, a dataset is built, where the grasping data of 40 objects and 10 objects are used for network training and testing, respectively. The detection accuracy is 96.96% based on the proposed model. Also, the proposed model is compared with a visuo-tactile fusion deep neural network (DNN) based on long short-term memory network (LSTM) on the collected dataset and a public dataset using the GelSight tactile sensor. The results demonstrate that the proposed model performs better on both dataset. The proposed model can help robots grasp daily objects reliably. In addition, it can be used in grasping force control, grasping policy generation and dexterous manipulation.
