However, it is still a challenge for robots to detect in-hand object slip through visuo-tactile fusion. To address this issue, a novel visuo-tactile fusion deep neural network is proposed to detect slip, which is a time-dependent continuous action. By using the multi-scale temporal convolution network (MS-TCN) to extract the temporal features of visual and tactile data, the slip can be detected effectively. In this paper, a 7-dregree-of-freedom (7-DoF) robot manipulator equipped with a camera and a tactile sensor is used for data collection on 50 daily objects with different shapes, materials, sizes, and weights. Therefore, a dataset is built, where the grasping data of 40 objects and 10 objects are used for network training and testing, respectively. The detection accuracy is 96.96% based on the proposed model. Also, the proposed model is compared with a visuo-tactile fusion deep neural network (DNN) based on long short-term memory network (LSTM) on the collected dataset and a public dataset using the GelSight tactile sensor. The results demonstrate that the proposed model performs better on both dataset. The proposed model can help robots grasp daily objects reliably. In addition, it can be used in grasping force control, grasping policy generation and dexterous manipulation.
abstract_zh: 人类可以通过视觉和触觉感知来准确判断手中的物体是否滑落。然而，对于机器人来说，通过视觉触觉融合来检测手中物体的滑动仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新颖的视觉触觉融合深度神经网络来检测滑动，这是一种依赖于时间的连续动作。通过使用多尺度时间卷积网络（MS-TCN）提取视觉和触觉数据的时间特征，可以有效地检测滑倒。在本文中，使用配备摄像头和触觉传感器的七自由度（7-DoF）机器人操纵器对 50 个不同形状、材料、尺寸和重量的日常物体进行数据收集。因此，建立了一个数据集，其中40个物体和10个物体的抓取数据分别用于网络训练和测试。基于所提出的模型，检测准确率为96.96%。此外，在收集的数据集和使用 GelSight 触觉传感器的公共数据集上，将所提出的模型与基于长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 的视觉触觉融合深度神经网络 (DNN) 进行了比较。结果表明，所提出的模型在两个数据集上都表现更好。所提出的模型可以帮助机器人可靠地抓取日常物体。此外，还可以用于抓力控制、抓政策生成和灵巧操控。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度时序卷积网络的视觉-触觉融合方法，用于检测机器人抓取物体时的滑动。
AI.motivation: 人类可通过视觉和触觉准确判断物体是否滑落，但机器人通过融合感知实现滑动检测仍具挑战性，需提升抓取可靠性。
AI.method: 设计多尺度时序卷积网络（MS-TCN）提取视觉与触觉数据的时序特征，使用7自由度机械臂采集50种日常物品的抓取数据构建数据集，并与LSTM基模型对比验证。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上实现96.96%检测准确率，且在公开数据集上优于LSTM基模型，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可提升机器人抓取可靠性，适用于抓取力控制、策略生成及灵巧操作等场景。

Also, the proposed model is compared with a visuo-tactile fusion deep neural network (DNN) based on long short-term memory network (LSTM) on the collected dataset and a public dataset using the GelSight tactile sensor. The results demonstrate that the proposed model performs better on both dataset. The proposed model can help robots grasp daily objects reliably. In addition, it can be used in grasping force control, grasping policy generation and dexterous manipulation. 人类可以通过视觉和触觉感知来准确判断手中的物体是否滑落。然而，对于机器人来说，通过视觉触觉融合来检测手中物体的滑动仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新颖的视觉触觉融合深度神经网络来检测滑动，这是一种依赖于时间的连续动作。通过使用多尺度时间卷积网络（MS-TCN）提取视觉和触觉数据的时间特征，可以有效地检测滑倒。在本文中，使用配备摄像头和触觉传感器的七自由度（7-DoF）机器人操纵器对 50 个不同形状、材料、尺寸和重量的日常物体进行数据收集。因此，建立了一个数据集，其中40个物体和10个物体的抓取数据分别用于网络训练和测试。基于所提出的模型，检测准确率为96.96%。此外，在收集的数据集和使用 GelSight 触觉传感器的公共数据集上，将所提出的模型与基于长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 的视觉触觉融合深度神经网络 (DNN) 进行了比较。结果表明，所提出的模型在两个数据集上都表现更好。所提出的模型可以帮助机器人可靠地抓取日常物体。此外，还可以用于抓力控制、抓政策生成和灵巧操控。 本文提出一种基于多尺度时序卷积网络的视觉-触觉融合方法，用于检测机器人抓取物体时的滑动。 Junli Gao,Zhaoji Huang,Zhaonian Tang,Haitao Song,Wenyu Liang cs.RO

authors_text: Junwoo Park,Jungsoo Lee,Youngin Cho,Woncheol Shin,Dongmin Kim,Jaegul Choo,Edward Choi
title: Deep Imbalanced Time-series Forecasting via Local Discrepancy Density
title_zh: 通过局部差异密度进行深度不平衡时间序列预测
comment: Accepted at European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML/PKDD) 2023
comments: Accepted at European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML/PKDD) 2023
abstract: Time-series forecasting models often encounter abrupt changes in a given period of time which generally occur due to unexpected or unknown events. Despite their scarce occurrences in the training set, abrupt changes incur loss that significantly contributes to the total loss. Therefore, they act as noisy training samples and prevent the model from learning generalizable patterns, namely the normal states. Based on our findings, we propose a reweighting framework that down-weights the losses incurred by abrupt changes and up-weights those by normal states. For the reweighting framework, we first define a measurement termed Local Discrepancy (LD) which measures the degree of abruptness of a change in a given period of time. Since a training set is mostly composed of normal states, we then consider how frequently the temporal changes appear in the training set based on LD. Our reweighting framework is applicable to existing time-series forecasting models regardless of the architectures. Through extensive experiments on 12 time-series forecasting models over eight datasets with various in-output sequence lengths, we demonstrate that applying our reweighting framework reduces MSE by 10.1% on average and by up to 18.6% in the state-of-the-art model.
summary: Time-series forecasting models often encounter abrupt changes in a given period of time which generally occur due to unexpected or unknown events. Despite their scarce occurrences in the training set, abrupt changes incur loss that significantly contributes to the total loss. Therefore, they act as noisy training samples and prevent the model from learning generalizable patterns, namely the normal states. Based on our findings, we propose a reweighting framework that down-weights the losses incurred by abrupt changes and up-weights those by normal states. For the reweighting framework, we first define a measurement termed Local Discrepancy (LD) which measures the degree of abruptness of a change in a given period of time. Since a training set is mostly composed of normal states, we then consider how frequently the temporal changes appear in the training set based on LD. Our reweighting framework is applicable to existing time-series forecasting models regardless of the architectures. Through extensive experiments on 12 time-series forecasting models over eight datasets with various in-output sequence lengths, we demonstrate that applying our reweighting framework reduces MSE by 10.1% on average and by up to 18.6% in the state-of-the-art model.
abstract_zh: 时间序列预测模型经常会遇到给定时间段内的突然变化，这些变化通常是由于意外或未知事件而发生的。尽管它们在训练集中很少出现，但突然的变化会导致损失，从而显着影响总损失。因此，它们充当噪声训练样本，并阻止模型学习可概括的模式，即正常状态。根据我们的研究结果，我们提出了一个重新加权框架，该框架降低了突然变化造成的损失的权重，并提高了正常状态造成的损失的权重。对于重新加权框架，我们首先定义一个称为局部差异（LD）的测量，它测量给定时间段内变化的突然程度。由于训练集主要由正常状态组成，因此我们基于 LD 考虑训练集中出现时间变化的频率。我们的重新加权框架适用于现有的时间序列预测模型，无论架构如何。通过对 8 个具有不同输入序列长度的数据集的 12 个时间序列预测模型进行大量实验，我们证明，应用我们的重新加权框架平均将 MSE 降低 10.1%，在最先进的模型中降低高达 18.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部差异密度的重加权框架，解决时间序列预测中突发变化导致的不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 时间序列预测模型在训练集中遭遇罕见但影响大的突发变化时，会导致显著损失并干扰模型学习正常状态的泛化能力。
AI.method: 定义局部差异（LD）度量变化突变程度，基于LD计算变化频率并构建重加权框架，对突发变化损失降权、正常状态损失升权。
AI.result: 在8个数据集的12种模型实验中，平均降低MSE 10.1%，最佳模型降幅达18.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该重加权框架有效缓解了突发变化对模型训练的干扰，显著提升时间序列预测精度且具有模型通用性。

Therefore, they act as noisy training samples and prevent the model from learning generalizable patterns, namely the normal states. Based on our findings, we propose a reweighting framework that down-weights the losses incurred by abrupt changes and up-weights those by normal states. For the reweighting framework, we first define a measurement termed Local Discrepancy (LD) which measures the degree of abruptness of a change in a given period of time. Since a training set is mostly composed of normal states, we then consider how frequently the temporal changes appear in the training set based on LD. Our reweighting framework is applicable to existing time-series forecasting models regardless of the architectures. Through extensive experiments on 12 time-series forecasting models over eight datasets with various in-output sequence lengths, we demonstrate that applying our reweighting framework reduces MSE by 10.1% on average and by up to 18.6% in the state-of-the-art model. 时间序列预测模型经常会遇到给定时间段内的突然变化，这些变化通常是由于意外或未知事件而发生的。尽管它们在训练集中很少出现，但突然的变化会导致损失，从而显着影响总损失。因此，它们充当噪声训练样本，并阻止模型学习可概括的模式，即正常状态。根据我们的研究结果，我们提出了一个重新加权框架，该框架降低了突然变化造成的损失的权重，并提高了正常状态造成的损失的权重。对于重新加权框架，我们首先定义一个称为局部差异（LD）的测量，它测量给定时间段内变化的突然程度。由于训练集主要由正常状态组成，因此我们基于 LD 考虑训练集中出现时间变化的频率。我们的重新加权框架适用于现有的时间序列预测模型，无论架构如何。通过对 8 个具有不同输入序列长度的数据集的 12 个时间序列预测模型进行大量实验，我们证明，应用我们的重新加权框架平均将 MSE 降低 10.1%，在最先进的模型中降低高达 18.6%。 本文提出一种基于局部差异密度的重加权框架，解决时间序列预测中突发变化导致的不平衡问题。 Junwoo Park,Jungsoo Lee,Youngin Cho,Woncheol Shin,Dongmin Kim,Jaegul Choo,Edward Choi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuhao Zhou,Mingjia Shi,Yuanxi Li,Qing Ye,Yanan Sun,Jiancheng Lv
title: Communication-efficient Federated Learning with Single-Step Synthetic Features Compressor for Faster Convergence
title_zh: 具有单步合成特征压缩器的通信高效联合学习可实现更快的收敛
abstract: Reducing communication overhead in federated learning (FL) is challenging but crucial for large-scale distributed privacy-preserving machine learning. While methods utilizing sparsification or others can largely lower the communication overhead, the convergence rate is also greatly compromised. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named single-step synthetic features compressor (3SFC), to achieve communication-efficient FL by directly constructing a tiny synthetic dataset based on raw gradients. Thus, 3SFC can achieve an extremely low compression rate when the constructed dataset contains only one data sample. Moreover, 3SFC's compressing phase utilizes a similarity-based objective function so that it can be optimized with just one step, thereby considerably improving its performance and robustness. In addition, to minimize the compressing error, error feedback (EF) is also incorporated into 3SFC. Experiments on multiple datasets and models suggest that 3SFC owns significantly better convergence rates compared to competing methods with lower compression rates (up to 0.02%). Furthermore, ablation studies and visualizations show that 3SFC can carry more information than competing methods for every communication round, further validating its effectiveness.
summary: Reducing communication overhead in federated learning (FL) is challenging but crucial for large-scale distributed privacy-preserving machine learning. While methods utilizing sparsification or others can largely lower the communication overhead, the convergence rate is also greatly compromised. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named single-step synthetic features compressor (3SFC), to achieve communication-efficient FL by directly constructing a tiny synthetic dataset based on raw gradients. Thus, 3SFC can achieve an extremely low compression rate when the constructed dataset contains only one data sample. Moreover, 3SFC's compressing phase utilizes a similarity-based objective function so that it can be optimized with just one step, thereby considerably improving its performance and robustness. In addition, to minimize the compressing error, error feedback (EF) is also incorporated into 3SFC. Experiments on multiple datasets and models suggest that 3SFC owns significantly better convergence rates compared to competing methods with lower compression rates (up to 0.02%). Furthermore, ablation studies and visualizations show that 3SFC can carry more information than competing methods for every communication round, further validating its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 减少联邦学习（FL）中的通信开销具有挑战性，但对于大规模分布式隐私保护机器学习至关重要。虽然利用稀疏化或其他方法可以大大降低通信开销，但收敛速度也受到很大影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为单步合成特征压缩器（3SFC）的新方法，通过直接构建基于原始梯度的微小合成数据集来实现通信高效的 FL。因此，当构建的数据集仅包含一个数据样本时，3SFC可以实现极低的压缩率。此外，3SFC的压缩阶段采用了基于相似性的目标函数，只需一步即可优化，从而大大提高了其性能和鲁棒性。此外，为了最小化压缩误差，误差反馈(EF)也被纳入3SFC中。对多个数据集和模型的实验表明，与压缩率较低（高达 0.02%）的竞争方法相比，3SFC 具有明显更好的收敛率。此外，消融研究和可视化表明，3SFC 在每一轮通信中都可以比竞争方法携带更多信息，进一步验证了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为3SFC的单步合成特征压缩器，用于实现通信高效的联邦学习，通过构建微型合成数据集来降低通信开销并加快收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习中的通信压缩方法虽然能减少通信开销，但会显著损害收敛速度，因此需要一种既能高效压缩又能保持收敛性能的新方法。
AI.method: 3SFC通过直接基于原始梯度构建微型合成数据集实现压缩，利用相似度目标函数进行单步优化，并结合误差反馈机制以减少压缩误差。
AI.result: 实验表明，3SFC在多个数据集和模型上均表现出显著优于现有方法的收敛速度，压缩率低至0.02%，且每轮通信携带更多信息。
AI.conclusion: 3SFC通过合成数据集和单步优化有效平衡了通信效率与收敛性能，为联邦学习提供了更高效且鲁棒的压缩解决方案。

authors_text: Prabhat K. Mishra,Mateus V. Gasparino,Andres E. B. Velasquez,Girish Chowdhary
title: Deep Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 深度模型预测控制
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.07171
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.07171
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning based model predictive control algorithm for control affine nonlinear discrete time systems with matched and bounded state-dependent uncertainties of unknown structure. Since the structure of uncertainties is not known, a deep neural network (DNN) is employed to approximate the disturbances. In order to avoid any unwanted behavior during the learning phase, a tube based model predictive controller is employed, which ensures satisfaction of constraints and input-to-state stability of the closed-loop states.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning based model predictive control algorithm for control affine nonlinear discrete time systems with matched and bounded state-dependent uncertainties of unknown structure. Since the structure of uncertainties is not known, a deep neural network (DNN) is employed to approximate the disturbances. In order to avoid any unwanted behavior during the learning phase, a tube based model predictive controller is employed, which ensures satisfaction of constraints and input-to-state stability of the closed-loop states.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的模型预测控制算法，用于控制具有匹配且有界的未知结构状态相关不确定性的仿射非线性离散时间系统。由于不确定性的结构未知，因此采用深度神经网络（DNN）来近似扰动。为了避免在学习阶段出现任何不需要的行为，采用了基于管的模型预测控制器，这确保了约束的满足和闭环状态的输入到状态的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的模型预测控制算法，用于处理具有未知结构状态依赖不确定性的非线性离散时间系统。
AI.motivation: 传统模型预测控制难以处理未知结构的不确定性，需确保约束满足和系统稳定性。
AI.method: 利用深度神经网络逼近未知扰动，并结合管状模型预测控制以保证约束和稳定性。
AI.result: 算法在保证约束和输入到状态稳定性的同时，有效处理了未知结构的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为具有未知状态依赖不确定性的非线性系统提供了有效且稳定的控制策略。

authors_text: Shantanav Chakraborty
title: Implementing any Linear Combination of Unitaries on Intermediate-term Quantum Computers
title_zh: 在中期量子计算机上实现任意酉线性组合
abstract: We develop three new methods to implement any Linear Combination of Unitaries (LCU), a powerful quantum algorithmic tool with diverse applications. While the standard LCU procedure requires several ancilla qubits and sophisticated multi-qubit controlled operations, our methods consume significantly fewer quantum resources. The first method (Single-Ancilla LCU) estimates expectation values of observables with respect to any quantum state prepared by an LCU procedure while requiring only a single ancilla qubit, and no multi-qubit controlled operations. The second approach (Analog LCU) is a simple, physically motivated, continuous-time analogue of LCU, tailored to hybrid qubit-qumode systems. The third method (Ancilla-free LCU) requires no ancilla qubit at all and is useful when we are interested in the projection of a quantum state (prepared by the LCU procedure) in some subspace of interest. We apply the first two techniques to develop new quantum algorithms for a wide range of practical problems, ranging from Hamiltonian simulation, ground state preparation and property estimation, and quantum linear systems. Remarkably, despite consuming fewer quantum resources they retain a provable quantum advantage. The third technique allows us to connect discrete and continuous-time quantum walks with their classical counterparts. It also unifies the recently developed optimal quantum spatial search algorithms in both these frameworks, and leads to the development of new ones that require fewer ancilla qubits. Overall, our results are quite generic and can be readily applied to other problems, even beyond those considered here.
summary: We develop three new methods to implement any Linear Combination of Unitaries (LCU), a powerful quantum algorithmic tool with diverse applications. While the standard LCU procedure requires several ancilla qubits and sophisticated multi-qubit controlled operations, our methods consume significantly fewer quantum resources. The first method (Single-Ancilla LCU) estimates expectation values of observables with respect to any quantum state prepared by an LCU procedure while requiring only a single ancilla qubit, and no multi-qubit controlled operations. The second approach (Analog LCU) is a simple, physically motivated, continuous-time analogue of LCU, tailored to hybrid qubit-qumode systems. The third method (Ancilla-free LCU) requires no ancilla qubit at all and is useful when we are interested in the projection of a quantum state (prepared by the LCU procedure) in some subspace of interest. We apply the first two techniques to develop new quantum algorithms for a wide range of practical problems, ranging from Hamiltonian simulation, ground state preparation and property estimation, and quantum linear systems. Remarkably, despite consuming fewer quantum resources they retain a provable quantum advantage. The third technique allows us to connect discrete and continuous-time quantum walks with their classical counterparts. It also unifies the recently developed optimal quantum spatial search algorithms in both these frameworks, and leads to the development of new ones that require fewer ancilla qubits. Overall, our results are quite generic and can be readily applied to other problems, even beyond those considered here.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了三种新方法来实现任何酉线性组合 (LCU)，这是一种具有多种应用的强大量子算法工具。虽然标准 LCU 程序需要多个辅助量子位和复杂的多量子位控制操作，但我们的方法消耗的量子资源要少得多。第一种方法（单辅助 LCU）估计关于由 LCU 过程准备的任何量子态的可观测值的期望值，同时仅需要单个辅助量子位，并且不需要多量子位控制操作。第二种方法（模拟 LCU）是一种简单的、物理驱动的、连续时间的 LCU 模拟，专为混合量子位-量子模式系统量身定制。第三种方法（无辅助 LCU）根本不需要辅助量子位，并且当我们对某个感兴趣的子空间中的量子态（由 LCU 过程准备）的投影感兴趣时非常有用。我们应用前两种技术来开发新的量子算法，解决广泛的实际问题，包括哈密顿模拟、基态准备和属性估计以及量子线性系统。值得注意的是，尽管消耗的量子资源较少，但它们仍然保留了可证明的量子优势。第三种技术使我们能够将离散和连续时间量子行走与其经典对应物联系起来。它还将最近开发的最佳量子空间搜索算法统一在这两个框架中，并导致需要更少辅助量子位的新算法的开发。总的来说，我们的结果非常通用，可以很容易地应用于其他问题，甚至超出这里考虑的问题。

AI.tldr: 开发三种新方法实现线性组合单元（LCU），以减少量子计算资源消耗
AI.motivation: 传统LCU方法需要大量辅助量子比特和复杂操作，新方法旨在减少资源消耗并保持量子优势
AI.method: 提出三种方法：单辅助LCU、模拟LCU和无辅助LCU，分别减少辅助量子比特和操作复杂度
AI.result: 开发出适用于哈密顿模拟等的新算法，保持量子优势，并统一了量子行走与经典算法框架
AI.conclusion: 方法通用性强，可应用于更广泛的问题，推动中等规模量子计算机的发展

authors_text: Emina Alickovic,Tobias Dorszewski,Thomas U. Christiansen,Kasper Eskelund,Leonardo Gizzi,Martin A. Skoglund,Dorothea Wendt
title: Predicting EEG Responses to Attended Speech via Deep Neural Networks for Speech
title_zh: 通过语音深度神经网络预测对参与语音的脑电图反应
abstract: Attending to the speech stream of interest in multi-talker environments can be a challenging task, particularly for listeners with hearing impairment. Research suggests that neural responses assessed with electroencephalography (EEG) are modulated by listener`s auditory attention, revealing selective neural tracking (NT) of the attended speech. NT methods mostly rely on hand-engineered acoustic and linguistic speech features to predict the neural response. Only recently, deep neural network (DNN) models without specific linguistic information have been used to extract speech features for NT, demonstrating that speech features in hierarchical DNN layers can predict neural responses throughout the auditory pathway. In this study, we go one step further to investigate the suitability of similar DNN models for speech to predict neural responses to competing speech observed in EEG. We recorded EEG data using a 64-channel acquisition system from 17 listeners with normal hearing instructed to attend to one of two competing talkers. Our data revealed that EEG responses are significantly better predicted by DNN-extracted speech features than by hand-engineered acoustic features. Furthermore, analysis of hierarchical DNN layers showed that early layers yielded the highest predictions. Moreover, we found a significant increase in auditory attention classification accuracies with the use of DNN-extracted speech features over the use of hand-engineered acoustic features. These findings open a new avenue for development of new NT measures to evaluate and further advance hearing technology.
summary: Attending to the speech stream of interest in multi-talker environments can be a challenging task, particularly for listeners with hearing impairment. Research suggests that neural responses assessed with electroencephalography (EEG) are modulated by listener`s auditory attention, revealing selective neural tracking (NT) of the attended speech. NT methods mostly rely on hand-engineered acoustic and linguistic speech features to predict the neural response. Only recently, deep neural network (DNN) models without specific linguistic information have been used to extract speech features for NT, demonstrating that speech features in hierarchical DNN layers can predict neural responses throughout the auditory pathway. In this study, we go one step further to investigate the suitability of similar DNN models for speech to predict neural responses to competing speech observed in EEG. We recorded EEG data using a 64-channel acquisition system from 17 listeners with normal hearing instructed to attend to one of two competing talkers. Our data revealed that EEG responses are significantly better predicted by DNN-extracted speech features than by hand-engineered acoustic features. Furthermore, analysis of hierarchical DNN layers showed that early layers yielded the highest predictions. Moreover, we found a significant increase in auditory attention classification accuracies with the use of DNN-extracted speech features over the use of hand-engineered acoustic features. These findings open a new avenue for development of new NT measures to evaluate and further advance hearing technology.
abstract_zh: 在多人环境中关注感兴趣的语音流可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是对于有听力障碍的听众而言。研究表明，脑电图（EEG）评估的神经反应受到听众听觉注意力的调节，揭示了所听演讲的选择性神经跟踪（NT）。 NT 方法主要依靠手工设计的声学和语言语音特征来预测神经反应。直到最近，没有特定语言信息的深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型才被用来提取 NT 的语音特征，证明分层 DNN 层中的语音特征可以预测整个听觉通路的神经反应。在这项研究中，我们进一步研究了类似的 DNN 语音模型的适用性，以预测对 EEG 中观察到的竞争语音的神经反应。我们使用 64 通道采集系统记录了 17 名听力正常的听众的脑电图数据，这些听众被指示去关注两名竞争者中的一位。我们的数据显示，与手工设计的声学特征相比，DNN 提取的语音特征可以更好地预测 EEG 反应。此外，对分层 DNN 层的分析表明，早期层产生的预测最高。此外，我们发现，与使用手工设计的声学特征相比，使用 DNN 提取的语音特征可以显着提高听觉注意力分类的准确性。这些发现为开发新的 NT 测量方法以评估和进一步推进听力技术开辟了新途径。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过深度神经网络（DNN）提取的语音特征预测听者在多说话人环境中对目标语音的EEG响应，对比传统手工设计的声学特征的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统选择性神经追踪（NT）方法依赖手工设计的声学和语言特征，难以全面捕捉语音复杂性。DNN能自动提取分层语音特征，可能更有效预测神经响应并提升助听技术评估。
AI.method: 使用64通道EEG系统记录17名正常听力受试者在双说话人竞争环境下的脑电数据，对比DNN提取的语音特征与传统声学特征在预测EEG响应及注意力分类中的表现，并分析DNN不同层级的贡献。
AI.result: DNN提取的语音特征显著优于传统声学特征预测EEG响应，且早期DNN层级预测效果最佳；注意力分类准确率也因DNN特征而显著提升。
AI.conclusion: DNN语音特征为开发新型NT指标提供了可行路径，有助于改进助听设备的评估与优化。

ai_content_json.result: DNN提取的语音特征显著优于传统声学特征预测EEG响应，且早期DNN层级预测效果最佳；注意力分类准确率也因DNN特征而显著提升。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DNN语音特征为开发新型NT指标提供了可行路径，有助于改进助听设备的评估与优化。

tldr: 本研究通过深度神经网络（DNN）提取的语音特征预测听者在多说话人环境中对目标语音的EEG响应，对比传统手工设计的声学特征的效果。
motivation: 传统选择性神经追踪（NT）方法依赖手工设计的声学和语言特征，难以全面捕捉语音复杂性。DNN能自动提取分层语音特征，可能更有效预测神经响应并提升助听技术评估。
method: 使用64通道EEG系统记录17名正常听力受试者在双说话人竞争环境下的脑电数据，对比DNN提取的语音特征与传统声学特征在预测EEG响应及注意力分类中的表现，并分析DNN不同层级的贡献。
result: DNN提取的语音特征显著优于传统声学特征预测EEG响应，且早期DNN层级预测效果最佳；注意力分类准确率也因DNN特征而显著提升。
conclusion: DNN语音特征为开发新型NT指标提供了可行路径，有助于改进助听设备的评估与优化。
search_text: Predicting EEG Responses to Attended Speech via Deep Neural Networks for Speech 通过语音深度神经网络预测对参与语音的脑电图反应 Attending to the speech stream of interest in multi-talker environments can be a challenging task, particularly for listeners with hearing impairment. Research suggests that neural responses assessed with electroencephalography (EEG) are modulated by listener`s auditory attention, revealing selective neural tracking (NT) of the attended speech. NT methods mostly rely on hand-engineered acoustic and linguistic speech features to predict the neural response. Only recently, deep neural network (DNN) models without specific linguistic information have been used to extract speech features for NT, demonstrating that speech features in hierarchical DNN layers can predict neural responses throughout the auditory pathway. In this study, we go one step further to investigate the suitability of similar DNN models for speech to predict neural responses to competing speech observed in EEG. We recorded EEG data using a 64-channel acquisition system from 17 listeners with normal hearing instructed to attend to one of two competing talkers. Our data revealed that EEG responses are significantly better predicted by DNN-extracted speech features than by hand-engineered acoustic features. Furthermore, analysis of hierarchical DNN layers showed that early layers yielded the highest predictions. Moreover, we found a significant increase in auditory attention classification accuracies with the use of DNN-extracted speech features over the use of hand-engineered acoustic features. These findings open a new avenue for development of new NT measures to evaluate and further advance hearing technology. 在多人环境中关注感兴趣的语音流可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是对于有听力障碍的听众而言。研究表明，脑电图（EEG）评估的神经反应受到听众听觉注意力的调节，揭示了所听演讲的选择性神经跟踪（NT）。 NT 方法主要依靠手工设计的声学和语言语音特征来预测神经反应。直到最近，没有特定语言信息的深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型才被用来提取 NT 的语音特征，证明分层 DNN 层中的语音特征可以预测整个听觉通路的神经反应。在这项研究中，我们进一步研究了类似的 DNN 语音模型的适用性，以预测对 EEG 中观察到的竞争语音的神经反应。我们使用 64 通道采集系统记录了 17 名听力正常的听众的脑电图数据，这些听众被指示去关注两名竞争者中的一位。我们的数据显示，与手工设计的声学特征相比，DNN 提取的语音特征可以更好地预测 EEG 反应。此外，对分层 DNN 层的分析表明，早期层产生的预测最高。此外，我们发现，与使用手工设计的声学特征相比，使用 DNN 提取的语音特征可以显着提高听觉注意力分类的准确性。这些发现为开发新的 NT 测量方法以评估和进一步推进听力技术开辟了新途径。 本研究通过深度神经网络（DNN）提取的语音特征预测听者在多说话人环境中对目标语音的EEG响应，对比传统手工设计的声学特征的效果。 Emina Alickovic,Tobias Dorszewski,Thomas U. Christiansen,Kasper Eskelund,Leonardo Gizzi,Martin A. Skoglund,Dorothea Wendt cs.HC,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Francesco Betti Sorbelli,Federico Corò,Sajal K. Das,Cristina M. Pinotti,Anil Shende
title: Dispatching Point Selection for a Drone-Based Delivery System Operating in a Mixed Euclidean-Manhattan Grid
title_zh: 在混合欧几里得-曼哈顿网格中运行的基于无人机的交付系统的调度点选择
abstract: In this paper, we present a drone-based delivery system that assumes to deal with two different mixed-areas, i.e., rural and urban. In these mixed-areas, called EM-grids, the distances are measured with two different metrics, and the shortest path between two destinations concatenates the Euclidean and Manhattan metrics. Due to payload constraints, the drone serves a single customer at a time returning back to the dispatching point (DP) after each delivery to load a new parcel for the next customer. In this paper, we present the 1-Median Euclidean-Manhattan grid Problem (MEMP) for EM-grids, whose goal is to determine the drone's DP position that minimizes the sum of the distances between all the locations to be served and the point itself. We study the MEMP on two different scenarios, i.e., one in which all the customers in the area need to be served (full-grid) and another one where only a subset of these must be served (partial-grid). For the full-grid scenario we devise optimal, approximation, and heuristic algorithms, while for the partial-grid scenario we devise optimal and heuristic algorithms. Eventually, we comprehensively evaluate our algorithms on generated synthetic and quasi-real data.
summary: In this paper, we present a drone-based delivery system that assumes to deal with two different mixed-areas, i.e., rural and urban. In these mixed-areas, called EM-grids, the distances are measured with two different metrics, and the shortest path between two destinations concatenates the Euclidean and Manhattan metrics. Due to payload constraints, the drone serves a single customer at a time returning back to the dispatching point (DP) after each delivery to load a new parcel for the next customer. In this paper, we present the 1-Median Euclidean-Manhattan grid Problem (MEMP) for EM-grids, whose goal is to determine the drone's DP position that minimizes the sum of the distances between all the locations to be served and the point itself. We study the MEMP on two different scenarios, i.e., one in which all the customers in the area need to be served (full-grid) and another one where only a subset of these must be served (partial-grid). For the full-grid scenario we devise optimal, approximation, and heuristic algorithms, while for the partial-grid scenario we devise optimal and heuristic algorithms. Eventually, we comprehensively evaluate our algorithms on generated synthetic and quasi-real data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于无人机的交付系统，该系统假设处理两个不同的混合区域，即农村和城市。在这些称为 EM 网格的混合区域中，距离是用两种不同的度量来测量的，两个目的地之间的最短路径连接了欧几里得度量和曼哈顿度量。由于有效载荷的限制，无人机一次为一名客户提供服务，每次送货后返回调度点 (DP) 为下一位客户装载新包裹。在本文中，我们提出了 EM 网格的 1 中值欧几里得曼哈顿网格问题 (MEMP)，其目标是确定无人机的 DP 位置，从而最小化所有要服务的位置与点本身之间的距离总和。我们在两种不同的场景下研究 MEMP，即一种场景中需要为该区域中的所有客户提供服务（全网格），另一种场景中只需要为其中的一部分客户提供服务（部分网格）。对于全网格场景，我们设计了最优算法、近似算法和启发式算法，而对于部分网格场景，我们设计了最优算法和启发式算法。最终，我们根据生成的合成数据和准真实数据全面评估我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机的配送系统，针对混合欧几里得-曼哈顿网格（EM网格）中的农村和城市区域，研究如何选择最优调度点（DP）以最小化所有服务点到该点的距离总和。
AI.motivation: 无人机配送需适应农村（欧几里得距离）和城市（曼哈顿距离）混合区域的复杂环境，传统方法无法有效处理两种距离度量的混合场景，需优化调度点位置以提升效率。
AI.method: 提出1-Median Euclidean-Manhattan网格问题（MEMP），针对全网格（所有客户需服务）和部分网格（仅部分客户需服务）场景，设计最优算法、近似算法和启发式算法，并在合成数据和准真实数据上验证。
AI.result: 算法在全网格和部分网格场景中均能有效减少总距离，启发式算法在计算效率与解质量间取得平衡，实验验证了方法在混合环境下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为混合距离度量环境下的无人机调度点选址提供了理论框架和实用算法，可支持复杂城市与农村区域的高效配送系统设计。

authors_text: Dmitry Rybin,Ruoyu Sun,Zhi-Quan Luo
title: Invariant Layers for Graphs with Nodes of Different Types
title_zh: 具有不同类型节点的图的不变层
abstract: Neural networks that satisfy invariance with respect to input permutations have been widely studied in machine learning literature. However, in many applications, only a subset of all input permutations is of interest. For heterogeneous graph data, one can focus on permutations that preserve node types. We fully characterize linear layers invariant to such permutations. We verify experimentally that implementing these layers in graph neural network architectures allows learning important node interactions more effectively than existing techniques. We show that the dimension of space of these layers is given by a generalization of Bell numbers, extending the work (Maron et al., 2019). We further narrow the invariant network design space by addressing a question about the sizes of tensor layers necessary for function approximation on graph data. Our findings suggest that function approximation on a graph with $n$ nodes can be done with tensors of sizes $\leq n$, which is tighter than the best-known bound $\leq n(n-1)/2$. For $d \times d$ image data with translation symmetry, our methods give a tight upper bound $2d - 1$ (instead of $d^{4}$) on sizes of invariant tensor generators via a surprising connection to Davenport constants.
summary: Neural networks that satisfy invariance with respect to input permutations have been widely studied in machine learning literature. However, in many applications, only a subset of all input permutations is of interest. For heterogeneous graph data, one can focus on permutations that preserve node types. We fully characterize linear layers invariant to such permutations. We verify experimentally that implementing these layers in graph neural network architectures allows learning important node interactions more effectively than existing techniques. We show that the dimension of space of these layers is given by a generalization of Bell numbers, extending the work (Maron et al., 2019). We further narrow the invariant network design space by addressing a question about the sizes of tensor layers necessary for function approximation on graph data. Our findings suggest that function approximation on a graph with $n$ nodes can be done with tensors of sizes $\leq n$, which is tighter than the best-known bound $\leq n(n-1)/2$. For $d \times d$ image data with translation symmetry, our methods give a tight upper bound $2d - 1$ (instead of $d^{4}$) on sizes of invariant tensor generators via a surprising connection to Davenport constants.
abstract_zh: 满足输入排列不变性的神经网络已在机器学习文献中得到广泛研究。然而，在许多应用中，仅对所有输入排列的子集感兴趣。对于异构图数据，可以关注保留节点类型的排列。我们充分描述了对这种排列不变的线性层。我们通过实验验证，在图神经网络架构中实现这些层可以比现有技术更有效地学习重要的节点交互。我们证明这些层的空间维度是由贝尔数的推广给出的，从而扩展了工作（Maron 等人，2019）。我们通过解决图数据函数逼近所需的张量层大小的问题，进一步缩小不变网络设计空间。我们的研究结果表明，具有 $n$ 个节点的图上的函数逼近可以使用大小为 $\leq n$ 的张量来完成，该张量比最著名的边界 $\leq n(n-1)/2$ 更紧。对于具有平移对称性的 $d \times d$ 图像数据，我们的方法通过与达文波特常数的令人惊讶的联系，给出了不变张量生成器大小的严格上限 $2d - 1$ （而不是 $d^{4}$）。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了针对异构图数据的节点类型保持不变的线性层，旨在提升图神经网络中节点交互学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络对输入排列的完全不变性在异构图中并非必要，仅需保持节点类型的排列不变性。现有方法在处理此类问题时效率不足，需更精确的数学框架和更紧的张量维度界。
AI.method: 通过完全表征保持节点类型排列不变的线性层，结合贝尔数推广其空间维度，并分析张量层大小对图数据函数逼近的影响，建立与达文波特常数的联系以优化图像数据的不变张量生成。
AI.result: 实验验证了新层在图神经网络中的有效性，证明其空间维度由广义贝尔数决定，张量大小上界从≤n(n-1)/2紧缩至≤n，并为图像数据提供2d-1的紧上界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为异构图的不变性学习提供了数学理论支持，通过优化张量维度界显著提升了图神经网络的效率，同时揭示了与数论常数的跨领域联系。

ai_content.conclusion: 该研究为异构图的不变性学习提供了数学理论支持，通过优化张量维度界显著提升了图神经网络的效率，同时揭示了与数论常数的跨领域联系。

search_text: Invariant Layers for Graphs with Nodes of Different Types 具有不同类型节点的图的不变层 Neural networks that satisfy invariance with respect to input permutations have been widely studied in machine learning literature. However, in many applications, only a subset of all input permutations is of interest. For heterogeneous graph data, one can focus on permutations that preserve node types. We fully characterize linear layers invariant to such permutations. We verify experimentally that implementing these layers in graph neural network architectures allows learning important node interactions more effectively than existing techniques. We show that the dimension of space of these layers is given by a generalization of Bell numbers, extending the work (Maron et al., 2019). We further narrow the invariant network design space by addressing a question about the sizes of tensor layers necessary for function approximation on graph data. Our findings suggest that function approximation on a graph with $n$ nodes can be done with tensors of sizes $\leq n$, which is tighter than the best-known bound $\leq n(n-1)/2$. For $d \times d$ image data with translation symmetry, our methods give a tight upper bound $2d - 1$ (instead of $d^{4}$) on sizes of invariant tensor generators via a surprising connection to Davenport constants. 满足输入排列不变性的神经网络已在机器学习文献中得到广泛研究。然而，在许多应用中，仅对所有输入排列的子集感兴趣。对于异构图数据，可以关注保留节点类型的排列。我们充分描述了对这种排列不变的线性层。我们通过实验验证，在图神经网络架构中实现这些层可以比现有技术更有效地学习重要的节点交互。我们证明这些层的空间维度是由贝尔数的推广给出的，从而扩展了工作（Maron 等人，2019）。我们通过解决图数据函数逼近所需的张量层大小的问题，进一步缩小不变网络设计空间。我们的研究结果表明，具有 $n$ 个节点的图上的函数逼近可以使用大小为 $\leq n$ 的张量来完成，该张量比最著名的边界 $\leq n(n-1)/2$ 更紧。对于具有平移对称性的 $d \times d$ 图像数据，我们的方法通过与达文波特常数的令人惊讶的联系，给出了不变张量生成器大小的严格上限 $2d - 1$ （而不是 $d^{4}$）。 该论文研究了针对异构图数据的节点类型保持不变的线性层，旨在提升图神经网络中节点交互学习的效率。 Dmitry Rybin,Ruoyu Sun,Zhi-Quan Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Pengyu Chen,Dongjing Miao,Weitian Tong,Zizheng Guo,Jianzhong Li,Zhipeng Cai
title: Random-Order Enumeration for Self-Reducible NP-Problems
title_zh: 自约 NP 问题的随机顺序枚举
abstract: In plenty of data analysis tasks, a basic and time-consuming process is to produce a large number of solutions and feed them into downstream processing. Various enumeration algorithms have been developed for this purpose. An enumeration algorithm produces all solutions of a problem instance without repetition. To be a statistically meaningful representation of the solution space, solutions are required to be enumerated in uniformly random order. This paper studies a set of self-reducible NP-problems in three hierarchies, where the problems are polynomially countable ($Sr_{NP}^{FP}$), admit FPTAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$), and admit FPRAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$), respectively. The trivial algorithm based on a (almost) uniform generator is in fact inefficient. We provide a new insight that the (almost) uniform generator is not the end of the story. More efficient algorithmic frameworks are proposed to enumerate solutions in uniformly random order for problems in these three hierarchies. (1) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FP}$, we show a random-order enumeration algorithm with polynomial delay (PDREnum); (2) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$, we show a Las Vegas random-order enumeration algorithm with expected polynomial delay (PDLVREnum); (3) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$, we devise a fully polynomial delay Atlantic City random-order enumeration algorithm with expected delay polynomial in the input size and the given error probability $δ$ (FPACREnum), which has a probability of at least $1-δ$ becoming a Las Vegas random-order enumeration algorithm. Finally, to further improve the efficiency of the random-order enumeration algorithms, based on the master/slave paradigm, we present a parallelization with 1.5-optimal enumeration delay and running time, along with the theoretical analysis.
summary: In plenty of data analysis tasks, a basic and time-consuming process is to produce a large number of solutions and feed them into downstream processing. Various enumeration algorithms have been developed for this purpose. An enumeration algorithm produces all solutions of a problem instance without repetition. To be a statistically meaningful representation of the solution space, solutions are required to be enumerated in uniformly random order. This paper studies a set of self-reducible NP-problems in three hierarchies, where the problems are polynomially countable ($Sr_{NP}^{FP}$), admit FPTAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$), and admit FPRAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$), respectively. The trivial algorithm based on a (almost) uniform generator is in fact inefficient. We provide a new insight that the (almost) uniform generator is not the end of the story. More efficient algorithmic frameworks are proposed to enumerate solutions in uniformly random order for problems in these three hierarchies. (1) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FP}$, we show a random-order enumeration algorithm with polynomial delay (PDREnum); (2) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$, we show a Las Vegas random-order enumeration algorithm with expected polynomial delay (PDLVREnum); (3) For problems in $Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$, we devise a fully polynomial delay Atlantic City random-order enumeration algorithm with expected delay polynomial in the input size and the given error probability $δ$ (FPACREnum), which has a probability of at least $1-δ$ becoming a Las Vegas random-order enumeration algorithm. Finally, to further improve the efficiency of the random-order enumeration algorithms, based on the master/slave paradigm, we present a parallelization with 1.5-optimal enumeration delay and running time, along with the theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 在大量数据分析任务中，一个基本且耗时的过程是产生大量解决方案并将其输入下游处理。为此目的已经开发了各种枚举算法。枚举算法产生问题实例的所有解决方案而不重复。为了成为解空间的统计上有意义的表示，需要以均匀随机的顺序枚举解。本文研究了三个层次结构中的一组自约 NP 问题，其中问题分别是多项式可数 ($Sr_{NP}^{FP}$)、承认 FPTAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$) 和承认 FPRAS ($Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$)。基于（几乎）均匀生成器的简单算法实际上效率很低。我们提供了一个新的见解，即（几乎）统一的生成器并不是故事的结局。提出了更有效的算法框架，以统一随机顺序枚举这三个层次结构中问题的解决方案。 (1) 对于$Sr_{NP}^{FP}$中的问题，我们展示了一种具有多项式延迟的随机顺序枚举算法(PDREnum)； (2) 对于$Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}$中的问题，我们展示了具有预期多项式延迟的拉斯维加斯随机顺序枚举算法(PDLVREnum)； (3) 针对 $Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}$ 中的问题，我们设计了一种完全多项式延迟大西洋城随机顺序枚举算法，其输入大小为预期延迟多项式，并且给定错误概率 $δ$ (FPACREnum)，该算法至少有 $1-δ$ 的概率成为拉斯维加斯随机顺序枚举算法。最后，为了进一步提高随机顺序枚举算法的效率，基于主/从范式，我们提出了具有1.5最优枚举延迟和运行时间的并行化，并进行了理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对三类自约化NP问题的随机顺序枚举算法，提出了多项式延迟、拉斯维加斯和全多项式延迟的随机顺序枚举框架，并实现了并行化优化。
AI.motivation: 在数据处理中，生成均匀随机顺序的解集是基础需求，但现有算法效率低下，需针对不同复杂度层级的自约化NP问题设计更高效的枚举方法。
AI.method: 针对三类问题分别设计算法：(1) Sr_{NP}^{FP}使用多项式延迟随机枚举算法PDREnum；(2) Sr_{NP}^{FPTAS}采用拉斯维加斯算法PDLVREnum；(3) Sr_{NP}^{FPRAS}提出全多项式延迟的FPACREnum，并基于主从模式实现1.5最优并行化。
AI.result: 提出了三种随机顺序枚举算法，分别适用于不同复杂度层级的问题，理论分析证明其效率优于传统方法，并通过并行化进一步降低时间延迟。
AI.conclusion: 本文为自约化NP问题的随机顺序枚举提供了分层算法框架，通过理论分析和并行优化显著提升了枚举效率，为大规模数据处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuya Onishi,Fumio Hashimoto,Kibo Ote,Keisuke Matsubara,Masanobu Ibaraki
title: Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Deep Image Prior-Based Robust PET Image Denoising
title_zh: 基于深度图像先验的鲁棒 PET 图像去噪的自监督预训练
abstract: Deep image prior (DIP) has been successfully applied to positron emission tomography (PET) image restoration, enabling represent implicit prior using only convolutional neural network architecture without training dataset, whereas the general supervised approach requires massive low- and high-quality PET image pairs. To answer the increased need for PET imaging with DIP, it is indispensable to improve the performance of the underlying DIP itself. Here, we propose a self-supervised pre-training model to improve the DIP-based PET image denoising performance. Our proposed pre-training model acquires transferable and generalizable visual representations from only unlabeled PET images by restoring various degraded PET images in a self-supervised approach. We evaluated the proposed method using clinical brain PET data with various radioactive tracers ($^{18}$F-florbetapir, $^{11}$C-Pittsburgh compound-B, $^{18}$F-fluoro-2-deoxy-D-glucose, and $^{15}$O-CO$_{2}$) acquired from different PET scanners. The proposed method using the self-supervised pre-training model achieved robust and state-of-the-art denoising performance while retaining spatial details and quantification accuracy compared to other unsupervised methods and pre-training model. These results highlight the potential that the proposed method is particularly effective against rare diseases and probes and helps reduce the scan time or the radiotracer dose without affecting the patients.
summary: Deep image prior (DIP) has been successfully applied to positron emission tomography (PET) image restoration, enabling represent implicit prior using only convolutional neural network architecture without training dataset, whereas the general supervised approach requires massive low- and high-quality PET image pairs. To answer the increased need for PET imaging with DIP, it is indispensable to improve the performance of the underlying DIP itself. Here, we propose a self-supervised pre-training model to improve the DIP-based PET image denoising performance. Our proposed pre-training model acquires transferable and generalizable visual representations from only unlabeled PET images by restoring various degraded PET images in a self-supervised approach. We evaluated the proposed method using clinical brain PET data with various radioactive tracers ($^{18}$F-florbetapir, $^{11}$C-Pittsburgh compound-B, $^{18}$F-fluoro-2-deoxy-D-glucose, and $^{15}$O-CO$_{2}$) acquired from different PET scanners. The proposed method using the self-supervised pre-training model achieved robust and state-of-the-art denoising performance while retaining spatial details and quantification accuracy compared to other unsupervised methods and pre-training model. These results highlight the potential that the proposed method is particularly effective against rare diseases and probes and helps reduce the scan time or the radiotracer dose without affecting the patients.
abstract_zh: 深度图像先验（DIP）已成功应用于正电子发射断层扫描（PET）图像恢复，能够仅使用卷积神经网络架构而不需要训练数据集来表示隐式先验，而一般的监督方法需要大量低质量和高质量的 PET 图像对。为了满足对 DIP PET 成像日益增长的需求，提高底层 DIP 本身的性能是必不可少的。在这里，我们提出了一种自监督预训练模型来提高基于 DIP 的 PET 图像去噪性能。我们提出的预训练模型通过以自我监督的方法恢复各种退化的 PET 图像，仅从未标记的 PET 图像中获取可转移和可概括的视觉表示。我们使用从不同 PET 扫描仪获取的各种放射性示踪剂（$^{18}$F-florbetapir、$^{11}$C-Pittsburghcompound-B、$^{18}$F-氟-2-脱氧-D-葡萄糖和 $^{15}$O-CO$_{2}$）临床脑部 PET 数据评估了所提出的方法。与其他无监督方法和预训练模型相比，所提出的使用自监督预训练模型的方法实现了鲁棒且最先进的去噪性能，同时保留了空间细节和量化精度。这些结果凸显了所提出的方法对罕见疾病和探针特别有效的潜力，并有助于减少扫描时间或放射性示踪剂剂量而不影响患者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督预训练的深度图像先验（DIP）方法，用于提升PET图像去噪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖大量标注的高质量PET图像对，而DIP无需数据集但性能有限。临床需求推动需提升DIP在稀有疾病及低剂量扫描场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过自监督预训练模型，仅利用未标注PET图像恢复多种退化PET图像，学习可迁移的视觉表征以增强DIP去噪能力。
AI.result: 在多种放射性示踪剂及PET设备的临床脑部数据上，该方法在保留空间细节和定量准确性方面优于其他无监督方法及预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在稀有疾病和低剂量场景下表现优异，可有效减少扫描时间或放射性示踪剂剂量，具有重要临床应用潜力。

search_text: Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Deep Image Prior-Based Robust PET Image Denoising 基于深度图像先验的鲁棒 PET 图像去噪的自监督预训练 Deep image prior (DIP) has been successfully applied to positron emission tomography (PET) image restoration, enabling represent implicit prior using only convolutional neural network architecture without training dataset, whereas the general supervised approach requires massive low- and high-quality PET image pairs. To answer the increased need for PET imaging with DIP, it is indispensable to improve the performance of the underlying DIP itself. Here, we propose a self-supervised pre-training model to improve the DIP-based PET image denoising performance. Our proposed pre-training model acquires transferable and generalizable visual representations from only unlabeled PET images by restoring various degraded PET images in a self-supervised approach. We evaluated the proposed method using clinical brain PET data with various radioactive tracers ($^{18}$F-florbetapir, $^{11}$C-Pittsburgh compound-B, $^{18}$F-fluoro-2-deoxy-D-glucose, and $^{15}$O-CO$_{2}$) acquired from different PET scanners. The proposed method using the self-supervised pre-training model achieved robust and state-of-the-art denoising performance while retaining spatial details and quantification accuracy compared to other unsupervised methods and pre-training model. These results highlight the potential that the proposed method is particularly effective against rare diseases and probes and helps reduce the scan time or the radiotracer dose without affecting the patients. 深度图像先验（DIP）已成功应用于正电子发射断层扫描（PET）图像恢复，能够仅使用卷积神经网络架构而不需要训练数据集来表示隐式先验，而一般的监督方法需要大量低质量和高质量的 PET 图像对。为了满足对 DIP PET 成像日益增长的需求，提高底层 DIP 本身的性能是必不可少的。在这里，我们提出了一种自监督预训练模型来提高基于 DIP 的 PET 图像去噪性能。我们提出的预训练模型通过以自我监督的方法恢复各种退化的 PET 图像，仅从未标记的 PET 图像中获取可转移和可概括的视觉表示。我们使用从不同 PET 扫描仪获取的各种放射性示踪剂（$^{18}$F-florbetapir、$^{11}$C-Pittsburghcompound-B、$^{18}$F-氟-2-脱氧-D-葡萄糖和 $^{15}$O-CO$_{2}$）临床脑部 PET 数据评估了所提出的方法。与其他无监督方法和预训练模型相比，所提出的使用自监督预训练模型的方法实现了鲁棒且最先进的去噪性能，同时保留了空间细节和量化精度。这些结果凸显了所提出的方法对罕见疾病和探针特别有效的潜力，并有助于减少扫描时间或放射性示踪剂剂量而不影响患者。 本文提出一种基于自监督预训练的深度图像先验（DIP）方法，用于提升PET图像去噪性能。 Yuya Onishi,Fumio Hashimoto,Kibo Ote,Keisuke Matsubara,Masanobu Ibaraki physics.med-ph,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sameera Ramasinghe,Violetta Shevchenko,Gil Avraham,Anton Van Den Hengel
title: BLiRF: Bandlimited Radiance Fields for Dynamic Scene Modeling
title_zh: BLiRF：用于动态场景建模的带限辐射场
abstract: Reasoning the 3D structure of a non-rigid dynamic scene from a single moving camera is an under-constrained problem. Inspired by the remarkable progress of neural radiance fields (NeRFs) in photo-realistic novel view synthesis of static scenes, extensions have been proposed for dynamic settings. These methods heavily rely on neural priors in order to regularize the problem. In this work, we take a step back and reinvestigate how current implementations may entail deleterious effects, including limited expressiveness, entanglement of light and density fields, and sub-optimal motion localization. As a remedy, we advocate for a bridge between classic non-rigid-structure-from-motion (\nrsfm) and NeRF, enabling the well-studied priors of the former to constrain the latter. To this end, we propose a framework that factorizes time and space by formulating a scene as a composition of bandlimited, high-dimensional signals. We demonstrate compelling results across complex dynamic scenes that involve changes in lighting, texture and long-range dynamics.
summary: Reasoning the 3D structure of a non-rigid dynamic scene from a single moving camera is an under-constrained problem. Inspired by the remarkable progress of neural radiance fields (NeRFs) in photo-realistic novel view synthesis of static scenes, extensions have been proposed for dynamic settings. These methods heavily rely on neural priors in order to regularize the problem. In this work, we take a step back and reinvestigate how current implementations may entail deleterious effects, including limited expressiveness, entanglement of light and density fields, and sub-optimal motion localization. As a remedy, we advocate for a bridge between classic non-rigid-structure-from-motion (\nrsfm) and NeRF, enabling the well-studied priors of the former to constrain the latter. To this end, we propose a framework that factorizes time and space by formulating a scene as a composition of bandlimited, high-dimensional signals. We demonstrate compelling results across complex dynamic scenes that involve changes in lighting, texture and long-range dynamics.
abstract_zh: 从单个移动摄像机推理非刚性动态场景的 3D 结构是一个欠约束问题。受神经辐射场（NeRF）在静态场景的逼真新颖视图合成方面取得的显着进展的启发，人们提出了动态设置的扩展。这些方法严重依赖神经先验来规范问题。在这项工作中，我们退后一步，重新研究当前的实现如何可能带来有害影响，包括有限的表现力、光场和密度场的纠缠以及次优的运动定位。作为一种补救措施，我们主张在经典的非刚性运动结构（\nrsfm）和 NeRF 之间建立一座桥梁，使前者经过充分研究的先验能够约束后者。为此，我们提出了一个框架，通过将场景表示为带限高维信号的组合来分解时间和空间。我们在涉及光照、纹理和远程动态变化的复杂动态场景中展示了引人注目的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出BLiRF框架，通过结合经典非刚性结构从运动（NRSfM）和神经辐射场（NeRF）方法，解决动态场景建模中的表达能力、光密度场纠缠和运动定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态场景建模方法存在表达能力有限、光密度场纠缠及运动定位不准确的问题，需结合经典NRSfM的先验约束以提高效果。
AI.method: 提出BLiRF框架，通过将场景建模为带限高维信号，结合NRSfM的先验约束与NeRF，实现时空因子分解，提升动态场景重建的准确性。
AI.result: 在涉及光照变化、纹理复杂及长距离动态的场景中，BLiRF展现出优越的重建效果，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BLiRF通过融合经典NRSfM先验与NeRF，有效解决了动态场景建模中的关键问题，验证了时空因子分解与带限信号建模的有效性。

authors_text: Ninon Devis,Nils Demerlé,Sarah Nabi,David Genova,Philippe Esling
title: Continuous descriptor-based control for deep audio synthesis
title_zh: 用于深度音频合成的基于连续描述符的控制
abstract: Despite significant advances in deep models for music generation, the use of these techniques remains restricted to expert users. Before being democratized among musicians, generative models must first provide expressive control over the generation, as this conditions the integration of deep generative models in creative workflows. In this paper, we tackle this issue by introducing a deep generative audio model providing expressive and continuous descriptor-based control, while remaining lightweight enough to be embedded in a hardware synthesizer. We enforce the controllability of real-time generation by explicitly removing salient musical features in the latent space using an adversarial confusion criterion. User-specified features are then reintroduced as additional conditioning information, allowing for continuous control of the generation, akin to a synthesizer knob. We assess the performance of our method on a wide variety of sounds including instrumental, percussive and speech recordings while providing both timbre and attributes transfer, allowing new ways of generating sounds.
summary: Despite significant advances in deep models for music generation, the use of these techniques remains restricted to expert users. Before being democratized among musicians, generative models must first provide expressive control over the generation, as this conditions the integration of deep generative models in creative workflows. In this paper, we tackle this issue by introducing a deep generative audio model providing expressive and continuous descriptor-based control, while remaining lightweight enough to be embedded in a hardware synthesizer. We enforce the controllability of real-time generation by explicitly removing salient musical features in the latent space using an adversarial confusion criterion. User-specified features are then reintroduced as additional conditioning information, allowing for continuous control of the generation, akin to a synthesizer knob. We assess the performance of our method on a wide variety of sounds including instrumental, percussive and speech recordings while providing both timbre and attributes transfer, allowing new ways of generating sounds.
abstract_zh: 尽管音乐生成的深度模型取得了重大进展，但这些技术的使用仍然仅限于专家用户。在音乐家中实现民主化之前，生成模型必须首先提供对生成的表达控制，因为这为深度生成模型在创意工作流程中的集成提供了条件。在本文中，我们通过引入深度生成音频模型来解决这个问题，该模型提供富有表现力和连续的基于描述符的控制，同时保持足够的轻量级以嵌入到硬件合成器中。我们通过使用对抗性混淆标准明确去除潜在空间中的显着音乐特征来增强实时生成的可控性。然后，用户指定的功能将作为附加调节信息重新引入，从而允许对生成进行连续控制，类似于合成器旋钮。我们评估我们的方法在各种声音上的性能，包括乐器、打击乐和语音录音，同时提供音色和属性传输，从而允许新的声音生成方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续描述符的深度音频生成控制方法，旨在实现轻量级实时音频合成。
AI.motivation: 现有深度音乐生成模型缺乏表达性控制，限制了其在音乐创作流程中的应用，需实现类似合成器旋钮的连续控制功能。
AI.method: 通过对抗混淆准则在潜在空间移除显著音乐特征，并将用户指定特征作为条件信息重新引入，实现连续控制。
AI.result: 方法在乐器、打击乐和语音等多种音频上验证有效，支持音色与属性迁移，生成效果符合预期。
AI.conclusion: 该轻量模型为硬件合成器嵌入提供了可行方案，通过连续描述符控制拓展了音频生成的新方式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续描述符的深度音频生成控制方法，旨在实现轻量级实时音频合成。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度音乐生成模型缺乏表达性控制，限制了其在音乐创作流程中的应用，需实现类似合成器旋钮的连续控制功能。

search_text: Continuous descriptor-based control for deep audio synthesis 用于深度音频合成的基于连续描述符的控制 Despite significant advances in deep models for music generation, the use of these techniques remains restricted to expert users. Before being democratized among musicians, generative models must first provide expressive control over the generation, as this conditions the integration of deep generative models in creative workflows. In this paper, we tackle this issue by introducing a deep generative audio model providing expressive and continuous descriptor-based control, while remaining lightweight enough to be embedded in a hardware synthesizer. We enforce the controllability of real-time generation by explicitly removing salient musical features in the latent space using an adversarial confusion criterion. User-specified features are then reintroduced as additional conditioning information, allowing for continuous control of the generation, akin to a synthesizer knob. We assess the performance of our method on a wide variety of sounds including instrumental, percussive and speech recordings while providing both timbre and attributes transfer, allowing new ways of generating sounds. 尽管音乐生成的深度模型取得了重大进展，但这些技术的使用仍然仅限于专家用户。在音乐家中实现民主化之前，生成模型必须首先提供对生成的表达控制，因为这为深度生成模型在创意工作流程中的集成提供了条件。在本文中，我们通过引入深度生成音频模型来解决这个问题，该模型提供富有表现力和连续的基于描述符的控制，同时保持足够的轻量级以嵌入到硬件合成器中。我们通过使用对抗性混淆标准明确去除潜在空间中的显着音乐特征来增强实时生成的可控性。然后，用户指定的功能将作为附加调节信息重新引入，从而允许对生成进行连续控制，类似于合成器旋钮。我们评估我们的方法在各种声音上的性能，包括乐器、打击乐和语音录音，同时提供音色和属性传输，从而允许新的声音生成方式。 本文提出一种基于连续描述符的深度音频生成控制方法，旨在实现轻量级实时音频合成。 Ninon Devis,Nils Demerlé,Sarah Nabi,David Genova,Philippe Esling cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Ruihang Miao,Weizhou Liu,Mingrui Chen,Zheng Gong,Weixin Xu,Chen Hu,Shuchang Zhou
title: OccDepth: A Depth-Aware Method for 3D Semantic Scene Completion
title_zh: OccDepth：一种用于 3D 语义场景补全的深度感知方法
abstract: 3D Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) can provide dense geometric and semantic scene representations, which can be applied in the field of autonomous driving and robotic systems. It is challenging to estimate the complete geometry and semantics of a scene solely from visual images, and accurate depth information is crucial for restoring 3D geometry. In this paper, we propose the first stereo SSC method named OccDepth, which fully exploits implicit depth information from stereo images (or RGBD images) to help the recovery of 3D geometric structures. The Stereo Soft Feature Assignment (Stereo-SFA) module is proposed to better fuse 3D depth-aware features by implicitly learning the correlation between stereo images. In particular, when the input are RGBD image, a virtual stereo images can be generated through original RGB image and depth map. Besides, the Occupancy Aware Depth (OAD) module is used to obtain geometry-aware 3D features by knowledge distillation using pre-trained depth models. In addition, a reformed TartanAir benchmark, named SemanticTartanAir, is provided in this paper for further testing our OccDepth method on SSC task. Compared with the state-of-the-art RGB-inferred SSC method, extensive experiments on SemanticKITTI show that our OccDepth method achieves superior performance with improving +4.82% mIoU, of which +2.49% mIoU comes from stereo images and +2.33% mIoU comes from our proposed depth-aware method. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/OccDepth.
summary: 3D Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) can provide dense geometric and semantic scene representations, which can be applied in the field of autonomous driving and robotic systems. It is challenging to estimate the complete geometry and semantics of a scene solely from visual images, and accurate depth information is crucial for restoring 3D geometry. In this paper, we propose the first stereo SSC method named OccDepth, which fully exploits implicit depth information from stereo images (or RGBD images) to help the recovery of 3D geometric structures. The Stereo Soft Feature Assignment (Stereo-SFA) module is proposed to better fuse 3D depth-aware features by implicitly learning the correlation between stereo images. In particular, when the input are RGBD image, a virtual stereo images can be generated through original RGB image and depth map. Besides, the Occupancy Aware Depth (OAD) module is used to obtain geometry-aware 3D features by knowledge distillation using pre-trained depth models. In addition, a reformed TartanAir benchmark, named SemanticTartanAir, is provided in this paper for further testing our OccDepth method on SSC task. Compared with the state-of-the-art RGB-inferred SSC method, extensive experiments on SemanticKITTI show that our OccDepth method achieves superior performance with improving +4.82% mIoU, of which +2.49% mIoU comes from stereo images and +2.33% mIoU comes from our proposed depth-aware method. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/OccDepth.
abstract_zh: 3D语义场景完成（SSC）可以提供密集的几何和语义场景表示，可应用于自动驾驶和机器人系统领域。仅根据视觉图像来估计场景的完整几何和语义具有挑战性，而准确的深度信息对于恢复 3D 几何至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了第一个名为 OccDepth 的立体 SSC 方法，该方法充分利用立体图像（或 RGBD 图像）的隐式深度信息来帮助恢复 3D 几何结构。提出了立体软特征分配（Stereo-SFA）模块，通过隐式学习立体图像之间的相关性来更好地融合 3D 深度感知特征。具体地，当输入是RGBD图像时，可以通过原始RGB图像和深度图生成虚拟立体图像。此外，占用感知深度（OAD）模块用于使用预训练的深度模型通过知识蒸馏来获取几何感知的3D特征。此外，本文还提供了一个改进的 TartanAir 基准，名为 SemanticTartanAir，用于进一步测试我们在 SSC 任务上的 OccDepth 方法。与最先进的 RGB 推断 SSC 方法相比，SemanticKITTI 上的大量实验表明，我们的 OccDepth 方法实现了优越的性能，提高了 +4.82% mIoU，其中 +2.49% mIoU 来自立体图像，+2.33% mIoU 来自我们提出的深度感知方法。我们的代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/OccDepth 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为OccDepth的深度感知方法，用于3D语义场景补全，通过利用立体图像或RGBD图像中的隐式深度信息来恢复3D几何结构。
AI.motivation: 仅凭视觉图像难以准确估计场景的完整几何和语义信息，而精确的深度信息对3D几何恢复至关重要，因此需要探索更有效的深度感知方法。
AI.method: 提出Stereo Soft Feature Assignment模块融合立体图像的深度感知特征，并通过虚拟立体图像生成和知识蒸馏的Occupancy Aware Depth模块获取几何感知的3D特征，同时构建新的SemanticTartanAir基准数据集。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，OccDepth方法相比现有RGB推断方法mIoU提升4.82%，其中立体图像贡献2.49%，深度感知方法贡献2.33%。
AI.conclusion: OccDepth通过有效利用深度信息显著提升了3D语义场景补全性能，验证了深度感知方法在该任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Les Atlas,Nicholas Rasmussen,Felix Schwock,Mert Pilanci
title: Complex Clipping for Improved Generalization in Machine Learning
title_zh: 复杂剪裁可提高机器学习的泛化能力
comment: Submitted to IEEE Signal Processing Letters
comments: Submitted to IEEE Signal Processing Letters
abstract: For many machine learning applications, a common input representation is a spectrogram. The underlying representation for a spectrogram is a short time Fourier transform (STFT) which gives complex values. The spectrogram uses the magnitude of these complex values, a commonly used detector. Modern machine learning systems are commonly overparameterized, where possible ill-conditioning problems are ameliorated by regularization. The common use of rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions between layers of a deep net has been shown to help this regularization, improving system performance. We extend this idea of ReLU activation to detection for the complex STFT, providing a simple-to-compute modified and regularized spectrogram, which potentially results in better behaved training. We then confirmed the benefit of this approach on a noisy acoustic data set used for a real-world application. Generalization performance improved substantially. This approach might benefit other applications which use time-frequency mappings, for acoustic, audio, and other applications.
summary: For many machine learning applications, a common input representation is a spectrogram. The underlying representation for a spectrogram is a short time Fourier transform (STFT) which gives complex values. The spectrogram uses the magnitude of these complex values, a commonly used detector. Modern machine learning systems are commonly overparameterized, where possible ill-conditioning problems are ameliorated by regularization. The common use of rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions between layers of a deep net has been shown to help this regularization, improving system performance. We extend this idea of ReLU activation to detection for the complex STFT, providing a simple-to-compute modified and regularized spectrogram, which potentially results in better behaved training. We then confirmed the benefit of this approach on a noisy acoustic data set used for a real-world application. Generalization performance improved substantially. This approach might benefit other applications which use time-frequency mappings, for acoustic, audio, and other applications.
abstract_zh: 对于许多机器学习应用程序来说，常见的输入表示是频谱图。频谱图的基础表示是短时傅立叶变换 (STFT)，它给出复数值。频谱图使用这些复数值的大小，这是一种常用的检测器。现代机器学习系统通常过度参数化，通过正则化可以改善可能的病态问题。深层网络各层之间普遍使用修正线性单元 (ReLU) 激活函数已被证明有助于这种正则化，从而提高系统性能。我们将 ReLU 激活的想法扩展到复杂 STFT 的检测，提供易于计算的修改和正则化频谱图，这可能会导致更好的训练。然后，我们确认了这种方法对用于实际应用的噪声声学数据集的好处。泛化性能显着提高。这种方法可能有利于其他使用时频映射的应用程序，例如声学、音频和其他应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种复数剪裁方法，通过改进频谱图表示提升机器学习模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统频谱图仅使用复数STFT的幅度信息而忽略相位，可能导致模型泛化能力不足；ReLU激活函数虽能辅助正则化，但未被应用于复数域处理。
AI.method: 将ReLU激活函数扩展至复数STFT的检测过程，生成包含相位信息的修改版正则化频谱图。
AI.result: 在噪声声学数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升模型泛化性能，适用于音频、声学等时频映射场景。
AI.conclusion: 复数域剪裁技术能有效增强模型稳定性与泛化能力，未来可拓展至更多复数信号处理领域。

The spectrogram uses the magnitude of these complex values, a commonly used detector. Modern machine learning systems are commonly overparameterized, where possible ill-conditioning problems are ameliorated by regularization. The common use of rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions between layers of a deep net has been shown to help this regularization, improving system performance. We extend this idea of ReLU activation to detection for the complex STFT, providing a simple-to-compute modified and regularized spectrogram, which potentially results in better behaved training. We then confirmed the benefit of this approach on a noisy acoustic data set used for a real-world application. Generalization performance improved substantially. This approach might benefit other applications which use time-frequency mappings, for acoustic, audio, and other applications. 对于许多机器学习应用程序来说，常见的输入表示是频谱图。频谱图的基础表示是短时傅立叶变换 (STFT)，它给出复数值。频谱图使用这些复数值的大小，这是一种常用的检测器。现代机器学习系统通常过度参数化，通过正则化可以改善可能的病态问题。深层网络各层之间普遍使用修正线性单元 (ReLU) 激活函数已被证明有助于这种正则化，从而提高系统性能。我们将 ReLU 激活的想法扩展到复杂 STFT 的检测，提供易于计算的修改和正则化频谱图，这可能会导致更好的训练。然后，我们确认了这种方法对用于实际应用的噪声声学数据集的好处。泛化性能显着提高。这种方法可能有利于其他使用时频映射的应用程序，例如声学、音频和其他应用程序。 本文提出一种复数剪裁方法，通过改进频谱图表示提升机器学习模型的泛化能力。 Les Atlas,Nicholas Rasmussen,Felix Schwock,Mert Pilanci eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Ao Zhang,He Wang,Pengcheng Guo,Yihui Fu,Lei Xie,Yingying Gao,Shilei Zhang,Junlan Feng
title: VE-KWS: Visual Modality Enhanced End-to-End Keyword Spotting
title_zh: VE-KWS：视觉模态增强的端到端关键词识别
abstract: The performance of the keyword spotting (KWS) system based on audio modality, commonly measured in false alarms and false rejects, degrades significantly under the far field and noisy conditions. Therefore, audio-visual keyword spotting, which leverages complementary relationships over multiple modalities, has recently gained much attention. However, current studies mainly focus on combining the exclusively learned representations of different modalities, instead of exploring the modal relationships during each respective modeling. In this paper, we propose a novel visual modality enhanced end-to-end KWS framework (VE-KWS), which fuses audio and visual modalities from two aspects. The first one is utilizing the speaker location information obtained from the lip region in videos to assist the training of multi-channel audio beamformer. By involving the beamformer as an audio enhancement module, the acoustic distortions, caused by the far field or noisy environments, could be significantly suppressed. The other one is conducting cross-attention between different modalities to capture the inter-modal relationships and help the representation learning of each modality. Experiments on the MSIP challenge corpus show that our proposed model achieves 2.79% false rejection rate and 2.95% false alarm rate on the Eval set, resulting in a new SOTA performance compared with the top-ranking systems in the ICASSP2022 MISP challenge.
summary: The performance of the keyword spotting (KWS) system based on audio modality, commonly measured in false alarms and false rejects, degrades significantly under the far field and noisy conditions. Therefore, audio-visual keyword spotting, which leverages complementary relationships over multiple modalities, has recently gained much attention. However, current studies mainly focus on combining the exclusively learned representations of different modalities, instead of exploring the modal relationships during each respective modeling. In this paper, we propose a novel visual modality enhanced end-to-end KWS framework (VE-KWS), which fuses audio and visual modalities from two aspects. The first one is utilizing the speaker location information obtained from the lip region in videos to assist the training of multi-channel audio beamformer. By involving the beamformer as an audio enhancement module, the acoustic distortions, caused by the far field or noisy environments, could be significantly suppressed. The other one is conducting cross-attention between different modalities to capture the inter-modal relationships and help the representation learning of each modality. Experiments on the MSIP challenge corpus show that our proposed model achieves 2.79% false rejection rate and 2.95% false alarm rate on the Eval set, resulting in a new SOTA performance compared with the top-ranking systems in the ICASSP2022 MISP challenge.
abstract_zh: 基于音频模态的关键字识别 (KWS) 系统的性能（通常以误报和误拒绝来衡量）在远场和噪声条件下会显着下降。因此，利用多种模式的互补关系的视听关键词识别最近引起了广泛关注。然而，当前的研究主要集中于结合不同模态的专门学习的表示，而不是探索每个建模过程中的模态关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉模态增强的端到端KWS框架（VE-KWS），它从两个方面融合了音频和视觉模态。第一个是利用从视频中的嘴唇区域获得的说话者位置信息来辅助多通道音频波束形成器的训练。通过将波束形成器作为音频增强模块，可以显着抑制由远场或噪声环境引起的声学失真。另一种是在不同模态之间进行交叉注意力，以捕获模态间关系并帮助每种模态的表示学习。 MSIP 挑战语料库上的实验表明，我们提出的模型在 Eval 集上实现了 2.79% 的误拒绝率和 2.95% 的误报率，与 ICASSP2022 MISP 挑战中的顶级系统相比，取得了新的 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉模态的端到端关键词识别框架VE-KWS，通过融合音频和视觉信息提升远场和噪声环境下的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音频模态的关键词识别系统在远场和噪声环境下表现不佳，现有研究主要关注多模态表示的简单结合，而未深入探索模态间的交互关系。
AI.method: 通过两个方面融合多模态信息：1) 利用视频中嘴唇区域的说话人位置信息优化多通道音频波束成形器；2) 采用跨模态注意力机制捕捉模态间关系以增强特征学习。
AI.result: 在MSIP数据集的Eval集上达到2.79%的误拒率和2.95%的误报率，相较ICASSP2022 MISP挑战赛最佳系统实现性能突破。
AI.conclusion: 通过视觉模态增强音频处理流程并建立跨模态关联，VE-KWS在远场噪声环境下实现了当前最优的关键词识别性能。

authors_text: Arpandeep Khatua,Vikram Sharma Mailthody,Bhagyashree Taleka,Tengfei Ma,Xiang Song,Wen-mei Hwu
title: IGB: Addressing The Gaps In Labeling, Features, Heterogeneity, and Size of Public Graph Datasets for Deep Learning Research
title_zh: IGB：解决深度学习研究公共图数据集的标签、特征、异质性和大小方面的差距
comment: Accepted in KDD'23 conference. This is final preprint version
comments: Accepted in KDD'23 conference. This is final preprint version
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have shown high potential for a variety of real-world, challenging applications, but one of the major obstacles in GNN research is the lack of large-scale flexible datasets. Most existing public datasets for GNNs are relatively small, which limits the ability of GNNs to generalize to unseen data. The few existing large-scale graph datasets provide very limited labeled data. This makes it difficult to determine if the GNN model's low accuracy for unseen data is inherently due to insufficient training data or if the model failed to generalize. Additionally, datasets used to train GNNs need to offer flexibility to enable a thorough study of the impact of various factors while training GNN models. In this work, we introduce the Illinois Graph Benchmark (IGB), a research dataset tool that the developers can use to train, scrutinize and systematically evaluate GNN models with high fidelity. IGB includes both homogeneous and heterogeneous academic graphs of enormous sizes, with more than 40% of their nodes labeled. Compared to the largest graph datasets publicly available, the IGB provides over 162X more labeled data for deep learning practitioners and developers to create and evaluate models with higher accuracy. The IGB dataset is a collection of academic graphs designed to be flexible, enabling the study of various GNN architectures, embedding generation techniques, and analyzing system performance issues for node classification tasks. IGB is open-sourced, supports DGL and PyG frameworks, and comes with releases of the raw text that we believe foster emerging language models and GNN research projects. An early public version of IGB is available at https://github.com/IllinoisGraphBenchmark/IGB-Datasets.

IGB includes both homogeneous and heterogeneous academic graphs of enormous sizes, with more than 40% of their nodes labeled. The IGB dataset is a collection of academic graphs designed to be flexible, enabling the study of various GNN architectures, embedding generation techniques, and analyzing system performance issues for node classification tasks. IGB is open-sourced, supports DGL and PyG frameworks, and comes with releases of the raw text that we believe foster emerging language models and GNN research projects. An early public version of IGB is available at https://github.com/IllinoisGraphBenchmark/IGB-Datasets.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 在各种现实世界、具有挑战性的应用中表现出了巨大的潜力，但 GNN 研究的主要障碍之一是缺乏大规模灵活的数据集。大多数现有的 GNN 公共数据集都相对较小，这限制了 GNN 泛化到不可见数据的能力。现有的少数大型图形数据集提供的标记数据非常有限。这使得很难确定 GNN 模型对未见过的数据的低准确率是否本质上是由于训练数据不足造成的，或者模型是否无法泛化。此外，用于训练 GNN 的数据集需要提供灵活性，以便能够在训练 GNN 模型时全面研究各种因素的影响。在这项工作中，我们介绍了伊利诺伊图基准（IGB），这是一种研究数据集工具，开发人员可以使用它来训练、审查和系统地评估高保真度的 GNN 模型。 IGB 包括规模巨大的同质和异质学术图，其中超过 40% 的节点已被标记。与公开可用的最大图形数据集相比，IGB 为深度学习从业者和开发人员提供了超过 162 倍的标记数据，以创建和评估更高精度的模型。 IGB 数据集是设计灵活的学术图的集合，可以研究各种 GNN 架构、嵌入生成技术以及分析节点分类任务的系统性能问题。 IGB 是开源的，支持 DGL 和 PyG 框架，并附带原始文本版本，我们相信这些原始文本可以促进新兴语言模型和 GNN 研究项目。 IGB 的早期公共版本可在 https://github.com/IllinoisGraphBenchmark/IGB-Datasets 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出伊利诺伊图基准（IGB）数据集，旨在解决现有公开图数据集在标注、特征、异质性和规模上的不足，以支持更有效的图神经网络（GNN）研究。
AI.motivation: 现有公开图数据集规模较小、标注数据有限且缺乏异质性，导致难以评估GNN模型的泛化能力及全面研究训练因素的影响。
AI.method: 构建包含大规模同质与异质学术图的IGB数据集，节点标注比例超40%，支持DGL和PyG框架，提供原始文本以促进语言模型与GNN研究。
AI.result: IGB相比现有最大图数据集提供162倍的标注数据，支持多种GNN架构、嵌入技术和系统性能分析，提升模型准确性与研究灵活性。
AI.conclusion: IGB为GNN研究提供了高质量、大规模且灵活的数据集，有助于推动模型创新与系统性能优化，促进图神经网络领域的发展。

IGB includes both homogeneous and heterogeneous academic graphs of enormous sizes, with more than 40% of their nodes labeled. Compared to the largest graph datasets publicly available, the IGB provides over 162X more labeled data for deep learning practitioners and developers to create and evaluate models with higher accuracy. The IGB dataset is a collection of academic graphs designed to be flexible, enabling the study of various GNN architectures, embedding generation techniques, and analyzing system performance issues for node classification tasks. IGB is open-sourced, supports DGL and PyG frameworks, and comes with releases of the raw text that we believe foster emerging language models and GNN research projects. An early public version of IGB is available at https://github.com/IllinoisGraphBenchmark/IGB-Datasets. 图神经网络 (GNN) 在各种现实世界、具有挑战性的应用中表现出了巨大的潜力，但 GNN 研究的主要障碍之一是缺乏大规模灵活的数据集。大多数现有的 GNN 公共数据集都相对较小，这限制了 GNN 泛化到不可见数据的能力。现有的少数大型图形数据集提供的标记数据非常有限。这使得很难确定 GNN 模型对未见过的数据的低准确率是否本质上是由于训练数据不足造成的，或者模型是否无法泛化。此外，用于训练 GNN 的数据集需要提供灵活性，以便能够在训练 GNN 模型时全面研究各种因素的影响。在这项工作中，我们介绍了伊利诺伊图基准（IGB），这是一种研究数据集工具，开发人员可以使用它来训练、审查和系统地评估高保真度的 GNN 模型。 IGB 包括规模巨大的同质和异质学术图，其中超过 40% 的节点已被标记。与公开可用的最大图形数据集相比，IGB 为深度学习从业者和开发人员提供了超过 162 倍的标记数据，以创建和评估更高精度的模型。 IGB 数据集是设计灵活的学术图的集合，可以研究各种 GNN 架构、嵌入生成技术以及分析节点分类任务的系统性能问题。 IGB 是开源的，支持 DGL 和 PyG 框架，并附带原始文本版本，我们相信这些原始文本可以促进新兴语言模型和 GNN 研究项目。 IGB 的早期公共版本可在 https://github.com/IllinoisGraphBenchmark/IGB-Datasets 上找到。 本文提出伊利诺伊图基准（IGB）数据集，旨在解决现有公开图数据集在标注、特征、异质性和规模上的不足，以支持更有效的图神经网络（GNN）研究。 Arpandeep Khatua,Vikram Sharma Mailthody,Bhagyashree Taleka,Tengfei Ma,Xiang Song,Wen-mei Hwu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.IR

authors_text: Jiawei Lian,Xiaofei Wang,Yuru Su,Mingyang Ma,Shaohui Mei
title: CBA: Contextual Background Attack against Optical Aerial Detection in the Physical World
title_zh: CBA：针对物理世界中光学航空探测的上下文背景攻击
abstract: Patch-based physical attacks have increasingly aroused concerns. However, most existing methods focus on obscuring targets captured on the ground, and some of these methods are simply extended to deceive aerial detectors. They smear the targeted objects in the physical world with the elaborated adversarial patches, which can only slightly sway the aerial detectors' prediction and with weak attack transferability. To address the above issues, we propose to perform Contextual Background Attack (CBA), a novel physical attack framework against aerial detection, which can achieve strong attack efficacy and transferability in the physical world even without smudging the interested objects at all. Specifically, the targets of interest, i.e. the aircraft in aerial images, are adopted to mask adversarial patches. The pixels outside the mask area are optimized to make the generated adversarial patches closely cover the critical contextual background area for detection, which contributes to gifting adversarial patches with more robust and transferable attack potency in the real world. To further strengthen the attack performance, the adversarial patches are forced to be outside targets during training, by which the detected objects of interest, both on and outside patches, benefit the accumulation of attack efficacy. Consequently, the sophisticatedly designed patches are gifted with solid fooling efficacy against objects both on and outside the adversarial patches simultaneously. Extensive proportionally scaled experiments are performed in physical scenarios, demonstrating the superiority and potential of the proposed framework for physical attacks. We expect that the proposed physical attack method will serve as a benchmark for assessing the adversarial robustness of diverse aerial detectors and defense methods.

However, most existing methods focus on obscuring targets captured on the ground, and some of these methods are simply extended to deceive aerial detectors. To address the above issues, we propose to perform Contextual Background Attack (CBA), a novel physical attack framework against aerial detection, which can achieve strong attack efficacy and transferability in the physical world even without smudging the interested objects at all. Specifically, the targets of interest, i.e. the aircraft in aerial images, are adopted to mask adversarial patches. The pixels outside the mask area are optimized to make the generated adversarial patches closely cover the critical contextual background area for detection, which contributes to gifting adversarial patches with more robust and transferable attack potency in the real world. To further strengthen the attack performance, the adversarial patches are forced to be outside targets during training, by which the detected objects of interest, both on and outside patches, benefit the accumulation of attack efficacy. Consequently, the sophisticatedly designed patches are gifted with solid fooling efficacy against objects both on and outside the adversarial patches simultaneously. Extensive proportionally scaled experiments are performed in physical scenarios, demonstrating the superiority and potential of the proposed framework for physical attacks. We expect that the proposed physical attack method will serve as a benchmark for assessing the adversarial robustness of diverse aerial detectors and defense methods.
abstract_zh: 基于补丁的物理攻击越来越引起人们的关注。然而，大多数现有方法侧重于模糊地面捕获的目标，其中一些方法只是简单地扩展到欺骗空中探测器。他们用精心设计的对抗补丁涂抹物理世界中的目标物体，这只能轻微影响空中探测器的预测，并且攻击可转移性较弱。为了解决上述问题，我们提出执行上下文背景攻击（CBA），这是一种针对空中探测的新型物理攻击框架，即使完全不弄脏感兴趣的对象，也可以在物理世界中实现强大的攻击功效和可转移性。具体来说，采用感兴趣的目标，即航空图像中的飞机来掩盖对抗性斑块。掩模区域外的像素经过优化，使生成的对抗性补丁紧密覆盖用于检测的关键上下文背景区域，这有助于赋予对抗性补丁在现实世界中更强大和可转移的攻击效力。为了进一步增强攻击性能，训练时将对抗性斑块强制设为外部目标，从而检测到斑块内外的感兴趣目标，有利于攻击效能的积累。因此，精心设计的补丁对于同时对抗敌方补丁内外的物体具有强大的愚弄功效。在物理场景中进行了广泛的按比例缩放的实验，证明了所提出的物理攻击框架的优越性和潜力。我们期望所提出的物理攻击方法将作为评估各种空中探测器和防御方法的对抗鲁棒性的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CBA的物理攻击框架，通过优化背景区域的对抗性补丁来攻击光学空中检测系统，无需直接遮挡目标即可实现强效且可迁移的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有物理攻击方法主要针对地面目标，且对空中检测系统的攻击效果有限，攻击可迁移性较弱，亟需一种无需遮挡目标即可实现高效攻击的新方法。
AI.method: 利用目标（如飞机）作为对抗补丁的掩码，优化补丁外部像素以覆盖检测关键的背景区域；训练过程中强制补丁位于目标外部，使攻击效果同时作用于目标及周边区域。
AI.result: 物理场景下的实验表明，CBA框架在攻击效果和可迁移性上优于现有方法，具备作为评估空中检测器鲁棒性的基准潜力。
AI.conclusion: CBA为物理世界中的光学空中检测系统提供了高效的攻击方法，并可作为测试对抗鲁棒性的基准框架。

authors_text: Jing Liang,Sanghyun Son,Ming Lin,Dinesh Manocha
title: GeoLCR: Attention-based Geometric Loop Closure and Registration
title_zh: GeoLCR：基于注意力的几何环闭合和配准
abstract: We present a novel algorithm specially designed for loop detection and registration that utilizes Lidar-based perception. Our approach to loop detection involves voxelizing point clouds, followed by an overlap calculation to confirm whether a vehicle has completed a loop. We further enhance the current pose's accuracy via an innovative point-level registration model. The efficacy of our algorithm has been assessed across a range of well-known datasets, including KITTI, KITTI-360, Nuscenes, Complex Urban, NCLT, and MulRan. In comparative terms, our method exhibits up to a twofold increase in the precision of both translation and rotation estimations. Particularly noteworthy is our method's performance on challenging sequences where it outperforms others, being the first to achieve a perfect 100% success rate in loop detection.
summary: We present a novel algorithm specially designed for loop detection and registration that utilizes Lidar-based perception. Our approach to loop detection involves voxelizing point clouds, followed by an overlap calculation to confirm whether a vehicle has completed a loop. We further enhance the current pose's accuracy via an innovative point-level registration model. The efficacy of our algorithm has been assessed across a range of well-known datasets, including KITTI, KITTI-360, Nuscenes, Complex Urban, NCLT, and MulRan. In comparative terms, our method exhibits up to a twofold increase in the precision of both translation and rotation estimations. Particularly noteworthy is our method's performance on challenging sequences where it outperforms others, being the first to achieve a perfect 100% success rate in loop detection.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种专门为循环检测和注册而设计的新颖算法，该算法利用基于激光雷达的感知。我们的循环检测方法涉及对点云进行体素化，然后进行重叠计算以确认车辆是否完成了循环。我们通过创新的点级配准模型进一步提高了当前姿势的准确性。我们算法的功效已在一系列知名数据集上进行了评估，包括 KITTI、KITTI-360、Nuscenes、Complex Urban、NCLT 和 MulRan。相比之下，我们的方法在平移和旋转估计的精度方面表现出两倍的提高。特别值得注意的是我们的方法在具有挑战性的序列上的表现优于其他方法，是第一个在循环检测中实现完美 100% 成功率的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR的注意力机制几何回环检测与配准算法GeoLCR，旨在提升自动驾驶中定位与地图构建的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有回环检测方法在复杂场景下存在定位精度不足、鲁棒性差的问题，亟需更高效的算法提升自动驾驶系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过体素化点云计算重叠区域确认回环，结合注意力机制的点级配准模型优化位姿估计，多数据集验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 在KITTI等数据集上实现平移和旋转估计精度提升2倍，在挑战性序列中首次达到100%回环检测成功率。
AI.conclusion: GeoLCR通过几何特征与注意力机制融合，显著提升了复杂环境下回环检测与配准性能，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的定位方案。
