Particularly noteworthy is our method's performance on challenging sequences where it outperforms others, being the first to achieve a perfect 100% success rate in loop detection. 我们提出了一种专门为循环检测和注册而设计的新颖算法，该算法利用基于激光雷达的感知。我们的循环检测方法涉及对点云进行体素化，然后进行重叠计算以确认车辆是否完成了循环。我们通过创新的点级配准模型进一步提高了当前姿势的准确性。我们算法的功效已在一系列知名数据集上进行了评估，包括 KITTI、KITTI-360、Nuscenes、Complex Urban、NCLT 和 MulRan。相比之下，我们的方法在平移和旋转估计的精度方面表现出两倍的提高。特别值得注意的是我们的方法在具有挑战性的序列上的表现优于其他方法，是第一个在循环检测中实现完美 100% 成功率的方法。 本文提出了一种基于LiDAR的注意力机制几何回环检测与配准算法GeoLCR，旨在提升自动驾驶中定位与地图构建的精度。 Jing Liang,Sanghyun Son,Ming Lin,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Vivek Myers,Erdem Bıyık,Dorsa Sadigh
title: Active Reward Learning from Online Preferences
title_zh: 根据在线偏好进行主动奖励学习
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Published in the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Published in the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Robot policies need to adapt to human preferences and/or new environments. Human experts may have the domain knowledge required to help robots achieve this adaptation. However, existing works often require costly offline re-training on human feedback, and those feedback usually need to be frequent and too complex for the humans to reliably provide. To avoid placing undue burden on human experts and allow quick adaptation in critical real-world situations, we propose designing and sparingly presenting easy-to-answer pairwise action preference queries in an online fashion. Our approach designs queries and determines when to present them to maximize the expected value derived from the queries' information. We demonstrate our approach with experiments in simulation, human user studies, and real robot experiments. In these settings, our approach outperforms baseline techniques while presenting fewer queries to human experts. Experiment videos, code and appendices are found at https://sites.google.com/view/onlineactivepreferences.

We demonstrate our approach with experiments in simulation, human user studies, and real robot experiments. In these settings, our approach outperforms baseline techniques while presenting fewer queries to human experts. Experiment videos, code and appendices are found at https://sites.google.com/view/onlineactivepreferences.
abstract_zh: 机器人政策需要适应人类偏好和/或新环境。人类专家可能拥有帮助机器人实现这种适应所需的领域知识。然而，现有的工作通常需要对人类反馈进行成本高昂的离线再训练，并且这些反馈通常需要频繁且过于复杂，以至于人类无法可靠地提供。为了避免给人类专家带来过度的负担，并允许在关键的现实情况下快速适应，我们建议以在线方式设计和谨慎地呈现易于回答的成对动作偏好查询。我们的方法设计查询并确定何时呈现它们，以最大化从查询信息中得出的预期价值。我们通过模拟实验、人类用户研究和真实机器人实验来展示我们的方法。在这些设置中，我们的方法优于基线技术，同时向人类专家提出更少的查询。实验视频、代码和附录可在 https://sites.google.com/view/onlineactivepreferences 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过在线偏好查询实现机器人奖励学习的方法，以减少对人类专家反馈的依赖并提高适应效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖昂贵的离线训练和复杂的人类反馈，难以在实际场景中快速适应，且增加人类专家负担。
AI.method: 设计易于回答的成对动作偏好查询，在线动态选择最佳时机呈现查询以最大化信息价值。
AI.result: 在仿真、用户研究和真实机器人实验中，该方法在减少查询次数的同时优于基线技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人实时适应人类偏好提供了高效、低负担的解决方案，适用于关键现实场景。

authors_text: Qiang Zhou,Yuang Liu,Chaohui Yu,Jingliang Li,Zhibin Wang,Fan Wang
title: LMSeg: Language-guided Multi-dataset Segmentation
title_zh: LMSeg：语言引导的多数据集分割
abstract: It's a meaningful and attractive topic to build a general and inclusive segmentation model that can recognize more categories in various scenarios. A straightforward way is to combine the existing fragmented segmentation datasets and train a multi-dataset network. However, there are two major issues with multi-dataset segmentation: (1) the inconsistent taxonomy demands manual reconciliation to construct a unified taxonomy; (2) the inflexible one-hot common taxonomy causes time-consuming model retraining and defective supervision of unlabeled categories. In this paper, we investigate the multi-dataset segmentation and propose a scalable Language-guided Multi-dataset Segmentation framework, dubbed LMSeg, which supports both semantic and panoptic segmentation. Specifically, we introduce a pre-trained text encoder to map the category names to a text embedding space as a unified taxonomy, instead of using inflexible one-hot label. The model dynamically aligns the segment queries with the category embeddings. Instead of relabeling each dataset with the unified taxonomy, a category-guided decoding module is designed to dynamically guide predictions to each datasets taxonomy. Furthermore, we adopt a dataset-aware augmentation strategy that assigns each dataset a specific image augmentation pipeline, which can suit the properties of images from different datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves significant improvements on four semantic and three panoptic segmentation datasets, and the ablation study evaluates the effectiveness of each component.
summary: It's a meaningful and attractive topic to build a general and inclusive segmentation model that can recognize more categories in various scenarios. A straightforward way is to combine the existing fragmented segmentation datasets and train a multi-dataset network. However, there are two major issues with multi-dataset segmentation: (1) the inconsistent taxonomy demands manual reconciliation to construct a unified taxonomy; (2) the inflexible one-hot common taxonomy causes time-consuming model retraining and defective supervision of unlabeled categories. In this paper, we investigate the multi-dataset segmentation and propose a scalable Language-guided Multi-dataset Segmentation framework, dubbed LMSeg, which supports both semantic and panoptic segmentation. Specifically, we introduce a pre-trained text encoder to map the category names to a text embedding space as a unified taxonomy, instead of using inflexible one-hot label. The model dynamically aligns the segment queries with the category embeddings. Instead of relabeling each dataset with the unified taxonomy, a category-guided decoding module is designed to dynamically guide predictions to each datasets taxonomy. Furthermore, we adopt a dataset-aware augmentation strategy that assigns each dataset a specific image augmentation pipeline, which can suit the properties of images from different datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves significant improvements on four semantic and three panoptic segmentation datasets, and the ablation study evaluates the effectiveness of each component.
abstract_zh: 建立一个通用的、具有包容性的、能够在各种场景下识别更多类别的细分模型是一个有意义且有吸引力的话题。一种直接的方法是结合现有的碎片化分割数据集并训练多数据集网络。然而，多数据集分割存在两个主要问题：（1）分类标准不一致，需要手动协调以构建统一的分类标准； （2）不灵活的单一热点通用分类导致模型重新训练耗时且对未标记类别的监督存在缺陷。在本文中，我们研究了多数据集分割，并提出了一种可扩展的语言引导多数据集分割框架，称为 LMSeg，它支持语义分割和全景分割。具体来说，我们引入了一种预训练的文本编码器，将类别名称映射到文本嵌入空间作为统一的分类法，而不是使用不灵活的单热标签。该模型动态地将分段查询与类别嵌入对齐。类别引导解码模块旨在动态指导对每个数据集分类法的预测，而不是使用统一分类法重新标记每个数据集。此外，我们采用数据集感知增强策略，为每个数据集分配一个特定的图像增强管道，该管道可以适应不同数据集图像的属性。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在四个语义和三个全景分割数据集上实现了显着改进，并且消融研究评估了每个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LMSeg的语言引导多数据集分割框架，以解决多数据集分割中的分类不一致和监督不足问题。
AI.motivation: 当前多数据集分割方法存在分类体系不一致和监督不灵活的问题，导致模型训练耗时且效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文引入预训练文本编码器将类别名称映射到统一的文本嵌入空间，并设计了类别引导解码模块和数据集感知增强策略，以实现动态对齐和高效预测。
AI.result: 在四个语义分割和三个全景分割数据集上，该方法取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: LMSeg框架有效解决了多数据集分割中的分类不一致和监督不足问题，具有良好的可扩展性和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hao Hu,Yiqin Yang,Qianchuan Zhao,Chongjie Zhang
title: The Provable Benefits of Unsupervised Data Sharing for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 无监督数据共享对离线强化学习的可证明的好处
comment: Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
comments: Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
abstract: Self-supervised methods have become crucial for advancing deep learning by leveraging data itself to reduce the need for expensive annotations. However, the question of how to conduct self-supervised offline reinforcement learning (RL) in a principled way remains unclear. In this paper, we address this issue by investigating the theoretical benefits of utilizing reward-free data in linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) within a semi-supervised setting. Further, we propose a novel, Provable Data Sharing algorithm (PDS) to utilize such reward-free data for offline RL. PDS uses additional penalties on the reward function learned from labeled data to prevent overestimation, ensuring a conservative algorithm. Our results on various offline RL tasks demonstrate that PDS significantly improves the performance of offline RL algorithms with reward-free data. Overall, our work provides a promising approach to leveraging the benefits of unlabeled data in offline RL while maintaining theoretical guarantees. We believe our findings will contribute to developing more robust self-supervised RL methods.
summary: Self-supervised methods have become crucial for advancing deep learning by leveraging data itself to reduce the need for expensive annotations. However, the question of how to conduct self-supervised offline reinforcement learning (RL) in a principled way remains unclear. In this paper, we address this issue by investigating the theoretical benefits of utilizing reward-free data in linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) within a semi-supervised setting. Further, we propose a novel, Provable Data Sharing algorithm (PDS) to utilize such reward-free data for offline RL. PDS uses additional penalties on the reward function learned from labeled data to prevent overestimation, ensuring a conservative algorithm. Our results on various offline RL tasks demonstrate that PDS significantly improves the performance of offline RL algorithms with reward-free data. Overall, our work provides a promising approach to leveraging the benefits of unlabeled data in offline RL while maintaining theoretical guarantees. We believe our findings will contribute to developing more robust self-supervised RL methods.
abstract_zh: 通过利用数据本身来减少对昂贵注释的需求，自我监督方法对于推进深度学习变得至关重要。然而，如何原则性地进行自监督离线强化学习（RL）的问题仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过研究在半监督环境下的线性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中利用无奖励数据的理论优势来解决这个问题。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的可证明数据共享算法（PDS），以利用此类无奖励数据进行离线强化学习。 PDS 对从标记数据中学习到的奖励函数使用额外的惩罚来防止高估，从而确保算法的保守性。我们在各种离线 RL 任务上的结果表明，PDS 使用无奖励数据显着提高了离线 RL 算法的性能。总的来说，我们的工作提供了一种有前景的方法，可以在保持理论保证的同时，利用离线强化学习中未标记数据的优势。我们相信我们的发现将有助于开发更强大的自我监督强化学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在离线强化学习中利用无监督数据共享的理论优势，并提出了一种名为PDS的算法以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督方法在深度学习中至关重要，但如何以理论化方式在离线强化学习中有效利用无标签数据仍不明确。
AI.method: 提出Provable Data Sharing (PDS)算法，在半监督框架下利用奖励无关数据，并通过添加惩罚项防止奖励函数过估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，PDS在多个离线RL任务中显著提升了使用奖励无关数据的算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为离线RL中利用无标签数据提供了理论保证的可行方法，有助于开发更稳健的自监督RL技术。

search_text: The Provable Benefits of Unsupervised Data Sharing for Offline Reinforcement Learning 无监督数据共享对离线强化学习的可证明的好处 Self-supervised methods have become crucial for advancing deep learning by leveraging data itself to reduce the need for expensive annotations. However, the question of how to conduct self-supervised offline reinforcement learning (RL) in a principled way remains unclear. In this paper, we address this issue by investigating the theoretical benefits of utilizing reward-free data in linear Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) within a semi-supervised setting. Further, we propose a novel, Provable Data Sharing algorithm (PDS) to utilize such reward-free data for offline RL. PDS uses additional penalties on the reward function learned from labeled data to prevent overestimation, ensuring a conservative algorithm. Our results on various offline RL tasks demonstrate that PDS significantly improves the performance of offline RL algorithms with reward-free data. Overall, our work provides a promising approach to leveraging the benefits of unlabeled data in offline RL while maintaining theoretical guarantees. We believe our findings will contribute to developing more robust self-supervised RL methods. 通过利用数据本身来减少对昂贵注释的需求，自我监督方法对于推进深度学习变得至关重要。然而，如何原则性地进行自监督离线强化学习（RL）的问题仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过研究在半监督环境下的线性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中利用无奖励数据的理论优势来解决这个问题。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的可证明数据共享算法（PDS），以利用此类无奖励数据进行离线强化学习。 PDS 对从标记数据中学习到的奖励函数使用额外的惩罚来防止高估，从而确保算法的保守性。我们在各种离线 RL 任务上的结果表明，PDS 使用无奖励数据显着提高了离线 RL 算法的性能。总的来说，我们的工作提供了一种有前景的方法，可以在保持理论保证的同时，利用离线强化学习中未标记数据的优势。我们相信我们的发现将有助于开发更强大的自我监督强化学习方法。 本文研究了在离线强化学习中利用无监督数据共享的理论优势，并提出了一种名为PDS的算法以提升性能。 Hao Hu,Yiqin Yang,Qianchuan Zhao,Chongjie Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiawei Lian,Xiaofei Wang,Yuru Su,Mingyang Ma,Shaohui Mei
title: Contextual adversarial attack against aerial detection in the physical world
title_zh: 针对物理世界空中探测的上下文对抗攻击
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been extensively utilized in aerial detection. However, DNNs' sensitivity and vulnerability to maliciously elaborated adversarial examples have progressively garnered attention. Recently, physical attacks have gradually become a hot issue due to they are more practical in the real world, which poses great threats to some security-critical applications. In this paper, we take the first attempt to perform physical attacks in contextual form against aerial detection in the physical world. We propose an innovative contextual attack method against aerial detection in real scenarios, which achieves powerful attack performance and transfers well between various aerial object detectors without smearing or blocking the interested objects to hide. Based on the findings that the targets' contextual information plays an important role in aerial detection by observing the detectors' attention maps, we propose to make full use of the contextual area of the interested targets to elaborate contextual perturbations for the uncovered attacks in real scenarios. Extensive proportionally scaled experiments are conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed contextual attack method, which demonstrates the proposed method's superiority in both attack efficacy and physical practicality.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been extensively utilized in aerial detection. However, DNNs' sensitivity and vulnerability to maliciously elaborated adversarial examples have progressively garnered attention. Recently, physical attacks have gradually become a hot issue due to they are more practical in the real world, which poses great threats to some security-critical applications. In this paper, we take the first attempt to perform physical attacks in contextual form against aerial detection in the physical world. We propose an innovative contextual attack method against aerial detection in real scenarios, which achieves powerful attack performance and transfers well between various aerial object detectors without smearing or blocking the interested objects to hide. Based on the findings that the targets' contextual information plays an important role in aerial detection by observing the detectors' attention maps, we propose to make full use of the contextual area of the interested targets to elaborate contextual perturbations for the uncovered attacks in real scenarios. Extensive proportionally scaled experiments are conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed contextual attack method, which demonstrates the proposed method's superiority in both attack efficacy and physical practicality.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于航空检测。然而，DNN 对恶意精心设计的对抗性示例的敏感性和脆弱性已逐渐引起人们的关注。近年来，物理攻击由于在现实世界中更加实用而逐渐成为一个热点问题，这对一些安全关键的应用程序构成了巨大的威胁。在本文中，我们首次尝试以上下文形式针对物理世界中的空中检测进行物理攻击。我们提出了一种针对真实场景中的空中检测的创新上下文攻击方法，该方法实现了强大的攻击性能，并且在各种空中物体检测器之间很好地传输，而不会涂抹或遮挡感兴趣的物体来隐藏。通过观察探测器的注意力图，发现目标的上下文信息在空中检测中发挥着重要作用，我们建议充分利用感兴趣目标的上下文区域来详细说明真实场景中未发现的攻击的上下文扰动。进行了广泛的按比例缩放的实验来评估所提出的上下文攻击方法的有效性，这证明了所提出的方法在攻击功效和物理实用性方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对物理世界空中检测系统的上下文对抗攻击方法，通过利用目标的上下文信息进行扰动，实现无需遮挡的高效攻击。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在空中检测中的应用面临物理攻击的威胁，现有攻击方法常需遮挡目标，而本文旨在提出无需遮挡、更贴近实际场景的上下文对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: 基于目标上下文信息对检测的重要性，提出利用目标周围区域生成上下文扰动，通过分析注意力图优化扰动，实现对多种检测器的有效攻击。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多种空中检测器上具有良好的攻击效果和物理可行性，且无需遮挡目标。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的上下文对抗攻击方法在物理世界中对空中检测系统具有高效且实际的攻击能力，凸显了现有系统在安全方面的潜在风险。

authors_text: Wang Lu,Xixu Hu,Jindong Wang,Xing Xie
title: FedCLIP: Fast Generalization and Personalization for CLIP in Federated Learning
title_zh: FedCLIP：联邦学习中 CLIP 的快速泛化和个性化
comment: Accepted by IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin; code is at: https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL
comments: Accepted by IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin; code is at: https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL
abstract: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a new paradigm for privacy-preserving computation in recent years. Unfortunately, FL faces two critical challenges that hinder its actual performance: data distribution heterogeneity and high resource costs brought by large foundation models. Specifically, the non-IID data in different clients make existing FL algorithms hard to converge while the high resource costs, including computational and communication costs that increase the deployment difficulty in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose an effective yet simple method, named FedCLIP, to achieve fast generalization and personalization for CLIP in federated learning. Concretely, we design an attention-based adapter for the large model, CLIP, and the rest operations merely depend on adapters. Lightweight adapters can make the most use of pretrained model information and ensure models be adaptive for clients in specific tasks. Simultaneously, small-scale operations can mitigate the computational burden and communication burden caused by large models. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets with distribution shifts. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that FedCLIP significantly outperforms other baselines (9% overall improvements on PACS) and effectively reduces computational and communication costs (283x faster than FedAVG). Our code will be available at: https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL.
summary: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a new paradigm for privacy-preserving computation in recent years. Unfortunately, FL faces two critical challenges that hinder its actual performance: data distribution heterogeneity and high resource costs brought by large foundation models. Specifically, the non-IID data in different clients make existing FL algorithms hard to converge while the high resource costs, including computational and communication costs that increase the deployment difficulty in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose an effective yet simple method, named FedCLIP, to achieve fast generalization and personalization for CLIP in federated learning. Concretely, we design an attention-based adapter for the large model, CLIP, and the rest operations merely depend on adapters. Lightweight adapters can make the most use of pretrained model information and ensure models be adaptive for clients in specific tasks. Simultaneously, small-scale operations can mitigate the computational burden and communication burden caused by large models. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets with distribution shifts. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that FedCLIP significantly outperforms other baselines (9% overall improvements on PACS) and effectively reduces computational and communication costs (283x faster than FedAVG). Our code will be available at: https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，联邦学习（FL）已成为隐私保护计算的新范式。不幸的是，FL面临着两个阻碍其实际性能的关键挑战：数据分布异构性和大型基础模型带来的高资源成本。具体来说，不同客户端的非独立同分布数据使得现有的FL算法难以收敛，同时高昂的资源成本（包括计算和通信成本）增加了实际场景中的部署难度。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效而简单的方法，名为 FedCLIP，以实现联邦学习中 CLIP 的快速泛化和个性化。具体来说，我们为大模型设计了一个基于注意力的适配器，CLIP，其余操作仅依赖于适配器。轻量级适配器可以充分利用预训练的模型信息，并确保模型能够适应客户的特定任务。同时，小规模操作可以减轻大型模型造成的计算负担和通信负担。对三个具有分布变化的数据集进行了广泛的实验。定性和定量结果表明，FedCLIP 的性能显着优于其他基准（PACS 总体改进了 9%），并有效降低了计算和通信成本（比 FedAVG 快 283 倍）。我们的代码将在以下位置提供：https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedCLIP方法，在联邦学习中实现CLIP模型的快速泛化与个性化。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临数据分布异质性和大型基础模型高资源成本的挑战，现有算法难以收敛且部署困难。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的轻量级适配器，仅依赖适配器进行模型微调以降低计算和通信成本。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，FedCLIP较基线提升9%（PACS数据集），计算通信成本降低283倍。
AI.conclusion: FedCLIP通过适配器机制有效解决了联邦学习中的异质性与资源消耗问题，具有实际应用价值。

motivation: 联邦学习面临数据分布异质性和大型基础模型高资源成本的挑战，现有算法难以收敛且部署困难。

search_text: FedCLIP: Fast Generalization and Personalization for CLIP in Federated Learning FedCLIP：联邦学习中 CLIP 的快速泛化和个性化 Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a new paradigm for privacy-preserving computation in recent years. Unfortunately, FL faces two critical challenges that hinder its actual performance: data distribution heterogeneity and high resource costs brought by large foundation models. Specifically, the non-IID data in different clients make existing FL algorithms hard to converge while the high resource costs, including computational and communication costs that increase the deployment difficulty in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose an effective yet simple method, named FedCLIP, to achieve fast generalization and personalization for CLIP in federated learning. Concretely, we design an attention-based adapter for the large model, CLIP, and the rest operations merely depend on adapters. Lightweight adapters can make the most use of pretrained model information and ensure models be adaptive for clients in specific tasks. Simultaneously, small-scale operations can mitigate the computational burden and communication burden caused by large models. Extensive experiments are conducted on three datasets with distribution shifts. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that FedCLIP significantly outperforms other baselines (9% overall improvements on PACS) and effectively reduces computational and communication costs (283x faster than FedAVG). Our code will be available at: https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL. 近年来，联邦学习（FL）已成为隐私保护计算的新范式。不幸的是，FL面临着两个阻碍其实际性能的关键挑战：数据分布异构性和大型基础模型带来的高资源成本。具体来说，不同客户端的非独立同分布数据使得现有的FL算法难以收敛，同时高昂的资源成本（包括计算和通信成本）增加了实际场景中的部署难度。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效而简单的方法，名为 FedCLIP，以实现联邦学习中 CLIP 的快速泛化和个性化。具体来说，我们为大模型设计了一个基于注意力的适配器，CLIP，其余操作仅依赖于适配器。轻量级适配器可以充分利用预训练的模型信息，并确保模型能够适应客户的特定任务。同时，小规模操作可以减轻大型模型造成的计算负担和通信负担。对三个具有分布变化的数据集进行了广泛的实验。定性和定量结果表明，FedCLIP 的性能显着优于其他基准（PACS 总体改进了 9%），并有效降低了计算和通信成本（比 FedAVG 快 283 倍）。我们的代码将在以下位置提供：https://github.com/microsoft/PersonalizedFL。 本文提出FedCLIP方法，在联邦学习中实现CLIP模型的快速泛化与个性化。 Wang Lu,Xixu Hu,Jindong Wang,Xing Xie cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dyuman Aditya,Kaustuv Mukherji,Srikar Balasubramanian,Abhiraj Chaudhary,Paulo Shakarian
title: PyReason: Software for Open World Temporal Logic
title_zh: PyReason：开放世界时态逻辑软件
comment: Equal contributions from first two authors. Accepted at 2023 AAAI Spring Symposium on Challenges Requiring the Combination of Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering (AAAI: MAKE)
comments: Equal contributions from first two authors. Accepted at 2023 AAAI Spring Symposium on Challenges Requiring the Combination of Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering (AAAI: MAKE)
abstract: The growing popularity of neuro symbolic reasoning has led to the adoption of various forms of differentiable (i.e., fuzzy) first order logic. We introduce PyReason, a software framework based on generalized annotated logic that both captures the current cohort of differentiable logics and temporal extensions to support inference over finite periods of time with capabilities for open world reasoning. Further, PyReason is implemented to directly support reasoning over graphical structures (e.g., knowledge graphs, social networks, biological networks, etc.), produces fully explainable traces of inference, and includes various practical features such as type checking and a memory-efficient implementation. This paper reviews various extensions of generalized annotated logic integrated into our implementation, our modern, efficient Python-based implementation that conducts exact yet scalable deductive inference, and a suite of experiments. PyReason is available at: github.com/lab-v2/pyreason.
summary: The growing popularity of neuro symbolic reasoning has led to the adoption of various forms of differentiable (i.e., fuzzy) first order logic. We introduce PyReason, a software framework based on generalized annotated logic that both captures the current cohort of differentiable logics and temporal extensions to support inference over finite periods of time with capabilities for open world reasoning. Further, PyReason is implemented to directly support reasoning over graphical structures (e.g., knowledge graphs, social networks, biological networks, etc.), produces fully explainable traces of inference, and includes various practical features such as type checking and a memory-efficient implementation. This paper reviews various extensions of generalized annotated logic integrated into our implementation, our modern, efficient Python-based implementation that conducts exact yet scalable deductive inference, and a suite of experiments. PyReason is available at: github.com/lab-v2/pyreason.
abstract_zh: 神经符号推理的日益普及导致了各种形式的可微（即模糊）一阶逻辑的采用。我们介绍 PyReason，这是一个基于广义注释逻辑的软件框架，它捕获当前的可微逻辑和时间扩展群，以支持有限时间内的推理，并具有开放世界推理的功能。此外，PyReason 的实现直接支持图形结构（例如知识图、社交网络、生物网络等）的推理，产生完全可解释的推理痕迹，并包括各种实用功能，例如类型检查和内存高效实现。本文回顾了集成到我们的实现中的广义注释逻辑的各种扩展、我们现代、高效的基于 Python 的实现（可进行精确但可扩展的演绎推理）以及一系列实验。 PyReason 位于：github.com/lab-v2/pyreason。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍PyReason软件框架，结合可微分逻辑与时态扩展，支持开放世界推理及图形结构处理。
AI.motivation: 神经符号推理兴起推动可微分逻辑发展，但现有方法缺乏对时态逻辑和开放世界推理的有效支持。
AI.method: 基于广义注释逻辑实现时态扩展，支持知识图谱等图形结构推理，包含类型检查、可解释轨迹生成及高效内存管理。
AI.result: 通过实验验证PyReason在精确性、可扩展性及实际应用中的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PyReason成功整合多种逻辑扩展，提供高效实现方案，为复杂场景推理提供实用工具。

authors_text: Chase W. Mathews,David J. Braun
title: Design of a Variable Stiffness Spring with Human-Selectable Stiffness
title_zh: 具有人为选择刚度的变刚度弹簧的设计
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: Springs are commonly used in wearable robotic devices to provide assistive joint torque without the need for motors and batteries. However, different tasks (such as walking or running) and different users (such as athletes with strong legs or the elderly with weak legs) necessitate different assistive joint torques, and therefore, springs with different stiffness. Variable stiffness springs are a special class of springs which can exert more or less torque upon the same deflection, provided that the user is able to change the stiffness of the spring. In this paper, we present a novel variable stiffness spring design in which the user can select a preferred spring stiffness similar to switching gears on a bicycle. Using a leg-swing experiment, we demonstrate that the user can increment and decrement spring stiffness in a large range to effectively assist the hip joint during leg oscillations. Variable stiffness springs with human-selectable stiffness could be key components of wearable devices which augment locomotion tasks, such as walking, running, and swimming.
summary: Springs are commonly used in wearable robotic devices to provide assistive joint torque without the need for motors and batteries. However, different tasks (such as walking or running) and different users (such as athletes with strong legs or the elderly with weak legs) necessitate different assistive joint torques, and therefore, springs with different stiffness. Variable stiffness springs are a special class of springs which can exert more or less torque upon the same deflection, provided that the user is able to change the stiffness of the spring. In this paper, we present a novel variable stiffness spring design in which the user can select a preferred spring stiffness similar to switching gears on a bicycle. Using a leg-swing experiment, we demonstrate that the user can increment and decrement spring stiffness in a large range to effectively assist the hip joint during leg oscillations. Variable stiffness springs with human-selectable stiffness could be key components of wearable devices which augment locomotion tasks, such as walking, running, and swimming.
abstract_zh: 弹簧通常用于可穿戴机器人设备中，无需电机和电池即可提供辅助关节扭矩。然而，不同的任务（例如步行或跑步）和不同的使用者（例如腿部有力的运动员或腿部无力的老年人）需要不同的辅助关节扭矩，因此需要不同刚度的弹簧。可变刚度弹簧是一类特殊的弹簧，只要用户能够改变弹簧的刚度，它就可以在相同的偏转下施加或多或少的扭矩。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可变刚度弹簧设计，用户可以选择类似于自行车上切换齿轮的首选弹簧刚度。通过腿部摆动实验，我们证明用户可以在大范围内增加和减少弹簧刚度，以在腿部摆动期间有效地协助髋关节。具有人类可选择刚度的可变刚度弹簧可能是可穿戴设备的关键组件，可增强步行、跑步和游泳等运动任务。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种用户可调节刚度的变刚度弹簧，用于可穿戴机器人设备以辅助关节扭矩。
AI.motivation: 不同任务和用户需求需要不同关节扭矩，传统固定刚度弹簧无法满足个性化需求。
AI.method: 提出一种类似自行车换挡的可调刚度弹簧设计，并通过腿部摆动实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验表明用户可在大范围内增减弹簧刚度，有效辅助髋关节运动。
AI.conclusion: 可调刚度弹簧可成为增强行走、跑步等运动任务的可穿戴设备关键组件。

authors_text: Rongzhi Gu,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Dong Yu
title: 3D Neural Beamforming for Multi-channel Speech Separation Against Location Uncertainty
title_zh: 用于针对位置不确定性的多通道语音分离的 3D 神经波束成形
abstract: Multi-channel speech separation using speaker's directional information has demonstrated significant gains over blind speech separation. However, it has two limitations. First, substantial performance degradation is observed when the coming directions of two sounds are close. Second, the result highly relies on the precise estimation of the speaker's direction. To overcome these issues, this paper proposes 3D features and an associated 3D neural beamformer for multi-channel speech separation. Previous works in this area are extended in two important directions. First, the traditional 1D directional beam patterns are generalized to 3D. This enables the model to extract speech from any target region in the 3D space. Thus, speakers with similar directions but different elevations or distances become separable. Second, to handle the speaker location uncertainty, previously proposed spatial feature is extended to a new 3D region feature. The proposed 3D region feature and 3D neural beamformer are evaluated under an in-car scenario. Experimental results demonstrated that the combination of 3D feature and 3D beamformer can achieve comparable performance to the separation model with ground truth speaker location as input.
summary: Multi-channel speech separation using speaker's directional information has demonstrated significant gains over blind speech separation. However, it has two limitations. First, substantial performance degradation is observed when the coming directions of two sounds are close. Second, the result highly relies on the precise estimation of the speaker's direction. To overcome these issues, this paper proposes 3D features and an associated 3D neural beamformer for multi-channel speech separation. Previous works in this area are extended in two important directions. First, the traditional 1D directional beam patterns are generalized to 3D. This enables the model to extract speech from any target region in the 3D space. Thus, speakers with similar directions but different elevations or distances become separable. Second, to handle the speaker location uncertainty, previously proposed spatial feature is extended to a new 3D region feature. The proposed 3D region feature and 3D neural beamformer are evaluated under an in-car scenario. Experimental results demonstrated that the combination of 3D feature and 3D beamformer can achieve comparable performance to the separation model with ground truth speaker location as input.
abstract_zh: 使用说话者的方向信息的多通道语音分离已证明比盲语音分离有显着的增益。然而，它有两个限制。首先，当两个声音的传入方向接近时，会观察到性能显着下降。其次，结果高度依赖于对说话者方向的精确估计。为了克服这些问题，本文提出了用于多通道语音分离的 3D 特征和相关的 3D 神经波束形成器。该领域先前的工作在两个重要方向上进行了扩展。首先，将传统的 1D 定向波束方向图推广到 3D。这使得模型能够从 3D 空间中的任何目标区域提取语音。因此，具有相似方向但不同高度或距离的扬声器变得可分离。其次，为了处理说话者位置的不确定性，先前提出的空间特征被扩展到新的 3D 区域特征。所提出的 3D 区域特征和 3D 神经波束形成器在车内场景下进行评估。实验结果表明，3D 特征和 3D 波束形成器的组合可以实现与以地面真实说话人位置作为输入的分离模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种3D神经波束成形方法，用于解决多通道语音分离中的位置不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在声源方向相近或定位不准确时性能显著下降，需提升对位置不确定性的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将传统1D波束模式扩展为3D，提取三维空间目标区域语音；设计3D区域特征以应对位置不确定性。
AI.result: 车载场景实验表明，3D特征与波束成形结合的性能可媲美使用真实位置信息的模型。
AI.conclusion: 3D方法有效缓解了位置不确定性问题，提升了复杂场景下的语音分离效果。

search_text: 3D Neural Beamforming for Multi-channel Speech Separation Against Location Uncertainty 用于针对位置不确定性的多通道语音分离的 3D 神经波束成形 Multi-channel speech separation using speaker's directional information has demonstrated significant gains over blind speech separation. However, it has two limitations. First, substantial performance degradation is observed when the coming directions of two sounds are close. Second, the result highly relies on the precise estimation of the speaker's direction. To overcome these issues, this paper proposes 3D features and an associated 3D neural beamformer for multi-channel speech separation. Previous works in this area are extended in two important directions. First, the traditional 1D directional beam patterns are generalized to 3D. This enables the model to extract speech from any target region in the 3D space. Thus, speakers with similar directions but different elevations or distances become separable. Second, to handle the speaker location uncertainty, previously proposed spatial feature is extended to a new 3D region feature. The proposed 3D region feature and 3D neural beamformer are evaluated under an in-car scenario. Experimental results demonstrated that the combination of 3D feature and 3D beamformer can achieve comparable performance to the separation model with ground truth speaker location as input. 使用说话者的方向信息的多通道语音分离已证明比盲语音分离有显着的增益。然而，它有两个限制。首先，当两个声音的传入方向接近时，会观察到性能显着下降。其次，结果高度依赖于对说话者方向的精确估计。为了克服这些问题，本文提出了用于多通道语音分离的 3D 特征和相关的 3D 神经波束形成器。该领域先前的工作在两个重要方向上进行了扩展。首先，将传统的 1D 定向波束方向图推广到 3D。这使得模型能够从 3D 空间中的任何目标区域提取语音。因此，具有相似方向但不同高度或距离的扬声器变得可分离。其次，为了处理说话者位置的不确定性，先前提出的空间特征被扩展到新的 3D 区域特征。所提出的 3D 区域特征和 3D 神经波束形成器在车内场景下进行评估。实验结果表明，3D 特征和 3D 波束形成器的组合可以实现与以地面真实说话人位置作为输入的分离模型相当的性能。 本文提出一种3D神经波束成形方法，用于解决多通道语音分离中的位置不确定性问题。 Rongzhi Gu,Shi-Xiong Zhang,Dong Yu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yoonhyung Lee,Jinhyeok Yang,Kyomin Jung
title: Varianceflow: High-Quality and Controllable Text-to-Speech using Variance Information via Normalizing Flow
title_zh: Varianceflow：通过归一化流使用方差信息实现高质量且可控的文本转语音
abstract: There are two types of methods for non-autoregressive text-to-speech models to learn the one-to-many relationship between text and speech effectively. The first one is to use an advanced generative framework such as normalizing flow (NF). The second one is to use variance information such as pitch or energy together when generating speech. For the second type, it is also possible to control the variance factors by adjusting the variance values provided to a model. In this paper, we propose a novel model called VarianceFlow combining the advantages of the two types. By modeling the variance with NF, VarianceFlow predicts the variance information more precisely with improved speech quality. Also, the objective function of NF makes the model use the variance information and the text in a disentangled manner resulting in more precise variance control. In experiments, VarianceFlow shows superior performance over other state-of-the-art TTS models both in terms of speech quality and controllability.
summary: There are two types of methods for non-autoregressive text-to-speech models to learn the one-to-many relationship between text and speech effectively. The first one is to use an advanced generative framework such as normalizing flow (NF). The second one is to use variance information such as pitch or energy together when generating speech. For the second type, it is also possible to control the variance factors by adjusting the variance values provided to a model. In this paper, we propose a novel model called VarianceFlow combining the advantages of the two types. By modeling the variance with NF, VarianceFlow predicts the variance information more precisely with improved speech quality. Also, the objective function of NF makes the model use the variance information and the text in a disentangled manner resulting in more precise variance control. In experiments, VarianceFlow shows superior performance over other state-of-the-art TTS models both in terms of speech quality and controllability.
abstract_zh: 非自回归文本到语音模型有两种方法可以有效地学习文本和语音之间的一对多关系。第一个是使用先进的生成框架，例如标准化流程（NF）。第二种是在生成语音时一起使用音调或能量等方差信息。对于第二种类型，还可以通过调整提供给模型的方差值来控制方差因子。在本文中，我们结合了这两种类型的优点，提出了一种称为 VarianceFlow 的新颖模型。通过使用 NF 对方差进行建模，VarianceFlow 可以更精确地预测方差信息，同时提高语音质量。此外，NF 的目标函数使模型以解开的方式使用方差信息和文本，从而实现更精确的方差控制。在实验中，VarianceFlow 在语音质量和可控性方面都表现出了优于其他最先进的 TTS 模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合归一化流（NF）和方差信息的非自回归文本到语音（TTS）模型VarianceFlow，以提高语音质量和可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有非自回归TTS模型分别通过归一化流或方差信息（如音高、能量）处理文本与语音的一对多关系，但单独使用存在局限性，需结合两者优势以提升效果。
AI.method: 通过归一化流建模方差信息，利用其目标函数实现方差与文本的解耦学习，从而精确预测方差并提升语音生成质量与可控性。
AI.result: 实验表明，VarianceFlow在语音质量与方差控制能力上优于其他先进TTS模型。
AI.conclusion: VarianceFlow通过融合归一化流与方差信息，有效提升了非自回归TTS模型的生成质量与可控性。

authors_text: Hamid Ghaderi,Brandon Foreman,Amin Nayebi,Sindhu Tipirneni,Chandan K. Reddy,Vignesh Subbian
title: A Self-Supervised Learning-based Approach to Clustering Multivariate Time-Series Data with Missing Values (SLAC-Time): An Application to TBI Phenotyping
title_zh: 基于自监督学习的方法对具有缺失值的多元时间序列数据进行聚类 (SLAC-Time)：在 TBI 表型分析中的应用
comment: Submitted to the Journal of Biomedical Informatics
comments: Submitted to the Journal of Biomedical Informatics
abstract: Self-supervised learning approaches provide a promising direction for clustering multivariate time-series data. However, real-world time-series data often include missing values, and the existing approaches require imputing missing values before clustering, which may cause extensive computations and noise and result in invalid interpretations. To address these challenges, we present a Self-supervised Learning-based Approach to Clustering multivariate Time-series data with missing values (SLAC-Time). SLAC-Time is a Transformer-based clustering method that uses time-series forecasting as a proxy task for leveraging unlabeled data and learning more robust time-series representations. This method jointly learns the neural network parameters and the cluster assignments of the learned representations. It iteratively clusters the learned representations with the K-means method and then utilizes the subsequent cluster assignments as pseudo-labels to update the model parameters. To evaluate our proposed approach, we applied it to clustering and phenotyping Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) patients in the Transforming Research and Clinical Knowledge in Traumatic Brain Injury (TRACK-TBI) study. Our experiments demonstrate that SLAC-Time outperforms the baseline K-means clustering algorithm in terms of silhouette coefficient, Calinski Harabasz index, Dunn index, and Davies Bouldin index. We identified three TBI phenotypes that are distinct from one another in terms of clinically significant variables as well as clinical outcomes, including the Extended Glasgow Outcome Scale (GOSE) score, Intensive Care Unit (ICU) length of stay, and mortality rate. The experiments show that the TBI phenotypes identified by SLAC-Time can be potentially used for developing targeted clinical trials and therapeutic strategies.
summary: Self-supervised learning approaches provide a promising direction for clustering multivariate time-series data. However, real-world time-series data often include missing values, and the existing approaches require imputing missing values before clustering, which may cause extensive computations and noise and result in invalid interpretations. To address these challenges, we present a Self-supervised Learning-based Approach to Clustering multivariate Time-series data with missing values (SLAC-Time). SLAC-Time is a Transformer-based clustering method that uses time-series forecasting as a proxy task for leveraging unlabeled data and learning more robust time-series representations. This method jointly learns the neural network parameters and the cluster assignments of the learned representations. It iteratively clusters the learned representations with the K-means method and then utilizes the subsequent cluster assignments as pseudo-labels to update the model parameters. To evaluate our proposed approach, we applied it to clustering and phenotyping Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) patients in the Transforming Research and Clinical Knowledge in Traumatic Brain Injury (TRACK-TBI) study. Our experiments demonstrate that SLAC-Time outperforms the baseline K-means clustering algorithm in terms of silhouette coefficient, Calinski Harabasz index, Dunn index, and Davies Bouldin index. We identified three TBI phenotypes that are distinct from one another in terms of clinically significant variables as well as clinical outcomes, including the Extended Glasgow Outcome Scale (GOSE) score, Intensive Care Unit (ICU) length of stay, and mortality rate. The experiments show that the TBI phenotypes identified by SLAC-Time can be potentially used for developing targeted clinical trials and therapeutic strategies.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习方法为多元时间序列数据的聚类提供了一个有前途的方向。然而，现实世界的时间序列数据通常包含缺失值，现有方法需要在聚类之前输入缺失值，这可能会导致大量计算和噪声，并导致无效的解释。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于自监督学习的方法来对缺失值的多元时间序列数据进行聚类（SLAC-Time）。 SLAC-Time 是一种基于 Transformer 的聚类方法，它使用时间序列预测作为代理任务，以利用未标记的数据并学习更稳健的时间序列表示。该方法联合学习神经网络参数和学习表示的聚类分配。它使用 K 均值方法迭代地对学习到的表示进行聚类，然后利用后续的聚类分配作为伪标签来更新模型参数。为了评估我们提出的方法，我们将其应用于创伤性脑损伤 (TRACK-TBI) 研究中的创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的聚类和表型分析。我们的实验表明，SLAC-Time 在轮廓系数、Calinski Harabasz 指数、Dunn 指数和 Davies Bouldin 指数方面优于基线 K 均值聚类算法。我们确定了三种 TBI 表型，它们在临床显着变量和临床结果方面彼此不同，包括扩展格拉斯哥结果量表 (GOSE) 评分、重症监护病房 (ICU) 住院时间和死亡率。实验表明，SLAC-Time 识别的 TBI 表型可用于开发有针对性的临床试验和治疗策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的多变量时间序列聚类方法SLAC-Time，用于处理缺失值并应用于脑外伤（TBI）表型分析。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理含缺失值的时间序列聚类时需先进行填补，导致计算复杂且引入噪声。本文旨在开发无需预先填补缺失值的聚类方法，以提高鲁棒性和临床适用性。
AI.method: SLAC-Time基于Transformer架构，以时间序列预测为代理任务，联合学习神经网络参数与聚类分配。通过迭代K-means聚类生成伪标签，更新模型参数。
AI.result: 在TRACK-TBI数据集上，SLAC-Time在多个评估指标（如轮廓系数、Calinski-Harabasz指数等）上优于基线K-means方法，并识别出三种具有临床意义的TBI表型。
AI.conclusion: SLAC-Time有效处理缺失值时间序列聚类，识别的TBI表型可为靶向临床试验和治疗策略提供支持。

search_text: A Self-Supervised Learning-based Approach to Clustering Multivariate Time-Series Data with Missing Values (SLAC-Time): An Application to TBI Phenotyping 基于自监督学习的方法对具有缺失值的多元时间序列数据进行聚类 (SLAC-Time)：在 TBI 表型分析中的应用 Self-supervised learning approaches provide a promising direction for clustering multivariate time-series data. However, real-world time-series data often include missing values, and the existing approaches require imputing missing values before clustering, which may cause extensive computations and noise and result in invalid interpretations. To address these challenges, we present a Self-supervised Learning-based Approach to Clustering multivariate Time-series data with missing values (SLAC-Time). SLAC-Time is a Transformer-based clustering method that uses time-series forecasting as a proxy task for leveraging unlabeled data and learning more robust time-series representations. This method jointly learns the neural network parameters and the cluster assignments of the learned representations. It iteratively clusters the learned representations with the K-means method and then utilizes the subsequent cluster assignments as pseudo-labels to update the model parameters. To evaluate our proposed approach, we applied it to clustering and phenotyping Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) patients in the Transforming Research and Clinical Knowledge in Traumatic Brain Injury (TRACK-TBI) study. Our experiments demonstrate that SLAC-Time outperforms the baseline K-means clustering algorithm in terms of silhouette coefficient, Calinski Harabasz index, Dunn index, and Davies Bouldin index. We identified three TBI phenotypes that are distinct from one another in terms of clinically significant variables as well as clinical outcomes, including the Extended Glasgow Outcome Scale (GOSE) score, Intensive Care Unit (ICU) length of stay, and mortality rate. The experiments show that the TBI phenotypes identified by SLAC-Time can be potentially used for developing targeted clinical trials and therapeutic strategies. 自监督学习方法为多元时间序列数据的聚类提供了一个有前途的方向。然而，现实世界的时间序列数据通常包含缺失值，现有方法需要在聚类之前输入缺失值，这可能会导致大量计算和噪声，并导致无效的解释。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于自监督学习的方法来对缺失值的多元时间序列数据进行聚类（SLAC-Time）。 SLAC-Time 是一种基于 Transformer 的聚类方法，它使用时间序列预测作为代理任务，以利用未标记的数据并学习更稳健的时间序列表示。该方法联合学习神经网络参数和学习表示的聚类分配。它使用 K 均值方法迭代地对学习到的表示进行聚类，然后利用后续的聚类分配作为伪标签来更新模型参数。为了评估我们提出的方法，我们将其应用于创伤性脑损伤 (TRACK-TBI) 研究中的创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的聚类和表型分析。我们的实验表明，SLAC-Time 在轮廓系数、Calinski Harabasz 指数、Dunn 指数和 Davies Bouldin 指数方面优于基线 K 均值聚类算法。我们确定了三种 TBI 表型，它们在临床显着变量和临床结果方面彼此不同，包括扩展格拉斯哥结果量表 (GOSE) 评分、重症监护病房 (ICU) 住院时间和死亡率。实验表明，SLAC-Time 识别的 TBI 表型可用于开发有针对性的临床试验和治疗策略。 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的多变量时间序列聚类方法SLAC-Time，用于处理缺失值并应用于脑外伤（TBI）表型分析。 Hamid Ghaderi,Brandon Foreman,Amin Nayebi,Sindhu Tipirneni,Chandan K. Reddy,Vignesh Subbian cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jianbo Ma,Siqi Pan,Deepak Chandran,Andrea Fanelli,Richard Cartwright
title: A low latency attention module for streaming self-supervised speech representation learning
title_zh: 用于流式自监督语音表示学习的低延迟注意力模块
abstract: The transformer is a fundamental building block in deep learning, and the attention mechanism is the transformer's core component. Self-supervised speech representation learning (SSRL) represents a popular use-case for the transformer architecture. Due to transformers' acausal behavior, the use of transformers for SSRL has been predominantly focused on acausal applications. However, several media processing problems, such as speech processing, require real-time solutions. In this paper, we present an implementation of the attention module that enables training of SSRL architectures with low compute and memory requirements, while allowing real-time inference with low and fixed latency. The attention module proposed in this paper includes two components, streaming attention (SA) and low-latency streaming attention (LLSA). The SA represents our proposal for an efficient streaming SSRL implementation, while the LLSA solves the latency build-up problem of other streaming attention architectures, such as the masked acausal attention (MAA), guaranteeing a latency equal to one layer even when multiple layers are stacked. We present a comparative analysis between the vanilla attention, which we will refer here as acausal attention (AA), the SA, and the LLSA, by training a streaming SSRL with automatic speech recognition as downstream task. When training on librispeech-clean-100 and testing on librispeech-test-clean, our low-latency attention module has a word error rate (WER) of 5.84%, which represents a significant improvement over the MAA (WER = 13.82%). Our implementation also reduces the inference latency from 1.92 to 0.16 seconds. The proposed low-latency module preserves many of the benefits of conventional acausal transformers, but also enables latency characteristics that make it applicable to real-time streaming applications.

However, several media processing problems, such as speech processing, require real-time solutions. In this paper, we present an implementation of the attention module that enables training of SSRL architectures with low compute and memory requirements, while allowing real-time inference with low and fixed latency. The attention module proposed in this paper includes two components, streaming attention (SA) and low-latency streaming attention (LLSA). The SA represents our proposal for an efficient streaming SSRL implementation, while the LLSA solves the latency build-up problem of other streaming attention architectures, such as the masked acausal attention (MAA), guaranteeing a latency equal to one layer even when multiple layers are stacked. We present a comparative analysis between the vanilla attention, which we will refer here as acausal attention (AA), the SA, and the LLSA, by training a streaming SSRL with automatic speech recognition as downstream task. When training on librispeech-clean-100 and testing on librispeech-test-clean, our low-latency attention module has a word error rate (WER) of 5.84%, which represents a significant improvement over the MAA (WER = 13.82%). Our implementation also reduces the inference latency from 1.92 to 0.16 seconds. The proposed low-latency module preserves many of the benefits of conventional acausal transformers, but also enables latency characteristics that make it applicable to real-time streaming applications.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是深度学习的基本构建模块，而注意力机制是 Transformer 的核心组件。自监督语音表示学习 (SSRL) 代表了 Transformer 架构的一个流行用例。由于 Transformer 的非因果行为，SSRL 中 Transformer 的使用主要集中在非因果应用上。然而，一些媒体处理问题（例如语音处理）需要实时解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种注意力模块的实现，该模块能够以较低的计算和内存需求训练 SSRL 架构，同时允许以低且固定的延迟进行实时推理。本文提出的注意力模块包括两个组件，流式注意力（SA）和低延迟流式注意力（LLSA）。 SA 代表了我们关于高效流式 SSRL 实现的建议，而 LLSA 解决了其他流式注意力架构的延迟累积问题，例如屏蔽非因果注意力（MAA），即使在多层堆叠时也保证延迟等于一层。我们通过使用自动语音识别作为下游任务来训练流式 SSRL，对普通注意力（这里称为非因果注意力（AA）、SA 和 LLSA）进行了比较分析。在 librispeech-clean-100 上进行训练并在 librispeech-test-clean 上进行测试时，我们的低延迟注意力模块的单词错误率 (WER) 为 5.84%，这比 MAA (WER = 13.82%) 有了显着改善。我们的实现还将推理延迟从 1.92 秒减少到 0.16 秒。所提出的低延迟模块保留了传统非因果变压器的许多优点，但也实现了延迟特性，使其适用于实时流应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低延迟的注意力模块，用于流式自监督语音表示学习，以实现实时推理。
AI.motivation: 传统的Transformer模型在自监督语音表示学习中主要用于非实时应用，而许多语音处理任务需要实时解决方案。现有流式注意力架构存在延迟累积问题，需要改进。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种包含流式注意力（SA）和低延迟流式注意力（LLSA）的注意力模块，以降低计算和内存需求，同时保证实时推理的低且固定延迟。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，本文提出的低延迟注意力模块在词错误率（WER）上达到5.84%，显著优于MAA的13.82%。同时，推理延迟从1.92秒减少到0.16秒。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的低延迟注意力模块保留了传统非因果Transformer的优势，并实现了适用于实时流式应用的延迟特性。

authors_text: Daniella Tola,Peter Corke
title: Understanding URDF: A Survey Based on User Experience
title_zh: 了解 URDF：基于用户体验的调查
comment: Corrected errors in figures 10 and 11, and added additional information in paragraph "Methods to obtain URDF (S14, 439 responses)" on page 5
comments: Corrected errors in figures 10 and 11, and added additional information in paragraph "Methods to obtain URDF (S14, 439 responses)" on page 5
abstract: With the increasing complexity of robot systems, it is necessary to simulate them before deployment. To do this, a model of the robot's kinematics or dynamics is required. One of the most commonly used formats for modeling robots is the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF). The goal of this article is to understand how URDF is currently used, what challenges people face when working with it, and how the community sees the future of URDF. The outcome can potentially be used to guide future research. This article presents the results from a survey based on 510 anonymous responses from robotic developers of different backgrounds and levels of experience. We find that 96.8% of the participants have simulated robots before, and of them 95.5% had used URDF. We identify a number of challenges and limitations that complicate the use of URDF, such as the inability to model parallel linkages and closed-chain systems, no real standard, lack of documentation, and a limited number of dynamic parameters to model the robot. Future perspectives for URDF are also determined, where 53.5% believe URDF will be more commonly used in the future, 12.2% believe other standards or tools will make URDF obsolete, and 34.4% are not sure what the future of URDF will be. Most participants agree that there is a need for better tooling to ensure URDF's future use.

One of the most commonly used formats for modeling robots is the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF). The goal of this article is to understand how URDF is currently used, what challenges people face when working with it, and how the community sees the future of URDF. The outcome can potentially be used to guide future research. This article presents the results from a survey based on 510 anonymous responses from robotic developers of different backgrounds and levels of experience. We find that 96.8% of the participants have simulated robots before, and of them 95.5% had used URDF. We identify a number of challenges and limitations that complicate the use of URDF, such as the inability to model parallel linkages and closed-chain systems, no real standard, lack of documentation, and a limited number of dynamic parameters to model the robot. Future perspectives for URDF are also determined, where 53.5% believe URDF will be more commonly used in the future, 12.2% believe other standards or tools will make URDF obsolete, and 34.4% are not sure what the future of URDF will be. Most participants agree that there is a need for better tooling to ensure URDF's future use.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人系统的复杂性不断增加，有必要在部署之前对其进行模拟。为此，需要机器人的运动学或动力学模型。机器人建模最常用的格式之一是统一机器人描述格式（URDF）。本文的目的是了解 URDF 目前的使用方式、人们在使用它时面临哪些挑战，以及社区如何看待 URDF 的未来。结果有可能用于指导未来的研究。本文介绍了一项基于 510 份来自不同背景和经验水平的机器人开发人员的匿名回复的调查结果。我们发现，96.8%的参与者之前有过模拟机器人，其中95.5%使用过URDF。我们发现了一些使 URDF 的使用变得复杂的挑战和限制，例如无法对并行连杆和闭链系统进行建模、没有真正的标准、缺乏文档以及用于对机器人进行建模的动态参数数量有限。 URDF 的未来前景也已确定，其中 53.5% 的人认为 URDF 未来会更常用，12.2% 的人认为其他标准或工具将使 URDF 过时，34.4% 的人不确定 URDF 的未来会怎样。大多数参与者都认为需要更好的工具来确保 URDF 的未来使用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查分析URDF（统一机器人描述格式）的当前使用情况、面临的挑战及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人系统复杂度提升，URDF作为常用建模格式存在诸多挑战，需通过用户反馈明确其问题与改进方向以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过匿名问卷收集510名不同背景机器人开发者的经验数据，分析URDF使用现状及痛点。
AI.result: 96.8%受访者曾进行机器人仿真，95.5%使用过URDF；主要挑战包括无法建模并联机构、缺乏标准及文档，53.5%认为URDF未来将更普及。
AI.conclusion: URDF需改进工具链以解决现有局限，多数开发者认可其价值但呼吁增强易用性与功能性。

search_text: Understanding URDF: A Survey Based on User Experience 了解 URDF：基于用户体验的调查 With the increasing complexity of robot systems, it is necessary to simulate them before deployment. To do this, a model of the robot's kinematics or dynamics is required. One of the most commonly used formats for modeling robots is the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF). The goal of this article is to understand how URDF is currently used, what challenges people face when working with it, and how the community sees the future of URDF. The outcome can potentially be used to guide future research. This article presents the results from a survey based on 510 anonymous responses from robotic developers of different backgrounds and levels of experience. We find that 96.8% of the participants have simulated robots before, and of them 95.5% had used URDF. We identify a number of challenges and limitations that complicate the use of URDF, such as the inability to model parallel linkages and closed-chain systems, no real standard, lack of documentation, and a limited number of dynamic parameters to model the robot. Future perspectives for URDF are also determined, where 53.5% believe URDF will be more commonly used in the future, 12.2% believe other standards or tools will make URDF obsolete, and 34.4% are not sure what the future of URDF will be. Most participants agree that there is a need for better tooling to ensure URDF's future use. 随着机器人系统的复杂性不断增加，有必要在部署之前对其进行模拟。为此，需要机器人的运动学或动力学模型。机器人建模最常用的格式之一是统一机器人描述格式（URDF）。本文的目的是了解 URDF 目前的使用方式、人们在使用它时面临哪些挑战，以及社区如何看待 URDF 的未来。结果有可能用于指导未来的研究。本文介绍了一项基于 510 份来自不同背景和经验水平的机器人开发人员的匿名回复的调查结果。我们发现，96.8%的参与者之前有过模拟机器人，其中95.5%使用过URDF。我们发现了一些使 URDF 的使用变得复杂的挑战和限制，例如无法对并行连杆和闭链系统进行建模、没有真正的标准、缺乏文档以及用于对机器人进行建模的动态参数数量有限。 URDF 的未来前景也已确定，其中 53.5% 的人认为 URDF 未来会更常用，12.2% 的人认为其他标准或工具将使 URDF 过时，34.4% 的人不确定 URDF 的未来会怎样。大多数参与者都认为需要更好的工具来确保 URDF 的未来使用。 本文通过调查分析URDF（统一机器人描述格式）的当前使用情况、面临的挑战及未来发展方向。 Daniella Tola,Peter Corke cs.RO

authors_text: Kaitlyn Zhou,Dan Jurafsky,Tatsunori Hashimoto
title: Navigating the Grey Area: How Expressions of Uncertainty and Overconfidence Affect Language Models
title_zh: 穿越灰色地带：不确定性和过度自信的表达如何影响语言模型
abstract: The increased deployment of LMs for real-world tasks involving knowledge and facts makes it important to understand model epistemology: what LMs think they know, and how their attitudes toward that knowledge are affected by language use in their inputs. Here, we study an aspect of model epistemology: how epistemic markers of certainty, uncertainty, or evidentiality like "I'm sure it's", "I think it's", or "Wikipedia says it's" affect models, and whether they contribute to model failures. We develop a typology of epistemic markers and inject 50 markers into prompts for question answering. We find that LMs are highly sensitive to epistemic markers in prompts, with accuracies varying more than 80%. Surprisingly, we find that expressions of high certainty result in a 7% decrease in accuracy as compared to low certainty expressions; similarly, factive verbs hurt performance, while evidentials benefit performance. Our analysis of a popular pretraining dataset shows that these markers of uncertainty are associated with answers on question-answering websites, while markers of certainty are associated with questions. These associations may suggest that the behavior of LMs is based on mimicking observed language use, rather than truly reflecting epistemic uncertainty.
summary: The increased deployment of LMs for real-world tasks involving knowledge and facts makes it important to understand model epistemology: what LMs think they know, and how their attitudes toward that knowledge are affected by language use in their inputs. Here, we study an aspect of model epistemology: how epistemic markers of certainty, uncertainty, or evidentiality like "I'm sure it's", "I think it's", or "Wikipedia says it's" affect models, and whether they contribute to model failures. We develop a typology of epistemic markers and inject 50 markers into prompts for question answering. We find that LMs are highly sensitive to epistemic markers in prompts, with accuracies varying more than 80%. Surprisingly, we find that expressions of high certainty result in a 7% decrease in accuracy as compared to low certainty expressions; similarly, factive verbs hurt performance, while evidentials benefit performance. Our analysis of a popular pretraining dataset shows that these markers of uncertainty are associated with answers on question-answering websites, while markers of certainty are associated with questions. These associations may suggest that the behavior of LMs is based on mimicking observed language use, rather than truly reflecting epistemic uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 在涉及知识和事实的现实世界任务中越来越多地部署语言模型，使得理解模型认识论变得非常重要：语言模型认为他们知道什么，以及他们对知识的态度如何受到输入中语言使用的影响。在这里，我们研究模型认识论的一个方面：确定性、不确定性或证据性的认知标记（例如“我确信它是”、“我认为它是”或“维基百科说它是”）如何影响模型，以及它们是否会导致模型失败。我们开发了认知标记的类型学，并将 50 个标记注入到问答提示中。我们发现 LM 对提示中的认知标记高度敏感，准确度变化超过 80%。令人惊讶的是，我们发现与低确定性表达式相比，高确定性表达式导致准确度下降 7%；同样，事实动词会损害绩效，而证据动词则有利于绩效。我们对流行的预训练数据集的分析表明，这些不确定性标记与问答网站上的答案相关，而确定性标记与问题相关。这些关联可能表明语言模型的行为是基于模仿观察到的语言使用，而不是真正反映认知的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型对输入中确定性、不确定性及证据性表达的敏感性，分析其对模型准确性的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型在现实任务中的广泛应用，理解其如何处理输入中的知识态度（如确定性或不确定性）及其对模型表现的影响变得至关重要。
AI.method: 构建认识论标记类型，将50种表达（如‘我确定’‘我认为’等）注入问答提示中，通过实验分析模型准确性变化，并关联预训练数据集中的标记分布。
AI.result: 模型对认识论标记高度敏感，确定性表达导致准确性下降7%，证据性标记提升性能；预训练数据中不确定性标记与答案相关，确定性标记与问题相关。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型的行为更倾向于模仿训练数据中的语言模式，而非真实反映知识的不确定性或确定性。

authors_text: Jane Hsieh,Miranda Karger,Lucas Zagal,Haiyi Zhu
title: Navigating Multi-Stakeholder Incentives and Preferences: Co-Designing Alternatives for the Future of Gig Worker Well-Being
title_zh: 引导多方利益相关者的激励和偏好：共同设计零工工人福祉未来的替代方案
abstract: Gig workers, and the products and services they provide, play an increasingly ubiquitous role in our daily lives. But despite growing evidence suggesting that worker well-being in gig economy platforms have become significant societal problems, few studies have investigated possible solutions. We take a stride in this direction by engaging workers, platform employees, and local regulators in a series of speed dating workshops using storyboards based on real-life situations to rapidly elicit stakeholder preferences for addressing financial, physical, and social issues related to worker well-being. Our results reveal that existing public and platformic infrastructures fall short in providing workers with resources needed to perform gigs, surfacing a need for multi-platform collaborations, technological innovations, as well as changes in regulations, labor laws, and the public's perception of gig workers, among others. Drawing from multi-stakeholder findings, we discuss these implications for technology, policy, and service as well as avenues for collaboration.
summary: Gig workers, and the products and services they provide, play an increasingly ubiquitous role in our daily lives. But despite growing evidence suggesting that worker well-being in gig economy platforms have become significant societal problems, few studies have investigated possible solutions. We take a stride in this direction by engaging workers, platform employees, and local regulators in a series of speed dating workshops using storyboards based on real-life situations to rapidly elicit stakeholder preferences for addressing financial, physical, and social issues related to worker well-being. Our results reveal that existing public and platformic infrastructures fall short in providing workers with resources needed to perform gigs, surfacing a need for multi-platform collaborations, technological innovations, as well as changes in regulations, labor laws, and the public's perception of gig workers, among others. Drawing from multi-stakeholder findings, we discuss these implications for technology, policy, and service as well as avenues for collaboration.
abstract_zh: 零工以及他们提供的产品和服务在我们的日常生活中发挥着越来越普遍的作用。但是，尽管越来越多的证据表明零工经济平台中的工人福祉已成为重大社会问题，但很少有研究调查可能的解决方案。我们朝这个方向迈出了一大步，让工人、平台员工和当地监管机构参与一系列快速约会研讨会，使用基于现实生活情况的故事板，快速引发利益相关者对解决与工人福祉相关的财务、身体和社会问题的偏好。我们的研究结果表明，现有的公共和平台基础设施在为工人提供零工所需的资源方面存在不足，需要多平台合作、技术创新以及法规、劳动法和公众对零工工人看法的变化等。根据多利益相关者的调查结果，我们讨论了这些对技术、政策和服务以及协作途径的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过多利益相关方协作设计，探索解决零工工作者福祉问题的未来方案。
AI.motivation: 零工经济中工作者的福祉问题日益严重，但现有研究缺乏针对解决方案的系统性探索。
AI.method: 通过基于真实场景的Storyboard速配研讨会，邀请零工工作者、平台员工及地方监管者快速收集利益相关方偏好。
AI.result: 发现现有公共和平台基础设施无法满足零工工作者需求，需多平台协作、技术创新及法规调整等综合措施。
AI.conclusion: 需从技术、政策和服务层面推动跨领域合作，重构社会对零工工作者的认知与支持体系。

authors_text: Yifan Jiang,Han Chen,Hanseok Ko
title: Spatial-temporal Transformer-guided Diffusion based Data Augmentation for Efficient Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 时空变换器引导的基于扩散的数据增强，用于高效的基于骨架的动作识别
abstract: Recently, skeleton-based human action has become a hot research topic because the compact representation of human skeletons brings new blood to this research domain. As a result, researchers began to notice the importance of using RGB or other sensors to analyze human action by extracting skeleton information. Leveraging the rapid development of deep learning (DL), a significant number of skeleton-based human action approaches have been presented with fine-designed DL structures recently. However, a well-trained DL model always demands high-quality and sufficient data, which is hard to obtain without costing high expenses and human labor. In this paper, we introduce a novel data augmentation method for skeleton-based action recognition tasks, which can effectively generate high-quality and diverse sequential actions. In order to obtain natural and realistic action sequences, we propose denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) that can generate a series of synthetic action sequences, and their generation process is precisely guided by a spatial-temporal transformer (ST-Trans). Experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) motion generation approaches on different naturality and diversity metrics. It proves that its high-quality synthetic data can also be effectively deployed to existing action recognition models with significant performance improvement.
summary: Recently, skeleton-based human action has become a hot research topic because the compact representation of human skeletons brings new blood to this research domain. As a result, researchers began to notice the importance of using RGB or other sensors to analyze human action by extracting skeleton information. Leveraging the rapid development of deep learning (DL), a significant number of skeleton-based human action approaches have been presented with fine-designed DL structures recently. However, a well-trained DL model always demands high-quality and sufficient data, which is hard to obtain without costing high expenses and human labor. In this paper, we introduce a novel data augmentation method for skeleton-based action recognition tasks, which can effectively generate high-quality and diverse sequential actions. In order to obtain natural and realistic action sequences, we propose denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) that can generate a series of synthetic action sequences, and their generation process is precisely guided by a spatial-temporal transformer (ST-Trans). Experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) motion generation approaches on different naturality and diversity metrics. It proves that its high-quality synthetic data can also be effectively deployed to existing action recognition models with significant performance improvement.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于骨骼的人体动作已成为一个热门研究课题，因为人体骨骼的紧凑表示为该研究领域带来了新的血液。因此，研究人员开始注意到使用 RGB 或其他传感器通过提取骨骼信息来分析人类行为的重要性。利用深度学习（DL）的快速发展，最近出现了大量基于骨架的人类动作方法，并具有精心设计的深度学习结构。然而，训练有素的深度学习模型总是需要高质量和充足的数据，而如果不花费高昂的费用和人力，这是很难获得的。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于基于骨架的动作识别任务的新颖的数据增强方法，该方法可以有效地生成高质量且多样化的序列动作。为了获得自然和真实的动作序列，我们提出了去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），它可以生成一系列合成动作序列，并且它们的生成过程由时空转换器（ST-Trans）精确引导。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不同的自然性和多样性指标上优于最先进的（SOTA）运动生成方法。它证明其高质量的合成数据也可以有效地部署到现有的动作识别模型中，并具有显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时空Transformer引导的扩散模型的数据增强方法，以提高骨架动作识别的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 高质量骨架动作数据获取成本高且耗时，现有数据增强方法难以生成自然且多样化的动作序列。
AI.method: 结合去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）与时空Transformer（ST-Trans），通过扩散过程生成合成动作序列并由ST-Trans精确引导。
AI.result: 在自然性与多样性指标上优于现有最先进方法，生成的高质量数据可有效提升现有动作识别模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能生成高质量合成数据，有效缓解数据不足问题，显著提升骨架动作识别模型效果。

search_text: Spatial-temporal Transformer-guided Diffusion based Data Augmentation for Efficient Skeleton-based Action Recognition 时空变换器引导的基于扩散的数据增强，用于高效的基于骨架的动作识别 Recently, skeleton-based human action has become a hot research topic because the compact representation of human skeletons brings new blood to this research domain. As a result, researchers began to notice the importance of using RGB or other sensors to analyze human action by extracting skeleton information. Leveraging the rapid development of deep learning (DL), a significant number of skeleton-based human action approaches have been presented with fine-designed DL structures recently. However, a well-trained DL model always demands high-quality and sufficient data, which is hard to obtain without costing high expenses and human labor. In this paper, we introduce a novel data augmentation method for skeleton-based action recognition tasks, which can effectively generate high-quality and diverse sequential actions. In order to obtain natural and realistic action sequences, we propose denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) that can generate a series of synthetic action sequences, and their generation process is precisely guided by a spatial-temporal transformer (ST-Trans). Experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) motion generation approaches on different naturality and diversity metrics. It proves that its high-quality synthetic data can also be effectively deployed to existing action recognition models with significant performance improvement. 近年来，基于骨骼的人体动作已成为一个热门研究课题，因为人体骨骼的紧凑表示为该研究领域带来了新的血液。因此，研究人员开始注意到使用 RGB 或其他传感器通过提取骨骼信息来分析人类行为的重要性。利用深度学习（DL）的快速发展，最近出现了大量基于骨架的人类动作方法，并具有精心设计的深度学习结构。然而，训练有素的深度学习模型总是需要高质量和充足的数据，而如果不花费高昂的费用和人力，这是很难获得的。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于基于骨架的动作识别任务的新颖的数据增强方法，该方法可以有效地生成高质量且多样化的序列动作。为了获得自然和真实的动作序列，我们提出了去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），它可以生成一系列合成动作序列，并且它们的生成过程由时空转换器（ST-Trans）精确引导。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不同的自然性和多样性指标上优于最先进的（SOTA）运动生成方法。它证明其高质量的合成数据也可以有效地部署到现有的动作识别模型中，并具有显着的性能提升。 提出一种基于时空Transformer引导的扩散模型的数据增强方法，以提高骨架动作识别的效率和效果。 Yifan Jiang,Han Chen,Hanseok Ko cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Philip Koopman
title: Large-Block Modular Addition Checksum Algorithms
title_zh: 大块模块化加法校验和算法
abstract: Checksum algorithms are widely employed due to their use of a simple algorithm with fast computational speed to provide a basic detection capability for corrupted data. This paper describes the benefits of adding the design parameter of increased data block size for modular addition checksums, combined with an empirical approach to modulus selection. A longer processing block size with the right modulus can provide significantly better fault detection performance with no change in the number of bytes used to store the check value. In particular, a large-block dual-sum approach provides Hamming Distance 3-class fault detection performance for many times the data word length capability of previously studied Fletcher and Adler checksums. Moduli of 253 and 65525 are identified as being particularly effective for general-purpose checksum use.
summary: Checksum algorithms are widely employed due to their use of a simple algorithm with fast computational speed to provide a basic detection capability for corrupted data. This paper describes the benefits of adding the design parameter of increased data block size for modular addition checksums, combined with an empirical approach to modulus selection. A longer processing block size with the right modulus can provide significantly better fault detection performance with no change in the number of bytes used to store the check value. In particular, a large-block dual-sum approach provides Hamming Distance 3-class fault detection performance for many times the data word length capability of previously studied Fletcher and Adler checksums. Moduli of 253 and 65525 are identified as being particularly effective for general-purpose checksum use.
abstract_zh: 校验和算法由于使用简单的算法和快速的计算速度来提供对损坏数据的基本检测能力，因此被广泛采用。本文描述了为模加校验和添加增加数据块大小的设计参数并结合模数选择的经验方法的好处。具有正确模数的较长处理块大小可以提供明显更好的故障检测性能，而无需改变用于存储校验值的字节数。特别是，大块双和方法提供了汉明距离 3 级故障检测性能，其数据字长能力是先前研究的 Fletcher 和 Adler 校验和的许多倍。模数 253 和 65525 被认为对于通用校验和使用特别有效。

AI.tldr: 提出大块模加校验和算法，通过增加数据块大小和优化模数选择，提升故障检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有校验和算法在检测数据错误时存在局限，需提升检测能力而不增加校验值存储开销
AI.method: 采用大块双求和方法结合经验模数选择策略，优化校验和计算过程
AI.result: 实现汉明距离3类故障检测，覆盖数据长度远超传统算法，模数253和65525表现优异
AI.conclusion: 大块模加校验和算法有效提升检测能力，推荐模数253和65525用于通用场景

authors_text: Wenxing Liu,Hanlin Niu,Wei Pan,Guido Herrmann,Joaquin Carrasco
title: Sim-and-Real Reinforcement Learning for Manipulation: A Consensus-based Approach
title_zh: 用于操作的模拟与真实强化学习：基于共识的方法
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Sim-and-real training is a promising alternative to sim-to-real training for robot manipulations. However, the current sim-and-real training is neither efficient, i.e., slow convergence to the optimal policy, nor effective, i.e., sizeable real-world robot data. Given limited time and hardware budgets, the performance of sim-and-real training is not satisfactory. In this paper, we propose a Consensus-based Sim-And-Real deep reinforcement learning algorithm (CSAR) for manipulator pick-and-place tasks, which shows comparable performance in both sim-and-real worlds. In this algorithm, we train the agents in simulators and the real world to get the optimal policies for both sim-and-real worlds. We found two interesting phenomenons: (1) Best policy in simulation is not the best for sim-and-real training. (2) The more simulation agents, the better sim-and-real training. The experimental video is available at: https://youtu.be/mcHJtNIsTEQ.
summary: Sim-and-real training is a promising alternative to sim-to-real training for robot manipulations. However, the current sim-and-real training is neither efficient, i.e., slow convergence to the optimal policy, nor effective, i.e., sizeable real-world robot data. Given limited time and hardware budgets, the performance of sim-and-real training is not satisfactory. In this paper, we propose a Consensus-based Sim-And-Real deep reinforcement learning algorithm (CSAR) for manipulator pick-and-place tasks, which shows comparable performance in both sim-and-real worlds. In this algorithm, we train the agents in simulators and the real world to get the optimal policies for both sim-and-real worlds. We found two interesting phenomenons: (1) Best policy in simulation is not the best for sim-and-real training. (2) The more simulation agents, the better sim-and-real training. The experimental video is available at: https://youtu.be/mcHJtNIsTEQ.
abstract_zh: 模拟与真实训练是机器人操作模拟与真实训练的一种有前途的替代方案。然而，当前的模拟和真实训练既不高效（即收敛到最优策略缓慢），也不有效（即大量的现实世界机器人数据）。由于时间和硬件预算有限，模拟与真实训练的性能并不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于机械手拾放任务的基于共识的 Sim-And-Real 深度强化学习算法（CSAR），该算法在模拟和现实世界中表现出相当的性能。在此算法中，我们在模拟器和现实世界中训练代理，以获得模拟世界和现实世界的最佳策略。我们发现了两个有趣的现象：（1）模拟中的最佳策略并不是模拟和真实训练的最佳策略。 (2) 模拟智能体越多，模拟真实训练效果越好。实验视频可在以下网址获取：https://youtu.be/mcHJtNIsTEQ。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共识的仿真与现实强化学习算法（CSAR），用于机械臂抓取与放置任务，旨在解决仿真与现实环境训练效率低、效果差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真与现实联合训练方法收敛速度慢、现实世界数据量不足，导致在有限时间和硬件资源下性能不理想，需改进训练效率与效果。
AI.method: 通过同时在仿真和现实环境中训练智能体，利用共识机制获取对两者均最优的策略，并发现仿真中最佳策略未必适用于联合训练，且仿真智能体数量越多训练效果越好。
AI.result: CSAR算法在仿真与现实环境中均表现出可比性能，验证了共识机制的有效性，并揭示了仿真策略选择与智能体数量对训练结果的影响规律。
AI.conclusion: 基于共识的联合训练方法能有效弥合仿真与现实差距，增加仿真智能体数量可提升训练效果，同时需注意仿真最优策略未必适用于实际联合训练场景。

In this paper, we propose a Consensus-based Sim-And-Real deep reinforcement learning algorithm (CSAR) for manipulator pick-and-place tasks, which shows comparable performance in both sim-and-real worlds. In this algorithm, we train the agents in simulators and the real world to get the optimal policies for both sim-and-real worlds. We found two interesting phenomenons: (1) Best policy in simulation is not the best for sim-and-real training. (2) The more simulation agents, the better sim-and-real training. The experimental video is available at: https://youtu.be/mcHJtNIsTEQ. 模拟与真实训练是机器人操作模拟与真实训练的一种有前途的替代方案。然而，当前的模拟和真实训练既不高效（即收敛到最优策略缓慢），也不有效（即大量的现实世界机器人数据）。由于时间和硬件预算有限，模拟与真实训练的性能并不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于机械手拾放任务的基于共识的 Sim-And-Real 深度强化学习算法（CSAR），该算法在模拟和现实世界中表现出相当的性能。在此算法中，我们在模拟器和现实世界中训练代理，以获得模拟世界和现实世界的最佳策略。我们发现了两个有趣的现象：（1）模拟中的最佳策略并不是模拟和真实训练的最佳策略。 (2) 模拟智能体越多，模拟真实训练效果越好。实验视频可在以下网址获取：https://youtu.be/mcHJtNIsTEQ。 本文提出了一种基于共识的仿真与现实强化学习算法（CSAR），用于机械臂抓取与放置任务，旨在解决仿真与现实环境训练效率低、效果差的问题。 Wenxing Liu,Hanlin Niu,Wei Pan,Guido Herrmann,Joaquin Carrasco cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Christian E. Roelofse,Corné E. van Daalen
title: An accurate and efficient approach to probabilistic conflict prediction
title_zh: 一种准确有效的概率冲突预测方法
comment: 10 + pages, accepted for publication, not published yet
comments: 10 + pages, accepted for publication, not published yet
abstract: Conflict prediction is a vital component of path planning for autonomous vehicles. Prediction methods must be accurate for reliable navigation, but also computationally efficient to enable online path planning. Efficient prediction methods are especially crucial when testing large sets of candidate trajectories. We present a prediction method that has the same accuracy as existing methods, but up to an order of magnitude faster. This is achieved by rewriting the conflict prediction problem in terms of the first-passage time distribution using a dimension-reduction transform. First-passage time distributions are analytically derived for a subset of Gaussian processes describing vehicle motion. The proposed method is applicable to 2-D stochastic processes where the mean can be approximated by line segments, and the conflict boundary can be approximated by piece-wise straight lines. The proposed method was tested in simulation and compared to two probability flow methods, as well as a recent instantaneous conflict probability method. The results demonstrate a significant decrease of computation time.
summary: Conflict prediction is a vital component of path planning for autonomous vehicles. Prediction methods must be accurate for reliable navigation, but also computationally efficient to enable online path planning. Efficient prediction methods are especially crucial when testing large sets of candidate trajectories. We present a prediction method that has the same accuracy as existing methods, but up to an order of magnitude faster. This is achieved by rewriting the conflict prediction problem in terms of the first-passage time distribution using a dimension-reduction transform. First-passage time distributions are analytically derived for a subset of Gaussian processes describing vehicle motion. The proposed method is applicable to 2-D stochastic processes where the mean can be approximated by line segments, and the conflict boundary can be approximated by piece-wise straight lines. The proposed method was tested in simulation and compared to two probability flow methods, as well as a recent instantaneous conflict probability method. The results demonstrate a significant decrease of computation time.
abstract_zh: 冲突预测是自动驾驶车辆路径规划的重要组成部分。预测方法必须准确才能实现可靠的导航，而且计算效率也必须高，才能实现在线路径规划。在测试大量候选轨迹时，有效的预测方法尤其重要。我们提出了一种预测方法，其精度与现有方法相同，但速度提高了一个数量级。这是通过使用降维变换根据首次通过时间分布重写冲突预测问题来实现的。通过分析得出描述车辆运动的高斯过程子集的首次通过时间分布。该方法适用于二维随机过程，其中均值可以用线段来近似，冲突边界可以用分段直线来近似。该方法在仿真中进行了测试，并与两种概率流方法以及最近的瞬时冲突概率方法进行了比较。结果表明计算时间显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种准确且高效的概率冲突预测方法，用于自动驾驶车辆的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有冲突预测方法在保证准确性的同时难以满足在线路径规划的计算效率需求，尤其在处理大量候选轨迹时效率不足。
AI.method: 通过将冲突预测问题转化为首次穿越时间分布，并利用降维变换和高斯过程的解析推导，实现计算加速。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法相比现有概率流方法和瞬时冲突概率方法，计算时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持预测准确性的同时大幅提升了计算效率，适用于均值可拟合为线段且冲突边界可分段直线近似的二维随机过程场景。

authors_text: Lingjie Kong,Pankaj Rajak,Siamak Shakeri
title: Generative Models for 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 3D 点云的生成模型
abstract: Point clouds are rich geometric data structures, where their three dimensional structure offers an excellent domain for understanding the representation learning and generative modeling in 3D space. In this work, we aim to improve the performance of point cloud latent-space generative models by experimenting with transformer encoders, latent-space flow models, and autoregressive decoders. We analyze and compare both generation and reconstruction performance of these models on various object types.
summary: Point clouds are rich geometric data structures, where their three dimensional structure offers an excellent domain for understanding the representation learning and generative modeling in 3D space. In this work, we aim to improve the performance of point cloud latent-space generative models by experimenting with transformer encoders, latent-space flow models, and autoregressive decoders. We analyze and compare both generation and reconstruction performance of these models on various object types.
abstract_zh: 点云是丰富的几何数据结构，其三维结构为理解 3D 空间中的表示学习和生成建模提供了一个极好的领域。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过试验变压器编码器、潜在空间流模型和自回归解码器来提高点云潜在空间生成模型的性能。我们分析并比较这些模型在各种对象类型上的生成和重建性能。

AI.tldr: 改进3D点云生成模型的性能
AI.motivation: 点云作为三维几何数据，为研究三维空间的表示学习和生成建模提供了良好领域，但现有模型在生成和重建性能上有待提升
AI.method: 采用Transformer编码器、潜在空间流模型和自回归解码器，分析比较不同模型在多种物体类型的生成与重建表现
AI.result: 实验结果表明不同模型在生成和重建任务中表现各异，为后续研究提供了对比基准
AI.conclusion: 需结合多种模型优势以提升3D点云生成效果，未来可探索更优架构与训练策略
