authors_text: Anton Kovalyov,Kashyap Patel,Issa Panahi
title: DFSNet: A Steerable Neural Beamformer Invariant to Microphone Array Configuration for Real-Time, Low-Latency Speech Enhancement
title_zh: DFSNet：一种不受麦克风阵列配置影响的可操纵神经波束形成器，可实现实时、低延迟语音增强
abstract: Invariance to microphone array configuration is a rare attribute in neural beamformers. Filter-and-sum (FS) methods in this class define the target signal with respect to a reference channel. However, this not only complicates formulation in reverberant conditions but also the network, which must have a mechanism to infer what the reference channel is. To address these issues, this study presents Delay Filter-and-Sum Network (DFSNet), a steerable neural beamformer invariant to microphone number and array geometry for causal speech enhancement. In DFSNet, acquired signals are first steered toward the speech source direction prior to the FS operation, which simplifies the task into the estimation of delay-and-summed reverberant clean speech. The proposed model is designed to incur low latency, distortion, and memory and computational burden, giving rise to high potential in hearing aid applications. Simulation results reveal comparable performance to noncausal state-of-the-art.
summary: Invariance to microphone array configuration is a rare attribute in neural beamformers. Filter-and-sum (FS) methods in this class define the target signal with respect to a reference channel. However, this not only complicates formulation in reverberant conditions but also the network, which must have a mechanism to infer what the reference channel is. To address these issues, this study presents Delay Filter-and-Sum Network (DFSNet), a steerable neural beamformer invariant to microphone number and array geometry for causal speech enhancement. In DFSNet, acquired signals are first steered toward the speech source direction prior to the FS operation, which simplifies the task into the estimation of delay-and-summed reverberant clean speech. The proposed model is designed to incur low latency, distortion, and memory and computational burden, giving rise to high potential in hearing aid applications. Simulation results reveal comparable performance to noncausal state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 麦克风阵列配置的不变性是神经波束形成器中的一个罕见属性。此类中的滤波求和 (FS) 方法定义相对于参考通道的目标信号。然而，这不仅使混响条件下的公式变得复杂，而且使网络变得复杂，网络必须有一种机制来推断参考通道是什么。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了延迟滤波求和网络 (DFSNet)，这是一种可操纵的神经波束形成器，对麦克风数量和阵列几何形状不变量，用于因果语音增强。在 DFSNet 中，在 FS 操作之前，首先将获取的信号引导至语音源方向，这将任务简化为延迟和求和混响干净语音的估计。所提出的模型旨在降低延迟、失真、内存和计算负担，从而在助听器应用中发挥巨大潜力。仿真结果显示了与非因果最先进技术相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DFSNet，一种对麦克风阵列配置不变的可导向神经波束成形器，用于实时低延迟语音增强。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波求和方法依赖参考通道定义目标信号，在混响环境下复杂且需额外机制确定参考通道，限制了应用灵活性。
AI.method: 通过先将信号导向语音源方向再执行滤波求和操作，将任务简化为估计延迟求和的混响干净语音，设计低延迟低计算负担的模型架构。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明其性能与非因果最先进方法相当，且具备实时性优势。
AI.conclusion: DFSNet实现了对麦克风数量和阵列几何不变的低延迟语音增强，具有助听器等实时应用的潜力。

However, this not only complicates formulation in reverberant conditions but also the network, which must have a mechanism to infer what the reference channel is. To address these issues, this study presents Delay Filter-and-Sum Network (DFSNet), a steerable neural beamformer invariant to microphone number and array geometry for causal speech enhancement. In DFSNet, acquired signals are first steered toward the speech source direction prior to the FS operation, which simplifies the task into the estimation of delay-and-summed reverberant clean speech. The proposed model is designed to incur low latency, distortion, and memory and computational burden, giving rise to high potential in hearing aid applications. Simulation results reveal comparable performance to noncausal state-of-the-art. 麦克风阵列配置的不变性是神经波束形成器中的一个罕见属性。此类中的滤波求和 (FS) 方法定义相对于参考通道的目标信号。然而，这不仅使混响条件下的公式变得复杂，而且使网络变得复杂，网络必须有一种机制来推断参考通道是什么。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了延迟滤波求和网络 (DFSNet)，这是一种可操纵的神经波束形成器，对麦克风数量和阵列几何形状不变量，用于因果语音增强。在 DFSNet 中，在 FS 操作之前，首先将获取的信号引导至语音源方向，这将任务简化为延迟和求和混响干净语音的估计。所提出的模型旨在降低延迟、失真、内存和计算负担，从而在助听器应用中发挥巨大潜力。仿真结果显示了与非因果最先进技术相当的性能。 本文提出DFSNet，一种对麦克风阵列配置不变的可导向神经波束成形器，用于实时低延迟语音增强。 Anton Kovalyov,Kashyap Patel,Issa Panahi eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jiali Cheng,George Dasoulas,Huan He,Chirag Agarwal,Marinka Zitnik
title: GNNDelete: A General Strategy for Unlearning in Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: GNNDelete：图神经网络中遗忘的通用策略
abstract: Graph unlearning, which involves deleting graph elements such as nodes, node labels, and relationships from a trained graph neural network (GNN) model, is crucial for real-world applications where data elements may become irrelevant, inaccurate, or privacy-sensitive. However, existing methods for graph unlearning either deteriorate model weights shared across all nodes or fail to effectively delete edges due to their strong dependence on local graph neighborhoods. To address these limitations, we introduce GNNDelete, a novel model-agnostic layer-wise operator that optimizes two critical properties, namely, Deleted Edge Consistency and Neighborhood Influence, for graph unlearning. Deleted Edge Consistency ensures that the influence of deleted elements is removed from both model weights and neighboring representations, while Neighborhood Influence guarantees that the remaining model knowledge is preserved after deletion. GNNDelete updates representations to delete nodes and edges from the model while retaining the rest of the learned knowledge. We conduct experiments on seven real-world graphs, showing that GNNDelete outperforms existing approaches by up to 38.8% (AUC) on edge, node, and node feature deletion tasks, and 32.2% on distinguishing deleted edges from non-deleted ones. Additionally, GNNDelete is efficient, taking 12.3x less time and 9.3x less space than retraining GNN from scratch on WordNet18.
summary: Graph unlearning, which involves deleting graph elements such as nodes, node labels, and relationships from a trained graph neural network (GNN) model, is crucial for real-world applications where data elements may become irrelevant, inaccurate, or privacy-sensitive. However, existing methods for graph unlearning either deteriorate model weights shared across all nodes or fail to effectively delete edges due to their strong dependence on local graph neighborhoods. To address these limitations, we introduce GNNDelete, a novel model-agnostic layer-wise operator that optimizes two critical properties, namely, Deleted Edge Consistency and Neighborhood Influence, for graph unlearning. Deleted Edge Consistency ensures that the influence of deleted elements is removed from both model weights and neighboring representations, while Neighborhood Influence guarantees that the remaining model knowledge is preserved after deletion. GNNDelete updates representations to delete nodes and edges from the model while retaining the rest of the learned knowledge. We conduct experiments on seven real-world graphs, showing that GNNDelete outperforms existing approaches by up to 38.8% (AUC) on edge, node, and node feature deletion tasks, and 32.2% on distinguishing deleted edges from non-deleted ones. Additionally, GNNDelete is efficient, taking 12.3x less time and 9.3x less space than retraining GNN from scratch on WordNet18.
abstract_zh: 图解学习涉及从经过训练的图神经网络 (GNN) 模型中删除节点、节点标签和关系等图元素，这对于数据元素可能变得不相关、不准确或隐私敏感的实际应用至关重要。然而，现有的图去学习方法要么会恶化所有节点共享的模型权重，要么由于对局部图邻域的强烈依赖而无法有效删除边。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 GNNDelete，这是一种新颖的与模型无关的分层算子，它优化了图取消学习的两个关键属性，即删除边一致性和邻域影响。删除边一致性确保删除元素的影响从模型权重和相邻表示中消除，而邻域影响保证删除后保留剩余的模型知识。 GNNDelete 更新表示以从模型中删除节点和边，同时保留其余学到的知识。我们对七个真实世界的图进行了实验，结果表明，GNNDelete 在边、节点和节点特征删除任务上比现有方法高出 38.8% (AUC)，在区分已删除边和未删除边方面比现有方法高出 32.2%。此外，GNNDelete 非常高效，与在 WordNet18 上从头开始重新训练 GNN 相比，节省了 12.3 倍的时间和 9.3 倍的空间。

AI.tldr: 提出GNNDelete方法，解决图神经网络中的图遗忘问题，有效删除节点、边及特征，同时保留其他知识。
AI.motivation: 现有图遗忘方法存在模型权重退化或无法有效删除边的问题，需兼顾删除效果与知识保留。
AI.method: 设计模型无关的分层操作符，通过优化删除边一致性与邻域影响，实现节点/边删除与知识保留。
AI.result: 在7个真实图数据集上，AUC指标优于现有方法38.8%，区分删除边准确率提升32.2%，效率达重训练的1/12.3。
AI.conclusion: GNNDelete有效解决图遗忘难题，在删除效果与计算效率间取得平衡，具备实际应用价值。

authors_text: Shenli Yuan,Lingjie Kong,Jiushuang Guo
title: From Audio to Symbolic Encoding
title_zh: 从音频到符号编码
abstract: Automatic music transcription (AMT) aims to convert raw audio to symbolic music representation. As a fundamental problem of music information retrieval (MIR), AMT is considered a difficult task even for trained human experts due to overlap of multiple harmonics in the acoustic signal. On the other hand, speech recognition, as one of the most popular tasks in natural language processing, aims to translate human spoken language to texts. Based on the similar nature of AMT and speech recognition (as they both deal with tasks of translating audio signal to symbolic encoding), this paper investigated whether a generic neural network architecture could possibly work on both tasks. In this paper, we introduced our new neural network architecture built on top of the current state-of-the-art Onsets and Frames, and compared the performances of its multiple variations on AMT task. We also tested our architecture with the task of speech recognition. For AMT, our models were able to produce better results compared to the model trained using the state-of-art architecture; however, although similar architecture was able to be trained on the speech recognition task, it did not generate very ideal result compared to other task-specific models.
summary: Automatic music transcription (AMT) aims to convert raw audio to symbolic music representation. As a fundamental problem of music information retrieval (MIR), AMT is considered a difficult task even for trained human experts due to overlap of multiple harmonics in the acoustic signal. On the other hand, speech recognition, as one of the most popular tasks in natural language processing, aims to translate human spoken language to texts. Based on the similar nature of AMT and speech recognition (as they both deal with tasks of translating audio signal to symbolic encoding), this paper investigated whether a generic neural network architecture could possibly work on both tasks. In this paper, we introduced our new neural network architecture built on top of the current state-of-the-art Onsets and Frames, and compared the performances of its multiple variations on AMT task. We also tested our architecture with the task of speech recognition. For AMT, our models were able to produce better results compared to the model trained using the state-of-art architecture; however, although similar architecture was able to be trained on the speech recognition task, it did not generate very ideal result compared to other task-specific models.
abstract_zh: 自动音乐转录（AMT）旨在将原始音频转换为符号音乐表示。作为音乐信息检索（MIR）的一个基本问题，由于声学信号中多个谐波的重叠，即使对于训练有素的人类专家来说，AMT 也被认为是一项艰巨的任务。另一方面，语音识别作为自然语言处理中最流行的任务之一，旨在将人类口语翻译为文本。基于 AMT 和语音识别的相似性质（因为它们都处理将音频信号转换为符号编码的任务），本文研究了通用神经网络架构是否可以同时处理这两个任务。在本文中，我们介绍了建立在当前最先进的 Onsets 和 Frames 之上的新神经网络架构，并比较了其在 AMT 任务上的多种变体的性能。我们还通过语音识别任务测试了我们的架构。对于 AMT，与使用最先进架构训练的模型相比，我们的模型能够产生更好的结果；然而，尽管类似的架构能够在语音识别任务上进行训练，但与其他特定任务模型相比，它并没有产生非常理想的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了是否可以使用通用神经网络架构同时处理音频到符号编码的音乐转录和语音识别任务。
AI.motivation: 音乐转录和语音识别均需将音频信号转化为符号表示，但音乐转录因和声叠加更复杂，而语音识别已有成熟模型，因此研究通用架构的可行性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于最新Onsets and Frames架构改进设计神经网络，通过多变体对比实验验证其在音乐转录任务中的效果，并测试该架构在语音识别任务中的表现。
AI.result: 改进模型在音乐转录任务中优于现有方法，但应用于语音识别时效果显著低于专用模型。
AI.conclusion: 通用神经网络架构在音乐转录中有效，但语音识别任务的性能不足表明不同任务间存在显著差异，需任务特定优化。

authors_text: Lingjie Kong,Yun Liao
title: Path Integral Based Convolution and Pooling for Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 异构图神经网络基于路径积分的卷积和池化
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNN) extends deep learning to graph-structure dataset. Similar to Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) using on image prediction, convolutional and pooling layers are the foundation to success for GNN on graph prediction tasks. In the initial PAN paper, it uses a path integral based graph neural networks for graph prediction. Specifically, it uses a convolution operation that involves every path linking the message sender and receiver with learnable weights depending on the path length, which corresponds to the maximal entropy random walk. It further generalizes such convolution operation to a new transition matrix called maximal entropy transition (MET). Because the diagonal entries of the MET matrix is directly related to the subgraph centrality, it provide a trial mechanism for pooling based on centrality score. While the initial PAN paper only considers node features. We further extends its capability to handle complex heterogeneous graph including both node and edge features.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNN) extends deep learning to graph-structure dataset. Similar to Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) using on image prediction, convolutional and pooling layers are the foundation to success for GNN on graph prediction tasks. In the initial PAN paper, it uses a path integral based graph neural networks for graph prediction. Specifically, it uses a convolution operation that involves every path linking the message sender and receiver with learnable weights depending on the path length, which corresponds to the maximal entropy random walk. It further generalizes such convolution operation to a new transition matrix called maximal entropy transition (MET). Because the diagonal entries of the MET matrix is directly related to the subgraph centrality, it provide a trial mechanism for pooling based on centrality score. While the initial PAN paper only considers node features. We further extends its capability to handle complex heterogeneous graph including both node and edge features.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）将深度学习扩展到图结构数据集。与用于图像预测的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 类似，卷积层和池化层是 GNN 在图预测任务上取得成功的基础。在最初的 PAN 论文中，它使用基于路径积分的图神经网络进行图预测。具体来说，它使用卷积运算，涉及连接消息发送者和接收者的每条路径，并根据路径长度提供可学习的权重，这对应于最大熵随机游走。它将这种卷积运算进一步推广到称为最大熵转移（MET）的新转移矩阵。由于MET矩阵的对角线条目与子图中心性直接相关，因此它提供了一种基于中心性得分的池化试验机制。而最初的 PAN 论文只考虑了节点特征。我们进一步扩展了其处理复杂异构图的能力，包括节点和边缘特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径积分的卷积和池化方法，用于处理异质图神经网络中的节点和边特征。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络（GNN）方法主要关注节点特征，难以有效处理包含节点和边特征的复杂异质图结构。
AI.method: 通过路径积分构建卷积操作，利用最大熵随机游走生成可学习的路径权重，并扩展为最大熵转移矩阵（MET），结合子图中心性实现基于中心性评分的池化机制。
AI.result: 成功将初始PAN方法扩展至异质图场景，支持同时处理节点和边特征的图预测任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为异质图神经网络提供了新的卷积与池化框架，增强了模型对复杂图结构的表达能力。

search_text: Path Integral Based Convolution and Pooling for Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks 异构图神经网络基于路径积分的卷积和池化 Graph neural networks (GNN) extends deep learning to graph-structure dataset. Similar to Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) using on image prediction, convolutional and pooling layers are the foundation to success for GNN on graph prediction tasks. In the initial PAN paper, it uses a path integral based graph neural networks for graph prediction. Specifically, it uses a convolution operation that involves every path linking the message sender and receiver with learnable weights depending on the path length, which corresponds to the maximal entropy random walk. It further generalizes such convolution operation to a new transition matrix called maximal entropy transition (MET). Because the diagonal entries of the MET matrix is directly related to the subgraph centrality, it provide a trial mechanism for pooling based on centrality score. While the initial PAN paper only considers node features. We further extends its capability to handle complex heterogeneous graph including both node and edge features. 图神经网络（GNN）将深度学习扩展到图结构数据集。与用于图像预测的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 类似，卷积层和池化层是 GNN 在图预测任务上取得成功的基础。在最初的 PAN 论文中，它使用基于路径积分的图神经网络进行图预测。具体来说，它使用卷积运算，涉及连接消息发送者和接收者的每条路径，并根据路径长度提供可学习的权重，这对应于最大熵随机游走。它将这种卷积运算进一步推广到称为最大熵转移（MET）的新转移矩阵。由于MET矩阵的对角线条目与子图中心性直接相关，因此它提供了一种基于中心性得分的池化试验机制。而最初的 PAN 论文只考虑了节点特征。我们进一步扩展了其处理复杂异构图的能力，包括节点和边缘特征。 本文提出了一种基于路径积分的卷积和池化方法，用于处理异质图神经网络中的节点和边特征。 Lingjie Kong,Yun Liao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Maryam Jameela,Gunho Sohn
title: NSANet: Noise Seeking Attention Network
title_zh: NSANet：噪声寻求注意力网络
abstract: LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) technology has remained popular in capturing natural and built environments for numerous applications. The recent technological advancements in electro-optical engineering have aided in obtaining laser returns at a higher pulse repetition frequency (PRF), which considerably increased the density of the 3D point cloud. Conventional techniques with lower PRF had a single pulse-in-air (SPIA) zone, large enough to avoid a mismatch among pulse pairs at the receiver. New multiple pulses-in-air (MPIA) technology guarantees various windows of operational ranges for a single flight line and no blind zones. The disadvantage of the technology is the projection of atmospheric returns closer to the same pulse-in-air zone of adjacent terrain points likely to intersect with objects of interest. These noise properties compromise the perceived quality of the scene and encourage the development of new noise-filtering neural networks, as existing filters are significantly ineffective. We propose a novel dual-attention noise-filtering neural network called Noise Seeking Attention Network (NSANet) that uses physical priors and local spatial attention to filter noise. Our research is motivated by two psychology theories of feature integration and attention engagement to prove the role of attention in computer vision at the encoding and decoding phase. The presented results of NSANet show the inclination towards attention engagement theory and a performance boost compared to the state-of-the-art noise-filtering deep convolutional neural networks.
summary: LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) technology has remained popular in capturing natural and built environments for numerous applications. The recent technological advancements in electro-optical engineering have aided in obtaining laser returns at a higher pulse repetition frequency (PRF), which considerably increased the density of the 3D point cloud. Conventional techniques with lower PRF had a single pulse-in-air (SPIA) zone, large enough to avoid a mismatch among pulse pairs at the receiver. New multiple pulses-in-air (MPIA) technology guarantees various windows of operational ranges for a single flight line and no blind zones. The disadvantage of the technology is the projection of atmospheric returns closer to the same pulse-in-air zone of adjacent terrain points likely to intersect with objects of interest. These noise properties compromise the perceived quality of the scene and encourage the development of new noise-filtering neural networks, as existing filters are significantly ineffective. We propose a novel dual-attention noise-filtering neural network called Noise Seeking Attention Network (NSANet) that uses physical priors and local spatial attention to filter noise. Our research is motivated by two psychology theories of feature integration and attention engagement to prove the role of attention in computer vision at the encoding and decoding phase. The presented results of NSANet show the inclination towards attention engagement theory and a performance boost compared to the state-of-the-art noise-filtering deep convolutional neural networks.
abstract_zh: LiDAR（光探测和测距）技术在捕捉自然和建筑环境的众多应用中仍然很受欢迎。光电工程领域的最新技术进步有助于以更高的脉冲重复频率 (PRF) 获得激光返回，从而大大增加了 3D 点云的密度。具有较低 PRF 的传统技术具有单个空气中脉冲 (SPIA) 区域，该区域足够大，可以避免接收器处脉冲对之间的不匹配。新的多重空气脉冲 (MPIA) 技术可保证单条航线的各种操作范围窗口且无盲区。该技术的缺点是大气回波的投影更接近可能与感兴趣物体相交的相邻地形点的同一空气脉冲区域。这些噪声特性会损害场景的感知质量，并鼓励开发新的噪声过滤神经网络，因为现有的过滤器效率很低。我们提出了一种新颖的双注意力噪声过滤神经网络，称为噪声寻求注意力网络（NSANet），它使用物理先验和局部空间注意力来过滤噪声。我们的研究受到特征整合和注意力参与两种心理学理论的推动，以证明注意力在计算机视觉编码和解码阶段的作用。 NSANet 提出的结果显示了对注意力参与理论的倾向，并且与最先进的噪声过滤深度卷积神经网络相比，性能有所提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NSANet的双注意力噪声过滤神经网络，用于解决高密度LiDAR点云中因新型MPIA技术导致的噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 新型多脉冲-in-air（MPIA）技术虽消除了盲区，但导致大气返回信号与目标物体在脉冲区重叠，现有滤波方法效果不佳，需结合注意力机制提升过滤效果。
AI.method: 基于特征整合与注意力参与的心理学理论，设计融合物理先验知识和局部空间注意力的双注意力网络，通过编码和解码阶段的注意力机制增强噪声抑制能力。
AI.result: NSANet在噪声过滤任务中表现出对注意力参与理论的倾向性，性能优于现有最先进的深度卷积神经网络。
AI.conclusion: NSANet验证了注意力机制在计算机视觉中编码解码阶段的有效性，为LiDAR点云噪声过滤提供了新思路，展示了心理学理论与深度学习结合的潜力。

authors_text: Chihcheng Hsieh,Isabel Blanco Nobre,Sandra Costa Sousa,Chun Ouyang,Margot Brereton,Jacinto C. Nascimento,Joaquim Jorge,Catarina Moreira
title: MDF-Net for abnormality detection by fusing X-rays with clinical data
title_zh: MDF-Net 通过融合 X 射线与临床数据进行异常检测
abstract: This study investigates the effects of including patients' clinical information on the performance of deep learning (DL) classifiers for disease location in chest X-ray images. Although current classifiers achieve high performance using chest X-ray images alone, our interviews with radiologists indicate that clinical data is highly informative and essential for interpreting images and making proper diagnoses. In this work, we propose a novel architecture consisting of two fusion methods that enable the model to simultaneously process patients' clinical data (structured data) and chest X-rays (image data). Since these data modalities are in different dimensional spaces, we propose a spatial arrangement strategy, spatialization, to facilitate the multimodal learning process in a Mask R-CNN model. We performed an extensive experimental evaluation using MIMIC-Eye, a dataset comprising modalities: MIMIC-CXR (chest X-ray images), MIMIC IV-ED (patients' clinical data), and REFLACX (annotations of disease locations in chest X-rays). Results show that incorporating patients' clinical data in a DL model together with the proposed fusion methods improves the disease localization in chest X-rays by 12\% in terms of Average Precision compared to a standard Mask R-CNN using only chest X-rays. Further ablation studies also emphasize the importance of multimodal DL architectures and the incorporation of patients' clinical data in disease localization. The architecture proposed in this work is publicly available to promote the scientific reproducibility of our study (https://github.com/ChihchengHsieh/multimodal-abnormalities-detection)
summary: This study investigates the effects of including patients' clinical information on the performance of deep learning (DL) classifiers for disease location in chest X-ray images. Although current classifiers achieve high performance using chest X-ray images alone, our interviews with radiologists indicate that clinical data is highly informative and essential for interpreting images and making proper diagnoses. In this work, we propose a novel architecture consisting of two fusion methods that enable the model to simultaneously process patients' clinical data (structured data) and chest X-rays (image data). Since these data modalities are in different dimensional spaces, we propose a spatial arrangement strategy, spatialization, to facilitate the multimodal learning process in a Mask R-CNN model. We performed an extensive experimental evaluation using MIMIC-Eye, a dataset comprising modalities: MIMIC-CXR (chest X-ray images), MIMIC IV-ED (patients' clinical data), and REFLACX (annotations of disease locations in chest X-rays). Results show that incorporating patients' clinical data in a DL model together with the proposed fusion methods improves the disease localization in chest X-rays by 12\% in terms of Average Precision compared to a standard Mask R-CNN using only chest X-rays. Further ablation studies also emphasize the importance of multimodal DL architectures and the incorporation of patients' clinical data in disease localization. The architecture proposed in this work is publicly available to promote the scientific reproducibility of our study (https://github.com/ChihchengHsieh/multimodal-abnormalities-detection)
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了纳入患者临床信息对深度学习 (DL) 分类器在胸部 X 射线图像中疾病定位的性能的影响。尽管当前的分类器仅使用胸部 X 射线图像即可实现高性能，但我们对放射科医生的采访表明，临床数据信息丰富，对于解释图像和做出正确的诊断至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种由两种融合方法组成的新颖架构，使模型能够同时处理患者的临床数据（结构化数据）和胸部 X 射线（图像数据）。由于这些数据模态位于不同的维度空间中，我们提出了一种空间排列策略，即空间化，以促进 Mask R-CNN 模型中的多模态学习过程。我们使用 MIMIC-Eye 进行了广泛的实验评估，该数据集包含以下模式：MIMIC-CXR（胸部 X 射线图像）、MIMIC IV-ED（患者临床数据）和 REFLACX（胸部 X 射线疾病位置注释）。结果表明，与仅使用胸部 X 射线的标准 Mask R-CNN 相比，将患者的临床数据与所提出的融合方法结合到 DL 模型中，可以将胸部 X 射线的疾病定位提高 12%。进一步的消融研究还强调了多模式 DL 架构以及将患者临床数据纳入疾病定位的重要性。这项工作中提出的架构是公开的，以促进我们研究的科学可重复性（https://github.com/Chih ChengHsieh/multimodal-abnormalities-detection）

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDF-Net架构，通过融合胸部X光图像与患者临床数据，提升胸部疾病定位检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型仅依赖X光图像进行疾病定位，但临床数据对放射科医生诊断具有重要参考价值，需探索多模态数据融合的潜力。
AI.method: 设计包含两种融合方法的新型网络架构，提出空间化策略处理异构数据模态，并集成至Mask R-CNN框架实现多模态联合学习。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-Eye数据集上，融合临床数据后模型平均精度提升12%，消融实验证实多模态架构有效性。
AI.conclusion: 临床数据与影像数据的融合显著提升疾病定位能力，验证了多模态深度学习在医学影像分析中的应用价值。

search_text: MDF-Net for abnormality detection by fusing X-rays with clinical data MDF-Net 通过融合 X 射线与临床数据进行异常检测 This study investigates the effects of including patients' clinical information on the performance of deep learning (DL) classifiers for disease location in chest X-ray images. Although current classifiers achieve high performance using chest X-ray images alone, our interviews with radiologists indicate that clinical data is highly informative and essential for interpreting images and making proper diagnoses. In this work, we propose a novel architecture consisting of two fusion methods that enable the model to simultaneously process patients' clinical data (structured data) and chest X-rays (image data). Since these data modalities are in different dimensional spaces, we propose a spatial arrangement strategy, spatialization, to facilitate the multimodal learning process in a Mask R-CNN model. We performed an extensive experimental evaluation using MIMIC-Eye, a dataset comprising modalities: MIMIC-CXR (chest X-ray images), MIMIC IV-ED (patients' clinical data), and REFLACX (annotations of disease locations in chest X-rays). Results show that incorporating patients' clinical data in a DL model together with the proposed fusion methods improves the disease localization in chest X-rays by 12\% in terms of Average Precision compared to a standard Mask R-CNN using only chest X-rays. Further ablation studies also emphasize the importance of multimodal DL architectures and the incorporation of patients' clinical data in disease localization. The architecture proposed in this work is publicly available to promote the scientific reproducibility of our study (https://github.com/ChihchengHsieh/multimodal-abnormalities-detection) 本研究调查了纳入患者临床信息对深度学习 (DL) 分类器在胸部 X 射线图像中疾病定位的性能的影响。尽管当前的分类器仅使用胸部 X 射线图像即可实现高性能，但我们对放射科医生的采访表明，临床数据信息丰富，对于解释图像和做出正确的诊断至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种由两种融合方法组成的新颖架构，使模型能够同时处理患者的临床数据（结构化数据）和胸部 X 射线（图像数据）。由于这些数据模态位于不同的维度空间中，我们提出了一种空间排列策略，即空间化，以促进 Mask R-CNN 模型中的多模态学习过程。我们使用 MIMIC-Eye 进行了广泛的实验评估，该数据集包含以下模式：MIMIC-CXR（胸部 X 射线图像）、MIMIC IV-ED（患者临床数据）和 REFLACX（胸部 X 射线疾病位置注释）。结果表明，与仅使用胸部 X 射线的标准 Mask R-CNN 相比，将患者的临床数据与所提出的融合方法结合到 DL 模型中，可以将胸部 X 射线的疾病定位提高 12%。进一步的消融研究还强调了多模式 DL 架构以及将患者临床数据纳入疾病定位的重要性。这项工作中提出的架构是公开的，以促进我们研究的科学可重复性（https://github.com/Chih ChengHsieh/multimodal-abnormalities-detection） 本文提出MDF-Net架构，通过融合胸部X光图像与患者临床数据，提升胸部疾病定位检测性能。 Chihcheng Hsieh,Isabel Blanco Nobre,Sandra Costa Sousa,Chun Ouyang,Margot Brereton,Jacinto C. authors_text: Liye Fu,Benjamin Newman,Maurice Jakesch,Sarah Kreps
title: Comparing Sentence-Level Suggestions to Message-Level Suggestions in AI-Mediated Communication
title_zh: 人工智能介导的沟通中句子级建议与消息级建议的比较
abstract: Traditionally, writing assistance systems have focused on short or even single-word suggestions. Recently, large language models like GPT-3 have made it possible to generate significantly longer natural-sounding suggestions, offering more advanced assistance opportunities. This study explores the trade-offs between sentence- vs. message-level suggestions for AI-mediated communication. We recruited 120 participants to act as staffers from legislators' offices who often need to respond to large volumes of constituent concerns. Participants were asked to reply to emails with different types of assistance. The results show that participants receiving message-level suggestions responded faster and were more satisfied with the experience, as they mainly edited the suggested drafts. In addition, the texts they wrote were evaluated as more helpful by others. In comparison, participants receiving sentence-level assistance retained a higher sense of agency, but took longer for the task as they needed to plan the flow of their responses and decide when to use suggestions. Our findings have implications for designing task-appropriate communication assistance systems.
summary: Traditionally, writing assistance systems have focused on short or even single-word suggestions. Recently, large language models like GPT-3 have made it possible to generate significantly longer natural-sounding suggestions, offering more advanced assistance opportunities. This study explores the trade-offs between sentence- vs. message-level suggestions for AI-mediated communication. We recruited 120 participants to act as staffers from legislators' offices who often need to respond to large volumes of constituent concerns. Participants were asked to reply to emails with different types of assistance. The results show that participants receiving message-level suggestions responded faster and were more satisfied with the experience, as they mainly edited the suggested drafts. In addition, the texts they wrote were evaluated as more helpful by others. In comparison, participants receiving sentence-level assistance retained a higher sense of agency, but took longer for the task as they needed to plan the flow of their responses and decide when to use suggestions. Our findings have implications for designing task-appropriate communication assistance systems.
abstract_zh: 传统上，写作辅助系统侧重于简短甚至单个单词的建议。最近，像 GPT-3 这样的大型语言模型已经可以生成更长、听起来更自然的建议，从而提供更高级的帮助机会。本研究探讨了人工智能介导的沟通中句子级建议与消息级建议之间的权衡。我们招募了 120 名参与者作为立法机关的工作人员，他们经常需要回应大量选民的关切。参与者被要求回复电子邮件并提供不同类型的帮助。结果表明，收到消息级建议的参与者响应速度更快，对体验更满意，因为他们主要编辑建议的草稿。此外，其他人认为他们写的文章更有帮助。相比之下，接受句子级帮助的参与者保留了更高的代理意识，但完成任务的时间更长，因为他们需要规划他们的反应流程并决定何时使用建议。我们的研究结果对于设计适合任务的通信辅助系统具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了AI中介通信中句子级建议与消息级建议的效果差异。
AI.motivation: 传统写作辅助系统侧重短文本建议，而大型语言模型可生成更长建议。研究旨在探索不同层级建议在任务效率与用户控制感间的权衡。
AI.method: 招募120名参与者模拟立法办公室工作人员，要求其在不同建议类型辅助下回复邮件，通过对比响应速度、满意度及文本质量评估效果。
AI.result: 消息级建议组响应更快且满意度更高，文本被评价为更实用；句子级建议组保留更高自主性但耗时更长。
AI.conclusion: 设计通信辅助系统需根据任务需求权衡建议层级：消息级提升效率，句子级增强控制感。

authors_text: Milad Shafiee,Guillaume Bellegarda,Auke Ijspeert
title: Puppeteer and Marionette: Learning Anticipatory Quadrupedal Locomotion Based on Interactions of a Central Pattern Generator and Supraspinal Drive
title_zh: 木偶师和木偶：基于中枢模式发生器和椎上驱动器的相互作用学习预期四足运动
comment: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Quadruped animal locomotion emerges from the interactions between the spinal central pattern generator (CPG), sensory feedback, and supraspinal drive signals from the brain. Computational models of CPGs have been widely used for investigating the spinal cord contribution to animal locomotion control in computational neuroscience and in bio-inspired robotics. However, the contribution of supraspinal drive to anticipatory behavior, i.e. motor behavior that involves planning ahead of time (e.g. of footstep placements), is not yet properly understood. In particular, it is not clear whether the brain modulates CPG activity and/or directly modulates muscle activity (hence bypassing the CPG) for accurate foot placements. In this paper, we investigate the interaction of supraspinal drive and a CPG in an anticipatory locomotion scenario that involves stepping over gaps. By employing deep reinforcement learning (DRL), we train a neural network policy that replicates the supraspinal drive behavior. This policy can either modulate the CPG dynamics, or directly change actuation signals to bypass the CPG dynamics. Our results indicate that the direct supraspinal contribution to the actuation signal is a key component for a high gap crossing success rate. However, the CPG dynamics in the spinal cord are beneficial for gait smoothness and energy efficiency. Moreover, our investigation shows that sensing the front feet distances to the gap is the most important and sufficient sensory information for learning gap crossing. Our results support the biological hypothesis that cats and horses mainly control the front legs for obstacle avoidance, and that hind limbs follow an internal memory based on the front limbs' information. Our method enables the quadruped robot to cross gaps of up to 20 cm (50% of body-length) without any explicit dynamics modeling or Model Predictive Control (MPC).
summary: Quadruped animal locomotion emerges from the interactions between the spinal central pattern generator (CPG), sensory feedback, and supraspinal drive signals from the brain. Computational models of CPGs have been widely used for investigating the spinal cord contribution to animal locomotion control in computational neuroscience and in bio-inspired robotics. However, the contribution of supraspinal drive to anticipatory behavior, i.e. motor behavior that involves planning ahead of time (e.g. of footstep placements), is not yet properly understood. In particular, it is not clear whether the brain modulates CPG activity and/or directly modulates muscle activity (hence bypassing the CPG) for accurate foot placements. In this paper, we investigate the interaction of supraspinal drive and a CPG in an anticipatory locomotion scenario that involves stepping over gaps. By employing deep reinforcement learning (DRL), we train a neural network policy that replicates the supraspinal drive behavior. This policy can either modulate the CPG dynamics, or directly change actuation signals to bypass the CPG dynamics. Our results indicate that the direct supraspinal contribution to the actuation signal is a key component for a high gap crossing success rate. However, the CPG dynamics in the spinal cord are beneficial for gait smoothness and energy efficiency. Moreover, our investigation shows that sensing the front feet distances to the gap is the most important and sufficient sensory information for learning gap crossing. Our results support the biological hypothesis that cats and horses mainly control the front legs for obstacle avoidance, and that hind limbs follow an internal memory based on the front limbs' information. Our method enables the quadruped robot to cross gaps of up to 20 cm (50% of body-length) without any explicit dynamics modeling or Model Predictive Control (MPC).
abstract_zh: 四足动物的运动是由脊髓中枢模式发生器（CPG）、感觉反馈和来自大脑的脊髓上驱动信号之间的相互作用产生的。 CPG 的计算模型已广泛用于研究计算神经科学和仿生机器人技术中脊髓对动物运动控制的贡献。然而，脊髓上驱动对预期行为（即涉及提前计划的运动行为（例如脚步位置）的贡献）尚未得到正确理解。特别是，尚不清楚大脑是否调节 CPG 活动和/或直接调节肌肉活动（因此绕过 CPG）以实现准确的足部放置。在本文中，我们研究了在涉及跨越间隙的预期运动场景中脊髓上驱动和 CPG 的相互作用。通过采用深度强化学习（DRL），我们训练了复制脊髓上驱动行为的神经网络策略。该策略可以调节 CPG 动态，或者直接改变驱动信号以绕过 CPG 动态。我们的结果表明，对驱动信号的直接脊髓上贡献是高间隙穿越成功率的关键组成部分。然而，脊髓中的 CPG 动力学有利于步态的平稳性和能量效率。此外，我们的调查表明，感知前脚到间隙的距离是学习间隙跨越的最重要和最充分的感觉信息。我们的结果支持了这样的生物学假设：猫和马主要控制前腿来躲避障碍物，后肢遵循基于前肢信息的内部记忆。我们的方法使四足机器人能够跨越长达 20 厘米（身体长度的 50%）的间隙，而无需任何显式动力学建模或模型预测控制 (MPC)。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了脊髓中央模式发生器（CPG）与大脑上位驱动信号在四足动物跨越障碍物时的交互作用，通过深度强化学习（DRL）训练神经网络策略以实现前瞻性步态规划。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确大脑上位驱动信号如何通过调节CPG或直接控制肌肉活动来实现前瞻性运动规划（如跨越障碍物）。需探索其在步态控制中的关键作用及生物合理性。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习训练神经网络策略，模拟上位驱动信号对CPG动态的调节或直接控制执行器信号，通过跨越障碍物任务验证两种机制的效果。
AI.result: 直接控制执行器信号显著提升跨越成功率（最大20cm间隙），CPG动态则优化步态平滑性与能耗；感知前肢与障碍物距离为关键感官信息，支持生物假说中前肢主导避障的结论。
AI.conclusion: 上位驱动直接调控执行器是实现高效避障的核心，CPG则保障运动经济性；前肢感知信息主导步态规划，后肢依赖前肢记忆，为仿生机器人控制提供新思路。

search_text: Puppeteer and Marionette: Learning Anticipatory Quadrupedal Locomotion Based on Interactions of a Central Pattern Generator and Supraspinal Drive 木偶师和木偶：基于中枢模式发生器和椎上驱动器的相互作用学习预期四足运动 Quadruped animal locomotion emerges from the interactions between the spinal central pattern generator (CPG), sensory feedback, and supraspinal drive signals from the brain. Computational models of CPGs have been widely used for investigating the spinal cord contribution to animal locomotion control in computational neuroscience and in bio-inspired robotics. However, the contribution of supraspinal drive to anticipatory behavior, i.e. motor behavior that involves planning ahead of time (e.g. of footstep placements), is not yet properly understood. In particular, it is not clear whether the brain modulates CPG activity and/or directly modulates muscle activity (hence bypassing the CPG) for accurate foot placements. In this paper, we investigate the interaction of supraspinal drive and a CPG in an anticipatory locomotion scenario that involves stepping over gaps. By employing deep reinforcement learning (DRL), we train a neural network policy that replicates the supraspinal drive behavior. This policy can either modulate the CPG dynamics, or directly change actuation signals to bypass the CPG dynamics. Our results indicate that the direct supraspinal contribution to the actuation signal is a key component for a high gap crossing success rate. However, the CPG dynamics in the spinal cord are beneficial for gait smoothness and energy efficiency. Moreover, our investigation shows that sensing the front feet distances to the gap is the most important and sufficient sensory information for learning gap crossing. Our results support the biological hypothesis that cats and horses mainly control the front legs for obstacle avoidance, and that hind limbs follow an internal memory based on the front limbs' information. Our method enables the quadruped robot to cross gaps of up to 20 cm (50% of body-length) without any explicit dynamics modeling or Model Predictive Control (MPC). 四足动物的运动是由脊髓中枢模式发生器（CPG）、感觉反馈和来自大脑的脊髓上驱动信号之间的相互作用产生的。 CPG 的计算模型已广泛用于研究计算神经科学和仿生机器人技术中脊髓对动物运动控制的贡献。然而，脊髓上驱动对预期行为（即涉及提前计划的运动行为（例如脚步位置）的贡献）尚未得到正确理解。特别是，尚不清楚大脑是否调节 CPG 活动和/或直接调节肌肉活动（因此绕过 CPG）以实现准确的足部放置。在本文中，我们研究了在涉及跨越间隙的预期运动场景中脊髓上驱动和 CPG 的相互作用。通过采用深度强化学习（DRL），我们训练了复制脊髓上驱动行为的神经网络策略。该策略可以调节 CPG 动态，或者直接改变驱动信号以绕过 CPG 动态。我们的结果表明，对驱动信号的直接脊髓上贡献是高间隙穿越成功率的关键组成部分。然而，脊髓中的 CPG 动力学有利于步态的平稳性和能量效率。此外，我们的调查表明，感知前脚到间隙的距离是学习间隙跨越的最重要和最充分的感觉信息。我们的结果支持了这样的生物学假设：猫和马主要控制前腿来躲避障碍物，后肢遵循基于前肢信息的内部记忆。我们的方法使四足机器人能够跨越长达 20 厘米（身体长度的 50%）的间隙，而无需任何显式动力学建模或模型预测控制 (MPC)。 本文研究了脊髓中央模式发生器（CPG）与大脑上位驱动信号在四足动物跨越障碍物时的交互作用，通过深度强化学习（DRL）训练神经网络策略以实现前瞻性步态规划。 Milad Shafiee,Guillaume Bellegarda,Auke Ijspeert cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xing Yi Liu,Homayoon Beigi
title: Efficient Ensemble for Multimodal Punctuation Restoration using Time-Delay Neural Network
title_zh: 使用时延神经网络进行多模态标点符号恢复的高效集成
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables, paper at IMCOM 2024, technical report at Recognition Technologies, Inc
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables, paper at IMCOM 2024, technical report at Recognition Technologies, Inc
abstract: Punctuation restoration plays an essential role in the post-processing procedure of automatic speech recognition, but model efficiency is a key requirement for this task. To that end, we present EfficientPunct, an ensemble method with a multimodal time-delay neural network that outperforms the current best model by 1.0 F1 points, using less than a tenth of its inference network parameters. We streamline a speech recognizer to efficiently output hidden layer acoustic embeddings for punctuation restoration, as well as BERT to extract meaningful text embeddings. By using forced alignment and temporal convolutions, we eliminate the need for attention-based fusion, greatly increasing computational efficiency and raising performance. EfficientPunct sets a new state of the art with an ensemble that weights BERT's purely language-based predictions slightly more than the multimodal network's predictions. Our code is available at https://github.com/lxy-peter/EfficientPunct.
summary: Punctuation restoration plays an essential role in the post-processing procedure of automatic speech recognition, but model efficiency is a key requirement for this task. To that end, we present EfficientPunct, an ensemble method with a multimodal time-delay neural network that outperforms the current best model by 1.0 F1 points, using less than a tenth of its inference network parameters. We streamline a speech recognizer to efficiently output hidden layer acoustic embeddings for punctuation restoration, as well as BERT to extract meaningful text embeddings. By using forced alignment and temporal convolutions, we eliminate the need for attention-based fusion, greatly increasing computational efficiency and raising performance. EfficientPunct sets a new state of the art with an ensemble that weights BERT's purely language-based predictions slightly more than the multimodal network's predictions. Our code is available at https://github.com/lxy-peter/EfficientPunct.
abstract_zh: 标点符号恢复在自动语音识别的后处理过程中起着至关重要的作用，但模型效率是该任务的关键要求。为此，我们提出了 EfficientPunct，一种具有多模态时滞神经网络的集成方法，其使用的推理网络参数不到十分之一，其性能比当前最佳模型高 1.0 个 F1 点。我们简化了语音识别器，以有效输出隐藏层声学嵌入以进行标点符号恢复，并使用 BERT 来提取有意义的文本嵌入。通过使用强制对齐和时间卷积，我们消除了基于注意力的融合的需要，大大提高了计算效率并提高了性能。 EfficientPunct 设定了一个新的技术水平，它的整体对 BERT 纯粹基于语言的预测的权重略高于多模态网络的预测。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/lxy-peter/EfficientPunct 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的多模态标点恢复方法EfficientPunct，结合时间延迟神经网络与BERT模型。
AI.motivation: 现有标点恢复模型参数量大且效率低，需在保持性能的同时提升计算效率。
AI.method: 采用时间延迟神经网络与语音识别器隐藏层嵌入结合BERT文本嵌入，通过强制对齐和时序卷积替代注意力机制实现高效融合。
AI.result: 在参数量仅为最佳模型1/10的情况下，F1分数提升1.0点，达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: EfficientPunct通过轻量化多模态集成方法，在效率与性能间取得平衡，代码已开源。

authors_text: Linghao Chen,Yunzhou Song,Hujun Bao,Xiaowei Zhou
title: Perceiving Unseen 3D Objects by Poking the Objects
title_zh: 通过戳物体来感知看不见的 3D 物体
abstract: We present a novel approach to interactive 3D object perception for robots. Unlike previous perception algorithms that rely on known object models or a large amount of annotated training data, we propose a poking-based approach that automatically discovers and reconstructs 3D objects. The poking process not only enables the robot to discover unseen 3D objects but also produces multi-view observations for 3D reconstruction of the objects. The reconstructed objects are then memorized by neural networks with regular supervised learning and can be recognized in new test images. The experiments on real-world data show that our approach could unsupervisedly discover and reconstruct unseen 3D objects with high quality, and facilitate real-world applications such as robotic grasping. The code and supplementary materials are available at the project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/poking_perception.
summary: We present a novel approach to interactive 3D object perception for robots. Unlike previous perception algorithms that rely on known object models or a large amount of annotated training data, we propose a poking-based approach that automatically discovers and reconstructs 3D objects. The poking process not only enables the robot to discover unseen 3D objects but also produces multi-view observations for 3D reconstruction of the objects. The reconstructed objects are then memorized by neural networks with regular supervised learning and can be recognized in new test images. The experiments on real-world data show that our approach could unsupervisedly discover and reconstruct unseen 3D objects with high quality, and facilitate real-world applications such as robotic grasping. The code and supplementary materials are available at the project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/poking_perception.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于机器人交互式 3D 对象感知的新颖方法。与之前依赖已知对象模型或大量带注释的训练数据的感知算法不同，我们提出了一种基于戳的方法，可以自动发现和重建 3D 对象。戳戳过程不仅使机器人能够发现看不见的 3D 物体，而且还可以产生多视图观察以进行物体的 3D 重建。然后，重建的对象通过定期监督学习的神经网络进行记忆，并可以在新的测试图像中被识别。对现实世界数据的实验表明，我们的方法可以无监督地高质量地发现和重建看不见的 3D 对象，并促进机器人抓取等现实世界的应用。代码和补充材料可在项目页面获取：https://zju3dv.github.io/poking_perception。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于 poking（触碰）的新型机器人交互式3D物体感知方法，无需预先已知物体模型或大量标注数据即可自动发现和重建未见过的3D物体。
AI.motivation: 传统感知算法依赖已知物体模型或大量标注数据，难以应对真实场景中未知物体的感知需求。本文旨在通过机器人主动触碰物体获取多视角信息，实现对未知3D物体的自主发现与重建。
AI.method: 通过机器人触碰物体获取多视角观测数据，结合神经网络的监督学习，自动发现并重建未见过的3D物体，最终在新测试图像中实现物体识别。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在真实场景中高质量重建未知3D物体，并有效支持机器人抓取等实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法无需先验知识即可实现未知物体的高质量重建，为机器人自主感知和交互提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于 poking（触碰）的新型机器人交互式3D物体感知方法，无需预先已知物体模型或大量标注数据即可自动发现和重建未见过的3D物体。

search_text: Perceiving Unseen 3D Objects by Poking the Objects 通过戳物体来感知看不见的 3D 物体 We present a novel approach to interactive 3D object perception for robots. Unlike previous perception algorithms that rely on known object models or a large amount of annotated training data, we propose a poking-based approach that automatically discovers and reconstructs 3D objects. The poking process not only enables the robot to discover unseen 3D objects but also produces multi-view observations for 3D reconstruction of the objects. The reconstructed objects are then memorized by neural networks with regular supervised learning and can be recognized in new test images. The experiments on real-world data show that our approach could unsupervisedly discover and reconstruct unseen 3D objects with high quality, and facilitate real-world applications such as robotic grasping. The code and supplementary materials are available at the project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/poking_perception. 我们提出了一种用于机器人交互式 3D 对象感知的新颖方法。与之前依赖已知对象模型或大量带注释的训练数据的感知算法不同，我们提出了一种基于戳的方法，可以自动发现和重建 3D 对象。戳戳过程不仅使机器人能够发现看不见的 3D 物体，而且还可以产生多视图观察以进行物体的 3D 重建。然后，重建的对象通过定期监督学习的神经网络进行记忆，并可以在新的测试图像中被识别。对现实世界数据的实验表明，我们的方法可以无监督地高质量地发现和重建看不见的 3D 对象，并促进机器人抓取等现实世界的应用。代码和补充材料可在项目页面获取：https://zju3dv.github.io/poking_perception。 本文提出一种基于 poking（触碰）的新型机器人交互式3D物体感知方法，无需预先已知物体模型或大量标注数据即可自动发现和重建未见过的3D物体。 Linghao Chen,Yunzhou Song,Hujun Bao,Xiaowei Zhou cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Wayner Barrios,Mattia Soldan,Alberto Mario Ceballos-Arroyo,Fabian Caba Heilbron,Bernard Ghanem
title: Localizing Moments in Long Video Via Multimodal Guidance
title_zh: 通过多模态指导定位长视频中的时刻
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023
abstract: The recent introduction of the large-scale, long-form MAD and Ego4D datasets has enabled researchers to investigate the performance of current state-of-the-art methods for video grounding in the long-form setup, with interesting findings: current grounding methods alone fail at tackling this challenging task and setup due to their inability to process long video sequences. In this paper, we propose a method for improving the performance of natural language grounding in long videos by identifying and pruning out non-describable windows. We design a guided grounding framework consisting of a Guidance Model and a base grounding model. The Guidance Model emphasizes describable windows, while the base grounding model analyzes short temporal windows to determine which segments accurately match a given language query. We offer two designs for the Guidance Model: Query-Agnostic and Query-Dependent, which balance efficiency and accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art models by 4.1% in MAD and 4.52% in Ego4D (NLQ), respectively. Code, data and MAD's audio features necessary to reproduce our experiments are available at: https://github.com/waybarrios/guidance-based-video-grounding.
summary: The recent introduction of the large-scale, long-form MAD and Ego4D datasets has enabled researchers to investigate the performance of current state-of-the-art methods for video grounding in the long-form setup, with interesting findings: current grounding methods alone fail at tackling this challenging task and setup due to their inability to process long video sequences. In this paper, we propose a method for improving the performance of natural language grounding in long videos by identifying and pruning out non-describable windows. We design a guided grounding framework consisting of a Guidance Model and a base grounding model. The Guidance Model emphasizes describable windows, while the base grounding model analyzes short temporal windows to determine which segments accurately match a given language query. We offer two designs for the Guidance Model: Query-Agnostic and Query-Dependent, which balance efficiency and accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art models by 4.1% in MAD and 4.52% in Ego4D (NLQ), respectively. Code, data and MAD's audio features necessary to reproduce our experiments are available at: https://github.com/waybarrios/guidance-based-video-grounding.
abstract_zh: 最近引入的大规模长格式 MAD 和 Ego4D 数据集使研究人员能够研究当前最先进的视频接地方法在长格式设置中的性能，并得出有趣的发现：由于无法处理长视频序列，仅当前的接地方法无法解决这一具有挑战性的任务和设置。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过识别和修剪不可描述窗口来提高长视频中自然语言基础性能的方法。我们设计了一个由指导模型和基础接地模型组成的引导接地框架。指导模型强调可描述的窗口，而基础基础模型分析短时间窗口以确定哪些片段准确匹配给定的语言查询。我们为指导模型提供两种设计：查询不可知的和查询相关的，平衡了效率和准确性。实验表明，我们提出的方法在 MAD 中优于最先进的模型 4.1%，在 Ego4D (NLQ) 中优于最先进的模型 4.52%。重现我们实验所需的代码、数据和 MAD 音频功能可在以下网址找到：https://github.com/waybarrios/guidance-based-video-grounding。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多模态引导定位长视频中关键时刻的方法，通过识别并剔除不可描述的时间窗口提升视频 grounding 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频 grounding 方法在处理长视频时表现不佳，因其无法有效处理长序列，导致定位精度下降。
AI.method: 设计包含引导模型（Query-Agnostic/Query-Dependent 两种方案）和基础 grounding 模型的框架，通过引导模型强调可描述窗口，基础模型分析短时序片段匹配语言查询。
AI.result: 在 MAD 数据集上提升 4.1%，在 Ego4D（NLQ）数据集上提升 4.52%，代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多模态引导框架有效解决了长视频 grounding 难题，验证了引导机制与短窗口分析结合的优越性。

authors_text: Qu Weiming,Liu Tianlin,Wu Xihong,Luo Dingsheng
title: Embodied Self-Supervised Learning (EMSSL) with Sampling and Training Coordination for Robot Arm Inverse Kinematics Model Learning
title_zh: 用于机器人手臂逆运动学模型学习的具有采样和训练协调的体现自监督学习 (EMSSL)
abstract: Forward and inverse kinematics models are fundamental to robot arms, serving as the basis for the robot arm's operational tasks. However, in model learning of robot arms, especially in the presence of redundant degrees of freedom, inverse model learning is more challenging than forward model learning due to the non-convex problem caused by multiple solutions. In this paper, we propose a framework for autonomous learning of the robot arm inverse model based on embodied self-supervised learning (EMSSL) with sampling and training coordination. We investigate batch inference and parallel computation strategies for data sampling in order to accelerate model learning and propose two approaches for fast adaptation of the robot arm model. A series of experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the method we proposed. The related code will be available soon.
summary: Forward and inverse kinematics models are fundamental to robot arms, serving as the basis for the robot arm's operational tasks. However, in model learning of robot arms, especially in the presence of redundant degrees of freedom, inverse model learning is more challenging than forward model learning due to the non-convex problem caused by multiple solutions. In this paper, we propose a framework for autonomous learning of the robot arm inverse model based on embodied self-supervised learning (EMSSL) with sampling and training coordination. We investigate batch inference and parallel computation strategies for data sampling in order to accelerate model learning and propose two approaches for fast adaptation of the robot arm model. A series of experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the method we proposed. The related code will be available soon.
abstract_zh: 正向和反向运动学模型是机器人手臂的基础，是机器人手臂操作任务的基础。然而，在机械臂的模型学习中，尤其是存在冗余自由度的情况下，由于多解带来的非凸问题，逆向模型学习比正向模型学习更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于具有采样和训练协调的体现自我监督学习（EMSSL）的机器人手臂逆模型自主学习框架。我们研究了数据采样的批量推理和并行计算策略，以加速模型学习，并提出了两种快速适应机器人手臂模型的方法。一系列实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。相关代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于具身自监督学习（EMSSL）的框架，结合采样与训练协调机制，用于解决机械臂逆运动学模型学习中的冗余自由度挑战。
AI.motivation: 机械臂逆运动学模型因冗余自由度导致的多解非凸问题，相较于正运动学模型更难学习，亟需高效的学习框架与策略。
AI.method: 设计EMSSL框架，通过批量推理与并行计算加速数据采样，提出两种快速适应方法以协调采样与训练过程。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在机械臂逆运动学模型学习中的有效性，具体表现为学习效率与模型适应性的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: EMSSL框架通过协调采样与训练策略，有效解决了逆运动学模型学习的挑战，为机械臂操作任务提供了新思路。

We investigate batch inference and parallel computation strategies for data sampling in order to accelerate model learning and propose two approaches for fast adaptation of the robot arm model. A series of experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the method we proposed. The related code will be available soon. 正向和反向运动学模型是机器人手臂的基础，是机器人手臂操作任务的基础。然而，在机械臂的模型学习中，尤其是存在冗余自由度的情况下，由于多解带来的非凸问题，逆向模型学习比正向模型学习更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于具有采样和训练协调的体现自我监督学习（EMSSL）的机器人手臂逆模型自主学习框架。我们研究了数据采样的批量推理和并行计算策略，以加速模型学习，并提出了两种快速适应机器人手臂模型的方法。一系列实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。相关代码即将发布。 本文提出了一种基于具身自监督学习（EMSSL）的框架，结合采样与训练协调机制，用于解决机械臂逆运动学模型学习中的冗余自由度挑战。 Qu Weiming,Liu Tianlin,Wu Xihong,Luo Dingsheng cs.RO

authors_text: Pablo Hernández-Cámara,Jorge Vila-Tomás,Valero Laparra,Jesús Malo
title: Analysis of Deep Image Quality Models
title_zh: 深度图像质量模型分析
abstract: Subjective image quality measures based on deep neural networks are very related to models of visual neuroscience. This connection benefits engineering but, more interestingly, the freedom to optimize deep networks in different ways, make them an excellent tool to explore the principles behind visual perception (both human and artificial). Recently, a myriad of networks have been successfully optimized for many interesting visual tasks. Although these nets were not specifically designed to predict image quality or other psychophysics, they have shown surprising human-like behavior. The reasons for this remain unclear. In this work, we perform a thorough analysis of the perceptual properties of pre-trained nets (particularly their ability to predict image quality) by isolating different factors: the goal (the function), the data (learning environment), the architecture, and the readout: selected layer(s), fine-tuning of channel relevance, and use of statistical descriptors as opposed to plain readout of responses. Several conclusions can be drawn. All the models correlate better with human opinion than SSIM. More importantly, some of the nets are in pair of state-of-the-art with no extra refinement or perceptual information. Nets trained for supervised tasks such as classification correlate substantially better with humans than LPIPS (a net specifically tuned for image quality). Interestingly, self-supervised tasks such as jigsaw also perform better than LPIPS. Simpler architectures are better than very deep nets. In simpler nets, correlation with humans increases with depth as if deeper layers were closer to human judgement. This is not true in very deep nets. Consistently with reports on illusions and contrast sensitivity, small changes in the image environment does not make a big difference. Finally, the explored statistical descriptors and concatenations had no major impact.

Several conclusions can be drawn. All the models correlate better with human opinion than SSIM. More importantly, some of the nets are in pair of state-of-the-art with no extra refinement or perceptual information. Nets trained for supervised tasks such as classification correlate substantially better with humans than LPIPS (a net specifically tuned for image quality). Interestingly, self-supervised tasks such as jigsaw also perform better than LPIPS. Simpler architectures are better than very deep nets. In simpler nets, correlation with humans increases with depth as if deeper layers were closer to human judgement. This is not true in very deep nets. Consistently with reports on illusions and contrast sensitivity, small changes in the image environment does not make a big difference. abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的主观图像质量测量与视觉神经科学模型密切相关。这种联系有利于工程，但更有趣的是，以不同方式优化深度网络的自由，使它们成为探索视觉感知（人类和人工）背后原理的绝佳工具。最近，大量网络已成功针对许多有趣的视觉任务进行了优化。尽管这些网络并不是专门为预测图像质量或其他心理物理学而设计的，但它们表现出了令人惊讶的类人行为。其原因尚不清楚。在这项工作中，我们通过隔离不同的因素来对预训练网络的感知特性（特别是它们预测图像质量的能力）进行彻底分析：目标（功能）、数据（学习环境）、架构和读出：选定的层、通道相关性的微调以及使用统计描述符而不是简单的响应读出。可以得出几个结论。所有模型都比 SSIM 更符合人类观点。更重要的是，一些网络是最先进的，没有额外的改进或感知信息。与 LPIPS（专门针对图像质量调整的网络）相比，经过分类等监督任务训练的网络与人类的相关性要好得多。有趣的是，像拼图这样的自监督任务也比 LPIPS 表现得更好。更简单的架构比非常深的网络更好。在更简单的网络中，与人类的相关性随着深度的增加而增加，就好像更深的层更接近人类的判断一样。在非常深的网络中情况并非如此。与错觉和对比敏感度的报告一致，图像环境的微小变化不会产生很大的差异。最后，所探索的统计描述符和串联没有产生重大影响。

AI.tldr: 分析预训练深度网络在图像质量预测中的感知特性
AI.motivation: 探索深度网络为何能表现出类似人类的图像质量判断能力，并揭示影响其性能的关键因素
AI.method: 通过隔离目标、数据、架构和读取方法等因素，分析预训练网络的感知特性
AI.result: 预训练网络在图像质量预测上优于SSIM和LPIPS，简单架构深度增加时相关性提升，但非常深的网络不适用
AI.conclusion: 简单架构的深层网络更接近人类判断，环境变化影响小，统计描述符无显著影响

authors_text: Qu Weiming,Liu Tianlin,Luo Dingsheng
title: High-Precise Robot Arm Manipulation based on Online Iterative Learning and Forward Simulation with Positioning Error Below End-Effector Physical Minimum Displacement
title_zh: 基于在线迭代学习和正向仿真的高精度机械臂操纵，定位误差低于末端执行器物理最小位移
abstract: Precision is a crucial performance indicator for robot arms, as high precision manipulation allows for a wider range of applications. Traditional methods for improving robot arm precision rely on error compensation. However, these methods are often not robust and lack adaptability. Learning-based methods offer greater flexibility and adaptability, while current researches show that they often fall short in achieving high precision and struggle to handle many scenarios requiring high precision. In this paper, we propose a novel high-precision robot arm manipulation framework based on online iterative learning and forward simulation, which can achieve positioning error (precision) less than end-effector physical minimum displacement. Additionally, we parallelize multiple high-precision manipulation strategies to better combine online iterative learning and forward simulation. Furthermore, we consider the joint angular resolution of the real robot arm, which is usually neglected in related works. A series of experiments on both simulation and real UR3 robot arm platforms demonstrate that our proposed method is effective and promising. The related code will be available soon.
summary: Precision is a crucial performance indicator for robot arms, as high precision manipulation allows for a wider range of applications. Traditional methods for improving robot arm precision rely on error compensation. However, these methods are often not robust and lack adaptability. Learning-based methods offer greater flexibility and adaptability, while current researches show that they often fall short in achieving high precision and struggle to handle many scenarios requiring high precision. In this paper, we propose a novel high-precision robot arm manipulation framework based on online iterative learning and forward simulation, which can achieve positioning error (precision) less than end-effector physical minimum displacement. Additionally, we parallelize multiple high-precision manipulation strategies to better combine online iterative learning and forward simulation. Furthermore, we consider the joint angular resolution of the real robot arm, which is usually neglected in related works. A series of experiments on both simulation and real UR3 robot arm platforms demonstrate that our proposed method is effective and promising. The related code will be available soon.
abstract_zh: 精度是机器人手臂的关键性能指标，因为高精度操纵可以实现更广泛的应用。提高机器人手臂精度的传统方法依赖于误差补偿。然而，这些方法往往不够稳健且缺乏适应性。基于学习的方法提供了更大的灵活性和适应性，但目前的研究表明，它们往往无法实现高精度，并且难以处理许多需要高精度的场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于在线迭代学习和正向仿真的新型高精度机械臂操纵框架，该框架可以实现小于末端执行器物理最小位移的定位误差（精度）。此外，我们并行化多个高精度操纵策略，以更好地结合在线迭代学习和前向模拟。此外，我们考虑了实际机器人手臂的关节角分辨率，这在相关工作中通常被忽略。在仿真和真实 UR3 机器人手臂平台上进行的一系列实验表明，我们提出的方法是有效且有前景的。相关代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于在线迭代学习和前向仿真的高精度机械臂操作框架，实现了末端执行器物理最小位移以下的定位误差。
AI.motivation: 传统误差补偿方法鲁棒性差且缺乏适应性，基于学习的方法虽灵活但难以达到高精度要求，需改进现有技术以实现更精确的机械臂控制。
AI.method: 结合在线迭代学习与前向仿真，平行化多策略并考虑实际机械臂关节角分辨率，构建新型高精度操作框架。
AI.result: 仿真与真实UR3机械臂实验验证了方法的有效性，定位误差低于物理最小位移，表现优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在高精度机械臂控制中具有潜力，相关代码即将公开。

authors_text: Zhe Wang,Aladine Chetouani,Mohamed Jarraya,Yung Hsin Chen,Yuhua Ru,Fang Chen,Fabian Bauer,Liping Zhang,Didier Hans,Rachid Jennane
title: Key-Exchange Convolutional Auto-Encoder for Data Augmentation in Early Knee Osteoarthritis Detection
title_zh: 用于早期膝骨关节炎检测中数据增强的密钥交换卷积自动编码器
abstract: Knee Osteoarthritis (KOA) is a common musculoskeletal condition that significantly affects mobility and quality of life, particularly in elderly populations. However, training deep learning models for early KOA classification is often hampered by the limited availability of annotated medical datasets, owing to the high costs and labour-intensive nature of data labelling. Traditional data augmentation techniques, while useful, rely on simple transformations and fail to introduce sufficient diversity into the dataset. To address these challenges, we propose the Key-Exchange Convolutional Auto-Encoder (KECAE) as an innovative Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based data augmentation strategy for early KOA classification. Our model employs a convolutional autoencoder with a novel key-exchange mechanism that generates synthetic images by selectively exchanging key pathological features between X-ray images, which not only diversifies the dataset but also ensures the clinical validity of the augmented data. A hybrid loss function is introduced to supervise feature learning and reconstruction, integrating multiple components, including reconstruction, supervision, and feature separation losses. Experimental results demonstrate that the KECAE-generated data significantly improve the performance of KOA classification models, with accuracy gains of up to 1.98% across various standard and state-of-the-art architectures. Furthermore, a clinical validation study involving expert radiologists confirms the anatomical plausibility and diagnostic realism of the synthetic outputs. These findings highlight the potential of KECAE as a robust tool for augmenting medical datasets in early KOA detection.
summary: Knee Osteoarthritis (KOA) is a common musculoskeletal condition that significantly affects mobility and quality of life, particularly in elderly populations. However, training deep learning models for early KOA classification is often hampered by the limited availability of annotated medical datasets, owing to the high costs and labour-intensive nature of data labelling. Traditional data augmentation techniques, while useful, rely on simple transformations and fail to introduce sufficient diversity into the dataset. To address these challenges, we propose the Key-Exchange Convolutional Auto-Encoder (KECAE) as an innovative Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based data augmentation strategy for early KOA classification. Our model employs a convolutional autoencoder with a novel key-exchange mechanism that generates synthetic images by selectively exchanging key pathological features between X-ray images, which not only diversifies the dataset but also ensures the clinical validity of the augmented data. A hybrid loss function is introduced to supervise feature learning and reconstruction, integrating multiple components, including reconstruction, supervision, and feature separation losses. Experimental results demonstrate that the KECAE-generated data significantly improve the performance of KOA classification models, with accuracy gains of up to 1.98% across various standard and state-of-the-art architectures. Furthermore, a clinical validation study involving expert radiologists confirms the anatomical plausibility and diagnostic realism of the synthetic outputs. These findings highlight the potential of KECAE as a robust tool for augmenting medical datasets in early KOA detection.
abstract_zh: 膝骨关节炎 (KOA) 是一种常见的肌肉骨骼疾病，会严重影响活动能力和生活质量，尤其是老年人群。然而，由于数据标记的高成本和劳动密集型性质，训练用于早期 KOA 分类的深度学习模型常常受到带注释的医学数据集的有限可用性的阻碍。传统的数据增强技术虽然有用，但依赖于简单的转换，无法在数据集中引入足够的多样性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了密钥交换卷积自动编码器（KECAE）作为一种创新的基于人工智能（AI）的数据增强策略，用于早期 KOA 分类。我们的模型采用具有新颖密钥交换机制的卷积自动编码器，通过选择性地交换 X 射线图像之间的关键病理特征来生成合成图像，这不仅使数据集多样化，而且确保了增强数据的临床有效性。引入混合损失函数来监督特征学习和重建，集成多个组件，包括重建、监督和特征分离损失。实验结果表明，KECAE 生成的数据显着提高了 KOA 分类模型的性能，在各种标准和最先进的架构中，准确率提升高达 1.98%。此外，一项由放射科专家参与的临床验证研究证实了合成输出的解剖合理性和诊断真实性。这些发现凸显了 KECAE 作为增强早期 KOA 检测中的医学数据集的强大工具的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键交换卷积自编码器（KECAE）的数据增强方法，用于改善早期膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）分类模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于标注医疗数据集的获取成本高且劳动密集，传统数据增强技术难以有效提升KOA分类模型的泛化能力，亟需更有效的数据增强策略。
AI.method: 设计了一种带有关键病理特征交换机制的卷积自编码器，通过选择性交换X光图像中的关键病变特征生成合成图像，并引入混合损失函数（包含重建、监督和特征分离损失）指导模型学习。
AI.result: KECAE生成的数据使多种分类模型的准确率提升最高达1.98%，且临床验证表明合成图像具有解剖合理性与诊断真实性。
AI.conclusion: KECAE为早期KOA检测中的医学数据增强提供了有效且临床可信的解决方案，具有重要的应用潜力。

search_text: Key-Exchange Convolutional Auto-Encoder for Data Augmentation in Early Knee Osteoarthritis Detection 用于早期膝骨关节炎检测中数据增强的密钥交换卷积自动编码器 Knee Osteoarthritis (KOA) is a common musculoskeletal condition that significantly affects mobility and quality of life, particularly in elderly populations. However, training deep learning models for early KOA classification is often hampered by the limited availability of annotated medical datasets, owing to the high costs and labour-intensive nature of data labelling. Traditional data augmentation techniques, while useful, rely on simple transformations and fail to introduce sufficient diversity into the dataset. To address these challenges, we propose the Key-Exchange Convolutional Auto-Encoder (KECAE) as an innovative Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based data augmentation strategy for early KOA classification. Our model employs a convolutional autoencoder with a novel key-exchange mechanism that generates synthetic images by selectively exchanging key pathological features between X-ray images, which not only diversifies the dataset but also ensures the clinical validity of the augmented data. A hybrid loss function is introduced to supervise feature learning and reconstruction, integrating multiple components, including reconstruction, supervision, and feature separation losses. Experimental results demonstrate that the KECAE-generated data significantly improve the performance of KOA classification models, with accuracy gains of up to 1.98% across various standard and state-of-the-art architectures. Furthermore, a clinical validation study involving expert radiologists confirms the anatomical plausibility and diagnostic realism of the synthetic outputs. These findings highlight the potential of KECAE as a robust tool for augmenting medical datasets in early KOA detection. 膝骨关节炎 (KOA) 是一种常见的肌肉骨骼疾病，会严重影响活动能力和生活质量，尤其是老年人群。然而，由于数据标记的高成本和劳动密集型性质，训练用于早期 KOA 分类的深度学习模型常常受到带注释的医学数据集的有限可用性的阻碍。传统的数据增强技术虽然有用，但依赖于简单的转换，无法在数据集中引入足够的多样性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了密钥交换卷积自动编码器（KECAE）作为一种创新的基于人工智能（AI）的数据增强策略，用于早期 KOA 分类。我们的模型采用具有新颖密钥交换机制的卷积自动编码器，通过选择性地交换 X 射线图像之间的关键病理特征来生成合成图像，这不仅使数据集多样化，而且确保了增强数据的临床有效性。引入混合损失函数来监督特征学习和重建，集成多个组件，包括重建、监督和特征分离损失。实验结果表明，KECAE 生成的数据显着提高了 KOA 分类模型的性能，在各种标准和最先进的架构中，准确率提升高达 1.98%。此外，一项由放射科专家参与的临床验证研究证实了合成输出的解剖合理性和诊断真实性。这些发现凸显了 KECAE 作为增强早期 KOA 检测中的医学数据集的强大工具的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于关键交换卷积自编码器（KECAE）的数据增强方法，用于改善早期膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）分类模型的性能。 Zhe Wang,Aladine Chetouani,Mohamed Jarraya,Yung Hsin Chen,Yuhua Ru,Fang Chen,Fabian Bauer,Liping Zhang,Didier Hans,Rachid Jennane eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shang-Fu Chen,Hsiang-Chun Wang,Ming-Hao Hsu,Chun-Mao Lai,Shao-Hua Sun
title: Diffusion Model-Augmented Behavioral Cloning
title_zh: 扩散模型-增强行为克隆
abstract: Imitation learning addresses the challenge of learning by observing an expert's demonstrations without access to reward signals from environments. Most existing imitation learning methods that do not require interacting with environments either model the expert distribution as the conditional probability p(a|s) (e.g., behavioral cloning, BC) or the joint probability p(s, a). Despite the simplicity of modeling the conditional probability with BC, it usually struggles with generalization. While modeling the joint probability can improve generalization performance, the inference procedure is often time-consuming, and the model can suffer from manifold overfitting. This work proposes an imitation learning framework that benefits from modeling both the conditional and joint probability of the expert distribution. Our proposed Diffusion Model-Augmented Behavioral Cloning (DBC) employs a diffusion model trained to model expert behaviors and learns a policy to optimize both the BC loss (conditional) and our proposed diffusion model loss (joint). DBC outperforms baselines in various continuous control tasks in navigation, robot arm manipulation, dexterous manipulation, and locomotion. We design additional experiments to verify the limitations of modeling either the conditional probability or the joint probability of the expert distribution, as well as compare different generative models. Ablation studies justify the effectiveness of our design choices.
summary: Imitation learning addresses the challenge of learning by observing an expert's demonstrations without access to reward signals from environments. Most existing imitation learning methods that do not require interacting with environments either model the expert distribution as the conditional probability p(a|s) (e.g., behavioral cloning, BC) or the joint probability p(s, a). Despite the simplicity of modeling the conditional probability with BC, it usually struggles with generalization. While modeling the joint probability can improve generalization performance, the inference procedure is often time-consuming, and the model can suffer from manifold overfitting. This work proposes an imitation learning framework that benefits from modeling both the conditional and joint probability of the expert distribution. Our proposed Diffusion Model-Augmented Behavioral Cloning (DBC) employs a diffusion model trained to model expert behaviors and learns a policy to optimize both the BC loss (conditional) and our proposed diffusion model loss (joint). DBC outperforms baselines in various continuous control tasks in navigation, robot arm manipulation, dexterous manipulation, and locomotion. We design additional experiments to verify the limitations of modeling either the conditional probability or the joint probability of the expert distribution, as well as compare different generative models. Ablation studies justify the effectiveness of our design choices.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习通过观察专家的演示来解决学习的挑战，而无需从环境中获取奖励信号。大多数不需要与环境交互的现有模仿学习方法要么将专家分布建模为条件概率 p(a|s)（例如行为克隆，BC）或联合概率 p(s, a)。尽管使用 BC 建模条件概率很简单，但它通常难以泛化。虽然对联合概率建模可以提高泛化性能，但推理过程通常非常耗时，并且模型可能会出现流形过度拟合。这项工作提出了一种模仿学习框架，该框架受益于对专家分布的条件概率和联合概率进行建模。我们提出的扩散模型增强行为克隆（DBC）采用经过训练的扩散模型来模拟专家行为，并学习优化 BC 损失（条件）和我们提出的扩散模型损失（联合）的策略。 DBC 在导航、机械臂操作、灵巧操作和运动等各种连续控制任务中的表现优于基线。我们设计了额外的实验来验证专家分布的条件概率或联合概率建模的局限性，并比较不同的生成模型。消融研究证明了我们设计选择的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合条件概率和联合概率建模的模仿学习框架DBC，通过扩散模型增强行为克隆方法。
AI.motivation: 传统行为克隆（BC）方法仅建模条件概率p(a|s)存在泛化能力差的问题，而联合概率建模虽能提升泛化性但存在推理耗时和过拟合风险。
AI.method: 设计扩散模型增强的行为克隆（DBC）框架，同时优化BC损失（条件概率）和扩散模型损失（联合概率），利用扩散模型学习专家行为分布。
AI.result: DBC在导航、机械臂操作、灵巧操作和运动控制等连续控制任务中优于基线方法，实验验证了单独建模的局限性并对比了不同生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化条件与联合概率建模能有效提升模仿学习性能，扩散模型在行为克隆中的应用具有显著优势。

authors_text: Songlin Dong,Haoyu Luo,Yuhang He,Xing Wei,Yihong Gong
title: Knowledge Restore and Transfer for Multi-label Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: 多标签类增量学习的知识恢复和迁移
abstract: Current class-incremental learning research mainly focuses on single-label classification tasks while multi-label class-incremental learning (MLCIL) with more practical application scenarios is rarely studied. Although there have been many anti-forgetting methods to solve the problem of catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning, these methods have difficulty in solving the MLCIL problem due to label absence and information dilution. In this paper, we propose a knowledge restore and transfer (KRT) framework for MLCIL, which includes a dynamic pseudo-label (DPL) module to restore the old class knowledge and an incremental cross-attention(ICA) module to save session-specific knowledge and transfer old class knowledge to the new model sufficiently. Besides, we propose a token loss to jointly optimize the incremental cross-attention module. Experimental results on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for improving recognition performance and mitigating forgetting on multi-label class-incremental learning tasks.
summary: Current class-incremental learning research mainly focuses on single-label classification tasks while multi-label class-incremental learning (MLCIL) with more practical application scenarios is rarely studied. Although there have been many anti-forgetting methods to solve the problem of catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning, these methods have difficulty in solving the MLCIL problem due to label absence and information dilution. In this paper, we propose a knowledge restore and transfer (KRT) framework for MLCIL, which includes a dynamic pseudo-label (DPL) module to restore the old class knowledge and an incremental cross-attention(ICA) module to save session-specific knowledge and transfer old class knowledge to the new model sufficiently. Besides, we propose a token loss to jointly optimize the incremental cross-attention module. Experimental results on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for improving recognition performance and mitigating forgetting on multi-label class-incremental learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 目前的类增量学习研究主要集中在单标签分类任务上，而具有更多实际应用场景的多标签类增量学习（MLCIL）的研究很少。尽管已经有很多抗遗忘方法来解决类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，但由于标签缺失和信息稀释，这些方法难以解决 MLCIL 问题。在本文中，我们提出了MLCIL的知识恢复和转移（KRT）框架，其中包括用于恢复旧类知识的动态伪标签（DPL）模块和用于保存特定于会话的知识并将旧类知识充分转移到新模型的增量交叉注意（ICA）模块。此外，我们提出了令牌损失来共同优化增量交叉注意模块。 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们的方法在提高多标签类增量学习任务的识别性能和减轻遗忘方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对多标签类别增量学习的知识恢复与迁移框架KRT，以解决标签缺失和信息稀释导致的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有抗遗忘方法难以应对多标签场景下的标签缺失和信息稀释问题，亟需专门针对多标签类别增量学习的新解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含动态伪标签模块（DPL）恢复旧类知识、增量交叉注意力模块（ICA）转移知识的KRT框架，并引入token loss联合优化模块。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL VOC数据集上验证了方法有效性，显著提升多标签增量学习的识别性能并缓解遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: KRT框架为多标签类别增量学习提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化模块设计或扩展至其他任务场景。

search_text: Knowledge Restore and Transfer for Multi-label Class-Incremental Learning 多标签类增量学习的知识恢复和迁移 Current class-incremental learning research mainly focuses on single-label classification tasks while multi-label class-incremental learning (MLCIL) with more practical application scenarios is rarely studied. Although there have been many anti-forgetting methods to solve the problem of catastrophic forgetting in class-incremental learning, these methods have difficulty in solving the MLCIL problem due to label absence and information dilution. In this paper, we propose a knowledge restore and transfer (KRT) framework for MLCIL, which includes a dynamic pseudo-label (DPL) module to restore the old class knowledge and an incremental cross-attention(ICA) module to save session-specific knowledge and transfer old class knowledge to the new model sufficiently. Besides, we propose a token loss to jointly optimize the incremental cross-attention module. Experimental results on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for improving recognition performance and mitigating forgetting on multi-label class-incremental learning tasks. 目前的类增量学习研究主要集中在单标签分类任务上，而具有更多实际应用场景的多标签类增量学习（MLCIL）的研究很少。尽管已经有很多抗遗忘方法来解决类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，但由于标签缺失和信息稀释，这些方法难以解决 MLCIL 问题。在本文中，我们提出了MLCIL的知识恢复和转移（KRT）框架，其中包括用于恢复旧类知识的动态伪标签（DPL）模块和用于保存特定于会话的知识并将旧类知识充分转移到新模型的增量交叉注意（ICA）模块。此外，我们提出了令牌损失来共同优化增量交叉注意模块。 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们的方法在提高多标签类增量学习任务的识别性能和减轻遗忘方面的有效性。 本文提出一种针对多标签类别增量学习的知识恢复与迁移框架KRT，以解决标签缺失和信息稀释导致的遗忘问题。 Songlin Dong,Haoyu Luo,Yuhang He,Xing Wei,Yihong Gong cs.CV

authors_text: Yoonjeon Kim,Hyunsu Kim,Junho Kim,Yunjey Choi,Eunho Yang
title: Learning Input-agnostic Manipulation Directions in StyleGAN with Text Guidance
title_zh: 使用文本引导学习 StyleGAN 中与输入无关的操作方向
abstract: With the advantages of fast inference and human-friendly flexible manipulation, image-agnostic style manipulation via text guidance enables new applications that were not previously available. The state-of-the-art text-guided image-agnostic manipulation method embeds the representation of each channel of StyleGAN independently in the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) space, and provides it in the form of a Dictionary to quickly find out the channel-wise manipulation direction during inference time. However, in this paper we argue that this dictionary which is constructed by controlling single channel individually is limited to accommodate the versatility of text guidance since the collective and interactive relation among multiple channels are not considered. Indeed, we show that it fails to discover a large portion of manipulation directions that can be found by existing methods, which manually manipulates latent space without texts. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel method that learns a Dictionary, whose entry corresponds to the representation of a single channel, by taking into account the manipulation effect coming from the interaction with multiple other channels. We demonstrate that our strategy resolves the inability of previous methods in finding diverse known directions from unsupervised methods and unknown directions from random text while maintaining the real-time inference speed and disentanglement ability.
summary: With the advantages of fast inference and human-friendly flexible manipulation, image-agnostic style manipulation via text guidance enables new applications that were not previously available. The state-of-the-art text-guided image-agnostic manipulation method embeds the representation of each channel of StyleGAN independently in the Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) space, and provides it in the form of a Dictionary to quickly find out the channel-wise manipulation direction during inference time. However, in this paper we argue that this dictionary which is constructed by controlling single channel individually is limited to accommodate the versatility of text guidance since the collective and interactive relation among multiple channels are not considered. Indeed, we show that it fails to discover a large portion of manipulation directions that can be found by existing methods, which manually manipulates latent space without texts. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel method that learns a Dictionary, whose entry corresponds to the representation of a single channel, by taking into account the manipulation effect coming from the interaction with multiple other channels. We demonstrate that our strategy resolves the inability of previous methods in finding diverse known directions from unsupervised methods and unknown directions from random text while maintaining the real-time inference speed and disentanglement ability.
abstract_zh: 凭借快速推理和人性化灵活操作的优势，通过文本指导进行与图像无关的样式操作可以实现以前不可用的新应用程序。最先进的文本引导图像不可知操作方法将 StyleGAN 每个通道的表示独立嵌入到对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）空间中，并以字典的形式提供，以便在推理时间内快速找出通道操作方向。然而，在本文中，我们认为，由于没有考虑多个通道之间的集体和交互关系，通过单独控制单个通道构建的字典仅限于容纳文本引导的多功能性。事实上，我们表明它无法发现现有方法可以找到的大部分操作方向，这些方法在没有文本的情况下手动操作潜在空间。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新的方法来学习字典，其条目对应于单个通道的表示，通过考虑来自与多个其他通道的交互的操纵效果。我们证明，我们的策略解决了以前的方法无法从无监督方法中找到各种已知方向和从随机文本中找到未知方向的问题，同时保持实时推理速度和解缠能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本引导的StyleGAN图像非特定输入操控方法，通过考虑多通道交互关系改进现有字典学习策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过独立嵌入StyleGAN各通道表示构建字典，但忽略了多通道间的协同作用，导致无法发现大量操控方向。
AI.method: 设计新型字典学习框架，在构建单通道表示时纳入与其他通道的交互影响，保留实时推理速度和解耦能力。
AI.result: 在保持实时性的同时，成功发现现有无监督方法和随机文本能操控的多样化方向，显著提升操控方向覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模多通道交互关系，提出的文本引导操控方法有效解决了现有技术的局限性，增强了StyleGAN的文本操控能力。
