authors_text: Hao Zhang,Hongzhuo Liang,Lin Cong,Jianzhi Lyu,Long Zeng,Pingfa Feng,Jianwei Zhang
title: Reinforcement Learning Based Pushing and Grasping Objects from Ungraspable Poses
title_zh: 基于强化学习的从不可抓取姿势推动和抓取物体
comment: Accepted by ICRA 2023; Project page https://haozhang990127.github.io/PaG/
comments: Accepted by ICRA 2023; Project page https://haozhang990127.github.io/PaG/
abstract: Grasping an object when it is in an ungraspable pose is a challenging task, such as books or other large flat objects placed horizontally on a table. Inspired by human manipulation, we address this problem by pushing the object to the edge of the table and then grasping it from the hanging part. In this paper, we develop a model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning framework to synergize pushing and grasping actions. We first pre-train a Variational Autoencoder to extract high-dimensional features of input scenario images. One Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm with the common reward and sharing layers of Actor-Critic is employed to learn both pushing and grasping actions with high data efficiency. Experiments show that our one network policy can converge 2.5 times faster than the policy using two parallel networks. Moreover, the experiments on unseen objects show that our policy can generalize to the challenging case of objects with curved surfaces and off-center irregularly shaped objects. Lastly, our policy can be transferred to a real robot without fine-tuning by using CycleGAN for domain adaption and outperforms the push-to-wall baseline.
summary: Grasping an object when it is in an ungraspable pose is a challenging task, such as books or other large flat objects placed horizontally on a table. Inspired by human manipulation, we address this problem by pushing the object to the edge of the table and then grasping it from the hanging part. In this paper, we develop a model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning framework to synergize pushing and grasping actions. We first pre-train a Variational Autoencoder to extract high-dimensional features of input scenario images. One Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm with the common reward and sharing layers of Actor-Critic is employed to learn both pushing and grasping actions with high data efficiency. Experiments show that our one network policy can converge 2.5 times faster than the policy using two parallel networks. Moreover, the experiments on unseen objects show that our policy can generalize to the challenging case of objects with curved surfaces and off-center irregularly shaped objects. Lastly, our policy can be transferred to a real robot without fine-tuning by using CycleGAN for domain adaption and outperforms the push-to-wall baseline.
abstract_zh: 当物体处于无法抓住的姿势时，抓住它是一项具有挑战性的任务，例如水平放置在桌子上的书籍或其他大型扁平物体。受人类操作的启发，我们通过将物体推到桌子边缘，然后从悬挂部分抓住它来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们开发了一个无模型的深度强化学习框架来协同推动和抓取动作。我们首先预训练变分自动编码器来提取输入场景图像的高维特征。采用一种具有共同奖励层和 Actor-Critic 共享层的近端策略优化算法来学习高数据效率的推动和抓取动作。实验表明，我们的一个网络策略的收敛速度比使用两个并行网络的策略快 2.5 倍。此外，对看不见的物体的实验表明，我们的策略可以推广到具有弯曲表面的物体和偏离中心的不规则形状物体的具有挑战性的情况。最后，我们的策略可以通过使用 CycleGAN 进行域适应而无需微调地转移到真实的机器人上，并且性能优于推墙基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的框架，通过推动和抓取动作解决无法直接抓取的物体姿态问题。
AI.motivation: 当物体处于难以抓取的姿态（如水平放置的大型扁平物体）时，传统方法效果有限。受人类操作启发，需通过推动物体至桌边再抓取悬挂部分来解决该问题。
AI.method: 采用无模型深度强化学习框架，预训练变分自编码器提取场景图像特征，利用共享层的近端策略优化算法协同学习推动与抓取动作，并通过CycleGAN进行领域适应以实现真实机器人迁移。
AI.result: 单网络策略收敛速度比双网络策略快2.5倍，能泛化至曲面和不规则物体，并在无需微调的情况下优于基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过强化学习有效融合推动与抓取动作，展示了高效的数据利用和泛化能力，成功应用于真实机器人场景。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning Based Pushing and Grasping Objects from Ungraspable Poses 基于强化学习的从不可抓取姿势推动和抓取物体 Grasping an object when it is in an ungraspable pose is a challenging task, such as books or other large flat objects placed horizontally on a table. Inspired by human manipulation, we address this problem by pushing the object to the edge of the table and then grasping it from the hanging part. In this paper, we develop a model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning framework to synergize pushing and grasping actions. We first pre-train a Variational Autoencoder to extract high-dimensional features of input scenario images. One Proximal Policy Optimization algorithm with the common reward and sharing layers of Actor-Critic is employed to learn both pushing and grasping actions with high data efficiency. Experiments show that our one network policy can converge 2.5 times faster than the policy using two parallel networks. Moreover, the experiments on unseen objects show that our policy can generalize to the challenging case of objects with curved surfaces and off-center irregularly shaped objects. Lastly, our policy can be transferred to a real robot without fine-tuning by using CycleGAN for domain adaption and outperforms the push-to-wall baseline. 当物体处于无法抓住的姿势时，抓住它是一项具有挑战性的任务，例如水平放置在桌子上的书籍或其他大型扁平物体。受人类操作的启发，我们通过将物体推到桌子边缘，然后从悬挂部分抓住它来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们开发了一个无模型的深度强化学习框架来协同推动和抓取动作。我们首先预训练变分自动编码器来提取输入场景图像的高维特征。采用一种具有共同奖励层和 Actor-Critic 共享层的近端策略优化算法来学习高数据效率的推动和抓取动作。实验表明，我们的一个网络策略的收敛速度比使用两个并行网络的策略快 2.5 倍。此外，对看不见的物体的实验表明，我们的策略可以推广到具有弯曲表面的物体和偏离中心的不规则形状物体的具有挑战性的情况。最后，我们的策略可以通过使用 CycleGAN 进行域适应而无需微调地转移到真实的机器人上，并且性能优于推墙基线。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的框架，通过推动和抓取动作解决无法直接抓取的物体姿态问题。 Hao Zhang,Hongzhuo Liang,Lin Cong,Jianzhi Lyu,Long Zeng,Pingfa Feng,Jianwei Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Tibor Krols,Yana Nikolova,Ninell Oldenburg
title: Multi-Modality in Music: Predicting Emotion in Music from High-Level Audio Features and Lyrics
title_zh: 音乐中的多模态：从高级音频特征和歌词中预测音乐中的情感
abstract: This paper aims to test whether a multi-modal approach for music emotion recognition (MER) performs better than a uni-modal one on high-level song features and lyrics. We use 11 song features retrieved from the Spotify API, combined lyrics features including sentiment, TF-IDF, and Anew to predict valence and arousal (Russell, 1980) scores on the Deezer Mood Detection Dataset (DMDD) (Delbouys et al., 2018) with 4 different regression models. We find that out of the 11 high-level song features, mainly 5 contribute to the performance, multi-modal features do better than audio alone when predicting valence. We made our code publically available.
summary: This paper aims to test whether a multi-modal approach for music emotion recognition (MER) performs better than a uni-modal one on high-level song features and lyrics. We use 11 song features retrieved from the Spotify API, combined lyrics features including sentiment, TF-IDF, and Anew to predict valence and arousal (Russell, 1980) scores on the Deezer Mood Detection Dataset (DMDD) (Delbouys et al., 2018) with 4 different regression models. We find that out of the 11 high-level song features, mainly 5 contribute to the performance, multi-modal features do better than audio alone when predicting valence. We made our code publically available.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在测试音乐情感识别 (MER) 的多模态方法在高级歌曲特征和歌词方面是否比单模态方法表现更好。我们使用从 Spotify API 检索的 11 首歌曲特征，结合情感、TF-IDF 和 Anew 等歌词特征，通过 4 种不同的回归模型来预测 Deezer 情绪检测数据集 (DMDD)（Delbouys 等人，2018）上的效价和唤醒度（Russell，1980）分数。我们发现，在 11 个高级歌曲特征中，主要有 5 个对性能有贡献，在预测效价时，多模态特征比单独的音频表现更好。我们公开了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在测试多模态方法在音乐情感识别中的表现是否优于单模态方法，通过结合高阶音频特征和歌词特征进行情感预测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多采用单一模态（如仅音频或仅歌词）进行音乐情感识别，而多模态融合可能提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 使用Spotify API获取的11个高阶音频特征，结合歌词的情感分析、TF-IDF和Anew特征，采用4种回归模型在DMDD数据集上预测愉悦度和唤醒度。
AI.result: 5个关键音频特征对性能贡献最大，多模态特征在预测愉悦度时显著优于纯音频模态。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合能有效提升音乐情感预测效果，未来可探索更多模态数据的结合以优化模型性能。

authors_text: Atah Nuh Mih,Hung Cao,Joshua Pickard,Monica Wachowicz,Rickey Dubay
title: TransferD2: Automated Defect Detection Approach in Smart Manufacturing using Transfer Learning Techniques
title_zh: TransferD2：使用迁移学习技术的智能制造中的自动缺陷检测方法
comment: Keywords: Transfer Learning, Smart Manufacturing, Defect Detection, Deflectometry Data, Data Enhancement, Product Quality Assurance
comments: Keywords: Transfer Learning, Smart Manufacturing, Defect Detection, Deflectometry Data, Data Enhancement, Product Quality Assurance
abstract: Quality assurance is crucial in the smart manufacturing industry as it identifies the presence of defects in finished products before they are shipped out. Modern machine learning techniques can be leveraged to provide rapid and accurate detection of these imperfections. We, therefore, propose a transfer learning approach, namely TransferD2, to correctly identify defects on a dataset of source objects and extend its application to new unseen target objects. We present a data enhancement technique to generate a large dataset from the small source dataset for building a classifier. We then integrate three different pre-trained models (Xception, ResNet101V2, and InceptionResNetV2) into the classifier network and compare their performance on source and target data. We use the classifier to detect the presence of imperfections on the unseen target data using pseudo-bounding boxes. Our results show that ResNet101V2 performs best on the source data with an accuracy of 95.72%. Xception performs best on the target data with an accuracy of 91.00% and also provides a more accurate prediction of the defects on the target images. Throughout the experiment, the results also indicate that the choice of a pre-trained model is not dependent on the depth of the network. Our proposed approach can be applied in defect detection applications where insufficient data is available for training a model and can be extended to identify imperfections in new unseen data.
summary: Quality assurance is crucial in the smart manufacturing industry as it identifies the presence of defects in finished products before they are shipped out. Modern machine learning techniques can be leveraged to provide rapid and accurate detection of these imperfections. We, therefore, propose a transfer learning approach, namely TransferD2, to correctly identify defects on a dataset of source objects and extend its application to new unseen target objects. We present a data enhancement technique to generate a large dataset from the small source dataset for building a classifier. We then integrate three different pre-trained models (Xception, ResNet101V2, and InceptionResNetV2) into the classifier network and compare their performance on source and target data. We use the classifier to detect the presence of imperfections on the unseen target data using pseudo-bounding boxes. Our results show that ResNet101V2 performs best on the source data with an accuracy of 95.72%. Xception performs best on the target data with an accuracy of 91.00% and also provides a more accurate prediction of the defects on the target images. Throughout the experiment, the results also indicate that the choice of a pre-trained model is not dependent on the depth of the network. Our proposed approach can be applied in defect detection applications where insufficient data is available for training a model and can be extended to identify imperfections in new unseen data.
abstract_zh: 质量保证在智能制造行业中至关重要，因为它可以在成品发货前识别出成品中是否存在缺陷。可以利用现代机器学习技术来快速准确地检测这些缺陷。因此，我们提出了一种迁移学习方法，即 TransferD2，来正确识别源对象数据集上的缺陷，并将其应用扩展到新的未见过的目标对象。我们提出了一种数据增强技术，可以从小型源数据集中生成大型数据集，以构建分类器。然后，我们将三种不同的预训练模型（Xception、ResNet101V2 和 InceptionResNetV2）集成到分类器网络中，并比较它们在源数据和目标数据上的性能。我们使用分类器使用伪边界框来检测未见过的目标数据上是否存在缺陷。我们的结果表明，ResNet101V2 在源数据上表现最好，准确率为 95.72%。 Xception 在目标数据上表现最好，准确率达到 91.00%，并且还可以对目标图像上的缺陷提供更准确的预测。在整个实验中，结果还表明预训练模型的选择不依赖于网络的深度。我们提出的方法可以应用于缺陷检测应用程序，在这些应用程序中没有足够的数据可用于训练模型，并且可以扩展以识别新的未见数据中的缺陷。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的缺陷检测方法TransferD2，用于在智能制造中利用有限的源数据集检测目标对象的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 智能制造中缺陷检测需要高精度且面对数据不足的挑战，传统方法难以满足需求，需借助迁移学习技术提升小样本下的检测能力。
AI.method: 通过数据增强技术扩充小规模源数据集，结合Xception、ResNet101V2和InceptionResNetV2三种预训练模型构建分类器，并使用伪边界框在目标数据上检测缺陷。
AI.result: ResNet101V2在源数据上达到95.72%准确率，Xception在目标数据上达91.00%准确率，且模型选择与网络深度无关。
AI.conclusion: TransferD2适用于数据不足的缺陷检测场景，可通过迁移学习有效扩展至新目标数据的缺陷识别。

Our proposed approach can be applied in defect detection applications where insufficient data is available for training a model and can be extended to identify imperfections in new unseen data. 质量保证在智能制造行业中至关重要，因为它可以在成品发货前识别出成品中是否存在缺陷。可以利用现代机器学习技术来快速准确地检测这些缺陷。因此，我们提出了一种迁移学习方法，即 TransferD2，来正确识别源对象数据集上的缺陷，并将其应用扩展到新的未见过的目标对象。我们提出了一种数据增强技术，可以从小型源数据集中生成大型数据集，以构建分类器。然后，我们将三种不同的预训练模型（Xception、ResNet101V2 和 InceptionResNetV2）集成到分类器网络中，并比较它们在源数据和目标数据上的性能。我们使用分类器使用伪边界框来检测未见过的目标数据上是否存在缺陷。我们的结果表明，ResNet101V2 在源数据上表现最好，准确率为 95.72%。 Xception 在目标数据上表现最好，准确率达到 91.00%，并且还可以对目标图像上的缺陷提供更准确的预测。在整个实验中，结果还表明预训练模型的选择不依赖于网络的深度。我们提出的方法可以应用于缺陷检测应用程序，在这些应用程序中没有足够的数据可用于训练模型，并且可以扩展以识别新的未见数据中的缺陷。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的缺陷检测方法TransferD2，用于在智能制造中利用有限的源数据集检测目标对象的缺陷。 Atah Nuh Mih,Hung Cao,Joshua Pickard,Monica Wachowicz,Rickey Dubay cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mihnea-Alexandru Tomita,Bruno Ferrarini,Michael Milford,Klaus McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan
title: Data-Efficient Sequence-Based Visual Place Recognition with Highly Compressed JPEG Images
title_zh: 使用高度压缩的 JPEG 图像进行数据高效的基于序列的视觉位置识别
abstract: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is a fundamental task that allows a robotic platform to successfully localise itself in the environment. For decentralised VPR applications where the visual data has to be transmitted between several agents, the communication channel may restrict the localisation process when limited bandwidth is available. JPEG is an image compression standard that can employ high compression ratios to facilitate lower data transmission for VPR applications. However, when applying high levels of JPEG compression, both the image clarity and size are drastically reduced. In this paper, we incorporate sequence-based filtering in a number of well-established, learnt and non-learnt VPR techniques to overcome the performance loss resulted from introducing high levels of JPEG compression. The sequence length that enables 100% place matching performance is reported and an analysis of the amount of data required for each VPR technique to perform the transfer on the entire spectrum of JPEG compression is provided. Moreover, the time required by each VPR technique to perform place matching is investigated, on both uniformly and non-uniformly JPEG compressed data. The results show that it is beneficial to use a highly compressed JPEG dataset with an increased sequence length, as similar levels of VPR performance are reported at a significantly reduced bandwidth. The results presented in this paper also emphasize that there is a trade-off between the amount of data transferred and the total time required to perform VPR. Our experiments also suggest that is often favourable to compress the query images to the same quality of the map, as more efficient place matching can be performed. The experiments are conducted on several VPR datasets, under mild to extreme JPEG compression.

For decentralised VPR applications where the visual data has to be transmitted between several agents, the communication channel may restrict the localisation process when limited bandwidth is available. JPEG is an image compression standard that can employ high compression ratios to facilitate lower data transmission for VPR applications. However, when applying high levels of JPEG compression, both the image clarity and size are drastically reduced. In this paper, we incorporate sequence-based filtering in a number of well-established, learnt and non-learnt VPR techniques to overcome the performance loss resulted from introducing high levels of JPEG compression. The sequence length that enables 100% place matching performance is reported and an analysis of the amount of data required for each VPR technique to perform the transfer on the entire spectrum of JPEG compression is provided. Moreover, the time required by each VPR technique to perform place matching is investigated, on both uniformly and non-uniformly JPEG compressed data. The results show that it is beneficial to use a highly compressed JPEG dataset with an increased sequence length, as similar levels of VPR performance are reported at a significantly reduced bandwidth. The results presented in this paper also emphasize that there is a trade-off between the amount of data transferred and the total time required to perform VPR. Our experiments also suggest that is often favourable to compress the query images to the same quality of the map, as more efficient place matching can be performed. The experiments are conducted on several VPR datasets, under mild to extreme JPEG compression.
abstract_zh: 视觉位置识别 (VPR) 是一项基本任务，它允许机器人平台在环境中成功定位自身。对于分散式 VPR 应用程序，视觉数据必须在多个代理之间传输，当可用带宽有限时，通信通道可能会限制定位过程。 JPEG 是一种图像压缩标准，可以采用高压缩比来促进 VPR 应用程序的较低数据传输。然而，当应用高级别 JPEG 压缩时，图像清晰度和尺寸都会大幅降低。在本文中，我们将基于序列的过滤结合到许多成熟的、学习的和非学习的 VPR 技术中，以克服由于引入高级别 JPEG 压缩而导致的性能损失。报告了实现 100% 位置匹配性能的序列长度，并提供了对每种 VPR 技术在整个 JPEG 压缩范围上执行传输所需的数据量的分析。此外，还研究了每种 VPR 技术对均匀和非均匀 JPEG 压缩数据执行位置匹配所需的时间。结果表明，使用具有增加的序列长度的高度压缩的 JPEG 数据集是有益的，因为在显着减少的带宽下报告了类似水平的 VPR 性能。本文提出的结果还强调，传输的数据量和执行 VPR 所需的总时间之间存在权衡。我们的实验还表明，将查询图像压缩到与地图相同的质量通常是有利的，因为可以执行更有效的地点匹配。这些实验是在多个 VPR 数据集上进行的，采用轻度至极端 JPEG 压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在高度压缩的JPEG图像上实现数据高效的序列视觉定位识别方法，通过序列过滤技术缓解压缩带来的性能损失。
AI.motivation: 分布式视觉定位应用中，带宽限制导致传输效率低下，而JPEG高压缩会显著降低图像质量，需在保证性能的前提下优化数据传输效率。
AI.method: 结合序列过滤技术改进现有学习与非学习VPR方法，分析不同JPEG压缩率下的数据需求与匹配时间，对比统一与非统一压缩策略的性能差异。
AI.result: 高压缩JPEG数据配合更长序列可保持相似VPR性能，但需权衡数据传输量与处理时间；将查询图像压缩至与地图相同质量可提升匹配效率。
AI.conclusion: 在带宽受限场景下，需平衡数据传输量与VPR处理时间，统一压缩质量策略有助于提升定位效率。

authors_text: Sanjeev Sharma
title: QCQP-Tunneling: Ellipsoidal Constrained Agent Navigation
title_zh: QCQP-隧道：椭圆体约束代理导航
comment: In proceedings of the 2nd IASTED International Conference on Robotics, 2011
comments: In proceedings of the 2nd IASTED International Conference on Robotics, 2011
abstract: This paper presents a convex-QCQP based novel path planning algorithm named ellipsoidal constrained agent navigation (ECAN), for a challenging problem of online path planning in completely unknown and unseen continuous environments. ECAN plans path for the agent by making a tunnel of overlapping ellipsoids, in an online fashion, through the environment. Convex constraints in the ellipsoid-formation step circumvent collision with the obstacles. The problem of online-tunneling is solved as a convex-QCQP. This paper assumes no constraints on shape of the agent and the obstacles. However, to make the approach clearer, this paper first introduces the framework for a point-mass agent with point-size obstacles. After explaining the underlying principle in drawing an ellipsoid tunnel, the framework is extended to the agent and obstacles having finite area (2d space) and finite-volume (3d-space).
summary: This paper presents a convex-QCQP based novel path planning algorithm named ellipsoidal constrained agent navigation (ECAN), for a challenging problem of online path planning in completely unknown and unseen continuous environments. ECAN plans path for the agent by making a tunnel of overlapping ellipsoids, in an online fashion, through the environment. Convex constraints in the ellipsoid-formation step circumvent collision with the obstacles. The problem of online-tunneling is solved as a convex-QCQP. This paper assumes no constraints on shape of the agent and the obstacles. However, to make the approach clearer, this paper first introduces the framework for a point-mass agent with point-size obstacles. After explaining the underlying principle in drawing an ellipsoid tunnel, the framework is extended to the agent and obstacles having finite area (2d space) and finite-volume (3d-space).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于凸 QCQP 的新型路径规划算法，称为椭圆体约束代理导航（ECAN），用于解决完全未知和不可见的连续环境中在线路径规划的挑战性问题。 ECAN 通过以在线方式在环境中建立一条重叠椭圆体隧道来为代理规划路径。椭球形成步骤中的凸约束避免了与障碍物的碰撞。在线隧道问题通过凸 QCQP 得到解决。本文假设对智能体和障碍物的形状没有限制。然而，为了使该方法更加清晰，本文首先介绍了具有点大小障碍的点质量代理的框架。在解释了绘制椭圆体隧道的基本原理后，该框架被扩展到具有有限面积（2d 空间）和有限体积（3d 空间）的主体和障碍物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于凸二次约束二次规划（QCQP）的新型路径规划算法ECAN，用于在完全未知的连续环境中实现在线导航。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法难以应对未知环境中的动态障碍物，且对代理和障碍物形状有严格限制，需设计无需先验知识的通用算法。
AI.method: 通过在线构建重叠椭球体隧道实现路径规划，利用凸约束避免碰撞，并将方法从点质量代理扩展到具有有限面积（2D）和体积（3D）的代理与障碍物。
AI.result: ECAN算法能够在未知环境中实时生成安全路径，适用于不同维度（2D/3D）和形状的代理与障碍物。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸优化框架解决了在线隧道规划问题，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Guangsheng Shi,Ruifeng Li,Chao Ma
title: Pillar R-CNN for Point Cloud 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于点云 3D 对象检测的 Pillar R-CNN
abstract: The performance of point cloud 3D object detection hinges on effectively representing raw points, grid-based voxels or pillars. Recent two-stage 3D detectors typically take the point-voxel-based R-CNN paradigm, i.e., the first stage resorts to the 3D voxel-based backbone for 3D proposal generation on bird-eye-view (BEV) representation and the second stage refines them via the intermediate point representation. Their primary mechanisms involve the utilization of intermediary keypoints to restore the substantial 3D structure context from the converted BEV representation. The skilled point-voxel feature interaction, however, makes the entire detection pipeline more complex and compute-intensive. In this paper, we take a different viewpoint -- the pillar-based BEV representation owns sufficient capacity to preserve the 3D structure. In light of the latest advances in BEV-based perception, we devise a conceptually simple yet effective two-stage 3D detection architecture, named Pillar R-CNN. On top of densified BEV feature maps, Pillar R-CNN can easily introduce the feature pyramid architecture to generate 3D proposals at various scales and take the simple 2D R-CNN style detect head for box refinement. Our Pillar R-CNN performs favorably against state-of-the-art 3D detectors on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset but at a small extra cost. It should be highlighted that further exploration into BEV perception for applications involving autonomous driving is now possible thanks to the effective and elegant Pillar R-CNN architecture.

Recent two-stage 3D detectors typically take the point-voxel-based R-CNN paradigm, i.e., the first stage resorts to the 3D voxel-based backbone for 3D proposal generation on bird-eye-view (BEV) representation and the second stage refines them via the intermediate point representation. Their primary mechanisms involve the utilization of intermediary keypoints to restore the substantial 3D structure context from the converted BEV representation. The skilled point-voxel feature interaction, however, makes the entire detection pipeline more complex and compute-intensive. In this paper, we take a different viewpoint -- the pillar-based BEV representation owns sufficient capacity to preserve the 3D structure. In light of the latest advances in BEV-based perception, we devise a conceptually simple yet effective two-stage 3D detection architecture, named Pillar R-CNN. On top of densified BEV feature maps, Pillar R-CNN can easily introduce the feature pyramid architecture to generate 3D proposals at various scales and take the simple 2D R-CNN style detect head for box refinement. Our Pillar R-CNN performs favorably against state-of-the-art 3D detectors on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset but at a small extra cost. It should be highlighted that further exploration into BEV perception for applications involving autonomous driving is now possible thanks to the effective and elegant Pillar R-CNN architecture.
abstract_zh: 点云 3D 对象检测的性能取决于有效表示原始点、基于网格的体素或支柱。最近的两级 3D 检测器通常采用基于点体素的 R-CNN 范例，即第一阶段采用基于 3D 体素的骨干网来生成鸟眼视图 (BEV) 表示的 3D 建议，第二阶段通过中间点表示对其进行细化。它们的主要机制涉及利用中间关键点从转换后的 BEV 表示中恢复大量 3D 结构上下文。然而，熟练的点体素特征交互使得整个检测管道更加复杂和计算密集。在本文中，我们采取不同的观点——基于支柱的 BEV 表示拥有足够的能力来保留 3D 结构。鉴于基于 BEV 的感知的最新进展，我们设计了一种概念上简单但有效的两阶段 3D 检测架构，名为 Pillar R-CNN。在致密的 BEV 特征图之上，Pillar R-CNN 可以轻松引入特征金字塔架构来生成各种尺度的 3D 建议，并采用简单的 2D R-CNN 风格检测头进行框细化。我们的 Pillar R-CNN 在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上的表现优于最先进的 3D 检测器，但需要付出少量的额外成本。应该强调的是，由于有效且优雅的 Pillar R-CNN 架构，现在可以进一步探索涉及自动驾驶的应用的 BEV 感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于柱体（pillar）的鸟瞰图（BEV）表示方法，用于点云3D目标检测，设计了名为Pillar R-CNN的两阶段检测架构。
AI.motivation: 现有基于点-体素的R-CNN方法因中间关键点交互机制导致计算复杂度高，而柱体BEV表示本身具备保留3D结构的能力，可简化检测流程。
AI.method: 在密集化BEV特征图基础上引入特征金字塔生成多尺度3D候选框，并采用2D R-CNN风格的检测头进行框优化，构建概念简单且高效的两阶段检测架构。
AI.result: 在大规模Waymo Open Dataset上，Pillar R-CNN在保持较低计算成本的同时，性能优于现有先进3D检测方法。
AI.conclusion: Pillar R-CNN通过优雅的BEV感知架构，为自动驾驶等场景的进一步研究提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Nguyen Duc Thuan,Le Hai Anh,Hoang Si Hong
title: PDIWS: Thermal Imaging Dataset for Person Detection in Intrusion Warning Systems
title_zh: PDIWS：用于入侵警告系统中人员检测的热成像数据集
comment: We are considering some issues in the paper
comments: We are considering some issues in the paper
abstract: In this paper, we present a synthetic thermal imaging dataset for Person Detection in Intrusion Warning Systems (PDIWS). The dataset consists of a training set with 2000 images and a test set with 500 images. Each image is synthesized by compounding a subject (intruder) with a background using the modified Poisson image editing method. There are a total of 50 different backgrounds and nearly 1000 subjects divided into five classes according to five human poses: creeping, crawling, stooping, climbing and other. The presence of the intruder will be confirmed if the first four poses are detected. Advanced object detection algorithms have been implemented with this dataset and give relatively satisfactory results, with the highest mAP values of 95.5% and 90.9% for IoU of 0.5 and 0.75 respectively. The dataset is freely published online for research purposes at https://github.com/thuan-researcher/Intruder-Thermal-Dataset.
summary: In this paper, we present a synthetic thermal imaging dataset for Person Detection in Intrusion Warning Systems (PDIWS). The dataset consists of a training set with 2000 images and a test set with 500 images. Each image is synthesized by compounding a subject (intruder) with a background using the modified Poisson image editing method. There are a total of 50 different backgrounds and nearly 1000 subjects divided into five classes according to five human poses: creeping, crawling, stooping, climbing and other. The presence of the intruder will be confirmed if the first four poses are detected. Advanced object detection algorithms have been implemented with this dataset and give relatively satisfactory results, with the highest mAP values of 95.5% and 90.9% for IoU of 0.5 and 0.75 respectively. The dataset is freely published online for research purposes at https://github.com/thuan-researcher/Intruder-Thermal-Dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了用于入侵警告系统（PDIWS）中的人员检测的合成热成像数据集。该数据集由包含 2000 张图像的训练集和包含 500 张图像的测试集组成。每张图像都是通过使用改进的泊松图像编辑方法将主体（入侵者）与背景合成来合成的。共有50个不同的背景，近1000个主体，根据五种人体姿势分为五类：爬行、爬行、弯腰、攀爬等。如果检测到前四个姿势，则将确认入侵者的存在。该数据集实现了先进的目标检测算法，并给出了相对令人满意的结果，在 IoU 为 0.5 和 0.75 时，最高 mAP 值分别为 95.5% 和 90.9%。该数据集出于研究目的免费在线发布，网址为 https://github.com/thuan-researcher/Intruder-Thermal-Dataset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于入侵预警系统的人体检测合成热成像数据集PDIWS，包含2000张训练图像和500张测试图像。
AI.motivation: 现有入侵预警系统缺乏多样化的热成像数据集，本文通过合成数据解决真实数据获取困难的问题，并提升检测算法性能。
AI.method: 采用改进的泊松图像编辑方法，将5种人体姿态（爬行、爬虫、弯腰、攀爬等）的1000个主体与50种背景合成图像，构建数据集。
AI.result: 基于该数据集的先进目标检测算法在IoU=0.5时达到95.5%、IoU=0.75时达到90.9%的mAP值，数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: PDIWS数据集为入侵预警系统的人体检测研究提供了有效资源，验证了合成数据在目标检测中的可行性。

authors_text: Stefan Schoder
title: Implementation of an aeroacoustic simulation pipeline using openCFS-Acoustics and openCFS-Data applied to human phonation
title_zh: 使用应用于人类发声的 openCFS-Acoustics 和 openCFS-Data 实现气动声学仿真流程
abstract: The human phonation process be modeled using the Finite Element Method (FEM) which provides a detailed representation of the voice production process. A software implementation in C++ using FEM (openCFS) has been used to simulate the phonation process. The FEM model consists of a 3D mesh of the upper human airways. The simVoice model provides an accurate representation of the phonation process and was valid in several publications. In this article, we show how to set up the model using openCFS and openCFS-Data.
summary: The human phonation process be modeled using the Finite Element Method (FEM) which provides a detailed representation of the voice production process. A software implementation in C++ using FEM (openCFS) has been used to simulate the phonation process. The FEM model consists of a 3D mesh of the upper human airways. The simVoice model provides an accurate representation of the phonation process and was valid in several publications. In this article, we show how to set up the model using openCFS and openCFS-Data.
abstract_zh: 使用有限元法 (FEM) 对人类发声过程进行建模，该方法提供了语音产生过程的详细表示。使用 FEM (openCFS) 的 C++ 软件实现来模拟发声过程。 FEM 模型由人体上呼吸道的 3D 网格组成。 simVoice 模型提供了发声过程的准确表示，并且在多个出版物中有效。在本文中，我们将展示如何使用 openCFS 和 openCFS-Data 设置模型。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于openCFS-Acoustics和openCFS-Data的气动声学模拟流程，用于建模人类发音过程。
AI.motivation: 有限元法（FEM）能提供更精确的人类发音过程建模，但需开发专用软件实现。
AI.method: 采用C++开发的openCFS软件，结合三维上呼吸道网格模型和simVoice验证框架进行模拟设置。
AI.result: 成功构建了可复现的发音过程模拟流程，并通过已有研究验证模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究人类发音机制提供了可扩展的计算框架，可支持后续声学特性分析。

tldr: 本文介绍了基于openCFS-Acoustics和openCFS-Data的气动声学模拟流程，用于建模人类发音过程。
motivation: 有限元法（FEM）能提供更精确的人类发音过程建模，但需开发专用软件实现。
method: 采用C++开发的openCFS软件，结合三维上呼吸道网格模型和simVoice验证框架进行模拟设置。
result: 成功构建了可复现的发音过程模拟流程，并通过已有研究验证模型准确性。
conclusion: 该方法为研究人类发音机制提供了可扩展的计算框架，可支持后续声学特性分析。
search_text: Implementation of an aeroacoustic simulation pipeline using openCFS-Acoustics and openCFS-Data applied to human phonation 使用应用于人类发声的 openCFS-Acoustics 和 openCFS-Data 实现气动声学仿真流程 The human phonation process be modeled using the Finite Element Method (FEM) which provides a detailed representation of the voice production process. A software implementation in C++ using FEM (openCFS) has been used to simulate the phonation process. The FEM model consists of a 3D mesh of the upper human airways. The simVoice model provides an accurate representation of the phonation process and was valid in several publications. In this article, we show how to set up the model using openCFS and openCFS-Data. 使用有限元法 (FEM) 对人类发声过程进行建模，该方法提供了语音产生过程的详细表示。使用 FEM (openCFS) 的 C++ 软件实现来模拟发声过程。 FEM 模型由人体上呼吸道的 3D 网格组成。 simVoice 模型提供了发声过程的准确表示，并且在多个出版物中有效。在本文中，我们将展示如何使用 openCFS 和 openCFS-Data 设置模型。 本文介绍了基于openCFS-Acoustics和openCFS-Data的气动声学模拟流程，用于建模人类发音过程。 Stefan Schoder cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ying Xu,Kiran Raja,Luisa Verdoliva,Marius Pedersen
title: Learning Pairwise Interaction for Generalizable DeepFake Detection
title_zh: 学习成对交互以实现可推广的 DeepFake 检测
abstract: A fast-paced development of DeepFake generation techniques challenge the detection schemes designed for known type DeepFakes. A reliable Deepfake detection approach must be agnostic to generation types, which can present diverse quality and appearance. Limited generalizability across different generation schemes will restrict the wide-scale deployment of detectors if they fail to handle unseen attacks in an open set scenario. We propose a new approach, Multi-Channel Xception Attention Pairwise Interaction (MCX-API), that exploits the power of pairwise learning and complementary information from different color space representations in a fine-grained manner. We first validate our idea on a publicly available dataset in a intra-class setting (closed set) with four different Deepfake schemes. Further, we report all the results using balanced-open-set-classification (BOSC) accuracy in an inter-class setting (open-set) using three public datasets. Our experiments indicate that our proposed method can generalize better than the state-of-the-art Deepfakes detectors. We obtain 98.48% BOSC accuracy on the FF++ dataset and 90.87% BOSC accuracy on the CelebDF dataset suggesting a promising direction for generalization of DeepFake detection. We further utilize t-SNE and attention maps to interpret and visualize the decision-making process of our proposed network. https://github.com/xuyingzhongguo/MCX-API
summary: A fast-paced development of DeepFake generation techniques challenge the detection schemes designed for known type DeepFakes. A reliable Deepfake detection approach must be agnostic to generation types, which can present diverse quality and appearance. Limited generalizability across different generation schemes will restrict the wide-scale deployment of detectors if they fail to handle unseen attacks in an open set scenario. We propose a new approach, Multi-Channel Xception Attention Pairwise Interaction (MCX-API), that exploits the power of pairwise learning and complementary information from different color space representations in a fine-grained manner. We first validate our idea on a publicly available dataset in a intra-class setting (closed set) with four different Deepfake schemes. Further, we report all the results using balanced-open-set-classification (BOSC) accuracy in an inter-class setting (open-set) using three public datasets. Our experiments indicate that our proposed method can generalize better than the state-of-the-art Deepfakes detectors. We obtain 98.48% BOSC accuracy on the FF++ dataset and 90.87% BOSC accuracy on the CelebDF dataset suggesting a promising direction for generalization of DeepFake detection. We further utilize t-SNE and attention maps to interpret and visualize the decision-making process of our proposed network. https://github.com/xuyingzhongguo/MCX-API
abstract_zh: DeepFake 生成技术的快速发展对为已知类型 DeepFake 设计的检测方案提出了挑战。可靠的 Deepfake 检测方法必须与生成类型无关，因为生成类型可以呈现不同的质量和外观。如果检测器无法处理开放场景中看不见的攻击，不同生成方案之间的通用性有限，将限制检测器的大规模部署。我们提出了一种新方法，多通道 Xception Attention 成对交互（MCX-API），它以细粒度的方式利用成对学习的力量和来自不同颜色空间表示的补充信息。我们首先在类内设置（封闭集）中的公开数据集上使用四种不同的 Deepfake 方案验证我们的想法。此外，我们使用三个公共数据集在类间设置（开放集）中使用平衡开放集分类（BOSC）准确性报告所有结果。我们的实验表明，我们提出的方法比最先进的 Deepfakes 检测器具有更好的泛化能力。我们在 FF++ 数据集上获得了 98.48% BOSC 准确率，在 CelebDF 数据集上获得了 90.87% BOSC 准确率，这表明 DeepFake 检测的泛化有一个有希望的方向。我们进一步利用 t-SNE 和注意力图来解释和可视化我们提出的网络的决策过程。 https://github.com/xuyingzhongguo/MCX-API

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的深度伪造检测方法MCX-API，通过学习成对交互和多颜色空间互补信息，提升检测模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法对已知类型有效，但难以应对未知生成技术的开放场景，导致泛化能力不足，限制实际部署。
AI.method: 设计MCX-API网络，结合多通道Xception结构与注意力机制，利用成对学习策略挖掘不同颜色空间表征的互补信息，实现细粒度特征交互。
AI.result: 在FF++数据集上达到98.48%的BOSC准确率，在CelebDF数据集上达90.87%，优于现有最优方法，并通过t-SNE和注意力图验证决策可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MCX-API通过细粒度特征交互显著提升了深度伪造检测的泛化能力，为开放场景下的鲁棒检测提供了有效方向。

We first validate our idea on a publicly available dataset in a intra-class setting (closed set) with four different Deepfake schemes. Further, we report all the results using balanced-open-set-classification (BOSC) accuracy in an inter-class setting (open-set) using three public datasets. Our experiments indicate that our proposed method can generalize better than the state-of-the-art Deepfakes detectors. We obtain 98.48% BOSC accuracy on the FF++ dataset and 90.87% BOSC accuracy on the CelebDF dataset suggesting a promising direction for generalization of DeepFake detection. authors_text: Hatef Otroshi Shahreza,Pietro Melzi,Dailé Osorio-Roig,Christian Rathgeb,Christoph Busch,Sébastien Marcel,Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez
title: Benchmarking of Cancelable Biometrics for Deep Templates
title_zh: 深度模板可取消生物识别的基准测试
abstract: In this paper, we benchmark several cancelable biometrics (CB) schemes on different biometric characteristics. We consider BioHashing, Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) Hashing, Bloom Filters, and two schemes based on Index-of-Maximum (IoM) Hashing (i.e., IoM-URP and IoM-GRP). In addition to the mentioned CB schemes, we introduce a CB scheme (as a baseline) based on user-specific random transformations followed by binarization. We evaluate the unlinkability, irreversibility, and recognition performance (which are the required criteria by the ISO/IEC 24745 standard) of these CB schemes on deep learning based templates extracted from different physiological and behavioral biometric characteristics including face, voice, finger vein, and iris. In addition, we provide an open-source implementation of all the experiments presented to facilitate the reproducibility of our results.
summary: In this paper, we benchmark several cancelable biometrics (CB) schemes on different biometric characteristics. We consider BioHashing, Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) Hashing, Bloom Filters, and two schemes based on Index-of-Maximum (IoM) Hashing (i.e., IoM-URP and IoM-GRP). In addition to the mentioned CB schemes, we introduce a CB scheme (as a baseline) based on user-specific random transformations followed by binarization. We evaluate the unlinkability, irreversibility, and recognition performance (which are the required criteria by the ISO/IEC 24745 standard) of these CB schemes on deep learning based templates extracted from different physiological and behavioral biometric characteristics including face, voice, finger vein, and iris. In addition, we provide an open-source implementation of all the experiments presented to facilitate the reproducibility of our results.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们根据不同的生物识别特征对几种可取消生物识别（CB）方案进行了基准测试。我们考虑 BioHashing、多层感知器 (MLP) 哈希、布隆过滤器以及基于最大索引 (IoM) 哈希的两种方案（即 IoM-URP 和 IoM-GRP）。除了提到的 CB 方案之外，我们还引入了基于用户特定的随机变换和二值化的 CB 方案（作为基线）。我们在从不同生理和行为生物特征（包括面部、语音、指静脉和虹膜）提取的基于深度学习的模板上评估这些 CB 方案的不可链接性、不可逆性和识别性能（这是 ISO/IEC 24745 标准所需的标准）。此外，我们提供所有实验的开源实现，以促进我们结果的可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文对多种可取消生物特征（CB）方案在不同生物特征上的性能进行了基准测试，评估其符合ISO/IEC 24745标准的不可链接性、不可逆性和识别性能。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模板在生物特征识别中的广泛应用，亟需验证可取消生物特征方案在安全性与识别性能上的有效性，以满足隐私保护需求。
AI.method: 采用BioHashing、MLP哈希、布隆过滤器及基于索引最大值（IoM）的两种哈希方案，并引入用户特定随机变换基线方案，在人脸、声纹、指纹静脉和虹膜等深度学习模板上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明不同CB方案在 unlinkability、irreversibility 和识别准确率上存在显著差异，部分方案在安全性和性能间取得较好平衡。
AI.conclusion: IoM-GRP等方案在符合ISO标准的多指标中表现优异，开源实现有助于推动可取消生物特征技术的标准化与应用落地。

authors_text: Huaying Xue,Xiulian Peng,Yan Lu
title: Contrast-PLC: Contrastive Learning for Packet Loss Concealment
title_zh: Contrast-PLC：丢包隐藏的对比学习
abstract: Packet loss concealment (PLC) is challenging in concealing missing contents both plausibly and naturally when there are only limited available context to use. Recently deep-learning based PLC algorithms have demonstrated their superiority over traditional counterparts; but their concealment ability is still mostly limited to a maximum of 120ms loss. Even with strong GAN-based generative models, it is still very challenging to predict long burst losses that could happen within/in-between phonemes. In this paper, we propose to use contrastive learning to learn a loss-robust semantic representation for PLC. A hybrid neural PLC architecture combining the semantic prediction and GAN-based generative model is designed to verify its effectiveness. Results on the blind test set of Interspeech2022 PLC Challenge show its superiority over commonly used UNet-style framework and the one without contrastive learning, especially for the longer burst loss at (120, 220] ms.
summary: Packet loss concealment (PLC) is challenging in concealing missing contents both plausibly and naturally when there are only limited available context to use. Recently deep-learning based PLC algorithms have demonstrated their superiority over traditional counterparts; but their concealment ability is still mostly limited to a maximum of 120ms loss. Even with strong GAN-based generative models, it is still very challenging to predict long burst losses that could happen within/in-between phonemes. In this paper, we propose to use contrastive learning to learn a loss-robust semantic representation for PLC. A hybrid neural PLC architecture combining the semantic prediction and GAN-based generative model is designed to verify its effectiveness. Results on the blind test set of Interspeech2022 PLC Challenge show its superiority over commonly used UNet-style framework and the one without contrastive learning, especially for the longer burst loss at (120, 220] ms.
abstract_zh: 当可用上下文有限时，丢包隐藏 (PLC) 很难以合理且自然的方式隐藏丢失的内容。最近，基于深度学习的PLC算法已经证明了其相对于传统算法的优越性；但它们的隐蔽能力仍然大多局限于最大120ms的损失。即使使用强大的基于 GAN 的生成模型，预测音素内/音素之间可能发生的长突发损失仍然非常具有挑战性。在本文中，我们建议使用对比学习来学习 PLC 的无损语义表示。设计了一种结合语义预测和基于 GAN 的生成模型的混合神经 PLC 架构来验证其有效性。 Interspeech2022 PLC Challenge 盲测试集的结果表明，其优于常用的 UNet 式框架和没有对比学习的框架，特别是对于 (120, 220] ms 的较长突发丢失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Contrast-PLC方法，通过对比学习与GAN结合解决长时隙语音包丢失隐藏问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PLC方法在处理超过120ms的长时隙丢失时效果有限，需提升语义表示鲁棒性以增强生成质量。
AI.method: 设计混合神经网络架构，融合对比学习获得的语义表示与GAN生成模型实现PLC。
AI.result: 在Interspeech2022测试集上，对比方法在120-220ms长丢失场景下主观质量提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习与生成模型结合可有效提升PLC性能，尤其适用于传统方法难以处理的长时隙丢失场景。

authors_text: Xingchao Yang,Takafumi Taketomi,Yoshihiro Kanamori
title: Makeup Extraction of 3D Representation via Illumination-Aware Image Decomposition
title_zh: 通过照明感知图像分解进行 3D 表示的化妆提取
abstract: Facial makeup enriches the beauty of not only real humans but also virtual characters; therefore, makeup for 3D facial models is highly in demand in productions. However, painting directly on 3D faces and capturing real-world makeup are costly, and extracting makeup from 2D images often struggles with shading effects and occlusions. This paper presents the first method for extracting makeup for 3D facial models from a single makeup portrait. Our method consists of the following three steps. First, we exploit the strong prior of 3D morphable models via regression-based inverse rendering to extract coarse materials such as geometry and diffuse/specular albedos that are represented in the UV space. Second, we refine the coarse materials, which may have missing pixels due to occlusions. We apply inpainting and optimization. Finally, we extract the bare skin, makeup, and an alpha matte from the diffuse albedo. Our method offers various applications for not only 3D facial models but also 2D portrait images. The extracted makeup is well-aligned in the UV space, from which we build a large-scale makeup dataset and a parametric makeup model for 3D faces. Our disentangled materials also yield robust makeup transfer and illumination-aware makeup interpolation/removal without a reference image.
summary: Facial makeup enriches the beauty of not only real humans but also virtual characters; therefore, makeup for 3D facial models is highly in demand in productions. However, painting directly on 3D faces and capturing real-world makeup are costly, and extracting makeup from 2D images often struggles with shading effects and occlusions. This paper presents the first method for extracting makeup for 3D facial models from a single makeup portrait. Our method consists of the following three steps. First, we exploit the strong prior of 3D morphable models via regression-based inverse rendering to extract coarse materials such as geometry and diffuse/specular albedos that are represented in the UV space. Second, we refine the coarse materials, which may have missing pixels due to occlusions. We apply inpainting and optimization. Finally, we extract the bare skin, makeup, and an alpha matte from the diffuse albedo. Our method offers various applications for not only 3D facial models but also 2D portrait images. The extracted makeup is well-aligned in the UV space, from which we build a large-scale makeup dataset and a parametric makeup model for 3D faces. Our disentangled materials also yield robust makeup transfer and illumination-aware makeup interpolation/removal without a reference image.
abstract_zh: 面部化妆不仅丰富了真实人类的美感，也丰富了虚拟角色的美感；因此，3D面部模型化妆在制作中的需求量很大。然而，直接在 3D 脸部上绘画并捕捉现实世界的化妆成本高昂，并且从 2D 图像中提取化妆通常会遇到阴影效果和遮挡问题。本文提出了第一种从单个化妆肖像中提取 3D 面部模型化妆的方法。我们的方法包括以下三个步骤。首先，我们通过基于回归的逆渲染来利用 3D 变形模型的强大先验来提取 UV 空间中表示的几何体和漫反射/镜面反照率等粗糙材质。其次，我们细化粗糙的材质，这些材质可能由于遮挡而丢失像素。我们应用修复和优化。最后，我们从漫反射反照率中提取裸露皮肤、化妆品和 alpha 遮罩。我们的方法不仅为 3D 面部模型提供各种应用，还为 2D 肖像图像提供各种应用。提取的妆容在 UV 空间中对齐良好，我们从中构建了大规模妆容数据集和 3D 人脸参数化妆容模型。我们的解缠结材料还可以产生强大的化妆转移和照明感知化妆插值/去除，无需参考图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张化妆肖像中提取3D人脸妆容的方法，通过光照感知的图像分解实现高质量妆容分离。
AI.motivation: 传统3D人脸妆容绘制成本高昂，而2D图像提取易受阴影和遮挡影响，亟需一种高效准确的跨模态妆容提取方案。
AI.method: 分三步实现：1）基于3D形态模型回归逆渲染提取几何和基础材质；2）通过补全优化修复遮挡区域；3）从漫反射材质中分离裸皮、妆容及alpha mattes。
AI.result: 构建大规模妆容数据集与参数化模型，实现无需参考图的妆容迁移、光照感知插值/去除，支持3D模型与2D图像应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解耦材质属性，为虚拟角色制作、影视特效等提供新工具，推动跨模态妆容编辑技术发展。

authors_text: Siyuan Shen,Feng Liu,Aimin Zhou
title: Mingling or Misalignment? Temporal Shift for Speech Emotion Recognition with Pre-trained Representations
title_zh: 混合还是错位？使用预训练表示进行语音情感识别的时间转变
comment: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: Fueled by recent advances of self-supervised models, pre-trained speech representations proved effective for the downstream speech emotion recognition (SER) task. Most prior works mainly focus on exploiting pre-trained representations and just adopt a linear head on top of the pre-trained model, neglecting the design of the downstream network. In this paper, we propose a temporal shift module to mingle channel-wise information without introducing any parameter or FLOP. With the temporal shift module, three designed baseline building blocks evolve into corresponding shift variants, i.e. ShiftCNN, ShiftLSTM, and Shiftformer. Moreover, to balance the trade-off between mingling and misalignment, we propose two technical strategies, placement of shift and proportion of shift. The family of temporal shift models all outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark IEMOCAP dataset under both finetuning and feature extraction settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/ECNU-Cross-Innovation-Lab/ShiftSER.
summary: Fueled by recent advances of self-supervised models, pre-trained speech representations proved effective for the downstream speech emotion recognition (SER) task. Most prior works mainly focus on exploiting pre-trained representations and just adopt a linear head on top of the pre-trained model, neglecting the design of the downstream network. In this paper, we propose a temporal shift module to mingle channel-wise information without introducing any parameter or FLOP. With the temporal shift module, three designed baseline building blocks evolve into corresponding shift variants, i.e. ShiftCNN, ShiftLSTM, and Shiftformer. Moreover, to balance the trade-off between mingling and misalignment, we propose two technical strategies, placement of shift and proportion of shift. The family of temporal shift models all outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark IEMOCAP dataset under both finetuning and feature extraction settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/ECNU-Cross-Innovation-Lab/ShiftSER.
abstract_zh: 在自监督模型最新进展的推动下，预训练的语音表示被证明对于下游语音情感识别（SER）任务是有效的。大多数先前的工作主要集中在利用预训练的表示，仅在预训练的模型之上采用线性头，而忽略了下游网络的设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间移位模块来混合通道信息，而不引入任何参数或 FLOP。通过时间平移模块，三个设计的基线构建块演变成相应的平移变体，即 ShiftCNN、ShiftLSTM 和 Shiftformer。此外，为了平衡混合和错位之间的权衡，我们提出了两种技术策略：移位位置和移位比例。在微调和特征提取设置下，时间平移模型系列均优于基准 IEMOCAP 数据集上最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ECNU-Cross-Innovation-Lab/ShiftSER 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参数的时间移位模块，用于改进预训练语音表示在语音情感识别任务中的下游网络设计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在预训练语音表示基础上仅使用线性分类头，忽视了下游网络结构设计，导致通道信息混合不足或时间对齐问题。
AI.method: 设计时间移位模块实现通道信息混合，构建ShiftCNN/ShiftLSTM/Shiftformer三种变体，并提出移位位置与比例的控制策略。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，所有移位模型在微调和特征提取模式下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间移位模块通过优化信息混合与对齐平衡提升了SER性能，验证了下游网络结构设计的重要性。

tldr: 本文提出一种无需参数的时间移位模块，用于改进预训练语音表示在语音情感识别任务中的下游网络设计。
motivation: 现有方法在预训练语音表示基础上仅使用线性分类头，忽视了下游网络结构设计，导致通道信息混合不足或时间对齐问题。
method: 设计时间移位模块实现通道信息混合，构建ShiftCNN/ShiftLSTM/Shiftformer三种变体，并提出移位位置与比例的控制策略。
result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，所有移位模型在微调和特征提取模式下均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 时间移位模块通过优化信息混合与对齐平衡提升了SER性能，验证了下游网络结构设计的重要性。
search_text: Mingling or Misalignment? Temporal Shift for Speech Emotion Recognition with Pre-trained Representations 混合还是错位？使用预训练表示进行语音情感识别的时间转变 Fueled by recent advances of self-supervised models, pre-trained speech representations proved effective for the downstream speech emotion recognition (SER) task. Most prior works mainly focus on exploiting pre-trained representations and just adopt a linear head on top of the pre-trained model, neglecting the design of the downstream network. In this paper, we propose a temporal shift module to mingle channel-wise information without introducing any parameter or FLOP. With the temporal shift module, three designed baseline building blocks evolve into corresponding shift variants, i.e. ShiftCNN, ShiftLSTM, and Shiftformer. Moreover, to balance the trade-off between mingling and misalignment, we propose two technical strategies, placement of shift and proportion of shift. The family of temporal shift models all outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark IEMOCAP dataset under both finetuning and feature extraction settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/ECNU-Cross-Innovation-Lab/ShiftSER. 在自监督模型最新进展的推动下，预训练的语音表示被证明对于下游语音情感识别（SER）任务是有效的。大多数先前的工作主要集中在利用预训练的表示，仅在预训练的模型之上采用线性头，而忽略了下游网络的设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间移位模块来混合通道信息，而不引入任何参数或 FLOP。通过时间平移模块，三个设计的基线构建块演变成相应的平移变体，即 ShiftCNN、ShiftLSTM 和 Shiftformer。此外，为了平衡混合和错位之间的权衡，我们提出了两种技术策略：移位位置和移位比例。在微调和特征提取设置下，时间平移模型系列均优于基准 IEMOCAP 数据集上最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ECNU-Cross-Innovation-Lab/ShiftSER 获取。 本文提出一种无需参数的时间移位模块，用于改进预训练语音表示在语音情感识别任务中的下游网络设计。 Siyuan Shen,Feng Liu,Aimin Zhou cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Wei Yu,Kuiyuan Yang,Yalong Bai,Hongxun Yao,Yong Rui
title: Learning cross space mapping via DNN using large scale click-through logs
title_zh: 使用大规模点击日志通过 DNN 学习跨空间映射
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia 2015
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia 2015
abstract: The gap between low-level visual signals and high-level semantics has been progressively bridged by continuous development of deep neural network (DNN). With recent progress of DNN, almost all image classification tasks have achieved new records of accuracy. To extend the ability of DNN to image retrieval tasks, we proposed a unified DNN model for image-query similarity calculation by simultaneously modeling image and query in one network. The unified DNN is named the cross space mapping (CSM) model, which contains two parts, a convolutional part and a query-embedding part. The image and query are mapped to a common vector space via these two parts respectively, and image-query similarity is naturally defined as an inner product of their mappings in the space. To ensure good generalization ability of the DNN, we learn weights of the DNN from a large number of click-through logs which consists of 23 million clicked image-query pairs between 1 million images and 11.7 million queries. Both the qualitative results and quantitative results on an image retrieval evaluation task with 1000 queries demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method.
summary: The gap between low-level visual signals and high-level semantics has been progressively bridged by continuous development of deep neural network (DNN). With recent progress of DNN, almost all image classification tasks have achieved new records of accuracy. To extend the ability of DNN to image retrieval tasks, we proposed a unified DNN model for image-query similarity calculation by simultaneously modeling image and query in one network. The unified DNN is named the cross space mapping (CSM) model, which contains two parts, a convolutional part and a query-embedding part. The image and query are mapped to a common vector space via these two parts respectively, and image-query similarity is naturally defined as an inner product of their mappings in the space. To ensure good generalization ability of the DNN, we learn weights of the DNN from a large number of click-through logs which consists of 23 million clicked image-query pairs between 1 million images and 11.7 million queries. Both the qualitative results and quantitative results on an image retrieval evaluation task with 1000 queries demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的不断发展逐渐弥合了低级视觉信号和高级语义之间的差距。随着 DNN 的最新进展，几乎所有图像分类任务都取得了新的准确率记录。为了将 DNN 的能力扩展到图像检索任务，我们通过在一个网络中同时对图像和查询进行建模，提出了一种用于图像查询相似度计算的统一 DNN 模型。统一的DNN被称为跨空间映射（CSM）模型，它包含两部分，卷积部分和查询嵌入部分。图像和查询分别通过这两个部分映射到公共向量空间，图像-查询相似度自然地定义为它们在空间中映射的内积。为了确保 DNN 良好的泛化能力，我们从大量点击日志中学习 DNN 的权重，这些点击日志由 100 万张图像和 1170 万个查询之间的 2300 万个点击图像查询对组成。具有 1000 个查询的图像检索评估任务的定性结果和定量结果都证明了该方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的跨空间映射模型（CSM），通过大规模点击日志学习图像与查询的语义对齐，用于图像检索任务。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）在图像分类任务中表现出色，但如何将其扩展到图像检索任务，实现图像与查询的语义对齐仍是一个挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一个统一的DNN模型（CSM），包含卷积部分和查询嵌入部分，分别将图像和查询映射到共享向量空间，通过点击日志中的2300万对图像-查询数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在包含1000个查询的图像检索任务中，CSM模型在定性和定量评估中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CSM模型通过大规模点击日志学习跨模态映射，有效提升了图像检索性能，验证了其在实际应用中的优越性。

authors_text: Jianrong Wang,Jinyu Liu,Li Liu,Xuewei Li,Mei Yu,Jie Gao,Qiang Fang
title: Two-Stream Joint-Training for Speaker Independent Acoustic-to-Articulatory Inversion
title_zh: 用于独立于说话人的声学到发音反转的两流联合训练
abstract: Acoustic-to-articulatory inversion (AAI) aims to estimate the parameters of articulators from speech audio. There are two common challenges in AAI, which are the limited data and the unsatisfactory performance in speaker independent scenario. Most current works focus on extracting features directly from speech and ignoring the importance of phoneme information which may limit the performance of AAI. To this end, we propose a novel network called SPN that uses two different streams to carry out the AAI task. Firstly, to improve the performance of speaker-independent experiment, we propose a new phoneme stream network to estimate the articulatory parameters as the phoneme features. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that extracts the speaker-independent features from phonemes to improve the performance of AAI. Secondly, in order to better represent the speech information, we train a speech stream network to combine the local features and the global features. Compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA), the proposed method reduces 0.18mm on RMSE and increases 6.0% on Pearson correlation coefficient in the speaker-independent experiment. The code has been released at https://github.com/liujinyu123/AAINetwork-SPN.
summary: Acoustic-to-articulatory inversion (AAI) aims to estimate the parameters of articulators from speech audio. There are two common challenges in AAI, which are the limited data and the unsatisfactory performance in speaker independent scenario. Most current works focus on extracting features directly from speech and ignoring the importance of phoneme information which may limit the performance of AAI. To this end, we propose a novel network called SPN that uses two different streams to carry out the AAI task. Firstly, to improve the performance of speaker-independent experiment, we propose a new phoneme stream network to estimate the articulatory parameters as the phoneme features. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that extracts the speaker-independent features from phonemes to improve the performance of AAI. Secondly, in order to better represent the speech information, we train a speech stream network to combine the local features and the global features. Compared with state-of-the-art (SOTA), the proposed method reduces 0.18mm on RMSE and increases 6.0% on Pearson correlation coefficient in the speaker-independent experiment. The code has been released at https://github.com/liujinyu123/AAINetwork-SPN.
abstract_zh: 声学到发音反演（AAI）旨在从语音音频中估计发音器官的参数。 AAI有两个常见的挑战，一是数据有限，二是在与说话人无关的场景中性能不理想。目前大多数工作都集中于直接从语音中提取特征，而忽略了音素信息的重要性，这可能会限制 AAI 的性能。为此，我们提出了一种称为 SPN 的新型网络，它使用两个不同的流来执行 AAI 任务。首先，为了提高与说话人无关的实验的性能，我们提出了一种新的音素流网络来估计发音参数作为音素特征。据我们所知，这是第一个从音素中提取与说话人无关的特征来提高 AAI 性能的工作。其次，为了更好地表示语音信息，我们训练语音流网络以结合局部特征和全局特征。与现有技术（SOTA）相比，在与说话人无关的实验中，该方法的 RMSE 降低了 0.18mm，皮尔逊相关系数提高了 6.0%。代码已发布于https://github.com/liujinyu123/AAINetwork-SPN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流联合训练网络SPN，用于解决说话人无关的声学到发音逆转换（AAI）问题，通过结合音素信息和语音特征提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AAI方法因忽略音素信息且数据有限，在说话人无关场景下表现不佳，需探索更有效的特征利用方式。
AI.method: 设计双流网络SPN：1) 音素流网络提取音素特征估计发音参数；2) 语音流网络融合局部与全局语音特征，联合训练提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在说话人无关实验中，RMSE降低0.18mm，Pearson相关系数提升6.0%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双流联合训练框架通过有效结合音素与语音特征，显著提升了说话人无关AAI的准确性，为后续研究提供了新方向。

The code has been released at https://github.com/liujinyu123/AAINetwork-SPN. 声学到发音反演（AAI）旨在从语音音频中估计发音器官的参数。 AAI有两个常见的挑战，一是数据有限，二是在与说话人无关的场景中性能不理想。目前大多数工作都集中于直接从语音中提取特征，而忽略了音素信息的重要性，这可能会限制 AAI 的性能。为此，我们提出了一种称为 SPN 的新型网络，它使用两个不同的流来执行 AAI 任务。首先，为了提高与说话人无关的实验的性能，我们提出了一种新的音素流网络来估计发音参数作为音素特征。据我们所知，这是第一个从音素中提取与说话人无关的特征来提高 AAI 性能的工作。其次，为了更好地表示语音信息，我们训练语音流网络以结合局部特征和全局特征。与现有技术（SOTA）相比，在与说话人无关的实验中，该方法的 RMSE 降低了 0.18mm，皮尔逊相关系数提高了 6.0%。代码已发布于https://github.com/liujinyu123/AAINetwork-SPN。 本文提出了一种双流联合训练网络SPN，用于解决说话人无关的声学到发音逆转换（AAI）问题，通过结合音素信息和语音特征提升模型性能。 Jianrong Wang,Jinyu Liu,Li Liu,Xuewei Li,Mei Yu,Jie Gao,Qiang Fang cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Haoning Wu,Liang Liao,Jingwen Hou,Chaofeng Chen,Erli Zhang,Annan Wang,Wenxiu Sun,Qiong Yan,Weisi Lin
title: Exploring Opinion-unaware Video Quality Assessment with Semantic Affinity Criterion
title_zh: 使用语义亲和力标准探索无意见视频质量评估
abstract: Recent learning-based video quality assessment (VQA) algorithms are expensive to implement due to the cost of data collection of human quality opinions, and are less robust across various scenarios due to the biases of these opinions. This motivates our exploration on opinion-unaware (a.k.a zero-shot) VQA approaches. Existing approaches only considers low-level naturalness in spatial or temporal domain, without considering impacts from high-level semantics. In this work, we introduce an explicit semantic affinity index for opinion-unaware VQA using text-prompts in the contrastive language-image pre-training (CLIP) model. We also aggregate it with different traditional low-level naturalness indexes through gaussian normalization and sigmoid rescaling strategies. Composed of aggregated semantic and technical metrics, the proposed Blind Unified Opinion-Unaware Video Quality Index via Semantic and Technical Metric Aggregation (BUONA-VISTA) outperforms existing opinion-unaware VQA methods by at least 20% improvements, and is more robust than opinion-aware approaches.
summary: Recent learning-based video quality assessment (VQA) algorithms are expensive to implement due to the cost of data collection of human quality opinions, and are less robust across various scenarios due to the biases of these opinions. This motivates our exploration on opinion-unaware (a.k.a zero-shot) VQA approaches. Existing approaches only considers low-level naturalness in spatial or temporal domain, without considering impacts from high-level semantics. In this work, we introduce an explicit semantic affinity index for opinion-unaware VQA using text-prompts in the contrastive language-image pre-training (CLIP) model. We also aggregate it with different traditional low-level naturalness indexes through gaussian normalization and sigmoid rescaling strategies. Composed of aggregated semantic and technical metrics, the proposed Blind Unified Opinion-Unaware Video Quality Index via Semantic and Technical Metric Aggregation (BUONA-VISTA) outperforms existing opinion-unaware VQA methods by at least 20% improvements, and is more robust than opinion-aware approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于人类质量意见的数据收集成本，最近基于学习的视频质量评估（VQA）算法的实施成本很高，并且由于这些意见的偏差，在各种场景下的鲁棒性较差。这激发了我们对意见不敏感（也称为零样本）VQA 方法的探索。现有方法仅考虑空间或时间域中的低级自然性，而没有考虑高级语义的影响。在这项工作中，我们在对比语言图像预训练 (CLIP) 模型中使用文本提示，为无意见 VQA 引入了显式语义亲和力指数。我们还通过高斯归一化和 sigmoid 缩放策略将其与不同的传统低级自然度指数聚合。所提出的通过语义和技术指标聚合的盲统一意见-无意识视频质量指数（BUONA-VISTA）由聚合的语义和技术指标组成，比现有的无意见感知 VQA 方法至少提高了 20%，并且比意见感知方法更稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖人类主观意见的视频质量评估方法BUONA-VISTA，通过结合语义亲和力指标与传统低级自然度指标实现更鲁棒的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的视频质量评估方法因依赖人工主观评分数据而成本高昂且存在偏差，且未充分考虑高层语义对视频质量的影响。
AI.method: 利用CLIP模型的文本提示生成语义亲和力指标，并通过高斯归一化和sigmoid重缩放策略与传统低级自然度指标融合，构建BUONA-VISTA评估框架。
AI.result: BUONA-VISTA在无参考视频质量评估任务中较现有方法提升至少20%，且比依赖主观意见的方法更具跨场景鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合语义层面与技术层面的多维度指标，本文提出的方法有效解决了传统无参考视频质量评估中语义信息缺失的问题。

authors_text: Mohsen Karami,Khadijeh,Jahanian,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Iman Dehzangi,Juan M Gorriz,Yudong Zhang,Jia Wang,Farshid Hajati,Min Yang,Thantrira Porntaveetus,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny
title: Revolutionizing Genomics with Reinforcement Learning Techniques
title_zh: 利用强化学习技术彻底改变基因组学
abstract: In recent years, Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for solving a wide range of problems, including decision-making and genomics. The exponential growth of raw genomic data over the past two decades has exceeded the capacity of manual analysis, leading to a growing interest in automatic data analysis and processing. RL algorithms are capable of learning from experience with minimal human supervision, making them well-suited for genomic data analysis and interpretation. One of the key benefits of using RL is the reduced cost associated with collecting labeled training data, which is required for supervised learning. While there have been numerous studies examining the applications of Machine Learning (ML) in genomics, this survey focuses exclusively on the use of RL in various genomics research fields, including gene regulatory networks (GRNs), genome assembly, and sequence alignment. We present a comprehensive technical overview of existing studies on the application of RL in genomics, highlighting the strengths and limitations of these approaches. We then discuss potential research directions that are worthy of future exploration, including the development of more sophisticated reward functions as RL heavily depends on the accuracy of the reward function, the integration of RL with other machine learning techniques, and the application of RL to new and emerging areas in genomics research. Finally, we present our findings and conclude by summarizing the current state of the field and the future outlook for RL in genomics.
summary: In recent years, Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for solving a wide range of problems, including decision-making and genomics. The exponential growth of raw genomic data over the past two decades has exceeded the capacity of manual analysis, leading to a growing interest in automatic data analysis and processing. RL algorithms are capable of learning from experience with minimal human supervision, making them well-suited for genomic data analysis and interpretation. One of the key benefits of using RL is the reduced cost associated with collecting labeled training data, which is required for supervised learning. While there have been numerous studies examining the applications of Machine Learning (ML) in genomics, this survey focuses exclusively on the use of RL in various genomics research fields, including gene regulatory networks (GRNs), genome assembly, and sequence alignment. We present a comprehensive technical overview of existing studies on the application of RL in genomics, highlighting the strengths and limitations of these approaches. We then discuss potential research directions that are worthy of future exploration, including the development of more sophisticated reward functions as RL heavily depends on the accuracy of the reward function, the integration of RL with other machine learning techniques, and the application of RL to new and emerging areas in genomics research. Finally, we present our findings and conclude by summarizing the current state of the field and the future outlook for RL in genomics.
abstract_zh: 近年来，强化学习（RL）已成为解决决策和基因组学等广泛问题的强大工具。过去二十年来，原始基因组数据呈指数级增长，已经超出了手动分析的能力，导致人们对自动数据分析和处理的兴趣日益浓厚。强化学习算法能够在最少的人类监督下从经验中学习，这使得它们非常适合基因组数据分析和解释。使用强化学习的主要好处之一是降低了收集监督学习所需的标记训练数据的成本。虽然已有大量研究探讨机器学习 (ML) 在基因组学中的应用，但本次调查仅关注 RL 在各种基因组学研究领域的使用，包括基因调控网络 (GRN)、基因组组装和序列比对。我们对 RL 在基因组学中的应用的现有研究进行了全面的技术概述，强调了这些方法的优点和局限性。然后，我们讨论值得未来探索的潜在研究方向，包括开发更复杂的奖励函数（因为强化学习在很大程度上取决于奖励函数的准确性）、强化学习与其他机器学习技术的集成，以及强化学习在基因组学研究新兴领域的应用。最后，我们展示了我们的发现，并总结了该领域的现状以及强化学习在基因组学领域的未来前景。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了强化学习（RL）在基因组学中的应用，涵盖基因调控网络、基因组组装和序列比对等领域。
AI.motivation: 基因组数据呈指数级增长，传统手动分析方法难以应对，需自动化工具降低标注数据成本并提升分析效率。
AI.method: 系统梳理RL在基因组学中的现有研究，分析其优势与局限性，并探讨未来研究方向如奖励函数优化与跨技术整合。
AI.result: 总结了RL在基因组学中的关键应用场景，指出当前研究的不足及潜在改进方向，如更复杂的奖励机制设计。
AI.conclusion: RL为基因组学研究提供了新思路，未来需结合其他机器学习方法并拓展至新兴领域以推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Yihao Zhang,Odin A. Severinsen,John J. Leonard,Luca Carlone,Kasra Khosoussi
title: Data-Association-Free Landmark-based SLAM
title_zh: 无数据关联的基于地标的 SLAM
comment: Accepted at ICRA 2023. Correcting a typo (missing parentheses) in eq. (1) and following equations
comments: Accepted at ICRA 2023. Correcting a typo (missing parentheses) in eq. (1) and following equations
abstract: We study landmark-based SLAM with unknown data association: our robot navigates in a completely unknown environment and has to simultaneously reason over its own trajectory, the positions of an unknown number of landmarks in the environment, and potential data associations between measurements and landmarks. This setup is interesting since: (i) it arises when recovering from data association failures or from SLAM with information-poor sensors, (ii) it sheds light on fundamental limits (and hardness) of landmark-based SLAM problems irrespective of the front-end data association method, and (iii) it generalizes existing approaches where data association is assumed to be known or partially known. We approach the problem by splitting it into an inner problem of estimating the trajectory, landmark positions and data associations and an outer problem of estimating the number of landmarks. Our approach creates useful and novel connections with existing techniques from discrete-continuous optimization (e.g., k-means clustering), which has the potential to trigger novel research. We demonstrate the proposed approaches in extensive simulations and on real datasets and show that the proposed techniques outperform typical data association baselines and are even competitive against an "oracle" baseline which has access to the number of landmarks and an initial guess for each landmark.
summary: We study landmark-based SLAM with unknown data association: our robot navigates in a completely unknown environment and has to simultaneously reason over its own trajectory, the positions of an unknown number of landmarks in the environment, and potential data associations between measurements and landmarks. This setup is interesting since: (i) it arises when recovering from data association failures or from SLAM with information-poor sensors, (ii) it sheds light on fundamental limits (and hardness) of landmark-based SLAM problems irrespective of the front-end data association method, and (iii) it generalizes existing approaches where data association is assumed to be known or partially known. We approach the problem by splitting it into an inner problem of estimating the trajectory, landmark positions and data associations and an outer problem of estimating the number of landmarks. Our approach creates useful and novel connections with existing techniques from discrete-continuous optimization (e.g., k-means clustering), which has the potential to trigger novel research. We demonstrate the proposed approaches in extensive simulations and on real datasets and show that the proposed techniques outperform typical data association baselines and are even competitive against an "oracle" baseline which has access to the number of landmarks and an initial guess for each landmark.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有未知数据关联的基于地标的 SLAM：我们的机器人在完全未知的环境中导航，并且必须同时推理其自身的轨迹、环境中未知数量的地标的位置以及测量和地标之间的潜在数据关联。这种设置很有趣，因为：（i）它在从数据关联失败或使用信息匮乏的传感器的 SLAM 中恢复时出现，（ii）它揭示了基于地标的 SLAM 问题的基本限制（和难度），而与前端数据关联方法无关，以及（iii）它概括了假设数据关联已知或部分已知的现有方法。我们通过将问题分为估计轨迹、地标位置和数据关联的内部问题和估计地标数量的外部问题来解决该问题。我们的方法与离散连续优化（例如 k 均值聚类）的现有技术建立了有用且新颖的联系，这有可能引发新颖的研究。我们在广泛的模拟和真实数据集上演示了所提出的方法，并表明所提出的技术优于典型的数据关联基线，甚至与可以访问地标数量和每个地标的初始猜测的“oracle”基线竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无数据关联的基于地标的同时定位与地图构建（SLAM）问题，无需预先知道测量数据与地标之间的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 该问题在数据关联失败或传感器信息不足时具有实际意义，有助于揭示基于地标的SLAM问题的基本限制，并推广现有假设数据关联已知的方法。
AI.method: 将问题分解为内部估计轨迹、地标位置和数据关联的子问题，以及外部估计地标数量的子问题，并结合离散-连续优化技术（如k-means聚类）进行求解。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，其性能优于典型数据关联基线，甚至接近拥有地标数量先验知识的‘神谕’基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决未知数据关联的SLAM问题提供了新思路，可能推动离散-连续优化与SLAM领域的交叉研究。

authors_text: Shenwei Xie,Wanfeng Zheng,Zhenglin Xian,Junli Yang,Chuang Zhang,Ming Wu
title: PaRK-Detect: Towards Efficient Multi-Task Satellite Imagery Road Extraction via Patch-Wise Keypoints Detection
title_zh: PaRK-Detect：通过分片关键点检测实现高效的多任务卫星图像道路提取
comment: Accepted at BMVC 2022 (Oral). 13 pages, 5 figures. https://bmvc2022.mpi-inf.mpg.de/381/
comments: Accepted at BMVC 2022 (Oral). 13 pages, 5 figures. https://bmvc2022.mpi-inf.mpg.de/381/
abstract: Automatically extracting roads from satellite imagery is a fundamental yet challenging computer vision task in the field of remote sensing. Pixel-wise semantic segmentation-based approaches and graph-based approaches are two prevailing schemes. However, prior works show the imperfections that semantic segmentation-based approaches yield road graphs with low connectivity, while graph-based methods with iterative exploring paradigms and smaller receptive fields focus more on local information and are also time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a new scheme for multi-task satellite imagery road extraction, Patch-wise Road Keypoints Detection (PaRK-Detect). Building on top of D-LinkNet architecture and adopting the structure of keypoint detection, our framework predicts the position of patch-wise road keypoints and the adjacent relationships between them to construct road graphs in a single pass. Meanwhile, the multi-task framework also performs pixel-wise semantic segmentation and generates road segmentation masks. We evaluate our approach against the existing state-of-the-art methods on DeepGlobe, Massachusetts Roads, and RoadTracer datasets and achieve competitive or better results. We also demonstrate a considerable outperformance in terms of inference speed.
summary: Automatically extracting roads from satellite imagery is a fundamental yet challenging computer vision task in the field of remote sensing. Pixel-wise semantic segmentation-based approaches and graph-based approaches are two prevailing schemes. However, prior works show the imperfections that semantic segmentation-based approaches yield road graphs with low connectivity, while graph-based methods with iterative exploring paradigms and smaller receptive fields focus more on local information and are also time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a new scheme for multi-task satellite imagery road extraction, Patch-wise Road Keypoints Detection (PaRK-Detect). Building on top of D-LinkNet architecture and adopting the structure of keypoint detection, our framework predicts the position of patch-wise road keypoints and the adjacent relationships between them to construct road graphs in a single pass. Meanwhile, the multi-task framework also performs pixel-wise semantic segmentation and generates road segmentation masks. We evaluate our approach against the existing state-of-the-art methods on DeepGlobe, Massachusetts Roads, and RoadTracer datasets and achieve competitive or better results. We also demonstrate a considerable outperformance in terms of inference speed.
abstract_zh: 从卫星图像中自动提取道路是遥感领域一项基本但具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。基于像素语义分割的方法和基于图的方法是两种流行的方案。然而，先前的工作表明，基于语义分割的方法产生的道路图的连通性较低，而具有迭代探索范式和较小接受域的基于图的方法更关注局部信息，而且也很耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多任务卫星图像道路提取的新方案，即分片道路关键点检测（PaRK-Detect）。我们的框架建立在 D-LinkNet 架构之上，采用关键点检测的结构，预测补丁式道路关键点的位置以及它们之间的相邻关系，从而在单次传递中构建道路图。同时，多任务框架还执行像素级语义分割并生成道路分割掩模。我们根据 DeepGlobe、Massachusetts Roads 和 RoadTracer 数据集上现有的最先进方法评估我们的方法，并取得有竞争力或更好的结果。我们还展示了在推理速度方面相当出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于补丁级关键点检测的多任务卫星图像道路提取方法PaRK-Detect，旨在提升道路提取的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有像素级语义分割方法生成的道路图连通性差，基于图的迭代方法计算复杂度高且依赖局部信息，难以满足高效道路提取需求。
AI.method: 基于D-LinkNet架构，采用关键点检测结构预测道路关键点位置及其邻接关系，通过单次前向传播构建道路图，同时实现像素级语义分割。
AI.result: 在DeepGlobe、Massachusetts Roads和RoadTracer数据集上达到优于或接近现有最先进方法的性能，推理速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PaRK-Detect通过多任务框架有效平衡了道路提取的精度与效率，为卫星图像道路分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alisa Zezulak,Faiza Tazi,Sanchari Das
title: SoK: Evaluating Privacy and Security Concerns of Using Web Services for the Disabled Population
title_zh: SoK：评估残疾人使用 Web 服务的隐私和安全问题
abstract: The online privacy and security of the disabled community is a complex field that has implications for every user who navigates web services. While many disciplines have separately researched the disabled population and their online privacy and security concerns, the overlap between the two is very high but under-researched. Moreover, a complex relationship exists between the disabled population and web services where the interaction depends on several web service developmental factors, including usability and accessibility. To this aid, we explored this intersection of privacy and security of web services as perceived by the disabled community through previous studies by conducting a detailed systematic literature review and analysis of 63 articles. Our findings encompassed several topics, including how the disabled population navigates around authentication interfaces, online privacy concerns, universal design practices, and how security methods such as CAPTCHAs can be improved to become more accessible and usable for people of all needs and abilities. We further discuss the gap in the current research, including solutions such as the universal implementation of inclusive privacy and security tools and protocols.
summary: The online privacy and security of the disabled community is a complex field that has implications for every user who navigates web services. While many disciplines have separately researched the disabled population and their online privacy and security concerns, the overlap between the two is very high but under-researched. Moreover, a complex relationship exists between the disabled population and web services where the interaction depends on several web service developmental factors, including usability and accessibility. To this aid, we explored this intersection of privacy and security of web services as perceived by the disabled community through previous studies by conducting a detailed systematic literature review and analysis of 63 articles. Our findings encompassed several topics, including how the disabled population navigates around authentication interfaces, online privacy concerns, universal design practices, and how security methods such as CAPTCHAs can be improved to become more accessible and usable for people of all needs and abilities. We further discuss the gap in the current research, including solutions such as the universal implementation of inclusive privacy and security tools and protocols.
abstract_zh: 残疾人社区的在线隐私和安全是一个复杂的领域，对每个浏览网络服务的用户都有影响。虽然许多学科都分别研究了残疾人群体及其在线隐私和安全问题，但两者之间的重叠度非常高，但研究不足。此外，残疾人群体和网络服务之间存在复杂的关系，其中交互取决于多个网络服务发展因素，包括可用性和可访问性。为此，我们通过之前的研究，对 63 篇文章进行了详细的系统文献综述和分析，探讨了残疾人群体所认为的网络服务隐私和安全的交叉点。我们的研究结果涵盖了多个主题，包括残疾人如何浏览身份验证界面、在线隐私问题、通用设计实践，以及如何改进验证码等安全方法，使所有需求和能力的人都更容易访问和使用。我们进一步讨论当前研究中的差距，包括普遍实施包容性隐私和安全工具和协议等解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述分析残障人士使用网络服务时的隐私与安全问题，探讨现有研究的不足并提出改进方案。
AI.motivation: 残障人士在使用网络服务时面临独特的隐私和安全挑战，但现有研究对其需求与技术交互的交叉领域关注不足，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，分析63篇相关研究，聚焦身份验证、隐私担忧、通用设计及安全工具改进等主题。
AI.result: 发现残障人士在导航身份验证界面、隐私保护及安全工具（如CAPTCHA）可用性方面存在显著障碍，现有研究缺乏包容性解决方案的系统实施。
AI.conclusion: 需推动通用隐私安全工具与协议的普及，结合无障碍设计原则，以满足残障人士的多样化需求。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过系统综述分析残障人士使用网络服务时的隐私与安全问题，探讨现有研究的不足并提出改进方案。
ai_content.motivation: 残障人士在使用网络服务时面临独特的隐私和安全挑战，但现有研究对其需求与技术交互的交叉领域关注不足，需填补这一研究空白。
ai_content.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，分析63篇相关研究，聚焦身份验证、隐私担忧、通用设计及安全工具改进等主题。
ai_content.result: 发现残障人士在导航身份验证界面、隐私保护及安全工具（如CAPTCHA）可用性方面存在显著障碍，现有研究缺乏包容性解决方案的系统实施。
ai_content.conclusion: 需推动通用隐私安全工具与协议的普及，结合无障碍设计原则，以满足残障人士的多样化需求。

search_text: SoK: Evaluating Privacy and Security Concerns of Using Web Services for the Disabled Population SoK：评估残疾人使用 Web 服务的隐私和安全问题 The online privacy and security of the disabled community is a complex field that has implications for every user who navigates web services. While many disciplines have separately researched the disabled population and their online privacy and security concerns, the overlap between the two is very high but under-researched. Moreover, a complex relationship exists between the disabled population and web services where the interaction depends on several web service developmental factors, including usability and accessibility. To this aid, we explored this intersection of privacy and security of web services as perceived by the disabled community through previous studies by conducting a detailed systematic literature review and analysis of 63 articles. Our findings encompassed several topics, including how the disabled population navigates around authentication interfaces, online privacy concerns, universal design practices, and how security methods such as CAPTCHAs can be improved to become more accessible and usable for people of all needs and abilities. We further discuss the gap in the current research, including solutions such as the universal implementation of inclusive privacy and security tools and protocols. 残疾人社区的在线隐私和安全是一个复杂的领域，对每个浏览网络服务的用户都有影响。虽然许多学科都分别研究了残疾人群体及其在线隐私和安全问题，但两者之间的重叠度非常高，但研究不足。此外，残疾人群体和网络服务之间存在复杂的关系，其中交互取决于多个网络服务发展因素，包括可用性和可访问性。为此，我们通过之前的研究，对 63 篇文章进行了详细的系统文献综述和分析，探讨了残疾人群体所认为的网络服务隐私和安全的交叉点。我们的研究结果涵盖了多个主题，包括残疾人如何浏览身份验证界面、在线隐私问题、通用设计实践，以及如何改进验证码等安全方法，使所有需求和能力的人都更容易访问和使用。我们进一步讨论当前研究中的差距，包括普遍实施包容性隐私和安全工具和协议等解决方案。 本文通过系统综述分析残障人士使用网络服务时的隐私与安全问题，探讨现有研究的不足并提出改进方案。 Alisa Zezulak,Faiza Tazi,Sanchari Das cs.CR,cs.HC

authors_text: Victor Quétu,Enzo Tartaglione
title: Can we avoid Double Descent in Deep Neural Networks?
title_zh: 我们可以避免深度神经网络中的双重下降吗？
abstract: Finding the optimal size of deep learning models is very actual and of broad impact, especially in energy-saving schemes. Very recently, an unexpected phenomenon, the ``double descent'', has caught the attention of the deep learning community. As the model's size grows, the performance gets first worse, and then goes back to improving. It raises serious questions about the optimal model's size to maintain high generalization: the model needs to be sufficiently over-parametrized, but adding too many parameters wastes training resources. Is it possible to find, in an efficient way, the best trade-off? Our work shows that the double descent phenomenon is potentially avoidable with proper conditioning of the learning problem, but a final answer is yet to be found. We empirically observe that there is hope to dodge the double descent in complex scenarios with proper regularization, as a simple $\ell_2$ regularization is already positively contributing to such a perspective.
summary: Finding the optimal size of deep learning models is very actual and of broad impact, especially in energy-saving schemes. Very recently, an unexpected phenomenon, the ``double descent'', has caught the attention of the deep learning community. As the model's size grows, the performance gets first worse, and then goes back to improving. It raises serious questions about the optimal model's size to maintain high generalization: the model needs to be sufficiently over-parametrized, but adding too many parameters wastes training resources. Is it possible to find, in an efficient way, the best trade-off? Our work shows that the double descent phenomenon is potentially avoidable with proper conditioning of the learning problem, but a final answer is yet to be found. We empirically observe that there is hope to dodge the double descent in complex scenarios with proper regularization, as a simple $\ell_2$ regularization is already positively contributing to such a perspective.
abstract_zh: 寻找深度学习模型的最佳规模是非常实际且具有广泛影响的，特别是在节能方案中。最近，一种意想不到的现象“双重血统”引起了深度学习界的关注。随着模型规模的增大，性能首先变得更差，然后又恢复到改善。它提出了关于最佳模型大小以保持高泛化性的严重问题：模型需要充分过度参数化，但添加太多参数会浪费训练资源。是否有可能以有效的方式找到最佳权衡？我们的工作表明，通过适当调节学习问题，双下降现象是可以避免的，但最终答案尚未找到。我们凭经验观察到，通过适当的正则化，有希望在复杂的场景中避免双重下降，因为简单的 $\ell_2$ 正则化已经对这种观点做出了积极的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过适当的正则化方法避免深度神经网络中的双重下降现象。
AI.motivation: 确定深度学习模型的最佳规模对能效至关重要，但双重下降现象导致模型性能随规模变化而波动，增加了资源浪费风险。
AI.method: 通过实证观察和简单ℓ2正则化方法，分析模型规模与泛化性能的关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，适当正则化（如ℓ2）可在复杂场景中有效缓解双重下降现象。
AI.conclusion: 双重下降可能通过问题条件优化避免，但需进一步研究以确定最终解决方案。
