authors_text: Yuantong Zhang,Daiqin Yang,Zhenzhong Chen,Wenpeng Ding
title: Continuous Space-Time Video Super-Resolution Utilizing Long-Range Temporal Information
title_zh: 利用长范围时间信息的连续时空视频超分辨率
abstract: In this paper, we consider the task of space-time video super-resolution (ST-VSR), namely, expanding a given source video to a higher frame rate and resolution simultaneously. However, most existing schemes either consider a fixed intermediate time and scale in the training stage or only accept a preset number of input frames (e.g., two adjacent frames) that fails to exploit long-range temporal information. To address these problems, we propose a continuous ST-VSR (C-STVSR) method that can convert the given video to any frame rate and spatial resolution. To achieve time-arbitrary interpolation, we propose a forward warping guided frame synthesis module and an optical-flow-guided context consistency loss to better approximate extreme motion and preserve similar structures among input and prediction frames. In addition, we design a memory-friendly cascading depth-to-space module to realize continuous spatial upsampling. Meanwhile, with the sophisticated reorganization of optical flow, the proposed method is memory friendly, making it possible to propagate information from long-range neighboring frames and achieve better reconstruction quality. Extensive experiments show that the proposed algorithm has good flexibility and achieves better performance on various datasets compared with the state-of-the-art methods in both objective evaluations and subjective visual effects.
summary: In this paper, we consider the task of space-time video super-resolution (ST-VSR), namely, expanding a given source video to a higher frame rate and resolution simultaneously. However, most existing schemes either consider a fixed intermediate time and scale in the training stage or only accept a preset number of input frames (e.g., two adjacent frames) that fails to exploit long-range temporal information. To address these problems, we propose a continuous ST-VSR (C-STVSR) method that can convert the given video to any frame rate and spatial resolution. To achieve time-arbitrary interpolation, we propose a forward warping guided frame synthesis module and an optical-flow-guided context consistency loss to better approximate extreme motion and preserve similar structures among input and prediction frames. In addition, we design a memory-friendly cascading depth-to-space module to realize continuous spatial upsampling. Meanwhile, with the sophisticated reorganization of optical flow, the proposed method is memory friendly, making it possible to propagate information from long-range neighboring frames and achieve better reconstruction quality. Extensive experiments show that the proposed algorithm has good flexibility and achieves better performance on various datasets compared with the state-of-the-art methods in both objective evaluations and subjective visual effects.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑时空视频超分辨率（ST-VSR）的任务，即将给定的源视频同时扩展到更高的帧速率和分辨率。然而，大多数现有方案要么在训练阶段考虑固定的中间时间和规模，要么只接受预设数量的输入帧（例如，两个相邻帧），而无法利用长程时间信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种连续 ST-VSR (C-STVSR) 方法，可以将给定视频转换为任何帧速率和空间分辨率。为了实现时间任意插值，我们提出了前向扭曲引导帧合成模块和光流引导上下文一致性损失，以更好地近似极端运动并保留输入帧和预测帧之间的相似结构。此外，我们设计了一个内存友好的级联深度到空间模块来实现连续的空间上采样。同时，通过复杂的光流重组，所提出的方法是内存友好的，使得从远程相邻帧传播信息并获得更好的重建质量成为可能。大量实验表明，所提出的算法具有良好的灵活性，并且在客观评估和主观视觉效果方面与最先进的方法相比，在各种数据集上都取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用长程时间信息的连续时空视频超分辨率方法，可同时提升视频帧率和空间分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于固定中间尺度或预设输入帧数，难以有效利用长程时间信息，导致运动估计和结构保持不足。
AI.method: 设计前向变形引导帧合成模块与光流引导上下文一致性损失，结合内存友好的级联深度到空间模块，实现时空连续超分。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上客观指标和主观视觉效果均优于现有方法，验证了算法灵活性与重建质量优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过长程信息传播和内存优化设计，有效解决了时空超分中的运动复杂性和结构保持问题。

authors_text: Alexey Gorbatovski,Sergey Kovalchuk
title: Bayesian Networks for Named Entity Prediction in Programming Community Question Answering
title_zh: 用于编程社区问答中的命名实体预测的贝叶斯网络
abstract: Within this study, we propose a new approach for natural language processing using Bayesian networks to predict and analyze the context and how this approach can be applied to the Community Question Answering domain. We discuss how Bayesian networks can detect semantic relationships and dependencies between entities, and this is connected to different score-based approaches of structure-learning. We compared the Bayesian networks with different score metrics, such as the BIC, BDeu, K2 and Chow-Liu trees. Our proposed approach out-performs the baseline model at the precision metric. We also discuss the influence of penalty terms on the structure of Bayesian networks and how they can be used to analyze the relationships between entities. In addition, we examine the visualization of directed acyclic graphs to analyze semantic relationships. The article further identifies issues with detecting certain semantic classes that are separated in the structure of directed acyclic graphs. Finally, we evaluate potential improvements for the Bayesian network approach.
summary: Within this study, we propose a new approach for natural language processing using Bayesian networks to predict and analyze the context and how this approach can be applied to the Community Question Answering domain. We discuss how Bayesian networks can detect semantic relationships and dependencies between entities, and this is connected to different score-based approaches of structure-learning. We compared the Bayesian networks with different score metrics, such as the BIC, BDeu, K2 and Chow-Liu trees. Our proposed approach out-performs the baseline model at the precision metric. We also discuss the influence of penalty terms on the structure of Bayesian networks and how they can be used to analyze the relationships between entities. In addition, we examine the visualization of directed acyclic graphs to analyze semantic relationships. The article further identifies issues with detecting certain semantic classes that are separated in the structure of directed acyclic graphs. Finally, we evaluate potential improvements for the Bayesian network approach.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种使用贝叶斯网络来预测和分析上下文的自然语言处理新方法，以及如何将该方法应用于社区问答领域。我们讨论贝叶斯网络如何检测实体之间的语义关系和依赖关系，这与不同的基于分数的结构学习方法相关。我们将贝叶斯网络与不同的评分指标进行了比较，例如 BIC、BDeu、K2 和 Chow-Liu 树。我们提出的方法在精度指标上优于基线模型。我们还讨论了惩罚项对贝叶斯网络结构的影响以及如何使用它们来分析实体之间的关系。此外，我们检查有向无环图的可视化以分析语义关系。该文章进一步确定了检测有向无环图结构中分离的某些语义类的问题。最后，我们评估贝叶斯网络方法的潜在改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用贝叶斯网络进行编程社区问答中的命名实体预测，通过比较不同评分标准优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理语义关系和依赖时存在不足，需更有效模型提升社区问答场景下的命名实体预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯网络结合BIC、BDeu、K2及Chow-Liu树等评分方法，分析惩罚项对结构的影响，并通过有向无环图可视化语义关系。
AI.result: 所提方法在精确率指标上优于基线模型，但发现部分语义类别在图结构中存在分离问题。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯网络有效但需改进语义类别分离问题，未来应优化惩罚项设计以增强模型表现。

authors_text: Kecheng Chen,Jie Liu,Renjie Wan,Victor Ho-Fun Lee,Varut Vardhanabhuti,Hong Yan,Haoliang Li
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Low-dose CT Reconstruction via Bayesian Uncertainty Alignment
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯不确定性对齐进行低剂量 CT 重建的无监督域适应
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) image reconstruction techniques can reduce patient radiation exposure while maintaining acceptable imaging quality. Deep learning is widely used in this problem, but the performance of testing data (a.k.a. target domain) is often degraded in clinical scenarios due to the variations that were not encountered in training data (a.k.a. source domain). Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) of LDCT reconstruction has been proposed to solve this problem through distribution alignment. However, existing UDA methods fail to explore the usage of uncertainty quantification, which is crucial for reliable intelligent medical systems in clinical scenarios with unexpected variations. Moreover, existing direct alignment for different patients would lead to content mismatch issues. To address these issues, we propose to leverage a probabilistic reconstruction framework to conduct a joint discrepancy minimization between source and target domains in both the latent and image spaces. In the latent space, we devise a Bayesian uncertainty alignment to reduce the epistemic gap between the two domains. This approach reduces the uncertainty level of target domain data, making it more likely to render well-reconstructed results on target domains. In the image space, we propose a sharpness-aware distribution alignment to achieve a match of second-order information, which can ensure that the reconstructed images from the target domain have similar sharpness to normal-dose CT images from the source domain. Experimental results on two simulated datasets and one clinical low-dose imaging dataset show that our proposed method outperforms other methods in quantitative and visualized performance.
summary: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) image reconstruction techniques can reduce patient radiation exposure while maintaining acceptable imaging quality. Deep learning is widely used in this problem, but the performance of testing data (a.k.a. target domain) is often degraded in clinical scenarios due to the variations that were not encountered in training data (a.k.a. source domain). Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) of LDCT reconstruction has been proposed to solve this problem through distribution alignment. However, existing UDA methods fail to explore the usage of uncertainty quantification, which is crucial for reliable intelligent medical systems in clinical scenarios with unexpected variations. Moreover, existing direct alignment for different patients would lead to content mismatch issues. To address these issues, we propose to leverage a probabilistic reconstruction framework to conduct a joint discrepancy minimization between source and target domains in both the latent and image spaces. In the latent space, we devise a Bayesian uncertainty alignment to reduce the epistemic gap between the two domains. This approach reduces the uncertainty level of target domain data, making it more likely to render well-reconstructed results on target domains. In the image space, we propose a sharpness-aware distribution alignment to achieve a match of second-order information, which can ensure that the reconstructed images from the target domain have similar sharpness to normal-dose CT images from the source domain. Experimental results on two simulated datasets and one clinical low-dose imaging dataset show that our proposed method outperforms other methods in quantitative and visualized performance.
abstract_zh: 低剂量计算机断层扫描 (LDCT) 图像重建技术可以减少患者的辐射暴露，同时保持可接受的成像质量。深度学习广泛用于解决这个问题，但由于训练数据（又名源域）中未遇到的变化，测试数据（又名目标域）的性能在临床场景中经常会下降。 LDCT重建的无监督域适应（UDA）被提出来通过分布对齐来解决这个问题。然而，现有的 UDA 方法未能探索不确定性量化的使用，这对于在具有意外变化的临床场景中可靠的智能医疗系统至关重要。此外，现有针对不同患者的直接调整会导致内容不匹配的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们建议利用概率重建框架来在潜在空间和图像空间中进行源域和目标域之间的联合差异最小化。在潜在空间中，我们设计了贝叶斯不确定性对齐来减少两个领域之间的认知差距。这种方法降低了目标域数据的不确定性水平，使其更有可能在目标域上呈现良好重构的结果。在图像空间中，我们提出了一种锐度感知分布对齐来实现二阶信息的匹配，这可以确保来自目标域的重建图像与来自源域的正常剂量CT图像具有相似的锐度。两个模拟数据集和一个临床低剂量成像数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在定量和可视化性能方面优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯不确定性对齐的无监督域适应方法，用于解决低剂量CT重建中的域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低剂量CT重建方法在临床场景中因训练数据与测试数据域差异导致性能下降，且未充分利用不确定性量化，易出现内容不匹配问题。
AI.method: 构建概率重建框架，在潜在空间通过贝叶斯不确定性对齐缩小域间认知差距，在图像空间采用锐度感知分布对齐匹配二阶信息。
AI.result: 在两个模拟数据集和一个临床低剂量数据集上的实验表明，该方法在定量指标和可视化效果上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化潜在空间与图像空间的域对齐，所提方法有效提升了低剂量CT重建在跨域场景下的鲁棒性与重建质量。

authors_text: Cris Cunha,Wei Liu,Tim French,Ajmal Mian
title: Q-Cogni: An Integrated Causal Reinforcement Learning Framework
title_zh: Q-Cogni：集成因果强化学习框架
abstract: We present Q-Cogni, an algorithmically integrated causal reinforcement learning framework that redesigns Q-Learning with an autonomous causal structure discovery method to improve the learning process with causal inference. Q-Cogni achieves optimal learning with a pre-learned structural causal model of the environment that can be queried during the learning process to infer cause-and-effect relationships embedded in a state-action space. We leverage on the sample efficient techniques of reinforcement learning, enable reasoning about a broader set of policies and bring higher degrees of interpretability to decisions made by the reinforcement learning agent. We apply Q-Cogni on the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) and compare against state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. We report results that demonstrate better policies, improved learning efficiency and superior interpretability of the agent's decision making. We also compare this approach with traditional shortest-path search algorithms and demonstrate the benefits of our causal reinforcement learning framework to high dimensional problems. Finally, we apply Q-Cogni to derive optimal routing decisions for taxis in New York City using the Taxi & Limousine Commission trip record data and compare with shortest-path search, reporting results that show 85% of the cases with an equal or better policy derived from Q-Cogni in a real-world domain.
summary: We present Q-Cogni, an algorithmically integrated causal reinforcement learning framework that redesigns Q-Learning with an autonomous causal structure discovery method to improve the learning process with causal inference. Q-Cogni achieves optimal learning with a pre-learned structural causal model of the environment that can be queried during the learning process to infer cause-and-effect relationships embedded in a state-action space. We leverage on the sample efficient techniques of reinforcement learning, enable reasoning about a broader set of policies and bring higher degrees of interpretability to decisions made by the reinforcement learning agent. We apply Q-Cogni on the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) and compare against state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. We report results that demonstrate better policies, improved learning efficiency and superior interpretability of the agent's decision making. We also compare this approach with traditional shortest-path search algorithms and demonstrate the benefits of our causal reinforcement learning framework to high dimensional problems. Finally, we apply Q-Cogni to derive optimal routing decisions for taxis in New York City using the Taxi & Limousine Commission trip record data and compare with shortest-path search, reporting results that show 85% of the cases with an equal or better policy derived from Q-Cogni in a real-world domain.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Q-Cogni，一种算法集成的因果强化学习框架，它通过自主因果结构发现方法重新设计了 Q-Learning，以通过因果推理来改进学习过程。 Q-Cogni 通过预先学习的环境结构因果模型来实现最佳学习，可以在学习过程中查询该模型，以推断嵌入状态-动作空间中的因果关系。我们利用强化学习的样本有效技术，能够推理更广泛的策略集，并为强化学习代理做出的决策带来更高程度的可解释性。我们将 Q-Cogni 应用于车辆路径问题 (VRP)，并与最先进的强化学习算法进行比较。我们报告的结果证明了更好的政策、更高的学习效率以及代理决策的卓越可解释性。我们还将这种方法与传统的最短路径搜索算法进行比较，并展示了我们的因果强化学习框架对高维问题的好处。最后，我们应用 Q-Cogni 使用出租车和豪华轿车委员会行程记录数据得出纽约市出租车的最佳路线决策，并与最短路径搜索进行比较，报告结果显示 85% 的案例在现实世界中具有与 Q-Cogni 相同或更好的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-Cogni框架，通过整合因果推理与Q-Learning算法，提升强化学习的决策效率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在高维复杂环境中存在样本效率低、策略可解释性差的问题，需结合因果推断提升决策质量。
AI.method: 设计自主因果结构发现机制，预学习环境结构因果模型并在学习过程中动态查询，结合高效样本技术优化策略空间探索。
AI.result: 在车辆路径规划和纽约出租车调度任务中，Q-Cogni相较最短路径算法和先进RL方法实现85%的案例策略更优，学习效率与可解释性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 因果强化学习框架Q-Cogni有效解决了复杂场景下的策略优化难题，为现实世界高维决策问题提供了可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Q-Cogni: An Integrated Causal Reinforcement Learning Framework Q-Cogni：集成因果强化学习框架 We present Q-Cogni, an algorithmically integrated causal reinforcement learning framework that redesigns Q-Learning with an autonomous causal structure discovery method to improve the learning process with causal inference. Q-Cogni achieves optimal learning with a pre-learned structural causal model of the environment that can be queried during the learning process to infer cause-and-effect relationships embedded in a state-action space. We leverage on the sample efficient techniques of reinforcement learning, enable reasoning about a broader set of policies and bring higher degrees of interpretability to decisions made by the reinforcement learning agent. We apply Q-Cogni on the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) and compare against state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. We report results that demonstrate better policies, improved learning efficiency and superior interpretability of the agent's decision making. We also compare this approach with traditional shortest-path search algorithms and demonstrate the benefits of our causal reinforcement learning framework to high dimensional problems. Finally, we apply Q-Cogni to derive optimal routing decisions for taxis in New York City using the Taxi & Limousine Commission trip record data and compare with shortest-path search, reporting results that show 85% of the cases with an equal or better policy derived from Q-Cogni in a real-world domain. 我们提出了 Q-Cogni，一种算法集成的因果强化学习框架，它通过自主因果结构发现方法重新设计了 Q-Learning，以通过因果推理来改进学习过程。 Q-Cogni 通过预先学习的环境结构因果模型来实现最佳学习，可以在学习过程中查询该模型，以推断嵌入状态-动作空间中的因果关系。我们利用强化学习的样本有效技术，能够推理更广泛的策略集，并为强化学习代理做出的决策带来更高程度的可解释性。我们将 Q-Cogni 应用于车辆路径问题 (VRP)，并与最先进的强化学习算法进行比较。我们报告的结果证明了更好的政策、更高的学习效率以及代理决策的卓越可解释性。我们还将这种方法与传统的最短路径搜索算法进行比较，并展示了我们的因果强化学习框架对高维问题的好处。最后，我们应用 Q-Cogni 使用出租车和豪华轿车委员会行程记录数据得出纽约市出租车的最佳路线决策，并与最短路径搜索进行比较，报告结果显示 85% 的案例在现实世界中具有与 Q-Cogni 相同或更好的策略。 本文提出Q-Cogni框架，通过整合因果推理与Q-Learning算法，提升强化学习的决策效率与可解释性。 Cris Cunha,Wei Liu,Tim French,Ajmal Mian cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhentian Qian,Jie Fu,Jing Xiao
title: Autonomous Search of Semantic Objects in Unknown Environments
title_zh: 未知环境中语义对象的自主搜索
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of enabling a robot to search for a semantic object, i.e., an object with a semantic label, in an unknown and GPS-denied environment. For the robot in the unknown environment to detect and find the target semantic object, it must perform simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) at both geometric and semantic levels using its onboard sensors while planning and executing its motion based on the ever-updated SLAM results. In other words, the robot must be able to conduct simultaneous localization, semantic mapping, motion planning, and execution in real-time in the presence of sensing and motion uncertainty. This is an open problem as it combines semantic SLAM based on perception and real-time motion planning and execution under uncertainty. Moreover, the goals of the robot motion change on the fly depending on whether and how the robot can detect the target object. We propose a novel approach to tackle the problem, leveraging semantic SLAM, Bayesian Networks, Markov Decision Process, and Real-Time Dynamic Programming. The results in simulation and real experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of enabling a robot to search for a semantic object, i.e., an object with a semantic label, in an unknown and GPS-denied environment. For the robot in the unknown environment to detect and find the target semantic object, it must perform simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) at both geometric and semantic levels using its onboard sensors while planning and executing its motion based on the ever-updated SLAM results. In other words, the robot must be able to conduct simultaneous localization, semantic mapping, motion planning, and execution in real-time in the presence of sensing and motion uncertainty. This is an open problem as it combines semantic SLAM based on perception and real-time motion planning and execution under uncertainty. Moreover, the goals of the robot motion change on the fly depending on whether and how the robot can detect the target object. We propose a novel approach to tackle the problem, leveraging semantic SLAM, Bayesian Networks, Markov Decision Process, and Real-Time Dynamic Programming. The results in simulation and real experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了使机器人能够在未知且无法使用 GPS 的环境中搜索语义对象（即具有语义标签的对象）的问题。为了使机器人在未知环境中检测和找到目标语义对象，它必须使用其机载传感器在几何和语义层面上执行同步定位和建图（SLAM），同时根据不断更新的SLAM结果规划和执行其运动。换句话说，机器人必须能够在存在感知和运动不确定性的情况下实时进行同步定位、语义映射、运动规划和执行。这是一个开放性问题，因为它结合了基于感知的语义 SLAM 和不确定性下的实时运动规划和执行。此外，机器人运动的目标会根据机器人是否以及如何检测目标物体而动态变化。我们提出了一种利用语义 SLAM、贝叶斯网络、马尔可夫决策过程和实时动态规划来解决该问题的新方法。模拟和实际实验的结果证明了我们方法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 在无GPS的未知环境中，机器人自主搜索语义对象，需同时进行几何和语义SLAM，并实时规划运动路径。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法处理动态变化的目标搜索任务与感知/运动不确定性，需结合语义SLAM与实时决策框架解决组合挑战。
AI.method: 融合语义SLAM、贝叶斯网络、马尔可夫决策过程和实时动态规划，实现多模态感知与不确定性下的实时路径规划。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验验证了方法在目标检测率和路径效率上的有效性，优于传统SLAM与规划分离的方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法首次实现语义SLAM与动态规划的联合优化，为未知环境自主搜索提供了新范式。

title: Heterogeneous robot teams with unified perception and autonomy: How Team CSIRO Data61 tied for the top score at the DARPA Subterranean Challenge
title_zh: 具有统一感知和自主权的异构机器人团队：CSIRO Data61 团队如何在 DARPA 地下挑战赛中并列最高分
abstract: The DARPA Subterranean Challenge was designed for competitors to develop and deploy teams of autonomous robots to explore difficult unknown underground environments. Categorised in to human-made tunnels, underground urban infrastructure and natural caves, each of these subdomains had many challenging elements for robot perception, locomotion, navigation and autonomy. These included degraded wireless communication, poor visibility due to smoke, narrow passages and doorways, clutter, uneven ground, slippery and loose terrain, stairs, ledges, overhangs, dripping water, and dynamic obstacles that move to block paths among others. In the Final Event of this challenge held in September 2021, the course consisted of all three subdomains. The task was for the robot team to perform a scavenger hunt for a number of pre-defined artefacts within a limited time frame. Only one human supervisor was allowed to communicate with the robots once they were in the course. Points were scored when accurate detections and their locations were communicated back to the scoring server. A total of 8 teams competed in the finals held at the Mega Cavern in Louisville, KY, USA. This article describes the systems deployed by Team CSIRO Data61 that tied for the top score and won second place at the event.
summary: The DARPA Subterranean Challenge was designed for competitors to develop and deploy teams of autonomous robots to explore difficult unknown underground environments. Categorised in to human-made tunnels, underground urban infrastructure and natural caves, each of these subdomains had many challenging elements for robot perception, locomotion, navigation and autonomy. These included degraded wireless communication, poor visibility due to smoke, narrow passages and doorways, clutter, uneven ground, slippery and loose terrain, stairs, ledges, overhangs, dripping water, and dynamic obstacles that move to block paths among others. In the Final Event of this challenge held in September 2021, the course consisted of all three subdomains. The task was for the robot team to perform a scavenger hunt for a number of pre-defined artefacts within a limited time frame. Only one human supervisor was allowed to communicate with the robots once they were in the course. Points were scored when accurate detections and their locations were communicated back to the scoring server. A total of 8 teams competed in the finals held at the Mega Cavern in Louisville, KY, USA. This article describes the systems deployed by Team CSIRO Data61 that tied for the top score and won second place at the event.
abstract_zh: DARPA 地下挑战赛旨在让参赛者开发和部署自主机器人团队来探索困难的未知地下环境。这些子领域分为人造隧道、地下城市基础设施和天然洞穴，每个子领域对机器人感知、运动、导航和自主都具有许多挑战性的元素。其中包括无线通信质量下降、烟雾导致的能见度差、狭窄的通道和门口、杂乱、不平坦的地面、湿滑和松散的地形、楼梯、壁架、悬挑、滴水以及移动阻塞路径的动态障碍物等。在 2021 年 9 月举行的这项挑战的决赛中，课程包含所有三个子领域。机器人团队的任务是在有限的时间内对一些预先定义的文物进行寻宝游戏。一旦机器人进入课程，只允许一名人类监督员与机器人进行交流。当准确的检测及其位置被传送回评分服务器时，即可得分。共有 8 支队伍参加了在美国肯塔基州路易斯维尔 Mega Cavern 举行的决赛。本文介绍了 CSIRO Data61 团队部署的系统，该团队在此次活动中获得并列最高分并获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CSIRO Data61团队在DARPA地下挑战赛中通过异构机器人团队实现统一感知与自主性，最终获得第二名的系统设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 地下环境存在通信受限、能见度低、地形复杂等挑战，需开发具备自主感知、导航与协作能力的机器人团队以完成未知环境探索任务。
AI.method: 采用异构机器人团队（含地面、空中机器人），结合统一感知系统、多机器人协同算法及鲁棒导航技术，通过实时数据融合与自主决策应对复杂地形与动态障碍。
AI.result: 在2021年DARPA地下挑战赛决赛中，团队以高效的目标探测与定位能力获得并列最高分，最终排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 异构机器人团队的统一感知与自主性架构可有效应对复杂地下环境挑战，为未来灾难救援等场景提供关键技术参考。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了CSIRO Data61团队在DARPA地下挑战赛中通过异构机器人团队实现统一感知与自主性，最终获得第二名的系统设计与实现。
ai_content.motivation: 地下环境存在通信受限、能见度低、地形复杂等挑战，需开发具备自主感知、导航与协作能力的机器人团队以完成未知环境探索任务。
ai_content.method: 采用异构机器人团队（含地面、空中机器人），结合统一感知系统、多机器人协同算法及鲁棒导航技术，通过实时数据融合与自主决策应对复杂地形与动态障碍。
ai_content.result: 在2021年DARPA地下挑战赛决赛中，团队以高效的目标探测与定位能力获得并列最高分，最终排名第二。
ai_content.conclusion: 异构机器人团队的统一感知与自主性架构可有效应对复杂地下环境挑战，为未来灾难救援等场景提供关键技术参考。

search_text: Heterogeneous robot teams with unified perception and autonomy: How Team CSIRO Data61 tied for the top score at the DARPA Subterranean Challenge 具有统一感知和自主权的异构机器人团队：CSIRO Data61 团队如何在 DARPA 地下挑战赛中并列最高分 The DARPA Subterranean Challenge was designed for competitors to develop and deploy teams of autonomous robots to explore difficult unknown underground environments. Categorised in to human-made tunnels, underground urban infrastructure and natural caves, each of these subdomains had many challenging elements for robot perception, locomotion, navigation and autonomy. These included degraded wireless communication, poor visibility due to smoke, narrow passages and doorways, clutter, uneven ground, slippery and loose terrain, stairs, ledges, overhangs, dripping water, and dynamic obstacles that move to block paths among others. In the Final Event of this challenge held in September 2021, the course consisted of all three subdomains. The task was for the robot team to perform a scavenger hunt for a number of pre-defined artefacts within a limited time frame. Only one human supervisor was allowed to communicate with the robots once they were in the course. Points were scored when accurate detections and their locations were communicated back to the scoring server. A total of 8 teams competed in the finals held at the Mega Cavern in Louisville, KY, USA. This article describes the systems deployed by Team CSIRO Data61 that tied for the top score and won second place at the event. DARPA 地下挑战赛旨在让参赛者开发和部署自主机器人团队来探索困难的未知地下环境。这些子领域分为人造隧道、地下城市基础设施和天然洞穴，每个子领域对机器人感知、运动、导航和自主都具有许多挑战性的元素。其中包括无线通信质量下降、烟雾导致的能见度差、狭窄的通道和门口、杂乱、不平坦的地面、湿滑和松散的地形、楼梯、壁架、悬挑、滴水以及移动阻塞路径的动态障碍物等。在 2021 年 9 月举行的这项挑战的决赛中，课程包含所有三个子领域。机器人团队的任务是在有限的时间内对一些预先定义的文物进行寻宝游戏。一旦机器人进入课程，只允许一名人类监督员与机器人进行交流。当准确的检测及其位置被传送回评分服务器时，即可得分。共有 8 支队伍参加了在美国肯塔基州路易斯维尔 Mega Cavern 举行的决赛。本文介绍了 CSIRO Data61 团队部署的系统，该团队在此次活动中获得并列最高分并获得第二名。 本文介绍了CSIRO Data61团队在DARPA地下挑战赛中通过异构机器人团队实现统一感知与自主性，最终获得第二名的系统设计与实现。 Navinda Kottege,Jason Williams,Brendan Tidd,Fletcher Talbot,Ryan Steindl,Mark Cox,Dennis Frousheger,Thomas Hines,Alex Pitt,Benjamin Tam,Brett Wood,Lauren Hanson,Katrina Lo Surdo,Thomas Molnar,Matt Wildie,Kazys Stepanas,Gavin Catt,Lachlan Tychsen-Smith,Dean Penfold,Leslie Overs,Milad Ramezani,Kasra Khosoussi,Farid Kendoul,Glenn Wagner,Duncan Palmer, et al. (5 additional authors not shown) cs.RO

authors_text: Zhichao Liu,Leshan Wang,Desen Zhou,Jian Wang,Songyang Zhang,Yang Bai,Errui Ding,Rui Fan
title: Temporal Segment Transformer for Action Segmentation
title_zh: 用于动作分割的时间段变压器
abstract: Recognizing human actions from untrimmed videos is an important task in activity understanding, and poses unique challenges in modeling long-range temporal relations. Recent works adopt a predict-and-refine strategy which converts an initial prediction to action segments for global context modeling. However, the generated segment representations are often noisy and exhibit inaccurate segment boundaries, over-segmentation and other problems. To deal with these issues, we propose an attention based approach which we call \textit{temporal segment transformer}, for joint segment relation modeling and denoising. The main idea is to denoise segment representations using attention between segment and frame representations, and also use inter-segment attention to capture temporal correlations between segments. The refined segment representations are used to predict action labels and adjust segment boundaries, and a final action segmentation is produced based on voting from segment masks. We show that this novel architecture achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on the popular 50Salads, GTEA and Breakfast benchmarks. We also conduct extensive ablations to demonstrate the effectiveness of different components of our design.
summary: Recognizing human actions from untrimmed videos is an important task in activity understanding, and poses unique challenges in modeling long-range temporal relations. Recent works adopt a predict-and-refine strategy which converts an initial prediction to action segments for global context modeling. However, the generated segment representations are often noisy and exhibit inaccurate segment boundaries, over-segmentation and other problems. To deal with these issues, we propose an attention based approach which we call \textit{temporal segment transformer}, for joint segment relation modeling and denoising. The main idea is to denoise segment representations using attention between segment and frame representations, and also use inter-segment attention to capture temporal correlations between segments. The refined segment representations are used to predict action labels and adjust segment boundaries, and a final action segmentation is produced based on voting from segment masks. We show that this novel architecture achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on the popular 50Salads, GTEA and Breakfast benchmarks. We also conduct extensive ablations to demonstrate the effectiveness of different components of our design.
abstract_zh: 从未经修剪的视频中识别人类行为是活动理解中的一项重要任务，并且对长期时间关系建模提出了独特的挑战。最近的工作采用了预测和细化策略，将初始预测转换为全局上下文建模的动作片段。然而，生成的分段表示通常是有噪声的，并且表现出不准确的分段边界、过​​度分段和其他问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于注意力的方法，称为 \textit{temporalegmenttransformer}，用于联合段关系建模和去噪。主要思想是使用片段和帧表示之间的注意力对片段表示进行去噪，并使用片段间注意力来捕获片段之间的时间相关性。细化的分段表示用于预测动作标签并调整分段边界，并根据分段掩码的投票生成最终的动作分段。我们证明，这种新颖的架构在流行的 50Salads、GTEA 和 Breakfast 基准测试中实现了最先进的准确性。我们还进行广泛的消融，以证明我们设计的不同组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的时序段变换器模型，用于解决未剪辑视频中动作分割的长距离时序关系建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有预测-细化策略生成的段表示存在噪声、边界不准确和过度分割等问题，需联合建模段间关系并进行去噪。
AI.method: 设计时序段变换器，通过段与帧间的注意力机制去噪段表示，并利用段间注意力捕捉时序关联，最终通过段掩码投票生成动作分割结果。
AI.result: 在50Salads、GTEA和Breakfast基准测试中达到最先进的分割准确率，并通过消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过联合段关系建模与去噪机制，有效提升了动作分割的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yuan Zhou,Jing Mei,Yiqin Yu,Tanveer Syeda-Mahmood
title: Medical visual question answering using joint self-supervised learning
title_zh: 使用联合自监督学习的医学视觉问答
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) becomes one of the most active research problems in the medical imaging domain. A well-known VQA challenge is the intrinsic diversity between the image and text modalities, and in the medical VQA task, there is another critical problem relying on the limited size of labelled image-question-answer data. In this study we propose an encoder-decoder framework that leverages the image-text joint representation learned from large-scaled medical image-caption data and adapted to the small-sized medical VQA task. The encoder embeds across the image-text dual modalities with self-attention mechanism and is independently pre-trained on the large-scaled medical image-caption dataset by multiple self-supervised learning tasks. Then the decoder is connected to the top of the encoder and fine-tuned using the small-sized medical VQA dataset. The experiment results present that our proposed method achieves better performance comparing with the baseline and SOTA methods.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) becomes one of the most active research problems in the medical imaging domain. A well-known VQA challenge is the intrinsic diversity between the image and text modalities, and in the medical VQA task, there is another critical problem relying on the limited size of labelled image-question-answer data. In this study we propose an encoder-decoder framework that leverages the image-text joint representation learned from large-scaled medical image-caption data and adapted to the small-sized medical VQA task. The encoder embeds across the image-text dual modalities with self-attention mechanism and is independently pre-trained on the large-scaled medical image-caption dataset by multiple self-supervised learning tasks. Then the decoder is connected to the top of the encoder and fine-tuned using the small-sized medical VQA dataset. The experiment results present that our proposed method achieves better performance comparing with the baseline and SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）成为医学成像领域最活跃的研究问题之一。众所周知的 VQA 挑战是图像和文本模态之间的内在多样性，而在医学 VQA 任务中，还存在另一个关键问题，依赖于标记图像-问题-答案数据的有限大小。在本研究中，我们提出了一种编码器-解码器框架，该框架利用从大规模医学图像标题数据中学习到的图像文本联合表示并适应小型医学 VQA 任务。该编码器通过自注意力机制嵌入图像-文本双模态，并通过多个自监督学习任务在大规模医学图像字幕数据集上独立进行预训练。然后解码器连接到编码器的顶部，并使用小型医学 VQA 数据集进行微调。实验结果表明，与基线和 SOTA 方法相比，我们提出的方法取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联合自监督学习的医学视觉问答框架，解决医学图像与文本模态差异及标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学VQA任务面临图像与文本模态差异大、标注数据稀缺的双重挑战，现有方法难以有效建模跨模态关系并适应小规模数据。
AI.method: 构建编码器-解码器框架，编码器通过自注意力机制融合图像-文本双模态特征，并在大规模医学图像-标题数据上使用多任务自监督预训练；解码器基于预训练编码器，在小规模医学VQA数据上微调。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在医学VQA任务上优于基线模型和现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合自监督学习能有效提升医学VQA模型性能，通过大规模预训练缓解小样本场景下的模态对齐难题。

A well-known VQA challenge is the intrinsic diversity between the image and text modalities, and in the medical VQA task, there is another critical problem relying on the limited size of labelled image-question-answer data. In this study we propose an encoder-decoder framework that leverages the image-text joint representation learned from large-scaled medical image-caption data and adapted to the small-sized medical VQA task. The encoder embeds across the image-text dual modalities with self-attention mechanism and is independently pre-trained on the large-scaled medical image-caption dataset by multiple self-supervised learning tasks. Then the decoder is connected to the top of the encoder and fine-tuned using the small-sized medical VQA dataset. The experiment results present that our proposed method achieves better performance comparing with the baseline and SOTA methods. 视觉问答（VQA）成为医学成像领域最活跃的研究问题之一。众所周知的 VQA 挑战是图像和文本模态之间的内在多样性，而在医学 VQA 任务中，还存在另一个关键问题，依赖于标记图像-问题-答案数据的有限大小。在本研究中，我们提出了一种编码器-解码器框架，该框架利用从大规模医学图像标题数据中学习到的图像文本联合表示并适应小型医学 VQA 任务。该编码器通过自注意力机制嵌入图像-文本双模态，并通过多个自监督学习任务在大规模医学图像字幕数据集上独立进行预训练。然后解码器连接到编码器的顶部，并使用小型医学 VQA 数据集进行微调。实验结果表明，与基线和 SOTA 方法相比，我们提出的方法取得了更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于联合自监督学习的医学视觉问答框架，解决医学图像与文本模态差异及标注数据不足的问题。 Yuan Zhou,Jing Mei,Yiqin Yu,Tanveer Syeda-Mahmood cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chengyu Zheng,Yuan Zhou,Xiulian Peng,Yuan Zhang,Yan Lu
title: Time-Variance Aware Real-Time Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 时间方差感知实时语音增强
abstract: Time-variant factors often occur in real-world full-duplex communication applications. Some of them are caused by the complex environment such as non-stationary environmental noises and varying acoustic path while some are caused by the communication system such as the dynamic delay between the far-end and near-end signals. Current end-to-end deep neural network (DNN) based methods usually model the time-variant components implicitly and can hardly handle the unpredictable time-variance in real-time speech enhancement. To explicitly capture the time-variant components, we propose a dynamic kernel generation (DKG) module that can be introduced as a learnable plug-in to a DNN-based end-to-end pipeline. Specifically, the DKG module generates a convolutional kernel regarding to each input audio frame, so that the DNN model is able to dynamically adjust its weights according to the input signal during inference. Experimental results verify that DKG module improves the performance of the model under time-variant scenarios, in the joint acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) and deep noise suppression (DNS) tasks.
summary: Time-variant factors often occur in real-world full-duplex communication applications. Some of them are caused by the complex environment such as non-stationary environmental noises and varying acoustic path while some are caused by the communication system such as the dynamic delay between the far-end and near-end signals. Current end-to-end deep neural network (DNN) based methods usually model the time-variant components implicitly and can hardly handle the unpredictable time-variance in real-time speech enhancement. To explicitly capture the time-variant components, we propose a dynamic kernel generation (DKG) module that can be introduced as a learnable plug-in to a DNN-based end-to-end pipeline. Specifically, the DKG module generates a convolutional kernel regarding to each input audio frame, so that the DNN model is able to dynamically adjust its weights according to the input signal during inference. Experimental results verify that DKG module improves the performance of the model under time-variant scenarios, in the joint acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) and deep noise suppression (DNS) tasks.
abstract_zh: 时变因素经常出现在现实世界的全双工通信应用中。其中一些是由复杂的环境引起的，例如非平稳的环境噪声和变化的声路径，而另一些则是由通信系统引起的，例如远端和近端信号之间的动态延迟。当前基于端到端深度神经网络（DNN）的方法通常对时变分量进行隐式建模，很难处理实时语音增强中不可预测的时变性。为了明确捕获时变组件，我们提出了一个动态内核生成（DKG）模块，该模块可以作为可学习插件引入到基于 DNN 的端到端管道中。具体来说，DKG模块针对每个输入音频帧生成一个卷积核，使得DNN模型能够在推理过程中根据输入信号动态调整其权重。实验结果验证了DKG模块在联合声学回声消除（AEC）和深度噪声抑制（DNS）任务中提高了模型在时变场景下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态内核生成模块（DKG），用于解决实时语音增强中的时变因素问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端DNN方法难以显式处理实时通信中的动态环境噪声、声学路径变化及信号延迟等时变因素，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计可插拔的动态内核生成模块（DKG），为每个音频帧生成自适应卷积核，使模型在推理时动态调整权重以应对时变特性。
AI.result: 实验表明，DKG模块在联合声学回声消除（AEC）和深度降噪（DNS）任务中显著提升了时变场景下的语音增强效果。
AI.conclusion: DKG模块通过显式建模时变特性，有效增强了实时语音增强系统在动态环境中的鲁棒性与适应性。

authors_text: Lemuel Puglisi,Frederik Barkhof,Daniel C. Alexander,Geoffrey JM Parker,Arman Eshaghi,Daniele Ravì
title: DeepBrainPrint: A Novel Contrastive Framework for Brain MRI Re-Identification
title_zh: DeepBrainPrint：脑 MRI 重新识别的新型对比框架
abstract: Recent advances in MRI have led to the creation of large datasets. With the increase in data volume, it has become difficult to locate previous scans of the same patient within these datasets (a process known as re-identification). To address this issue, we propose an AI-powered medical imaging retrieval framework called DeepBrainPrint, which is designed to retrieve brain MRI scans of the same patient. Our framework is a semi-self-supervised contrastive deep learning approach with three main innovations. First, we use a combination of self-supervised and supervised paradigms to create an effective brain fingerprint from MRI scans that can be used for real-time image retrieval. Second, we use a special weighting function to guide the training and improve model convergence. Third, we introduce new imaging transformations to improve retrieval robustness in the presence of intensity variations (i.e. different scan contrasts), and to account for age and disease progression in patients. We tested DeepBrainPrint on a large dataset of T1-weighted brain MRIs from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and on a synthetic dataset designed to evaluate retrieval performance with different image modalities. Our results show that DeepBrainPrint outperforms previous methods, including simple similarity metrics and more advanced contrastive deep learning frameworks.
summary: Recent advances in MRI have led to the creation of large datasets. With the increase in data volume, it has become difficult to locate previous scans of the same patient within these datasets (a process known as re-identification). To address this issue, we propose an AI-powered medical imaging retrieval framework called DeepBrainPrint, which is designed to retrieve brain MRI scans of the same patient. Our framework is a semi-self-supervised contrastive deep learning approach with three main innovations. First, we use a combination of self-supervised and supervised paradigms to create an effective brain fingerprint from MRI scans that can be used for real-time image retrieval. Second, we use a special weighting function to guide the training and improve model convergence. Third, we introduce new imaging transformations to improve retrieval robustness in the presence of intensity variations (i.e. different scan contrasts), and to account for age and disease progression in patients. We tested DeepBrainPrint on a large dataset of T1-weighted brain MRIs from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and on a synthetic dataset designed to evaluate retrieval performance with different image modalities. Our results show that DeepBrainPrint outperforms previous methods, including simple similarity metrics and more advanced contrastive deep learning frameworks.
abstract_zh: MRI 的最新进展导致了大型数据集的创建。随着数据量的增加，在这些数据集中定位同一患者以前的扫描变得困难（这一过程称为重新识别）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 DeepBrainPrint 的人工智能医学影像检索框架，旨在检索同一患者的脑部 MRI 扫描结果。我们的框架是一种半自我监督的对比深度学习方法，具有三个主要创新。首先，我们结合使用自监督和监督范例，从 MRI 扫描中创建有效的大脑指纹，可用于实时图像检索。其次，我们使用特殊的权重函数来指导训练并提高模型收敛性。第三，我们引入了新的成像转换，以提高强度变化（即不同的扫描对比度）下检索的鲁棒性，并考虑患者的年龄和疾病进展。我们在阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 的 T1 加权脑部 MRI 大型数据集以及旨在评估不同图像模式的检索性能的合成数据集上测试了 DeepBrainPrint。我们的结果表明 DeepBrainPrint 优于以前的方法，包括简单的相似性度量和更先进的对比深度学习框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DeepBrainPrint的新型对比框架，用于脑部MRI图像的再识别，解决大规模数据集中定位同一患者先前扫描的难题。
AI.motivation: 随着MRI数据集规模扩大，定位同一患者的先前扫描变得困难，传统方法在准确性和鲁棒性上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用半自监督对比学习框架，结合自监督与监督范式生成脑部指纹，引入权重函数优化训练，并设计新型图像变换以应对强度差异和疾病进展影响。
AI.result: 在ADNI真实数据集和合成数据集上测试表明，DeepBrainPrint优于传统相似度度量及先进对比学习框架。
AI.conclusion: DeepBrainPrint通过创新方法有效提升了脑MRI再识别性能，为医疗影像检索提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Huasong Zhou,Xiaowei Xu,Xiaodong Wang,Leon Bevan Bullock
title: SATBA: An Invisible Backdoor Attack Based On Spatial Attention
title_zh: SATBA：一种基于空间注意力的隐形后门攻击
abstract: Backdoor attack has emerged as a novel and concerning threat to AI security. These attacks involve the training of Deep Neural Network (DNN) on datasets that contain hidden trigger patterns. Although the poisoned model behaves normally on benign samples, it exhibits abnormal behavior on samples containing the trigger pattern. However, most existing backdoor attacks suffer from two significant drawbacks: their trigger patterns are visible and easy to detect by backdoor defense or even human inspection, and their injection process results in the loss of natural sample features and trigger patterns, thereby reducing the attack success rate and model accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoor attack named SATBA that overcomes these limitations using spatial attention and an U-net based model. The attack process begins by using spatial attention to extract meaningful data features and generate trigger patterns associated with clean images. Then, an U-shaped model is used to embed these trigger patterns into the original data without causing noticeable feature loss. We evaluate our attack on three prominent image classification DNN across three standard datasets. The results demonstrate that SATBA achieves high attack success rate while maintaining robustness against backdoor defenses. Furthermore, we conduct extensive image similarity experiments to emphasize the stealthiness of our attack strategy. Overall, SATBA presents a promising approach to backdoor attack, addressing the shortcomings of previous methods and showcasing its effectiveness in evading detection and maintaining high attack success rate.

Furthermore, we conduct extensive image similarity experiments to emphasize the stealthiness of our attack strategy. Overall, SATBA presents a promising approach to backdoor attack, addressing the shortcomings of previous methods and showcasing its effectiveness in evading detection and maintaining high attack success rate.
abstract_zh: 后门攻击已成为人工智能安全的一种新颖且令人担忧的威胁。这些攻击涉及在包含隐藏触发模式的数据集上训练深度神经网络 (DNN)。尽管中毒模型在良性样本上表现正常，但它在包含触发模式的样本上表现出异常行为。然而，大多数现有的后门攻击都存在两个显着的缺点：它们的触发模式是可见的，很容易被后门防​​御甚至人工检查检测到；它们的注入过程会导致自然样本特征和触发模式的丢失，从而降低攻击成功率和模型准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SATBA 的新型后门攻击，它使用空间注意力和基于 U-net 的模型克服了这些限制。攻击过程首先使用空间注意力来提取有意义的数据特征并生成与干净图像相关的触发模式。然后，使用 U 形模型将这些触发模式嵌入到原始数据中，而不会造成明显的特征损失。我们评估了对三个标准数据集上三个著名图像分类 DNN 的攻击。结果表明，SATBA 实现了较高的攻击成功率，同时保持了针对后门防御的鲁棒性。此外，我们进行了广泛的图像相似性实验，以强调我们的攻击策略的隐蔽性。总的来说，SATBA 提出了一种有前途的后门攻击方法，解决了以前方法的缺点，并展示了其在逃避检测和保持高攻击成功率方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SATBA，一种基于空间注意力的不可见后门攻击方法，解决现有后门攻击触发模式可见和特征损失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击存在触发模式易被检测和注入过程导致特征损失的缺陷，需设计隐蔽性强且保持模型性能的攻击方法。
AI.method: 利用空间注意力提取数据特征生成触发模式，并通过U-Net模型将触发模式嵌入原始数据，避免特征损失。
AI.result: 在三个图像分类数据集上实现高攻击成功率，对后门防御具有鲁棒性，图像相似性实验验证了攻击隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: SATBA有效克服传统后门攻击缺陷，在隐蔽性和攻击成功率之间取得平衡，为AI安全威胁研究提供新思路。

search_text: SATBA: An Invisible Backdoor Attack Based On Spatial Attention SATBA：一种基于空间注意力的隐形后门攻击 Backdoor attack has emerged as a novel and concerning threat to AI security. These attacks involve the training of Deep Neural Network (DNN) on datasets that contain hidden trigger patterns. Although the poisoned model behaves normally on benign samples, it exhibits abnormal behavior on samples containing the trigger pattern. However, most existing backdoor attacks suffer from two significant drawbacks: their trigger patterns are visible and easy to detect by backdoor defense or even human inspection, and their injection process results in the loss of natural sample features and trigger patterns, thereby reducing the attack success rate and model accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoor attack named SATBA that overcomes these limitations using spatial attention and an U-net based model. The attack process begins by using spatial attention to extract meaningful data features and generate trigger patterns associated with clean images. Then, an U-shaped model is used to embed these trigger patterns into the original data without causing noticeable feature loss. We evaluate our attack on three prominent image classification DNN across three standard datasets. The results demonstrate that SATBA achieves high attack success rate while maintaining robustness against backdoor defenses. Furthermore, we conduct extensive image similarity experiments to emphasize the stealthiness of our attack strategy. Overall, SATBA presents a promising approach to backdoor attack, addressing the shortcomings of previous methods and showcasing its effectiveness in evading detection and maintaining high attack success rate. 后门攻击已成为人工智能安全的一种新颖且令人担忧的威胁。这些攻击涉及在包含隐藏触发模式的数据集上训练深度神经网络 (DNN)。尽管中毒模型在良性样本上表现正常，但它在包含触发模式的样本上表现出异常行为。然而，大多数现有的后门攻击都存在两个显着的缺点：它们的触发模式是可见的，很容易被后门防​​御甚至人工检查检测到；它们的注入过程会导致自然样本特征和触发模式的丢失，从而降低攻击成功率和模型准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SATBA 的新型后门攻击，它使用空间注意力和基于 U-net 的模型克服了这些限制。攻击过程首先使用空间注意力来提取有意义的数据特征并生成与干净图像相关的触发模式。然后，使用 U 形模型将这些触发模式嵌入到原始数据中，而不会造成明显的特征损失。我们评估了对三个标准数据集上三个著名图像分类 DNN 的攻击。结果表明，SATBA 实现了较高的攻击成功率，同时保持了针对后门防御的鲁棒性。此外，我们进行了广泛的图像相似性实验，以强调我们的攻击策略的隐蔽性。总的来说，SATBA 提出了一种有前途的后门攻击方法，解决了以前方法的缺点，并展示了其在逃避检测和保持高攻击成功率方面的有效性。 本文提出SATBA，一种基于空间注意力的不可见后门攻击方法，解决现有后门攻击触发模式可见和特征损失的问题。 Huasong Zhou,Xiaowei Xu,Xiaodong Wang,Leon Bevan Bullock cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Panagiotis Kourtesis,Josie Linnell,Rayaan Amir,Ferran Argelaguet,Sarah E. MacPherson
title: Cybersickness, Cognition, & Motor Skills: The Effects of Music, Gender, and Gaming Experience
title_zh: 晕眩症、认知和运动技能：音乐、性别和游戏体验的影响
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics journal
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics journal
abstract: Recent research has attempted to identify methods to mitigate cybersickness and examine its aftereffects. In this direction, this paper examines the effects of cybersickness on cognitive, motor, and reading performance in VR. Also, this paper evaluates the mitigating effects of music on cybersickness, as well as the role of gender, and the computing, VR, and gaming experience of the user. This paper reports two studies. In this study, 39 participants performed an assessment four times, once before the rides (baseline), and then once after each ride (3 rides). In each ride either Calming, or Joyful, or No Music was played. During each ride, linear and angular accelerations took place to induce cybersickness in the participants. In each assessment, while immersed in VR, the participants evaluated their cybersickness symptomatology and performed a verbal working memory task, a visuospatial working memory task, and a psychomotor task. While responding to the cybersickness questionnaire (3D UI), eye-tracking was conducted to measure reading time and pupillometry. The results showed that Joyful and Calming music substantially decreased the intensity of nausea-related symptoms. However, only Joyful music significantly decreased the overall cybersickness intensity. Importantly, cybersickness was found to decrease verbal working memory performance and pupil size. Also, it significantly decelerated psychomotor (reaction time) and reading abilities. Higher gaming experience was associated with lower cybersickness. When controlling for gaming experience, there were no significant differences between female and male participants in terms of cybersickness. The outcomes indicated the efficiency of music in mitigating cybersickness, the important role of gaming experience in cybersickness, and the significant effects of cybersickness on pupil size, cognition, psychomotor skills, and reading ability.

abstract_zh: 最近的研究试图找到减轻晕眩症的方法并检查其后果。在这个方向上，本文研究了晕眩症对 VR 中认知、运动和阅读表现的影响。此外，本文还评估了音乐对晕机症的缓解作用，以及性别的作用以及用户的计算、虚拟现实和游戏体验。本文报告了两项研究。在这项研究中，39 名参与者进行了四次评估，一次是在游乐设施之前（基线），然后是每次游乐设施之后一次（3 次游乐设施）。每次骑行时都会播放“平静”、“快乐”或“无音乐”。在每次骑行过程中，都会发生线性和角加速度，从而引起参与者的晕机症。在每次评估中，参与者在沉浸在虚拟现实中时，都会评估他们的晕机症状，并执行言语工作记忆任务、视觉空间工作记忆任务和精神运动任务。在回答晕机问卷（3D UI）时，进行了眼动追踪来测量阅读时间和瞳孔测量。结果表明，快乐和平静的音乐大大降低了恶心相关症状的强度。然而，只有快乐的音乐显着降低了整体晕眩强度。重要的是，人们发现晕机症会降低言语工作记忆能力和瞳孔大小。此外，它还显着降低了精神运动（反应时间）和阅读能力。较高的游戏体验与较低的晕机症状相关。在控制游戏体验时，女性和男性参与者在网络晕眩方面没有显着差异。结果表明音乐在缓解晕动症方面的效率、游戏体验在晕动症中的重要作用，以及晕动症对瞳孔大小、认知、精神运动技能和阅读能力的显着影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了音乐、性别和游戏经验对虚拟现实（VR）中晕动症及其对认知和运动技能影响的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究尚未充分探讨晕动症的缓解方法及其对认知、运动能力的后续影响，需进一步分析音乐、性别和游戏经验等因素的作用。
AI.method: 通过两项研究，39名参与者在VR环境中接受三次不同音乐（平静、欢快、无音乐）条件下的晕动症诱发实验，评估其症状、工作记忆、心理运动能力和阅读表现，并结合眼动追踪数据。
AI.result: 欢快音乐显著降低整体晕动症强度，平静音乐减少恶心症状；晕动症损害语言工作记忆、瞳孔大小、心理运动反应时间和阅读能力；游戏经验越高，晕动症越轻，性别差异在控制游戏经验后不显著。
AI.conclusion: 音乐（尤其是欢快音乐）可有效缓解晕动症，游戏经验是关键影响因素，晕动症显著影响认知、运动及阅读能力。

The outcomes indicated the efficiency of music in mitigating cybersickness, the important role of gaming experience in cybersickness, and the significant effects of cybersickness on pupil size, cognition, psychomotor skills, and reading ability. 最近的研究试图找到减轻晕眩症的方法并检查其后果。在这个方向上，本文研究了晕眩症对 VR 中认知、运动和阅读表现的影响。此外，本文还评估了音乐对晕机症的缓解作用，以及性别的作用以及用户的计算、虚拟现实和游戏体验。本文报告了两项研究。在这项研究中，39 名参与者进行了四次评估，一次是在游乐设施之前（基线），然后是每次游乐设施之后一次（3 次游乐设施）。每次骑行时都会播放“平静”、“快乐”或“无音乐”。在每次骑行过程中，都会发生线性和角加速度，从而引起参与者的晕机症。在每次评估中，参与者在沉浸在虚拟现实中时，都会评估他们的晕机症状，并执行言语工作记忆任务、视觉空间工作记忆任务和精神运动任务。在回答晕机问卷（3D UI）时，进行了眼动追踪来测量阅读时间和瞳孔测量。结果表明，快乐和平静的音乐大大降低了恶心相关症状的强度。然而，只有快乐的音乐显着降低了整体晕眩强度。重要的是，人们发现晕机症会降低言语工作记忆能力和瞳孔大小。此外，它还显着降低了精神运动（反应时间）和阅读能力。较高的游戏体验与较低的晕机症状相关。在控制游戏体验时，女性和男性参与者在网络晕眩方面没有显着差异。结果表明音乐在缓解晕动症方面的效率、游戏体验在晕动症中的重要作用，以及晕动症对瞳孔大小、认知、精神运动技能和阅读能力的显着影响。 本文研究了音乐、性别和游戏经验对虚拟现实（VR）中晕动症及其对认知和运动技能影响的作用。 Panagiotis Kourtesis,Josie Linnell,Rayaan Amir,Ferran Argelaguet,Sarah E. MacPherson cs.HC

authors_text: Aashish Kolluri,Sarthak Choudhary,Bryan Hooi,Prateek Saxena
title: Scalable Neural Network Training over Distributed Graphs
title_zh: 分布式图上的可扩展神经网络训练
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) fuel diverse machine learning tasks involving graph-structured data, ranging from predicting protein structures to serving personalized recommendations. Real-world graph data must often be stored distributed across many machines not just because of capacity constraints, but because of compliance with data residency or privacy laws. In such setups, network communication is costly and becomes the main bottleneck to train GNNs. Optimizations for distributed GNN training have targeted data-level improvements so far -- via caching, network-aware partitioning, and sub-sampling -- that work for data center-like setups where graph data is accessible to a single entity and data transfer costs are ignored. We present RETEXO, the first framework which eliminates the severe communication bottleneck in distributed GNN training while respecting any given data partitioning configuration. The key is a new training procedure, lazy message passing, that reorders the sequence of training GNN elements. RETEXO achieves 1-2 orders of magnitude reduction in network data costs compared to standard GNN training, while retaining accuracy. RETEXO scales gracefully with increasing decentralization and decreasing bandwidth. It is the first framework that can be used to train GNNs at all network decentralization levels -- including centralized data-center networks, wide area networks, proximity networks, and edge networks.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) fuel diverse machine learning tasks involving graph-structured data, ranging from predicting protein structures to serving personalized recommendations. Real-world graph data must often be stored distributed across many machines not just because of capacity constraints, but because of compliance with data residency or privacy laws. In such setups, network communication is costly and becomes the main bottleneck to train GNNs. Optimizations for distributed GNN training have targeted data-level improvements so far -- via caching, network-aware partitioning, and sub-sampling -- that work for data center-like setups where graph data is accessible to a single entity and data transfer costs are ignored. We present RETEXO, the first framework which eliminates the severe communication bottleneck in distributed GNN training while respecting any given data partitioning configuration. The key is a new training procedure, lazy message passing, that reorders the sequence of training GNN elements. RETEXO achieves 1-2 orders of magnitude reduction in network data costs compared to standard GNN training, while retaining accuracy. RETEXO scales gracefully with increasing decentralization and decreasing bandwidth. It is the first framework that can be used to train GNNs at all network decentralization levels -- including centralized data-center networks, wide area networks, proximity networks, and edge networks.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 推动涉及图结构数据的各种机器学习任务，从预测蛋白质结构到提供个性化建议。现实世界的图形数据通常必须分布在许多机器上存储，这不仅是因为容量限制，还因为遵守数据驻留或隐私法。在这种设置中，网络通信成本高昂，成为训练 GNN 的主要瓶颈。到目前为止，分布式 GNN 训练的优化已经针对数据级别的改进——通过缓存、网络感知分区和子采样——适用于类似数据中心的设置，其中单个实体可以访问图数据，并且忽略数据传输成本。我们提出 RETEXO，这是第一个框架，它消除了分布式 GNN 训练中严重的通信瓶颈，同时尊重任何给定的数据分区配置。关键是一个新的训练过程，即延迟消息传递，它对训练 GNN 元素的序列进行重新排序。与标准 GNN 训练相比，RETEXO 实现了网络数据成本降低 1-2 个数量级，同时保持准确性。 RETEXO 随着去中心化的增加和带宽的减少而优雅地扩展。它是第一个可用于训练所有网络去中心化级别的 GNN 的框架，包括集中式数据中心网络、广域网、邻近网络和边缘网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RETEXO的框架，旨在解决分布式图神经网络（GNN）训练中的通信瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的图数据常因存储容量限制或数据驻留/隐私法规要求而分布于多台机器上，但现有优化方法无法有效应对分布式环境下的高通信成本问题。
AI.method: 通过引入新的训练方法——延迟消息传递（lazy message passing），重新排列GNN训练元素的顺序，以降低网络通信需求。
AI.result: 相比标准GNN训练，RETEXO将网络数据成本降低1-2个数量级，同时保持模型精度，并能适应不同去中心化程度的网络环境。
AI.conclusion: RETEXO是首个可适用于所有网络去中心化层级（从数据中心到边缘网络）的分布式GNN训练框架，显著提升了通信效率与可扩展性。

authors_text: Jawad Muhammad,Yunlong Wang,Junxing Hu,Kunbo Zhang,Zhenan Sun
title: CASIA-Iris-Africa: A Large-scale African Iris Image Database
title_zh: CASIA-Iris-Africa：大规模非洲虹膜图像数据库
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in Machine Intelligence Research Journal (MIR)
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in Machine Intelligence Research Journal (MIR)
abstract: Iris biometrics is a phenotypic biometric trait that has proven to be agnostic to human natural physiological changes. Research on iris biometrics has progressed tremendously, partly due to publicly available iris databases. Various databases have been available to researchers that address pressing iris biometric challenges such as constraint, mobile, multispectral, synthetics, long-distance, contact lenses, liveness detection, etc. However, these databases mostly contain subjects of Caucasian and Asian docents with very few Africans. Despite many investigative studies on racial bias in face biometrics, very few studies on iris biometrics have been published, mainly due to the lack of racially diverse large-scale databases containing sufficient iris samples of Africans in the public domain. Furthermore, most of these databases contain a relatively small number of subjects and labelled images. This paper proposes a large-scale African database named CASIA-Iris-Africa that can be used as a complementary database for the iris recognition community to mediate the effect of racial biases on Africans. The database contains 28,717 images of 1023 African subjects (2046 iris classes) with age, gender, and ethnicity attributes that can be useful in demographically sensitive studies of Africans. Sets of specific application protocols are incorporated with the database to ensure the database's variability and scalability. Performance results of some open-source SOTA algorithms on the database are presented, which will serve as baseline performances. The relatively poor performances of the baseline algorithms on the proposed database despite better performance on other databases prove that racial biases exist in these iris recognition algorithms. The database will be made available on our website: http://www.idealtest.org.

Research on iris biometrics has progressed tremendously, partly due to publicly available iris databases. Various databases have been available to researchers that address pressing iris biometric challenges such as constraint, mobile, multispectral, synthetics, long-distance, contact lenses, liveness detection, etc. However, these databases mostly contain subjects of Caucasian and Asian docents with very few Africans. Despite many investigative studies on racial bias in face biometrics, very few studies on iris biometrics have been published, mainly due to the lack of racially diverse large-scale databases containing sufficient iris samples of Africans in the public domain. Furthermore, most of these databases contain a relatively small number of subjects and labelled images. This paper proposes a large-scale African database named CASIA-Iris-Africa that can be used as a complementary database for the iris recognition community to mediate the effect of racial biases on Africans. The database contains 28,717 images of 1023 African subjects (2046 iris classes) with age, gender, and ethnicity attributes that can be useful in demographically sensitive studies of Africans. Sets of specific application protocols are incorporated with the database to ensure the database's variability and scalability. Performance results of some open-source SOTA algorithms on the database are presented, which will serve as baseline performances. The relatively poor performances of the baseline algorithms on the proposed database despite better performance on other databases prove that racial biases exist in these iris recognition algorithms. The database will be made available on our website: http://www.idealtest.org.
abstract_zh: 虹膜生物识别是一种表型生物识别特征，已被证明与人类自然生理变化无关。虹膜生物识别技术的研究取得了巨大进展，部分原因在于公开的虹膜数据库。研究人员可以使用各种数据库来解决紧迫的虹膜生物识别挑战，例如约束、移动、多光谱、合成、远距离、隐形眼镜、活体检测等。然而，这些数据库主要包含白人和亚洲人的主题，很少有非洲人。尽管有许多关于面部生物识别技术中种族偏见的调查研究，但关于虹膜生物识别技术的研究却很少发表，这主要是由于公共领域缺乏包含足够的非洲人虹膜样本的种族多样化的大规模数据库。此外，大多数这些数据库包含相对较少数量的主题和标记图像。本文提出了一个名为 CASIA-Iris-Africa 的大型非洲数据库，可以作为虹膜识别社区的补充数据库，以调解种族偏见对非洲人的影响。该数据库包含 1023 个非洲受试者（2046 个虹膜类别）的 28,717 张图像，具有年龄、性别和种族属性，可用于非洲人的人口统计敏感研究。一组特定的应用程序协议与数据库合并，以确保数据库的可变性和可扩展性。给出了一些开源SOTA算法在数据库上的性能结果，这将作为基准性能。尽管在其他数据库上性能较好，但基线算法在所提出的数据库上的性能相对较差，证明这些虹膜识别算法中存在种族偏见。该数据库将在我们的网站上提供：http://www.idealtest.org。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模非洲虹膜图像数据库CASIA-Iris-Africa，用于缓解虹膜识别算法中的种族偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有虹膜数据库缺乏非洲人群样本，导致算法存在种族偏见，而针对虹膜的种族偏见研究因数据不足极少开展。
AI.method: 采集1023名非洲受试者的28,717张虹膜图像，包含年龄、性别和种族属性，并设计应用协议验证数据库有效性，测试开源算法性能。
AI.result: 主流算法在该数据库表现较差，而其他数据库表现较好，证实了算法存在种族偏见。
AI.conclusion: CASIA-Iris-Africa数据库为研究非洲人群虹膜识别提供了基准数据，有助于开发更公平的算法。

The database will be made available on our website: http://www.idealtest.org. 虹膜生物识别是一种表型生物识别特征，已被证明与人类自然生理变化无关。虹膜生物识别技术的研究取得了巨大进展，部分原因在于公开的虹膜数据库。研究人员可以使用各种数据库来解决紧迫的虹膜生物识别挑战，例如约束、移动、多光谱、合成、远距离、隐形眼镜、活体检测等。然而，这些数据库主要包含白人和亚洲人的主题，很少有非洲人。尽管有许多关于面部生物识别技术中种族偏见的调查研究，但关于虹膜生物识别技术的研究却很少发表，这主要是由于公共领域缺乏包含足够的非洲人虹膜样本的种族多样化的大规模数据库。此外，大多数这些数据库包含相对较少数量的主题和标记图像。本文提出了一个名为 CASIA-Iris-Africa 的大型非洲数据库，可以作为虹膜识别社区的补充数据库，以调解种族偏见对非洲人的影响。该数据库包含 1023 个非洲受试者（2046 个虹膜类别）的 28,717 张图像，具有年龄、性别和种族属性，可用于非洲人的人口统计敏感研究。一组特定的应用程序协议与数据库合并，以确保数据库的可变性和可扩展性。给出了一些开源SOTA算法在数据库上的性能结果，这将作为基准性能。尽管在其他数据库上性能较好，但基线算法在所提出的数据库上的性能相对较差，证明这些虹膜识别算法中存在种族偏见。该数据库将在我们的网站上提供：http://www.idealtest.org。 本文提出一个大规模非洲虹膜图像数据库CASIA-Iris-Africa，用于缓解虹膜识别算法中的种族偏见问题。 Jawad Muhammad,Yunlong Wang,Junxing Hu,Kunbo Zhang,Zhenan Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyi Zhang,Isaac Tham,Zhaoyi Hou,Jiaxuan Ren,Liyang Zhou,Hainiu Xu,Li Zhang,Lara J. Martin,Rotem Dror,Sha Li,Heng Ji,Martha Palmer,Susan Brown,Reece Suchocki,Chris Callison-Burch
title: Human-in-the-Loop Schema Induction
title_zh: 人在环模式归纳
abstract: Schema induction builds a graph representation explaining how events unfold in a scenario. Existing approaches have been based on information retrieval (IR) and information extraction(IE), often with limited human curation. We demonstrate a human-in-the-loop schema induction system powered by GPT-3. We first describe the different modules of our system, including prompting to generate schematic elements, manual edit of those elements, and conversion of those into a schema graph. By qualitatively comparing our system to previous ones, we show that our system not only transfers to new domains more easily than previous approaches, but also reduces efforts of human curation thanks to our interactive interface.
summary: Schema induction builds a graph representation explaining how events unfold in a scenario. Existing approaches have been based on information retrieval (IR) and information extraction(IE), often with limited human curation. We demonstrate a human-in-the-loop schema induction system powered by GPT-3. We first describe the different modules of our system, including prompting to generate schematic elements, manual edit of those elements, and conversion of those into a schema graph. By qualitatively comparing our system to previous ones, we show that our system not only transfers to new domains more easily than previous approaches, but also reduces efforts of human curation thanks to our interactive interface.
abstract_zh: 模式归纳构建了一个图形表示，解释事件如何在场景中展开。现有方法基于信息检索（IR）和信息提取（IE），通常人工管理有限。我们演示了由 GPT-3 支持的人机循环模式归纳系统。我们首先描述系统的不同模块，包括提示生成原理图元素、手动编辑这些元素以及将它们转换为模式图。通过对我们的系统与以前的系统进行定性比较，我们表明，我们的系统不仅比以前的方法更容易转移到新领域，而且由于我们的交互式界面，还减少了人工管理的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人类反馈的模式归纳系统，利用GPT-3生成事件图谱并减少人工校对工作量。
AI.motivation: 现有模式归纳方法依赖信息检索和抽取技术，人工校对效率低且难以适应新领域。
AI.method: 基于GPT-3构建模块化系统，包含模式元素生成、人工编辑及图谱转换流程，并通过交互界面优化协作流程。
AI.result: 系统在跨领域适应性上优于传统方法，且交互设计使人工校对工作量减少。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作模式归纳系统能有效提升图谱构建效率与领域迁移能力。

authors_text: Sotiris Pelekis,Evangelos Karakolis,Francisco Silva,Vasileios Schoinas,Spiros Mouzakitis,Georgios Kormpakis,Nuno Amaro,John Psarras
title: In Search of Deep Learning Architectures for Load Forecasting: A Comparative Analysis and the Impact of the Covid-19 Pandemic on Model Performance
title_zh: 寻找用于负载预测的深度学习架构：比较分析以及 Covid-19 大流行对模型性能的影响
comment: ef:2022 13th International Conference on Information, Intelligence, Systems & Applications (IISA)
comments: ef:2022 13th International Conference on Information, Intelligence, Systems & Applications (IISA)
abstract: In power grids, short-term load forecasting (STLF) is crucial as it contributes to the optimization of their reliability, emissions, and costs, while it enables the participation of energy companies in the energy market. STLF is a challenging task, due to the complex demand of active and reactive power from multiple types of electrical loads and their dependence on numerous exogenous variables. Amongst them, special circumstances, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, can often be the reason behind distribution shifts of load series. This work conducts a comparative study of Deep Learning (DL) architectures, namely Neural Basis Expansion Analysis Time Series Forecasting (N-BEATS), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), and Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN), with respect to forecasting accuracy and training sustainability, meanwhile examining their out-of-distribution generalization capabilities during the COVID-19 pandemic era. A Pattern Sequence Forecasting (PSF) model is used as baseline. The case study focuses on day-ahead forecasts for the Portuguese national 15-minute resolution net load time series. The results can be leveraged by energy companies and network operators (i) to reinforce their forecasting toolkit with state-of-the-art DL models; (ii) to become aware of the serious consequences of crisis events on model performance; (iii) as a high-level model evaluation, deployment, and sustainability guide within a smart grid context.

This work conducts a comparative study of Deep Learning (DL) architectures, namely Neural Basis Expansion Analysis Time Series Forecasting (N-BEATS), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), and Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN), with respect to forecasting accuracy and training sustainability, meanwhile examining their out-of-distribution generalization capabilities during the COVID-19 pandemic era. A Pattern Sequence Forecasting (PSF) model is used as baseline. The case study focuses on day-ahead forecasts for the Portuguese national 15-minute resolution net load time series. The results can be leveraged by energy companies and network operators (i) to reinforce their forecasting toolkit with state-of-the-art DL models; (ii) to become aware of the serious consequences of crisis events on model performance; (iii) as a high-level model evaluation, deployment, and sustainability guide within a smart grid context.
abstract_zh: 在电网中，短期负荷预测（STLF）至关重要，因为它有助于优化电网的可靠性、排放和成本，同时使能源公司能够参与能源市场。 STLF 是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为多种类型的电力负载对有功和无功功率的复杂需求及其对众多外生变量的依赖。其中，特殊情况，例如COVID-19大流行，往往可能是负荷系列分布变化的原因。这项工作对深度学习（DL）架构，即神经基础扩展分析时间序列预测（N-BEATS）、长短期记忆（LSTM）和时间卷积网络（TCN）进行了预测准确性和训练可持续性的比较研究，同时检验了它们在COVID-19大流行期间的分布外泛化能力。模式序列预测 (PSF) 模型用作基线。该案例研究重点关注葡萄牙国家 15 分钟分辨率净负荷时间序列的日前预测。能源公司和网络运营商可以利用这些结果 (i) 通过最先进的深度学习模型强化其预测工具包； (ii) 意识到危机事件对模型性能的严重影响； (iii) 作为智能电网背景下的高级模型评估、部署和可持续性指南。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了深度学习模型（如N-BEATS、LSTM、TCN）在短期负荷预测中的性能，并分析了新冠疫情对模型表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 短期负荷预测对电网可靠性、成本优化至关重要，但受多种外部因素影响，特别是疫情等突发事件可能导致负荷分布突变，需评估模型在危机下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用葡萄牙全国15分钟分辨率净负荷数据，对比N-BEATS、LSTM、TCN等深度学习模型与基准PSF模型的预测精度、训练可持续性及疫情时期的分布外泛化能力。
AI.result: 结果显示先进深度学习模型在预测精度和可持续性上优于基准模型，但疫情等危机事件显著降低了模型性能，需警惕突发事件对预测的影响。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型可提升负荷预测能力，但能源公司需认识到危机事件对模型性能的潜在冲击，并在智能电网中制定相应的模型评估与部署策略。

authors_text: Mingyu Guo,Jialiang Li,Aneta Neumann,Frank Neumann,Hung Nguyen
title: Limited Query Graph Connectivity Test
title_zh: 有限查询图连接测试
abstract: We propose a combinatorial optimisation model called Limited Query Graph Connectivity Test. We consider a graph whose edges have two possible states (On/Off). The edges' states are hidden initially. We could query an edge to reveal its state. Given a source s and a destination t, we aim to test s-t connectivity by identifying either a path (consisting of only On edges) or a cut (consisting of only Off edges). We are limited to B queries, after which we stop regardless of whether graph connectivity is established. We aim to design a query policy that minimizes the expected number of queries. Our model is mainly motivated by a cyber security use case where we need to establish whether an attack path exists in a network, between a source and a destination. Edge query is resolved by manual effort from the IT admin, which is the motivation behind query minimization. Our model is highly related to monotone Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation (SBFE). There are two existing exact algorithms for SBFE that are prohibitively expensive. We propose a significantly more scalable exact algorithm. While previous exact algorithms only scale for trivial graphs (i.e., past works experimented on at most 20 edges), we empirically demonstrate that our algorithm is scalable for a wide range of much larger practical graphs (i.e., Windows domain network graphs with tens of thousands of edges). We propose three heuristics. Our best-performing heuristic is via reducing the search horizon of the exact algorithm. The other two are via reinforcement learning (RL) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS). We also derive an anytime algorithm for computing the performance lower bound. Experimentally, we show that all our heuristics are near optimal. The exact algorithm based heuristic outperforms all, surpassing RL, MCTS and 8 existing heuristics ported from SBFE and related literature.
summary: We propose a combinatorial optimisation model called Limited Query Graph Connectivity Test. We consider a graph whose edges have two possible states (On/Off). The edges' states are hidden initially. We could query an edge to reveal its state. Given a source s and a destination t, we aim to test s-t connectivity by identifying either a path (consisting of only On edges) or a cut (consisting of only Off edges). We are limited to B queries, after which we stop regardless of whether graph connectivity is established. We aim to design a query policy that minimizes the expected number of queries. Our model is mainly motivated by a cyber security use case where we need to establish whether an attack path exists in a network, between a source and a destination. Edge query is resolved by manual effort from the IT admin, which is the motivation behind query minimization. Our model is highly related to monotone Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation (SBFE). There are two existing exact algorithms for SBFE that are prohibitively expensive. We propose a significantly more scalable exact algorithm. While previous exact algorithms only scale for trivial graphs (i.e., past works experimented on at most 20 edges), we empirically demonstrate that our algorithm is scalable for a wide range of much larger practical graphs (i.e., Windows domain network graphs with tens of thousands of edges). We propose three heuristics. Our best-performing heuristic is via reducing the search horizon of the exact algorithm. The other two are via reinforcement learning (RL) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS). We also derive an anytime algorithm for computing the performance lower bound. Experimentally, we show that all our heuristics are near optimal. The exact algorithm based heuristic outperforms all, surpassing RL, MCTS and 8 existing heuristics ported from SBFE and related literature.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为有限查询图连接测试的组合优化模型。我们考虑一个图，其边有两种可能的状态（开/关）。边缘的状态最初是隐藏的。我们可以查询一条边来揭示它的状态。给定源 s 和目的地 t，我们的目标是通过识别路径（仅由 On 边组成）或切口（仅由 Off 边组成）来测试 s-t 连接性。我们仅限于 B 查询，之后无论图连接是否建立，我们都会停止。我们的目标是设计一种查询策略，最大限度地减少预期查询数量。我们的模型主要受网络安全用例的启发，在该用例中，我们需要确定网络中源和目的地之间是否存在攻击路径。边缘查询由 IT 管理员手动解决，这是查询最小化背后的动机。我们的模型与单调随机布尔函数评估（SBFE）高度相关。 SBFE 有两种现有的精确算法，但成本高昂。我们提出了一种可扩展性明显更高的精确算法。虽然以前的精确算法仅适用于普通图（即过去的工作最多在 20 条边上进行实验），但我们凭经验证明我们的算法可适用于各种更大的实际图（即具有数万条边的 Windows 域网络图）。我们提出三种启发法。我们表现​​最好的启发式方法是减少精确算法的搜索范围。另外两个是通过强化学习（RL）和蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）。我们还推导出一种用于计算性能下限的随时算法。通过实验，我们表明我们所有的启发式方法都接近最佳。基于精确算法的启发式算法优于所有算法，超越了 RL、MCTS 以及从 SBFE 和相关文献移植的 8 种现有启发式算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为'有限查询图连通性测试'的组合优化模型，旨在通过最少的边查询次数判断图中源点与终点的连通性，同时考虑边状态（开/关）的隐藏特性。
AI.motivation: 受网络安全场景启发，需在人工干预成本较高的情况下，通过最小化查询次数判断网络中是否存在攻击路径。
AI.method: 设计可扩展的精确算法及三种启发式方法（搜索范围缩减、强化学习、蒙特卡洛树搜索），并提出计算性能下限的任何时间算法。
AI.result: 实验表明算法可处理数万条边的Windows域网络图，最佳启发式方法优于现有8种启发式及RL/MCTS方法，接近最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效解决了大规模网络连通性验证问题，在网络安全等实际场景中具有重要应用价值。

search_text: Limited Query Graph Connectivity Test 有限查询图连接测试 We propose a combinatorial optimisation model called Limited Query Graph Connectivity Test. We consider a graph whose edges have two possible states (On/Off). The edges' states are hidden initially. We could query an edge to reveal its state. Given a source s and a destination t, we aim to test s-t connectivity by identifying either a path (consisting of only On edges) or a cut (consisting of only Off edges). We are limited to B queries, after which we stop regardless of whether graph connectivity is established. We aim to design a query policy that minimizes the expected number of queries. Our model is mainly motivated by a cyber security use case where we need to establish whether an attack path exists in a network, between a source and a destination. Edge query is resolved by manual effort from the IT admin, which is the motivation behind query minimization. Our model is highly related to monotone Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation (SBFE). There are two existing exact algorithms for SBFE that are prohibitively expensive. We propose a significantly more scalable exact algorithm. While previous exact algorithms only scale for trivial graphs (i.e., past works experimented on at most 20 edges), we empirically demonstrate that our algorithm is scalable for a wide range of much larger practical graphs (i.e., Windows domain network graphs with tens of thousands of edges). We propose three heuristics. Our best-performing heuristic is via reducing the search horizon of the exact algorithm. The other two are via reinforcement learning (RL) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS). We also derive an anytime algorithm for computing the performance lower bound. Experimentally, we show that all our heuristics are near optimal. The exact algorithm based heuristic outperforms all, surpassing RL, MCTS and 8 existing heuristics ported from SBFE and related literature. 我们提出了一种称为有限查询图连接测试的组合优化模型。我们考虑一个图，其边有两种可能的状态（开/关）。边缘的状态最初是隐藏的。我们可以查询一条边来揭示它的状态。给定源 s 和目的地 t，我们的目标是通过识别路径（仅由 On 边组成）或切口（仅由 Off 边组成）来测试 s-t 连接性。我们仅限于 B 查询，之后无论图连接是否建立，我们都会停止。我们的目标是设计一种查询策略，最大限度地减少预期查询数量。我们的模型主要受网络安全用例的启发，在该用例中，我们需要确定网络中源和目的地之间是否存在攻击路径。边缘查询由 IT 管理员手动解决，这是查询最小化背后的动机。我们的模型与单调随机布尔函数评估（SBFE）高度相关。 SBFE 有两种现有的精确算法，但成本高昂。我们提出了一种可扩展性明显更高的精确算法。虽然以前的精确算法仅适用于普通图（即过去的工作最多在 20 条边上进行实验），但我们凭经验证明我们的算法可适用于各种更大的实际图（即具有数万条边的 Windows 域网络图）。我们提出三种启发法。我们表现​​最好的启发式方法是减少精确算法的搜索范围。另外两个是通过强化学习（RL）和蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）。我们还推导出一种用于计算性能下限的随时算法。通过实验，我们表明我们所有的启发式方法都接近最佳。基于精确算法的启发式算法优于所有算法，超越了 RL、MCTS 以及从 SBFE 和相关文献移植的 8 种现有启发式算法。 本文提出一种称为'有限查询图连通性测试'的组合优化模型，旨在通过最少的边查询次数判断图中源点与终点的连通性，同时考虑边状态（开/关）的隐藏特性。 Mingyu Guo,Jialiang Li,Aneta Neumann,Frank Neumann,Hung Nguyen cs.DS,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Saqlain Hussain Shah,Muhammad Saad Saeed,Shah Nawaz,Muhammad Haroon Yousaf
title: Speaker Recognition in Realistic Scenario Using Multimodal Data
title_zh: 使用多模态数据的现实场景中的说话人识别
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'2023)
comments: Accepted at the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'2023)
abstract: In recent years, an association is established between faces and voices of celebrities leveraging large scale audio-visual information from YouTube. The availability of large scale audio-visual datasets is instrumental in developing speaker recognition methods based on standard Convolutional Neural Networks. Thus, the aim of this paper is to leverage large scale audio-visual information to improve speaker recognition task. To achieve this task, we proposed a two-branch network to learn joint representations of faces and voices in a multimodal system. Afterwards, features are extracted from the two-branch network to train a classifier for speaker recognition. We evaluated our proposed framework on a large scale audio-visual dataset named VoxCeleb$1$. Our results show that addition of facial information improved the performance of speaker recognition. Moreover, our results indicate that there is an overlap between face and voice.
summary: In recent years, an association is established between faces and voices of celebrities leveraging large scale audio-visual information from YouTube. The availability of large scale audio-visual datasets is instrumental in developing speaker recognition methods based on standard Convolutional Neural Networks. Thus, the aim of this paper is to leverage large scale audio-visual information to improve speaker recognition task. To achieve this task, we proposed a two-branch network to learn joint representations of faces and voices in a multimodal system. Afterwards, features are extracted from the two-branch network to train a classifier for speaker recognition. We evaluated our proposed framework on a large scale audio-visual dataset named VoxCeleb$1$. Our results show that addition of facial information improved the performance of speaker recognition. Moreover, our results indicate that there is an overlap between face and voice.
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用 YouTube 上的大规模视听信息，在名人的面孔和声音之间建立了关联。大规模视听数据集的可用性有助于开发基于标准卷积神经网络的说话人识别方法。因此，本文的目的是利用大规模视听信息来改进说话人识别任务。为了实现这一任务，我们提出了一个两分支网络来学习多模态系统中面部和声音的联合表示。然后，从两分支网络中提取特征来训练用于说话人识别的分类器。我们在名为 VoxCeleb$1$ 的大型视听数据集上评估了我们提出的框架。我们的结果表明，面部信息的添加提高了说话人识别的性能。此外，我们的结果表明面部和声音之间存在重叠。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用多模态数据（人脸和语音）改进真实场景下的说话人识别任务，提出了一种双分支网络结构进行联合表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别方法主要依赖单模态语音数据，而实际场景中人脸与语音存在关联性，利用多模态信息可提升识别性能。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络分别提取人脸和语音特征，通过联合表示学习融合多模态信息，使用VoxCeleb1数据集训练并评估分类器。
AI.result: 实验表明加入人脸信息后识别性能提升，且人脸与语音特征存在重叠区域，验证了多模态数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合能有效提升说话人识别准确率，人脸与语音特征的关联性为跨模态学习提供了理论依据。
