authors_text: Chengze Yu,Taiqiang Wu,Jiayi Li,Xingyu Bai,Yujiu Yang
title: SynGen: A Syntactic Plug-and-play Module for Generative Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: SynGen：用于生成基于方面的情感分析的语法即插即用模块
abstract: Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) is a sentiment analysis task at fine-grained level. Recently, generative frameworks have attracted increasing attention in ABSA due to their ability to unify subtasks and their continuity to upstream pre-training tasks. However, these generative models suffer from the neighboring dependency problem that induces neighboring words to get higher attention. In this paper, we propose SynGen, a plug-and-play syntactic information aware module. As a plug-in module, our SynGen can be easily applied to any generative framework backbones. The key insight of our module is to add syntactic inductive bias to attention assignment and thus direct attention to the correct target words. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first one to introduce syntactic information to generative ABSA frameworks. Our module design is based on two main principles: (1) maintaining the structural integrity of backbone PLMs and (2) disentangling the added syntactic information and original semantic information. Empirical results on four popular ABSA datasets demonstrate that SynGen enhanced model achieves a comparable performance to the state-of-the-art model with relaxed labeling specification and less training consumption.
summary: Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) is a sentiment analysis task at fine-grained level. Recently, generative frameworks have attracted increasing attention in ABSA due to their ability to unify subtasks and their continuity to upstream pre-training tasks. However, these generative models suffer from the neighboring dependency problem that induces neighboring words to get higher attention. In this paper, we propose SynGen, a plug-and-play syntactic information aware module. As a plug-in module, our SynGen can be easily applied to any generative framework backbones. The key insight of our module is to add syntactic inductive bias to attention assignment and thus direct attention to the correct target words. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first one to introduce syntactic information to generative ABSA frameworks. Our module design is based on two main principles: (1) maintaining the structural integrity of backbone PLMs and (2) disentangling the added syntactic information and original semantic information. Empirical results on four popular ABSA datasets demonstrate that SynGen enhanced model achieves a comparable performance to the state-of-the-art model with relaxed labeling specification and less training consumption.
abstract_zh: 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）是一种细粒度的情感分析任务。最近，生成框架由于其统一子任务的能力以及对上游预训练任务的连续性而在 ABSA 中引起了越来越多的关注。然而，这些生成模型存在相邻依赖问题，导致相邻单词获得更高的关注。在本文中，我们提出了 SynGen，一个即插即用的句法信息感知模块。作为插件模块，我们的 SynGen 可以轻松应用于任何生成框架主干。我们模块的关键见解是将句法归纳偏差添加到注意分配中，从而将注意力引导到正确的目标词上。据我们所知，我们是第一个将句法信息引入生成 ABSA 框架的人。我们的模块设计基于两个主要原则：(1) 保持骨干 PLM 的结构完整性；(2) 解开添加的句法信息和原始语义信息。四个流行的 ABSA 数据集的实证结果表明，SynGen 增强模型通过宽松的标签规范和更少的训练消耗实现了与最先进模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SynGen模块，通过引入句法信息改进生成式细粒度情感分析模型，解决邻近依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式模型在方面级情感分析中存在邻近词注意力偏差问题，需通过句法引导实现精准目标词定位。
AI.method: 设计可插拔的SynGen模块，在注意力机制中注入句法归纳偏置，同时保持预训练模型结构完整性和语义信息独立性。
AI.result: 在四个主流数据集上验证，SynGen增强模型在宽松标注规范下达到SOTA性能，训练消耗更低。

search_text: SynGen: A Syntactic Plug-and-play Module for Generative Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis SynGen：用于生成基于方面的情感分析的语法即插即用模块 Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) is a sentiment analysis task at fine-grained level. Recently, generative frameworks have attracted increasing attention in ABSA due to their ability to unify subtasks and their continuity to upstream pre-training tasks. However, these generative models suffer from the neighboring dependency problem that induces neighboring words to get higher attention. In this paper, we propose SynGen, a plug-and-play syntactic information aware module. As a plug-in module, our SynGen can be easily applied to any generative framework backbones. The key insight of our module is to add syntactic inductive bias to attention assignment and thus direct attention to the correct target words. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first one to introduce syntactic information to generative ABSA frameworks. Our module design is based on two main principles: (1) maintaining the structural integrity of backbone PLMs and (2) disentangling the added syntactic information and original semantic information. Empirical results on four popular ABSA datasets demonstrate that SynGen enhanced model achieves a comparable performance to the state-of-the-art model with relaxed labeling specification and less training consumption. 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）是一种细粒度的情感分析任务。最近，生成框架由于其统一子任务的能力以及对上游预训练任务的连续性而在 ABSA 中引起了越来越多的关注。然而，这些生成模型存在相邻依赖问题，导致相邻单词获得更高的关注。在本文中，我们提出了 SynGen，一个即插即用的句法信息感知模块。作为插件模块，我们的 SynGen 可以轻松应用于任何生成框架主干。我们模块的关键见解是将句法归纳偏差添加到注意分配中，从而将注意力引导到正确的目标词上。据我们所知，我们是第一个将句法信息引入生成 ABSA 框架的人。我们的模块设计基于两个主要原则：(1) 保持骨干 PLM 的结构完整性；(2) 解开添加的句法信息和原始语义信息。四个流行的 ABSA 数据集的实证结果表明，SynGen 增强模型通过宽松的标签规范和更少的训练消耗实现了与最先进模型相当的性能。 本文提出SynGen模块，通过引入句法信息改进生成式细粒度情感分析模型，解决邻近依赖问题。 Chengze Yu,Taiqiang Wu,Jiayi Li,Xingyu Bai,Yujiu Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yukuan Jia,Ruiqing Mao,Yuxuan Sun,Sheng Zhou,Zhisheng Niu
title: MASS: Mobility-Aware Sensor Scheduling of Cooperative Perception for Connected Automated Driving
title_zh: MASS：互联自动驾驶协作感知的移动感知传感器调度
abstract: Timely and reliable environment perception is fundamental to safe and efficient automated driving. However, the perception of standalone intelligence inevitably suffers from occlusions. A new paradigm, Cooperative Perception (CP), comes to the rescue by sharing sensor data from another perspective, i.e., from a cooperative vehicle (CoV). Due to the limited communication bandwidth, it is essential to schedule the most beneficial CoV, considering both the viewpoints and communication quality. Existing methods rely on the exchange of meta-information, such as visibility maps, to predict the perception gains from nearby vehicles, which induces extra communication and processing overhead. In this paper, we propose a new approach, learning while scheduling, for distributed scheduling of CP. The solution enables CoVs to predict the perception gains using past observations, leveraging the temporal continuity of perception gains. Specifically, we design a mobility-aware sensor scheduling (MASS) algorithm based on the restless multi-armed bandit (RMAB) theory to maximize the expected average perception gain. An upper bound on the expected average learning regret is proved, which matches the lower bound of any online algorithm up to a logarithmic factor. Extensive simulations are carried out on realistic traffic traces. The results show that the proposed MASS algorithm achieves the best average perception gain and improves recall by up to 4.2 percentage points compared to other learning-based algorithms. Finally, a case study on a trace of LiDAR frames qualitatively demonstrates the superiority of adaptive exploration, the key element of the MASS algorithm.
summary: Timely and reliable environment perception is fundamental to safe and efficient automated driving. However, the perception of standalone intelligence inevitably suffers from occlusions. A new paradigm, Cooperative Perception (CP), comes to the rescue by sharing sensor data from another perspective, i.e., from a cooperative vehicle (CoV). Due to the limited communication bandwidth, it is essential to schedule the most beneficial CoV, considering both the viewpoints and communication quality. Existing methods rely on the exchange of meta-information, such as visibility maps, to predict the perception gains from nearby vehicles, which induces extra communication and processing overhead. In this paper, we propose a new approach, learning while scheduling, for distributed scheduling of CP. The solution enables CoVs to predict the perception gains using past observations, leveraging the temporal continuity of perception gains. Specifically, we design a mobility-aware sensor scheduling (MASS) algorithm based on the restless multi-armed bandit (RMAB) theory to maximize the expected average perception gain. An upper bound on the expected average learning regret is proved, which matches the lower bound of any online algorithm up to a logarithmic factor. Extensive simulations are carried out on realistic traffic traces. The results show that the proposed MASS algorithm achieves the best average perception gain and improves recall by up to 4.2 percentage points compared to other learning-based algorithms. Finally, a case study on a trace of LiDAR frames qualitatively demonstrates the superiority of adaptive exploration, the key element of the MASS algorithm.
abstract_zh: 及时、可靠的环境感知是安全、高效的自动驾驶的基础。然而，对独立智能的感知不可避免地会受到遮挡。一种新的范式，即合作感知（CP），通过从另一个角度（即来自合作车辆（CoV））共享传感器数据来解决这一问题。由于通信带宽有限，必须考虑观点和通信质量来调度最有益的 CoV。现有方法依赖于元信息（例如可见性地图）的交换来预测附近车辆的感知增益，这会导致额外的通信和处理开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的方法，即边调度边学习，用于 CP 的分布式调度。该解决方案使冠状病毒能够利用过去的观察结果来预测感知增益，并利用感知增益的时间连续性。具体来说，我们设计了一种基于不安定多臂老虎机（RMAB）理论的移动感知传感器调度（MASS）算法，以最大化预期平均感知增益。证明了预期平均学习后悔的上限，它与任何在线算法的下限匹配到对数因子。对真实的交通轨迹进行了广泛的模拟。结果表明，与其他基于学习的算法相比，所提出的 MASS 算法实现了最佳平均感知增益，并将召回率提高了高达 4.2 个百分点。最后，通过对 LiDAR 帧轨迹的案例研究定性地证明了自适应探索（MASS 算法的关键要素）的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MASS的移动性感知传感器调度方法，用于连接自动驾驶中的协同感知，通过选择最优的协同车辆以提升环境感知的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 单智能体感知易受遮挡影响，现有协同感知方法依赖元信息交换导致通信开销大，需设计无需元信息的高效调度策略。
AI.method: 基于无休止多臂老虎机（RMAB）理论，设计MASS算法，利用感知增益的时间连续性进行学习与调度，无需交换元信息。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，MASS算法在平均感知增益和召回率上优于其他算法，召回率提升最高达4.2个百分点，并通过LiDAR帧迹验证了自适应探索的优势。
AI.conclusion: MASS通过平衡探索与利用，实现了通信高效的协同感知调度，为连接自动驾驶提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Lam Pham,Cam Le,Dat Ngo,Anh Nguyen,Jasmin Lampert,Alexander Schindler,Ian McLoughlin
title: A Light-weight Deep Learning Model for Remote Sensing Image Classification
title_zh: 一种用于遥感图像分类的轻量级深度学习模型
abstract: In this paper, we present a high-performance and light-weight deep learning model for Remote Sensing Image Classification (RSIC), the task of identifying the aerial scene of a remote sensing image. To this end, we first valuate various benchmark convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures: MobileNet V1/V2, ResNet 50/151V2, InceptionV3/InceptionResNetV2, EfficientNet B0/B7, DenseNet 121/201, ConNeXt Tiny/Large. Then, the best performing models are selected to train a compact model in a teacher-student arrangement. The knowledge distillation from the teacher aims to achieve high performance with significantly reduced complexity. By conducting extensive experiments on the NWPU-RESISC45 benchmark, our proposed teacher-student models outperforms the state-of-the-art systems, and has potential to be applied on a wide rage of edge devices.
summary: In this paper, we present a high-performance and light-weight deep learning model for Remote Sensing Image Classification (RSIC), the task of identifying the aerial scene of a remote sensing image. To this end, we first valuate various benchmark convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures: MobileNet V1/V2, ResNet 50/151V2, InceptionV3/InceptionResNetV2, EfficientNet B0/B7, DenseNet 121/201, ConNeXt Tiny/Large. Then, the best performing models are selected to train a compact model in a teacher-student arrangement. The knowledge distillation from the teacher aims to achieve high performance with significantly reduced complexity. By conducting extensive experiments on the NWPU-RESISC45 benchmark, our proposed teacher-student models outperforms the state-of-the-art systems, and has potential to be applied on a wide rage of edge devices.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于遥感图像分类（RSIC）的高性能、轻量级深度学习模型，该模型用于识别遥感图像的航空场景。为此，我们首先评估各种基准卷积神经网络（CNN）架构：MobileNet V1/V2、ResNet 50/151V2、InceptionV3/InceptionResNetV2、EfficientNet B0/B7、DenseNet 121/201、ConNeXt Tiny/Large。然后，选择表现最好的模型来在师生安排中训练紧凑模型。老师的知识蒸馏旨在以显着降低复杂性的方式实现高性能。通过在 NWPU-RESISC45 基准上进行广泛的实验，我们提出的师生模型优于最先进的系统，并且有潜力广泛应用于边缘设备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高性能且轻量的深度学习模型，用于遥感图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型复杂度高，难以在边缘设备上部署，需开发轻量化模型以实现高效遥感图像分类。
AI.method: 评估多种基准CNN架构，选择表现最佳模型作为教师网络，通过知识蒸馏训练学生网络以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 在NWPU-RESISC45基准测试中，所提模型优于现有系统，具备在边缘设备广泛应用的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的轻量化遥感图像分类模型，通过知识蒸馏平衡性能与复杂度，适合边缘计算场景。

search_text: A Light-weight Deep Learning Model for Remote Sensing Image Classification 一种用于遥感图像分类的轻量级深度学习模型 In this paper, we present a high-performance and light-weight deep learning model for Remote Sensing Image Classification (RSIC), the task of identifying the aerial scene of a remote sensing image. To this end, we first valuate various benchmark convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures: MobileNet V1/V2, ResNet 50/151V2, InceptionV3/InceptionResNetV2, EfficientNet B0/B7, DenseNet 121/201, ConNeXt Tiny/Large. Then, the best performing models are selected to train a compact model in a teacher-student arrangement. The knowledge distillation from the teacher aims to achieve high performance with significantly reduced complexity. By conducting extensive experiments on the NWPU-RESISC45 benchmark, our proposed teacher-student models outperforms the state-of-the-art systems, and has potential to be applied on a wide rage of edge devices. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于遥感图像分类（RSIC）的高性能、轻量级深度学习模型，该模型用于识别遥感图像的航空场景。为此，我们首先评估各种基准卷积神经网络（CNN）架构：MobileNet V1/V2、ResNet 50/151V2、InceptionV3/InceptionResNetV2、EfficientNet B0/B7、DenseNet 121/201、ConNeXt Tiny/Large。然后，选择表现最好的模型来在师生安排中训练紧凑模型。老师的知识蒸馏旨在以显着降低复杂性的方式实现高性能。通过在 NWPU-RESISC45 基准上进行广泛的实验，我们提出的师生模型优于最先进的系统，并且有潜力广泛应用于边缘设备。 本文提出一种高性能且轻量的深度学习模型，用于遥感图像分类任务。 Lam Pham,Cam Le,Dat Ngo,Anh Nguyen,Jasmin Lampert,Alexander Schindler,Ian McLoughlin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyuan Liu,Minglei Fu,Andong Liu,Wenan Zhang,Bo Chen
title: A Homotopy Invariant Based on Convex Dissection Topology and a Distance Optimal Path Planning Algorithm
title_zh: 基于凸剖拓扑的同伦不变量和距离最优路径规划算法
comment: Please note that the letter version of this paper is currently under review by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L). In comparison to the letter version, this full version provides more rigorous proofs and reasoning for the CDT encoder, along with numerous practical theorems and corollaries. The complete paper consists of 17 pages, 14 figures, and 7 tables
comments: Please note that the letter version of this paper is currently under review by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L). In comparison to the letter version, this full version provides more rigorous proofs and reasoning for the CDT encoder, along with numerous practical theorems and corollaries. The complete paper consists of 17 pages, 14 figures, and 7 tables
abstract: The concept of path homotopy has received widely attention in the field of path planning in recent years. In this article, a homotopy invariant based on convex dissection for a two-dimensional bounded Euclidean space is developed, which can efficiently encode all homotopy path classes between any two points. Thereafter, the optimal path planning task consists of two steps: (i) search for the homotopy path class that may contain the optimal path, and (ii) obtain the shortest homotopy path in this class. Furthermore, an optimal path planning algorithm called CDT-RRT* (Rapidly-exploring Random Tree Star based on Convex Division Topology) is proposed. We designed an efficient sampling formula for CDT-RRT*, which gives it a tendency to actively explore unknown homotopy classes, and incorporated the principles of the Elastic Band algorithm to obtain the shortest path in each class. Through a series of experiments, it was determined that the performance of the proposed algorithm is comparable with state-of-the-art path planning algorithms. Hence, the application significance of the developed homotopy invariant in the field of path planning was verified.

Thereafter, the optimal path planning task consists of two steps: (i) search for the homotopy path class that may contain the optimal path, and (ii) obtain the shortest homotopy path in this class. Furthermore, an optimal path planning algorithm called CDT-RRT* (Rapidly-exploring Random Tree Star based on Convex Division Topology) is proposed. We designed an efficient sampling formula for CDT-RRT*, which gives it a tendency to actively explore unknown homotopy classes, and incorporated the principles of the Elastic Band algorithm to obtain the shortest path in each class. Through a series of experiments, it was determined that the performance of the proposed algorithm is comparable with state-of-the-art path planning algorithms. Hence, the application significance of the developed homotopy invariant in the field of path planning was verified.
abstract_zh: 路径同伦的概念近年来在路径规划领域受到广泛关注。在本文中，提出了一种基于二维有界欧几里得空间的凸剖分的同伦不变量，它可以有效地编码任意两点之间的所有同伦路径类。此后，最优路径规划任务包括两个步骤：（i）搜索可能包含最优路径的同伦路径类，以及（ii）获得该类中的最短同伦路径。此外，还提出了一种称为CDT-RRT*（基于凸除拓扑的快速探索随机树星）的最优路径规划算法。我们为 CDT-RRT* 设计了一个高效的采样公式，使其倾向于主动探索未知的同伦类，并结合 Elastic Band 算法的原理来获得每个类中的最短路径。通过一系列实验，确定所提出算法的性能可与最先进的路径规划算法相媲美。由此验证了所提出的同伦不变量在路径规划领域的应用意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于凸分割拓扑的同伦不变量及一种距离最优路径规划算法CDT-RRT*，用于解决二维欧几里得空间中的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在处理复杂环境中的同伦类路径搜索时效率不足，需开发能高效编码同伦类并寻找最短路径的算法。
AI.method: 通过构建凸分割拓扑的同伦不变量，将路径规划分为同伦类筛选与类内最短路径求解两阶段，并设计CDT-RRT*算法结合弹性带原理实现优化。
AI.result: 实验表明CDT-RRT*算法性能与先进方法相当，验证了所提出的同伦不变量在路径规划中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 基于凸分割拓扑的同伦不变量为路径规划提供了新思路，CDT-RRT*算法有效实现了最优路径搜索。

authors_text: Zhi Li,Jinghao Xin,Ning Li
title: Autonomous Exploration and Mapping for Mobile Robots via Cumulative Curriculum Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过累积课程强化学习的移动机器人自主探索和绘图
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has been widely applied in autonomous exploration and mapping tasks, but often struggles with the challenges of sampling efficiency, poor adaptability to unknown map sizes, and slow simulation speed. To speed up convergence, we combine curriculum learning (CL) with DRL, and first propose a Cumulative Curriculum Reinforcement Learning (CCRL) training framework to alleviate the issue of catastrophic forgetting faced by general CL. Besides, we present a novel state representation, which considers a local egocentric map and a global exploration map resized to the fixed dimension, so as to flexibly adapt to environments with various sizes and shapes. Additionally, for facilitating the fast training of DRL models, we develop a lightweight grid-based simulator, which can substantially accelerate simulation compared to popular robot simulation platforms such as Gazebo. Based on the customized simulator, comprehensive experiments have been conducted, and the results show that the CCRL framework not only mitigates the catastrophic forgetting problem, but also improves the sample efficiency and generalization of DRL models, compared to general CL as well as without a curriculum. Our code is available at https://github.com/BeamanLi/CCRL_Exploration.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has been widely applied in autonomous exploration and mapping tasks, but often struggles with the challenges of sampling efficiency, poor adaptability to unknown map sizes, and slow simulation speed. To speed up convergence, we combine curriculum learning (CL) with DRL, and first propose a Cumulative Curriculum Reinforcement Learning (CCRL) training framework to alleviate the issue of catastrophic forgetting faced by general CL. Besides, we present a novel state representation, which considers a local egocentric map and a global exploration map resized to the fixed dimension, so as to flexibly adapt to environments with various sizes and shapes. Additionally, for facilitating the fast training of DRL models, we develop a lightweight grid-based simulator, which can substantially accelerate simulation compared to popular robot simulation platforms such as Gazebo. Based on the customized simulator, comprehensive experiments have been conducted, and the results show that the CCRL framework not only mitigates the catastrophic forgetting problem, but also improves the sample efficiency and generalization of DRL models, compared to general CL as well as without a curriculum. Our code is available at https://github.com/BeamanLi/CCRL_Exploration.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）已广泛应用于自主探索和建图任务，但常常面临采样效率、对未知地图尺寸适应性差和模拟速度慢的挑战。为了加速收敛，我们将课程学习（CL）与DRL相结合，并首先提出了累积课程强化学习（CCRL）训练框架，以缓解通用CL面临的灾难性遗忘问题。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的状态表示，它考虑了调整到固定维度的局部自我中心地图和全局探索地图，以便灵活地适应各种大小和形状的环境。此外，为了促进 DRL 模型的快速训练，我们开发了一种轻量级的基于网格的模拟器，与 Gazebo 等流行的机器人模拟平台相比，它可以大大加快模拟速度。基于定制的模拟器，进行了全面的实验，结果表明，与通用 CL 以及无课程相比，CCRL 框架不仅减轻了灾难性遗忘问题，而且提高了 DRL 模型的样本效率和泛化能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/BeamanLi/CCRL_Exploration 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于累积课程强化学习（CCRL）的框架，用于解决移动机器人自主探索与地图构建中的效率与适应性问题。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习（DRL）在自主探索与地图构建任务中存在采样效率低、对未知地图规模适应性差及仿真速度慢等挑战。
AI.method: 结合课程学习（CL）与DRL，提出CCRL框架缓解灾难性遗忘问题；设计融合局部自中心地图与全局探索地图的状态表示；开发轻量级网格化仿真器加速训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，CCRL框架相比传统课程学习和无课程方法，在样本效率、泛化能力及适应不同规模环境方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CCRL通过改进课程学习机制和状态表示，有效提升了移动机器人自主探索与地图构建的效率与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Kechun Xu,Runjian Chen,Shuqi Zhao,Zizhang Li,Hongxiang Yu,Ci Chen,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Failure-aware Policy Learning for Self-assessable Robotics Tasks
title_zh: 自评估机器人任务的故障感知策略学习
abstract: Self-assessment rules play an essential role in safe and effective real-world robotic applications, which verify the feasibility of the selected action before actual execution. But how to utilize the self-assessment results to re-choose actions remains a challenge. Previous methods eliminate the selected action evaluated as failed by the self-assessment rules, and re-choose one with the next-highest affordance~(i.e. process-of-elimination strategy [1]), which ignores the dependency between the self-assessment results and the remaining untried actions. However, this dependency is important since the previous failures might help trim the remaining over-estimated actions. In this paper, we set to investigate this dependency by learning a failure-aware policy. We propose two architectures for the failure-aware policy by representing the self-assessment results of previous failures as the variable state, and leveraging recurrent neural networks to implicitly memorize the previous failures. Experiments conducted on three tasks demonstrate that our method can achieve better performances with higher task success rates by less trials. Moreover, when the actions are correlated, learning a failure-aware policy can achieve better performance than the process-of-elimination strategy.
summary: Self-assessment rules play an essential role in safe and effective real-world robotic applications, which verify the feasibility of the selected action before actual execution. But how to utilize the self-assessment results to re-choose actions remains a challenge. Previous methods eliminate the selected action evaluated as failed by the self-assessment rules, and re-choose one with the next-highest affordance~(i.e. process-of-elimination strategy [1]), which ignores the dependency between the self-assessment results and the remaining untried actions. However, this dependency is important since the previous failures might help trim the remaining over-estimated actions. In this paper, we set to investigate this dependency by learning a failure-aware policy. We propose two architectures for the failure-aware policy by representing the self-assessment results of previous failures as the variable state, and leveraging recurrent neural networks to implicitly memorize the previous failures. Experiments conducted on three tasks demonstrate that our method can achieve better performances with higher task success rates by less trials. Moreover, when the actions are correlated, learning a failure-aware policy can achieve better performance than the process-of-elimination strategy.
abstract_zh: 自评估规则在安全有效的现实机器人应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，它在实际执行之前验证所选动作的可行性。但如何利用自我评估结果重新选择行动仍然是一个挑战。以前的方法消除了自我评估规则评估为失败的所选动作，并重新选择具有次高可供性的动作~（即消除过程策略[1]），它忽略了自我评估结果与剩余未尝试动作之间的依赖性。然而，这种依赖性很重要，因为之前的失败可能有助于减少剩余的高估操作。在本文中，我们通过学习故障感知策略来研究这种依赖性。我们提出了两种故障感知策略架构，将先前故障的自我评估结果表示为变量状态，并利用循环神经网络隐式记忆先前的故障。对三个任务进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以通过更少的试验获得更好的性能和更高的任务成功率。此外，当动作相关时，学习故障感知策略可以比消除过程策略获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种失败感知策略学习方法，用于自我评估的机器人任务，以提高任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法在利用自我评估结果重新选择动作时忽略了失败结果与剩余未尝试动作之间的依赖关系，这限制了性能。
AI.method: 作者通过将先前失败的自我评估结果表示为变量状态，并利用循环神经网络隐式记忆之前的失败，提出了两种失败感知策略架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三个任务中能以更少的尝试次数实现更高的任务成功率，尤其在动作相关的情况下表现优于消除策略。
AI.conclusion: 学习失败感知策略可以有效利用失败信息，提高机器人任务的性能，特别是在动作相关的情况下。

However, this dependency is important since the previous failures might help trim the remaining over-estimated actions. In this paper, we set to investigate this dependency by learning a failure-aware policy. Experiments conducted on three tasks demonstrate that our method can achieve better performances with higher task success rates by less trials. authors_text: Yanqi Chen,Zhengyu Ma,Wei Fang,Xiawu Zheng,Zhaofei Yu,Yonghong Tian
title: A Unified Framework for Soft Threshold Pruning
title_zh: 软阈值剪枝的统一框架
comment: To appear in the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
comments: To appear in the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
abstract: Soft threshold pruning is among the cutting-edge pruning methods with state-of-the-art performance. However, previous methods either perform aimless searching on the threshold scheduler or simply set the threshold trainable, lacking theoretical explanation from a unified perspective. In this work, we reformulate soft threshold pruning as an implicit optimization problem solved using the Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (ISTA), a classic method from the fields of sparse recovery and compressed sensing. Under this theoretical framework, all threshold tuning strategies proposed in previous studies of soft threshold pruning are concluded as different styles of tuning $L_1$-regularization term. We further derive an optimal threshold scheduler through an in-depth study of threshold scheduling based on our framework. This scheduler keeps $L_1$-regularization coefficient stable, implying a time-invariant objective function from the perspective of optimization. In principle, the derived pruning algorithm could sparsify any mathematical model trained via SGD. We conduct extensive experiments and verify its state-of-the-art performance on both Artificial Neural Networks (ResNet-50 and MobileNet-V1) and Spiking Neural Networks (SEW ResNet-18) on ImageNet datasets. On the basis of this framework, we derive a family of pruning methods, including sparsify-during-training, early pruning, and pruning at initialization. The code is available at https://github.com/Yanqi-Chen/LATS.
summary: Soft threshold pruning is among the cutting-edge pruning methods with state-of-the-art performance. However, previous methods either perform aimless searching on the threshold scheduler or simply set the threshold trainable, lacking theoretical explanation from a unified perspective. In this work, we reformulate soft threshold pruning as an implicit optimization problem solved using the Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (ISTA), a classic method from the fields of sparse recovery and compressed sensing. Under this theoretical framework, all threshold tuning strategies proposed in previous studies of soft threshold pruning are concluded as different styles of tuning $L_1$-regularization term. We further derive an optimal threshold scheduler through an in-depth study of threshold scheduling based on our framework. This scheduler keeps $L_1$-regularization coefficient stable, implying a time-invariant objective function from the perspective of optimization. In principle, the derived pruning algorithm could sparsify any mathematical model trained via SGD. We conduct extensive experiments and verify its state-of-the-art performance on both Artificial Neural Networks (ResNet-50 and MobileNet-V1) and Spiking Neural Networks (SEW ResNet-18) on ImageNet datasets. On the basis of this framework, we derive a family of pruning methods, including sparsify-during-training, early pruning, and pruning at initialization. The code is available at https://github.com/Yanqi-Chen/LATS.
abstract_zh: 软阈值剪枝是具有最先进性能的前沿剪枝方法之一。然而，以往的方法要么对阈值调度器进行漫无目的的搜索，要么简单地设置可训练的阈值，缺乏统一视角的理论解释。在这项工作中，我们将软阈值剪枝重新表述为使用迭代收缩阈值算法（ISTA）解决的隐式优化问题，这是稀疏恢复和压缩感知领域的经典方法。在此理论框架下，以往软阈值剪枝研究中提出的所有阈值调整策略都可以归结为不同风格的调整$L_1$-正则化项。我们通过基于我们的框架的阈值调度的深入研究，进一步推导出最优阈值调度器。该调度器保持 $L_1$-正则化系数稳定，这意味着从优化的角度来看，目标函数是时不变的。原则上，衍生的剪枝算法可以稀疏任何通过 SGD 训练的数学模型。我们进行了广泛的实验，并在 ImageNet 数据集上的人工神经网络（ResNet-50 和 MobileNet-V1）和尖峰神经网络（SEW ResNet-18）上验证了其最先进的性能。在此框架的基础上，我们推导出一系列剪枝方法，包括训练期间稀疏化、早期剪枝和初始化时剪枝。代码可在 https://github.com/Yanqi-Chen/LATS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的软阈值剪枝框架，通过理论分析和优化算法改进，实现了高效的模型剪枝。
AI.motivation: 现有软阈值剪枝方法缺乏统一理论指导，阈值调度策略要么随机搜索要么简单可训练，无法解释其内在机制。
AI.method: 将软阈值剪枝重构为隐式优化问题，基于ISTA算法框架，推导出保持L1正则化系数稳定的最优阈值调度器。
AI.result: 在ResNet-50、MobileNet-V1和SEW ResNet-18等网络上达到SOTA剪枝效果，支持训练中剪枝、早期剪枝等多种方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为软阈值剪枝提供了理论统一性，衍生出多种有效剪枝策略，代码已开源验证方法普适性。

authors_text: Haixing Dai,Zhengliang Liu,Wenxiong Liao,Xiaoke Huang,Yihan Cao,Zihao Wu,Lin Zhao,Shaochen Xu,Wei Liu,Ninghao Liu,Sheng Li,Dajiang Zhu,Hongmin Cai,Lichao Sun,Quanzheng Li,Dinggang Shen,Tianming Liu,Xiang Li
title: AugGPT: Leveraging ChatGPT for Text Data Augmentation
title_zh: AugGPT：利用 ChatGPT 进行文本数据增强
abstract: Text data augmentation is an effective strategy for overcoming the challenge of limited sample sizes in many natural language processing (NLP) tasks. This challenge is especially prominent in the few-shot learning scenario, where the data in the target domain is generally much scarcer and of lowered quality. A natural and widely-used strategy to mitigate such challenges is to perform data augmentation to better capture the data invariance and increase the sample size. However, current text data augmentation methods either can't ensure the correct labeling of the generated data (lacking faithfulness) or can't ensure sufficient diversity in the generated data (lacking compactness), or both. Inspired by the recent success of large language models, especially the development of ChatGPT, which demonstrated improved language comprehension abilities, in this work, we propose a text data augmentation approach based on ChatGPT (named AugGPT). AugGPT rephrases each sentence in the training samples into multiple conceptually similar but semantically different samples. The augmented samples can then be used in downstream model training. Experiment results on few-shot learning text classification tasks show the superior performance of the proposed AugGPT approach over state-of-the-art text data augmentation methods in terms of testing accuracy and distribution of the augmented samples.
summary: Text data augmentation is an effective strategy for overcoming the challenge of limited sample sizes in many natural language processing (NLP) tasks. This challenge is especially prominent in the few-shot learning scenario, where the data in the target domain is generally much scarcer and of lowered quality. A natural and widely-used strategy to mitigate such challenges is to perform data augmentation to better capture the data invariance and increase the sample size. However, current text data augmentation methods either can't ensure the correct labeling of the generated data (lacking faithfulness) or can't ensure sufficient diversity in the generated data (lacking compactness), or both. Inspired by the recent success of large language models, especially the development of ChatGPT, which demonstrated improved language comprehension abilities, in this work, we propose a text data augmentation approach based on ChatGPT (named AugGPT). AugGPT rephrases each sentence in the training samples into multiple conceptually similar but semantically different samples. The augmented samples can then be used in downstream model training. Experiment results on few-shot learning text classification tasks show the superior performance of the proposed AugGPT approach over state-of-the-art text data augmentation methods in terms of testing accuracy and distribution of the augmented samples.
abstract_zh: 文本数据增强是克服许多自然语言处理（NLP）任务中样本量有限的挑战的有效策略。这一挑战在小样本学习场景中尤为突出，其中目标域中的数据通常更加稀缺且质量较低。缓解此类挑战的一种自然且广泛使用的策略是执行数据增强，以更好地捕获数据不变性并增加样本量。然而，当前的文本数据增强方法要么无法确保生成的数据的正确标记（缺乏忠实性），要么无法确保生成的数据具有足够的多样性（缺乏紧凑性），或者两者兼而有之。受到大型语言模型最近成功的启发，特别是 ChatGPT 的发展，它证明了语言理解能力的提高，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 ChatGPT 的文本数据增强方法（称为 AugGPT）。 AugGPT 将训练样本中的每个句子重新表述为多个概念相似但语义不同的样本。然后，增强的样本可以用于下游模型训练。少样本学习文本分类任务的实验结果表明，在测试准确性和增强样本的分布方面，所提出的 AugGPT 方法比最先进的文本数据增强方法具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AugGPT方法，利用ChatGPT进行文本数据增强，以解决自然语言处理任务中样本量不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本数据增强方法存在生成数据标签不准确或多样性不足的问题，而ChatGPT的强大多语言理解能力为解决这一挑战提供了新思路。
AI.method: 通过ChatGPT将训练样本中的每个句子重述为多个语义不同但概念相似的样本，从而实现数据增强。
AI.result: 在少样本文本分类任务中，AugGPT在测试准确率和增强样本分布方面优于现有最先进的数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: AugGPT通过结合ChatGPT的语言理解能力，有效提升了文本数据增强的准确性和多样性，为少样本学习场景提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: AugGPT: Leveraging ChatGPT for Text Data Augmentation AugGPT：利用 ChatGPT 进行文本数据增强 Text data augmentation is an effective strategy for overcoming the challenge of limited sample sizes in many natural language processing (NLP) tasks. This challenge is especially prominent in the few-shot learning scenario, where the data in the target domain is generally much scarcer and of lowered quality. A natural and widely-used strategy to mitigate such challenges is to perform data augmentation to better capture the data invariance and increase the sample size. However, current text data augmentation methods either can't ensure the correct labeling of the generated data (lacking faithfulness) or can't ensure sufficient diversity in the generated data (lacking compactness), or both. Inspired by the recent success of large language models, especially the development of ChatGPT, which demonstrated improved language comprehension abilities, in this work, we propose a text data augmentation approach based on ChatGPT (named AugGPT). AugGPT rephrases each sentence in the training samples into multiple conceptually similar but semantically different samples. The augmented samples can then be used in downstream model training. Experiment results on few-shot learning text classification tasks show the superior performance of the proposed AugGPT approach over state-of-the-art text data augmentation methods in terms of testing accuracy and distribution of the augmented samples. 文本数据增强是克服许多自然语言处理（NLP）任务中样本量有限的挑战的有效策略。这一挑战在小样本学习场景中尤为突出，其中目标域中的数据通常更加稀缺且质量较低。缓解此类挑战的一种自然且广泛使用的策略是执行数据增强，以更好地捕获数据不变性并增加样本量。然而，当前的文本数据增强方法要么无法确保生成的数据的正确标记（缺乏忠实性），要么无法确保生成的数据具有足够的多样性（缺乏紧凑性），或者两者兼而有之。受到大型语言模型最近成功的启发，特别是 ChatGPT 的发展，它证明了语言理解能力的提高，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 ChatGPT 的文本数据增强方法（称为 AugGPT）。 AugGPT 将训练样本中的每个句子重新表述为多个概念相似但语义不同的样本。然后，增强的样本可以用于下游模型训练。少样本学习文本分类任务的实验结果表明，在测试准确性和增强样本的分布方面，所提出的 AugGPT 方法比最先进的文本数据增强方法具有优越的性能。 本文提出AugGPT方法，利用ChatGPT进行文本数据增强，以解决自然语言处理任务中样本量不足的问题。 Haixing Dai,Zhengliang Liu,Wenxiong Liao,Xiaoke Huang,Yihan Cao,Zihao Wu,Lin Zhao,Shaochen Xu,Wei Liu,Ninghao Liu,Sheng Li,Dajiang Zhu,Hongmin Cai,Lichao Sun,Quanzheng Li,Dinggang Shen,Tianming Liu,Xiang Li cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cedric Le Gentil,Othmane-Latif Ouabi,Lan Wu,Cedric Pradalier,Teresa Vidal-Calleja
title: Accurate Gaussian-Process-based Distance Fields with applications to Echolocation and Mapping
title_zh: 基于高斯过程的精确距离场及其在回声定位和测绘中的应用
abstract: This paper introduces a novel method to estimate distance fields from noisy point clouds using Gaussian Process (GP) regression. Distance fields, or distance functions, gained popularity for applications like point cloud registration, odometry, SLAM, path planning, shape reconstruction, etc. A distance field provides a continuous representation of the scene defined as the shortest distance from any query point and the closest surface. The key concept of the proposed method is the transformation of a GP-inferred latent scalar field into an accurate distance field by using a reverting function related to the kernel inverse. The latent field can be interpreted as a smooth occupancy map. This paper provides the theoretical derivation of the proposed method as well as a novel uncertainty proxy for the distance estimates. The improved performance compared with existing distance fields is demonstrated with simulated experiments. The level of accuracy of the proposed approach enables novel applications that rely on precise distance estimation: this work presents echolocation and mapping frameworks for ultrasonic-guided wave sensing in metallic structures. These methods leverage the proposed distance field with a physics-based measurement model accounting for the propagation of the ultrasonic waves in the material. Real-world experiments are conducted to demonstrate the soundness of these frameworks.
summary: This paper introduces a novel method to estimate distance fields from noisy point clouds using Gaussian Process (GP) regression. Distance fields, or distance functions, gained popularity for applications like point cloud registration, odometry, SLAM, path planning, shape reconstruction, etc. A distance field provides a continuous representation of the scene defined as the shortest distance from any query point and the closest surface. The key concept of the proposed method is the transformation of a GP-inferred latent scalar field into an accurate distance field by using a reverting function related to the kernel inverse. The latent field can be interpreted as a smooth occupancy map. This paper provides the theoretical derivation of the proposed method as well as a novel uncertainty proxy for the distance estimates. The improved performance compared with existing distance fields is demonstrated with simulated experiments. The level of accuracy of the proposed approach enables novel applications that rely on precise distance estimation: this work presents echolocation and mapping frameworks for ultrasonic-guided wave sensing in metallic structures. These methods leverage the proposed distance field with a physics-based measurement model accounting for the propagation of the ultrasonic waves in the material. Real-world experiments are conducted to demonstrate the soundness of these frameworks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种使用高斯过程（GP）回归估计噪声点云距离场的新方法。距离场或距离函数在点云配准、里程计、SLAM、路径规划、形状重建等应用中广受欢迎。距离场提供场景的连续表示，定义为距任何查询点和最近表面的最短距离。该方法的关键概念是通过使用与核逆相关的恢复函数将 GP 推断的潜在标量场转换为精确的距离场。潜场可以解释为平滑的占用图。本文提供了所提出方法的理论推导以及距离估计的新型不确定性代理。通过模拟实验证明了与现有距离场相比改进的性能。所提出方法的精确度水平使得依赖于精确距离估计的新颖应用成为可能：这项工作提出了金属结构中超声波导波传感的回声定位和映射框架。这些方法利用所提出的距离场和基于物理的测量模型来解释超声波在材料中的传播。进行现实世界的实验来证明这些框架的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程回归的噪声点云距离场估计方法，并应用于超声波引导的回声定位与地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统距离场方法在处理噪声点云时精度不足，难以满足SLAM、路径规划等场景对精确距离估计的需求。
AI.method: 通过高斯过程推断潜在标量场，结合核逆相关反函数转换为距离场，同时提出距离估计的不确定性代理模型。
AI.result: 实验表明方法优于现有技术，实现了超声波在金属结构中的精确距离估计与新型传感框架验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了距离场估计精度，为依赖精确距离的回声定位与映射应用提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Yaqi Liu,Binbin Lv,Xin Jin,Xiaoyu Chen,Xiaokun Zhang
title: TBFormer: Two-Branch Transformer for Image Forgery Localization
title_zh: TBFormer：用于图像伪造定位的两分支变压器
abstract: Image forgery localization aims to identify forged regions by capturing subtle traces from high-quality discriminative features. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-style network with two feature extraction branches for image forgery localization, and it is named as Two-Branch Transformer (TBFormer). Firstly, two feature extraction branches are elaborately designed, taking advantage of the discriminative stacked Transformer layers, for both RGB and noise domain features. Secondly, an Attention-aware Hierarchical-feature Fusion Module (AHFM) is proposed to effectively fuse hierarchical features from two different domains. Although the two feature extraction branches have the same architecture, their features have significant differences since they are extracted from different domains. We adopt position attention to embed them into a unified feature domain for hierarchical feature investigation. Finally, a Transformer decoder is constructed for feature reconstruction to generate the predicted mask. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Image forgery localization aims to identify forged regions by capturing subtle traces from high-quality discriminative features. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-style network with two feature extraction branches for image forgery localization, and it is named as Two-Branch Transformer (TBFormer). Firstly, two feature extraction branches are elaborately designed, taking advantage of the discriminative stacked Transformer layers, for both RGB and noise domain features. Secondly, an Attention-aware Hierarchical-feature Fusion Module (AHFM) is proposed to effectively fuse hierarchical features from two different domains. Although the two feature extraction branches have the same architecture, their features have significant differences since they are extracted from different domains. We adopt position attention to embed them into a unified feature domain for hierarchical feature investigation. Finally, a Transformer decoder is constructed for feature reconstruction to generate the predicted mask. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 图像伪造定位旨在通过捕获高质量判别特征的细微痕迹来识别伪造区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有两个特征提取分支的 Transformer 式网络，用于图像伪造定位，并将其命名为两分支 Transformer（TBFormer）。首先，利用判别性堆叠 Transformer 层，针对 RGB 和噪声域特征精心设计了两个特征提取分支。其次，提出了一种注意感知的分层特征融合模块（AHFM）来有效地融合来自两个不同领域的分层特征。尽管两个特征提取分支具有相同的架构，但由于它们是从不同的领域提取的，因此它们的特征存在显着差异。我们采用位置注意力将它们嵌入到统一的特征域中以进行分层特征研究。最后，构建一个 Transformer 解码器进行特征重建，以生成预测掩模。对公开数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支Transformer网络（TBFormer），用于图像伪造定位任务，通过融合RGB域和噪声域特征提升伪造区域检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉图像伪造的细微痕迹，且跨域特征融合能力不足，需设计更高效的特征提取与融合机制。
AI.method: 设计双分支结构分别提取RGB和噪声域特征，通过注意力感知的层次化融合模块（AHFM）对齐跨域特征，最后利用Transformer解码器生成伪造区域预测掩码。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，TBFormer在伪造定位任务中优于现有方法，具有更高的检测精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TBFormer通过双分支特征提取与跨域融合机制，有效提升了图像伪造定位的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: TBFormer: Two-Branch Transformer for Image Forgery Localization TBFormer：用于图像伪造定位的两分支变压器 Image forgery localization aims to identify forged regions by capturing subtle traces from high-quality discriminative features. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-style network with two feature extraction branches for image forgery localization, and it is named as Two-Branch Transformer (TBFormer). Firstly, two feature extraction branches are elaborately designed, taking advantage of the discriminative stacked Transformer layers, for both RGB and noise domain features. Secondly, an Attention-aware Hierarchical-feature Fusion Module (AHFM) is proposed to effectively fuse hierarchical features from two different domains. Although the two feature extraction branches have the same architecture, their features have significant differences since they are extracted from different domains. We adopt position attention to embed them into a unified feature domain for hierarchical feature investigation. Finally, a Transformer decoder is constructed for feature reconstruction to generate the predicted mask. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model. 图像伪造定位旨在通过捕获高质量判别特征的细微痕迹来识别伪造区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有两个特征提取分支的 Transformer 式网络，用于图像伪造定位，并将其命名为两分支 Transformer（TBFormer）。首先，利用判别性堆叠 Transformer 层，针对 RGB 和噪声域特征精心设计了两个特征提取分支。其次，提出了一种注意感知的分层特征融合模块（AHFM）来有效地融合来自两个不同领域的分层特征。尽管两个特征提取分支具有相同的架构，但由于它们是从不同的领域提取的，因此它们的特征存在显着差异。我们采用位置注意力将它们嵌入到统一的特征域中以进行分层特征研究。最后，构建一个 Transformer 解码器进行特征重建，以生成预测掩模。对公开数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出模型的有效性。 本文提出一种双分支Transformer网络（TBFormer），用于图像伪造定位任务，通过融合RGB域和噪声域特征提升伪造区域检测精度。 Yaqi Liu,Binbin Lv,Xin Jin,Xiaoyu Chen,Xiaokun Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Hongyang Li,Ailing Zeng,Feng Li,Shilong Liu,Xingyu Liao,Lei Zhang
title: Introducing Depth into Transformer-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 深入介绍基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测
abstract: In this paper, we present DAT, a Depth-Aware Transformer framework designed for camera-based 3D detection. Our model is based on observing two major issues in existing methods: large depth translation errors and duplicate predictions along depth axes. To mitigate these issues, we propose two key solutions within DAT. To address the first issue, we introduce a Depth-Aware Spatial Cross-Attention (DA-SCA) module that incorporates depth information into spatial cross-attention when lifting image features to 3D space. To address the second issue, we introduce an auxiliary learning task called Depth-aware Negative Suppression loss. First, based on their reference points, we organize features as a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) feature map. Then, we sample positive and negative features along each object ray that connects an object and a camera and train the model to distinguish between them. The proposed DA-SCA and DNS methods effectively alleviate these two problems. We show that DAT is a versatile method that enhances the performance of all three popular models, BEVFormer, DETR3D, and PETR. Our evaluation on BEVFormer demonstrates that DAT achieves a significant improvement of +2.8 NDS on nuScenes val under the same settings. Moreover, when using pre-trained VoVNet-99 as the backbone, DAT achieves strong results of 60.0 NDS and 51.5 mAP on nuScenes test. Our code will be soon.
summary: In this paper, we present DAT, a Depth-Aware Transformer framework designed for camera-based 3D detection. Our model is based on observing two major issues in existing methods: large depth translation errors and duplicate predictions along depth axes. To mitigate these issues, we propose two key solutions within DAT. To address the first issue, we introduce a Depth-Aware Spatial Cross-Attention (DA-SCA) module that incorporates depth information into spatial cross-attention when lifting image features to 3D space. To address the second issue, we introduce an auxiliary learning task called Depth-aware Negative Suppression loss. First, based on their reference points, we organize features as a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) feature map. Then, we sample positive and negative features along each object ray that connects an object and a camera and train the model to distinguish between them. The proposed DA-SCA and DNS methods effectively alleviate these two problems. We show that DAT is a versatile method that enhances the performance of all three popular models, BEVFormer, DETR3D, and PETR. Our evaluation on BEVFormer demonstrates that DAT achieves a significant improvement of +2.8 NDS on nuScenes val under the same settings. Moreover, when using pre-trained VoVNet-99 as the backbone, DAT achieves strong results of 60.0 NDS and 51.5 mAP on nuScenes test. Our code will be soon.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 DAT，一种专为基于相机的 3D 检测而设计的深度感知 Transformer 框架。我们的模型基于观察现有方法中的两个主要问题：大的深度平移误差和沿深度轴的重复预测。为了缓解这些问题，我们在 DAT 中提出了两个关键解决方案。为了解决第一个问题，我们引入了深度感知空间交叉注意力（DA-SCA）模块，该模块在将图像特征提升到 3D 空间时将深度信息合并到空间交叉注意力中。为了解决第二个问题，我们引入了一种称为深度感知负抑制损失的辅助学习任务。首先，根据它们的参考点，我们将特征组织为鸟瞰图（BEV）特征图。然后，我们沿着连接物体和相机的每条物体射线对正特征和负特征进行采样，并训练模型来区分它们。所提出的DA-SCA和DNS方法有效地缓解了这两个问题。我们证明 DAT 是一种通用方法，可以增强所有三种流行模型（BEVFormer、DETR3D 和 PETR）的性能。我们对 BEVFormer 的评估表明，在相同设置下，DAT 在 nuScenes val 上实现了 +2.8 NDS 的显着改进。此外，当使用预训练的 VoVNet-99 作为主干时，DAT 在 nuScenes 测试中取得了 60.0 NDS 和 51.5 mAP 的强劲结果。我们的代码很快就会出现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的深度感知3D目标检测框架DAT，旨在解决现有方法在深度转换误差和深度轴重复预测方面的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的3D检测方法存在深度转换误差大和深度轴预测重复的问题，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 提出Depth-Aware Spatial Cross-Attention（DA-SCA）模块融合深度信息，并设计Depth-aware Negative Suppression（DNS）损失函数，通过鸟瞰图特征映射和正负样本区分优化模型。
AI.result: 在BEVFormer模型上，DAT在nuScenes验证集上NDS提升2.8；使用VoVNet-99主干时，测试集达到60.0 NDS和51.5 mAP。
AI.conclusion: DAT方法有效缓解了深度感知问题，可通用增强多种主流3D检测模型性能，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Introducing Depth into Transformer-based 3D Object Detection 深入介绍基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测 In this paper, we present DAT, a Depth-Aware Transformer framework designed for camera-based 3D detection. Our model is based on observing two major issues in existing methods: large depth translation errors and duplicate predictions along depth axes. To mitigate these issues, we propose two key solutions within DAT. To address the first issue, we introduce a Depth-Aware Spatial Cross-Attention (DA-SCA) module that incorporates depth information into spatial cross-attention when lifting image features to 3D space. To address the second issue, we introduce an auxiliary learning task called Depth-aware Negative Suppression loss. First, based on their reference points, we organize features as a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) feature map. Then, we sample positive and negative features along each object ray that connects an object and a camera and train the model to distinguish between them. The proposed DA-SCA and DNS methods effectively alleviate these two problems. We show that DAT is a versatile method that enhances the performance of all three popular models, BEVFormer, DETR3D, and PETR. Our evaluation on BEVFormer demonstrates that DAT achieves a significant improvement of +2.8 NDS on nuScenes val under the same settings. Moreover, when using pre-trained VoVNet-99 as the backbone, DAT achieves strong results of 60.0 NDS and 51.5 mAP on nuScenes test. authors_text: Daiqing Qi,Handong Zhao,Sheng Li
title: Better Generative Replay for Continual Federated Learning
title_zh: 更好的生成重播以实现持续联邦学习
abstract: Federated learning is a technique that enables a centralized server to learn from distributed clients via communications without accessing the client local data. However, existing federated learning works mainly focus on a single task scenario with static data. In this paper, we introduce the problem of continual federated learning, where clients incrementally learn new tasks and history data cannot be stored due to certain reasons, such as limited storage and data retention policy. Generative replay based methods are effective for continual learning without storing history data, but adapting them for this setting is challenging. By analyzing the behaviors of clients during training, we find that the unstable training process caused by distributed training on non-IID data leads to a notable performance degradation. To address this problem, we propose our FedCIL model with two simple but effective solutions: model consolidation and consistency enforcement. Our experimental results on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baselines.
summary: Federated learning is a technique that enables a centralized server to learn from distributed clients via communications without accessing the client local data. However, existing federated learning works mainly focus on a single task scenario with static data. In this paper, we introduce the problem of continual federated learning, where clients incrementally learn new tasks and history data cannot be stored due to certain reasons, such as limited storage and data retention policy. Generative replay based methods are effective for continual learning without storing history data, but adapting them for this setting is challenging. By analyzing the behaviors of clients during training, we find that the unstable training process caused by distributed training on non-IID data leads to a notable performance degradation. To address this problem, we propose our FedCIL model with two simple but effective solutions: model consolidation and consistency enforcement. Our experimental results on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baselines.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种技术，使集中式服务器能够通过通信向分布式客户端学习，而无需访问客户端本地数据。然而，现有的联邦学习工作主要集中在具有静态数据的单一任务场景。在本文中，我们介绍了持续联邦学习的问题，其中客户端增量学习新任务，并且由于某些原因（例如有限的存储和数据保留策略）无法存储历史数据。基于生成重放的方法对于持续学习非常有效，无需存储历史数据，但使其适应这种设置具有挑战性。通过分析训练过程中客户端的行为，我们发现非独立同分布数据上的分布式训练导致训练过程不稳定，导致性能显着下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 FedCIL 模型，该模型具有两个简单但有效的解决方案：模型整合和一致性执行。我们在多个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedCIL模型，解决持续联邦学习中因无法存储历史数据导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习主要针对单一任务和静态数据，而实际场景中客户端需持续学习新任务且受限于存储条件，传统生成重放方法在此设置下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出FedCIL模型，通过模型整合（consolidation）和一致性强制（consistency enforcement）两种机制优化分布式非独立同分布数据下的训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，FedCIL方法显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedCIL有效缓解了持续联邦学习中的历史数据存储限制与训练不稳定性矛盾，为该领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yufei Wang,Yi Yu,Wenhan Yang,Lanqing Guo,Lap-Pui Chau,Alex Kot,Bihan Wen
title: Raw Image Reconstruction with Learned Compact Metadata
title_zh: 使用学习的紧凑元数据重建原始图像
abstract: While raw images exhibit advantages over sRGB images (e.g., linearity and fine-grained quantization level), they are not widely used by common users due to the large storage requirements. Very recent works propose to compress raw images by designing the sampling masks in the raw image pixel space, leading to suboptimal image representations and redundant metadata. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to learn a compact representation in the latent space serving as the metadata in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, we propose a novel sRGB-guided context model with improved entropy estimation strategies, which leads to better reconstruction quality, smaller size of metadata, and faster speed. We illustrate how the proposed raw image compression scheme can adaptively allocate more bits to image regions that are important from a global perspective. The experimental results show that the proposed method can achieve superior raw image reconstruction results using a smaller size of the metadata on both uncompressed sRGB images and JPEG images.
summary: While raw images exhibit advantages over sRGB images (e.g., linearity and fine-grained quantization level), they are not widely used by common users due to the large storage requirements. Very recent works propose to compress raw images by designing the sampling masks in the raw image pixel space, leading to suboptimal image representations and redundant metadata. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to learn a compact representation in the latent space serving as the metadata in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, we propose a novel sRGB-guided context model with improved entropy estimation strategies, which leads to better reconstruction quality, smaller size of metadata, and faster speed. We illustrate how the proposed raw image compression scheme can adaptively allocate more bits to image regions that are important from a global perspective. The experimental results show that the proposed method can achieve superior raw image reconstruction results using a smaller size of the metadata on both uncompressed sRGB images and JPEG images.
abstract_zh: 虽然原始图像比 sRGB 图像具有优势（例如线性度和细粒度量化级别），但由于存储需求较大，它们并未被普通用户广泛使用。最近的工作提出通过在原始图像像素空间中设计采样掩模来压缩原始图像，从而导致次优的图像表示和冗余的元数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来学习潜在空间中的紧凑表示，以端到端的方式充当元数据。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 sRGB 引导的上下文模型，该模型具有改进的熵估计策略，可以带来更好的重建质量、更小的元数据大小和更快的速度。我们说明了所提出的原始图像压缩方案如何自适应地将更多位分配给从全局角度来看很重要的图像区域。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以在未压缩的 sRGB 图像和 JPEG 图像上使用较小尺寸的元数据实现优异的原始图像重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习紧凑的潜在空间表示来压缩原始图像的新框架，以解决原始图像存储需求大且现有压缩方法效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 原始图像虽具有线性等优势，但因存储需求大未被广泛使用。现有压缩方法在原始像素空间设计采样掩码，导致表示次优且元数据冗余。
AI.method: 提出端到端学习潜在空间紧凑表示作为元数据，并设计sRGB引导的上下文模型与改进熵估计策略，实现自适应位分配。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在未压缩sRGB图像和JPEG图像上均能以更小的元数据大小实现更优的原始图像重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过紧凑元数据学习和自适应位分配，在压缩效率和重建质量上优于现有方案。

search_text: Raw Image Reconstruction with Learned Compact Metadata 使用学习的紧凑元数据重建原始图像 While raw images exhibit advantages over sRGB images (e.g., linearity and fine-grained quantization level), they are not widely used by common users due to the large storage requirements. Very recent works propose to compress raw images by designing the sampling masks in the raw image pixel space, leading to suboptimal image representations and redundant metadata. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to learn a compact representation in the latent space serving as the metadata in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, we propose a novel sRGB-guided context model with improved entropy estimation strategies, which leads to better reconstruction quality, smaller size of metadata, and faster speed. We illustrate how the proposed raw image compression scheme can adaptively allocate more bits to image regions that are important from a global perspective. The experimental results show that the proposed method can achieve superior raw image reconstruction results using a smaller size of the metadata on both uncompressed sRGB images and JPEG images. 虽然原始图像比 sRGB 图像具有优势（例如线性度和细粒度量化级别），但由于存储需求较大，它们并未被普通用户广泛使用。最近的工作提出通过在原始图像像素空间中设计采样掩模来压缩原始图像，从而导致次优的图像表示和冗余的元数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来学习潜在空间中的紧凑表示，以端到端的方式充当元数据。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 sRGB 引导的上下文模型，该模型具有改进的熵估计策略，可以带来更好的重建质量、更小的元数据大小和更快的速度。我们说明了所提出的原始图像压缩方案如何自适应地将更多位分配给从全局角度来看很重要的图像区域。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以在未压缩的 sRGB 图像和 JPEG 图像上使用较小尺寸的元数据实现优异的原始图像重建结果。 本文提出了一种通过学习紧凑的潜在空间表示来压缩原始图像的新框架，以解决原始图像存储需求大且现有压缩方法效率低的问题。 Yufei Wang,Yi Yu,Wenhan Yang,Lanqing Guo,Lap-Pui Chau,Alex Kot,Bihan Wen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Juan Castorena,L. Turin Dickman,Adam J. Killebrew,James R Gattiker,Rod Linn,E. Louise Loudermilk
title: ForestAlign: Automatic Forest Structure-based Alignment for Multi-view TLS and ALS Point Clouds
title_zh: ForestAlign：针对多视图 TLS 和 ALS 点云的基于森林结构的自动对齐
abstract: Access to highly detailed models of heterogeneous forests, spanning from the near surface to above the tree canopy at varying scales, is increasingly in demand. This enables advanced computational tools for analysis, planning, and ecosystem management. LiDAR sensors, available through terrestrial (TLS) and aerial (ALS) scanning platforms, have become established as the primary technologies for forest monitoring due to their capability to rapidly collect precise 3D structural information. Forestry now recognizes the benefits that a multi-scale approach can bring by leveraging the strengths of each platform. Here, we propose ForestAlign: an effective, target-less, and fully automatic co-registration method for aligning forest point clouds collected from multi-view, multi-scale LiDAR sources. ForestAlign employs an incremental alignment strategy, grouping and aggregating 3D points based on increasing levels of structural complexity. This strategy aligns 3D points from less complex (e.g., ground) to more complex structures (e.g., tree trunks, foliage) sequentially, refining alignment iteratively. Empirical evidence demonstrates the method's effectiveness in aligning scans, with RMSE errors of less than 0.75 degrees in rotation and 5.5 cm in translation in the TLS to TLS case and of 0.8 degrees and 8 cm in the TLS to ALS case, respectively. These results demonstrate that ForestAlign can effectively integrate TLS-to-TLS and TLS-to-ALS forest scans, making it a valuable tool in GPS-denied areas without relying on manually placed targets, while achieving high performance.
summary: Access to highly detailed models of heterogeneous forests, spanning from the near surface to above the tree canopy at varying scales, is increasingly in demand. This enables advanced computational tools for analysis, planning, and ecosystem management. LiDAR sensors, available through terrestrial (TLS) and aerial (ALS) scanning platforms, have become established as the primary technologies for forest monitoring due to their capability to rapidly collect precise 3D structural information. Forestry now recognizes the benefits that a multi-scale approach can bring by leveraging the strengths of each platform. Here, we propose ForestAlign: an effective, target-less, and fully automatic co-registration method for aligning forest point clouds collected from multi-view, multi-scale LiDAR sources. ForestAlign employs an incremental alignment strategy, grouping and aggregating 3D points based on increasing levels of structural complexity. This strategy aligns 3D points from less complex (e.g., ground) to more complex structures (e.g., tree trunks, foliage) sequentially, refining alignment iteratively. Empirical evidence demonstrates the method's effectiveness in aligning scans, with RMSE errors of less than 0.75 degrees in rotation and 5.5 cm in translation in the TLS to TLS case and of 0.8 degrees and 8 cm in the TLS to ALS case, respectively. These results demonstrate that ForestAlign can effectively integrate TLS-to-TLS and TLS-to-ALS forest scans, making it a valuable tool in GPS-denied areas without relying on manually placed targets, while achieving high performance.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越需要获得高度详细的异质森林模型，从近地表到树冠上方不同尺度的模型。这使得先进的计算工具能够用于分析、规划和生态系统管理。可通过地面 (TLS) 和空中 (ALS) 扫描平台使用的 LiDAR 传感器由于能够快速收集精确的 3D 结构信息，已成为森林监测的主要技术。林业现在认识到多尺度方法可以通过利用每个平台的优势带来的好处。在这里，我们提出了 ForestAlign：一种有效的、无目标的、全自动的联合配准方法，用于对齐从多视图、多尺度 LiDAR 源收集的森林点云。 ForestAlign 采用增量对齐策略，根据结构复杂程度的增加对 3D 点进行分组和聚合。该策略将 3D 点从不太复杂的结构（例如地面）依次对齐到更复杂的结构（例如树干、树叶），迭代地优化对齐。经验证据证明了该方法在对齐扫描方面的有效性，在 TLS 到 TLS 的情况下，RMSE 旋转误差小于 0.75 度，平移误差小于 5.5 cm，在 TLS 到 ALS 的情况下，RMSE 误差分别小于 0.8 度和 8 cm。这些结果表明，ForestAlign 可以有效集成 TLS-to-TLS 和 TLS-to-ALS 森林扫描，使其成为 GPS 拒绝区域的宝贵工具，无需依赖手动放置目标，同时实现高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需目标物的全自动多视角TLS和ALS点云对齐方法ForestAlign，用于森林结构的多尺度LiDAR数据整合。
AI.motivation: 异质森林的多尺度建模需求推动了TLS和ALS LiDAR技术的结合，但现有方法依赖人工目标物且难以在GPS受限区域应用，亟需自动化对齐方案。
AI.method: 采用增量对齐策略，按结构复杂度分层聚合点云数据，从简单结构（如地面）到复杂结构（如树干、树冠）逐步优化对齐，实现迭代精炼。
AI.result: TLS到TLS的旋转误差小于0.75度、平移误差5.5厘米；TLS到ALS的旋转误差0.8度、平移误差8厘米，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ForestAlign无需人工目标即可高效整合多源LiDAR数据，在GPS受限区域具有重要应用价值，为森林监测提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: Benzhi Wang,Yang Yang,Jinlin Wu,Guo-jun Qi,Zhen Lei
title: Self-similarity Driven Scale-invariant Learning for Weakly Supervised Person Search
title_zh: 用于弱监督人员搜索的自相似性驱动的尺度不变学习
abstract: Weakly supervised person search aims to jointly detect and match persons with only bounding box annotations. Existing approaches typically focus on improving the features by exploring relations of persons. However, scale variation problem is a more severe obstacle and under-studied that a person often owns images with different scales (resolutions). On the one hand, small-scale images contain less information of a person, thus affecting the accuracy of the generated pseudo labels. On the other hand, the similarity of cross-scale images is often smaller than that of images with the same scale for a person, which will increase the difficulty of matching. In this paper, we address this problem by proposing a novel one-step framework, named Self-similarity driven Scale-invariant Learning (SSL). Scale invariance can be explored based on the self-similarity prior that it shows the same statistical properties of an image at different scales. To this end, we introduce a Multi-scale Exemplar Branch to guide the network in concentrating on the foreground and learning scale-invariant features by hard exemplars mining. To enhance the discriminative power of the features in an unsupervised manner, we introduce a dynamic multi-label prediction which progressively seeks true labels for training. It is adaptable to different types of unlabeled data and serves as a compensation for clustering based strategy. Experiments on PRW and CUHK-SYSU databases demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Weakly supervised person search aims to jointly detect and match persons with only bounding box annotations. Existing approaches typically focus on improving the features by exploring relations of persons. However, scale variation problem is a more severe obstacle and under-studied that a person often owns images with different scales (resolutions). On the one hand, small-scale images contain less information of a person, thus affecting the accuracy of the generated pseudo labels. On the other hand, the similarity of cross-scale images is often smaller than that of images with the same scale for a person, which will increase the difficulty of matching. In this paper, we address this problem by proposing a novel one-step framework, named Self-similarity driven Scale-invariant Learning (SSL). Scale invariance can be explored based on the self-similarity prior that it shows the same statistical properties of an image at different scales. To this end, we introduce a Multi-scale Exemplar Branch to guide the network in concentrating on the foreground and learning scale-invariant features by hard exemplars mining. To enhance the discriminative power of the features in an unsupervised manner, we introduce a dynamic multi-label prediction which progressively seeks true labels for training. It is adaptable to different types of unlabeled data and serves as a compensation for clustering based strategy. Experiments on PRW and CUHK-SYSU databases demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 弱监督人员搜索旨在联合检测和匹配仅具有边界框注释的人员。现有的方法通常侧重于通过探索人的关系来改进特征。然而，尺度变化问题是一个更严重的障碍，并且研究不足，因为一个人经常拥有不同尺度（分辨率）的图像。一方面，小尺度图像包含的人的信息较少，从而影响生成的伪标签的准确性。另一方面，对于一个人来说，跨尺度图像的相似度往往小于相同尺度图像的相似度，这会增加匹配的难度。在本文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的一步框架来解决这个问题，称为自相似性驱动的尺度不变学习（SSL）。尺度不变性可以基于自相似性先验来探索，它在不同尺度上显示图像的相同统计特性。为此，我们引入了多尺度样本分支来引导网络集中于前景并通过硬样本挖掘来学习尺度不变特征。为了以无监督的方式增强特征的判别能力，我们引入了动态多标签预测，它逐步寻找用于训练的真实标签。它适用于不同类型的未标记数据，并作为基于聚类的策略的补偿。在 PRW 和 CUHK-SYSU 数据库上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自相似性的尺度不变学习框架SSL，用于解决弱监督行人搜索中的尺度变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在弱监督行人搜索中未充分解决尺度变化导致的伪标签不准确和跨尺度图像相似度低的问题，影响匹配效果。
AI.method: 提出SSL框架，包含多尺度示例分支通过硬示例挖掘学习尺度不变特征，并引入动态多标签预测增强特征判别力。
AI.result: 在PRW和CUHK-SYSU数据集上验证了方法有效性，显著提升跨尺度行人匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过自相似性先验和动态标签补偿机制，SSL框架有效解决了弱监督行人搜索中的尺度不变性难题。

search_text: Self-similarity Driven Scale-invariant Learning for Weakly Supervised Person Search 用于弱监督人员搜索的自相似性驱动的尺度不变学习 Weakly supervised person search aims to jointly detect and match persons with only bounding box annotations. Existing approaches typically focus on improving the features by exploring relations of persons. However, scale variation problem is a more severe obstacle and under-studied that a person often owns images with different scales (resolutions). On the one hand, small-scale images contain less information of a person, thus affecting the accuracy of the generated pseudo labels. On the other hand, the similarity of cross-scale images is often smaller than that of images with the same scale for a person, which will increase the difficulty of matching. In this paper, we address this problem by proposing a novel one-step framework, named Self-similarity driven Scale-invariant Learning (SSL). Scale invariance can be explored based on the self-similarity prior that it shows the same statistical properties of an image at different scales. To this end, we introduce a Multi-scale Exemplar Branch to guide the network in concentrating on the foreground and learning scale-invariant features by hard exemplars mining. To enhance the discriminative power of the features in an unsupervised manner, we introduce a dynamic multi-label prediction which progressively seeks true labels for training. It is adaptable to different types of unlabeled data and serves as a compensation for clustering based strategy. Experiments on PRW and CUHK-SYSU databases demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. 弱监督人员搜索旨在联合检测和匹配仅具有边界框注释的人员。现有的方法通常侧重于通过探索人的关系来改进特征。然而，尺度变化问题是一个更严重的障碍，并且研究不足，因为一个人经常拥有不同尺度（分辨率）的图像。一方面，小尺度图像包含的人的信息较少，从而影响生成的伪标签的准确性。另一方面，对于一个人来说，跨尺度图像的相似度往往小于相同尺度图像的相似度，这会增加匹配的难度。在本文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的一步框架来解决这个问题，称为自相似性驱动的尺度不变学习（SSL）。尺度不变性可以基于自相似性先验来探索，它在不同尺度上显示图像的相同统计特性。为此，我们引入了多尺度样本分支来引导网络集中于前景并通过硬样本挖掘来学习尺度不变特征。为了以无监督的方式增强特征的判别能力，我们引入了动态多标签预测，它逐步寻找用于训练的真实标签。它适用于不同类型的未标记数据，并作为基于聚类的策略的补偿。在 PRW 和 CUHK-SYSU 数据库上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于自相似性的尺度不变学习框架SSL，用于解决弱监督行人搜索中的尺度变化问题。 Benzhi Wang,Yang Yang,Jinlin Wu,Guo-jun Qi,Zhen Lei cs.CV

authors_text: Akila de Silva,Mona Zhao,Donald Stewart,Fahim Hasan Khan,Gregory Dusek,James Davis,Alex Pang
title: RipViz: Finding Rip Currents by Learning Pathline Behavior
title_zh: RipViz：通过学习路径行为寻找离岸流
comment: This is the author's version of the article published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics, 2023
comments: This is the author's version of the article published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics, 2023
abstract: We present a hybrid machine learning and flow analysis feature detection method, RipViz, to extract rip currents from stationary videos. Rip currents are dangerous strong currents that can drag beachgoers out to sea. Most people are either unaware of them or do not know what they look like. In some instances, even trained personnel such as lifeguards have difficulty identifying them. RipViz produces a simple, easy to understand visualization of rip location overlaid on the source video. With RipViz, we first obtain an unsteady 2D vector field from the stationary video using optical flow. Movement at each pixel is analyzed over time. At each seed point, sequences of short pathlines, rather a single long pathline, are traced across the frames of the video to better capture the quasi-periodic flow behavior of wave activity. Because of the motion on the beach, the surf zone, and the surrounding areas, these pathlines may still appear very cluttered and incomprehensible. Furthermore, lay audiences are not familiar with pathlines and may not know how to interpret them. To address this, we treat rip currents as a flow anomaly in an otherwise normal flow. To learn about the normal flow behavior, we train an LSTM autoencoder with pathline sequences from normal ocean, foreground, and background movements. During test time, we use the trained LSTM autoencoder to detect anomalous pathlines (i.e., those in the rip zone). The origination points of such anomalous pathlines, over the course of the video, are then presented as points within the rip zone. RipViz is fully automated and does not require user input. Feedback from domain expert suggests that RipViz has the potential for wider use.

The origination points of such anomalous pathlines, over the course of the video, are then presented as points within the rip zone. RipViz is fully automated and does not require user input. Feedback from domain expert suggests that RipViz has the potential for wider use.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种混合机器学习和流分析特征检测方法 RipViz，用于从静止视频中提取裂流。离岸流是危险的强流，可以将海滩游客拖到海里。大多数人要么不知道它们，要么不知道它们长什么样。在某些情况下，即使是受过训练的人员（例如救生员）也很难识别它们。 RipViz 生成一个简单、易于理解的可视化图像，显示叠加在源视频上的裂口位置。使用 RipViz，我们首先使用光流从静止视频中获得不稳定的 2D 矢量场。随着时间的推移，分析每个像素的运动。在每个种子点，在视频帧中追踪短路径序列，而不是单个长路径线，以更好地捕获波浪活动的准周期流动行为。由于海滩、冲浪区和周边地区的运动，这些路径可能仍然显得非常混乱和难以理解。此外，外行观众不熟悉路线，可能不知道如何解释它们。为了解决这个问题，我们将离岸流视为正常流动中的流动异常。为了了解正常的水流行为，我们使用正常海洋、前景和背景运动的路径序列训练 LSTM 自动编码器。在测试期间，我们使用经过训练的 LSTM 自动编码器来检测异常路径（即撕裂区域中的路径）。然后，在视频过程中，此类异常路径线的起始点将显示为撕裂区域内的点。 RipViz 是完全自动化的，不需要用户输入。领域专家的反馈表明 RipViz 具有更广泛使用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习与流场分析的混合方法RipViz，用于从静态视频中自动检测离岸流。
AI.motivation: 离岸流具有高度危险性且难以被普通人或甚至受训人员识别，亟需一种自动化工具实现快速定位。
AI.method: 通过光流法获取二维矢量场，追踪像素级路径线序列并利用LSTM自编码器学习正常流场模式，通过异常路径线检测离岸流区域。
AI.result: 系统可自动生成叠加在原始视频上的离岸流可视化结果，无需人工干预且获得领域专家认可。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了离岸流检测难题，具有在公共安全领域推广的潜力。

authors_text: Guanghui Fu,Gabriel Jimenez,Sophie Loizillon,Lydia Chougar,Didier Dormont,Romain Valabregue,Ninon Burgos,Stéphane Lehéricy,Daniel Racoceanu,Olivier Colliot,the ICEBERG Study Group
title: Frequency Disentangled Learning for Segmentation of Midbrain Structures from Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping Data
title_zh: 从定量磁化率图数据中分割中脑结构的频率解缠结学习
abstract: One often lacks sufficient annotated samples for training deep segmentation models. This is in particular the case for less common imaging modalities such as Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM). It has been shown that deep models tend to fit the target function from low to high frequencies. One may hypothesize that such property can be leveraged for better training of deep learning models. In this paper, we exploit this property to propose a new training method based on frequency-domain disentanglement. It consists of two main steps: i) disentangling the image into high- and low-frequency parts and feature learning; ii) frequency-domain fusion to complete the task. The approach can be used with any backbone segmentation network. We apply the approach to the segmentation of the red and dentate nuclei from QSM data which is particularly relevant for the study of parkinsonian syndromes. We demonstrate that the proposed method provides considerable performance improvements for these tasks. We further applied it to three public datasets from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon (MSD) challenge. For two MSD tasks, it provided smaller but still substantial improvements (up to 7 points of Dice), especially under small training set situations.
summary: One often lacks sufficient annotated samples for training deep segmentation models. This is in particular the case for less common imaging modalities such as Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM). It has been shown that deep models tend to fit the target function from low to high frequencies. One may hypothesize that such property can be leveraged for better training of deep learning models. In this paper, we exploit this property to propose a new training method based on frequency-domain disentanglement. It consists of two main steps: i) disentangling the image into high- and low-frequency parts and feature learning; ii) frequency-domain fusion to complete the task. The approach can be used with any backbone segmentation network. We apply the approach to the segmentation of the red and dentate nuclei from QSM data which is particularly relevant for the study of parkinsonian syndromes. We demonstrate that the proposed method provides considerable performance improvements for these tasks. We further applied it to three public datasets from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon (MSD) challenge. For two MSD tasks, it provided smaller but still substantial improvements (up to 7 points of Dice), especially under small training set situations.
abstract_zh: 人们通常缺乏足够的带注释的样本来训练深度分割模型。对于定量磁敏图 (QSM) 等不太常见的成像方式尤其如此。事实证明，深度模型倾向于从低频到高频拟合目标函数。人们可能会假设，可以利用这一特性来更好地训练深度学习模型。在本文中，我们利用这一特性提出了一种基于频域解缠的新训练方法。它包括两个主要步骤：i）将图像分解为高频部分和低频部分以及特征学习； ii) 频域融合来完成任务。该方法可用于任何骨干分段网络。我们将该方法应用于 QSM 数据中的红色核和齿状核的分割，这对于帕金森综合征的研究特别相关。我们证明所提出的方法为这些任务提供了相当大的性能改进。我们进一步将其应用于医疗细分十项全能 (MSD) 挑战赛的三个公共数据集。对于两项 MSD 任务，它提供了较小但仍然显着的改进（高达 7 个 Dice 点），特别是在小训练集情况下。

AI.tldr: 提出一种频率解耦学习方法，用于解决QSM数据中中脑结构分割的标注样本不足问题。
AI.motivation: 由于QSM数据标注样本不足，且深度模型拟合频率特性，需利用频率域解耦提升分割效果。
AI.method: 将图像分解为高低频部分进行特征学习，再通过频率域融合完成分割任务，适用于任何分割网络。
AI.result: 在QSM数据分割任务中显著提升性能，MSD数据集上Dice分数提高最高达7点，尤其在小样本情况下效果明显。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升分割性能，适用于不同网络，尤其在小样本场景下表现优异，具有广泛应用前景。

search_text: Frequency Disentangled Learning for Segmentation of Midbrain Structures from Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping Data 从定量磁化率图数据中分割中脑结构的频率解缠结学习 One often lacks sufficient annotated samples for training deep segmentation models. This is in particular the case for less common imaging modalities such as Quantitative Susceptibility Mapping (QSM). It has been shown that deep models tend to fit the target function from low to high frequencies. One may hypothesize that such property can be leveraged for better training of deep learning models. In this paper, we exploit this property to propose a new training method based on frequency-domain disentanglement. It consists of two main steps: i) disentangling the image into high- and low-frequency parts and feature learning; ii) frequency-domain fusion to complete the task. The approach can be used with any backbone segmentation network. We apply the approach to the segmentation of the red and dentate nuclei from QSM data which is particularly relevant for the study of parkinsonian syndromes. We demonstrate that the proposed method provides considerable performance improvements for these tasks. We further applied it to three public datasets from the Medical Segmentation Decathlon (MSD) challenge. For two MSD tasks, it provided smaller but still substantial improvements (up to 7 points of Dice), especially under small training set situations. 人们通常缺乏足够的带注释的样本来训练深度分割模型。对于定量磁敏图 (QSM) 等不太常见的成像方式尤其如此。事实证明，深度模型倾向于从低频到高频拟合目标函数。人们可能会假设，可以利用这一特性来更好地训练深度学习模型。在本文中，我们利用这一特性提出了一种基于频域解缠的新训练方法。它包括两个主要步骤：i）将图像分解为高频部分和低频部分以及特征学习； ii) 频域融合来完成任务。该方法可用于任何骨干分段网络。我们将该方法应用于 QSM 数据中的红色核和齿状核的分割，这对于帕金森综合征的研究特别相关。我们证明所提出的方法为这些任务提供了相当大的性能改进。我们进一步将其应用于医疗细分十项全能 (MSD) 挑战赛的三个公共数据集。对于两项 MSD 任务，它提供了较小但仍然显着的改进（高达 7 个 Dice 点），特别是在小训练集情况下。 提出一种频率解耦学习方法，用于解决QSM数据中中脑结构分割的标注样本不足问题。 Guanghui Fu,Gabriel Jimenez,Sophie Loizillon,Lydia Chougar,Didier Dormont,Romain Valabregue,Ninon Burgos,Stéphane Lehéricy,Daniel Racoceanu,Olivier Colliot,the ICEBERG Study Group eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Alexandra Chronopoulou,Brian Thompson,Prashant Mathur,Yogesh Virkar,Surafel M. Lakew,Marcello Federico
title: Jointly Optimizing Translations and Speech Timing to Improve Isochrony in Automatic Dubbing
title_zh: 联合优化翻译和语音计时以提高自动配音的同步性
abstract: Automatic dubbing (AD) is the task of translating the original speech in a video into target language speech. The new target language speech should satisfy isochrony; that is, the new speech should be time aligned with the original video, including mouth movements, pauses, hand gestures, etc. In this paper, we propose training a model that directly optimizes both the translation as well as the speech duration of the generated translations. We show that this system generates speech that better matches the timing of the original speech, compared to prior work, while simplifying the system architecture.
summary: Automatic dubbing (AD) is the task of translating the original speech in a video into target language speech. The new target language speech should satisfy isochrony; that is, the new speech should be time aligned with the original video, including mouth movements, pauses, hand gestures, etc. In this paper, we propose training a model that directly optimizes both the translation as well as the speech duration of the generated translations. We show that this system generates speech that better matches the timing of the original speech, compared to prior work, while simplifying the system architecture.
abstract_zh: 自动配音（AD）是将视频中的原始语音翻译成目标语言语音的任务。新的目标语言语音应满足等时性；也就是说，新的语音应该与原始视频在时间上保持一致，包括嘴部动作、停顿、手势等。在本文中，我们建议训练一个模型，该模型可以直接优化翻译以及生成的翻译的语音持续时间。我们证明，与之前的工作相比，该系统生成的语音与原始语音的时序更好地匹配，同时简化了系统架构。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过联合优化翻译与语音时长，提升自动配音中生成语音与原始视频的等时性匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有自动配音方法常将翻译与语音时长优化分离，难以精确匹配原视频的时间特征（如口型、手势等），导致配音与视频不同步。
AI.method: 提出联合优化模型，同步训练翻译模块与语音时长预测模块，通过端到端学习使生成语音的时间分布与原视频严格对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在保持翻译准确性的同时，显著提升了生成语音与原视频的等时性，且系统架构更简洁。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化翻译与时长可有效解决自动配音的时序对齐问题，为未来多模态语音生成提供新思路。
