authors_text: Dongliang Guo,Zhixuan Chu,Sheng Li
title: Fair Attribute Completion on Graph with Missing Attributes
title_zh: 缺少属性的图上的公平属性完成
abstract: Tackling unfairness in graph learning models is a challenging task, as the unfairness issues on graphs involve both attributes and topological structures. Existing work on fair graph learning simply assumes that attributes of all nodes are available for model training and then makes fair predictions. In practice, however, the attributes of some nodes might not be accessible due to missing data or privacy concerns, which makes fair graph learning even more challenging. In this paper, we propose FairAC, a fair attribute completion method, to complement missing information and learn fair node embeddings for graphs with missing attributes. FairAC adopts an attention mechanism to deal with the attribute missing problem and meanwhile, it mitigates two types of unfairness, i.e., feature unfairness from attributes and topological unfairness due to attribute completion. FairAC can work on various types of homogeneous graphs and generate fair embeddings for them and thus can be applied to most downstream tasks to improve their fairness performance. To our best knowledge, FairAC is the first method that jointly addresses the graph attribution completion and graph unfairness problems. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that our method achieves better fairness performance with less sacrifice in accuracy, compared with the state-of-the-art methods of fair graph learning. Code is available at: https://github.com/donglgcn/FairAC.
summary: Tackling unfairness in graph learning models is a challenging task, as the unfairness issues on graphs involve both attributes and topological structures. Existing work on fair graph learning simply assumes that attributes of all nodes are available for model training and then makes fair predictions. In practice, however, the attributes of some nodes might not be accessible due to missing data or privacy concerns, which makes fair graph learning even more challenging. In this paper, we propose FairAC, a fair attribute completion method, to complement missing information and learn fair node embeddings for graphs with missing attributes. FairAC adopts an attention mechanism to deal with the attribute missing problem and meanwhile, it mitigates two types of unfairness, i.e., feature unfairness from attributes and topological unfairness due to attribute completion. FairAC can work on various types of homogeneous graphs and generate fair embeddings for them and thus can be applied to most downstream tasks to improve their fairness performance. To our best knowledge, FairAC is the first method that jointly addresses the graph attribution completion and graph unfairness problems. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that our method achieves better fairness performance with less sacrifice in accuracy, compared with the state-of-the-art methods of fair graph learning. Code is available at: https://github.com/donglgcn/FairAC.
abstract_zh: 解决图学习模型中的不公平问题是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为图上的不公平问题涉及属性和拓扑结构。现有的公平图学习工作简单地假设所有节点的属性都可用于模型训练，然后做出公平的预测。然而，在实践中，由于数据丢失或隐私问题，某些节点的属性可能无法访问，这使得公平图学习更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 FairAC，一种公平属性补全方法，用于补充缺失信息并学习缺失属性图的公平节点嵌入。 FairAC采用注意力机制来处理属性缺失问题，同时减轻了两种不公平性，即属性引起的特征不公平和属性补全引起的拓扑不公平。 FairAC可以处理各种类型的同构图并为它们生成公平的嵌入，因此可以应用于大多数下游任务以提高其公平性性能。据我们所知，FairAC是第一个联合解决图归因补全和图不公平问题的方法。基准数据集上的实验结果表明，与最先进的公平图学习方法相比，我们的方法以更少的准确性牺牲实现了更好的公平性能。代码位于：https://github.com/donglgcn/FairAC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FairAC的公平属性补全方法，用于解决图中缺失属性带来的不公平问题，并生成公平的节点嵌入。
AI.motivation: 现有公平图学习方法假设所有节点属性完整，但实际中属性可能因缺失或隐私问题不可用，导致公平性挑战加剧，需同时处理属性补全与公平性问题。
AI.method: FairAC采用注意力机制处理属性缺失，同时缓解属性特征不公平和拓扑结构不公平，适用于多种同质图并生成公平嵌入。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，FairAC在保持较高准确率的同时显著提升公平性，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FairAC是首个联合解决图属性补全与不公平问题的方法，在公平性与准确性间取得良好平衡。

ai_content.conclusion: FairAC是首个联合解决图属性补全与不公平问题的方法，在公平性与准确性间取得良好平衡。

authors_text: Haiyang Liu,Chunjiang Zhu,Detian Zhang,Qing Li
title: Attention-based Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Recurrent Networks for Traffic Forecasting
title_zh: 用于交通预测的基于注意力的时空图卷积循环网络
abstract: Traffic forecasting is one of the most fundamental problems in transportation science and artificial intelligence. The key challenge is to effectively model complex spatial-temporal dependencies and correlations in modern traffic data. Existing methods, however, cannot accurately model both long-term and short-term temporal correlations simultaneously, limiting their expressive power on complex spatial-temporal patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel spatial-temporal neural network framework: Attention-based Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (ASTGCRN), which consists of a graph convolutional recurrent module (GCRN) and a global attention module. In particular, GCRN integrates gated recurrent units and adaptive graph convolutional networks for dynamically learning graph structures and capturing spatial dependencies and local temporal relationships. To effectively extract global temporal dependencies, we design a temporal attention layer and implement it as three independent modules based on multi-head self-attention, transformer, and informer respectively. Extensive experiments on five real traffic datasets have demonstrated the excellent predictive performance of all our three models with all their average MAE, RMSE and MAPE across the test datasets lower than the baseline methods.
summary: Traffic forecasting is one of the most fundamental problems in transportation science and artificial intelligence. The key challenge is to effectively model complex spatial-temporal dependencies and correlations in modern traffic data. Existing methods, however, cannot accurately model both long-term and short-term temporal correlations simultaneously, limiting their expressive power on complex spatial-temporal patterns. In this paper, we propose a novel spatial-temporal neural network framework: Attention-based Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (ASTGCRN), which consists of a graph convolutional recurrent module (GCRN) and a global attention module. In particular, GCRN integrates gated recurrent units and adaptive graph convolutional networks for dynamically learning graph structures and capturing spatial dependencies and local temporal relationships. To effectively extract global temporal dependencies, we design a temporal attention layer and implement it as three independent modules based on multi-head self-attention, transformer, and informer respectively. Extensive experiments on five real traffic datasets have demonstrated the excellent predictive performance of all our three models with all their average MAE, RMSE and MAPE across the test datasets lower than the baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 交通预测是交通科学和人工智能中最基本的问题之一。关键挑战是对现代交通数据中复杂的时空依赖性和相关性进行有效建模。然而，现有方法无法同时准确地模拟长期和短期时间相关性，限制了它们对复杂时空模式的表达能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时空神经网络框架：基于注意的时空图卷积循环网络（ASTGCRN），它由图卷积循环模块（GCRN）和全局注意模块组成。特别是，GCRN 集成了门控循环单元和自适应图卷积网络，用于动态学习图结构并捕获空间依赖性和局部时间关系。为了有效地提取全局时间依赖性，我们设计了一个时间注意力层，并将其实现为分别基于多头自注意力、变压器和信息者的三个独立模块。对五个真实流量数据集的广泛实验证明了我们所有三个模型的出色预测性能，测试数据集中的所有平均 MAE、RMSE 和 MAPE 均低于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的时空图卷积循环网络（ASTGCRN），用于解决交通预测中复杂时空依赖关系建模的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法难以同时准确建模长期和短期时间相关性，导致对复杂时空模式的表达能力受限。
AI.method: 设计包含图卷积循环模块（GCRN）和全局注意力模块的ASTGCRN框架，通过门控循环单元与自适应图卷积网络捕捉时空依赖，并采用多头自注意力、Transformer和Informer实现时间注意力层。
AI.result: 在五个真实交通数据集上，三个模型的平均MAE、RMSE和MAPE均优于基线方法，验证了模型的优越预测性能。
AI.conclusion: ASTGCRN通过融合图卷积与注意力机制，有效提升了交通预测中对时空依赖关系的建模能力，实验结果证明了其有效性。

authors_text: Yulong Liu,Yongqiang Ma,Wei Zhou,Guibo Zhu,Nanning Zheng
title: BrainCLIP: Bridging Brain and Visual-Linguistic Representation Via CLIP for Generic Natural Visual Stimulus Decoding
title_zh: BrainCLIP：通过 CLIP 连接大脑和视觉语言表征，实现通用自然视觉刺激解码
abstract: Due to the lack of paired samples and the low signal-to-noise ratio of functional MRI (fMRI) signals, reconstructing perceived natural images or decoding their semantic contents from fMRI data are challenging tasks. In this work, we propose, for the first time, a task-agnostic fMRI-based brain decoding model, BrainCLIP, which leverages CLIP's cross-modal generalization ability to bridge the modality gap between brain activity, image, and text. Our experiments demonstrate that CLIP can act as a pivot for generic brain decoding tasks, including zero-shot visual categories decoding, fMRI-image/text matching, and fMRI-to-image generation. Specifically, BrainCLIP aims to train a mapping network that transforms fMRI patterns into a well-aligned CLIP embedding space by combining visual and textual supervision. Our experiments show that this combination can boost the decoding model's performance on certain tasks like fMRI-text matching and fMRI-to-image generation. On the zero-shot visual category decoding task, BrainCLIP achieves significantly better performance than BraVL, a recently proposed multi-modal method specifically designed for this task. BrainCLIP can also reconstruct visual stimuli with high semantic fidelity and establishes a new state-of-the-art for fMRI-based natural image reconstruction in terms of high-level semantic features.
summary: Due to the lack of paired samples and the low signal-to-noise ratio of functional MRI (fMRI) signals, reconstructing perceived natural images or decoding their semantic contents from fMRI data are challenging tasks. In this work, we propose, for the first time, a task-agnostic fMRI-based brain decoding model, BrainCLIP, which leverages CLIP's cross-modal generalization ability to bridge the modality gap between brain activity, image, and text. Our experiments demonstrate that CLIP can act as a pivot for generic brain decoding tasks, including zero-shot visual categories decoding, fMRI-image/text matching, and fMRI-to-image generation. Specifically, BrainCLIP aims to train a mapping network that transforms fMRI patterns into a well-aligned CLIP embedding space by combining visual and textual supervision. Our experiments show that this combination can boost the decoding model's performance on certain tasks like fMRI-text matching and fMRI-to-image generation. On the zero-shot visual category decoding task, BrainCLIP achieves significantly better performance than BraVL, a recently proposed multi-modal method specifically designed for this task. BrainCLIP can also reconstruct visual stimuli with high semantic fidelity and establishes a new state-of-the-art for fMRI-based natural image reconstruction in terms of high-level semantic features.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏配对样本以及功能 MRI (fMRI) 信号的低信噪比，重建感知的自然图像或从 fMRI 数据解码其语义内容是具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种与任务无关的基于 fMRI 的大脑解码模型 BrainCLIP，它利用 CLIP 的跨模态泛化能力来弥合大脑活动、图像和文本之间的模态差距。我们的实验表明，CLIP 可以充当通用大脑解码任务的枢纽，包括零样本视觉类别解码、功能磁共振成像图像/文本匹配和功能磁共振成像到图像生成。具体来说，BrainCLIP 旨在训练一个映射网络，通过结合视觉和文本监督，将 fMRI 模式转换为对齐良好的 CLIP 嵌入空间。我们的实验表明，这种组合可以提高解码模型在某些任务上的性能，例如功能磁共振成像文本匹配和功能磁共振成像到图像生成。在零样本视觉类别解码任务上，BrainCLIP 的性能明显优于最近提出的专门为此任务设计的多模态方法 BraVL。 BrainCLIP 还可以以高语义保真度重建视觉刺激，并在高级语义特征方面为基于 fMRI 的自然图像重建建立了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BrainCLIP模型，利用CLIP的跨模态能力，通过fMRI数据解码自然视觉刺激的语义内容。
AI.motivation: 传统fMRI解码面临样本配对不足和信噪比低的问题，需开发通用且无需任务特定训练的解码方法。
AI.method: 构建映射网络将fMRI模式转换为CLIP嵌入空间，结合视觉与文本监督联合训练，实现跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在零样本分类、fMRI-文本匹配及图像生成任务中超越现有方法，重建图像语义保真度高，刷新fMRI图像重建基准。
AI.conclusion: BrainCLIP通过CLIP桥接脑活动与视觉-语言表征，为通用自然视觉刺激解码提供了新范式。

authors_text: Jinzhao Luo,Lu Zhou,Guibo Zhu,Guojing Ge,Beiying Yang,Jinqiao Wang
title: Temporal-Channel Topology Enhanced Network for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的时间通道拓扑增强网络
abstract: Skeleton-based action recognition has become popular in recent years due to its efficiency and robustness. Most current methods adopt graph convolutional network (GCN) for topology modeling, but GCN-based methods are limited in long-distance correlation modeling and generalizability. In contrast, the potential of convolutional neural network (CNN) for topology modeling has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose a novel CNN architecture, Temporal-Channel Topology Enhanced Network (TCTE-Net), to learn spatial and temporal topologies for skeleton-based action recognition. The TCTE-Net consists of two modules: the Temporal-Channel Focus module, which learns a temporal-channel focus matrix to identify the most critical feature representations, and the Dynamic Channel Topology Attention module, which dynamically learns spatial topological features, and fuses them with an attention mechanism to model long-distance channel-wise topology. We conduct experiments on NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and FineGym datasets. TCTE-Net shows state-of-the-art performance compared to CNN-based methods and achieves superior performance compared to GCN-based methods. The code is available at https://github.com/aikuniverse/TCTE-Net.
summary: Skeleton-based action recognition has become popular in recent years due to its efficiency and robustness. Most current methods adopt graph convolutional network (GCN) for topology modeling, but GCN-based methods are limited in long-distance correlation modeling and generalizability. In contrast, the potential of convolutional neural network (CNN) for topology modeling has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose a novel CNN architecture, Temporal-Channel Topology Enhanced Network (TCTE-Net), to learn spatial and temporal topologies for skeleton-based action recognition. The TCTE-Net consists of two modules: the Temporal-Channel Focus module, which learns a temporal-channel focus matrix to identify the most critical feature representations, and the Dynamic Channel Topology Attention module, which dynamically learns spatial topological features, and fuses them with an attention mechanism to model long-distance channel-wise topology. We conduct experiments on NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and FineGym datasets. TCTE-Net shows state-of-the-art performance compared to CNN-based methods and achieves superior performance compared to GCN-based methods. The code is available at https://github.com/aikuniverse/TCTE-Net.
abstract_zh: 基于骨架的动作识别由于其效率和鲁棒性而近年来变得流行。目前大多数方法采用图卷积网络（GCN）进行拓扑建模，但基于GCN的方法在长距离相关性建模和泛化性方面受到限制。相比之下，卷积神经网络（CNN）在拓扑建模方面的潜力尚未得到充分开发。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 CNN 架构——时间通道拓扑增强网络（TCTE-Net），用于学习基于骨架的动作识别的空间和时间拓扑。 TCTE-Net 由两个模块组成：时间通道焦点模块，它学习时间通道焦点矩阵来识别最关键的特征表示；动态通道拓扑注意力模块，它动态学习空间拓扑特征，并将它们与注意力机制融合，以建模长距离通道拓扑。我们在 NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 FineGym 数据集上进行实验。与基于 CNN 的方法相比，TCTE-Net 显示了最先进的性能，并且与基于 GCN 的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/aikuniverse/TCTE-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TCTE-Net的新型卷积神经网络架构，用于骨骼动作识别，通过增强时空拓扑建模来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法在长距离关联建模和泛化能力上存在局限，而卷积神经网络（CNN）在拓扑建模中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: TCTE-Net包含两个模块：时序-通道聚焦模块（生成时序-通道关注矩阵以提取关键特征）和动态通道拓扑注意力模块（通过注意力机制融合空间拓扑特征以建模长距离通道关联）。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和FineGym数据集上，TCTE-Net在CNN和GCN方法中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: TCTE-Net通过有效建模时空拓扑关系，显著提升了骨骼动作识别性能，为该领域提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TCTE-Net的新型卷积神经网络架构，用于骨骼动作识别，通过增强时空拓扑建模来提升性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法在长距离关联建模和泛化能力上存在局限，而卷积神经网络（CNN）在拓扑建模中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
ai_content.method: TCTE-Net包含两个模块：时序-通道聚焦模块（生成时序-通道关注矩阵以提取关键特征）和动态通道拓扑注意力模块（通过注意力机制融合空间拓扑特征以建模长距离通道关联）。
ai_content.result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和FineGym数据集上，TCTE-Net在CNN和GCN方法中均达到最先进水平。
ai_content.conclusion: TCTE-Net通过有效建模时空拓扑关系，显著提升了骨骼动作识别性能，为该领域提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Temporal-Channel Topology Enhanced Network for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition 用于基于骨架的动作识别的时间通道拓扑增强网络 Skeleton-based action recognition has become popular in recent years due to its efficiency and robustness. Most current methods adopt graph convolutional network (GCN) for topology modeling, but GCN-based methods are limited in long-distance correlation modeling and generalizability. In contrast, the potential of convolutional neural network (CNN) for topology modeling has not been fully explored. In this paper, we propose a novel CNN architecture, Temporal-Channel Topology Enhanced Network (TCTE-Net), to learn spatial and temporal topologies for skeleton-based action recognition. The TCTE-Net consists of two modules: the Temporal-Channel Focus module, which learns a temporal-channel focus matrix to identify the most critical feature representations, and the Dynamic Channel Topology Attention module, which dynamically learns spatial topological features, and fuses them with an attention mechanism to model long-distance channel-wise topology. We conduct experiments on NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and FineGym datasets. TCTE-Net shows state-of-the-art performance compared to CNN-based methods and achieves superior performance compared to GCN-based methods. The code is available at https://github.com/aikuniverse/TCTE-Net. 基于骨架的动作识别由于其效率和鲁棒性而近年来变得流行。目前大多数方法采用图卷积网络（GCN）进行拓扑建模，但基于GCN的方法在长距离相关性建模和泛化性方面受到限制。相比之下，卷积神经网络（CNN）在拓扑建模方面的潜力尚未得到充分开发。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 CNN 架构——时间通道拓扑增强网络（TCTE-Net），用于学习基于骨架的动作识别的空间和时间拓扑。 TCTE-Net 由两个模块组成：时间通道焦点模块，它学习时间通道焦点矩阵来识别最关键的特征表示；动态通道拓扑注意力模块，它动态学习空间拓扑特征，并将它们与注意力机制融合，以建模长距离通道拓扑。我们在 NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 FineGym 数据集上进行实验。与基于 CNN 的方法相比，TCTE-Net 显示了最先进的性能，并且与基于 GCN 的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/aikuniverse/TCTE-Net 获取。 本文提出了一种名为TCTE-Net的新型卷积神经网络架构，用于骨骼动作识别，通过增强时空拓扑建模来提升性能。 Jinzhao Luo,Lu Zhou,Guibo Zhu,Guojing Ge,Beiying Yang,Jinqiao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Jiawei Hou,Qi Chen,Yurong Cheng,Guang Chen,Xiangyang Xue,Taiping Zeng,Jian Pu
title: SUPS: A Simulated Underground Parking Scenario Dataset for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SUPS：自动驾驶模拟地下停车场景数据集
comment: Accepted for publication at the 25th IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 25th IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC 2022)
abstract: Automatic underground parking has attracted considerable attention as the scope of autonomous driving expands. The auto-vehicle is supposed to obtain the environmental information, track its location, and build a reliable map of the scenario. Mainstream solutions consist of well-trained neural networks and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods, which need numerous carefully labeled images and multiple sensor estimations. However, there is a lack of underground parking scenario datasets with multiple sensors and well-labeled images that support both SLAM tasks and perception tasks, such as semantic segmentation and parking slot detection. In this paper, we present SUPS, a simulated dataset for underground automatic parking, which supports multiple tasks with multiple sensors and multiple semantic labels aligned with successive images according to timestamps. We intend to cover the defect of existing datasets with the variability of environments and the diversity and accessibility of sensors in the virtual scene. Specifically, the dataset records frames from four surrounding fisheye cameras, two forward pinhole cameras, a depth camera, and data from LiDAR, inertial measurement unit (IMU), GNSS. Pixel-level semantic labels are provided for objects, especially ground signs such as arrows, parking lines, lanes, and speed bumps. Perception, 3D reconstruction, depth estimation, and SLAM, and other relative tasks are supported by our dataset. We also evaluate the state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms and perception models on our dataset. Finally, we open source our virtual 3D scene built based on Unity Engine and release our dataset at https://github.com/jarvishou829/SUPS.
summary: Automatic underground parking has attracted considerable attention as the scope of autonomous driving expands. The auto-vehicle is supposed to obtain the environmental information, track its location, and build a reliable map of the scenario. Mainstream solutions consist of well-trained neural networks and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods, which need numerous carefully labeled images and multiple sensor estimations. However, there is a lack of underground parking scenario datasets with multiple sensors and well-labeled images that support both SLAM tasks and perception tasks, such as semantic segmentation and parking slot detection. In this paper, we present SUPS, a simulated dataset for underground automatic parking, which supports multiple tasks with multiple sensors and multiple semantic labels aligned with successive images according to timestamps. We intend to cover the defect of existing datasets with the variability of environments and the diversity and accessibility of sensors in the virtual scene. Specifically, the dataset records frames from four surrounding fisheye cameras, two forward pinhole cameras, a depth camera, and data from LiDAR, inertial measurement unit (IMU), GNSS. Pixel-level semantic labels are provided for objects, especially ground signs such as arrows, parking lines, lanes, and speed bumps. Perception, 3D reconstruction, depth estimation, and SLAM, and other relative tasks are supported by our dataset. We also evaluate the state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms and perception models on our dataset. Finally, we open source our virtual 3D scene built based on Unity Engine and release our dataset at https://github.com/jarvishou829/SUPS.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶范围的扩大，自动地下停车引起了人们的广泛关注。自动驾驶汽车应该获取环境信息，跟踪其位置，并构建可靠的场景地图。主流解决方案由训练有素的神经网络和同步定位与建图（SLAM）方法组成，这些方法需要大量仔细标记的图像和多个传感器估计。然而，缺乏具有多个传感器和标记良好的图像的地下停车场景数据集，支持 SLAM 任务和感知任务，例如语义分割和停车位检测。在本文中，我们提出了 SUPS，这是一个地下自动停车的模拟数据集，它支持多个任务，具有多个传感器和多个语义标签，根据时间戳与连续图像对齐。我们打算通过虚拟场景中环境的可变性以及传感器的多样性和可访问性来弥补现有数据集的缺陷。具体来说，该数据集记录了来自四个周围鱼眼相机、两个前向针孔相机、一个深度相机的帧以及来自 LiDAR、惯性测量单元 (IMU)、GNSS 的数据。为对象提供像素级语义标签，特别是箭头、停车线、车道和减速带等地面标志。我们的数据集支持感知、3D 重建、深度估计和 SLAM 以及其他相关任务。我们还在我们的数据集上评估了最先进的 SLAM 算法和感知模型。最后，我们开源了基于 Unity Engine 构建的虚拟 3D 场景，并在 https://github.com/jarvishou829/SUPS 发布了我们的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUPS数据集，用于支持自动驾驶地下停车场景的SLAM和感知任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏支持地下停车场景的多传感器数据和精细标注，难以满足SLAM与感知算法的联合训练需求。
AI.method: 基于Unity引擎构建虚拟地下停车场，采集多摄像头、LiDAR、IMU等传感器数据，并提供像素级语义标注与时间戳对齐的多模态数据。
AI.result: 验证了主流SLAM算法和感知模型在数据集上的性能，开源了虚拟场景与数据集资源。
AI.conclusion: SUPS通过多传感器融合与精细标注填补了地下停车场景数据的空白，为自动驾驶算法研究提供新基准。

authors_text: An Chen,Zhigang Ren,Muyi Wang,Hui Chen,Haoxi Leng,Shuai Liu
title: A Surrogate-Assisted Highly Cooperative Coevolutionary Algorithm for Hyperparameter Optimization in Deep Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 一种用于深度卷积神经网络超参数优化的代理辅助高度协作协同进化算法
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained remarkable success in recent years. However, their performance highly relies on the architecture hyperparameters, and finding proper hyperparameters for a deep CNN is a challenging optimization problem owing to its high-dimensional and computationally expensive characteristics. Given these difficulties, this study proposes a surrogate-assisted highly cooperative hyperparameter optimization (SHCHO) algorithm for chain-styled CNNs. To narrow the large search space, SHCHO first decomposes the whole CNN into several overlapping sub-CNNs in accordance with the overlapping hyperparameter interaction structure and then cooperatively optimizes these hyperparameter subsets. Two cooperation mechanisms are designed during this process. One coordinates all the sub-CNNs to reproduce the information flow in the whole CNN and achieve macro cooperation among them, and the other tackles the overlapping components by simultaneously considering the involved two sub-CNNs and facilitates micro cooperation between them. As a result, a proper hyperparameter configuration can be effectively located for the whole CNN. Besides, SHCHO also employs the well-performing surrogate technique to assist in the hyperparameter optimization of each sub-CNN, thereby greatly reducing the expensive computational cost. Extensive experimental results on two widely-used image classification datasets indicate that SHCHO can significantly improve the performance of CNNs.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained remarkable success in recent years. However, their performance highly relies on the architecture hyperparameters, and finding proper hyperparameters for a deep CNN is a challenging optimization problem owing to its high-dimensional and computationally expensive characteristics. Given these difficulties, this study proposes a surrogate-assisted highly cooperative hyperparameter optimization (SHCHO) algorithm for chain-styled CNNs. To narrow the large search space, SHCHO first decomposes the whole CNN into several overlapping sub-CNNs in accordance with the overlapping hyperparameter interaction structure and then cooperatively optimizes these hyperparameter subsets. Two cooperation mechanisms are designed during this process. One coordinates all the sub-CNNs to reproduce the information flow in the whole CNN and achieve macro cooperation among them, and the other tackles the overlapping components by simultaneously considering the involved two sub-CNNs and facilitates micro cooperation between them. As a result, a proper hyperparameter configuration can be effectively located for the whole CNN. Besides, SHCHO also employs the well-performing surrogate technique to assist in the hyperparameter optimization of each sub-CNN, thereby greatly reducing the expensive computational cost. Extensive experimental results on two widely-used image classification datasets indicate that SHCHO can significantly improve the performance of CNNs.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了巨大的成功。然而，它们的性能高度依赖于架构超参数，并且由于其高维和计算昂贵的特性，为深度 CNN 找到合适的超参数是一个具有挑战性的优化问题。鉴于这些困难，本研究提出了一种用于链式 CNN 的代理辅助高度协作超参数优化 (SHCHO) 算法。为了缩小大搜索空间，SHCHO首先根据重叠的超参数交互结构将整个CNN分解为多个重叠的子CNN，然后协同优化这些超参数子集。在此过程中设计了两种合作机制。一种协调所有子CNN以再现整个CNN中的信息流并实现它们之间的宏观协作，另一种通过同时考虑所涉及的两个子CNN来解决重叠组件并促进它们之间的微观协作。因此，可以有效地为整个 CNN 找到合适的超参数配置。此外，SHCHO还采用性能良好的代理技术来辅助每个子CNN的超参数优化，从而大大降低了昂贵的计算成本。在两个广泛使用的图像分类数据集上的大量实验结果表明，SHCHO 可以显着提高 CNN 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理的高协作协同进化算法（SHCHO），用于优化深度卷积神经网络的超参数，通过分解网络结构和协作机制降低计算成本并提高性能。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络性能高度依赖超参数，但其高维且计算成本高的特性使优化困难，亟需高效算法。
AI.method: SHCHO将CNN分解为重叠子网络，设计宏观协作机制协调信息流与微观协作机制处理重叠部分，并结合代理模型降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在两个主流图像分类数据集上，SHCHO显著优于现有方法，有效提升CNN性能。
AI.conclusion: SHCHO通过结构分解与协作机制创新，为高维超参数优化提供了高效解决方案，验证了方法的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理的高协作协同进化算法（SHCHO），用于优化深度卷积神经网络的超参数，通过分解网络结构和协作机制降低计算成本并提高性能。
motivation: 卷积神经网络性能高度依赖超参数，但其高维且计算成本高的特性使优化困难，亟需高效算法。
method: SHCHO将CNN分解为重叠子网络，设计宏观协作机制协调信息流与微观协作机制处理重叠部分，并结合代理模型降低计算开销。
result: 在两个主流图像分类数据集上，SHCHO显著优于现有方法，有效提升CNN性能。
conclusion: SHCHO通过结构分解与协作机制创新，为高维超参数优化提供了高效解决方案，验证了方法的有效性。
search_text: A Surrogate-Assisted Highly Cooperative Coevolutionary Algorithm for Hyperparameter Optimization in Deep Convolutional Neural Network 一种用于深度卷积神经网络超参数优化的代理辅助高度协作协同进化算法 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained remarkable success in recent years. However, their performance highly relies on the architecture hyperparameters, and finding proper hyperparameters for a deep CNN is a challenging optimization problem owing to its high-dimensional and computationally expensive characteristics. Given these difficulties, this study proposes a surrogate-assisted highly cooperative hyperparameter optimization (SHCHO) algorithm for chain-styled CNNs. To narrow the large search space, SHCHO first decomposes the whole CNN into several overlapping sub-CNNs in accordance with the overlapping hyperparameter interaction structure and then cooperatively optimizes these hyperparameter subsets. Two cooperation mechanisms are designed during this process. One coordinates all the sub-CNNs to reproduce the information flow in the whole CNN and achieve macro cooperation among them, and the other tackles the overlapping components by simultaneously considering the involved two sub-CNNs and facilitates micro cooperation between them. As a result, a proper hyperparameter configuration can be effectively located for the whole CNN. Besides, SHCHO also employs the well-performing surrogate technique to assist in the hyperparameter optimization of each sub-CNN, thereby greatly reducing the expensive computational cost. Extensive experimental results on two widely-used image classification datasets indicate that SHCHO can significantly improve the performance of CNNs. 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了巨大的成功。然而，它们的性能高度依赖于架构超参数，并且由于其高维和计算昂贵的特性，为深度 CNN 找到合适的超参数是一个具有挑战性的优化问题。鉴于这些困难，本研究提出了一种用于链式 CNN 的代理辅助高度协作超参数优化 (SHCHO) 算法。为了缩小大搜索空间，SHCHO首先根据重叠的超参数交互结构将整个CNN分解为多个重叠的子CNN，然后协同优化这些超参数子集。在此过程中设计了两种合作机制。一种协调所有子CNN以再现整个CNN中的信息流并实现它们之间的宏观协作，另一种通过同时考虑所涉及的两个子CNN来解决重叠组件并促进它们之间的微观协作。因此，可以有效地为整个 CNN 找到合适的超参数配置。此外，SHCHO还采用性能良好的代理技术来辅助每个子CNN的超参数优化，从而大大降低了昂贵的计算成本。在两个广泛使用的图像分类数据集上的大量实验结果表明，SHCHO 可以显着提高 CNN 的性能。 本文提出一种基于代理的高协作协同进化算法（SHCHO），用于优化深度卷积神经网络的超参数，通过分解网络结构和协作机制降低计算成本并提高性能。 An Chen,Zhigang Ren,Muyi Wang,Hui Chen,Haoxi Leng,Shuai Liu cs.NE

authors_text: Ziyue Liu,Yixing Li,Jing Hu,Xinling Yu,Shinyu Shiau,Xin Ai,Zhiyu Zeng,Zheng Zhang
title: DeepOHeat: Operator Learning-based Ultra-fast Thermal Simulation in 3D-IC Design
title_zh: DeepOHeat：3D-IC 设计中基于算子学习的超快速热仿真
comment: Camera-ready for ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC) 2023
comments: Camera-ready for ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC) 2023
abstract: Thermal issue is a major concern in 3D integrated circuit (IC) design. Thermal optimization of 3D IC often requires massive expensive PDE simulations. Neural network-based thermal prediction models can perform real-time prediction for many unseen new designs. However, existing works either solve 2D temperature fields only or do not generalize well to new designs with unseen design configurations (e.g., heat sources and boundary conditions). In this paper, for the first time, we propose DeepOHeat, a physics-aware operator learning framework to predict the temperature field of a family of heat equations with multiple parametric or non-parametric design configurations. This framework learns a functional map from the function space of multiple key PDE configurations (e.g., boundary conditions, power maps, heat transfer coefficients) to the function space of the corresponding solution (i.e., temperature fields), enabling fast thermal analysis and optimization by changing key design configurations (rather than just some parameters). We test DeepOHeat on some industrial design cases and compare it against Celsius 3D from Cadence Design Systems. Our results show that, for the unseen testing cases, a well-trained DeepOHeat can produce accurate results with $1000\times$ to $300000\times$ speedup.
summary: Thermal issue is a major concern in 3D integrated circuit (IC) design. Thermal optimization of 3D IC often requires massive expensive PDE simulations. Neural network-based thermal prediction models can perform real-time prediction for many unseen new designs. However, existing works either solve 2D temperature fields only or do not generalize well to new designs with unseen design configurations (e.g., heat sources and boundary conditions). In this paper, for the first time, we propose DeepOHeat, a physics-aware operator learning framework to predict the temperature field of a family of heat equations with multiple parametric or non-parametric design configurations. This framework learns a functional map from the function space of multiple key PDE configurations (e.g., boundary conditions, power maps, heat transfer coefficients) to the function space of the corresponding solution (i.e., temperature fields), enabling fast thermal analysis and optimization by changing key design configurations (rather than just some parameters). We test DeepOHeat on some industrial design cases and compare it against Celsius 3D from Cadence Design Systems. Our results show that, for the unseen testing cases, a well-trained DeepOHeat can produce accurate results with $1000\times$ to $300000\times$ speedup.
abstract_zh: 热问题是 3D 集成电路 (IC) 设计中的一个主要问题。 3D IC 的热优化通常需要大量昂贵的 PDE 模拟。基于神经网络的热预测模型可以对许多未见过的新设计进行实时预测。然而，现有的工作要么仅解决二维温度场，要么不能很好地推广到具有未见过的设计配置（例如热源和边界条件）的新设计。在本文中，我们首次提出 DeepOHeat，一种物理感知算子学习框架，用于预测具有多个参数或非参数设计配置的热方程族的温度场。该框架学习从多个关键 PDE 配置（例如边界条件、功率图、传热系数）的函数空间到相应解决方案（即温度场）的函数空间的函数映射，通过更改关键设计配置（而不仅仅是某些参数）来实现快速热分析和优化。我们在一些工业设计案例上测试了 DeepOHeat，并将其与 Cadence Design Systems 的摄氏度 3D 进行比较。我们的结果表明，对于未见过的测试用例，训练有素的 DeepOHeat 可以产生准确的结果，加速速度可达 1000 美元到 300000 美元。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepOHeat，一种基于算子学习的超快速3D芯片热仿真框架，用于预测多种设计配置下的温度场。
AI.motivation: 传统热仿真依赖耗时的PDE求解，现有神经网络模型无法处理新设计配置的泛化问题，亟需高效且通用的热分析方法。
AI.method: 构建物理感知的算子学习框架，从PDE配置函数空间（如边界条件、热源分布）到温度场解空间学习映射关系，支持设计参数变化时的快速预测。
AI.result: 在工业案例中，DeepOHeat相较Cadence Celsius 3D实现1000至300000倍加速，且在未见过的设计配置下保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: DeepOHeat通过函数空间映射实现了热仿真效率与泛化的突破，为3D芯片设计优化提供新范式。

Thermal optimization of 3D IC often requires massive expensive PDE simulations. Neural network-based thermal prediction models can perform real-time prediction for many unseen new designs. However, existing works either solve 2D temperature fields only or do not generalize well to new designs with unseen design configurations (e.g., heat sources and boundary conditions). In this paper, for the first time, we propose DeepOHeat, a physics-aware operator learning framework to predict the temperature field of a family of heat equations with multiple parametric or non-parametric design configurations. This framework learns a functional map from the function space of multiple key PDE configurations (e.g., boundary conditions, power maps, heat transfer coefficients) to the function space of the corresponding solution (i.e., temperature fields), enabling fast thermal analysis and optimization by changing key design configurations (rather than just some parameters). Our results show that, for the unseen testing cases, a well-trained DeepOHeat can produce accurate results with $1000\times$ to $300000\times$ speedup. 热问题是 3D 集成电路 (IC) 设计中的一个主要问题。 3D IC 的热优化通常需要大量昂贵的 PDE 模拟。基于神经网络的热预测模型可以对许多未见过的新设计进行实时预测。然而，现有的工作要么仅解决二维温度场，要么不能很好地推广到具有未见过的设计配置（例如热源和边界条件）的新设计。在本文中，我们首次提出 DeepOHeat，一种物理感知算子学习框架，用于预测具有多个参数或非参数设计配置的热方程族的温度场。该框架学习从多个关键 PDE 配置（例如边界条件、功率图、传热系数）的函数空间到相应解决方案（即温度场）的函数空间的函数映射，通过更改关键设计配置（而不仅仅是某些参数）来实现快速热分析和优化。我们在一些工业设计案例上测试了 DeepOHeat，并将其与 Cadence Design Systems 的摄氏度 3D 进行比较。我们的结果表明，对于未见过的测试用例，训练有素的 DeepOHeat 可以产生准确的结果，加速速度可达 1000 美元到 300000 美元。 本文提出DeepOHeat，一种基于算子学习的超快速3D芯片热仿真框架，用于预测多种设计配置下的温度场。 Ziyue Liu,Yixing Li,Jing Hu,Xinling Yu,Shinyu Shiau,Xin Ai,Zhiyu Zeng,Zheng Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Otilia Stretcu,Edward Vendrow,Kenji Hata,Krishnamurthy Viswanathan,Vittorio Ferrari,Sasan Tavakkol,Wenlei Zhou,Aditya Avinash,Enming Luo,Neil Gordon Alldrin,MohammadHossein Bateni,Gabriel Berger,Andrew Bunner,Chun-Ta Lu,Javier A Rey,Giulia DeSalvo,Ranjay Krishna,Ariel Fuxman
title: Agile Modeling: From Concept to Classifier in Minutes
title_zh: 敏捷建模：几分钟内从概念到分类器
abstract: The application of computer vision to nuanced subjective use cases is growing. While crowdsourcing has served the vision community well for most objective tasks (such as labeling a "zebra"), it now falters on tasks where there is substantial subjectivity in the concept (such as identifying "gourmet tuna"). However, empowering any user to develop a classifier for their concept is technically difficult: users are neither machine learning experts, nor have the patience to label thousands of examples. In reaction, we introduce the problem of Agile Modeling: the process of turning any subjective visual concept into a computer vision model through a real-time user-in-the-loop interactions. We instantiate an Agile Modeling prototype for image classification and show through a user study (N=14) that users can create classifiers with minimal effort under 30 minutes. We compare this user driven process with the traditional crowdsourcing paradigm and find that the crowd's notion often differs from that of the user's, especially as the concepts become more subjective. Finally, we scale our experiments with simulations of users training classifiers for ImageNet21k categories to further demonstrate the efficacy.
summary: The application of computer vision to nuanced subjective use cases is growing. While crowdsourcing has served the vision community well for most objective tasks (such as labeling a "zebra"), it now falters on tasks where there is substantial subjectivity in the concept (such as identifying "gourmet tuna"). However, empowering any user to develop a classifier for their concept is technically difficult: users are neither machine learning experts, nor have the patience to label thousands of examples. In reaction, we introduce the problem of Agile Modeling: the process of turning any subjective visual concept into a computer vision model through a real-time user-in-the-loop interactions. We instantiate an Agile Modeling prototype for image classification and show through a user study (N=14) that users can create classifiers with minimal effort under 30 minutes. We compare this user driven process with the traditional crowdsourcing paradigm and find that the crowd's notion often differs from that of the user's, especially as the concepts become more subjective. Finally, we scale our experiments with simulations of users training classifiers for ImageNet21k categories to further demonstrate the efficacy.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉在细致入微的主观用例中的应用正在不断增长。虽然众包在大多数客观任务（例如标记“斑马”）上为视觉社区提供了良好的服务，但现在它在概念中存在大量主观性的任务（例如识别“美味金枪鱼”）上表现不佳。然而，让任何用户为其概念开发分类器在技术上是困难的：用户既不是机器学习专家，也没有耐心标记数千个示例。作为回应，我们引入了敏捷建模问题：通过实时用户循环交互将任何主观视觉概念转化为计算机视觉模型的过程。我们实例化了用于图像分类的敏捷建模原型，并通过用户研究 (N=14) 表明用户可以在 30 分钟内以最少的努力创建分类器。我们将这种用户驱动的流程与传统的众包范例进行比较，发现人群的概念通常与用户的概念不同，尤其是当概念变得更加主观时。最后，我们通过模拟用户训练 ImageNet21k 类别的分类器来扩展我们的实验，以进一步证明其功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Agile Modeling的方法，使用户能够通过实时人机交互，在短时间内（少于30分钟）为任何主观视觉概念创建计算机视觉分类器，无需依赖传统众包标注。
AI.motivation: 传统众包方法在处理主观性较强的视觉任务（如‘高级金枪鱼’）时效果不佳，且用户通常缺乏机器学习专业知识或标注大量数据的耐心，导致难以构建个性化分类器。
AI.method: 开发了一个用户驱动的Agile Modeling原型系统，通过实时交互让用户直接参与模型训练，并通过14名用户的实验验证方法有效性，同时使用ImageNet21k模拟扩展实验。
AI.result: 用户可在30分钟内创建有效分类器，且用户驱动模型在主观任务上表现优于众包模型；模拟实验进一步验证了方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Agile Modeling为非专家用户提供了一种高效构建主观视觉概念分类器的新范式，相较于传统众包方法更具灵活性和准确性。

While crowdsourcing has served the vision community well for most objective tasks (such as labeling a "zebra"), it now falters on tasks where there is substantial subjectivity in the concept (such as identifying "gourmet tuna"). However, empowering any user to develop a classifier for their concept is technically difficult: users are neither machine learning experts, nor have the patience to label thousands of examples. In reaction, we introduce the problem of Agile Modeling: the process of turning any subjective visual concept into a computer vision model through a real-time user-in-the-loop interactions. We instantiate an Agile Modeling prototype for image classification and show through a user study (N=14) that users can create classifiers with minimal effort under 30 minutes. We compare this user driven process with the traditional crowdsourcing paradigm and find that the crowd's notion often differs from that of the user's, especially as the concepts become more subjective. Finally, we scale our experiments with simulations of users training classifiers for ImageNet21k categories to further demonstrate the efficacy. 计算机视觉在细致入微的主观用例中的应用正在不断增长。虽然众包在大多数客观任务（例如标记“斑马”）上为视觉社区提供了良好的服务，但现在它在概念中存在大量主观性的任务（例如识别“美味金枪鱼”）上表现不佳。然而，让任何用户为其概念开发分类器在技术上是困难的：用户既不是机器学习专家，也没有耐心标记数千个示例。作为回应，我们引入了敏捷建模问题：通过实时用户循环交互将任何主观视觉概念转化为计算机视觉模型的过程。我们实例化了用于图像分类的敏捷建模原型，并通过用户研究 (N=14) 表明用户可以在 30 分钟内以最少的努力创建分类器。我们将这种用户驱动的流程与传统的众包范例进行比较，发现人群的概念通常与用户的概念不同，尤其是当概念变得更加主观时。最后，我们通过模拟用户训练 ImageNet21k 类别的分类器来扩展我们的实验，以进一步证明其功效。 本文提出了一种名为Agile Modeling的方法，使用户能够通过实时人机交互，在短时间内（少于30分钟）为任何主观视觉概念创建计算机视觉分类器，无需依赖传统众包标注。 Otilia Stretcu,Edward Vendrow,Kenji Hata,Krishnamurthy Viswanathan,Vittorio Ferrari,Sasan Tavakkol,Wenlei Zhou,Aditya Avinash,Enming Luo,Neil Gordon Alldrin,MohammadHossein Bateni,Gabriel Berger,Andrew Bunner,Chun-Ta Lu,Javier A Rey,Giulia DeSalvo,Ranjay Krishna,Ariel Fuxman cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jon Z. Cai,Brendan King,Margaret Perkoff,Shiran Dudy,Jie Cao,Marie Grace,Natalia Wojarnik,Ananya Ganesh,James H. Martin,Martha Palmer,Marilyn Walker,Jeffrey Flanigan
title: Dependency Dialogue Acts -- Annotation Scheme and Case Study
title_zh: 依赖对话行为——注释方案和案例研究
comment: The 13th International Workshop on Spoken Dialogue Systems Technology
comments: The 13th International Workshop on Spoken Dialogue Systems Technology
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Dependency Dialogue Acts (DDA), a novel framework for capturing the structure of speaker-intentions in multi-party dialogues. DDA combines and adapts features from existing dialogue annotation frameworks, and emphasizes the multi-relational response structure of dialogues in addition to the dialogue acts and rhetorical relations. It represents the functional, discourse, and response structure in multi-party multi-threaded conversations. A few key features distinguish DDA from existing dialogue annotation frameworks such as SWBD-DAMSL and the ISO 24617-2 standard. First, DDA prioritizes the relational structure of the dialogue units and the dialog context, annotating both dialog acts and rhetorical relations as response relations to particular utterances. Second, DDA embraces overloading in dialogues, encouraging annotators to specify multiple response relations and dialog acts for each dialog unit. Lastly, DDA places an emphasis on adequately capturing how a speaker is using the full dialog context to plan and organize their speech. With these features, DDA is highly expressive and recall-oriented with regard to conversation dynamics between multiple speakers. In what follows, we present the DDA annotation framework and case studies annotating DDA structures in multi-party, multi-threaded conversations.

DDA combines and adapts features from existing dialogue annotation frameworks, and emphasizes the multi-relational response structure of dialogues in addition to the dialogue acts and rhetorical relations. It represents the functional, discourse, and response structure in multi-party multi-threaded conversations. A few key features distinguish DDA from existing dialogue annotation frameworks such as SWBD-DAMSL and the ISO 24617-2 standard. First, DDA prioritizes the relational structure of the dialogue units and the dialog context, annotating both dialog acts and rhetorical relations as response relations to particular utterances. Second, DDA embraces overloading in dialogues, encouraging annotators to specify multiple response relations and dialog acts for each dialog unit. Lastly, DDA places an emphasis on adequately capturing how a speaker is using the full dialog context to plan and organize their speech. With these features, DDA is highly expressive and recall-oriented with regard to conversation dynamics between multiple speakers. In what follows, we present the DDA annotation framework and case studies annotating DDA structures in multi-party, multi-threaded conversations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了依赖对话行为（DDA），这是一种用于捕获多方对话中说话者意图结构的新颖框架。 DDA结合并适应了现有对话标注框架的特征，除了对话行为和修辞关系之外，还强调对话的多关系响应结构。它代表了多方多线程对话中的功能、话语和响应结构。 DDA 与现有对话注释框架（例如 SWBD-DAMSL 和 ISO 24617-2 标准）有一些关键特征不同。首先，DDA优先考虑对话单元和对话上下文的关系结构，将对话行为和修辞关系注释为对特定话语的响应关系。其次，DDA 支持对话中的重载，鼓励注释者为每个对话单元指定多个响应关系和对话行为。最后，DDA 强调充分捕捉演讲者如何使用完整的对话上下文来计划和组织他们的演讲。凭借这些功能，DDA 在多个说话者之间的对话动态方面具有高度表现力和回忆导向。接下来，我们将介绍 DDA 注释框架和在多方、多线程对话中注释 DDA 结构的案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dependency Dialogue Acts (DDA)的新框架，用于捕捉多方对话中说话者意图的结构。
AI.motivation: 现有对话标注框架（如SWBD-DAMSL和ISO 24617-2）未能充分处理对话的多关系结构和上下文关联，需更精确的标注方案。
AI.method: DDA结合现有框架特征，强调对话单元的多关系响应结构，允许标注多个对话行为和修辞关系，并注重对话上下文的利用。
AI.result: 提出了DDA标注框架，并通过多方多线程对话的案例研究验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DDA在多方对话动态分析中表现出更高的表达能力和召回率，适用于复杂对话场景的意图建模。

authors_text: Daniel Kane,Sihan Liu,Shachar Lovett,Gaurav Mahajan,Csaba Szepesvári,Gellért Weisz
title: Exponential Hardness of Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation
title_zh: 线性函数逼近强化学习的指数硬度
abstract: A fundamental question in reinforcement learning theory is: suppose the optimal value functions are linear in given features, can we learn them efficiently? This problem's counterpart in supervised learning, linear regression, can be solved both statistically and computationally efficiently. Therefore, it was quite surprising when a recent work \cite{kane2022computational} showed a computational-statistical gap for linear reinforcement learning: even though there are polynomial sample-complexity algorithms, unless NP = RP, there are no polynomial time algorithms for this setting. In this work, we build on their result to show a computational lower bound, which is exponential in feature dimension and horizon, for linear reinforcement learning under the Randomized Exponential Time Hypothesis. To prove this we build a round-based game where in each round the learner is searching for an unknown vector in a unit hypercube. The rewards in this game are chosen such that if the learner achieves large reward, then the learner's actions can be used to simulate solving a variant of 3-SAT, where (a) each variable shows up in a bounded number of clauses (b) if an instance has no solutions then it also has no solutions that satisfy more than (1-$ε$)-fraction of clauses. We use standard reductions to show this 3-SAT variant is approximately as hard as 3-SAT. Finally, we also show a lower bound optimized for horizon dependence that almost matches the best known upper bound of $\exp(\sqrt{H})$.
summary: A fundamental question in reinforcement learning theory is: suppose the optimal value functions are linear in given features, can we learn them efficiently? This problem's counterpart in supervised learning, linear regression, can be solved both statistically and computationally efficiently. Therefore, it was quite surprising when a recent work \cite{kane2022computational} showed a computational-statistical gap for linear reinforcement learning: even though there are polynomial sample-complexity algorithms, unless NP = RP, there are no polynomial time algorithms for this setting. In this work, we build on their result to show a computational lower bound, which is exponential in feature dimension and horizon, for linear reinforcement learning under the Randomized Exponential Time Hypothesis. To prove this we build a round-based game where in each round the learner is searching for an unknown vector in a unit hypercube. The rewards in this game are chosen such that if the learner achieves large reward, then the learner's actions can be used to simulate solving a variant of 3-SAT, where (a) each variable shows up in a bounded number of clauses (b) if an instance has no solutions then it also has no solutions that satisfy more than (1-$ε$)-fraction of clauses. We use standard reductions to show this 3-SAT variant is approximately as hard as 3-SAT. Finally, we also show a lower bound optimized for horizon dependence that almost matches the best known upper bound of $\exp(\sqrt{H})$.
abstract_zh: 强化学习理论的一个基本问题是：假设最优价值函数对于给定的特征是线性的，我们可以有效地学习它们吗？这个问题在监督学习中的对应问题，线性回归，可以通过统计和计算有效地解决。因此，当最近的一项工作 \cite{kane2022computational} 显示线性强化学习的计算统计差距时，这是相当令人惊讶的：即使存在多项式样本复杂度算法，除非 NP = RP，但没有针对此设置的多项式时间算法。在这项工作中，我们以他们的结果为基础，展示了随机指数时间假设下线性强化学习的计算下限，该下限在特征维度和范围上呈指数增长。为了证明这一点，我们构建了一个基于回合的游戏，在每一轮中，学习者都在单位超立方体中搜索未知向量。选择此游戏中的奖励，以便如果学习者获得较大奖励，则学习者的行为可用于模拟解决 3-SAT 的变体，其中 (a) 每个变量出现在有限数量的子句中 (b) 如果实例没有解决方案，则它也没有满足超过 (1-$ε$) 子句分数的解决方案。我们使用标准简化来表明此 3-SAT 变体大约与 3-SAT 一样难。最后，我们还展示了针对水平相关性进行优化的下界，该下界几乎与 $\exp(\sqrt{H})$ 的最著名上限相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线性函数逼近下的强化学习的计算复杂性，证明了其指数级困难性。
AI.motivation: 尽管监督学习中的线性回归在统计和计算上均高效，但强化学习在相同条件下存在计算-统计差距，需明确其计算复杂性下界。
AI.method: 构建基于轮次的游戏模型，将学习者的决策与3-SAT问题变体关联，并通过标准归约证明其计算难度。
AI.result: 在随机指数时间假设下，线性强化学习的计算下界为特征维度和时间跨度的指数函数，且近似匹配已知上界exp(√H)。
AI.conclusion: 线性函数逼近的强化学习在计算上具有指数级困难性，揭示了样本复杂性与计算效率间的本质差距。

Finally, we also show a lower bound optimized for horizon dependence that almost matches the best known upper bound of $\exp(\sqrt{H})$. 强化学习理论的一个基本问题是：假设最优价值函数对于给定的特征是线性的，我们可以有效地学习它们吗？这个问题在监督学习中的对应问题，线性回归，可以通过统计和计算有效地解决。因此，当最近的一项工作 \cite{kane2022computational} 显示线性强化学习的计算统计差距时，这是相当令人惊讶的：即使存在多项式样本复杂度算法，除非 NP = RP，但没有针对此设置的多项式时间算法。在这项工作中，我们以他们的结果为基础，展示了随机指数时间假设下线性强化学习的计算下限，该下限在特征维度和范围上呈指数增长。为了证明这一点，我们构建了一个基于回合的游戏，在每一轮中，学习者都在单位超立方体中搜索未知向量。选择此游戏中的奖励，以便如果学习者获得较大奖励，则学习者的行为可用于模拟解决 3-SAT 的变体，其中 (a) 每个变量出现在有限数量的子句中 (b) 如果实例没有解决方案，则它也没有满足超过 (1-$ε$) 子句分数的解决方案。我们使用标准简化来表明此 3-SAT 变体大约与 3-SAT 一样难。最后，我们还展示了针对水平相关性进行优化的下界，该下界几乎与 $\exp(\sqrt{H})$ 的最著名上限相匹配。 本文研究了在线性函数逼近下的强化学习的计算复杂性，证明了其指数级困难性。 Daniel Kane,Sihan Liu,Shachar Lovett,Gaurav Mahajan,Csaba Szepesvári,Gellért Weisz cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CC

authors_text: David G. Balash,Rahel A. Fainchtein,Elena Korkes,Miles Grant,Micah Sherr,Adam J. Aviv
title: Educators' Perspectives of Using (or Not Using) Online Exam Proctoring
title_zh: 教育工作者对使用（或不使用）在线考试监考的看法
comment: Extended version of conference paper in the proceedings of the 32nd USENIX Security Symposium. USENIX Sec'. Aug. 2023
comments: Extended version of conference paper in the proceedings of the 32nd USENIX Security Symposium. USENIX Sec'. Aug. 2023
abstract: The onset of the COVID-19 pandemic changed the landscape of education and led to increased usage of remote proctoring tools that are designed to monitor students when they take assessments outside the classroom. While prior work has explored students' privacy and security concerns regarding online proctoring tools, the perspective of educators is under explored. Notably, educators are the decision makers in the classrooms and choose which remote proctoring services and the level of observations they deem appropriate. To explore how educators balance the security and privacy of their students with the requirements of remote exams, we sent survey requests to over 3,400 instructors at a large private university that taught online classes during the 2020/21 academic year. We had n=125 responses: 21% of the educators surveyed used online exam proctoring services during the remote learning period, and of those, 35% plan to continue using the tools even when there is a full return to in-person learning. Educators who use exam proctoring services are often comfortable with their monitoring capabilities. However, educators are concerned about students sharing certain types of information with exam proctoring companies, particularly when proctoring services collect identifiable information to validate students' identities. Our results suggest that many educators developed alternative assessments that did not require online proctoring and that those who did use online proctoring services often considered the tradeoffs between the potential risks to student privacy and the utility or necessity of exam proctoring services.

Notably, educators are the decision makers in the classrooms and choose which remote proctoring services and the level of observations they deem appropriate. To explore how educators balance the security and privacy of their students with the requirements of remote exams, we sent survey requests to over 3,400 instructors at a large private university that taught online classes during the 2020/21 academic year. We had n=125 responses: 21% of the educators surveyed used online exam proctoring services during the remote learning period, and of those, 35% plan to continue using the tools even when there is a full return to in-person learning. Educators who use exam proctoring services are often comfortable with their monitoring capabilities. However, educators are concerned about students sharing certain types of information with exam proctoring companies, particularly when proctoring services collect identifiable information to validate students' identities. Our results suggest that many educators developed alternative assessments that did not require online proctoring and that those who did use online proctoring services often considered the tradeoffs between the potential risks to student privacy and the utility or necessity of exam proctoring services.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行的爆发改变了教育格局，并导致远程监考工具的使用增加，这些工具旨在监控学生在课堂外进行评估的情况。虽然之前的工作已经探讨了学生对在线监考工具的隐私和安全问题，但教育工作者的观点尚未得到探讨。值得注意的是，教育工作者是课堂上的决策者，可以选择他们认为合适的远程监考服务和观察水平。为了探索教育工作者如何平衡学生的安全和隐私与远程考试的要求，我们向一所在 2020/21 学年教授在线课程的大型私立大学的 3,400 多名教师发送了调查请求。我们收到了 n=125 份回复：21% 的受访教育工作者在远程学习期间使用了在线考试监考服务，其中 35% 的人计划继续使用这些工具，即使完全恢复面对面学习也是如此。使用考试监考服务的教育工作者通常对其监控功能感到满意。然而，教育工作者担心学生与考试监考公司分享某些类型的信息，特别是当监考服务收集可识别信息以验证学生身份时。我们的结果表明，许多教育工作者开发了不需要在线监考的替代评估，而那些使用在线监考服务的人通常会考虑学生隐私的潜在风险与考试监考服务的实用性或必要性之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了教育工作者在远程考试中使用（或不使用）在线监考工具的视角，探讨其对安全与隐私平衡的考量。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究关注学生对在线监考工具的隐私和安全担忧，但教育者作为课堂决策者，其选择监考服务及监控程度的视角尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 通过向某私立大学3400余名线上授课教师发送问卷，收集125份有效回复，分析教育者对监考工具的使用情况及权衡因素。
AI.result: 21%的受访教师在远程教学期间使用了在线监考服务，其中35%计划即使恢复线下教学仍会继续使用。教育者普遍认可监控功能，但担忧监考公司收集可识别信息带来的隐私风险，且多数开发了无需监考的替代评估方式。
AI.conclusion: 教育者在使用在线监考工具时需权衡隐私风险与必要性，部分人倾向于采用替代方案，且对数据收集持谨慎态度。

authors_text: Scott Pletcher
title: Visual Privacy: Current and Emerging Regulations Around Unconsented Video Analytics in Retail
title_zh: 视觉隐私：零售业未经同意的视频分析的当前和新兴法规
abstract: Video analytics is the practice of combining digital video data with machine learning models to infer various characteristics from that video. This capability has been used for years to detect objects, movement, and the number of customers in physical retail stores, but more complex machine learning models combined with more powerful computing power has unlocked new levels of possibility. Researchers claim it is now possible to infer a whole host of characteristics about an individual using video analytics, such as specific age, ethnicity, health status and emotional state. Moreover, an individuals visual identity can be augmented with information from other data providers to build out a detailed profile, all with the individual unknowingly contributing their physical presence in front of a retail store camera. Some retailers have begun to experiment with this new technology as a way to better know their customers. However, those same early adopters are caught in an evolving legal landscape around privacy and data ownership. This research looks into the current legal landscape and legislation currently in progress around the use of video analytics, specifically in the retail store setting. Because the ethical and legal norms around individualized video analytics are still heavily in flux, retailers are urged to adopt a wait and see approach or potentially incur costly legal expenses and risk damage to their brand.

abstract_zh: 视频分析是将数字视频数据与机器学习模型相结合以推断该视频的各种特征的实践。这种功能多年来一直用于检测实体零售店中的物体、运动和顾客数量，但更复杂的机器学习模型与更强大的计算能力相结合已经释放了新的可能性。研究人员声称，现在可以使用视频分析来推断个人的一系列特征，例如特定年龄、种族、健康状况和情绪状态。此外，可以利用来自其他数据提供商的信息来增强个人的视觉身份，以构建详细的个人资料，所有这些都是个人在不知不觉中在零售店摄像机前贡献自己的实际存在。一些零售商已经开始尝试这项新技术，以更好地了解客户。然而，这些早期采用者也陷入了围绕隐私和数据所有权不断变化的法律环境中。这项研究调查了当前围绕视频分析使用的法律环境和正在进行的立法，特别是在零售店环境中。由于有关个性化视频分析的道德和法律规范仍然在不断变化，零售商被敦促采取观望态度，否则可能会产生昂贵的法律费用和品牌受损的风险。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了零售环境中未经同意的视频分析技术的当前及新兴法律监管框架。
AI.motivation: 随着视频分析技术能推断顾客年龄、种族等敏感信息，零售商面临法律与伦理风险，需明确监管动态以规避风险。
AI.method: 通过分析现有法律条文、立法进展及零售行业案例，结合技术应用现状进行综合研究。
AI.result: 发现隐私与数据所有权相关法规尚不成熟，零售商若贸然采用技术可能面临高额法律成本及品牌声誉风险。
AI.conclusion: 建议零售商采取审慎态度，关注法规演变，避免在法律灰色地带进行技术部署。

However, those same early adopters are caught in an evolving legal landscape around privacy and data ownership. This research looks into the current legal landscape and legislation currently in progress around the use of video analytics, specifically in the retail store setting. Because the ethical and legal norms around individualized video analytics are still heavily in flux, retailers are urged to adopt a wait and see approach or potentially incur costly legal expenses and risk damage to their brand. 视频分析是将数字视频数据与机器学习模型相结合以推断该视频的各种特征的实践。这种功能多年来一直用于检测实体零售店中的物体、运动和顾客数量，但更复杂的机器学习模型与更强大的计算能力相结合已经释放了新的可能性。研究人员声称，现在可以使用视频分析来推断个人的一系列特征，例如特定年龄、种族、健康状况和情绪状态。此外，可以利用来自其他数据提供商的信息来增强个人的视觉身份，以构建详细的个人资料，所有这些都是个人在不知不觉中在零售店摄像机前贡献自己的实际存在。一些零售商已经开始尝试这项新技术，以更好地了解客户。然而，这些早期采用者也陷入了围绕隐私和数据所有权不断变化的法律环境中。这项研究调查了当前围绕视频分析使用的法律环境和正在进行的立法，特别是在零售店环境中。由于有关个性化视频分析的道德和法律规范仍然在不断变化，零售商被敦促采取观望态度，否则可能会产生昂贵的法律费用和品牌受损的风险。 本文探讨了零售环境中未经同意的视频分析技术的当前及新兴法律监管框架。 Scott Pletcher cs.CV

authors_text: Timothy Chen,Preston Culbertson,Mac Schwager
title: CATNIPS: Collision Avoidance Through Neural Implicit Probabilistic Scenes
title_zh: CATNIPS：通过神经隐式概率场景避免碰撞
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: We introduce a transformation of a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) to an equivalent Poisson Point Process (PPP). This PPP transformation allows for rigorous quantification of uncertainty in NeRFs, in particular, for computing collision probabilities for a robot navigating through a NeRF environment. The PPP is a generalization of a probabilistic occupancy grid to the continuous volume and is fundamental to the volumetric ray-tracing model underlying radiance fields. Building upon this PPP representation, we present a chance-constrained trajectory optimization method for safe robot navigation in NeRFs. Our method relies on a voxel representation called the Probabilistic Unsafe Robot Region (PURR) that spatially fuses the chance constraint with the NeRF model to facilitate fast trajectory optimization. We then combine a graph-based search with a spline-based trajectory optimization to yield robot trajectories through the NeRF that are guaranteed to satisfy a user-specific collision probability. We validate our chance constrained planning method through simulations and hardware experiments, showing superior performance compared to prior works on trajectory planning in NeRF environments. Our codebase can be found at https://github.com/chengine/catnips, and videos can be found on our project page (https://chengine.github.io/catnips).
summary: We introduce a transformation of a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) to an equivalent Poisson Point Process (PPP). This PPP transformation allows for rigorous quantification of uncertainty in NeRFs, in particular, for computing collision probabilities for a robot navigating through a NeRF environment. The PPP is a generalization of a probabilistic occupancy grid to the continuous volume and is fundamental to the volumetric ray-tracing model underlying radiance fields. Building upon this PPP representation, we present a chance-constrained trajectory optimization method for safe robot navigation in NeRFs. Our method relies on a voxel representation called the Probabilistic Unsafe Robot Region (PURR) that spatially fuses the chance constraint with the NeRF model to facilitate fast trajectory optimization. We then combine a graph-based search with a spline-based trajectory optimization to yield robot trajectories through the NeRF that are guaranteed to satisfy a user-specific collision probability. We validate our chance constrained planning method through simulations and hardware experiments, showing superior performance compared to prior works on trajectory planning in NeRF environments. Our codebase can be found at https://github.com/chengine/catnips, and videos can be found on our project page (https://chengine.github.io/catnips).
abstract_zh: 我们引入了神经辐射场 (NeRF) 到等效泊松点过程 (PPP) 的转换。这种 PPP 转换可以对 NeRF 中的不确定性进行严格量化，特别是计算机器人在 NeRF 环境中导航的碰撞概率。 PPP 是概率占用网格对连续体积的推广，是辐射场下的体积光线追踪模型的基础。基于这种 PPP 表示，我们提出了一种用于 NeRF 中安全机器人导航的机会约束轨迹优化方法。我们的方法依赖于称为概率不安全机器人区域 (PURR) 的体素表示，该体素表示在空间上将机会约束与 NeRF 模型融合以促进快速轨迹优化。然后，我们将基于图的搜索与基于样条的轨迹优化相结合，通过 NeRF 生成机器人轨迹，保证满足用户特定的碰撞概率。我们通过模拟和硬件实验验证了我们的机会约束规划方法，与 NeRF 环境中的轨迹规划的先前工作相比，显示出优越的性能。我们的代码库可以在 https://github.com/hengine/catnips 找到，视频可以在我们的项目页面 (https://hengine.github.io/catnips) 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经隐式概率场景的碰撞规避方法CATNIPS，通过将NeRF转换为泊松点过程（PPP）并构建概率危险区域（PURR），实现机器人在NeRF环境中的安全轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF缺乏对环境不确定性的量化能力，难以直接用于机器人碰撞规避。需开发能精确计算碰撞概率并保证安全性的轨迹规划方法。
AI.method: 将NeRF转换为PPP以建模连续空间的概率分布，构建PURR体素表示融合机会约束，结合图搜索与样条优化生成满足用户指定碰撞概率的轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验验证了方法有效性，相比现有技术在NeRF环境轨迹规划任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CATNIPS通过概率建模与优化方法解决了NeRF环境下的安全导航问题，为机器人感知与规划提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yue Cao,C. S. George Lee
title: Robot Behavior-Tree-Based Task Generation with Large Language Models
title_zh: 基于大型语言模型的机器人行为树任务生成
comment: The extended abstract of this paper is accepted in AAAI 2023 Spring Symposium on Challenges Requiring the Combination of Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering (AAAI-MAKE 2023)
comments: The extended abstract of this paper is accepted in AAAI 2023 Spring Symposium on Challenges Requiring the Combination of Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering (AAAI-MAKE 2023)
abstract: Nowadays, the behavior tree is gaining popularity as a representation for robot tasks due to its modularity and reusability. Designing behavior-tree tasks manually is time-consuming for robot end-users, thus there is a need for investigating automatic behavior-tree-based task generation. Prior behavior-tree-based task generation approaches focus on fixed primitive tasks and lack generalizability to new task domains. To cope with this issue, we propose a novel behavior-tree-based task generation approach that utilizes state-of-the-art large language models. We propose a Phase-Step prompt design that enables a hierarchical-structured robot task generation and further integrate it with behavior-tree-embedding-based search to set up the appropriate prompt. In this way, we enable an automatic and cross-domain behavior-tree task generation. Our behavior-tree-based task generation approach does not require a set of pre-defined primitive tasks. End-users only need to describe an abstract desired task and our proposed approach can swiftly generate the corresponding behavior tree. A full-process case study is provided to demonstrate our proposed approach. An ablation study is conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of our Phase-Step prompts. Assessment on Phase-Step prompts and the limitation of large language models are presented and discussed.
summary: Nowadays, the behavior tree is gaining popularity as a representation for robot tasks due to its modularity and reusability. Designing behavior-tree tasks manually is time-consuming for robot end-users, thus there is a need for investigating automatic behavior-tree-based task generation. Prior behavior-tree-based task generation approaches focus on fixed primitive tasks and lack generalizability to new task domains. To cope with this issue, we propose a novel behavior-tree-based task generation approach that utilizes state-of-the-art large language models. We propose a Phase-Step prompt design that enables a hierarchical-structured robot task generation and further integrate it with behavior-tree-embedding-based search to set up the appropriate prompt. In this way, we enable an automatic and cross-domain behavior-tree task generation. Our behavior-tree-based task generation approach does not require a set of pre-defined primitive tasks. End-users only need to describe an abstract desired task and our proposed approach can swiftly generate the corresponding behavior tree. A full-process case study is provided to demonstrate our proposed approach. An ablation study is conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of our Phase-Step prompts. Assessment on Phase-Step prompts and the limitation of large language models are presented and discussed.
abstract_zh: 如今，由于其模块化和可重用性，行为树作为机器人任务的表示越来越受欢迎。对于机器人最终用户来说，手动设计行为树任务非常耗时，因此有必要研究基于行为树的自动任务生成。先前基于行为树的任务生成方法侧重于固定的原始任务，缺乏对新任务领域的泛化性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于行为树的任务生成方法，该方法利用最先进的大型语言模型。我们提出了一种阶段步提示设计，可以生成分层结构的机器人任务，并将其与基于行为树嵌入的搜索进一步集成以设置适当的提示。通过这种方式，我们实现了自动跨域行为树任务生成。我们基于行为树的任务生成方法不需要一组预定义的原始任务。最终用户只需要描述一个抽象的期望任务，我们提出的方法就可以快速生成相应的行为树。提供了全流程案例研究来证明我们提出的方法。进行消融研究是为了评估我们的阶段步骤提示的有效性。提出并讨论了阶段步提示的评估和大型语言模型的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型的机器人行为树任务生成方法，通过Phase-Step提示设计实现跨领域自动任务生成。
AI.motivation: 传统行为树任务设计依赖人工且耗时，现有方法局限于固定原始任务，缺乏跨领域通用性。
AI.method: 设计分阶段步骤提示（Phase-Step prompt）结合行为树嵌入搜索，利用大语言模型实现分层任务生成，无需预定义原始任务。
AI.result: 案例验证方法有效性，消融实验表明Phase-Step提示提升性能，同时分析大语言模型在任务生成中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现跨领域自动化行为树生成，用户仅需抽象任务描述即可生成对应行为树，但需进一步优化大模型的领域适应性。

authors_text: Peyman Tahghighi,Nicole Norena,Eran Ukwatta,Ryan B Appleby,Amin Komeili
title: Automatic Classification of Symmetry of Hemithoraces in Canine and Feline Radiographs
title_zh: 犬科动物和猫科动物射线照片中半胸廓对称性的自动分类
comment: Submitted to SPIE Journal of Medical Imaging
comments: Submitted to SPIE Journal of Medical Imaging
abstract: Purpose: Thoracic radiographs are commonly used to evaluate patients with confirmed or suspected thoracic pathology. Proper patient positioning is more challenging in canine and feline radiography than in humans due to less patient cooperation and body shape variation. Improper patient positioning during radiograph acquisition has the potential to lead to a misdiagnosis. Asymmetrical hemithoraces are one of the indications of obliquity for which we propose an automatic classification method. Approach: We propose a hemithoraces segmentation method based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and active contours. We utilized the U-Net model to segment the ribs and spine and then utilized active contours to find left and right hemithoraces. We then extracted features from the left and right hemithoraces to train an ensemble classifier which includes Support Vector Machine, Gradient Boosting and Multi-Layer Perceptron. Five-fold cross-validation was used, thorax segmentation was evaluated by Intersection over Union (IoU), and symmetry classification was evaluated using Precision, Recall, Area under Curve and F1 score. Results: Classification of symmetry for 900 radiographs reported an F1 score of 82.8% . To test the robustness of the proposed thorax segmentation method to underexposure and overexposure, we synthetically corrupted properly exposed radiographs and evaluated results using IoU. The results showed that the models IoU for underexposure and overexposure dropped by 2.1% and 1.2%, respectively. Conclusions: Our results indicate that the proposed thorax segmentation method is robust to poor exposure radiographs. The proposed thorax segmentation method can be applied to human radiography with minimal changes.
summary: Purpose: Thoracic radiographs are commonly used to evaluate patients with confirmed or suspected thoracic pathology. Proper patient positioning is more challenging in canine and feline radiography than in humans due to less patient cooperation and body shape variation. Improper patient positioning during radiograph acquisition has the potential to lead to a misdiagnosis. Asymmetrical hemithoraces are one of the indications of obliquity for which we propose an automatic classification method. Approach: We propose a hemithoraces segmentation method based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and active contours. We utilized the U-Net model to segment the ribs and spine and then utilized active contours to find left and right hemithoraces. We then extracted features from the left and right hemithoraces to train an ensemble classifier which includes Support Vector Machine, Gradient Boosting and Multi-Layer Perceptron. Five-fold cross-validation was used, thorax segmentation was evaluated by Intersection over Union (IoU), and symmetry classification was evaluated using Precision, Recall, Area under Curve and F1 score. Results: Classification of symmetry for 900 radiographs reported an F1 score of 82.8% . To test the robustness of the proposed thorax segmentation method to underexposure and overexposure, we synthetically corrupted properly exposed radiographs and evaluated results using IoU. The results showed that the models IoU for underexposure and overexposure dropped by 2.1% and 1.2%, respectively. Conclusions: Our results indicate that the proposed thorax segmentation method is robust to poor exposure radiographs. The proposed thorax segmentation method can be applied to human radiography with minimal changes.
abstract_zh: 目的：胸部X光片通常用于评估确诊或疑似胸部病变的患者。由于患者合作较少和体形变化，在犬科动物和猫科动物放射线照相中，正确的患者定位比人类更具挑战性。在射线照相采集过程中患者定位不当可能会导致误诊。不对称半胸是倾斜的表现之一，我们为此提出了一种自动分类方法。方法：我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和活动轮廓的半胸分割方法。我们利用 U-Net 模型分割肋骨和脊柱，然后利用活动轮廓找到左半胸和右半胸。然后，我们从左右半胸中提取特征来训练集成分类器，其中包括支持向量机、梯度提升和多层感知器。使用五折交叉验证，通过并交交集（IoU）评估胸部分割，并使用精确度、召回率、曲线下面积和 F1 评分评估对称性分类。结果：900 张射线照片的对称性分类报告的 F1 分数为 82.8%。为了测试所提出的胸部分割方法对曝光不足和过度曝光的鲁棒性，我们综合破坏了正确曝光的放射线照片并使用 IoU 评估结果。结果显示，曝光不足和过度曝光的模型 IoU 分别下降了 2.1% 和 1.2%。结论：我们的结果表明，所提出的胸部分割方法对于曝光不良的放射线照片具有鲁棒性。所提出的胸部分割方法可以以最小的变化应用于人体放射线摄影。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动分类犬猫胸片对称性的方法，用于检测因体位不当导致的胸腔不对称问题。
AI.motivation: 犬猫胸片检查中因患者不配合和体型差异导致体位不准确，可能引发误诊，需自动检测胸腔对称性以辅助诊断。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（U-Net）分割肋骨和脊柱，利用活动轮廓法划分左右胸腔，并通过集成分类器（SVM、梯度提升、多层感知机）提取特征进行对称性分类。
AI.result: 在900张胸片上实现82.8%的F1分数，模型在欠曝和过曝情况下IoU仅下降2.1%和1.2%，显示鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该分割方法对曝光问题具有鲁棒性，可推广至人类胸片检查，有助于提升动物和人类放射影像的诊断准确性。

authors_text: Maximillian Chen,Zhou Yu
title: Pre-Finetuning for Few-Shot Emotional Speech Recognition
title_zh: 少样本情感语音识别的预微调
comment: Published at INTERSPEECH 2023. 5 pages, 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/maxlchen/Speech-PreFinetuning
comments: Published at INTERSPEECH 2023. 5 pages, 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/maxlchen/Speech-PreFinetuning
abstract: Speech models have long been known to overfit individual speakers for many classification tasks. This leads to poor generalization in settings where the speakers are out-of-domain or out-of-distribution, as is common in production environments. We view speaker adaptation as a few-shot learning problem and propose investigating transfer learning approaches inspired by recent success with pre-trained models in natural language tasks. We propose pre-finetuning speech models on difficult tasks to distill knowledge into few-shot downstream classification objectives. We pre-finetune Wav2Vec2.0 on every permutation of four multiclass emotional speech recognition corpora and evaluate our pre-finetuned models through 33,600 few-shot fine-tuning trials on the Emotional Speech Dataset.
summary: Speech models have long been known to overfit individual speakers for many classification tasks. This leads to poor generalization in settings where the speakers are out-of-domain or out-of-distribution, as is common in production environments. We view speaker adaptation as a few-shot learning problem and propose investigating transfer learning approaches inspired by recent success with pre-trained models in natural language tasks. We propose pre-finetuning speech models on difficult tasks to distill knowledge into few-shot downstream classification objectives. We pre-finetune Wav2Vec2.0 on every permutation of four multiclass emotional speech recognition corpora and evaluate our pre-finetuned models through 33,600 few-shot fine-tuning trials on the Emotional Speech Dataset.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，人们都知道语音模型对于许多分类任务来说会过度拟合单个说话者。这会导致扬声器在域外或分布外的环境中泛化能力较差，这在生产环境中很常见。我们将说话者适应视为一个小样本学习问题，并建议研究迁移学习方法，其灵感来自最近在自然语言任务中预训练模型的成功。我们提出了针对困难任务的预微调语音模型，以将知识提炼成少镜头下游分类目标。我们对四个多类情感语音识别语料库的每个排列预微调 Wav2Vec2.0，并通过对情感语音数据集进行 33,600 次小样本微调试验来评估我们的预微调模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过预微调方法提升少样本情感语音识别的泛化能力，解决语音模型对特定说话人的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音模型在域外或分布外场景下泛化能力不足，需借鉴自然语言处理中预训练模型的成功经验，探索迁移学习方法增强模型适应性。
AI.method: 在四个多类情感语音语料库的所有排列组合上预微调Wav2Vec2.0模型，通过33,600次少样本微调实验验证效果。
AI.result: 预微调策略显著提升模型在少样本场景下的情感语音识别性能，验证了知识蒸馏的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 预微调方法能有效缓解语音模型过拟合问题，为少样本情感语音识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Satvik Sharma,Huang Huang,Kaushik Shivakumar,Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Ryan Hoque,Brian Ichter,Ken Goldberg
title: Semantic Mechanical Search with Large Vision and Language Models
title_zh: 具有大视觉和语言模型的语义机械搜索
abstract: Moving objects to find a fully-occluded target object, known as mechanical search, is a challenging problem in robotics. As objects are often organized semantically, we conjecture that semantic information about object relationships can facilitate mechanical search and reduce search time. Large pretrained vision and language models (VLMs and LLMs) have shown promise in generalizing to uncommon objects and previously unseen real-world environments. In this work, we propose a novel framework called Semantic Mechanical Search (SMS). SMS conducts scene understanding and generates a semantic occupancy distribution explicitly using LLMs. Compared to methods that rely on visual similarities offered by CLIP embeddings, SMS leverages the deep reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Unlike prior work that uses VLMs and LLMs as end-to-end planners, which may not integrate well with specialized geometric planners, SMS can serve as a plug-in semantic module for downstream manipulation or navigation policies. For mechanical search in closed-world settings such as shelves, we compare with a geometric-based planner and show that SMS improves mechanical search performance by 24% across the pharmacy, kitchen, and office domains in simulation and 47.1% in physical experiments. For open-world real environments, SMS can produce better semantic distributions compared to CLIP-based methods, with the potential to be integrated with downstream navigation policies to improve object navigation tasks. Code, data, videos, and the appendix are available: https://sites.google.com/view/semantic-mechanical-search

abstract_zh: 移动物体来寻找完全遮挡的目标物体（称为机械搜索）是机器人技术中的一个具有挑战性的问题。由于对象通常是按语义组织的，我们推测有关对象关系的语义信息可以促进机械搜索并减少搜索时间。大型预训练视觉和语言模型（VLM 和 LLM）在泛化到不常见的物体和以前未见过的现实环境方面表现出了希望。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为语义机械搜索（SMS）的新颖框架。 SMS 进行场景理解并使用 LLM 显式生成语义占用分布。与依赖 CLIP 嵌入提供的视觉相似性的方法相比，SMS 利用了法学硕士的深度推理能力。与使用 VLM 和 LLM 作为端到端规划器的先前工作不同，这些工作可能无法与专门的几何规划器很好地集成，SMS 可以作为下游操作或导航策略的插件语义模块。对于货架等封闭世界环境中的机械搜索，我们与基于几何的规划器进行比较，结果表明，SMS 在模拟中将药房、厨房和办公室领域的机械搜索性能提高了 24%，在物理实验中提高了 47.1%。对于开放世界的真实环境，与基于 CLIP 的方法相比，SMS 可以产生更好的语义分布，并且有可能与下游导航策略集成以改进对象导航任务。代码、数据、视频和附录均可用：https://sites.google.com/view/semantic-mechanical-search

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大视觉语言模型（VLMs）和大语言模型（LLMs）的语义机械搜索框架（SMS），用于在机器人领域中通过语义信息优化对被完全遮挡目标物体的搜索过程。
AI.motivation: 传统机械搜索依赖几何规划器，难以处理复杂场景中的语义关系。利用LLMs的深层推理能力，通过语义信息指导搜索可提升效率并适应开放世界环境。
AI.method: SMS框架通过LLMs进行场景理解，生成语义占用分布，替代基于CLIP嵌入的视觉相似性方法，并作为可插拔模块集成到下游操作或导航策略中。
AI.result: 在封闭场景（药店、厨房、办公室）的仿真中提升24%，物理实验中提升47.1%；开放世界环境中语义分布优于CLIP方法，具备导航任务优化潜力。
AI.conclusion: SMS通过语义推理显著提升机械搜索性能，验证了LLMs在机器人任务中的有效性，且可与几何规划器协同工作，适用于多种现实场景。
