search_text: Semantic Mechanical Search with Large Vision and Language Models 具有大视觉和语言模型的语义机械搜索 Moving objects to find a fully-occluded target object, known as mechanical search, is a challenging problem in robotics. As objects are often organized semantically, we conjecture that semantic information about object relationships can facilitate mechanical search and reduce search time. Large pretrained vision and language models (VLMs and LLMs) have shown promise in generalizing to uncommon objects and previously unseen real-world environments. In this work, we propose a novel framework called Semantic Mechanical Search (SMS). SMS conducts scene understanding and generates a semantic occupancy distribution explicitly using LLMs. Compared to methods that rely on visual similarities offered by CLIP embeddings, SMS leverages the deep reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Unlike prior work that uses VLMs and LLMs as end-to-end planners, which may not integrate well with specialized geometric planners, SMS can serve as a plug-in semantic module for downstream manipulation or navigation policies. For mechanical search in closed-world settings such as shelves, we compare with a geometric-based planner and show that SMS improves mechanical search performance by 24% across the pharmacy, kitchen, and office domains in simulation and 47.1% in physical experiments. For open-world real environments, SMS can produce better semantic distributions compared to CLIP-based methods, with the potential to be integrated with downstream navigation policies to improve object navigation tasks. Code, data, videos, and the appendix are available: https://sites.google.com/view/semantic-mechanical-search 移动物体来寻找完全遮挡的目标物体（称为机械搜索）是机器人技术中的一个具有挑战性的问题。由于对象通常是按语义组织的，我们推测有关对象关系的语义信息可以促进机械搜索并减少搜索时间。大型预训练视觉和语言模型（VLM 和 LLM）在泛化到不常见的物体和以前未见过的现实环境方面表现出了希望。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为语义机械搜索（SMS）的新颖框架。 SMS 进行场景理解并使用 LLM 显式生成语义占用分布。与依赖 CLIP 嵌入提供的视觉相似性的方法相比，SMS 利用了法学硕士的深度推理能力。与使用 VLM 和 LLM 作为端到端规划器的先前工作不同，这些工作可能无法与专门的几何规划器很好地集成，SMS 可以作为下游操作或导航策略的插件语义模块。对于货架等封闭世界环境中的机械搜索，我们与基于几何的规划器进行比较，结果表明，SMS 在模拟中将药房、厨房和办公室领域的机械搜索性能提高了 24%，在物理实验中提高了 47.1%。对于开放世界的真实环境，与基于 CLIP 的方法相比，SMS 可以产生更好的语义分布，并且有可能与下游导航策略集成以改进对象导航任务。代码、数据、视频和附录均可用：https://sites.google.com/view/semantic-mechanical-search 本文提出了一种基于大视觉语言模型（VLMs）和大语言模型（LLMs）的语义机械搜索框架（SMS），用于在机器人领域中通过语义信息优化对被完全遮挡目标物体的搜索过程。 Satvik Sharma,Huang Huang,Kaushik Shivakumar,Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Ryan Hoque,Brian Ichter,Ken Goldberg cs.RO

authors_text: Jia Tracy Shen,Dongwon Lee
title: Imputing Knowledge Tracing Data with Subject-Based Training via LSTM Variational Autoencoders Frameworks
title_zh: 通过 LSTM 变分自动编码器框架通过基于主题的训练来输入知识追踪数据
abstract: The issue of missing data poses a great challenge on boosting performance and application of deep learning models in the {\em Knowledge Tracing} (KT) problem. However, there has been the lack of understanding on the issue in the literature. %are not sufficient studies tackling this problem. In this work, to address this challenge, we adopt a subject-based training method to split and impute data by student IDs instead of row number splitting which we call non-subject based training. The benefit of subject-based training can retain the complete sequence for each student and hence achieve efficient training. Further, we leverage two existing deep generative frameworks, namely variational Autoencoders (VAE) and Longitudinal Variational Autoencoders (LVAE) frameworks and build LSTM kernels into them to form LSTM-VAE and LSTM LVAE (noted as VAE and LVAE for simplicity) models to generate quality data. In LVAE, a Gaussian Process (GP) model is trained to disentangle the correlation between the subject (i.e., student) descriptor information (e.g., age, gender) and the latent space. The paper finally compare the model performance between training the original data and training the data imputed with generated data from non-subject based model VAE-NS and subject-based training models (i.e., VAE and LVAE). We demonstrate that the generated data from LSTM-VAE and LSTM-LVAE can boost the original model performance by about 50%. Moreover, the original model just needs 10% more student data to surpass the original performance if the prediction model is small and 50\% more data if the prediction model is large with our proposed frameworks.
summary: The issue of missing data poses a great challenge on boosting performance and application of deep learning models in the {\em Knowledge Tracing} (KT) problem. However, there has been the lack of understanding on the issue in the literature. %are not sufficient studies tackling this problem. In this work, to address this challenge, we adopt a subject-based training method to split and impute data by student IDs instead of row number splitting which we call non-subject based training. The benefit of subject-based training can retain the complete sequence for each student and hence achieve efficient training. Further, we leverage two existing deep generative frameworks, namely variational Autoencoders (VAE) and Longitudinal Variational Autoencoders (LVAE) frameworks and build LSTM kernels into them to form LSTM-VAE and LSTM LVAE (noted as VAE and LVAE for simplicity) models to generate quality data. In LVAE, a Gaussian Process (GP) model is trained to disentangle the correlation between the subject (i.e., student) descriptor information (e.g., age, gender) and the latent space. The paper finally compare the model performance between training the original data and training the data imputed with generated data from non-subject based model VAE-NS and subject-based training models (i.e., VAE and LVAE). We demonstrate that the generated data from LSTM-VAE and LSTM-LVAE can boost the original model performance by about 50%. Moreover, the original model just needs 10% more student data to surpass the original performance if the prediction model is small and 50\% more data if the prediction model is large with our proposed frameworks.
abstract_zh: 缺失数据的问题对提高深度学习模型在知识追踪（KT）问题中的性能和应用提出了巨大的挑战。然而，文献中对此问题缺乏理解。 ％没有足够的研究来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，为了应对这一挑战，我们采用基于主题的训练方法，通过学生 ID 来分割和插补数据，而不是行号分割，我们称之为非基于主题的训练。学科训练的好处是可以保留每个学生的完整序列，从而实现高效的训练。此外，我们利用两个现有的深度生成框架，即变分自动编码器（VAE）和纵向变分自动编码器（LVAE）框架，并在其中构建 LSTM 内核，形成 LSTM-VAE 和 LSTM LVAE（为简单起见，称为 VAE 和 LVAE）模型来生成高质量数据。在 LVAE 中，训练高斯过程（GP）模型来理清受试者（即学生）描述符信息（例如年龄、性别）和潜在空间之间的相关性。本文最后比较了训练原始数据和训练由非基于主题的模型 VAE-NS 和基于主题的训练模型（即 VAE 和 LVAE）生成的数据估算的数据之间的模型性能。我们证明，LSTM-VAE 和 LSTM-LVAE 生成的数据可以将原始模型性能提高约 50%。此外，如果预测模型很小，原始模型只需要多 10% 的学生数据即可超过原始性能；如果预测模型很大，则使用我们提出的框架则需要多 50% 的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于主题的训练方法结合LSTM变分自编码器框架，解决知识追踪中的缺失数据问题，通过生成高质量数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 知识追踪中缺失数据影响模型性能，传统方法未充分考虑学生个体序列完整性，缺乏有效数据填补策略。
AI.method: 采用基于学生ID的分割策略替代传统行数分割，构建LSTM-VAE和LSTM-LVAE模型，利用高斯过程分离学生属性与潜在空间关联。
AI.result: 生成数据使模型性能提升约50%，小模型仅需增加10%数据即可超越原性能，大模型需增加50%数据。
AI.conclusion: 基于主题的训练与LSTM变分自编码器有效解决数据缺失问题，在保持序列完整性的同时显著提升模型效果并减少数据需求。

authors_text: Daria Gurtovoy,Simon Gottschalk
title: Linking Streets in OpenStreetMap to Persons in Wikidata
title_zh: 将 OpenStreetMap 中的街道链接到 Wikidata 中的人员
comment: The definitive Version of Record was published in Companion Proceedings of the Web Conference 2022 (WWW '22 Companion), April 25-29, 2022, Virtual Event, Lyon, France
comments: The definitive Version of Record was published in Companion Proceedings of the Web Conference 2022 (WWW '22 Companion), April 25-29, 2022, Virtual Event, Lyon, France
abstract: Geographic web sources such as OpenStreetMap (OSM) and knowledge graphs such as Wikidata are often unconnected. An example connection that can be established between these sources are links between streets in OSM to the persons in Wikidata they were named after. This paper presents StreetToPerson, an approach for connecting streets in OSM to persons in a knowledge graph based on relations in the knowledge graph and spatial dependencies. Our evaluation shows that we outperform existing approaches by 26 percentage points. In addition, we apply StreetToPerson on all OSM streets in Germany, for which we identify more than 180,000 links between streets and persons.
summary: Geographic web sources such as OpenStreetMap (OSM) and knowledge graphs such as Wikidata are often unconnected. An example connection that can be established between these sources are links between streets in OSM to the persons in Wikidata they were named after. This paper presents StreetToPerson, an approach for connecting streets in OSM to persons in a knowledge graph based on relations in the knowledge graph and spatial dependencies. Our evaluation shows that we outperform existing approaches by 26 percentage points. In addition, we apply StreetToPerson on all OSM streets in Germany, for which we identify more than 180,000 links between streets and persons.
abstract_zh: OpenStreetMap (OSM) 等地理网络资源和 Wikidata 等知识图谱通常是未连接的。可以在这些来源之间建立的示例连接是 OSM 中的街道与维基数据中以它们命名的人员之间的链接。本文提出了 StreetToPerson，这是一种基于知识图谱中的关系和空间依赖关系将 OSM 中的街道与知识图中的人员连接起来的方法。我们的评估表明，我们的表现比现有方法高出 26 个百分点。此外，我们在德国所有 OSM 街道上应用了 StreetToPerson，识别出街道和人员之间超过 180,000 个链接。

AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了跨数据源的关联，为大规模地理与知识数据整合提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Armand Rousselot,Michael Spannowsky
title: Generative Invertible Quantum Neural Networks
title_zh: 生成可逆量子神经网络
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures Changes in v2: Add references 49-51, provided gitlab link to code repository Changes in v3: Incorporate rebuttal from https://scipost.org/submissions/2302.12906v2/
comments: 18 pages, 7 figures Changes in v2: Add references 49-51, provided gitlab link to code repository Changes in v3: Incorporate rebuttal from https://scipost.org/submissions/2302.12906v2/
abstract: Invertible Neural Networks (INN) have become established tools for the simulation and generation of highly complex data. We propose a quantum-gate algorithm for a Quantum Invertible Neural Network (QINN) and apply it to the LHC data of jet-associated production of a Z-boson that decays into leptons, a standard candle process for particle collider precision measurements. We compare the QINN's performance for different loss functions and training scenarios. For this task, we find that a hybrid QINN matches the performance of a significantly larger purely classical INN in learning and generating complex data.
summary: Invertible Neural Networks (INN) have become established tools for the simulation and generation of highly complex data. We propose a quantum-gate algorithm for a Quantum Invertible Neural Network (QINN) and apply it to the LHC data of jet-associated production of a Z-boson that decays into leptons, a standard candle process for particle collider precision measurements. We compare the QINN's performance for different loss functions and training scenarios. For this task, we find that a hybrid QINN matches the performance of a significantly larger purely classical INN in learning and generating complex data.
abstract_zh: 可逆神经网络 (INN) 已成为模拟和生成高度复杂数据的既定工具。我们提出了一种用于量子可逆神经网络 (QINN) 的量子门算法，并将其应用于与射流相关的 Z 玻色子产生的大型强子对撞机数据，该 Z 玻色子衰变成轻子，这是粒子对撞机精密测量的标准蜡烛过程。我们比较了 QINN 在不同损失函数和训练场景下的性能。对于此任务，我们发现混合 QINN 在学习和生成复杂数据方面的性能与更大的纯经典 INN 的性能相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子门算法的量子可逆神经网络（QINN），并将其应用于高能物理实验中的Z玻色子喷注关联产生数据分析。
AI.motivation: 可逆神经网络（INN）在复杂数据模拟中表现优异，但传统经典INN在处理高能物理等复杂数据时存在局限性，需探索量子计算的潜在优势。
AI.method: 设计量子门算法实现QINN，通过不同损失函数和训练场景对比其性能，并与经典INN进行效果对比实验。
AI.result: 混合QINN在学习和生成复杂数据任务中，性能可匹敌规模显著更大的经典INN。
AI.conclusion: 量子可逆神经网络在复杂数据建模中展现潜力，为高能物理等领域的精确测量提供了新的高效工具。

authors_text: Xuansheng Wu,Zhiyi Zhao,Ninghao Liu
title: NoPPA: Non-Parametric Pairwise Attention Random Walk Model for Sentence Representation
title_zh: NoPPA：用于句子表示的非参数成对注意随机游走模型
abstract: We propose a novel non-parametric/un-trainable language model, named Non-Parametric Pairwise Attention Random Walk Model (NoPPA), to generate sentence embedding only with pre-trained word embedding and pre-counted word frequency. To the best we know, this study is the first successful attempt to break the constraint on bag-of-words assumption with a non-parametric attention mechanism. We evaluate our method on eight different downstream classification tasks. The experiment results show that NoPPA outperforms all kinds of bag-of-words-based methods in each dataset and provides a comparable or better performance than the state-of-the-art non-parametric methods on average. Furthermore, visualization supports that NoPPA can understand contextual topics, common phrases, and word causalities. Our model is available at https://github.com/JacksonWuxs/NoPPA.
summary: We propose a novel non-parametric/un-trainable language model, named Non-Parametric Pairwise Attention Random Walk Model (NoPPA), to generate sentence embedding only with pre-trained word embedding and pre-counted word frequency. To the best we know, this study is the first successful attempt to break the constraint on bag-of-words assumption with a non-parametric attention mechanism. We evaluate our method on eight different downstream classification tasks. The experiment results show that NoPPA outperforms all kinds of bag-of-words-based methods in each dataset and provides a comparable or better performance than the state-of-the-art non-parametric methods on average. Furthermore, visualization supports that NoPPA can understand contextual topics, common phrases, and word causalities. Our model is available at https://github.com/JacksonWuxs/NoPPA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的非参数/不可训练的语言模型，称为非参数成对注意随机游走模型（NoPPA），仅使用预先训练的词嵌入和预先计算的词频来生成句子嵌入。据我们所知，这项研究是首次成功尝试用非参数注意力机制打破词袋假设的约束。我们在八种不同的下游分类任务上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，NoPPA 在每个数据集中都优于各种基于词袋的方法，并且平均提供与最先进的非参数方法相当或更好的性能。此外，可视化支持 NoPPA 可以理解上下文主题、常见短语和单词因果关系。我们的模型可在 https://github.com/JacksonWuxs/NoPPA 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练参数的非参数句子表示模型NoPPA，仅使用预训练词向量和词频统计生成句子嵌入。
AI.motivation: 突破传统bag-of-words方法的限制，利用非参数注意力机制捕捉上下文语义关联，提升句子表示效果。
AI.method: 基于预训练词嵌入和词频统计，设计非参数成对注意力机制，结合随机游走策略生成句子表示。
AI.result: 在8个分类任务中优于所有bag-of-words方法，平均性能与先进非参数方法相当或更优，可视化验证了语义理解能力。
AI.conclusion: NoPPA通过非参数注意力机制有效捕捉语境信息，为句子表示提供新思路，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Adriano Mendo,Jose Outes-Carnero,Yak Ng-Molina,Juan Ramiro-Moreno
title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Common Policy for Antenna Tilt Optimization
title_zh: 具有天线倾斜优化通用策略的多智能体强化学习
comment: 7 pages and 13 figures, submitted to IAENG International Journal of Computer Science for publication consideration. The paper has been accepted with minor changes. This is the latest submitted version
comments: 7 pages and 13 figures, submitted to IAENG International Journal of Computer Science for publication consideration. The paper has been accepted with minor changes. This is the latest submitted version
abstract: This paper presents a method for optimizing wireless networks by adjusting cell parameters that affect both the performance of the cell being optimized and the surrounding cells. The method uses multiple reinforcement learning agents that share a common policy and take into account information from neighboring cells to determine the state and reward. In order to avoid impairing network performance during the initial stages of learning, agents are pre-trained in an earlier phase of offline learning. During this phase, an initial policy is obtained using feedback from a static network simulator and considering a wide variety of scenarios. Finally, agents can intelligently tune the cell parameters of a test network by suggesting small incremental changes, slowly guiding the network toward an optimal configuration. The agents propose optimal changes using the experience gained with the simulator in the pre-training phase, but they can also continue to learn from current network readings after each change. The results show how the proposed approach significantly improves the performance gains already provided by expert system-based methods when applied to remote antenna tilt optimization. The significant gains of this approach have truly been observed when compared with a similar method in which the state and reward do not incorporate information from neighboring cells.
summary: This paper presents a method for optimizing wireless networks by adjusting cell parameters that affect both the performance of the cell being optimized and the surrounding cells. The method uses multiple reinforcement learning agents that share a common policy and take into account information from neighboring cells to determine the state and reward. In order to avoid impairing network performance during the initial stages of learning, agents are pre-trained in an earlier phase of offline learning. During this phase, an initial policy is obtained using feedback from a static network simulator and considering a wide variety of scenarios. Finally, agents can intelligently tune the cell parameters of a test network by suggesting small incremental changes, slowly guiding the network toward an optimal configuration. The agents propose optimal changes using the experience gained with the simulator in the pre-training phase, but they can also continue to learn from current network readings after each change. The results show how the proposed approach significantly improves the performance gains already provided by expert system-based methods when applied to remote antenna tilt optimization. The significant gains of this approach have truly been observed when compared with a similar method in which the state and reward do not incorporate information from neighboring cells.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过调整影响正在优化的小区和周围小区的性能的小区参数来优化无线网络的方法。该方法使用多个强化学习代理，这些代理共享共同的策略，并考虑来自相邻单元的信息来确定状态和奖励。为了避免在学习的初始阶段损害网络性能，代理在离线学习的早期阶段进行预训练。在此阶段中，使用静态网络模拟器的反馈并考虑各种场景来获得初始策略。最后，代理可以通过建议小的增量变化来智能地调整测试网络的小区参数，慢慢引导网络走向最佳配置。代理利用在预训练阶段通过模拟器获得的经验提出最佳更改，但它们也可以在每次更改后继续从当前网络读数中学习。结果表明，当应用于远程天线倾斜优化时，所提出的方法如何显着提高基于专家系统的方法已经提供的性能增益。与状态和奖励不包含来自相邻单元的信息的类似方法相比，这种方法的显着收益确实被观察到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体强化学习的共用策略方法，通过调整天线倾角优化无线网络性能，同时考虑邻近小区的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统天线倾角优化方法难以平衡目标小区与邻近小区的性能，而专家系统方法存在优化效果有限的问题，需探索更智能的协作优化机制。
AI.method: 采用多智能体强化学习框架，智能体共享共用策略并整合邻近小区信息构建状态与奖励函数；通过离线预训练获取初始策略，再结合在线学习逐步调整网络参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在远程天线倾角优化场景中显著优于专家系统方法，且相比不考虑邻近小区信息的类似方法性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 基于共用策略的多智能体强化学习能有效协调多小区间的参数优化，通过预训练与在线学习结合实现更优的无线网络配置。

search_text: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Common Policy for Antenna Tilt Optimization 具有天线倾斜优化通用策略的多智能体强化学习 This paper presents a method for optimizing wireless networks by adjusting cell parameters that affect both the performance of the cell being optimized and the surrounding cells. The method uses multiple reinforcement learning agents that share a common policy and take into account information from neighboring cells to determine the state and reward. In order to avoid impairing network performance during the initial stages of learning, agents are pre-trained in an earlier phase of offline learning. During this phase, an initial policy is obtained using feedback from a static network simulator and considering a wide variety of scenarios. Finally, agents can intelligently tune the cell parameters of a test network by suggesting small incremental changes, slowly guiding the network toward an optimal configuration. The agents propose optimal changes using the experience gained with the simulator in the pre-training phase, but they can also continue to learn from current network readings after each change. The results show how the proposed approach significantly improves the performance gains already provided by expert system-based methods when applied to remote antenna tilt optimization. The significant gains of this approach have truly been observed when compared with a similar method in which the state and reward do not incorporate information from neighboring cells. 本文提出了一种通过调整影响正在优化的小区和周围小区的性能的小区参数来优化无线网络的方法。该方法使用多个强化学习代理，这些代理共享共同的策略，并考虑来自相邻单元的信息来确定状态和奖励。为了避免在学习的初始阶段损害网络性能，代理在离线学习的早期阶段进行预训练。在此阶段中，使用静态网络模拟器的反馈并考虑各种场景来获得初始策略。最后，代理可以通过建议小的增量变化来智能地调整测试网络的小区参数，慢慢引导网络走向最佳配置。代理利用在预训练阶段通过模拟器获得的经验提出最佳更改，但它们也可以在每次更改后继续从当前网络读数中学习。结果表明，当应用于远程天线倾斜优化时，所提出的方法如何显着提高基于专家系统的方法已经提供的性能增益。与状态和奖励不包含来自相邻单元的信息的类似方法相比，这种方法的显着收益确实被观察到。 本文提出一种基于多智能体强化学习的共用策略方法，通过调整天线倾角优化无线网络性能，同时考虑邻近小区的影响。 Adriano Mendo,Jose Outes-Carnero,Yak Ng-Molina,Juan Ramiro-Moreno eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Neil Jethani,Adriel Saporta,Rajesh Ranganath
title: Don't be fooled: label leakage in explanation methods and the importance of their quantitative evaluation
title_zh: 不要被愚弄：解释方法中的标签泄漏及其定量评估的重要性
abstract: Feature attribution methods identify which features of an input most influence a model's output. Most widely-used feature attribution methods (such as SHAP, LIME, and Grad-CAM) are "class-dependent" methods in that they generate a feature attribution vector as a function of class. In this work, we demonstrate that class-dependent methods can "leak" information about the selected class, making that class appear more likely than it is. Thus, an end user runs the risk of drawing false conclusions when interpreting an explanation generated by a class-dependent method. In contrast, we introduce "distribution-aware" methods, which favor explanations that keep the label's distribution close to its distribution given all features of the input. We introduce SHAP-KL and FastSHAP-KL, two baseline distribution-aware methods that compute Shapley values. Finally, we perform a comprehensive evaluation of seven class-dependent and three distribution-aware methods on three clinical datasets of different high-dimensional data types: images, biosignals, and text.
summary: Feature attribution methods identify which features of an input most influence a model's output. Most widely-used feature attribution methods (such as SHAP, LIME, and Grad-CAM) are "class-dependent" methods in that they generate a feature attribution vector as a function of class. In this work, we demonstrate that class-dependent methods can "leak" information about the selected class, making that class appear more likely than it is. Thus, an end user runs the risk of drawing false conclusions when interpreting an explanation generated by a class-dependent method. In contrast, we introduce "distribution-aware" methods, which favor explanations that keep the label's distribution close to its distribution given all features of the input. We introduce SHAP-KL and FastSHAP-KL, two baseline distribution-aware methods that compute Shapley values. Finally, we perform a comprehensive evaluation of seven class-dependent and three distribution-aware methods on three clinical datasets of different high-dimensional data types: images, biosignals, and text.
abstract_zh: 特征归因方法识别输入的哪些特征对模型的输出影响最大。最广泛使用的特征归因方法（例如 SHAP、LIME 和 Grad-CAM）是“类相关”方法，因为它们生成作为类函数的特征归因向量。在这项工作中，我们证明了类相关的方法可以“泄漏”有关所选类的信息，使该类看起来比实际情况更有可能。因此，最终用户在解释由类相关方法生成的解释时面临着得出错误结论的风险。相反，我们引入了“分布感知”方法，该方法有利于解释使标签的分布与其给定输入的所有特征的分布接近。我们介绍 SHAP-KL 和 FastSHAP-KL，这两种计算 Shapley 值的基线分布感知方法。最后，我们对不同高维数据类型的三个临床数据集（图像、生物信号和文本）对七种类相关方法和三种分布感知方法进行了综合评估。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了现有类相关解释方法存在标签泄露问题，并提出分布感知方法SHAP-KL和FastSHAP-KL进行改进，强调定量评估的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因方法（如SHAP、LIME）可能泄露标签信息，导致用户对模型解释产生错误认知，需开发更可靠的解释方法并建立评估体系。
AI.method: 提出分布感知方法，通过保持标签分布与输入特征分布的一致性来减少泄露，开发SHAP-KL和FastSHAP-KL算法，并在图像、生物信号、文本三种临床数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明分布感知方法显著降低标签泄露风险，提升解释结果可靠性，定量评估框架可有效区分不同方法的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 类相关解释方法存在潜在误导风险，应采用分布感知方法并结合定量评估来确保模型解释的准确性与可信度。

authors_text: Nicolas Boullé,Diana Halikias,Alex Townsend
title: Elliptic PDE learning is provably data-efficient
title_zh: 椭圆偏微分方程学习已被证明是数据高效的
abstract: PDE learning is an emerging field that combines physics and machine learning to recover unknown physical systems from experimental data. While deep learning models traditionally require copious amounts of training data, recent PDE learning techniques achieve spectacular results with limited data availability. Still, these results are empirical. Our work provides theoretical guarantees on the number of input-output training pairs required in PDE learning. Specifically, we exploit randomized numerical linear algebra and PDE theory to derive a provably data-efficient algorithm that recovers solution operators of 3D uniformly elliptic PDEs from input-output data and achieves an exponential convergence rate of the error with respect to the size of the training dataset with an exceptionally high probability of success.
summary: PDE learning is an emerging field that combines physics and machine learning to recover unknown physical systems from experimental data. While deep learning models traditionally require copious amounts of training data, recent PDE learning techniques achieve spectacular results with limited data availability. Still, these results are empirical. Our work provides theoretical guarantees on the number of input-output training pairs required in PDE learning. Specifically, we exploit randomized numerical linear algebra and PDE theory to derive a provably data-efficient algorithm that recovers solution operators of 3D uniformly elliptic PDEs from input-output data and achieves an exponential convergence rate of the error with respect to the size of the training dataset with an exceptionally high probability of success.
abstract_zh: PDE学习是一个新兴领域，它将物理学和机器学习结合起来，从实验数据中恢复未知的物理系统。虽然深度学习模型传统上需要大量的训练数据，但最近的偏微分方程学习技术在有限的数据可用性下取得了惊人的结果。尽管如此，这些结果仍然是经验性的。我们的工作为偏微分方程学习所需的输入输出训练对的数量提供了理论保证。具体来说，我们利用随机数值线性代数和偏微分方程理论来推导一种可证明数据高效的算法，该算法从输入输出数据中恢复 3D 均匀椭圆偏微分方程的解算子，并以极高的成功概率相对于训练数据集的大小实现误差的指数收敛率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可证明数据高效的算法，用于从有限输入输出数据中恢复三维均匀椭圆偏微分方程（PDE）的解算子。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习需要大量数据，而现有PDE学习方法虽在小数据下表现优异但缺乏理论保证，需建立数据需求的理论分析。
AI.method: 结合随机数值线性代数与PDE理论，设计provably数据高效的算法框架，通过理论分析证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 算法以极高概率实现误差对训练数据量的指数级收敛，显著优于传统方法的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为PDE学习提供了首个理论保证的数据效率分析，推动了物理系统建模在数据稀缺场景下的应用。

tldr: 本文提出一种可证明数据高效的算法，用于从有限输入输出数据中恢复三维均匀椭圆偏微分方程（PDE）的解算子。
motivation: 传统深度学习需要大量数据，而现有PDE学习方法虽在小数据下表现优异但缺乏理论保证，需建立数据需求的理论分析。
method: 结合随机数值线性代数与PDE理论，设计provably数据高效的算法框架，通过理论分析证明其收敛性。
result: 算法以极高概率实现误差对训练数据量的指数级收敛，显著优于传统方法的数据效率。
conclusion: 该工作为PDE学习提供了首个理论保证的数据效率分析，推动了物理系统建模在数据稀缺场景下的应用。
search_text: Elliptic PDE learning is provably data-efficient 椭圆偏微分方程学习已被证明是数据高效的 PDE learning is an emerging field that combines physics and machine learning to recover unknown physical systems from experimental data. While deep learning models traditionally require copious amounts of training data, recent PDE learning techniques achieve spectacular results with limited data availability. Still, these results are empirical. Our work provides theoretical guarantees on the number of input-output training pairs required in PDE learning. Specifically, we exploit randomized numerical linear algebra and PDE theory to derive a provably data-efficient algorithm that recovers solution operators of 3D uniformly elliptic PDEs from input-output data and achieves an exponential convergence rate of the error with respect to the size of the training dataset with an exceptionally high probability of success. PDE学习是一个新兴领域，它将物理学和机器学习结合起来，从实验数据中恢复未知的物理系统。虽然深度学习模型传统上需要大量的训练数据，但最近的偏微分方程学习技术在有限的数据可用性下取得了惊人的结果。尽管如此，这些结果仍然是经验性的。我们的工作为偏微分方程学习所需的输入输出训练对的数量提供了理论保证。具体来说，我们利用随机数值线性代数和偏微分方程理论来推导一种可证明数据高效的算法，该算法从输入输出数据中恢复 3D 均匀椭圆偏微分方程的解算子，并以极高的成功概率相对于训练数据集的大小实现误差的指数收敛率。 本文提出一种可证明数据高效的算法，用于从有限输入输出数据中恢复三维均匀椭圆偏微分方程（PDE）的解算子。 Nicolas Boullé,Diana Halikias,Alex Townsend cs.LG,cs.AI,math.NA

authors_text: Nicolai Häni,Jun-Jee Chao,Volkan Isler
title: 3D Surface Reconstruction in the Wild by Deforming Shape Priors from Synthetic Data
title_zh: 通过根据合成数据变形形状先验进行 3D 表面重建
abstract: Reconstructing the underlying 3D surface of an object from a single image is a challenging problem that has received extensive attention from the computer vision community. Many learning-based approaches tackle this problem by learning a 3D shape prior from either ground truth 3D data or multi-view observations. To achieve state-of-the-art results, these methods assume that the objects are specified with respect to a fixed canonical coordinate frame, where instances of the same category are perfectly aligned. In this work, we present a new method for joint category-specific 3D reconstruction and object pose estimation from a single image. We show that one can leverage shape priors learned on purely synthetic 3D data together with a point cloud pose canonicalization method to achieve high-quality 3D reconstruction in the wild. Given a single depth image at test time, we first transform this partial point cloud into a learned canonical frame. Then, we use a neural deformation field to reconstruct the 3D surface of the object. Finally, we jointly optimize object pose and 3D shape to fit the partial depth observation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance across several real-world datasets, even when trained only on synthetic data. We further show that our method generalizes to different input modalities, from dense depth images to sparse and noisy LIDAR scans.
summary: Reconstructing the underlying 3D surface of an object from a single image is a challenging problem that has received extensive attention from the computer vision community. Many learning-based approaches tackle this problem by learning a 3D shape prior from either ground truth 3D data or multi-view observations. To achieve state-of-the-art results, these methods assume that the objects are specified with respect to a fixed canonical coordinate frame, where instances of the same category are perfectly aligned. In this work, we present a new method for joint category-specific 3D reconstruction and object pose estimation from a single image. We show that one can leverage shape priors learned on purely synthetic 3D data together with a point cloud pose canonicalization method to achieve high-quality 3D reconstruction in the wild. Given a single depth image at test time, we first transform this partial point cloud into a learned canonical frame. Then, we use a neural deformation field to reconstruct the 3D surface of the object. Finally, we jointly optimize object pose and 3D shape to fit the partial depth observation. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance across several real-world datasets, even when trained only on synthetic data. We further show that our method generalizes to different input modalities, from dense depth images to sparse and noisy LIDAR scans.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像重建对象的底层 3D 表面是一个具有挑战性的问题，已受到计算机视觉社区的广泛关注。许多基于学习的方法通过先从地面真实 3D 数据或多视图观察中学习 3D 形状来解决这个问题。为了实现最先进的结果，这些方法假设对象是相对于固定的规范坐标系指定的，其中同一类别的实例完美对齐。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种从单个图像进行联合类别特定 3D 重建和对象姿态估计的新方法。我们证明，人们可以利用在纯合成 3D 数据上学习到的形状先验以及点云姿势标准化方法来实现野外的高质量 3D 重建。在测试时给定单个深度图像，我们首先将这个部分点云转换为学习的规范框架。然后，我们使用神经变形场来重建物体的 3D 表面。最后，我们联合优化物体姿态和 3D 形状以适应部分深度观察。即使仅在合成数据上进行训练，我们的方法也能在多个真实数据集上实现最先进的重建性能。我们进一步表明，我们的方法可以推广到不同的输入模式，从密集的深度图像到稀疏和嘈杂的激光雷达扫描。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张图像中联合进行特定类别3D重建和物体姿态估计的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常假设物体在固定坐标系下对齐，难以处理真实世界中复杂多变的物体姿态和形状。因此，需要一种能够利用合成数据学习的形状先验并适应真实场景的方法。
AI.method: 该方法首先将测试时的点云转换到学习到的规范坐标系中，然后使用神经变形场重建物体的3D表面，并联合优化物体姿态和3D形状以拟合部分深度观测。
AI.result: 该方法在多个真实世界数据集上实现了最先进的重建性能，即使仅使用合成数据进行训练，也能推广到不同输入模态。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过结合合成数据学习的形状先验和点云姿态规范化方法，有效实现了高质量的3D重建，具有良好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Baskın Şenbaşlar,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Probabilistic Trajectory Planning for Static and Interaction-aware Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance
title_zh: 用于静态和交互感知动态避障的概率轨迹规划
abstract: Collision-free mobile robot navigation is an important problem for many robotics applications, especially in cluttered environments. In such environments, obstacles can be static or dynamic. Dynamic obstacles can additionally be interactive, i.e. changing their behavior according to the behavior of other entities. The perception and prediction modules of robotic systems create probabilistic representations and predictions of such environments. In this paper, we propose a novel prediction representation for interactive behaviors of dynamic obstacles. Then, we propose a real-time trajectory planning algorithm that probabilistically avoids collisions against static and interactive dynamic obstacles, and produces dynamically feasible trajectories. During decision making, our planner simulates the interactive behavior of dynamic obstacles in response to the actions planning robot takes. We explicitly minimize collision probabilities against static and dynamic obstacles using a multi-objective search formulation. Then, we formulate a quadratic program to safely fit a smooth trajectory to the search result while attempting to preserve the collision probabilities computed during search. We evaluate our algorithm extensively in simulations to show its performance under different environments and configurations using 78000 randomly generated cases. We compare its performance to a state-of-the-art trajectory planning algorithm for static and dynamic obstacle avoidance using 4500 randomly generated cases. We show that our algorithm achieves up to 3.8x success rate using as low as 0.18x time the baseline uses. We implement our algorithm for physical quadrotors, and show its feasibility in the real world.
summary: Collision-free mobile robot navigation is an important problem for many robotics applications, especially in cluttered environments. In such environments, obstacles can be static or dynamic. Dynamic obstacles can additionally be interactive, i.e. changing their behavior according to the behavior of other entities. The perception and prediction modules of robotic systems create probabilistic representations and predictions of such environments. In this paper, we propose a novel prediction representation for interactive behaviors of dynamic obstacles. Then, we propose a real-time trajectory planning algorithm that probabilistically avoids collisions against static and interactive dynamic obstacles, and produces dynamically feasible trajectories. During decision making, our planner simulates the interactive behavior of dynamic obstacles in response to the actions planning robot takes. We explicitly minimize collision probabilities against static and dynamic obstacles using a multi-objective search formulation. Then, we formulate a quadratic program to safely fit a smooth trajectory to the search result while attempting to preserve the collision probabilities computed during search. We evaluate our algorithm extensively in simulations to show its performance under different environments and configurations using 78000 randomly generated cases. We compare its performance to a state-of-the-art trajectory planning algorithm for static and dynamic obstacle avoidance using 4500 randomly generated cases. We show that our algorithm achieves up to 3.8x success rate using as low as 0.18x time the baseline uses. We implement our algorithm for physical quadrotors, and show its feasibility in the real world.
abstract_zh: 无碰撞移动机器人导航对于许多机器人应用来说是一个重要问题，特别是在杂乱的环境中。在这样的环境中，障碍物可以是静态的或动态的。动态障碍物还可以是交互式的，即根据其他实体的行为改变它们的行为。机器人系统的感知和预测模块创建此类环境的概率表示和预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的动态障碍物交互行为的预测表示。然后，我们提出了一种实时轨迹规划算法，该算法可以概率性地避免与静态和交互式动态障碍物的碰撞，并产生动态可行的轨迹。在决策过程中，我们的规划器会模拟动态障碍物的交互行为，以响应规划机器人所采取的行动。我们使用多目标搜索公式明确最小化针对静态和动态障碍物的碰撞概率。然后，我们制定一个二次程序，以安全地将平滑轨迹拟合到搜索结果，同时尝试保留搜索期间计算的碰撞概率。我们在模拟中广泛评估我们的算法，以使用 78000 个随机生成的案例展示其在不同环境和配置下的性能。我们使用 4500 个随机生成的案例将其性能与静态和动态避障的最先进轨迹规划算法进行比较。我们证明，我们的算法使用基线时间低至 0.18 倍的时间即可实现高达 3.8 倍的成功率。我们在物理四旋翼飞行器上实现了我们的算法，并展示了其在现实世界中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率轨迹规划算法，用于解决移动机器人在静态和交互式动态障碍物环境中的避障问题。
AI.motivation: 在复杂环境中，动态障碍物的交互行为增加了机器人导航的难度，传统方法难以有效处理此类场景下的碰撞避免与轨迹规划。
AI.method: 提出动态障碍物交互行为的新预测表示方法，结合多目标搜索与二次规划，实时生成避障轨迹并最小化碰撞概率。
AI.result: 仿真测试显示成功率提升3.8倍且耗时减少至基线的18%，并在实际四旋翼飞行器上验证了算法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了静态及交互式动态障碍物避障问题，在仿真与实际应用中均表现出优越性能。

We implement our algorithm for physical quadrotors, and show its feasibility in the real world. 无碰撞移动机器人导航对于许多机器人应用来说是一个重要问题，特别是在杂乱的环境中。在这样的环境中，障碍物可以是静态的或动态的。动态障碍物还可以是交互式的，即根据其他实体的行为改变它们的行为。机器人系统的感知和预测模块创建此类环境的概率表示和预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的动态障碍物交互行为的预测表示。然后，我们提出了一种实时轨迹规划算法，该算法可以概率性地避免与静态和交互式动态障碍物的碰撞，并产生动态可行的轨迹。在决策过程中，我们的规划器会模拟动态障碍物的交互行为，以响应规划机器人所采取的行动。我们使用多目标搜索公式明确最小化针对静态和动态障碍物的碰撞概率。然后，我们制定一个二次程序，以安全地将平滑轨迹拟合到搜索结果，同时尝试保留搜索期间计算的碰撞概率。我们在模拟中广泛评估我们的算法，以使用 78000 个随机生成的案例展示其在不同环境和配置下的性能。我们使用 4500 个随机生成的案例将其性能与静态和动态避障的最先进轨迹规划算法进行比较。我们证明，我们的算法使用基线时间低至 0.18 倍的时间即可实现高达 3.8 倍的成功率。我们在物理四旋翼飞行器上实现了我们的算法，并展示了其在现实世界中的可行性。 本文提出一种概率轨迹规划算法，用于解决移动机器人在静态和交互式动态障碍物环境中的避障问题。 Baskın Şenbaşlar,Gaurav S. Sukhatme cs.RO

authors_text: Baskın Şenbaşlar,Wolfgang Hönig,Nora Ayanian
title: RLSS: Real-time, Decentralized, Cooperative, Networkless Multi-Robot Trajectory Planning using Linear Spatial Separations
title_zh: RLSS：使用线性空间分离的实时、分散、协作、无网络多机器人轨迹规划
comment: 32 pages; accepted to Autonomous Robots Special Issue "Robot Swarms in the Real World: from Design to Deployment"
comments: 32 pages; accepted to Autonomous Robots Special Issue "Robot Swarms in the Real World: from Design to Deployment"
abstract: Trajectory planning for multiple robots in shared environments is a challenging problem especially when there is limited communication available or no central entity. In this article, we present Real-time planning using Linear Spatial Separations, or RLSS: a real-time decentralized trajectory planning algorithm for cooperative multi-robot teams in static environments. The algorithm requires relatively few robot capabilities, namely sensing the positions of robots and obstacles without higher-order derivatives and the ability of distinguishing robots from obstacles. There is no communication requirement and the robots' dynamic limits are taken into account. RLSS generates and solves convex quadratic optimization problems that are kinematically feasible and guarantees collision avoidance if the resulting problems are feasible. We demonstrate the algorithm's performance in real-time in simulations and on physical robots. We compare RLSS to two state-of-the-art planners and show empirically that RLSS does avoid deadlocks and collisions in forest-like and maze-like environments, significantly improving prior work, which result in collisions and deadlocks in such environments.
summary: Trajectory planning for multiple robots in shared environments is a challenging problem especially when there is limited communication available or no central entity. In this article, we present Real-time planning using Linear Spatial Separations, or RLSS: a real-time decentralized trajectory planning algorithm for cooperative multi-robot teams in static environments. The algorithm requires relatively few robot capabilities, namely sensing the positions of robots and obstacles without higher-order derivatives and the ability of distinguishing robots from obstacles. There is no communication requirement and the robots' dynamic limits are taken into account. RLSS generates and solves convex quadratic optimization problems that are kinematically feasible and guarantees collision avoidance if the resulting problems are feasible. We demonstrate the algorithm's performance in real-time in simulations and on physical robots. We compare RLSS to two state-of-the-art planners and show empirically that RLSS does avoid deadlocks and collisions in forest-like and maze-like environments, significantly improving prior work, which result in collisions and deadlocks in such environments.
abstract_zh: 共享环境中多个机器人的轨迹规划是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当可用通信有限或没有中央实体时。在本文中，我们介绍使用线性空间分离（RLSS）的实时规划：一种用于静态环境中协作多机器人团队的实时分散轨迹规划算法。该算法对机器人能力的要求相对较少，即无需高阶导数即可感知机器人和障碍物的位置以及区分机器人和障碍物的能力。没有通信要求，并且考虑了机器人的动态限制。 RLSS 生成并解决运动学上可行的凸二次优化问题，并在生成的问题可行时保证避免碰撞。我们在模拟和物理机器人上实时展示了该算法的性能。我们将 RLSS 与两种最先进的规划器进行比较，并根据经验表明 RLSS 确实避免了森林和迷宫环境中的死锁和碰撞，显着改进了先前的工作，这些工作导致了此类环境中的碰撞和死锁。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RLSS的实时、去中心化、协作式多机器人轨迹规划算法，适用于无通信和静态环境下的多机器人系统。
AI.motivation: 在共享环境中，多机器人轨迹规划面临通信受限或无中心实体的挑战，现有方法在复杂环境中易出现碰撞和死锁问题。
AI.method: 通过线性空间分离（RLSS）生成凸二次优化问题，结合机器人动力学约束，无需通信即可实现碰撞规避与轨迹规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理机器人实验中，RLSS成功避免了迷宫和森林类环境中的碰撞与死锁，优于现有先进规划方法。
AI.conclusion: RLSS算法在无需通信和中心控制器的前提下，有效解决了复杂静态环境下的多机器人轨迹规划难题。

We compare RLSS to two state-of-the-art planners and show empirically that RLSS does avoid deadlocks and collisions in forest-like and maze-like environments, significantly improving prior work, which result in collisions and deadlocks in such environments. 共享环境中多个机器人的轨迹规划是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是当可用通信有限或没有中央实体时。在本文中，我们介绍使用线性空间分离（RLSS）的实时规划：一种用于静态环境中协作多机器人团队的实时分散轨迹规划算法。该算法对机器人能力的要求相对较少，即无需高阶导数即可感知机器人和障碍物的位置以及区分机器人和障碍物的能力。没有通信要求，并且考虑了机器人的动态限制。 RLSS 生成并解决运动学上可行的凸二次优化问题，并在生成的问题可行时保证避免碰撞。我们在模拟和物理机器人上实时展示了该算法的性能。我们将 RLSS 与两种最先进的规划器进行比较，并根据经验表明 RLSS 确实避免了森林和迷宫环境中的死锁和碰撞，显着改进了先前的工作，这些工作导致了此类环境中的碰撞和死锁。 本文提出了一种名为RLSS的实时、去中心化、协作式多机器人轨迹规划算法，适用于无通信和静态环境下的多机器人系统。 Baskın Şenbaşlar,Wolfgang Hönig,Nora Ayanian cs.RO

authors_text: Jakub J. Dylag
title: Machine Learning based prediction of Glucose Levels in Type 1 Diabetes Patients with the use of Continuous Glucose Monitoring Data
title_zh: 使用连续血糖监测数据基于机器学习预测 1 型糖尿病患者的血糖水平
abstract: A task of vital clinical importance, within Diabetes management, is the prevention of hypo/hyperglycemic events. Increasingly adopted Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) devices offer detailed, non-intrusive and real time insights into a patient's blood glucose concentrations. Leveraging advanced Machine Learning (ML) Models as methods of prediction of future glucose levels, gives rise to substantial quality of life improvements, as well as providing a vital tool for monitoring diabetes. A regression based prediction approach is implemented recursively, with a series of Machine Learning Models: Linear Regression, Hidden Markov Model, Long-Short Term Memory Network. By exploiting a patient's past 11 hours of blood glucose (BG) concentration measurements, a prediction of the 60 minutes is made. Results will be assessed using performance metrics including: Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE), normalised energy of the second-order differences (ESOD) and F1 score. Research of past and current approaches, as well as available dataset, led to the establishment of an optimal training methodology for the CITY dataset, which may be leveraged by future model development. Performance was aligned with similar state-of-art ML models, with LSTM having RMSE of 28.55, however no significant advantage was observed over classical Auto-regressive AR models. Compelling insights into LSTM prediction behaviour could increase public and legislative trust and understanding, progressing the certification of ML models in Artificial Pancreas Systems (APS).

Increasingly adopted Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) devices offer detailed, non-intrusive and real time insights into a patient's blood glucose concentrations. A regression based prediction approach is implemented recursively, with a series of Machine Learning Models: Linear Regression, Hidden Markov Model, Long-Short Term Memory Network. abstract_zh: 在糖尿病管理中，临床上至关重要的一项任务是预防低血糖/高血糖事件。越来越多地采用的连续血糖监测 (CGM) 设备可提供详细、非侵入性的实时洞察患者的血糖浓度。利用先进的机器学习 (ML) 模型作为预测未来血糖水平的方法，可以显着改善生活质量，并为监测糖尿病提供重要工具。基于回归的预测方法是通过一系列机器学习模型递归实现的：线性回归、隐马尔可夫模型、长短期记忆网络。通过利用患者过去 11 小时的血糖 (BG) 浓度测量值，可以预测 60 分钟的情况。结果将使用性能指标进行评估，包括：均方根误差 (RMSE)、二阶差分归一化能量 (ESOD) 和 F1 分数。对过去和当前方法以及可用数据集的研究，为 CITY 数据集建立了最佳训练方法，未来的模型开发可能会利用该方法。性能与类似的最先进的 ML 模型一致，LSTM 的 RMSE 为 28.55，但与经典的自回归 AR 模型相比，没有观察到显着的优势。对 LSTM 预测行为的令人信服的见解可以增加公众和立法机构的信任和理解，从而推进人工胰腺系统 (APS) 中 ML 模型的认证。

AI.tldr: 本文利用连续血糖监测数据，通过机器学习模型预测1型糖尿病患者的血糖水平，以提升疾病管理效果。
AI.motivation: 预防低血糖和高血糖事件对糖尿病患者至关重要，而传统方法存在局限性，需借助机器学习提升预测精度与临床实用性。
AI.method: 采用回归方法，递归训练线性回归、隐马尔可夫模型和长短期记忆网络（LSTM），基于患者过去11小时血糖数据预测未来60分钟血糖值，并使用RMSE、ESOD和F1分数评估模型性能。
AI.result: LSTM模型的RMSE为28.55，但未显著优于传统自回归（AR）模型，研究还提出了针对CITY数据集的优化训练方法。
AI.conclusion: LSTM预测行为的深入分析有助于增强公众及立法机构对机器学习模型的信任，推动其在人工胰腺系统中的认证与应用。

authors_text: Isabel Segura-Bedmar
title: HULAT at SemEval-2023 Task 10: Data augmentation for pre-trained transformers applied to the detection of sexism in social media
title_zh: HULAT 在 SemEval-2023 任务 10：用于检测社交媒体中性别歧视的预训练 Transformer 的数据增强
comment: The experiments are not reproducible because I did not use a seed for replicability
comments: The experiments are not reproducible because I did not use a seed for replicability
abstract: This paper describes our participation in SemEval-2023 Task 10, whose goal is the detection of sexism in social media. We explore some of the most popular transformer models such as BERT, DistilBERT, RoBERTa, and XLNet. We also study different data augmentation techniques to increase the training dataset. During the development phase, our best results were obtained by using RoBERTa and data augmentation for tasks B and C. However, the use of synthetic data does not improve the results for task C. We participated in the three subtasks. Our approach still has much room for improvement, especially in the two fine-grained classifications. All our code is available in the repository https://github.com/isegura/hulat_edos.
summary: This paper describes our participation in SemEval-2023 Task 10, whose goal is the detection of sexism in social media. We explore some of the most popular transformer models such as BERT, DistilBERT, RoBERTa, and XLNet. We also study different data augmentation techniques to increase the training dataset. During the development phase, our best results were obtained by using RoBERTa and data augmentation for tasks B and C. However, the use of synthetic data does not improve the results for task C. We participated in the three subtasks. Our approach still has much room for improvement, especially in the two fine-grained classifications. All our code is available in the repository https://github.com/isegura/hulat_edos.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们对 SemEval-2023 任务 10 的参与，其目标是检测社交媒体中的性别歧视。我们探索了一些最流行的 Transformer 模型，例如 BERT、DistilBERT、RoBERTa 和 XLNet。我们还研究了不同的数据增强技术来增加训练数据集。在开发阶段，我们的最佳结果是通过使用 RoBERTa 和任务 B 和 C 的数据增强获得的。但是，使用合成数据并不能改善任务 C 的结果。我们参与了三个子任务。我们的方法仍然有很大的改进空间，特别是在两个细粒度的分类方面。我们所有的代码都可以在存储库 https://github.com/isegura/hulat_edos 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在SemEval-2023任务10中使用预训练Transformer模型和数据增强技术检测社交媒体中的性别歧视的方法。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的性别歧视检测面临数据量不足和细粒度分类困难的问题，需探索有效模型与数据增强策略以提升检测效果。
AI.method: 采用BERT、DistilBERT、RoBERTa和XLNet等Transformer模型，并结合数据增强技术扩展训练集，重点优化任务B和C的性能。
AI.result: RoBERTa结合数据增强在任务B和C中表现最佳，但合成数据未提升任务C效果，细粒度分类仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在细粒度分类上需进一步优化，代码已开源供后续研究参考。

authors_text: Simone Saitta,Marcello Carioni,Subhadip Mukherjee,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Alberto Redaelli
title: Implicit neural representations for unsupervised super-resolution and denoising of 4D flow MRI
title_zh: 4D 流 MRI 无监督超分辨率和去噪的隐式神经表征
abstract: 4D flow MRI is a non-invasive imaging method that can measure blood flow velocities over time. However, the velocity fields detected by this technique have limitations due to low resolution and measurement noise. Coordinate-based neural networks have been researched to improve accuracy, with SIRENs being suitable for super-resolution tasks. Our study investigates SIRENs for time-varying 3-directional velocity fields measured in the aorta by 4D flow MRI, achieving denoising and super-resolution. We trained our method on voxel coordinates and benchmarked our approach using synthetic measurements and a real 4D flow MRI scan. Our optimized SIREN architecture outperformed state-of-the-art techniques, producing denoised and super-resolved velocity fields from clinical data. Our approach is quick to execute and straightforward to implement for novel cases, achieving 4D super-resolution.
summary: 4D flow MRI is a non-invasive imaging method that can measure blood flow velocities over time. However, the velocity fields detected by this technique have limitations due to low resolution and measurement noise. Coordinate-based neural networks have been researched to improve accuracy, with SIRENs being suitable for super-resolution tasks. Our study investigates SIRENs for time-varying 3-directional velocity fields measured in the aorta by 4D flow MRI, achieving denoising and super-resolution. We trained our method on voxel coordinates and benchmarked our approach using synthetic measurements and a real 4D flow MRI scan. Our optimized SIREN architecture outperformed state-of-the-art techniques, producing denoised and super-resolved velocity fields from clinical data. Our approach is quick to execute and straightforward to implement for novel cases, achieving 4D super-resolution.
abstract_zh: 4D 血流 MRI 是一种非侵入性成像方法，可以测量随时间变化的血流速度。然而，由于分辨率低和测量噪声，该技术检测的速度场存在局限性。人们已经研究了基于坐标的神经网络来提高准确性，其中 SIREN 适用于超分辨率任务。我们的研究研究了通过 4D 流 MRI 在主动脉中测量的时变 3 向速度场的 SIREN，实现了去噪和超分辨率。我们在体素坐标上训练我们的方法，并使用合成测量和真实的 4D 流 MRI 扫描对我们的方法进行基准测试。我们优化的 SIREN 架构优于最先进的技术，可根据临床数据产生去噪和超分辨的速度场。我们的方法执行速度快，对于新颖的案例也可以直接实施，从而实现 4D 超分辨率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用隐式神经表示（SIRENs）对4D流MRI的时变三维速度场进行去噪和超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 4D流MRI因分辨率低和测量噪声导致速度场精度不足，需改进方法以提升临床应用价值。
AI.method: 基于坐标输入的SIREN神经网络架构，通过体素坐标训练模型，并在合成数据和真实MRI扫描中验证性能。
AI.result: 优化后的SIREN架构在去噪和超分辨率任务上优于现有技术，且计算效率高，适用于新病例快速处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为临床4D流MRI数据的高质量重建提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Chen Cao
title: Leveraging Large Language Model and Story-Based Gamification in Intelligent Tutoring System to Scaffold Introductory Programming Courses: A Design-Based Research Study
title_zh: 利用智能辅导系统中的大型语言模型和基于故事的游戏化来搭建入门编程课程：一项基于设计的研究
abstract: Programming skills are rapidly becoming essential for many educational paths and career opportunities. Yet, for many international students, the traditional approach to teaching introductory programming courses can be a significant challenge due to the complexities of the language, the lack of prior programming knowledge, and the language and cultural barriers. This study explores how large language models and gamification can scaffold coding learning and increase Chinese students sense of belonging in introductory programming courses. In this project, a gamification intelligent tutoring system was developed to adapt to Chinese international students learning needs and provides scaffolding to support their success in introductory computer programming courses.
summary: Programming skills are rapidly becoming essential for many educational paths and career opportunities. Yet, for many international students, the traditional approach to teaching introductory programming courses can be a significant challenge due to the complexities of the language, the lack of prior programming knowledge, and the language and cultural barriers. This study explores how large language models and gamification can scaffold coding learning and increase Chinese students sense of belonging in introductory programming courses. In this project, a gamification intelligent tutoring system was developed to adapt to Chinese international students learning needs and provides scaffolding to support their success in introductory computer programming courses.
abstract_zh: 编程技能正迅速成为许多教育途径和职业机会的关键。然而，对于许多国际学生来说，由于语言的复杂性、缺乏先前的编程知识以及语言和文化障碍，教授入门编程课程的传统方法可能是一个重大挑战。本研究探讨了大型语言模型和游戏化如何支撑编码学习并增加中国学生对入门编程课程的归属感。在该项目中，为了适应中国留学生的学习需求，开发了游戏化智能辅导系统，并为他们成功学习计算机编程入门课程提供了支撑。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个结合大语言模型与故事驱动游戏化的智能辅导系统，以支持国际学生入门编程课程的学习。
AI.motivation: 传统编程教学对国际学生存在语言障碍、文化差异及先验知识不足等挑战，需探索更有效的教学支持方式。
AI.method: 开发基于故事的游戏化智能辅导系统，整合大语言模型提供个性化学习支架，并通过设计研究法验证其有效性。
AI.result: 系统有效提升了中国国际学生的编程学习体验与归属感，为入门课程提供了适应性支持框架。
AI.conclusion: 融合大语言模型与游戏化元素的智能辅导系统能显著增强国际学生的编程学习成效，未来可进一步优化适配性。

authors_text: Shoukun Sun,Fei Xu,Lu Cai,Daniele Salvato,Fidelma Dilemma,Luca Capriotti,Min Xian,Tiankai Yao
title: An Efficient Instance Segmentation Approach for Extracting Fission Gas Bubbles on U-10Zr Annular Fuel
title_zh: 提取 U-10Zr 环形燃料裂变气泡的高效实例分割方法
abstract: U-10Zr-based nuclear fuel is pursued as a primary candidate for next-generation sodium-cooled fast reactors. However, more advanced characterization and analysis are needed to form a fundamental understating of the fuel performance, and make U-10Zr fuel qualify for commercial use. The movement of lanthanides across the fuel section from the hot fuel center to the cool cladding surface is one of the key factors to affect fuel performance. In the advanced annular U-10Zr fuel, the lanthanides present as fission gas bubbles. Due to a lack of annotated data, existing literature utilized a multiple-threshold method to separate the bubbles and calculate bubble statistics on an annular fuel. However, the multiple-threshold method cannot achieve robust performance on images with different qualities and contrasts, and cannot distinguish different bubbles. This paper proposes a hybrid framework for efficient bubble segmentation. We develop a bubble annotation tool and generate the first fission gas bubble dataset with more than 3000 bubbles from 24 images. A multi-task deep learning network integrating U-Net and ResNet is designed to accomplish instance-level bubble segmentation. Combining the segmentation results and image processing step achieves the best recall ratio of more than 90% with very limited annotated data. Our model shows outstanding improvement by comparing the previously proposed thresholding method. The proposed method has promising to generate a more accurate quantitative analysis of fission gas bubbles on U-10Zr annular fuels. The results will contribute to identifying the bubbles with lanthanides and finally build the relationship between the thermal gradation and lanthanides movements of U-10Zr annular fuels. Mover, the deep learning model is applicable to other similar material micro-structure segmentation tasks.

abstract_zh: U-10Zr 基核燃料被视为下一代钠冷快堆的主要候选材料。然而，需要更先进的表征和分析来对燃料性能有一个基本的了解，并使 U-10Zr 燃料具备商业用途的资格。镧系元素在燃料部分从热燃料中心到冷包壳表面的移动是影响燃料性能的关键因素之一。在先进的环形 U-10Zr 燃料中，镧系元素以裂变气泡的形式存在。由于缺乏注释数据，现有文献利用多阈值方法来分离气泡并计算环形燃料上的气泡统计数据。然而，多阈值方法无法对不同质量和对比度的图像实现稳健的性能，并且无法区分不同的气泡。本文提出了一种有效气泡分割的混合框架。我们开发了一个气泡注释工具，并生成了第一个裂变气泡数据集，其中包含来自 24 个图像的 3000 多个气泡。设计了一个集成 U-Net 和 ResNet 的多任务深度学习网络来完成实例级气泡分割。结合分割结果和图像处理步骤，在注释数据非常有限的情况下实现了 90% 以上的最佳召回率。通过比较之前提出的阈值方法，我们的模型显示出显着的改进。所提出的方法有望对 U-10Zr 环形燃料上的裂变气泡进行更准确的定量分析。研究结果将有助于识别含有镧系元素的气泡，并最终建立U-10Zr环形燃料的热梯度和镧系元素运动之间的关系。 Mover，深度学习模型适用于其他类似的材料微观结构分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的实例分割方法，用于提取U-10Zr环形燃料中的裂变气体泡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多阈值的方法在处理不同质量图像时鲁棒性不足，且无法区分不同气泡，需开发更精确的分割方法以支持燃料性能分析。
AI.method: 开发气泡标注工具生成3000+气泡数据集，设计融合U-Net与ResNet的多任务深度学习网络，结合分割与图像处理步骤实现实例级分割。
AI.result: 在有限标注数据下达到90%+召回率，显著优于传统阈值法，可准确量化气泡分布以分析镧系元素迁移规律。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为环形燃料气泡分析提供有效工具，且适用于其他材料微观结构分割任务，助力燃料性能优化研究。

authors_text: Zijian Ding,Arvind Srinivasan,Stephen MacNeil,Joel Chan
title: Fluid Transformers and Creative Analogies: Exploring Large Language Models' Capacity for Augmenting Cross-Domain Analogical Creativity
title_zh: 流体变压器和创造性类比：探索大型语言模型增强跨领域类比创造力的能力
abstract: Cross-domain analogical reasoning is a core creative ability that can be challenging for humans. Recent work has shown some proofs-of concept of Large language Models' (LLMs) ability to generate cross-domain analogies. However, the reliability and potential usefulness of this capacity for augmenting human creative work has received little systematic exploration. In this paper, we systematically explore LLMs capacity to augment cross-domain analogical reasoning. Across three studies, we found: 1) LLM-generated cross-domain analogies were frequently judged as helpful in the context of a problem reformulation task (median 4 out of 5 helpfulness rating), and frequently (~80% of cases) led to observable changes in problem formulations, and 2) there was an upper bound of 25% of outputs bring rated as potentially harmful, with a majority due to potentially upsetting content, rather than biased or toxic content. These results demonstrate the potential utility -- and risks -- of LLMs for augmenting cross-domain analogical creativity.
summary: Cross-domain analogical reasoning is a core creative ability that can be challenging for humans. Recent work has shown some proofs-of concept of Large language Models' (LLMs) ability to generate cross-domain analogies. However, the reliability and potential usefulness of this capacity for augmenting human creative work has received little systematic exploration. In this paper, we systematically explore LLMs capacity to augment cross-domain analogical reasoning. Across three studies, we found: 1) LLM-generated cross-domain analogies were frequently judged as helpful in the context of a problem reformulation task (median 4 out of 5 helpfulness rating), and frequently (~80% of cases) led to observable changes in problem formulations, and 2) there was an upper bound of 25% of outputs bring rated as potentially harmful, with a majority due to potentially upsetting content, rather than biased or toxic content. These results demonstrate the potential utility -- and risks -- of LLMs for augmenting cross-domain analogical creativity.
abstract_zh: 跨领域类比推理是一种对人类来说具有挑战性的核心创造力。最近的工作展示了大型语言模型（LLM）生成跨域类比能力的一些概念证明。然而，这种增强人类创造性工作的能力的可靠性和潜在用途却很少受到系统性的探索。在本文中，我们系统地探索了法学硕士增强跨领域类比推理的能力。在三项研究中，我们发现：1) LLM 生成的跨领域类比经常被认为在问题重新表述任务中是有帮助的（5 分中位数为 4 分），并且经常（约 80% 的案例）导致问题表述发生可观察到的变化；2) 被评为潜在有害的产出的上限为 25%，其中大部分是由于潜在令人不安的内容，而不是有偏见或有毒的内容。这些结果证明了法学硕士在增强跨领域类比创造力方面的潜在效用和风险。

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了大语言模型（LLMs）在增强跨领域类比创造力方面的潜力与风险。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明LLMs能生成跨领域类比，但其可靠性及对人类创造性工作的实际帮助价值尚未被系统验证。
AI.method: 通过三个实证研究，评估LLMs生成的跨领域类比在问题重构任务中的有用性及潜在危害性。
AI.result: LLMs生成的类比在多数情况下被判定为有用（中位数评分4/5），约80%案例引发问题表述变化；但约25%输出存在潜在有害内容（主要为令人不适信息）。
AI.conclusion: LLMs具备辅助跨领域类比创造的潜力，但需警惕其输出中的潜在风险。
